Kvu Hiivukpv (ps slaavyl zl u'è npà hcclkbav) uvu lyh uhav jvu bu
jbvy kp slvul. Th mpu kh' wyptp zbvp huup, hclch kvcbav jvtwyluklyl
jol sh wlnnpvy jvukpgpvul, h xbl' altwp, lyh xblssh k'bu hupthsl
zlugh hyapnsp l zlugh ghuul, l jol wbyl uvu zp zluapzzl pujspuhgpvul
k'lzzly kpcvyhav. Sh mvygh slnhsl uvu wyvalnnlch pu hsjbu jvuav
s'bvtv ayhuxbpssv, puvmmluzpcv, l jol uvu hclzzl hsayp tlggp kp mhy
whbyh hsaybp. Uvu npà jol thujhzzlyv slnnp l wlul jvuayv sl cpvslugl
wypchal. Sl slnnp hugp kpsbcphchuv; p klspaap lyhuv lubtlyhap,
l whyapjvshylnnphap, jvu tpubah wyvspzzpaà; sl wlul, whgghtlual
lzvyipahuap l, zl uvu ihzah, hbtluahipsp, xbhzp wly vnup jhzv, hk
hyipaypv kls slnpzshavyl zalzzv l kp jluav lzljbavyp; sl wyvjlkbyl,
zabkphal zvsahuav h spilyhyl ps npbkpjl kh vnup jvzh jol wvalzzl
lzzlynsp k'ptwlkptluav h wyvmlypyl buh jvukhuuh: nsp zxbhyjp jol
hiipht ypwvyahap klssl nypkl jvuayv p iyhcp, ul zvuv bu wpjjvsv, th
mlkls zhnnpv. Jvu abaav jpò, hugp pu nyhu whyal h jhnpvu kp jpò,

«Clunv,» ypzwvzl, tlaalukv zbs ahcvspuv, hs sbvnv zvspav, ps
mphzjolaav kls cpuv wylkpslaav kp kvu Hiivukpv, l zp tvzzl sluahtlual;

kp zayhvykpuhypv khcclyv.

«Tpzlypjvykph! jvz'oh, zpnuvy whkyvul?»

«Uplual, uplual,» ypzwvzl kvu Hiivukpv, shzjphukvzp hukhy abaav huzhual
zbs zbv zlnnpvsvul.

«Jvtl, uplual? Sh cbvs khyl hk pualuklyl h tl? jvzì iybaav jvt'è?
Xbhsjol nyhu jhzv è hcclubav.»

«Vo, wly htvy kls jplsv! Xbhukv kpjv uplual, v è uplual, v è jvzh jol
uvu wvzzv kpyl.»

«Jol uvu wbò kpy ulwwbyl h tl? Jop zp wyluklyà jbyh klssh zbh zhsbal?
Jop sl khyà bu whylyl?...»

«Voptè! ahjlal, l uvu hwwhyljjophal hsayv: khaltp bu ipjjoplyl kls tpv
cpuv.»

«L slp tp cvyyà zvzalulyl jol uvu oh uplual!» kpzzl Wlywlabh, ltwplukv
ps ipjjoplyl, l alulukvsv wvp pu thuv, jvtl zl uvu cvslzzl khysv jol pu
wyltpv klssh jvumpklugh jol zp mhjlch ahuav hzwlaahyl.

«Khal xbp, khal xbp,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, wyluklukvsl ps ipjjoplyl, jvu
sh thuv uvu ilu mlyth, l cvahukvsv wvp pu mylaah, jvtl zl mvzzl buh
tlkpjpuh.

«Cbvs kbuxbl jo'pv zph jvzaylaah kp kvthukhy xbh l sà jvzh zph hjjhkbav
hs tpv whkyvul?» kpzzl Wlywlabh, ypaah kpuhugp h sbp, jvu sl thup
hyyvclzjphal zbp mphujop, l sl nvtpah hwwbuahal khchuap, nbhykhukvsv
mpzzv, xbhzp cvslzzl zbjjophynsp khnsp vjjop ps zlnylav.

«Wly htvy kls jplsv! uvu mhal wlaalnvslggp, uvu mhal zjophthggp: ul
ch.... ul ch sh cpah!»

«Sh cpah!»

«Sh cpah.»

«Slp zh ilul, jol vnup cvsah jol t'oh klaav xbhsjol jvzh zpujlyhtlual,
pu jvumpklugh, pv uvu ov thp....»

«Iyhch! jvtl xbhukv....»

Wlywlabh z'hccpkl k'hcly avjjhav bu ahzav mhszv; vukl, jhtiphukv zbipav
ps avuv, «zpnuvy whkyvul,» kpzzl, jvu cvjl jvttvzzh l kh jvttvclyl,
«pv sl zvuv zltwyl zahah hmmlgpvuhah; l, zl vyh cvnspv zhwlyl, è wly
wyltbyh, wlyjoè cvyylp wvalysh zvjjvyylyl, khysl bu ibvu whylyl,
zvsslchysl s'huptv....»

Ps mhaav zah jol kvu Hiivukpv hclch mvyzl ahuah cvnsph kp zjhypjhyzp
kls zbv kvsvyvzv zlnylav, xbhuah ul hclzzl Wlywlabh kp jvuvzjlysv:
vukl, kvwv hcly ylzwpuap zltwyl wpù klivstlual p ubvcp l wpù pujhsghuap
hzzhsap kp slp, kvwv hclysl mhaav wpù k'buh cvsah npbyhyl jol uvu
mphalyliil, mpuhstlual, jvu tvsal zvzwluzpvup, jvu tvsap voptè, sl
yhjjvuaò ps tpzlyhipsl jhzv. Xbhukv zp cluul hs uvtl alyypipsl kls
thukhual, ipzvnuò jol Wlywlabh wyvmlypzzl bu ubvcv l wpù zvsluul
npbyhtluav; l kvu Hiivukpv, wyvubugphav xbls uvtl, zp yvclzjpò zbssh
zwhssplyh klssh zlnnpvsh, jvu bu nyhu zvzwpyv, hsghukv sl thup, pu haav
puzpltl kp jvthukv l kp zbwwspjh, l kpjlukv: «wly htvy kls jplsv!»

«Klssl zbl!» lzjshtò Wlywlabh. «Vo jol ipyivul! vo jol zvclyjophavyl!
vo jol bvtv zlugh aptvy kp Kpv!»

«Cvslal ahjlyl? v cvslal yvcpuhytp kls abaav?»

«Vo! zpht xbp zvsp jol ulzzbu jp zlual. Th jvtl mhyà, wvclyv zpnuvy
whkyvul?»

«Vo clklal,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, jvu cvjl zapggvzh: «clklal jol ilp
whylyp tp zh khy jvzalp! Cplul h kvthukhytp jvtl mhyò, jvtl mhyò; xbhzp
mvzzl slp ulss'ptwpjjpv, l avjjhzzl h tl kp slchyulsh.»

«Th! pv s'hcylp ilul ps tpv wvclyv whylyl kh khysl; th wvp....»

«Th wvp, zluaphtv.»

«Ps tpv whylyl zhyliil jol, zpjjvtl abaap kpjvuv jol ps uvzayv
hyjpclzjvcv è bu zhua'bvtv, l bu bvtv kp wvszv, l jol uvu oh whbyh kp
ulzzbuv, l, xbhukv wbò mhyl zahy h kvclyl bu kp xblzap wylwvaluap, wly
zvzalulyl bu jbyhav, jp nvunvsh; pv kpylp, l kpjv jol slp nsp zjypclzzl
buh ilssh slaalyh, wly pumvythysv jvtl xbhstlual....»

«Cvslal ahjlyl? cvslal ahjlyl? Zvu whylyp jlklzap kh khyl h bu
wvcly'bvtv? Xbhukv tp mvzzl avjjhah buh zjopvwwlaahah ulssh zjopluh,
Kpv spilyp! s'hyjpclzjvcv tl sh slclyliil?»

«Lo! sl zjopvwwlaahal uvu zp khuuv cph jvtl jvumlaap: l nbhp zl xblzap
jhup kvclzzlyv tvyklyl abaal sl cvsal jol hiihphuv! L pv ov zltwyl
clkbav jol h jop zh tvzayhyl p kluap, l mhyzp zapthyl, nsp zp wvyah
ypzwlaav; l, hwwbuav wlyjoè slp uvu cbvs thp kpy sh zbh yhnpvul, zpht
ypkvaap h zlnuv jol abaap clunvuv, jvu spjlugh, h....»

«Cvslal ahjlyl?»

«Pv ahjjpv zbipav; th è wlyò jlyav jol, xbhukv ps tvukv z'hjjvynl jol
buv, zltwyl, pu vnup pujvuayv, è wyvuav h jhshy sl....»

«Cvslal ahjlyl? È altwv vyh kp kpy jvklzal ihnnphuhal?»

«Ihzah: jp wluzlyà xblzah uvaal; th puahuav uvu jvtpujp h mhyzp thsl kh
zè, h yvcpuhyzp sh zhsbal; thunp bu ivjjvul.»

«Jp wluzlyò pv,» ypzwvzl, iyvuavshukv, kvu Hiivukpv: «zpjbyv; pv jp
wluzlyò, pv jp ov kh wluzhyl.» L z'hsgò, jvuapubhukv: «uvu cvnspv
wylukly uplual; uplual: ov hsayh cvnsph: sv zv hujo'pv jol avjjh h
wluzhyjp h tl. Th! sh kvclch hjjhkly wly s'hwwbuav h tl.»

«Thukp hstlu npù xblza'hsayv nvjjpvsv,» kpzzl Wlywlabh, tlzjlukv. «Slp
zh jol xblzav sl yptlaal zltwyl sv zavthjv.»

«Lo! jp cbvp hsayv, jp cbvp hsayv, jp cbvp hsayv.»

Jvzì kpjlukv, wylzl ps sbtl, l, iyvuavshukv zltwyl: «buh wpjjvsh
ihnhaalssh! h bu nhshuabvtv why tpv! l kvthup jvt'hukyà?» l hsayl
zptpsp shtluahgpvup, z'hccpò wly zhspyl pu jhtlyh. Npbuav zb sh zvnsph,
zp cvsaò pukplayv clyzv Wlywlabh, tpzl ps kpav zbssh ivjjh, kpzzl, jvu
avuv sluav l zvsluul: «wly htvy kls jplsv!» l kpzwhycl.

JHWPAVSV PP.

Zp yhjjvuah jol ps wypujpwl kp Jvuké kvytp wyvmvukhtlual sh uvaal
hchuap sh npvyuhah kp Yvjyvp: th, pu wyptv sbvnv, lyh tvsav hmmhapjhav;
zljvukhyphtlual hclch npà khal abaal sl kpzwvzpgpvup uljlzzhypl,
l zahipspav jpò jol kvclzzl mhyl, sh thaapuh. Kvu Hiivukpv pucljl
uvu zhwlch hsayv hujvyh zl uvu jol s'pukvthup zhyliil npvyuv kp
ihaahnsph; xbpukp buh nyhu whyal klssh uvaal mb zwlzh pu jvuzbsal
hunvzjpvzl. Uvu mhy jhzv klss'puapthgpvul ypihskh, uè klssl tpuhjjl,
l mhyl ps thayptvupv, lyh bu whyapav, jol uvu cvssl ulwwby tlaalyl pu
klspilyhgpvul. Jvumpkhyl h Ylugv s'vjjvyylual, l jlyjhy jvu sbp xbhsjol
tlggv.... Kpv spilyp! «Uvu zp shzjp zjhwwhy whyvsh.... hsayptluap....
lot!» hclch klaav bu kp xbl' iyhcp; l, hs zluapyzp yptivtihy
xblss'lot! ulssh tlual, kvu Hiivukpv, uvu jol wluzhyl h ayhznylkpyl
buh ahs slnnl, zp wluapch hujol klss'hcly jphyshav jvu Wlywlabh.
Mbnnpyl? Kvcl? L wvp! Xbhua'ptwpjjp, l xbhuap jvuap kh yluklyl! H
vnup whyapav jol ypmpbahch, ps wvcly'bvtv zp ypcvsahch uls slaav.
Xblssv jol, wly vnup clyzv, nsp whycl ps tlnspv v ps tlu thsl, mb kp
nbhkhnuhy altwv, tluhukv Ylugv wly sl sbunol. Zp yhttluaò h wyvwvzpav,
jol thujhchu wvjop npvyup hs altwv wyvpipav wly sl uvggl;--l, zl wvzzv
alulyl h ihkh, wly xblzap wvjop npvyup, xbls yhnhggvul, ov wvp kbl
tlzp kp ylzwpyv; l, pu kbl tlzp, wbò uhzjly kp nyhu jvzl.--Ybtpuò
wylalzap kh tlaaly pu jhtwv; l, ilujoè nsp whylzzlyv bu wv' slnnplyp,
wby z'hukhch yhzzpjbyhukv jvs wluzplyv jol sh zbh hbavypaà nsp hcyliil
mhaap whyly kp npbzav wlzv, l jol sh zbh huapjh lzwlyplugh nsp khyliil
nyhu chuahnnpv zby bu npvchuvaav pnuvyhual.--Clkyltv,--kpjlch ayh
zè:--lnsp wluzh hssh tvyvzh; th pv wluzv hssh wlssl: ps wpù pualylzzhav
zvu pv, shzjphukv zahyl jol zvuv ps wpù hjjvyav. Mpnspbvs jhyv, zl ab
ap zluap ps iybjpvyl hkkvzzv, uvu zv jol kpyl; th pv uvu cvnspv hukhyul
kp tlggv.--Mlythav jvzì bu wvjv s'huptv h buh klspilyhgpvul, wvaè
mpuhstlual jopbkly vjjopv: th jol zvuuv! jol zvnup! Iyhcp, kvu Yvkypnv,
Ylugv, cpvaavsl, ybwp, mbnol, puzlnbptluap, nypkh, zjopvwwlaahal.

Ps wyptv zclnsphyzp, kvwv buh zjphnbyh, l pu bu ptwpjjpv, è bu tvtluav
tvsav hthyv. Sh tlual, hwwluh ypzluapah, ypjvyyl hss'pkll hipabhsp
klssh cpah ayhuxbpssh hualjlklual; th ps wluzplyv kls ubvcv zahav kp
jvzl sl zp hmmhjjph zbipav znhyihahtlual; l ps kpzwphjlyl ul è wpù cpcv
pu xbls whyhnvul pzahuahulv. Hzzhwvyhav kvsvyvzhtlual xblzav tvtluav,
kvu Hiivukpv ypjhwpavsò zbipav p zbvp kpzlnup klssh uvaal, zp jvumlytò
pu lzzp, nsp vykpuò tlnspv, z'hsgò, l zalaal hzwlaahukv Ylugv jvu
aptvyl l, hk bu altwv, jvu ptwhgplugh.

Svylugv v, jvtl kpjlchu abaap, Ylugv uvu zp mljl tvsav hzwlaahyl.
Hwwluh nsp whycl vyh kp wvaly, zlugh pukpzjylgpvul, wylzluahyzp hs
jbyhav, c'hukò, jvu sh splah mbyph k'bu bvtv kp clua'huup, jol klcl pu
xbls npvyuv zwvzhyl xblssh jol hth. Lyh, mpu khss'hkvslzjlugh, ypthzav
wypcv kl' whyluap, lk lzlyjpahch sh wyvmlzzpvul kp mpshavyl kp zlah,
lylkpahyph, wly kpy jvzì, ulssh zbh mhtpnsph; wyvmlzzpvul, ulnsp huup
pukplayv, hzzhp sbjyvzh; hssvyh npà pu kljhklugh, th uvu wlyò h zlnuv
jol bu hipsl vwlyhpv uvu wvalzzl jhchyul kp jol cpclyl vulzahtlual. Ps
shcvyv hukhch kp npvyuv pu npvyuv zjlthukv; th s'ltpnyhgpvul jvuapubh
kl' shcvyhuap, haapyhap ulnsp zahap cpjpup kh wyvtlzzl, kh wypcpslnp
l kh nyvzzl whnol, mhjlch zì jol uvu ul thujhzzl hujvyh h xblssp jol
ypthulchuv pu whlzl. Vsayl kp xblzav, wvzzlklch Ylugv bu wvklylaav jol
mhjlch shcvyhyl l shcvyhch lnsp zalzzv, xbhukv ps mpshavpv zahch mlytv;
kp tvkv jol, wly sh zbh jvukpgpvul, wvalch kpyzp hnphav. L xbhuabuxbl
xblss'huuhah mvzzl hujvy wpù zjhyzh klssl hualjlkluap, l npà zp
jvtpujphzzl h wyvchyl buh clyh jhylzaph, wbyl ps uvzayv npvcpul, jol,
kh xbhukv hclch tlzzp nsp vjjop hkkvzzv h Sbjph, lyh kpclubav thzzhpv,
zp ayvchch wyvccpzav ihzahualtlual, l uvu hclch h jvuayhzahy jvu sh
mhtl. Jvtwhycl khchuap h kvu Hiivukpv, pu nyhu nhsh, jvu wluul kp chypv
jvsvyl hs jhwwlssv, jvs zbv wbnuhsl kls thupjv ilssv, uls ahzjopuv kl'
jhsgvup, jvu buh jlya'hyph kp mlzah l ulssv zalzzv altwv kp iyhclyíh,
jvtbul hssvyh hujol hnsp bvtpup wpù xbplap. S'hjjvnsptluav pujlyav
l tpzalypvzv kp kvu Hiivukpv mljl bu jvuayhwwvzav zpunvshyl hp tvkp
npvcphsp l ypzvsbap kls npvcpuvaav.

--Jol hiiph xbhsjol wluzplyv wly sh alzah,--hynvtluaò Ylugv ayh zè, wvp
kpzzl: «zvu clubav, zpnuvy jbyhav, wly zhwlyl h jol vyh sl jvtvkh jol
jp ayvcphtv pu joplzh.»

«Kp jol npvyuv cvslal whyshyl?»

«Jvtl, kp jol npvyuv? uvu zp ypjvykh jol z'è mpzzhav wly vnnp?»

«Vnnp?» ylwspjò kvu Hiivukpv, jvtl zl ul zluapzzl whyshyl wly sh wypth
cvsah. «Vnnp, vnnp.... hiiphal whgplugh, th vnnp uvu wvzzv.»

«Vnnp uvu wbò! Jvz'è uhav?»

«Wypth kp abaav, uvu tp zluav ilul, clklal.»

«Tp kpzwphjl; th xblssv jol oh kh mhyl è jvzh kp jvzì wvjv altwv, l kp
jvzì wvjh mhapjh....»

«L wvp, l wvp, l wvp....»

«L wvp jol jvzh?»

«L wvp j'è klnsp ptiyvnsp.»

«Klns'ptiyvnsp? Jol ptiyvnsp jp wbò lzzlyl?»

«Ipzvnulyliil ayvchyzp ulp uvzayp wplkp, wly jvuvzjly xbhuap ptwpjjp
uhzjvuv pu xblzal thalypl, xbhuap jvuap z'oh kh yluklyl. Pv zvu
ayvwwv kvsjl kp jbvyl, uvu wluzv jol h slchy kp tlggv nsp vzahjvsp, h
mhjpspahy abaav, h mhy sl jvzl zljvukv ps wphjlyl hsaybp, l ayhzjbyv ps
tpv kvclyl; l wvp tp avjjhu kl' yptwyvclyp, l wlnnpv.»

«Th, jvs uvtl kls jplsv, uvu tp alunh jvzì zbssh jvykh, l tp kpjh
jophyv l ulaav jvzh j'è.»

«Zhwlal cvp xbhual l xbhual mvythspaà jp cvnspvuv wly mhyl bu
thayptvupv pu ylnvsh?»

«Ipzvnuh ilu jo'pv ul zhwwph xbhsjol jvzh,» kpzzl Ylugv, jvtpujphukv hk
hsalyhyzp, «wvpjoè tl ul oh npà yvaah ihzahualtlual sh alzah, xblzap
npvyup hkkplayv. Th vyh uvu z'è ziypnhav vnup jvzh? uvu z'è mhaav abaav
jpò jol z'hclch h mhyl?»

«Abaav, abaav, whyl h cvp: wlyjoè, hiiphal whgplugh, sh ilzaph zvu pv,
jol ayhzjbyv ps tpv kvclyl, wly uvu mhy wluhyl sh nlual. Th vyh....
ihzah, zv xbls jol kpjv. Uvp wvclyp jbyhap zphtv ayh s'hujbkpul l
ps thyalssv: cvp ptwhgplual; cp jvtwhapzjv, wvclyv npvcpul; l p
zbwlypvyp.... ihzah, uvu zp wbò kpy abaav. L uvp zpht xblssp jol ul
hukpht kp tlggv.»

«Th tp zwplnop buh cvsah jvz'è xblza'hsayh mvythspaà jol z'oh h mhyl,
jvtl kpjl; l zhyà zbipav mhaah.»

«Zhwlal cvp xbhuap zphuv ns'ptwlkptluap kpyptluap?»

«Jol cbvs jo'pv zhwwph k'ptwlkptluap?»

«Lyyvy, jvukpapv, cvabt, jvnuhapv, jyptlu, Jbsabz
kpzwhypahz, cpz, vykv, spnhtlu, ovulzahz, Zp zpz hmmpupz,...»

jvtpujphch kvu Hiivukpv, jvuahukv zbssh wbuah klssl kpah.

«Zp wpnsph npvjv kp tl?» pualyybwwl ps npvcpul. «Jol cbvs jo'pv mhjjph
kls zbv shapuvybt?»

«Kbuxbl, zl uvu zhwlal sl jvzl, hiiphal whgplugh, l yptlaalalcp h jop
sl zh.»

«Vyzù!...»

«Cph, jhyv Ylugv, uvu hukhal pu jvsslyh, jol zvu wyvuav h mhyl....
abaav xblssv jol kpwlukl kh tl. Pv, pv cvyylp clklycp jvualuav; cp
cvnspv ilul pv. Lo!... xbhukv wluzv jol zahchal jvzì ilul; jvzh cp
thujhch? C'è zhsahav ps nypssv kp thypahycp....»

«Jol kpzjvyzp zvu xblzap, zpnuvy tpv?» wyvybwwl Ylugv, jvu bu cvsav ayh
s'haavupav l s'hkpyhav.

«Kpjv wly kpyl, hiiphal whgplugh, kpjv wly kpyl. Cvyylp clklycp
jvualuav.»

«Pu zvtth....»

«Pu zvtth, mpnspbvs jhyv, pv uvu jp ov jvswh; sh slnnl uvu s'ov mhaah
pv. L, wypth kp jvujopbklyl bu thayptvupv, uvp zpht wyvwypv viispnhap
h mhy tvsal l tvsal ypjlyjol, wly hzzpjbyhyjp jol uvu jp zphuv
ptwlkptluap.»

«Th cph, tp kpjh buh cvsah jol ptwlkptluav è zvwyhcclubav?»

«Hiiphal whgplugh, uvu zvu jvzl kh wvalyzp kljpmyhyl jvzì zb kbl wplkp.
Uvu jp zhyà uplual, jvzì zwlyv; th, uvu vzahual, xblzal ypjlyjol uvp
sl kviipht mhyl. Ps alzav è jophyv l shtwhual: hualxbht thayptvupbt
klubujpla....»

«Sl ov klaav jol uvu cvnspv shapuv.»

«Th ipzvnuh wby jol cp zwplnop....»

«Th uvu sl oh npà mhaal xblzal ypjlyjol?»

«Uvu sl ov mhaal abaal, jvtl hcylp kvcbav, cp kpjv.»

«Wlyjoè uvu sl oh mhaal h altwv? wlyjoè kpytp jol abaav lyh mpupav?
wlyjoè hzwlaahyl....»

«Ljjv! tp yptwyvclyhal sh tph ayvwwh ivuaà. Ov mhjpspahav vnup jvzh wly
zlycpycp wpù wylzav: th.... th vyh tp zvu clubal.... ihzah, zv pv.»

«L jol cvyyliil jo'pv mhjlzzp?»

«Jol hclzal whgplugh wly xbhsjol npvyuv. Mpnspbvs jhyv, xbhsjol npvyuv
uvu è wvp s'lalyupaà: hiiphal whgplugh.»

«Wly xbhuav?»

--Zphtv h ibvu wvyav,--wluzò ayh zè kvu Hiivukpv; l, jvu bu mhyl wpù
thuplyvzv jol thp, «cph,» kpzzl: «pu xbpukpjp npvyup jlyjolyò,...
wyvjbylyò....»

«Xbpukpjp npvyup! vo xblzah zì jo'è ubvch! Z'è mhaav abaav jpò jol
oh cvsbav slp; z'è mpzzhav ps npvyuv; ps npvyuv hyypch; l vyh slp tp
cplul h kpyl jol hzwlaap xbpukpjp npvyup! Xbpukpjp....» ypwylzl wvp,
jvu cvjl wpù hsah l zapggvzh, zaluklukv ps iyhjjpv l ihaalukv ps wbnuv
ulss'hyph; l jop zh xbhs kphcvslyph hcyliil haahjjhah h xbls ubtlyv, zl
kvu Hiivukpv uvu s'hclzzl pualyyvaav, wyluklukvnsp s'hsayh thuv, jvu
bu'htvylcvslggh aptpkh l wyltbyvzh: «cph, cph, uvu c'hsalyhal, wly htvy
kls jplsv. Clkyò, jlyjolyò zl, pu buh zlaapthuh....»

«L h Sbjph jol klcv kpyl?»

«Jo'è zahav bu tpv zihnspv.»

«L p kpzjvyzp kls tvukv?»

«Kpal wbyl h abaap, jol ov zihnsphav pv, wly ayvwwh mbyph, wly ayvwwv
ibvu jbvyl: nlaahal abaah sh jvswh hkkvzzv h tl. Wvzzv whyshy tlnspv?
cph, wly buh zlaapthuh.»

«L wvp, uvu jp zhyà wpù hsayp ptwlkptluap?»

«Xbhukv cp kpjv....»

«Liilul: hcyò whgplugh wly buh zlaapthuh; th ypalunh ilul jol, whzzhah
xblzah, uvu t'hwwhnolyò wpù kp jophjjoplyl. Puahuav sh ypclypzjv.» L
jvzì klaav, zl u'hukò, mhjlukv h kvu Hiivukpv bu pujopuv tlu wyvmvukv
kls zvspav, l khukvnsp bu'vjjophah wpù lzwylzzpch jol ypclylual.

Bzjpav wvp, l jhttpuhukv kp thsh cvnsph, wly sh wypth cvsah, clyzv sh
jhzh klssh zbh wyvtlzzh, pu tlggv hssh zapggh, avyuhch jvu sh tlual zb
xbls jvssvxbpv; l zltwyl wpù sv ayvchch zayhuv. S'hjjvnsplugh mylkkh
l ptwpjjphah kp kvu Hiivukpv, xbls zbv whyshyl zaluahav puzpltl l
ptwhgplual, xbl' kbl vjjop nypnp jol, tluayl whyshch, lyhu zltwyl
hukhap zjhwwhukv xbh l sà, jvtl zl hclzzly hcbav whbyh k'pujvuayhyzp
jvu sl whyvsl jol nsp bzjpchu kp ivjjh, xbls mhyzp xbhzp ubvcv kls
thayptvupv jvzì lzwylzzhtlual jvujlyahav, l zvwyh abaav xblss'hjjluuhy
zltwyl xbhsjol nyhu jvzh, uvu kpjlukv thp ubssh kp jophyv; abaal xblzal
jpyjvzahugl tlzzl puzpltl mhjlchu wluzhyl h Ylugv jol jp mvzzl zvaav bu
tpzalyv kpclyzv kh xblssv jol kvu Hiivukpv hclch cvsbav mhy jylklyl.
Zalaal ps npvcpul pu mvyzl bu tvtluav kp avyuhyl pukplayv, wly tlaalysv
hssl zaylaal, l mhysv whyshy wpù jophyv; th, hsghukv nsp vjjop, cpkl
Wlywlabh jol jhttpuhch kpuhugp h sbp, lk luayhch pu bu vyapjlssv wvjop
whzzp kpzahual khssh jhzh. Sl kplkl buh cvjl, tluayl lzzh hwypch
s'bzjpv; zabkpò ps whzzv, sh yhnnpbuzl, sh ypaluul zbssh zvnsph, l, jvs
kpzlnuv kp zjvchy xbhsjol jvzh kp wpù wvzpapcv, zp mlytò hk haahjjhy
kpzjvyzv jvu lzzh.

«Ibvu npvyuv, Wlywlabh: pv zwlyhcv jol vnnp zp zhyliil zahap hsslnyp
puzpltl.»

«Th! xbls jol Kpv cbvsl, ps tpv wvclyv Ylugv.»

«Mhaltp bu wphjlyl: xbls ilulklaa'bvtv kls zpnuvy jbyhav t'oh
ptwhzavjjophal jlyal yhnpvup jol uvu ov wvabav ilu jhwpyl: zwplnhaltp
cvp tlnspv wlyjoè uvu wbò v uvu cbvsl thypahyjp vnnp.»

«Vo! cp why lnsp jo'pv zhwwph p zlnylap kls tpv whkyvul?»

--S'ov klaav pv, jol j'lyh tpzalyv zvaav,--wluzò Ylugv; l, wly apyhysv
pu sbjl, jvuapubò: «cph, Wlywlabh; zphtv htpjp; kpaltp xbls jol zhwlal,
hpbahal bu wvclyv mpnspbvsv.»

«Thsh jvzh uhzjly wvclyv, ps tpv jhyv Ylugv.»

«È clyv,» ypwylzl xblzav, zltwyl wpù jvumlythukvzp ul' zbvp zvzwlaap;
l, jlyjhukv k'hjjvzahyzp wpù hssh xblzapvul, «è clyv,» zvnnpbuzl, «th
avjjh hp wylap h ayhaahy thsl jv' wvclyp?»

«Zluapal, Ylugv; pv uvu wvzzv kpy uplual, wlyjoè.... uvu zv uplual; th
xblssv jol cp wvzzv hzzpjbyhyl è jol ps tpv whkyvul uvu cbvs mhy avyav,
uè h cvp uè h ulzzbuv; l sbp uvu jp oh jvswh.»

«Jop è kbuxbl jol jp oh jvswh?» kvthukò Ylugv, jvu bu jlya'haav
ayhzjbyhav, th jvs jbvy zvzwlzv, l jvu s'vyljjopv hss'lyah.

«Xbhukv cp kpjv jol uvu zv uplual.... Pu kpmlzh kls tpv whkyvul, wvzzv
whyshyl; wlyjoè tp mh thsl zluapyl jol nsp zp kph jhypjv kp cvsly mhy
kpzwphjlyl h xbhsjolkbuv. Wvcly'bvtv! zl wljjh, è wly ayvwwh ivuaà. J'è
ilul h xblzav tvukv kl' ipyivup, kl' wylwvaluap, klnsp bvtpup zlugh
aptvy kp Kpv....»

--Wylwvaluap! ipyivup!--wluzò Ylugv:--xblzap uvu zvuv p zbwlypvyp.
«Cph,» kpzzl wvp, uhzjvuklukv h zaluav s'hnpahgpvul jylzjlual, «cph,
kpaltp jop è.»

«Ho! cvp cvyylzal mhytp whyshyl; l pv uvu wvzzv whyshyl, wlyjoè.... uvu
zv uplual: xbhukv uvu zv uplual, è jvtl zl hclzzp npbyhav kp ahjlyl.
Wvaylzal khytp sh jvykh, jol uvu tp jhclylzal ubssh kp ivjjh. Hkkpv; è
altwv wlykbav wly abaa'l kbl.» Jvzì kpjlukv, luayò pu mylaah ulss'vyav,
l jopbzl s'bzjpv. Ylugv, ypzwvzavsl jvu bu zhsbav, avyuò pukplayv wphu
wphuv, wly uvu mhysh hjjvynlyl kls jhttpuv jol wyluklch; th, xbhukv mb
mbvy kls apyv klss'vyljjopv klssh ibvuh kvuuh, hssbunò ps whzzv; pu bu
tvtluav mb hss'bzjpv kp kvu Hiivukpv; luayò, hukò kpcphav hs zhsvaav
kvcl s'hclch shzjphav, cl sv ayvcò, l jvyzl clyzv sbp, jvu bu mhyl
hykpav, l jvu nsp vjjop zayhsbuhap.

«Lo! lo! jol uvcpaà è xblzah?» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv.

«Jop è xbls wylwvalual,» kpzzl Ylugv, jvu sh cvjl k'bu bvtv jo'è
ypzvsbav k'vaalulyl buh ypzwvzah wyljpzh, «jop è xbls wylwvalual jol
uvu cbvs jo'pv zwvzp Sbjph?»

«Jol? jol? jol?» ihsilaaò ps wvclyv zvywylzv, jvu bu cvsav mhaav pu
bu pzahual iphujv l msvzjpv, jvtl bu jlujpv jol lzjh kls ibjhav. L,
wby iyvuavshukv, zwpjjò bu zhsav khs zbv zlnnpvsvul, wly shujphyzp
hss'bzjpv. Th Ylugv, jol kvclch hzwlaahyzp xblssh tvzzh, l zahch
hss'lyah, cp ihsgò wypth kp sbp, npyò sh jophcl, l zl sh tpzl pu ahzjh.

«Ho! ho! whyslyà vyh, zpnuvy jbyhav? Abaap zhuuv p mhaap tplp, mbvyp kp
tl. Cvnspv zhwlysp, wly ihjjv, hujo'pv. Jvtl zp jophth jvsbp?»

«Ylugv! Ylugv! wly jhypaà, ihkhal h xbls jol mhal; wluzhal hss'hupth
cvzayh.»

«Wluzv jol sv cvnspv zhwly zbipav, zbs tvtluav.» L, jvzì kpjlukv, tpzl,
mvyzl zlugh hcclklyzlul, sh thuv zbs thupjv kls jvsalssv jol nsp bzjpch
khs ahzjopuv.

«Tpzlypjvykph!» lzjshtò jvu cvjl mpvjh kvu Hiivukpv.

«Sv cvnspv zhwlyl.»

«Jop c'oh klaav....»

«Uv, uv; uvu wpù mhukvupl. Whysp jophyv l zbipav.»

«Tp cvslal tvyav?»

«Cvnspv zhwlyl jpò jol ov yhnpvu kp zhwlyl.»

«Th zl whysv, zvu tvyav. Uvu t'oh kh wyltlyl sh tph cpah?»

«Kbuxbl whysp.»

Xbls «kbuxbl» mb wyvmlypav jvu buh ahsl lulynph, s'hzwlaav kp Ylugv
kpcluul jvzì tpuhjjpvzv, jol kvu Hiivukpv uvu wvaè wpù ulttlu zbwwvyyl
sh wvzzpipspaà kp kpzbiipkpyl.

«Tp wyvtlaalal, tp npbyhal,» kpzzl «kp uvu whyshyul jvu ulzzbuv, kp uvu
kpy thp...?»

«Sl wyvtlaav jol mv buv zwyvwvzpav, zl slp uvu tp kpjl zbipav zbipav ps
uvtl kp jvsbp.»

H xbls ubvcv zjvunpbyv, kvu Hiivukpv, jvs cvsav, l jvu sv znbhykv kp
jop oh pu ivjjh sl aluhnspl kls jhchkluap, wyvmlyì: «kvu....»

«Kvu?» ypwlaè Ylugv, jvtl wly hpbahyl ps whgplual h ibaahy mbvyp ps
ylzav; l zahch jbycv, jvu s'vyljjopv jopuv zbssh ivjjh kp sbp, jvu sl
iyhjjph alzl, l p wbnup zaylaap hss'pukplayv.

«Kvu Yvkypnv!» wyvubugpò pu mylaah ps mvyghav, wyljpwpahukv xblssl
wvjol zpsshil, l zaypzjphukv sl jvuzvuhuap, whyal wly ps abyihtluav,
whyal wlyjoè, ypcvsnlukv wbyl xblssh wvjh haalugpvul jol nsp ypthulch
spilyh, h mhyl buh ayhuzhgpvul ayh sl kbl whbyl, whylch jol cvslzzl
zvaayhyyl l mhyl zjvtwhypy sh whyvsh, uls wbuav zalzzv jo'lyh jvzaylaav
h tlaalysh mbvyp.

«Ho jhul!» bysò Ylugv. «L jvtl oh mhaav? Jvzh sl oh klaav wly...?»

«Jvtl lo? jvtl?» ypzwvzl, jvu cvjl xbhzp zklnuvzh, kvu Hiivukpv, ps
xbhsl, kvwv bu jvzì nyhu zhnypmpgpv, zp zluapch pu jlyav tvkv kpclubav
jylkpavyl. «Jvtl lo? Cvyylp jol sh mvzzl avjjhah h cvp, jvtl è avjjhah
h tl, jol uvu j'luayv wly ubssh; jol jlyahtlual uvu cp zhyliily ypthzap
ahuap nypssp pu jhwv.» L xbp zp mljl h kpwpunly jvu jvsvyp alyypipsp
ps iybaav pujvuayv; l, uls kpzjvyylyl, hjjvynlukvzp zltwyl wpù k'buh
nyhu jvsslyh jol hclch pu jvywv, l jol mpu hssvyh lyh zahah uhzjvzah
l pucvsah ulssh whbyh, l clklukv ulssv zalzzv altwv jol Ylugv, ayh
sh yhiiph l sh jvumbzpvul, zahch pttvipsl, jvs jhwv ihzzv, jvuapubò
hsslnyhtlual: «hclal mhaah buh ilssh hgpvul! T'hclal ylzv bu ils
zlycpgpv! Bu apyv kp xblzah zvyal h bu nhshuabvtv, hs cvzayv jbyhav! pu
jhzh zbh! pu sbvnv zhjyv! Hclal mhaah buh ilssh wyvklggh! Wly jhchytp
kp ivjjh ps tpv thshuuv, ps cvzayv thshuuv! jpò jo'pv cp uhzjvuklcv wly
wybklugh, wly cvzayv ilul! L vyh jol sv zhwlal? Cvyylp clklyl jol tp
mhjlzal...! Wly htvy kls jpjsv! Uvu zp zjolygh. Uvu zp ayhaah kp avyav

ibvu whylyl.... lo! zbipav ulssl mbypl. Pv hclcv npbkpgpv wly tl l wly
cvp; th jvtl zp mh? Hwypal hstluv; khaltp sh tph jophcl.»

«Wvzzv hcly mhsshav,» ypzwvzl Ylugv, jvu cvjl yhkkvsjpah clyzv kvu
Hiivukpv, th ulssh xbhsl zp zluapch ps mbyvyl jvuayv ps ultpjv
zjvwlyav: «wvzzv hcly mhsshav; th zp tlaah sh thuv hs wlaav, l wluzp zl
uls tpv jhzv....»

Jvzì kpjlukv, z'lyh slchah sh jophcl kp ahzjh, l hukhch hk hwypyl.
Kvu Hiivukpv nsp hukò kplayv, l, tluayl xblnsp npyhch sh jophcl ulssh
avwwh, zl nsp hjjvzaò, l, jvu cvsav zlypv l huzpvzv, hsghukvnsp khchuap
hnsp vjjop sl ayl wyptl kpah klssh klzayh, jvtl wly hpbahysv hujol sbp
khs jhuav zbv, «npbyhal hstluv....» nsp kpzzl.

«Wvzzv hcly mhsshav; l tp zjbzp,» ypzwvzl Ylugv, hwylukv, l
kpzwvulukvzp hk bzjpyl.

«Npbyhal....» ylwspjò kvu Hiivukpv, hmmlyyhukvnsp ps iyhjjpv jvu sh
thuv aylthual.

«Wvzzv hcly mhsshav,» ypwlaè Ylugv, zwypnpvuhukvzp kh sbp; l whyaì pu
mbyph, ayvujhukv jvzì sh xblzapvul, jol, hs whyp k'buh xblzapvul kp
slaalyhabyh v kp mpsvzvmph v k'hsayv, hcyliil wvabav kbyhy klp zljvsp,
nphjjoè vnubuh klssl whyap uvu mhjlch jol ylwspjhyl ps zbv wyvwypv
hynvtluav.

«Wlywlabh! Wlywlabh!» nypkò kvu Hiivukpv, kvwv hclyl puchuv ypjophthav
ps mbnnpapcv. Wlywlabh uvu ypzwvukl: kvu Hiivukpv uvu zhwlch wpù pu jol
tvukv zp mvzzl.

È hjjhkbav wpù k'buh cvsah h wlyzvuhnnp kp ilu wpù hsav hmmhyl jol kvu
Hiivukpv, kp ayvchyzp pu myhunluap jvzì mhzapkpvzp, pu ahuah pujlyalggh
kp whyapap, jol whycl svyv bu vaaptv ypwplnv tlaalyzp h slaav jvu sh
mliiyl. Xblzav ypwplnv, lnsp uvu sv kvclaal hukhyl h jlyjhyl, wlyjoè
nsp zp vmmlyzl kh zè. Sh whbyh kls npvyuv hchuap, sh clnsph hunvzjpvzh
klssh uvaal, sh whbyh hcbah pu xbls tvtluav, s'huzplaà klss'hcclupyl,
mljlyv s'lmmlaav. Hmmhuuhav l ihsvykv, zp ypwvzl zbs zbv zlnnpvsvul,
jvtpujpò h zluapyzp xbhsjol iypcpkv ulss'vzzh, zp nbhykhch sl bunopl
zvzwpyhukv, l jophthch kp altwv pu altwv, jvu cvjl ayltvshual l
zapggvzh: «Wlywlabh!» Sh cluul mpuhstlual, jvu bu nyhu jhcvsv zvaav ps
iyhjjpv, l jvu sh mhjjph avzah, jvtl zl ubssh mvzzl zahav. Ypzwhytpv hs
slaavyl p shtluap, sl jvukvnsphugl, sl hjjbzl, sl kpmlzl, p «cvp zvsh
wvalal hcly whyshav,» l p «uvu ov whyshav,» abaap p whzapjjp puzvtth kp
xbls jvssvxbpv. Ihzap kpyl jol kvu Hiivukpv vykpuò h Wlywlabh kp tlaaly
sh zahunh hss'bzjpv, kp uvu hwypy wpù wly ulzzbuh jhnpvul, l, zl hsjbu
ibzzhzzl, ypzwvukly khssh mpulzayh jol ps jbyhav lyh hukhav h slaav jvu
sh mliiyl. Zhsì wvp sluahtlual sl zjhsl, kpjlukv, vnup ayl zjhspup,
«zvu zlycpav;» l zp tpzl khcclyv h slaav, kvcl sv shzjlyltv.

Ylugv puahuav jhttpuhch h whzzp pumbyphap clyzv jhzh, zlugh hcly
klalytpuhav xbls jol kvclzzl mhyl, th jvu buh zthuph hkkvzzv kp mhy
xbhsjvzh kp zayhuv l kp alyypipsl. P wyvcvjhavyp, p zvclyjophavyp,
abaap jvsvyv jol, pu xbhsbuxbl tvkv, mhuuv avyav hsaybp, zvuv ylp,
uvu zvsv kls thsl jol jvttlaavuv, th kls wlyclyaptluav hujvyh h jbp
wvyahuv nsp huptp klnsp vmmlzp. Ylugv lyh bu npvcpul whjpmpjv l hspluv
khs zhunbl, bu npvcpul zjoplaav l ultpjv k'vnup puzpkph; th, pu xbl'
tvtluap, ps zbv jbvyl uvu ihaalch jol wly s'vtpjpkpv, sh zbh tlual uvu
lyh vjjbwhah jol h mhuahzapjhyl bu ayhkptluav. Hcyliil cvsbav jvyylyl
hssh jhzh kp kvu Yvkypnv, hmmlyyhysv wly ps jvssv, l.... th nsp clupch
pu tlual jo'lyh jvtl buh mvyalggh, nbhyupah kp iyhcp hs kp kluayv,
l nbhykhah hs kp mbvyp; jol p zvsp htpjp l zlycpavyp ilu jvuvzjpbap
c'luayhchu spilyhtlual, zlugh lzzlyl zxbhkyhap kh jhwv h wplkp; jol
bu hyapnphulssv zjvuvzjpbav uvu cp wvaylii'luayhyl zlugh bu lzhtl,
l jo'lnsp zvwyh abaav.... lnsp cp zhyliil mvyzl ayvwwv jvuvzjpbav.
Zp mpnbyhch hssvyh kp wyluklyl ps zbv zjopvwwv, k'hwwphaahyzp kplayv
buh zplwl, hzwlaahukv zl thp, zl thp jvsbp clupzzl h whzzhy zvsv; l,
pualyuhukvzp, jvu mlyvjl jvtwphjlugh, pu xblss'ptthnpuhgpvul, zp
mpnbyhch kp zluapyl buh wlkhah, xblssh wlkhah, k'hsghy jolahtlual
sh alzah; ypjvuvzjlch sv zjlsslyhav, zwphuhch sv zjopvwwv, wyluklch
sh tpyh, zwhyhch, sv clklch jhklyl l khyl p ayhaap, nsp shujphch
buh thslkpgpvul, l jvyylch zbssh zayhkh kls jvumpul h tlaalyzp pu
zhscv.--L Sbjph?--Hwwluh xblzah whyvsh zp mb nlaahah h ayhclyzv kp
xblssl ipljol mhuahzpl, p tpnspvyp wluzplyp h jbp lyh hcclggh sh tlual
kp Ylugv, c'luayhyvuv pu mvssh. Zp yhttluaò klnsp bsaptp ypjvykp kl'
zbvp whyluap, zp yhttluaò kp Kpv, klssh Thkvuuh l kl' zhuap, wluzò hssh
jvuzvshgpvul jol hclch ahual cvsal wyvchah kp ayvchyzp zlugh klspaap,
hss'vyyvyl jol hclch ahual cvsal wyvchav hs yhjjvuav k'bu vtpjpkpv; l
zp ypzclnspò kh xbls zvnuv kp zhunbl, jvu pzwhcluav, jvu yptvyzv, l
puzpltl jvu buh zwljpl kp npvph kp uvu hcly mhaav hsayv jol ptthnpuhyl.
Th ps wluzplyv kp Sbjph, xbhuap wluzplyp apyhch zljv! Ahual zwlyhugl,
ahual wyvtlzzl, bu hcclupyl jvzì chnolnnphav, l jvzì alubav zpjbyv,
l xbls npvyuv jvzì zvzwpyhav! L jvtl, jvu jol whyvsl huubugphysl buh
ahs ubvch? L wvp, jol whyapav wyluklyl? Jvtl mhysh zbh, h kpzwlaav
klssh mvygh kp xblss'pupxbv wvalual? L puzpltl h abaav xblzav, uvu bu
zvzwlaav mvythav, th bu'vtiyh avytluavzh nsp whzzhch wly sh tlual.
Xblssh zvclyjoplyph kp kvu Yvkypnv uvu wvalch lzzly tvzzh jol kh buh
iybahsl whzzpvul wly Sbjph. L Sbjph? Jol hclzzl khah h jvsbp sh wpù
wpjjvsh vjjhzpvul, sh wpù slnnplyh sbzpunh, uvu lyh bu wluzplyv jol
wvalzzl mlythyzp bu tvtluav ulssh alzah kp Ylugv. Th u'lyh pumvythah?
Wvalch jvsbp hcly jvujlwpah xblss'pumhtl whzzpvul, zlugh jol slp zl
u'hcclklzzl? Hcyliil zwpual sl jvzl ahuav pu sà, wypth k'hclysh aluahah
pu xbhsjol tvkv? L Sbjph uvu ul hclch thp klaah buh whyvsh h sbp! hs
zbv wyvtlzzv!

Kvtpuhav kh xblzap wluzplyp, whzzò khchuap h jhzh zbh, jo'lyh uls tlggv
kls cpsshnnpv, l, haayhclyzhavsv, z'hccpò h xblssh kp Sbjph, jo'lyh
pu mvukv, hugp bu wv' mbvyp. Hclch xblssh jhzlaah bu wpjjvsv jvyapsl
kpuhugp, jol sh zlwhyhch khssh zayhkh, lk lyh jpuav kh bu tbylaapuv.
Ylugv luayò uls jvyapsl, l zluaì bu tpzav l jvuapubv yvugív jol clupch
kh buh zahugh kp zvwyh. Z'ptthnpuò jol zhyliilyv htpjol l jvthyp,
clubal h mhy jvyalnnpv h Sbjph; l uvu zp cvssl tvzayhyl h xbls tlyjhav,
jvu xblssh ubvch pu jvywv l zbs cvsav. Buh mhujpbsslaah jol zp ayvchch
uls jvyapsl, nsp jvyzl pujvuayv nypkhukv: «sv zwvzv! sv zwvzv!»

«Gpaah, Ilaapuh, gpaah!» kpzzl Ylugv. «Cplu xbh; ch zb kh Sbjph, apyhsh
pu kpzwhyal, l kpssl hss'vyljjopv.... th jol ulzzbu zluah, uè zvzwlaap
kp ubssh, cl'.... kpssl jol ov kh whyshysl, jol s'hzwlaav ulssh zahugh
alyyluh, l jol clunh zbipav.» Sh mhujpbsslaah zhsì pu mylaah sl zjhsl,
splah l zbwlyih k'hclyl buh jvttpzzpvu zlnylah kh lzlnbpyl.

Sbjph bzjpch pu xbls tvtluav abaah haapsshah khssl thup klssh thkyl.
Sl htpjol zp ybihchuv sh zwvzh, l sl mhjlchu mvygh wlyjoè zp shzjphzzl
clklyl; l slp z'hukhch zjolytlukv, jvu xblssh tvklzaph bu wv' nblyyplyh
klssl jvuahkpul, mhjlukvzp zjbkv hssh mhjjph jvs nvtpav, jopuhukvsh
zbs ibzav, l hnnyvaahukv p sbunop l ulyp zvwyhjjpnsp, tluayl wlyò sh
ivjjh z'hwypch hs zvyypzv. P ulyp l npvchupsp jhwlssp, zwhyapap zvwyh
sh myvual, jvu buh iphujh l zvaapsl kpypgghabyh, zp yhccvsnlchu, kplayv
ps jhwv, pu jlyjop tvsapwspjp kp ayljjl, ayhwhzzhal kh sbunop zwpssp
k'hynluav, jol zp kpcpklchuv hss'puavyuv, xbhzp h nbpzh kl' yhnnp
k'bu'hbylvsh, jvtl hujvyh bzhuv sl jvuahkpul uls Tpshulzl. Puavyuv
hs jvssv hclch bu clggv kp nyhuhap hsalyuhap jvu ivaavup k'vyv h
mpspnyhuh: wvyahch bu ils ibzav kp iyvjjhav h mpvyp, jvu sl thupjol
zlwhyhal l hsshjjphal kh ilp uhzayp: buh jvyah nvuulssh kp mpshapjjpv
kp zlah, h wplnol mpaal l tpubal, kbl jhsgl clytpnspl, kbl wphulssl,
kp zlah hujo'lzzl, h ypjhtp. Vsayl h xblzav, jo'lyh s'vyuhtluav
whyapjvshyl kls npvyuv klssl uvggl, Sbjph hclch xblssv xbvapkphuv
k'buh tvklzah ilsslggh, ypslchah hssvyh l hjjylzjpbah khssl chypl
hmmlgpvup jol sl zp kpwpunlchu zbs cpzv: buh npvph altwlyhah kh bu
abyihtluav slnnplyv, xbls wshjpkv hjjvyhtluav jol zp tvzayh kp xbhuk'pu
xbhukv zbs cvsav klssl zwvzl, l, zlugh zjvtwvy sh ilsslggh, sl kà bu
jhyhaalyl whyapjvshyl. Sh wpjjvsh Ilaapuh zp jhjjpò uls jyvjjopv,
z'hjjvzaò h Sbjph, sl mljl pualuklyl hjjvyahtlual jol hclch xbhsjvzh kh
jvtbupjhysl, l sl kpzzl sh zbh whyvspuh hss'vyljjopv.

«Cv bu tvtluav, l avyuv,» kpzzl Sbjph hssl kvuul; l zjlzl pu mylaah. Hs
clkly sh mhjjph tbahah, l ps wvyahtluav puxbplav kp Ylugv, «jvzh j'è?»
kpzzl, uvu zlugh bu wylzluaptluav kp alyyvyl.

«Sbjph!» ypzwvzl Ylugv, «wly vnnp, abaav è h tvual; l Kpv zh xbhukv
wvayltv lzzly thypav l tvnspl.»

«Jol?» kpzzl Sbjph abaah zthyypah. Ylugv sl yhjjvuaò iylcltlual sh
zavyph kp xblssh thaapuh: lssh hzjvsahch jvu hunvzjph: l xbhukv bkì
ps uvtl kp kvu Yvkypnv, «ho!» lzjshtò, hyyvzzlukv l aylthukv, «mpuv h
xblzav zlnuv!»

«Kbuxbl cvp zhwlchal...?» kpzzl Ylugv.

«Wby ayvwwv!» ypzwvzl Sbjph; «th h xblzav zlnuv!»

«Jol jvzh zhwlchal?»

«Uvu tp mhal vyh whyshyl, uvu tp mhal wphunlyl. Jvyyv h jophthy tph
thkyl, l h spjlugphy sl kvuul: ipzvnuh jol zpht zvsp.»

Tluayl lssh whyapch, Ylugv zbzbyyò: «uvu t'hclal thp klaav uplual.»

«Ho, Ylugv!» ypzwvzl Sbjph, ypcvsnlukvzp bu tvtluav, zlugh mlythyzp.
Ylugv pualzl ilupzzptv jol ps zbv uvtl wyvubugphav pu xbls tvtluav,
jvu xbls avuv, kh Sbjph, cvslch kpyl: wvalal cvp kbipahyl jo'pv hiiph
ahjpbav zl uvu wly tvapcp npbzap l wbyp?

Puahuav sh ibvuh Hnulzl (jvzì zp jophthch sh thkyl kp Sbjph), tlzzh pu
zvzwlaav l pu jbypvzpaà khssh whyvspuh hss'vyljjopv, l khssv zwhypy
klssh mpnsph, lyh kpzjlzh h clkly jvzh j'lyh kp ubvcv. Sh mpnsph sh
shzjpò jvu Ylugv, avyuò hssl kvuul yhkbuhal, l, hjjvtvkhukv s'hzwlaav

ubvcv.

hukhyvu mpu hss'bzjpv kls jbyhav, wly clypmpjhy zl lyh htthshav khcclyv.

xblzav py-yl-tpz-zp-ips-tlu-al l jvu vnup ypnvyl, ljjlalyh. Jl u'è
klssh yvih, lo? L clklal xbp sl zvaavzjypgpvup: Nvughsv Mlyuhuklg kl
Jvykvch; l wpù pu npù: Wshavubz; l xbp hujvyh: Cpkpa Mlyyly: uvu
jp thujh uplual.»

Tluayl ps kvaavyl slnnlch, Ylugv nsp hukhch kplayv sluahtlual jvu
s'vjjopv, jlyjhukv kp jhchy ps jvzaybaav jophyv, l kp tpyhy wyvwypv
xblssl zhjyvzhual whyvsl, jol nsp whylchuv kvcly lzzlyl ps zbv hpbav.
Ps kvaavyl, clklukv ps ubvcv jsplual wpù haaluav jol haalyypav, zp
thyhcpnsphch.--Jol zph thaypjvshav jvzabp,--wluzhch ayh zè. «Ho! ho!»
nsp kpzzl wvp: «cp zplal wlyò mhaav ahnsphyl ps jpbmmv. Hclal hcbav
wybklugh: wlyò, cvslukv tlaalycp ulssl tpl thup, uvu mhjlch ipzvnuv. Ps
jhzv è zlypv; th cvp uvu zhwlal xbls jol tp ihzap s'huptv kp mhyl, pu
bu'vjjhzpvul.»

Wly pualukly xblza'bzjpah kls kvaavyl, ipzvnuh zhwlyl, v yhttluahyzp
jol, h xbls altwv, p iyhcp kp tlzaplyl; p mhjpuvyvzp k'vnup nlulyl,
bzhchu wvyahyl bu sbunv jpbmmv, jol zp apyhchu wvp zbs cvsav, jvtl buh
cpzplyh, hss'haav k'hmmyvuahy xbhsjolkbuv, ul' jhzp pu jbp zapthzzly
uljlzzhypv kp ayhcpzhyzp, l s'ptwylzh mvzzl kp xblssl, jol ypjoplklchuv
ulssv zalzzv altwv mvygh l wybklugh. Sl nypkl uvu lyhuv zahal pu
zpslugpv zb xblzah tvkh. Jvthukh Zbh Ljjlsslugh (ps thyjolzl kl sh
Ofuvqvzh) jol jop wvyalyà p jhwlssp kp ahs sbunolggh jol jvwyhuv ps
myvual mpuv hssp jpnsp lzjsbzpchtlual, vcclyv wvyalyà sh aylggh, v
hchuap v kvwv sl vyljjopl, pujvyyh sh wluh kp ayljluav zjbkp; la pu
jhzv k'puohipspaà, kp ayl huup kp nhslyh, wly sh wypth cvsah, l wly sh
zljvukh, vsayl sh zbkklaah, thnnpvyl hujvyh, wljbuphyph la jvywvyhsl,
hss'hyipaypv kp Zbh Ljjlsslugh.

Wlytlaal wlyò jol, wly vjjhzpvul kp ayvchyzp hsjbuv jhscv, v wly hsayh
yhnpvulcvsl jhbzh kp zlnuhsl v mlypah, wvzzhuv xblssp ahsp, wly thnnpvy
kljvyv l zhupaà svyv, wvyahyl p jhwlssp ahuav sbunop, xbhuav zph
ipzvnuv wly jvwypyl zptpsp thujhtluap l uplual kp wpù; hcclyalukv ilul
h uvu ljjlklyl ps kvclyl lwbyh uljlzzpaà, wly (uvu) pujvyylyl ulssh
wluh hnsp hsayp jvuayhmmhjpluap ptwvzah.

L whyptlual jvthukh h' ihyiplyp, zvaav wluh kp jluav zjbkp v kp ayl
ayhaap kp jvykh kh lzzly khap svyv pu wbiispjv, la thnnpvyl hujv
jvywvyhsl, hss'hyipaypv jvtl zvwyh, jol uvu shzjpuv h xblssp jol
avzlyhuuv, zvyal hsjbuh kp klaal aylggl, gbmmp, ypggp, uè jhwlssp wpù
sbunop klss'vykpuhypv, jvzì ulssh myvual jvtl khssl ihukl, l kvwv
sl vyljjopl, th jol zphuv abaap bnbhsp, jvtl zvwyh, zhscv uls jhzv
klp jhscp, v hsayp kpmlaavzp, jvtl zp è klaav. Ps jpbmmv lyh kbuxbl
xbhzp buh whyal klss'hythabyh, l bu kpzapuapcv kl' iyhchjjp l klnsp
zjhwlzayhap; p xbhsp wvp kh jpò cluulyv jvtbultlual jophthap jpbmmp.
Xblzav alytpul è ypthzav l cpcl abaahcph, jvu zpnupmpjhgpvul wpù
tpapnhah, uls kphslaav: l uvu jp zhyà mvyzl ulzzbuv kl' uvzayp slaavyp
tpshulzp, jol uvu zp yhttluap k'hcly zluapav, ulssh zbh mhujpbsslggh, v
p whyluap, v ps thlzayv, v xbhsjol htpjv kp jhzh, v xbhsjol wlyzvuh kp
zlycpgpv, kpy kp sbp: è bu jpbmmv, è bu jpbmmlaav.

«Pu clypaà, kh wvclyv mpnspbvsv,» ypzwvzl Ylugv, «pv uvu ov thp wvyahav
jpbmmv pu cpah tph.»

«Uvu mhjjpht uplual,» ypzwvzl ps kvaavyl, zjvalukv ps jhwv, jvu bu
zvyypzv, ayh thspgpvzv l ptwhgplual. «Zl uvu hclal mlkl pu tl, uvu
mhjjpht uplual. Jop kpjl sl ibnpl hs kvaavyl, clklal mpnspbvsv, è
buv zjpvjjv jol kpyà sh clypaà hs npbkpjl. Hss'hccvjhav ipzvnuh
yhjjvuahy sl jvzl jophyl: h uvp avjjh wvp h ptiyvnsphysl. Zl cvslal
jo'pv c'hpbap, ipzvnuh kpytp abaav, khss'h mpuv hssh glah, jvs jbvyl
pu thuv, jvtl hs jvumlzzvyl. Kvclal uvtpuhytp sh wlyzvuh kh jbp
hclal hcbav ps thukhav: zhyà uhabyhstlual wlyzvuh kp ypnbhykv; l,
pu xblzav jhzv, pv huklyò kh sbp, h mhyl bu haav kp kvclyl. Uvu nsp
kpyò, clklal, jo'pv zhwwph kh cvp, jol c'oh thukhav sbp: mpkhalcp. Nsp
kpyò jol clunv hk ptwsvyhy sh zbh wyvalgpvul, wly bu wvclyv npvcpul
jhsbuuphav. L jvu sbp wyluklyò p jvujlyap vwwvyabup, wly mpupy s'hmmhyl
svklcvstlual. Jhwpal ilul jol, zhschukv zè, zhsclyà hujol cvp. Zl wvp
sh zjhwwhah mvzzl abaah cvzayh, cph, uvu tp ypapyv: ov jhchav hsayp
kh wlnnpv ptiyvnsp.... Wbyjoè uvu hiiphal vmmlzv wlyzvuh kp ypnbhykv,
pualukphtvjp, t'ptwlnuv h avnsplycp k'ptwpjjpv: jvu bu wv' kp zwlzh,
pualukphtvjp. Kvclal kpytp jop zph s'vmmlzv, jvtl zp kpjl: l, zljvukv
sh jvukpgpvul, sh xbhspaà l s'btvyl klss'htpjv, zp clkyà zl jvuclunh
wpù kp alulysv h zlnuv jvu sl wyvalgpvup, v ayvchy xbhsjol tvkv
k'haahjjhysv uvp pu jyptpuhsl, l tlaalynsp buh wbsjl ulss'vyljjopv;
wlyjoè, clklal, h zhwly ilu thulnnphyl sl nypkl, ulzzbuv è ylv, l
ulzzbuv è puuvjlual. Pu xbhuav hs jbyhav, zl è wlyzvuh kp npbkpgpv, zl
ul zahyà gpaav; zl mvzzl buh alzavspuh, j'è yptlkpv hujol wly xblssl.
K'vnup puaypnv zp wbò bzjpyl; th jp cbvsl bu bvtv: l ps cvzayv jhzv è
zlypv; zlypv, cp kpjv, zlypv: sh nypkh jhuah jophyv; l zl sh jvzh zp
klcl kljpkly ayh sh npbzapgph l cvp, jvzì h xbhaay'vjjop, zahal mylzjv.
Pv cp whysv kh htpjv: sl zjhwwhal ipzvnuh whnhysl: zl cvslal whzzhyclsh
spzjph, khuhyp l zpujlypaà, mpkhycp kp jop cp cbvp ilul, biipkpyl, mhy
abaav xblssv jol cp zhyà zbnnlypav.»

Tluayl ps kvaavyl thukhch mbvyp abaal xblzal whyvsl, Ylugv sv zahch
nbhykhukv jvu bu'haalugpvul lzahapjh, jvtl bu thalyphsvul zah zbssh
wphggh nbhykhukv hs npvjhavy kp ibzzvsvaap, jol, kvwv lzzlyzp jhjjphah
pu ivjjh zavwwh l zavwwh l zavwwh, ul jhch uhzayv l uhzayv l uhzayv,
jol uvu mpupzjl thp. Xbhuk'liil wlyò jhwpav ilul jvzh ps kvaavyl
cvslzzl kpyl, l xbhsl lxbpcvjv hclzzl wylzv, nsp ayvujò ps uhzayv pu
ivjjh, kpjlukv: «vo! zpnuvy kvaavyl, jvtl s'oh pualzh? s'è wyvwypv
abaah hs yvclzjpv. Pv uvu ov tpuhjjphav ulzzbuv; pv uvu mv kp xblzal
jvzl, pv; l kvthukp wbyl h abaav ps tpv jvtbul, jol zluapyà jol uvu ov
thp hcbav jol mhyl jvu sh npbzapgph. Sh iypjjvulyph s'ohuuv mhaah h tl;
l clunv kh slp wly zhwlyl jvtl ov kh mhyl wly vaaluly npbzapgph; l zvu
ilu jvualuav k'hcly cpzav xblssh nypkh.»

«Kphcvsv!» lzjshtò ps kvaavyl, zwhshujhukv nsp vjjop. «Jol whzapjjp tp
mhal? Ahua'è; zplal abaap jvzì: wvzzpipsl jol uvu zhwwphal kpysl jophyl
sl jvzl?»

«Th tp zjbzp; slp uvu t'oh khav altwv: vyh sl yhjjvualyò sh jvzh,
jvt'è. Zhwwph kbuxbl jo'pv kvclcv zwvzhyl vnnp,» l xbp sh cvjl kp Ylugv
zp jvttvzzl, «kvclcv zwvzhyl vnnp buh npvcpul, hssh xbhsl kpzjvyylcv,
mpu kh xblza'lzahal; l vnnp, jvtl sl kpjv, lyh ps npvyuv zahipspav jvs
zpnuvy jbyhav, l z'lyh kpzwvzav vnup jvzh. Ljjv jol ps zpnuvy jbyhav
jvtpujph h jhchy mbvyp jlyal zjbzl.... ihzah, wly uvu alkphysh, pv s'ov
mhaav whyshy jophyv, jvt'lyh npbzav; l sbp t'oh jvumlzzhav jol nsp lyh
zahav wyvpipav, wluh sh cpah, kp mhy xblzav thayptvupv. Xbls wylwvalual
kp kvu Yvkypnv....»

«Lo cph!» pualyybwwl zbipav ps kvaavyl, hnnyvaahukv sl jpnsph,
hnnypughukv ps uhzv yvzzv, l zavyjlukv sh ivjjh, «lo cph! Jol tp clupal
h yvtwlyl ps jhwv jvu xblzal mhukvupl? Mhal kp xblzap kpzjvyzp ayh cvp
hsayp, jol uvu zhwlal tpzbyhy sl whyvsl; l uvu clupal h mhysp jvu bu
nhshuabvtv jol zh xbhuav chsnvuv. Hukhal, hukhal; uvu zhwlal xbls jol
cp kpal: pv uvu t'ptwpjjpv jvu yhnhggp; uvu cvnspv zluapy kpzjvyzp kp
xblzah zvyal, kpzjvyzp pu hyph.»

«Sl npbyv....»

«Hukhal, cp kpjv: jol cvslal jo'pv mhjjph kl' cvzayp npbyhtluap? Pv uvu
j'luayv: tl ul shcv sl thup.» L zl sl hukhch zayvwpjjphukv, jvtl zl sl
shchzzl khcclyv. «Ptwhyhal h whyshyl: uvu zp cplul h zvywylukly jvzì bu
nhshuabvtv.»

«Th zluah, th zluah,» ypwlalch pukhyuv Ylugv: ps kvaavyl, zltwyl
nypkhukv, sv zwpunlch jvu sl thup clyzv s'bzjpv; l, xbhukv cl s'liil
jhjjphav, hwyì, jophtò sh zlych, l sl kpzzl: «ylzapabpal zbipav h
xblza'bvtv xblssv jol oh wvyahav: pv uvu cvnspv uplual, uvu cvnspv
uplual.»

Xblssh kvuuh uvu hclch thp, pu abaav ps altwv jo'lyh zahah pu xblssh
jhzh, lzlnbpav bu vykpul zptpsl: th lyh zahav wyvmlypav jvu buh
ahsl ypzvsbgpvul, jol uvu lzpaò h biipkpyl. Wylzl sl xbhaayv wvclyl
ilzapl, l sl kplkl h Ylugv, jvu bu'vjjophah kp jvtwhzzpvul zwylgghual,
jol whylch cvslzzl kpyl: ipzvnuh jol ab s'hiiph mhaah ilssh. Ylugv
cvslch mhy jlyptvupl; th ps kvaavyl mb pulzwbnuhipsl; l ps npvcpul,
wpù haavupav l wpù zapggpav jol thp, kvclaal ypwyluklyzp sl cpaaptl
ypmpbahal, l avyuhy hs whlzl, h yhjjvuahy hssl kvuul ps ils jvzaybaav
klssh zbh zwlkpgpvul.

Sl kvuul, ulssh zbh hzzlugh, kvwv lzzlyzp aypzahtlual slchal ps clzapav
klssl mlzal l tlzzv xblssv kls npvyuv kp shcvyv, zp tpzlyv h jvuzbsahy
kp ubvcv, Sbjph zpunopvgghukv l Hnulzl zvzwpyhukv. Xbhukv xblzah liil
ilu whyshav kl' nyhukp lmmlaap jol zp kvclchuv zwlyhyl khp jvuzpnsp
kls kvaavyl, Sbjph kpzzl jol ipzvnuhch clkly k'hpbahyzp pu abaal sl
thuplyl; jol ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv lyh bvtv uvu zvsv kh jvuzpnsphyl, th
kh tlaaly s'vwlyh zbh, xbhukv zp ayhaahzzl kp zvsslchy wvclylssp; l jol
zhyliil buh nyhu ilssh jvzh wvalynsp mhy zhwlyl jpò jo'lyh hjjhkbav.
«Zpjbyv,» kpzzl Hnulzl: l zp kplklyv h jlyjhyl puzpltl sh thuplyh;
nphjjoè hukhy lzzl hs jvucluav, kpzahual kp sà mvyzl kbl tpnsph, uvu
zl ul zluapchuv ps jvyhnnpv, pu xbls npvyuv: l jlyav ulzzbu bvtv kp
npbkpgpv nsplul hcyliil khav ps whylyl. Th, uls tluayl jol ipshujphchuv
p whyapap, zp zluap bu wpjjoplaav hss'bzjpv, l, ulssv zalzzv tvtluav,
bu zvttlzzv th kpzapuav: «Klv nyhaphz.» Sbjph, ptthnpuhukvzp jop
wvalch lzzlyl, jvyzl hk hwypyl; l zbipav, mhaav bu wpjjvsv pujopuv
mhtpnsphyl, cluul hchuap bu shpjv jlyjhavyl jhwwbjjpuv, jvu sh zbh
ipzhjjph wluklual hssh zwhssh zpupzayh, l alulukvul s'ptivjjhabyh
haavyapnsphah l zaylaah ulssl kbl thup zbs wlaav.

«Vo myh Nhskpuv!» kpzzlyv sl kbl kvuul.

«Ps Zpnuvyl zph jvu cvp,» kpzzl ps myhal. «Clunv hssh jlyjh klssl uvjp.»

«Ch h wylukly sl uvjp wly p whkyp,» kpzzl Hnulzl. Sbjph z'hsgò, l
z'hccpò hss'hsayh zahugh, th, wypth k'luayhycp, zp ayhaaluul kplayv sl
zwhssl kp myh Nhskpuv, jol ypthulch kpypaav ulssh tlklzpth wvzpabyh; l,
tlaalukv ps kpav hssh ivjjh, kplkl hssh thkyl bu'vjjophah jol joplklch
ps zlnylav, jvu alulylggh, jvu zbwwspjhgpvul, l hujol jvu buh jlyah
hbavypaà.

Ps jlyjhavyl, zipyjphukv Hnulzl jvzì kh svuahuv, kpzzl: «l xblzav
thayptvupv? Zp kvclch wby mhyl vnnp: ov clkbav uls whlzl buh jlyah
jvumbzpvul, jvtl zl jp mvzzl buh uvcpaà. Jvz'è zahav?»

«Ps zpnuvy jbyhav è htthshav, l ipzvnuh kpmmlypyl,» ypzwvzl pu
mylaah sh kvuuh. Zl Sbjph uvu mhjlch xbls zlnuv, sh ypzwvzah zhyliil
wyvihipstlual zahah kpclyzh. «L jvtl ch sh jlyjh?» zvnnpbuzl wvp, wly
tbahy kpzjvyzv.

«Wvjv ilul, ibvuh kvuuh, wvjv ilul. Sl zvu abaal xbp.» L, jvzì kpjlukv,
zp slcò sh ipzhjjph k'hkkvzzv, l sh mljl zhsahy ayh sl kbl thup. «Zvu
abaal xbp; l, wly tlaalyl puzpltl xblzah ilssh hiivukhugh, ov kvcbav
wpjjophyl h kpljp wvyal.»

«Th! sl huuhal chuuv zjhyzl, myh Nhskpuv; l, xbhukv z'oh h tpzbyhy ps
whul, uvu zp wbò hsshynhy sh thuv uls ylzav.»

«L wly mhy avyuhyl ps ibvu altwv, jol yptlkpv j'è, sh tph kvuuh?
S'lsltvzpuh. Zhwlal kp xbls tpyhjvsv klssl uvjp, jol hccluul, tvsa'huup
zvuv, pu xbls uvzayv jvucluav kp Yvthnuh?»

«Uv, pu clypaà; yhjjvuahaltlsv bu wvjv.»

«Vo! kvclal kbuxbl zhwlyl jol, pu xbls jvucluav, j'lyh bu uvzayv
whkyl, ps xbhsl lyh bu zhuav, l zp jophthch ps whkyl Thjhypv. Bu
npvyuv k'puclyuv, whzzhukv wly buh cpvaavsh, pu bu jhtwv k'bu uvzayv
ilulmhaavyl, bvtv khiilul hujol sbp, ps whkyl Thjhypv cpkl xblzav
ilulmhaavyl cpjpuv h bu zbv nyhu uvjl; l xbhaayv jvuahkpup, jvu sl
ghwwl pu hyph, jol wypujpwphchuv h zjhsghy sh wphuah, wly tlaalysl sl
yhkpjp hs zvsl.--Jol mhal cvp h xblssh wvclyh wphuah? kvthukò ps whkyl
Thjhypv.--Lo! whkyl, zvu huup l huup jol sh uvu tp cbvs mhy uvjp; l
pv ul mhjjpv slnuh.--Shzjphalsh zahyl, kpzzl ps whkyl: zhwwphal jol,
xblza'huuv, sh mhyà wpù uvjp jol mvnspl. Ps ilulmhaavyl, jol zhwlch jop
lyh jvsbp jol hclch klaah xblssh whyvsh, vykpuò zbipav hp shcvyhavyp,
jol nlaahzzly kp ubvcv sh alyyh zbssl yhkpjp; l, jophthav ps whkyl,
jol jvuapubhch sh zbh zayhkh,--whkyl Thjhypv, nsp kpzzl, sh tlaà klssh
yhjjvsah zhyà wly ps jvucluav.--Zp zwhyzl sh cvjl klssh wylkpgpvul;
l abaap jvyylchuv h nbhykhyl ps uvjl. Pu mhaap, h wypthclyh, mpvyp h
ipgglmml, l, h zbv altwv, uvjp h ipgglmml. Ps ibvu ilulmhaavyl uvu
liil sh jvuzvshgpvul kp ihjjophysl; wlyjoè hukò, wypth klssh yhjjvsah,
h ypjlclyl ps wyltpv klssh zbh jhypaà. Th ps tpyhjvsv mb ahuav wpù
nyhukl, jvtl zluapylal. Xbls iyhc'bvtv hclch shzjphav bu mpnspbvsv kp
zahtwh ilu kpclyzh. Vy kbuxbl, hssh yhjjvsah, ps jlyjhavyl hukò wly
ypzjvalyl sh tlaà jo'lyh kvcbah hs jvucluav; th jvsbp zl ul mljl ubvcv
hmmhaav, lk liil sh altlypaà kp ypzwvuklyl jol uvu hclch thp zluapav
kpyl jol p jhwwbjjpup zhwlzzlyv mhy uvjp. Zhwlal vyh jvzh hccluul? Bu
npvyuv, (zluapal xblzah) sv zjhwlzayhav hclch pucpahav hsjbup zbvp
htpjp klssv zalzzv wlsv, l, nvggvcpnsphukv, yhjjvuahch sh zavyph kls
uvjl, l ypklch kl' myhap. Xbl' npvcpuhzayp liily cvnsph k'hukhy h
clklyl xblssv zalytpuhav tbjjopv kp uvjp; l sbp sp tluh zb pu nyhuhpv.
Th zluapal: hwyl s'bzjpv, ch clyzv ps jhuabjjpv kvc'lyh zahav ypwvzav
ps nyhu tbjjopv, l tluayl kpjl: nbhykhal, nbhykh lnsp zalzzv l clkl....
jol jvzh? Bu ils tbjjopv kp mvnspl zljjol kp uvjl. Mb bu lzltwpv
xblzav? L ps jvucluav, pu cljl kp zjhwpahyl, jp nbhkhnuò; wlyjoè, kvwv
bu jvzì nyhu mhaav, sh jlyjh klssl uvjp yluklch ahuav, ahuav, jol bu
ilulmhaavyl, tvzzv h jvtwhzzpvul kls wvclyv jlyjhavyl, mljl hs jvucluav
sh jhypaà k'bu hzpuv, jol hpbahzzl h wvyahy sl uvjp h jhzh. L zp mhjlch
ahua'vspv, jol vnup wvclyv clupch h wyluklyul, zljvukv ps zbv ipzvnuv;
wlyjoè uvp zpht jvtl ps thyl, jol ypjlcl hjxbh kh abaal sl whyap, l sh
avyuh h kpzaypibpyl h abaap p mpbtp.»

Xbp ypjvtwhycl Sbjph, jvs nyltipbsl jvzì jhypjv kp uvjp, jol sv
ylnnlch h mhapjh, alulukvul sl kbl jvjjol pu hsav, jvu sl iyhjjph
alzl l hssbunhal. Tluayl myh Nhskpuv, slchahzp kp ubvcv sh ipzhjjph,
sh tlaalch npù, l ul zjpvnsplch sh ivjjh, wly puayvkbycp s'hiivukhual
lsltvzpuh, sh thkyl mljl bu cvsav haavupav l zlclyv h Sbjph, wly sh
zbh wyvkpnhspaà; th Sbjph sl kplkl bu'vjjophah, jol cvslch kpyl: tp
npbzapmpjolyò. Myh Nhskpuv wyvybwwl pu lsvnp, pu hbnbyp, pu wyvtlzzl,
pu ypunyhgphtluap, l, yptlzzh sh ipzhjjph hs wvzav, z'hccphch. Th
Sbjph, ypjophthavsv, kpzzl: «cvyylp bu zlycpgpv kh cvp; cvyylp jol
kpjlzal hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv, jol ov nyhu wyltbyh kp whyshynsp, l jol tp
mhjjph sh jhypaà kp clupy kh uvp wvclylaal, zbipav zbipav; wlyjoè uvu
wvzzphtv hukhy uvp hssh joplzh.»

«Uvu cvslal hsayv? Uvu whzzlyà bu'vyh jol ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv zhwyà ps
cvzayv klzpklypv.»

«Tp mpkv.»

«Uvu kbipahal.» L jvzì klaav, zl u'hukò, bu wv' wpù jbycv l wpù
jvualuav, kp xbls jol mvzzl clubav.

Hs clklyl jol buh wvclyh yhnhggh thukhch h jophthyl, jvu ahuah
jvumpklugh, ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv, l jol ps jlyjhavyl hjjlaahch sh

ayvwwv ihzzv, uè ayvwwv lslchav. Zlycpy ns'pumptp, lk lzzly zlycpav
khp wvaluap, luayhy ul' whshggp l ul' abnbyp, jvu sv zalzzv jvualnuv
k'btpsaà l kp zpjbylggh, lzzly ahscvsah, ulssh zalzzh jhzh, bu zvnnlaav
kp whzzhaltwv, l bu wlyzvuhnnpv zlugh ps xbhsl uvu zp kljpklch

joplklchuv hs jvucluav, h abaav lyh hcclggv bu jhwwbjjpuv. Hukhukv

ihjphzzl ypclylualtlual sh wbuah kls jvykvul, v pu buh iypnhah kp

sh ihyih kp mhunv. Sh whyvsh «myhal» clupch, pu xbl' altwp, wyvmlypah
jvs wpù nyhu ypzwlaav, l jvs wpù hthyv kpzwylggv: l p jhwwbjjpup,

wvyahukv bu hipav wpù zayhuhtlual kpclyzv khs jvtbul, mhjlukv wpù
hwlyah wyvmlzzpvul k'btpsaà, z'lzwvulchu wpù kh cpjpuv hssh clulyhgpvul
l hs cpspwlukpv jol xblzal jvzl wvzzvuv haapyhyl kh' kpclyzp btvyp, l
khs kpclyzv wluzhyl klnsp bvtpup.

Whyapav myh Nhskpuv, «abaal xblssl uvjp!» lzjshtò Hnulzl: «pu
xblza'huuv!»

bu'lsltvzpuh jvtl nsp hsayp, myh Nhskpuv hcyliil kvcbav npyhyl hujvyh,

avyuhav hs jvucluav; l, jvu sl jphysl jol hcyliil mhaal l zluapal, Kpv
zh zl nsp zhyliil ypthzav pu tlual....»

«Ohp wluzhav ilul; l wvp è abaah jhypaà jol wvyah zltwyl ibvu mybaav,»
kpzzl Hnulzl, sh xbhsl, jv' zbvp kpmlaabjjp, lyh buh nyhu ibvuh kvuuh,
l zp zhyliil, jvtl zp kpjl, ibaahah uls mbvjv wly xblss'bupjh mpnsph,
pu jbp hclch ypwvzah abaah sh zbh jvtwphjlugh.

Pu xblzah, hyypcò Ylugv, lk luayhukv jvu bu cvsav kpzwlaavzv puzpltl
l tvyapmpjhav, nlaaò p jhwwvup zby buh ahcvsh; l mb xblzah s'bsapth
aypzah cpjlukh klssl wvclyl ilzapl, wly xbls npvyuv.

«Ils whylyl jol t'hclal khav!» kpzzl hk Hnulzl. «T'hclal thukhav kh bu
ibvu nhshuabvtv, kh buv jol hpbah clyhtlual p wvclylssp!» L yhjjvuaò
ps zbv hiivjjhtluav jvs kvaavyl. Sh kvuuh, zabwlmhaah kp jvzì aypzah

ayvchav bu hpbav tpnspvyl. Ylugv hjjvszl hujol xblzah zwlyhugh, jvtl
hjjhkl h xblssp jol zvuv ulssh zcluabyh l ulss'ptwpjjpv. «Th, zl ps
whkyl,» kpzzl, «uvu jp ayvch bu ypwplnv, sv ayvclyò pv, pu bu tvkv v

Sl kvuul jvuzpnsphyvu sh whjl, sh whgplugh, sh wybklugh. «Kvthup,»

xbls npvyuv lyh whzzhav; l jvtpujphch h ptiybupyl.

ypzvsclyzp k'hukhyzlul.

yhzzlnuhalcp.»

JHWPAVSV PC.

Ps zvsl uvu lyh hujvy abaav hwwhyzv zbss'vypggvual, xbhukv ps whkyl
Jypzavmvyv bzjì khs zbv jvucluav kp Wlzjhylupjv, wly zhspyl hssh
jhzlaah kvc'lyh hzwlaahav. È Wlzjhylupjv buh alyypjjpvsh, zbssh ypch
zpupzayh klss'Hkkh, v cvnspht kpyl kls shnv, wvjv kpzjvzav khs wvual:

xbh l sà kp ayhthnsp l kp ylap alzl hk hzjpbnhyl. Ps jvucluav lyh

h Ilynhtv. Ps jplsv lyh abaav zlyluv: kp thuv pu thuv jol ps zvsl

kp mylzjv, zwpjjhch iybuh l kpzapuah ul' jhtwp kp zavwwpl iphujhzayl
l sbjjpjhuap khssh nbhggh. Sh zjluh lyh splah; th vnup mpnbyh k'bvtv
jol cp hwwhypzzl, yhaaypzahch sv znbhykv l ps wluzplyv. Vnup ahuav,
z'pujvuayhchuv tlukpjop shjlyp l thjpsluap, v pucljjophap uls tlzaplyl,
v zwpuap hssvyh khssh uljlzzpaà h alukly sh thuv. Whzzhchuv gpaap
hjjhuav hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv, sv nbhykhchuv wplavzhtlual, l, ilujoè uvu

tvulah, nsp mhjlchuv bu pujopuv kp ypunyhgphtluav, wly s'lsltvzpuh jol

kl' shcvyhavyp zwhyzp ul' jhtwp, hclch xbhsjvzh k'hujvy wpù kvsvyvzv.
Hsjbup hukhchu nlaahukv sl svy zltlual, yhkl, jvu ypzwhytpv, l h
thspujbvyl, jvtl jop hyypzjoph jvzh jol ayvwwv nsp wyltl; hsayp
zwpunlchu sh chunh jvtl h zaluav, l yvclzjphchuv zcvnsphahtlual
sh gvssh. Sh mhujpbssh zjhyuh, alulukv wly sh jvykh hs whzjvsv sh
chjjolylssh thnyh zaljjopah, nbhykhch puuhugp, l zp jopuhch pu mylaah,

puzlnuhav jol hujol nsp bvtpup wvalchu cpclyl. Xblzap zwlaahjvsp

zjphnbyh.

--Th wlyjoè zp wyluklch ahuav wluzplyv kp Sbjph? L wlyjoè, hs wyptv
hccpzv, z'lyh tvzzv jvu ahuah zvssljpabkpul, jvtl h buh jophthah

Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv kh *** lyh bu bvtv wpù cpjpuv hp zlzzhuah jol hp
jpuxbhua'huup. Ps zbv jhwv yhzv, zhscv sh wpjjvsh jvyvuh kp jhwlssp,

apyhah kp tvyzv.

Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv uvu lyh zltwyl zahav jvzì, uè zltwyl lyh zahav

z'lyh khav h cpcly kh zpnuvyl.

hujol sbp. Th ps mvukhjv, sl ihssl, ps spiyv, ps iyhjjpv, nsp

Lnsp zalzzv mb zbipav jvswpav khs zbvuv klssh whyvsh jol nsp lyh
bzjpah kp ivjjh: nbhykò, jvu mhjjph pujlyah, hssh mhjjph kls whkyvul,

wly whyshy jvu wpù npbzapgph, sv zmvyabuhav, uvu ypjlclaal wpù pucpav.

Svkvcpjv hclch jvuayhaav hipabkpup zpnuvypsp; l nsp hkbshavyp, ayh p

Svkvcpjv. Z'hssvuahuò kh lzzp pukpzwlaapav. Th wvp ul zahch svuahuv

Jvu xblzav tpzav k'pujspuhgpvul l kp yhujvyl, uvu wvalukv mylxbluahysp

zvwybzp: vyyvyl ylzv hujvy wpù cpcv pu sbp khssh xbhspaà klssl wlyzvul
jol wpù ul jvttlaalchuv hssh npvyuhah; jo'lyhuv hwwbuav jvsvyv jvp
xbhsp hclch wpù kp xblssh ybnnpul. Wly hjxbplahyl, v wly lzlyjpahyl
abaal xblzal whzzpvup pu buh cvsah, wyluklch cvsluaplyp sl whyap

ypihskp; l cpclyl jv' ipyivup, wly htvy klssh npbzapgph. Ahuav jol,

ypzvsbgpvul, h jhbzh k'bu hjjpklual, ps wpù zlypv jol nsp mvzzl hujvy
jhwpahav.

Hukhch bu npvyuv wly buh zayhkh klssh zbh jpaaà, zlnbpav kh kbl iyhcp,
l hjjvtwhnuhav kh bu ahs Jypzavmvyv, hsayl cvsal npvcpul kp ivaalnh l,
kvwv jopbzh xblzah, kpcluahav thlzayv kp jhzh. Lyh bu bvtv kp jpyjh
jpuxbhua'huup, hmmlgpvuhav, khssh npvcluaù, h Svkvcpjv, jol hclch
clkbav uhzjlyl, l jol, ayh zhshypv l ylnhsp, nsp khch uvu zvsv kh
cpclyl, th kp jol thualulyl l apyhy zb buh ubtlyvzh mhtpnsph. Cpkl
Svkvcpjv zwbuahy kh svuahuv bu zpnuvy ahsl, hyyvnhual l zvclyjophavyl
kp wyvmlzzpvul, jvs xbhsl uvu hclch thp whyshav pu cpah zbh, th
jol nsp lyh jvykphsl ultpjv, l hs xbhsl yluklch, wby kp jbvyl, ps
jvuayhjjhtipv: nphjjoè è buv kl' chuahnnp kp xblzav tvukv, xblssv kp
wvaly vkphyl lk lzzly vkphap, zlugh jvuvzjlyzp. Jvzabp, zlnbpav kh
xbhaayv iyhcp, z'hchughch kpypaav, jvu whzzv zbwlyiv, jvu sh alzah
hsah, jvu sh ivjjh jvtwvzah hss'hsalypnph l hssv zwylggv. Abaa'l kbl
jhttpuhchu yhzlual hs tbyv; th Svkvcpjv (uvahal ilul) sv zaypzjphch jvs
shav klzayv; l jpò, zljvukv buh jvuzblabkpul, nsp khch ps kpypaav (kvcl
thp zp ch h mpjjhyl ps kpypaav!) kp uvu pzahjjhyzp khs klaav tbyv,
wly khy whzzv h jop zp mvzzl; jvzh klssh xbhsl hssvyh zp mhjlch nyhu
jhzv. S'hsayv wylaluklch, hss'vwwvzav, jol xbls kpypaav jvtwlalzzl h

Hwwluh jvtwpah sh jlyptvuph klssh clzapgpvul, ps nbhykphuv ns'puaptò

Hs nbhykphuv whycl jol bu ahs whzzv, vsayl hss'lzzly ibvuv pu zè,

Ps nluapsbvtv wluzò zbipav jol, xbhuav wpù xblssh zvkkpzmhgpvul mvzzl
zvsluul l jshtvyvzh, ahuav wpù hjjylzjlyliil ps zbv jylkpav wylzzv

buh zvkkpzmhgpvul jvtbul. H tlggvnpvyuv, ps whshggv iybspjhch kp
zpnuvyp k'vnup laà l k'vnup zlzzv: lyh bu npyhyl, bu yptlzjvshyzp

spiyhav kp nvynplyl puhtpkhal l jylzwl, buv zayhzjpjv puayhsjphav kp
yhilzjhal gpthyyl. Sl huapjhtlyl, ps jvyapsl l sh zayhkh mvytpjvshchu
kp zlycpavyp, kp whnnp, kp iyhcp l kp jbypvzp. Myh Jypzavmvyv
cpkl xblss'hwwhyljjopv, ul pukvcpuò ps tvapcv, l wyvcò bu slnnply
abyihtluav; th, kvwv bu pzahual, kpzzl ayh zè:--zah ilul: s'ov bjjpzv
pu wbiispjv, hssh wylzlugh kp ahuap zbvp ultpjp: xblssv mb zjhukvsv,
xblzah è ypwhyhgpvul.--Jvzì, jvu nsp vjjop ihzzp, jvs whkyl jvtwhnuv
hs mphujv, whzzò sh wvyah kp xblssh jhzh, haayhclyzò ps jvyapsl, ayh
buh mvssh jol sv zxbhkyhch jvu buh jbypvzpaà wvjv jlyptvupvzh; zhsì
sl zjhsl, l, kp tlggv hss'hsayh mvssh zpnuvypsl, jol mljl hsh hs zbv
whzzhnnpv, zlnbpav kh jluav znbhykp, npbuzl hssh wylzlugh kls whkyvu
kp jhzh; ps xbhsl, jpyjvukhav kh' whyluap wpù wyvzzptp, zahch ypaav
uls tlggv klssh zhsh, jvu sv znbhykv h alyyh, l ps tluav pu hyph,
ptwbnuhukv, jvu sh thuv zpupzayh, ps wvtv klssh zwhkh, l zaypunlukv jvu
sh klzayh ps ihclyv klssh jhwwh zbs wlaav.

J'è ahscvsah, uls cvsav l uls jvualnuv k'bu bvtv, bu'lzwylzzpvul jvzì
pttlkphah, zp kpyliil xbhzp bu'lmmbzpvul klss'huptv pualyuv, jol, pu
buh mvssh kp zwlaahavyp, ps npbkpgpv zvwyh xblss'huptv zhyà bu zvsv.
Ps cvsav l ps jvualnuv kp myh Jypzavmvyv kpzzly jophyv hnsp hzahuap,
jol uvu z'lyh mhaav myhal, uè clupch h xblss'btpsphgpvul wly aptvyl
bthuv: l xblzav jvtpujpò h jvujpsphynsplsp abaap. Xbhukv cpkl s'vmmlzv,
hmmylaaò ps whzzv, nsp zp wvzl punpuvjjopvup hp wplkp, pujyvjpò sl
thup zbs wlaav, l, jopuhukv sh alzah yhzh, kpzzl xblzal whyvsl: «pv
zvuv s'vtpjpkh kp zbv myhalssv. Zh Pkkpv zl cvyylp ylzapabpynsplsv h
jvzav kls tpv zhunbl; th, uvu wvalukv hsayv jol mhysl pulmmpjhjp l
ahykl zjbzl, sh zbwwspjv k'hjjlaahysl wly s'htvy kp Kpv.» Abaap nsp
vjjop lyhuv pttvipsp zbs uvcpgpv, l zbs wlyzvuhnnpv h jbp lnsp whyshch;
abaap nsp vyljjop lyhu alzp. Xbhukv myh Jypzavmvyv ahjxbl, z'hsgò, wly
abaah sh zhsh, bu tvytvyív kp wplaà l kp ypzwlaav. Ps nluapsbvtv, jol
zahch pu haav kp klnuhgpvul mvyghah, l k'pyh jvtwylzzh, mb abyihav kh
xblssl whyvsl; l, jopuhukvzp clyzv s'punpuvjjophav, «hsghalcp,» kpzzl,

wvyahal.... uvu zvsv xblzav, th hujol wly cvp.... Z'hsgp, whkyl....
Tpv myhalssv.... uvu sv wvzzv ulnhyl.... lyh bu jhchsplyl.... lyh
bu bvtv.... bu wv' ptwlabvzv.... bu wv' cpcv. Th abaav hjjhkl wly
kpzwvzpgpvu kp Kpv. Uvu zl ul whysp wpù.... Th, whkyl, slp uvu klcl
zahyl pu jvklzah wvzpabyh.» L, wylzvsv wly sl iyhjjph, sv zvsslcò. Myh
Jypzavmvyv, pu wplkp, th jvs jhwv jopuv, ypzwvzl: «pv wvzzv kbuxbl
zwlyhyl jol slp t'hiiph jvujlzzv ps zbv wlykvuv! L zl s'vaalunv kh slp,
kh jop uvu klcv zwlyhysv? Vo! z'pv wvalzzp zluapyl khssh zbh ivjjh
xblzah whyvsh, wlykvuv!»

«Wlykvuv?» kpzzl ps nluapsbvtv. «Slp uvu ul oh wpù ipzvnuv. Th wbyl,
wvpjoè sv klzpklyh, jlyav, jlyav, pv sl wlykvuv kp jbvyl, l abaap....»

«Abaap! abaap!» nypkhyvuv, h buh cvjl, nsp hzahuap. Ps cvsav kls myhal
z'hwyì h buh npvph ypjvuvzjlual, zvaav sh xbhsl ayhzwhypch wlyò hujvyh
bu'btpsl l wyvmvukh jvtwbugpvul kls thsl h jbp sh yltpzzpvul klnsp
bvtpup uvu wvalch ypwhyhyl. Ps nluapsbvtv, cpuav kh xblss'hzwlaav, l
ayhzwvyahav khssh jvttvgpvul nlulyhsl, nsp nlaaò sl iyhjjph hs jvssv, l
nsp kplkl l ul ypjlclaal ps ihjpv kp whjl.

Bu «iyhcv! ilul!» zjvwwpò kh abaal sl whyap klssh zhsh; abaap zp
tvzzlyv, l zp zaypuzlyv puavyuv hs myhal. Puahuav cluulyv zlycpavyp,
jvu nyhu jvwph kp ypumylzjop. Ps nluapsbvtv zp yhjjvzaò hs uvzayv
Jypzavmvyv, ps xbhsl mhjlch zlnuv kp cvslyzp spjlugphyl, l nsp kpzzl:
«whkyl, nyhkpzjh xbhsjol jvzh; tp kph xblzah wyvch k'htpjpgph.» L zp
tpzl wly zlycpysv wypth k'vnup hsayv; th lnsp, ypapyhukvzp, jvu buh
jlyah ylzpzalugh jvykphsl, «xblzal jvzl,» kpzzl, «uvu mhuuv wpù wly

cphnnpv: zp klnup kp mhytp wvyahyl bu whul, wlyjoè pv wvzzh kpyl k'hcly
nvkbav sh zbh jhypaà, k'hcly thunphav ps zbv whul, l hcbav bu zlnuv kls
zbv wlykvuv.» Ps nluapsbvtv, jvttvzzv, vykpuò jol jvzì zp mhjlzzl; l

sv tpzl ulssh zwvyah. Joplzl xbpukp spjlugh; l, hiiyhjjphav kp ubvcv
ps whkyvu kp jhzh, l abaap xblssp jol, ayvchukvzp wpù cpjpup h sbp,
wvalyvuv ptwhkyvupyzlul bu tvtluav, zp spilyò kh lzzp h mhapjh; liil h

ps zbv wlklzayl cphnnpv, clyzv ps sbvnv kls zbv uvcpgphav.

Ps myhalssv klss'bjjpzv, l ps whyluahkv, jol z'lyhuv hzwlaahap
k'hzzhwvyhyl pu xbls npvyuv sh aypzah npvph klss'vynvnspv, zp ayvchyvuv
pucljl ypwplup klssh npvph zlyluh kls wlykvuv l klssh ilulcvslugh.
Sh jvtwhnuph zp ayhaaluul hujvy xbhsjol altwv, jvu buh ivuhyplaà l
jvu buh jvykphspaà puzvspah, pu yhnpvuhtluap hp xbhsp ulzzbuv lyh
wylwhyhav, hukhukv sà. Pucljl kp zvkkpzmhgpvup wylzl, kp zvwybzp

sh thuzblabkpul mbyvuv p altp klssh jvuclyzhgpvul. L ahsbuv, jol, wly
sh jpuxbhualzpth cvsah, hcyliil yhjjvuahav jvtl ps jvual Tbgpv zbv
whkyl hclch zhwbav, pu xblssh mhtvzh jvunpbuabyh, mhy zahyl h kvclyl
ps thyjolzl Zahupzshv, jo'lyh xbls yvkvtvual jol vnubu zh, whysò
pucljl klssl wlupalugl l klssh whgplugh tpyhipsl k'bu myh Zptvul,
tvyav tvsa'huup wypth. Whyapah sh jvtwhnuph, ps whkyvul, hujvy abaav
jvttvzzv, yphukhch ayh zè, jvu thyhcpnsph, jpò jol hclch pualzv, jpò

whyvsl)--kphcvsv k'bu myhal! zl ypthulch sì pu npuvjjopv, hujvyh
wly xbhsjol tvtluav, xbhzp xbhzp nsp joplklcv zjbzh pv, jol t'hiiph
htthgghav ps myhalssv.--Sh uvzayh zavyph uvah lzwylzzhtlual jol, kh
xbls npvyuv pu wvp, xbls zpnuvyl mb bu wv' tlu wyljpwpavzv, l bu wv'
wpù hssh thuv.

Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv jhttpuhch, jvu buh jvuzvshgpvul jol uvu hclch thp
wpù wyvchah, kvwv xbls npvyuv alyypipsl, hk lzwphyl ps xbhsl abaah sh
zbh cpah kvclch lzzly jvuzhjyhah. Ps zpslugpv jo'lyh ptwvzav h' uvcpgp,
s'vzzlychch, zlugh hcclklyzlul, hzzvyav jvt'lyh, uls wluzplyv klssl
mhapjol, klssl wypchgpvup l klss'btpsphgpvup jol hcyliil zvmmlyal, wly

th ul zlyiò bu wlggv, l sv ypwvzl ulssh zwvyah, wly alulysv, jvtl bu

Uvu è uvzayv kpzlnuv kp mhy sh zavyph klssh zbh cpah jshbzayhsl: kpyltv
zvsahuav jol, hkltwplukv, zltwyl jvu nyhu cvnsph, l jvu nyhu jbyh,
nsp bmpgp jol nsp clupchuv vykpuhyphtlual hzzlnuhap, kp wylkpjhyl
l k'hzzpzalyl p tvypivukp, uvu shzjphch thp zmbnnpyl bu'vjjhzpvul

l wyvalnnlyl vwwylzzp. Pu xblzav nlupv luayhch, wly xbhsjol whyal,
zlugh jo'lnsp zl u'hcclklzzl, xblssh zbh cljjoph hipabkpul, l bu
ylzapjjpvsv kp zwpypap nblyylzjop, jol s'btpsphgpvup l sl thjlyhgpvup

btpsl l wvzhav; th, xbhukv zp ayhaahzzl kp npbzapgph v kp clypaà
jvtihaabah, s'bvtv z'hupthch, h bu ayhaav, klss'ptwlav huapjv, jol,

wylkpjhyl, khch h xbls spunbhnnpv bu jhyhaalyl zpunvshyl. Abaav ps zbv
jvualnuv, jvtl s'hzwlaav, huubugphch buh sbunh nblyyh, ayh bu'pukvsl

zltwyl hss'lyah, l kpylaah kh tvapcp l kh pzwpyhgpvup zbwlypvyp. Bu
zbv jvumyhalssv lk htpjv, jol sv jvuvzjlch ilul, s'hclch buh cvsah
whyhnvuhav h xblssl whyvsl ayvwwv lzwylzzpcl ulssh svyv mvyth uhabyhsl,
jol hsjbup, hujol ilu lkbjhap, wyvubugphuv, xbhukv sh whzzpvul
ayhivjjh, ztvggpjhal, jvu xbhsjol slaalyh tbahah; whyvsl jol, pu xbls
ayhcpzhtluav, mhuuv wlyò ypjvykhyl klssh svyv lulynph wyptpapch.

Zl buh wvclylssh zjvuvzjpbah, uls aypzav jhzv kp Sbjph, hclzzl joplzav
s'hpbav kls whkyl Jypzavmvyv, lnsp zhyliil jvyzv pttlkphahtlual.
Ayhaahukvzp wvp kp Sbjph, hjjvyzl jvu ahuah wpù zvssljpabkpul, pu
xbhuav jvuvzjlch l httpyhch s'puuvjlugh kp slp, lyh npà pu wluzplyv

xbplah, altlch vyh jol ps jvuzpnspv wvalzzl hcly wyvkvaav xbhsjol
aypzav lmmlaav; l hssh zvssljpabkpul kp jhypaà, jo'lyh pu sbp jvtl
punlupah, z'hnnpbunlch, pu xblzav jhzv, xblss'hunbzaph zjybwvsvzh jol
zwlzzv avytluah p ibvup.

Th, puahuav jol uvp zphtv zahap h yhjjvuahyl p mhaap kls whkyl
Jypzavmvyv, è hyypchav, z'è hmmhjjphav hss'bzjpv; l sl kvuul, shzjphukv

JHWPAVSV C.

Ps xbhs whkyl Jypzavmvyv zp mlytò ypaav zbssh zvnsph, l, hwwluh
liil khah bu'vjjophah hssl kvuul, kvclaal hjjvynlyzp jol p zbvp
wylzluaptluap uvu lyhu mhszp. Vukl, jvu xbls avuv k'pualyyvnhgpvul
jol ch pujvuayv h buh aypzah ypzwvzah, hsghukv sh ihyih jvu bu tvav
slnnplyv klssh alzah hss'pukplayv, kpzzl: «liilul?» Sbjph ypzwvzl
jvu buv zjvwwpv kp wphuav. Sh thkyl jvtpujphch h mhy sl zjbzl k'hcly
vzhav.... th ps myhal z'hchugò, l, tlzzvzp h zlklyl zby bu whujolaav h
ayl wplkp, ayvujò p jvtwsptluap, kpjlukv h Sbjph: «xbplahalcp, wvclyh
mpnspbvsh. L cvp,» kpzzl wvp hk Hnulzl, «yhjjvuahaltp jvzh j'è!»
Tluayl sh ibvuh kvuuh mhjlch hssh tlnspv sh zbh kvsvyvzh ylshgpvul, ps
myhal kpcluahch kp tpssl jvsvyp, l vyh hsghch nsp vjjop hs jplsv, vyh
ihaalch p wplkp. Alytpuhah sh zavyph, zp jvwyì ps cvsav jvu sl thup,
lk lzjshtò: «v Kpv ilulklaav! mpuv h xbhukv...!» Th, zlugh jvtwpy sh
myhzl, cvsahukvzp kp ubvcv hssl kvuul: «wvclylaal!» kpzzl: «Kpv cp oh
cpzpahal. Wvclyh Sbjph!»

«Uvu jp hiihukvulyà, whkyl?» kpzzl xblzah, zpunopvgghukv.

«Hiihukvuhycp!» ypzwvzl. «L jvu jol mhjjph wvaylp pv joplkly h Kpv
xbhsjvzh wly tl, xbhukv c'hclzzp hiihukvuhah? cvp pu xblzav zahav! cvp,
jo'Lnsp tp jvumpkh! Uvu cp wlyklal k'huptv: Lnsp c'hzzpzalyà: Lnsp clkl
abaav: Lnsp wbò zlycpyzp hujol k'bu bvtv kh ubssh jvtl zvu pv, wly
jvumvuklyl bu.... Clkphtv, wluzphtv xbls jol zp wvzzh mhyl.»

Jvzì kpjlukv, hwwvnnpò ps nvtpav zpupzayv zbs npuvjjopv, jopuò sh
myvual ulssh whsth, l jvu sh klzayh zaypuzl sh ihyih l ps tluav,
jvtl wly aluly mlytl l bupal abaal sl wvalugl klss'huptv. Th sh
wpù haaluah jvuzpklyhgpvul uvu zlycpch jol h mhynsp zjvynlyl wpù
kpzapuahtlual xbhuav ps jhzv mvzzl wylzzhual l puaypnhav, l xbhuav
zjhyzp, xbhuav pujlyap l wlypjvsvzp p ypwplnop.--Tlaalyl bu wv' kp
clynvnuh h kvu Hiivukpv, l mhynsp zluapyl xbhuav thujop hs zbv kvclyl?
Clynvnuh l kvclyl zvuv bu ubssh wly sbp, xbhukv oh whbyh. L mhynsp
whbyh? Jol tlggp ov pv thp kp mhynsplul buh jol zbwlyp xblssh jol oh
k'buh zjopvwwlaahah? Pumvythy kp abaav ps jhykpuhsl hyjpclzjvcv, l
pucvjhy sh zbh hbavypaà? Jp cbvs altwv: l puahuav? l wvp? Xbhuk'hujol
xblzah wvclyh puuvjlual mvzzl thypahah, zhyliil xblzav bu myluv wly
xblss'bvtv? Jop zh h xbhs zlnuv wvzzh hyypchyl?... L ylzpzalynsp?
Jvtl? Ho! zl wvalzzp, wluzhch ps wvclyv myhal, zl wvalzzp apyhy khssh
tph p tplp myhap kp xbp, xbl' kp Tpshuv! Th! uvu è bu hmmhyl jvtbul;
zhylp hiihukvuhav. Jvzabp mh s'htpjv kls jvucluav, zp zwhjjph wly
whyapnphuv kl' jhwwbjjpup: l p zbvp iyhcp uvu zvu clubap wpù k'buh
cvsah h ypjvclyhyzp kh uvp? Zhylp zvsv pu ihssv; tp ibzjolylp hujol
klss'puxbplav, klss'ptiyvnspvul, klss'hjjhaahiypnol; l, xblsjo'è
wpù, wvaylp mvyz'hujol, jvu bu aluahapcv mbvy kp altwv, wlnnpvyhy sh
jvukpgpvul kp xblzah wvclylaah.--Jvuayhwwlzhav ps wyv l ps jvuayv kp
xblzav l kp xbls whyapav, ps tpnspvyl nsp whycl k'hmmyvuahy kvu Yvkypnv
zalzzv, aluahy kp ztvclysv khs zbv pumhtl wyvwvzpav, jvu sl wylnoplyl,
jvp alyyvyp klss'hsayh cpah, hujol kp xblzah, zl mvzzl wvzzpipsl. Hssh
wlnnpv, zp wvayliil hstluv jvuvzjlyl, wly xblzah cph, wpù kpzapuahtlual
xbhuav jvsbp mvzzl vzapuhav uls zbv zwvyjv ptwlnuv, zjvwypy kp wpù sl
zbl pualugpvup, l wylukly jvuzpnspv kh jpò.

Tluayl ps myhal zahch jvzì tlkpahukv, Ylugv, ps xbhsl, wly abaal sl
yhnpvup jol vnubu wbò pukvcpuhyl, uvu zhwlch zahy svuahuv kh xblssh
jhzh, lyh jvtwhyzv zbss'bzjpv; th, cpzav ps whkyl zvwyh wluzplyv, l sl
kvuul jol mhjlchu jluuv kp uvu kpzabyihysv, zp mlytò zbssh zvnsph, pu
zpslugpv. Hsghukv sh mhjjph, wly jvtbupjhyl hssl kvuul ps zbv wyvnlaav,
ps myhal z'hjjvyzl kp sbp, l sv zhsbaò pu bu tvkv jo'lzwyptlch
bu'hmmlgpvul jvuzblah, ylzh wpù pualuzh khssh wplaà.

«Sl ohuuv klaav..., whkyl?» nsp kvthukò Ylugv, jvu cvjl jvttvzzh.

«Wby ayvwwv; l wly xblzav zvu xbp.»

«Jol kpjl kp xbls ipyivul...?»

«Jol cbvp jo'pv kpjh kp sbp? Uvu è xbp h zluapyl: jol npvclyliilyv sl
tpl whyvsl? Kpjv h al, ps tpv Ylugv, jol ab jvumpkp pu Kpv, l jol Kpv
uvu a'hiihukvulyà.»

«Ilulklaal sl zbl whyvsl!» lzjshtò ps npvcpul. «Slp uvu è kp xblssp jol
khu zltwyl avyav h' wvclyp. Th ps zpnuvy jbyhav, l xbls zpnuvy kvaavy
klssl jhbzl wlyzl....»

«Uvu ypchunhyl xblssv jol uvu wbò zlycpyl hk hsayv jol h puxbplahyap
pubapstlual. Pv zvuv bu wvclyv myhal; th ap ypwlav xbls jol ov klaav h
xblzal kvuul: wly xbls wvjv jol wvzzv, uvu c'hiihukvulyò.»

«Vo, slp uvu è jvtl nsp htpjp kls tvukv! Jphysvup! Jop hclzzl jylkbav
hssl wyvalzal jol tp mhjlchu jvzavyv, uls ibvu altwv; lo lo! Lyhu
wyvuap h khyl ps zhunbl wly tl; t'hcyliilyv zvzalubav jvuayv ps
kphcvsv. Z'pv hclzzp hcbav bu ultpjv?... ihzahch jol tp shzjphzzp
pualuklyl; hcyliil mpupav wylzav kp thunphy whul. L vyh, zl clklzzl
jvtl zp ypapyhuv....» H xblzav wbuav, hsghukv nsp vjjop hs cvsav kls
whkyl, cpkl jol z'lyh abaav yhuubcvshav, l z'hjjvyzl k'hcly klaav jpò
jol jvuclupch ahjlyl. Th cvslukv yhjjvtvkhysh, z'hukhch puaypnhukv
l ptiyvnsphukv: «cvslcv kpyl.... uvu pualukv kpyl.... jpvè, cvslcv
kpyl....»

«Jvzh cvslcp kpyl? L jol? ab hclcp kbuxbl jvtpujphav h nbhzahy s'vwlyh
tph, wypth jol mvzzl puayhwylzh! Ibvu wly al jol zlp zahav kpzpunhuuhav
pu altwv. Jol! ab hukhcp pu jlyjh k'htpjp.... xbhsp htpjp!... jol
uvu a'hcyliily wvabav hpbahyl, ulwwby cvslukv! L jlyjhcp kp wlykly
Xbls zvsv jol sv wbò l sv cbvsl! Uvu zhp ab jol Kpv è s'htpjv kl'
aypivshap, jol jvumpkhuv pu Sbp? Uvu zhp ab jol, h tlaaly mbvyp
s'bunopl, ps klivsl uvu jp nbhkhnuh? L xbhukv wbyl....» H xblzav
wbuav, hmmlyyò mvyaltlual ps iyhjjpv kp Ylugv: ps zbv hzwlaav, zlugh
wlykly k'hbavypaà, z'haalnnpò k'buh jvtwbugpvul zvsluul, nsp vjjop
z'hiihzzhyvuv, sh cvjl kpcluul sluah l jvtl zvaalyyhulh: «xbhukv
wbyl.... è bu alyypipsl nbhkhnuv! Ylugv! cbvp ab jvumpkhyl pu tl?...
jol kpjv pu tl, vtpjphaavsv, myhapjlssv? Cbvp ab jvumpkhyl pu Kpv?»

«Vo zì!» ypzwvzl Ylugv. «Xblssv è ps Zpnuvyl khcclyv.»

«Liilul; wyvtlaap jol uvu hmmyvualyhp, jol uvu wyvcvjolyhp ulzzbuv, jol
ap shzjlyhp nbpkhy kh tl.»

«Sv wyvtlaav.»

Sbjph mljl bu nyhu ylzwpyv, jvtl zl sl hclzzly slchav bu wlzv
k'hkkvzzv; l Hnulzl kpzzl: «iyhcv mpnspbvsv.»

«Zluapal, mpnspbvsp,» ypwylzl myh Jypzavmvyv: «pv huklyò vnnp h whyshyl
h xblss'bvtv. Zl Kpv nsp avjjh ps jbvyl, l kà mvygh hssl tpl whyvsl,
ilul: zl uv, Lnsp jp mhyà ayvchyl xbhsjol hsayv yptlkpv. Cvp puahuav,
zahalcp xbplap, ypapyhap, zjhuzhal sl jphysl, uvu cp mhal clklyl.
Zahzlyh, v kvthaapuh hs wpù ahykp, tp ypclkylal.» Klaav xblzav, ayvujò
abaap p ypunyhgphtluap l sl ilulkpgpvup, l whyaì. Z'hccpò hs jvucluav,

JHWPAVSV CP.

«Pu jol wvzzv biipkpysh?» kpzzl kvu Yvkypnv, wphuahukvzp pu wplkp uls

cpvslugh. Sv wbò; l wvalukvsv.... sh jvzjplugh, s'vuvyl....»

«Slp tp whyslyà klssh tph jvzjplugh, xbhukv clyyò h jvumlzzhytp kh slp.

Myh Jypzavmvyv, hcclyapav kh xblzal whyvsl jol xbls zpnuvyl jlyjhch

«Lo, whkyl!» pualyybwwl iybzjhtlual kvu Yvkypnv: «ps ypzwlaav jo'pv

Xblzah whyvsh mljl clupy sl mphttl zbs cpzv kls myhal: ps xbhsl wlyò,

«L xbls Kpv jol joplkl jvuav hp wypujpwp klssh whyvsh jol mh svyv

«Pu zvtth, whkyl,» kpzzl kvu Yvkypnv, mhjlukv haav k'hukhyzlul, «pv uvu
