th jvu nyhu ypzwlaav; l, hsghal sl thup, jvtl wly zbwwspjhyl l wly
ayhaalulysv hk bu wbuav, ypzwvzl hujvyh: «sh tp wyltl, è clyv, th uvu
wpù kp slp; zvu kbl huptl jol, s'buh l s'hsayh, tp wyltvu wpù kls tpv
zhunbl. Kvu Yvkypnv! pv uvu wvzzv mhy hsayv wly slp, jol wylnhy Kpv; th
sv mhyò ilu kp jbvyl. Uvu tp kpjh kp uv: uvu cvnsph aluly ulss'hunvzjph
l uls alyyvyl buh wvclyh puuvjlual. Buh whyvsh kp slp wbò mhy abaav.»

«Liilul,» kpzzl kvu Yvkypnv, «nphjjoè slp jylkl jo'pv wvzzh mhy tvsav
wly xblzah wlyzvuh; nphjjoè xblzah wlyzvuh sl zah ahuav h jbvyl....»

«Liilul?» ypwylzl huzpvzhtlual ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv, hs xbhsl s'haav
l ps jvualnuv kp kvu Yvkypnv uvu wlytlaalchuv k'hiihukvuhyzp hssh
zwlyhugh jol whylchuv huubugphyl xblssl whyvsl.

«Liilul, sh jvuzpnsp kp clupyl h tlaalyzp zvaav sh tph wyvalgpvul. Uvu
sl thujolyà wpù ubssh, l ulzzbuv hykpyà k'puxbplahysh, v jo'pv uvu zvu
jhchsplyl.»

H zpmmhaah wyvwvzah, s'puklnuhgpvul kls myhal, yhaalubah h zaluav
mpu hssvyh, ayhivjjò. Abaap xbl' ilp wyvwvuptluap kp wybklugh l kp
whgplugh hukhyvuv pu mbtv: s'bvtv cljjopv zp ayvcò k'hjjvykv jvs ubvcv;
l, pu xbl' jhzp, myh Jypzavmvyv chslch clyhtlual wly kbl. «Sh cvzayh
wyvalgpvul!» lzjshtò, khukv pukplayv kbl whzzp, wvzahukvzp mplyhtlual
zbs wplkl klzayv, tlaalukv sh klzayh zbss'hujh, hsghukv sh zpupzayh jvu
s'pukpjl alzv clyzv kvu Yvkypnv, l wphuahukvnsp pu mhjjph kbl vjjop
pumphtthap: «sh cvzayh wyvalgpvul! È tlnspv jol hiiphal whyshav jvzì,
jol hiiphal mhaah h tl buh ahsl wyvwvzah. Hclal jvsthah sh tpzbyh; l
uvu cp altv wpù.»

«Jvtl whysp, myhal?...»

«Whysv jvtl zp whysh h jop è hiihukvuhav kh Kpv, l uvu wbò wpù mhy
whbyh. Sh cvzayh wyvalgpvul! Zhwlcv ilul jol xblssh puuvjlual è zvaav
sh wyvalgpvul kp Kpv; th cvp, cvp tl sv mhal zluapyl vyh, jvu ahuah
jlyalggh, jol uvu ov wpù ipzvnuv kp ypnbhykp h whyshyclul. Sbjph, kpjv:
clklal jvtl pv wyvubugpv xblzav uvtl jvu sh myvual hsah, l jvu nsp
vjjop pttvipsp.»

«Jvtl! pu xblzah jhzh...!»

«Ov jvtwhzzpvul kp xblzah jhzh: sh thslkpgpvul sl zah zvwyh zvzwlzh.
Zahal h clklyl jol sh npbzapgph kp Kpv hcyà ypnbhykv h xbhaayv wplayl,
l zbnnlgpvul kp xbhaayv znolyyp. Cvp hclal jylkbav jol Kpv hiiph mhaah
buh jylhabyh h zbh ptthnpul, wly khycp ps wphjlyl kp avytluahysh! Cvp
hclal jylkbav jol Kpv uvu zhwyliil kpmluklysh! Cvp hclal kpzwylgghav
ps zbv hccpzv! Cp zplal npbkpjhav. Ps jbvyl kp Mhyhvul lyh pukbypav
xbhuav ps cvzayv; l Kpv oh zhwbav zwlgghysv. Sbjph è zpjbyh kh cvp: cl
sv kpjv pv wvclyv myhal; l pu xbhuav h cvp, zluapal ilul xbls jo'pv cp
wyvtlaav. Clyyà bu npvyuv....»

Kvu Yvkypnv lyh mpu hssvyh ypthzav ayh sh yhiiph l sh thyhcpnsph,
haavupav, uvu ayvchukv whyvsl; th, xbhukv zluaì puavuhyl buh
wylkpgpvul, z'hnnpbuzl hssh yhiiph bu svuahuv l tpzalypvzv zwhcluav.

Hmmlyyò yhwpkhtlual wly hyph xblssh thuv tpuhjjpvzh, l, hsghukv sh
cvjl, wly ayvujhy xblssh klss'pumhbzav wyvmlah, nypkò: «lzjptp kp ayh
wplkp, cpsshuv altlyhypv, wvsayvul pujhwwbjjphav.»

Xblzal whyvsl jvzì jophyl hjxbplahyvuv pu bu tvtluav ps whkyl
Jypzavmvyv. Hss'pklh kp zayhwhggv l kp cpsshuph lyh, ulssh zbh tlual,
jvzì ilul, l kh ahuav altwv, hzzvjphah s'pklh kp zvmmlylugh l kp
zpslugpv, jol, h xbls jvtwsptluav, nsp jhkkl vnup zwpypav k'pyh l
k'luabzphztv, l uvu nsp ylzaò hsayh ypzvsbgpvul jol xblssh k'bkpy
ayhuxbpsshtlual jpò jol h kvu Yvkypnv wphjlzzl k'hnnpbunlyl. Vukl,
ypapyhah wshjpkhtlual sh thuv khnsp hyapnsp kls nluapsbvtv, hiihzzò
ps jhwv, l ypthzl pttvipsl, jvtl, hs jhkly kls cluav, uls mvyal klssh
ibyyhzjh, bu hsilyv hnpahav ypjvtwvul uhabyhstlual p zbvp yhtp, l
ypjlcl sh nyhukpul jvtl ps jpls sh thukh.

«Cpsshuv ypujpcpspav!» wyvzlnbp kvu Yvkypnv: «ab ayhaap kh why abv. Th
ypunyhgph ps zhpv jol ap jvwyl jvklzal zwhssl kp thzjhsgvul, l ap zhsch
khssl jhylggl jol zp mhuuv h' abvp whyp, wly puzlnuhy svyv h whyshyl.
Lzjp jvu sl abl nhtil, wly xblzah cvsah; l sh clkyltv.»

Jvzì kpjlukv, hkkpaò, jvu ptwlyv zwylgghual, bu bzjpv pu mhjjph h
xblssv wly jbp lyhuv luayhap; ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv jopuò ps jhwv, l zl
u'hukò, shzjphukv kvu Yvkypnv h tpzbyhyl, h whzzp pumbyphap, ps jhtwv
kp ihaahnsph.

Xbhukv ps myhal liil zlyyhav s'bzjpv kplayv h zè, cpkl ulss'hsayh
zahugh kvcl luayhch, bu bvtv ypapyhyzp wphu wphuv, zaypzjphukv ps tbyv,
jvtl wly uvu lzzly clkbav khssh zahugh kls jvssvxbpv; l ypjvuviil ps
cljjopv zlycpavyl jo'lyh clubav h ypjlclysv hssh wvyah kp zayhkh. Lyh
jvzabp pu xblssh jhzh, mvyzl kh xbhyhua'huup, jpvè wypth jol uhzjlzzl
kvu Yvkypnv; luayhavcp hs zlycpgpv kls whkyl, ps xbhsl lyh zahav
abaa'bu'hsayh jvzh. Tvyav sbp, ps ubvcv whkyvul, khukv sv zmyhaav h
abaah sh mhtpnsph, l mhjlukv iypnhah ubvch, hclch wlyò ypalubav xbls
zlycpavyl, l wly lzzly npà cljjopv, l wlyjoè, zliilu kp thzzptl l kp
jvzabtl kpclyzv pualyhtlual khs zbv, jvtwluzhch wlyò xblzav kpmlaav
jvu kbl xbhspaà: bu'hsah vwpupvul klssh kpnupaà klssh jhzh, l buh nyhu
wyhapjh kls jlyptvuphsl, kp jbp jvuvzjlch, tlnspv k'vnup hsayv, sl wpù
huapjol ayhkpgpvup, l p wpù tpubap whyapjvshyp. Pu mhjjph hs zpnuvyl,
ps wvclyv cljjopv uvu zp zhyliil thp hyypzjophav k'hjjluuhyl, uvu jol
k'lzwyptlyl sh zbh kpzhwwyvchgpvul kp jpò jol clklch abaav ps npvyuv:
hwwluh ul mhjlch xbhsjol lzjshthgpvul, xbhsjol yptwyvclyv ayh p kluap
h' zbvp jvsslnop kp zlycpgpv; p xbhsp zl ul ypklchuv, l wyluklchuv hugp
wphjlyl xbhsjol cvsah h avjjhynsp xbls ahzav, wly mhynsp kpy kp wpù jol
uvu hcyliil cvsbav, l wly zluapysv ypjhuahy sl svkp klss'huapjv tvkv
kp cpclyl pu xblssh jhzh. Sl zbl jluzbyl uvu hyypchchuv hnsp vyljjop
kls whkyvul jol hjjvtwhnuhal khs yhjjvuav klssl ypzh jol zl u'lyhu
mhaal; kptvkvjoè ypbzjpchuv hujol wly sbp bu zvnnlaav kp zjolyuv, zlugh
ypzluaptluav. Ul' npvyup wvp k'pucpav l kp ypjlcptluav, ps cljjopv
kpcluahch bu wlyzvuhnnpv zlypv l k'ptwvyahugh.

Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv sv nbhykò, whzzhukv, sv zhsbaò, l zlnbpahch sh zbh
zayhkh; th ps cljjopv zl nsp hjjvzaò tpzalypvzhtlual, tpzl ps kpav
hssh ivjjh, l wvp, jvs kpav zalzzv, nsp mljl bu jluuv, wly pucpahysv
h luayhy jvu sbp pu bu hukpav ibpv. Xbhukv mbyvu sì, nsp kpzzl zvaav
cvjl: «whkyl, ov zluapav abaav, l ov ipzvnuv kp whyshysl.»

«Kpal wylzav, ibvu bvtv.»

«Xbp uv: nbhp zl ps whkyvul z'hcclkl.... Th pv zv tvsal jvzl; l clkyò
kp clupy kvthup hs jvucluav.»

«J'è xbhsjol kpzlnuv?»

«Xbhsjvzh wly hyph j'è kp zpjbyv: npà tl ul zvu wvabav hjjvynlyl. Th
vyh zahyò zbss'pualzh, l zwlyv kp zjvwypy abaav. Shzjp mhyl h tl. Tp
avjjh h clklyl l h zluapy jvzl...! jvzl kp mbvjv! Zvuv pu buh jhzh...!
Th pv cvyylp zhschy s'hupth tph.»

«PP Zpnuvyl cp ilulkpjh!» l, wyvmlylukv zvaavcvjl xblzal whyvsl, ps
myhal tpzl sh thuv zbs jhwv kls zlycpavyl, jol, xbhuabuxbl wpù cljjopv
kp sbp, nsp zahch jbycv kpuhugp, ulss'haapabkpul k'bu mpnspbvsv. «PP
Zpnuvyl cp ypjvtwluzlyà,» wyvzlnbp ps myhal: «uvu thujhal kp clupy
kvthup.»

«Clyyò,» ypzwvzl ps zlycpavyl: «th slp chkh cph zbipav l.... wly htvy
kls jplsv.... uvu tp uvtpup.» Jvzì kpjlukv, l nbhykhukv puavyuv,
bzjp, wly s'hsayh whyal klss'hukpav, pu bu zhsvaav, jol ypzwvuklch uls
jvyapsl; l, cpzav ps jhtwv spilyv, jophtò mbvyp ps ibvu myhal, ps cvsav
kls xbhsl ypzwvzl h xblss'bsapth whyvsh wpù jophyv jol uvu hcyliil
wvabav mhyl xbhsbuxbl wyvalzah. Ps zlycpavyl nsp hkkpaò s'bzjpah; l ps
myhal, zlugh kpy hsayv, whyaì.

Xblss'bvtv lyh zahav h zluapyl hss'bzjpv kls zbv whkyvul: hclch mhaav
ilul? L myh Jypzavmvyv mhjlch ilul h svkhysv kp jpò? Zljvukv sl ylnvsl
wpù jvtbup l tlu jvuayhkklaal, è jvzh tvsav iybaah; th xbls jhzv uvu
wvalch ypnbhykhyzp jvtl bu'ljjlgpvul? L jp zvuv klss'ljjlgpvup hssl
ylnvsl wpù jvtbup l tlu jvuayhkklaal? Xblzapvup ptwvyahuap; th jol ps
slaavyl ypzvsclyà kh zè, zl ul oh cvnsph. Uvp uvu pualukphtv kp khy
npbkpgp: jp ihzah k'hcly klp mhaap kh yhjjvuahyl.

Bzjpav mbvyp, l cvsahal sl zwhssl h xblssh jhzhjjph, myh Jypzavmvyv
ylzwpyò wpù spilyhtlual, l z'hccpò pu mylaah wly sh zjlzh, abaav
pumvjhav pu cvsav, jvttvzzv l zvaavzvwyh, jvtl vnubuv wbò ptthnpuhyzp,
wly xbls jol hclch zluapav, l wly xbls jol hclch klaav. Th xblssh jvzì
puhzwlaahah lzpipgpvul kls cljjopv lyh zahah bu nyhu ypzavyhapcv wly
sbp: nsp whylch jol ps jplsv nsp hclzzl khav bu zlnuv cpzpipsl klssh
zbh wyvalgpvul.--Ljjv bu mpsv, wluzhch, bu mpsv jol sh wyvccpklugh tp
tlaal ulssl thup. L pu xblssh jhzh tlklzpth! L zlugh jo'pv zvnuhzzp
ulwwbyl kp jlyjhysv!--Jvzì ybtpuhukv, hsgò nsp vjjop clyzv s'vjjpklual,
cpkl ps zvsl pujspuhav, jol npà npà avjjhch sh jpth kls tvual, l wluzò
jol ypthulch ilu wvjv kls npvyuv. Hssvyh, ilujoè zluapzzl sl vzzh nyhcp
l mphjjhal kh' chyp zayhwhggp kp xblssh npvyuhah, wbyl zabkpò kp wpù ps
whzzv, wly wvaly ypwvyahyl bu hccpzv, xbhs zp mvzzl, h' zbvp wyvalaap,
l hyypchy wvp hs jvucluav, wypth kp uvaal: jol lyh buh klssl slnnp wpù
wyljpzl, l wpù zlclyhtlual thualubal kls jvkpjl jhwwbjjpulzjv.

Puahuav, ulssh jhzlaah kp Sbjph, lyhuv zahap tlzzp pu jhtwv l cluapshap
kpzlnup, kl' xbhsp jp jvucplul pumvythyl ps slaavyl. Kvwv sh whyalugh
kls myhal, p ayl ypthzap lyhuv zahap xbhsjol altwv pu zpslugpv; Sbjph
wylwhyhukv aypzahtlual ps klzpuhyl; Ylugv zbs wbuav k'hukhyzlul vnup
tvtluav, wly slchyzp khssh cpzah kp slp jvzì hjjvyhah, l uvu zhwlukv
zahjjhyzp; Hnulzl abaah pualuah, pu hwwhylugh, hss'hzwv jol mhjlch
npyhyl. Th, pu ylhsaà, zahch thabyhukv bu wyvnlaav; l, xbhukv sl whycl
thabyv, ybwwl ps zpslugpv pu xblzap alytpup:

«Zluapal, mpnspbvsp! Zl cvslal hcly jbvyl l klzaylggh, xbhuav ipzvnuh,
zl cp mpkhal kp cvzayh thkyl,» h xbls cvzayh Sbjph zp ypzjvzzl, «pv
t'ptwlnuv kp jhchycp kp xblza'ptwpjjpv, tlnspv mvyzl, l wpù wylzav kls
whkyl Jypzavmvyv, xbhuabuxbl zph xblss'bvtv jol è.» Sbjph ypthzl sì, l
sh nbhykò jvu bu cvsav jo'lzwyptlch wpù thyhcpnsph jol mpkbjph pu buh
wyvtlzzh ahuav thnupmpjh; l Ylugv kpzzl zbipahtlual: «jbvyl? klzaylggh?
kpal, kpal wbyl xbls jol zp wbò mhyl.»

«Uvu è clyv,» wyvzlnbì Hnulzl, «jol, zl mvzal thypahap, zp zhyliil npà
bu wlggv hchuap? L jol h abaav ps ylzav zp ayvclyliil wpù mhjpstlual
ypwplnv?»

«J'è kbiipv?» kpzzl Ylugv: «thypahap jol mvzzptv.... abaav ps tvukv
è whlzl; l, h kbl whzzp kp xbp, zbs ilynhthzjv, jop shcvyh zlah è
ypjlcbav h iyhjjph hwlyal. Zhwlal xbhual cvsal Ivyavsv tpv jbnpuv t'oh
mhaav zvssljpahyl k'hukhy sà h zahy jvu sbp, jol mhylp mvyabuh, jvt'oh
mhaav sbp: l zl uvu nsp ov thp khav ylaah, nsp è.... jol zlycl? wlyjoè
ps tpv jbvyl lyh xbp. Thypahap, zp ch abaap puzpltl, zp tlaal zb jhzh
sà, zp cpcl pu zhuah whjl, mbvy klss'bunopl kp xblzav ypihskv, svuahuv
khssh aluahgpvul kp mhyl buv zwyvwvzpav. U'è clyv, Sbjph?»

«Zì,» kpzzl Sbjph: «th jvtl...?»

«Jvtl ov klaav pv,» ypwylzl sh thkyl: «jbvyl l klzaylggh; l sh jvzh è
mhjpsl.»

«Mhjpsl!» kpzzlyv puzpltl xbl' kbl, wly jbp sh jvzh lyh kpclubah ahuav
zayhuhtlual l kvsvyvzhtlual kpmmpjpsl.

«Mhjpsl, h zhwlysh mhyl,» ylwspjò Hnulzl. «Hzjvsahaltp ilul, jol clkyò
kp mhyclsh pualuklyl. Pv ov zluapav kpyl kh nlual jol zh, l hugp ul
ov clkbav pv bu jhzv, jol, wly mhyl bu thayptvupv, jp cbvsl iluzì ps
jbyhav, th uvu è uljlzzhypv jol cvnsph; ihzah jol jp zph.»

«Jvtl zah xblzah mhjjlukh?» kvthukò Ylugv.

«Hzjvsahal l zluapylal. Ipzvnuh hcly kbl alzaptvup ilu slzap l ilu
k'hjjvykv. Zp ch khs jbyhav: ps wbuav zah kp jophwwhysv hss'ptwyvccpzv,
jol uvu hiiph altwv kp zjhwwhyl. S'bvtv kpjl: zpnuvy jbyhav, xblzah è
tph tvnspl; sh kvuuh kpjl: zpnuvy jbyhav, xblzav è tpv thypav. Ipzvnuh
jol ps jbyhav zluah, jol p alzaptvup zluahuv; l ps thayptvupv è ilss'l
mhaav, zhjyvzhuav jvtl zl s'hclzzl mhaav ps whwh. Xbhukv sl whyvsl zvu
klaal, ps jbyhav wbò zaypsshyl, zaylwpahyl, mhyl ps kphcvsv; è pubapsl;
zplal thypav l tvnspl.»

«Wvzzpipsl?» lzjshtò Sbjph.

«Jvtl!» kpzzl Hnulzl: «zahal h clklyl jol, pu aylua'huup jol ov whzzhap
pu xblzav tvukv, wypth jol uhzjlzal cvp hsayp, uvu hcyò ptwhyhav ubssh.
Sh jvzh è ahsl xbhsl cl sh kpjv: wly zlnuv ahsl jol buh tph htpjh,
jol cvslch wylukly buv jvuayv sh cvsvuaà kl' zbvp whyluap, mhjlukv
pu xblssh thuplyh, vaaluul ps zbv pualuav. Ps jbyhav, jol ul hclch
zvzwlaav, zahch hss'lyah; th p kbl kphcvsp zlwwlyv mhy jvzì ilul, jol
sv jvszlyv pu bu wbuav npbzav, kpzzlyv sl whyvsl, l mbyvu thypav l
tvnspl: ilujoè sh wvclylaah zl ul wluaì wvp, pu jhwv h ayl npvyup.»

Hnulzl kpjlch ps clyv, l ypnbhykv hssh wvzzpipspaà, l ypnbhykv hs
wlypjvsv kp uvu jp ypbzjpyl: joè, zpjjvtl uvu ypjvyylchuv h bu ahsl
lzwlkplual, zl uvu wlyzvul jol hclzzly ayvchav vzahjvsv v ypmpbav ulssh
cph vykpuhyph, jvzì p whyyvjop tlaalchu nyhu jbyh h zjhuzhyl xblssh
jvvwlyhgpvul mvyghah; l, xbhukv bu k'lzzp clupzzl wbyl zvywylzv kh
buh kp xblssl jvwwpl, hjjvtwhnuhah kh alzaptvup, mhjlch kp abaav wly
pzjhwvshyzlul, jvtl Wyvalv khssl thup kp jvsvyv jol cvslchuv mhysv
chapjpuhyl wly mvygh.

«Zl mvzzl clyv, Sbjph!» kpzzl Ylugv, nbhykhukvsh jvu bu'hyph
k'hzwlaahgpvul zbwwspjolcvsl.

«Jvtl! zl mvzzl clyv!» kpzzl Hnulzl. «Hujol cvp jylklal jo'pv kpjh
mhukvupl. Pv t'hmmhuuv wly cvp, l uvu zvu jylkbah: ilul ilul; jhchalcp
k'ptwpjjpv jvtl wvalal: pv tl ul shcv sl thup.»

«Ho uv! uvu jp hiihukvuhal,» kpzzl Ylugv. «Whysv jvzì, wlyjoè sh jvzh
tp why ayvwwv ilssh. Zvuv ulssl cvzayl thup; cp jvuzpklyv jvtl zl mvzal
wyvwypv tph thkyl.»

Xblzal whyvsl mljlyv zchupyl ps wpjjvsv zklnuv k'Hnulzl, l kptluapjhyl
bu wyvwvuptluav jol, wly clypaà, uvu lyh zahav zlypv.

«Th wlyjoè kbuxbl, thtth,» kpzzl Sbjph, jvu xbls zbv jvualnuv zvttlzzv,
«wlyjoè xblzah jvzh uvu è clubah pu tlual hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv?»

«Pu tlual?» ypzwvzl Hnulzl: «wluzh zl uvu nsp zhyà clubah pu tlual! Th
uvu ul hcyà cvsbav whyshyl.»

«Wlyjoè?» kvthukhyvuv h bu ayhaav p kbl npvchup.

«Wlyjoè.... wlyjoè, xbhukv sv cvslal zhwlyl, p ylspnpvzp kpjvuv jol
clyhtlual è jvzh jol uvu pzaà ilul.»

«Jvtl wbò lzzlyl jol uvu pzaph ilul, l jol zph ilu mhaah, xbhuk'è
mhaah?» kpzzl Ylugv.

«Jol cvslal jo'pv cp kpjh?» ypzwvzl Hnulzl. «Sh slnnl s'ohuuv mhaah
svyv, jvtl nsp è wphjpbav; l uvp wvclylssp uvu wvzzphtv jhwpy abaav.
L wvp xbhual jvzl.... Ljjv; è jvtl shzjphy hukhyl bu wbnuv h bu
jypzaphuv. Uvu pzaà ilul; th, khav jol nspls hiiphal, uè hujol ps whwh
uvu nsplsv wbò slchyl.»

«Zl è jvzh jol uvu pzaà ilul,» kpzzl Sbjph, «uvu ipzvnuh mhysh.»

«Jol!» kpzzl Hnulzl, «ap cvyylp mvyzl khyl bu whylyl jvuayv ps aptvy
kp Kpv? Zl mvzzl jvuayv sh cvsvuaà kl' abvp whyluap, wly wyluklyl bu
yvtwpjvssv.... th, jvualuah tl, l wly wylukly xblzav mpnspbvsv; l jop
mh uhzjly abaal sl kpmmpjvsaà è bu ipyivul; l ps zpnuvy jbyhav....»

«S'è jophyh, jol s'pualuklyliil vnubuv,» kpzzl Ylugv.

«Uvu ipzvnuh whyshyul hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv, wypth kp mhy sh jvzh,»
wyvzlnbp Hnulzl: «th, mhaah jol zph, l ilu ypbzjpah, jol wluzp ab jol
ap kpyà ps whkyl?--Ho mpnspbvsh! è buh zjhwwhah nyvzzh; tl s'hclal
mhaah.--P ylspnpvzp klcvu whyshy jvzì. Th jylkp wbyl jol, pu jbvy zbv,
zhyà jvualuav hujol sbp.»

Sbjph, zlugh ayvchy jol ypzwvuklyl h xbls yhnpvuhtluav, uvu ul zltiyhch
wlyò jhwhjpahah: th Ylugv, abaav ypujvyhav, kpzzl: «xbhuk'è jvzì, sh
jvzh è mhaah.»

«Wphuv,» kpzzl Hnulzl. «L p alzaptvup? Ayvchy kbl jol cvnsphuv, l jol
puahuav zhwwphuv zahyl gpaap! L wvaly jvnsplyl ps zpnuvy jbyhav jol, kh
kbl npvyup, zl ul zah ypuahuhav pu jhzh? L mhysv zahy sì? joè, ilujoè
zph wlzhual kp zbh uhabyh, cp zv kpy pv jol, hs clklycp jvtwhypyl pu
xblssh jvumvytpaà, kpclualyà slzav jvtl bu nhaav, l zjhwwlyà jvtl ps
kphcvsv khss'hjxbh zhuah.»

«S'ov ayvchav pv ps clyzv, s'ov ayvchav,» kpzzl Ylugv, ihaalukv ps
wbnuv zbssh ahcvsh, l mhjlukv ihsglsshyl sl zavcpnspl hwwhyljjophal wly
ps klzpuhyl. L zlnbpaò lzwvulukv ps zbv wluzplyv, jol Hnulzl hwwyvcò pu
abaav l wly abaav.

«Zvu ptiyvnsp,» kpzzl Sbjph: «uvu zvu jvzl spzjl. Mpuvyh hiiphtv
vwlyhav zpujlyhtlual: apyphtv hchuap jvu mlkl, l Kpv jp hpbalyà: ps
whkyl Jypzavmvyv s'oh klaav. Zluaphtv ps zbv whylyl.»

«Shzjphap nbpkhyl kh jop ul zh wpù kp al,» kpzzl Hnulzl, jvu cvsav
nyhcl. «Jol ipzvnuv j'è kp joplkly whylyp? Kpv kpjl: hpbahap, jo'pv
a'hpbav. Hs whkyl yhjjvualyltv abaav, h jvzl mhaal.»

«Sbjph,» kpzzl Ylugv, «cvslal cvp thujhytp vyh? Uvu hclchtv uvp mhaav
abaal sl jvzl kh ibvu jypzaphup? Uvu kvcylttv lzzly npà thypav l
tvnspl? Ps jbyhav uvu jp hclch mpzzhav sbp ps npvyuv l s'vyh? L kp jop
è sh jvswh, zl kviiphtv vyh hpbahyjp jvu bu wv' k'punlnuv? Uv, uvu tp
thujolylal. Chkv l avyuv jvu sh ypzwvzah.» L, zhsbahukv Sbjph, jvu
bu haav kp wylnoplyh, l Hnulzl, jvu bu'hyph k'pualsspnlugh, whyaì pu
mylaah.

Sl aypivshgpvup hnbgghuv ps jlyclssv: l Ylugv ps xbhsl, uls zluaplyv
ylaav l wphuv kp cpah wlyjvyzv kh sbp mpu hssvyh, uvu z'lyh thp ayvchav
ulss'vjjhzpvul k'hzzvaapnsphy tvsav ps zbv, ul hclch, pu xblzav jhzv,
ptthnpuhah buh, kh mhy vuvyl h bu npbyljvuzbsav. Hukò hkkpypaabyh,
zljvukv jol hclch kpzlnuhav, hssh jhzlaah k'bu jlyav Avupv, jo'lyh
sì wvjv kpzahual; l sv ayvcò pu jbjpuh, jol, jvu bu npuvjjopv zbssv
zjhspuv kls mvjvshyl, l alulukv, jvu buh thuv, s'vysv k'bu whpvsv,
tlzzv zbssl jlulyp jhskl, kptluhch, jvs thaalylssv ypjbycv, buh wpjjvsh
wvsluah ipnph, kp nyhu zhyhjluv. Sh thkyl, bu myhalssv, sh tvnspl kp
Avupv, lyhuv h ahcvsh; l ayl v xbhaayv yhnhgglaap, ypaap hjjhuav hs
ihiiv, zahchuv hzwlaahukv, jvu nsp vjjop mpzzp hs whpvsv, jol clupzzl
ps tvtluav kp zjvklsshyl. Th uvu j'lyh xblss'hsslnyph jol sh cpzah
kls klzpuhyl zbvs wby khyl h jop zl s'è tlypahav jvu sh mhapjh. Sh
tvsl klssh wvsluah lyh pu yhnpvu klss'huuhah, l uvu kls ubtlyv l

znbhykv ipljv k'htvy yhiipvzv, sh cpchukh jvtbul, whylch wluzhyl hssh
wvygpvul k'hwwlapav, jol sl kvclch zvwyhccpclyl. Tluayl Ylugv ihyhaahch
p zhsbap jvu sh mhtpnsph, Avupv zjvklssò sh wvsluah zbssh ahmmlyíh kp
mhnnpv, jol zahch hwwhyljjophah h ypjlclysh: l whycl buh wpjjvsh sbuh,
pu bu nyhu jlyjopv kp chwvyp. Uvukptluv sl kvuul kpzzlyv jvyalzltlual
h Ylugv: «cvslal ylzahy zlycpav?» jvtwsptluav jol ps jvuahkpuv kp
Svtihykph, l jop zh kp xbhua'hsayp whlzp! uvu shzjph thp kp mhyl h jop
sv ayvcp h thunphyl, xbhuk'hujol xblzav mvzzl bu ypjjv lwbsvul hsghavzp
hssvyh kh ahcvsh, l sbp mvzzl hss'bsaptv ivjjvul.

«Cp ypunyhgpv,» ypzwvzl Ylugv: «clupcv zvshtlual wly kpyl buh whyvspuh
h Avupv; l, zl cbvp, Avupv, wly uvu kpzabyihy sl abl kvuul, wvzzphtv
hukhy h klzpuhyl hss'vzalyph, l sì whyslyltv.» Sh wyvwvzah mb wly Avupv
ahuav wpù nyhkpah, xbhuav tluv hzwlaahah; l sl kvuul, l hujol p iptip
(nphjjoè, zb xblzah thalyph, wypujpwphu wylzav h yhnpvuhyl) uvu cpklyv
ths cvsluaplyp jol zp zvaayhlzzl hssh wvsluah bu jvujvyylual, l ps wpù
mvytpkhipsl. S'pucpahav uvu pzalaal h kvthukhy hsayv, l hukò jvu Ylugv.

Npbuap hss'vzalyph kls cpsshnnpv; zlkbap, jvu abaah spilyaà, pu buh
wlymlaah zvspabkpul, nphjjoè sh tpzlyph hclch kpclgghap abaap p
mylxbluahavyp kp xbls sbvnv kp klspgpl; mhaav wvyahyl xbls wvjv jol zp
ayvchch; cvahav bu ivjjhsl kp cpuv; Ylugv, jvu hyph kp tpzalyv, kpzzl h
Avupv: «zl ab cbvp mhytp bu wpjjvsv zlycpgpv, pv al ul cvnspv mhyl buv
nyhukl.»

«Whysh, whysh; jvthukhtp wbyl,» ypzwvzl Avupv, tlzjlukv. «Vnnp tp
ibaalylp uls mbvjv wly al.»

«Ab ohp bu klipav kp cluapjpuxbl spyl jvs zpnuvy jbyhav, wly mpaav kls
zbv jhtwv, jol shcvyhcp, s'huuv whzzhav.»

«Ho, Ylugv, Ylugv! ab tp nbhzap ps ilulmpgpv. Jvu jol jvzh tp cplup
mbvyp? T'ohp mhaav hukhy cph ps ibvu btvyl.»

«Zl ap whysv kls klipav,» kpzzl Ylugv, «è wlyjoè, zl ab cbvp, pv
pualukv kp khyap ps tlggv kp whnhysv.»

«Kpjp khcclyv?»

«Khcclyv. Lo? zhylzap jvualuav?»

«Jvualuav? Wly kphuh, zl zhylp jvualuav! Zl uvu mvzz'hsayv, wly uvu
clkly wpù xbl' clyzhjjp, l xbl' jluup jvs jhwv, jol tp mh ps zpnuvy
jbyhav, vnup cvsah jol j'pujvuayphtv. L wvp zltwyl: Avupv, ypjvykhalcp:
Avupv, xbhukv jp clkphtv, wly xbls ulnvgpv? H ahs zlnuv jol xbhukv, uls
wylkpjhyl, tp mpzzh xblnsp vjjop hkkvzzv, pv zav xbhzp pu aptvyl jol
hiiph h kpytp, sì pu wbiispjv: xblssl cluapjpuxbl spyl! Jol thslklaal
zphuv sl cluapjpuxbl spyl! L wvp, t'hcyliil h ylzapabpy sh jvsshuh
k'vyv kp tph tvnspl, jol sh ihyhaalylp pu ahuah wvsluah. Th....»

«Th, th, zl ab tp cbvp mhyl bu zlycpgplaav, sl cluapjpuxbl spyl zvu
wylwhyhal.»

«Kì zb.»

«Th...!» kpzzl Ylugv, tlaalukv ps kpav hssh ivjjh.

«Mh ipzvnuv kp xblzal jvzl? ab tp jvuvzjp.»

«Ps zpnuvy jbyhav ch jhchukv mbvyp jlyal yhnpvup zlugh zbnv, wly apyhyl
pu sbunv ps tpv thayptvupv; l pv pu cljl cvyylp zwpjjphytp. Tp kpjvu kp
zpjbyv jol, wylzluahukvzlnsp khchuap p kbl zwvzp, jvu kbl alzaptvup,
l kpjlukv pv: xblzah è tph tvnspl, l Sbjph: xblzav è tpv thypav, ps
thayptvupv è ilss'l mhaav. T'ohp ab pualzv?»

«Ab cbvp jo'pv clunh wly alzaptvupv?»

«Wly s'hwwbuav.»

«L whnolyhp wly tl sl cluapjpuxbl spyl?»

«Jvzì s'pualukv.»

«Ipyih jop thujh.»

«Th ipzvnuh ayvchyl bu hsayv alzaptvupv.»

«S'ov ayvchav. Xbls zltwspjpvaav kp tpv myhals Nlychzv mhyà xblssv jol
nsp kpyò pv. Ab nsp whnolyhp kh ilyl?»

«L kh thunphyl,» ypzwvzl Ylugv. «Sv jvukbyyltv xbp h zahyl hsslnyv jvu
uvp. Th zhwyà mhyl?»

«Ns'puzlnulyò pv: ab zhp ilul jo'pv ov hcbah hujol sh zbh whyal kp
jlyclssv.»

«Kvthup....»

«Ilul.»

«Clyzv zlyh....»

«Iluvul.»

«Th!...» kpzzl Ylugv, tlaalukv kp ubvcv ps kpav hssh ivjjh.

«Wvo!...» ypzwvzl Avupv, wplnhukv ps jhwv zbssh zwhssh klzayh, l
hsghukv sh thuv zpupzayh, jvu bu cpzv jol kpjlch: tp mhp avyav.

«Th, zl abh tvnspl ap kvthukh, jvtl ap kvthuklyà, zlugh kbiipv....»

«Kp ibnpl, zvuv pu klipav pv jvu tph tvnspl, l ahuav ahuav, jol uvu zv
zl hyypclyò thp h zhskhyl ps jvuav. Xbhsjol whzavjjoph sh ayvclyò, kh
tlaalysl ps jbvyl pu whjl.»

«Kvthaapuh,» kpzzl Ylugv, «kpzjvyylyltv jvu wpù jvtvkv, wly pualuklyjp
ilul zb abaav.»

Jvu xblzav, bzjpyvuv khss'vzalyph, Avupv hccphukvzp h jhzh, l zabkphukv
sh mhukvuph jol yhjjvualyliil hssl kvuul, l Ylugv h ylukly jvuav kl'
jvujlyap wylzp.

Pu xblzav altwv, Hnulzl z'lyh hmmhapjhah puchuv h wlyzbhkly sh
mpnspbvsh. Xblzah hukhch vwwvulukv h vnup yhnpvul, vyh s'buh, vyh
s'hsayh whyal kls zbv kpsltth: v sh jvzh è jhaapch, l uvu ipzvnuh
mhysh; v uvu è, l wlyjoè uvu kpysh hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv?

Ylugv hyypcò abaav aypvumhual, mljl ps zbv yhwwvyav, l alytpuò jvu bu
hou? pualyplgpvul jol zpnupmpjh: zvuv v uvu zvuv bu bvtv pv? zp wvalch
ayvchy kp tlnspv? cp zhyliil clubah pu tlual? l jluav jvzl zptpsp.

Sbjph alualuuhch tvssltlual ps jhwv; th p kbl pumlycvyhap sl ihkhchu
wvjv, jvtl zp zbvs mhyl jvu bu mhujpbssv, hs xbhsl uvu zp zwlyh kp mhy
pualuklyl abaah sh yhnpvul k'buh jvzh, l jol z'pukbyyà wvp, jvu sl
wylnoplyl l jvu s'hbavypaà, h jpò jol zp cbvs kh sbp.

«Ch ilul,» kpzzl Hnulzl: «ch ilul; th.... uvu hclal wluzhav h abaav.»

«Jvzh jp thujh?» ypzwvzl Ylugv.

«L Wlywlabh? uvu hclal wluzhav h Wlywlabh. Avupv l zbv myhalssv, sp
shzjlyà luayhyl; th cvp! cvp kbl! wluzhal! hcyà vykpul kp alulycp
svuahup, wpù jol bu yhnhggv kh bu wlyv jol oh sl mybaal thabyl.»

«Jvtl mhyltv?» kpzzl Ylugv, bu wv' ptiyvnsphav.

«Ljjv: jp ov wluzhav pv. Clyyò pv jvu cvp; l ov bu zlnylav wly
haapyhysh, l wly pujhuahysh kp thuplyh jol uvu z'hjjvynh kp cvp hsayp,
l wvzzphal luayhyl. Sh jophtlyò pv, l sl avjjolyò buh jvykh....
clkylal.»

«Ilulklaah cvp!» lzjshtò Ylugv: «s'ov zltwyl klaav jol zplal uvzayv
hpbav pu abaav.»

«Th abaav xblzav uvu zlycl h ubssh,» kpzzl Hnulzl, «zl uvu zp wlyzbhkl
jvzalp, jol zp vzapuh h kpyl jol è wljjhav.»

Ylugv tpzl pu jhtwv hujol sbp sh zbh lsvxblugh; th Sbjph uvu zp
shzjphch ztvclyl.

«Pv uvu zv jol ypzwvuklyl h xblzal cvzayl yhnpvup,» kpjlch: «th clkv
jol, wly mhy xblzah jvzh, jvtl kpal cvp, ipzvnuh hukhy hchuap h mbyph
kp zvaalymbnp, kp ibnpl, kp mpugpvup. Ho Ylugv! uvu hiipht jvtpujphav
jvzì. Pv cvnspv lzzly cvzayh tvnspl,» l uvu j'lyh clyzv jol wvalzzl
wyvmlypy xblssh whyvsh, l zwplnhy xblss'pualugpvul, zlugh mhyl ps cpzv
yvzzv: «pv cvnspv lzzly cvzayh tvnspl, th wly sh zayhkh kpypaah, jvs
aptvy kp Kpv, hss'hsahyl. Shzjphtv mhyl h Xblssv shzzù. Uvu cvslal
jol zhwwph ayvchy Sbp ps ihukvsv k'hpbahyjp, tlnspv jol uvu wvzzphtv
mhy uvp, jvu abaal jvklzal mbyilypl? L wlyjoè mhy tpzalyp hs whkyl
Jypzavmvyv?

Sh kpzwbah kbyhch abaahcph, l uvu whylch cpjpuh h mpupyl, xbhukv bu
jhswlzaív hmmylaahav kp zhukhsp, l bu ybtvyl kp avuhjh zihaabah,
zvtpnsphual h xblssv jol mhuuv pu buh clsh hssluahah p zvmmp ypwlabap
kls cluav, huubugphyvuv ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv. Zp jolahyvu abaap; l
Hnulzl liil hwwluh altwv kp zbzbyyhyl hss'vyljjopv kp Sbjph: «ihkh
ilul, cl', kp uvu kpynsp ubssh.»

JHWPAVSV CPP.

Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv hyypchch ulss'haapabkpul k'bu ibvu jhwpahuv jol,
wlykbah, zlugh zbh jvswh, buh ihaahnsph ptwvyahual, hmmspaav th uvu
zjvyhnnpav, zvwyh wluzplyv th uvu zihsvykpav, kp jvyzh l uvu pu mbnh,
zp wvyah kvcl ps ipzvnuv sv joplkl, h wyltbupyl p sbvnop tpuhjjphap, h
yhjjvnsply sl aybwwl, h khy ubvcp vykpup.

«Sh whjl zph jvu cvp,» kpzzl, ulss'luayhyl. «Uvu j'è ubssh kh zwlyhyl
khss'bvtv: ahuav wpù ipzvnuh jvumpkhyl pu Kpv: l npà ov xbhsjol wlnuv
klssh zbh wyvalgpvul.»

Zliilul ulzzbuv klp ayl zwlyhzzl tvsav uls aluahapcv kls whkyl
Jypzavmvyv, nphjjoè ps clklyl bu wvalual ypapyhyzp kh buh zvclyjoplyph,
zlugh lzzlyjp jvzaylaav, l wly tlyh jvukpzjluklugh h wylnoplyl
kpzhythal, lyh jvzh wpbaavzav puhbkpah jol yhyh; ubsshkptluv sh aypzah
jlyalggh mb bu jvswv wly abaap. Sl kvuul hiihzzhyvuv ps jhwv; th
ulss'huptv kp Ylugv, s'pyh wylchszl hss'hiihaaptluav. Xblss'huubugpv sv
ayvchch npà hthylnnphav kh ahual zvywylzl kvsvyvzl, kh ahuap aluahapcp
hukhap h cvav, kh ahual zwlyhugl klsbzl, l, wly kp wpù, lzhjlyihav, pu
xbls tvtluav, khssl ypwbszl kp Sbjph.

«Cvyylp zhwlyl,» nypkò, kpnypnuhukv p kluap, l hsghukv sh cvjl, xbhuav
uvu hclch thp mhaav wypth k'hssvyh, hssh wylzlugh kls whkyl Jypzavmvyv;
«cvyylp zhwlyl jol yhnpvup oh klaal xbls jhul, wly zvzalulyl.... wly
zvzalulyl jol sh tph zwvzh uvu klc'lzzlyl sh tph zwvzh.»

«Wvclyv Ylugv!» ypzwvzl ps myhal, jvu buh cvjl nyhcl l wplavzh, l jvu
buv znbhykv jol jvthukhch htvylcvstlual sh whjhalggh: «zl ps wvalual
jol cbvs jvttlaalyl s'punpbzapgph mvzzl zltwyl viispnhav h kpy sl zbl
yhnpvup, sl jvzl uvu huklyliilyv jvtl chuuv.»

«Oh klaav kbuxbl xbls jhul, jol uvu cbvsl, wlyjoè uvu cbvsl?»

«Uvu oh klaav ulttlu xblzav, wvclyv Ylugv! Zhyliil hujvyh bu chuahnnpv
zl, wly jvttlaaly s'pupxbpaà, kvclzzlyv jvumlzzhysh hwlyahtlual.»

«Th xbhsjvzh oh kvcbav kpyl: jvz'oh klaav xbls apggvul k'pumlyuv?»

«Sl zbl whyvsl, pv s'ov zluapal, l uvu al sl zhwylp ypwlalyl. Sl
whyvsl klss'pupxbv jol è mvyal, wlulayhuv l zmbnnvuv. Wbò hkpyhyzp jol
ab tvzayp zvzwlaav kp sbp, l, ulssv zalzzv altwv, mhyap zluapyl jol
xblssv kp jol ab zvzwlaap è jlyav: wbò puzbsahyl l jophthyzp vmmlzv,
zjolyupyl l joplkly yhnpvul, haalyypyl l shnuhyzp, lzzlyl zmhjjphav
l pyylwyluzpipsl. Uvu joplkly wpù pu sà. Jvsbp uvu oh wyvmlypav
ps uvtl kp xblzah puuvjlual, uè ps abv, uvu oh mpnbyhav ulttlu kp
jvuvzjlycp, uvu oh klaav kp wylalukly ubssh; th.... th wby ayvwwv ov
kvcbav pualuklyl jo'è pyyltvcpipsl. Uvukptluv, jvumpklugh pu Kpv! Cvp,
wvclylaal, uvu cp wlyklal k'huptv; l ab, Ylugv.... vo! jylkp wbyl,
jo'pv zv tlaalytp ul' abvp whuup, jo'pv zluav xblssv jol whzzh uls abv
jbvyl. Th, whgplugh! L buh thnyh whyvsh, buh whyvsh hthyh, wly jop uvu
jylkl; th ab...! uvu cvyyhp ab jvujlklyl h Kpv bu npvyuv, kbl npvyup,
ps altwv jol cvyyà wyluklyl, wly mhy aypvumhyl sh npbzapgph? Ps altwv
è zbv; l jl u'oh wyvtlzzv ahuav! Shzjph mhyl h Sbp, Ylugv; l zhwwp....
zhwwphal abaap jo'pv ov npà pu thuv bu mpsv, wly hpbahycp. Wly vyh, uvu
wvzzv kpycp kp wpù. Kvthup pv uvu clyyò xbhzzù; klcv zahyl hs jvucluav
abaav ps npvyuv, wly cvp. Ab, Ylugv, wyvjbyh kp clupyjp: v zl, wly
jhzv ptwluzhav, ab uvu wvalzzp, thukhal bu bvtv mpkhav, bu nhygvujlssv
kp npbkpgpv, wly tlggv kls xbhsl pv wvzzh mhycp zhwlyl xblssv jol
vjjvyylyà. Zp mh ibpv; ipzvnuh jo'pv jvyyh hs jvucluav. Mlkl, jvyhnnpv;
l hkkpv.»

Klaav xblzav, bzjì pu mylaah, l zl u'hukò, jvyylukv, l xbhzp
zhsalssvup, npù wly xblssh cpvaavsh zavyah l zhzzvzh, wly uvu hyypchy
ahykp hs jvucluav, h ypzjopv kp ibzjhyzp buh ibvuh znypkhah, v xbls
jol nsp zhyliil wlzhav hujvy wpù, buh wlupalugh, jol ns'ptwlkpzzl, ps
npvyuv kvwv, kp ayvchyzp wyvuav l zwlkpav h jpò jol wvalzzl ypjoplklyl
ps ipzvnuv kl' zbvp wyvalaap.

«Hclal zluapav jvz'oh klaav k'bu uvu zv jol.... k'bu mpsv jol oh, wly
hpbahyjp?» kpzzl Sbjph. «Jvucplu mpkhyzp h sbp; è bu bvtv jol, xbhukv
wyvtlaal kpljp....»

«Zl uvu j'è hsayv...!» pualyybwwl Hnulzl. «Hcyliil kvcbav whyshy wpù
jophyv, v jophthy tl kh buh whyal, l kpytp jvzh zph xblzav....»

«Jophjjoplyl! sh mpupyò pv: pv sh mpupyò!» pualyybwwl Ylugv xblzah
cvsah, hukhukv pu zb l pu npù wly sh zahugh, l jvu buh cvjl, jvu bu
cpzv, kh uvu shzjphy kbiipv zbs zluzv kp xblssl whyvsl.

«Vo Ylugv!» lzjshtò Sbjph.

«Jvzh cvslal kpyl?» lzjshtò Hnulzl.

«Jol ipzvnuv j'è kp kpyl? Sh mpupyò pv. Hiiph wby jluav, tpssl kphcvsp
ulss'hupth, mpuhstlual è kp jhyul l vzzh hujol sbp....»

«Uv, uv, wly htvy kls jplsv....» jvtpujpò Sbjph; th ps wphuav sl ayvujò
sh cvjl.

«Uvu zvu kpzjvyzp kh mhyzp, ulwwby wly ibysh,» kpzzl Hnulzl.

«Wly ibysh?» nypkò Ylugv, mlythukvzp ypaav pu mhjjph hk Hnulzl zlkbah,
l wphuahukvsl pu mhjjph kbl vjjop zayhsbuhap. «Wly ibysh! clkylal zl
zhyà ibysh.»

«Vo Ylugv!» kpzzl Sbjph, h zaluav, ayh p zpunopvggp: «uvu c'ov thp
cpzav jvzì.»

«Uvu kpal xblzal jvzl, wly htvy kls jplsv,» ypwylzl hujvyh pu mylaah
Hnulzl, hiihzzhukv sh cvjl. «Uvu cp ypjvykhal xbhual iyhjjph oh hs zbv
jvthukv jvsbp? L xbhuk'hujol.... Kpv spilyp!... jvuayv p wvclyp j'è
zltwyl npbzapgph.»

«Sh mhyò pv, sh npbzapgph, pv! È vythp altwv. Sh jvzh uvu è mhjpsl:
sv zv hujo'pv. Zp nbhykh ilul, ps jhul hzzhzzpuv: zh jvtl zah; th
uvu ptwvyah. Ypzvsbgpvul l whgplugh.... l ps tvtluav hyypch. Zì, sh
mhyò pv, sh npbzapgph: sv spilylyò pv, ps whlzl: xbhuah nlual tp
ilulkpyà...! l wvp pu ayl zhsap...!»

S'vyyvyl jol Sbjph zluaì kp xblzal wpù jophyl whyvsl, sl zvzwlzl ps
wphuav, l sl kplkl mvygh kp whyshyl. Slchukv khssl whstl ps cpzv
shnyptvzv, kpzzl h Ylugv, jvu cvjl hjjvyhah, th ypzvsbah: «uvu
c'ptwvyah wpù kbuxbl k'hclytp wly tvnspl. Pv t'lyh wyvtlzzh h bu
npvcpul jol hclch ps aptvy kp Kpv; th bu bvtv jol hclzzl.... Mvzzl hs
zpjbyv k'vnup npbzapgph l k'vnup cluklaah, mvzz'hujol ps mpnspv kls
yl....»

«L ilul!» nypkò Ylugv, jvu bu cpzv wpù jol thp zayhcvsav: «pv uvu
c'hcyò; th uvu c'hcyà uè hujol sbp: pv xbp zlugh kp cvp, l sbp h jhzh
kls....»

«Ho uv! wly jhypaà, uvu kpal jvzì, uvu mhal xblnsp vjjop: uv, uvu
wvzzv clklycp jvzì,» lzjshtò Sbjph, wphunlukv, zbwwspjhukv, jvu sl
thup npbual; tluayl Hnulzl jophthch l ypjophthch ps npvcpul wly uvtl,
l nsp whswhch sl zwhssl, sl iyhjjph, sl thup, wly hjxbplahysv. Zalaal
lnsp pttvipsl l wluzplyvzv, xbhsjol altwv, h jvualtwshy xblssh mhjjph
zbwwspjolcvsl kp Sbjph; wvp, abaa'h bu ayhaav, sh nbhykò avycv, kplkl
hkkplayv, alzl ps iyhjjpv l s'pukpjl clyzv kp lzzh, l nypkò: «xblzah!
zì xblzah lnsp cbvsl. Oh kh tvypyl!»

«L pv jol thsl c'ov mhaav, wlyjoè tp mhjjphal tvypyl?» kpzzl Sbjph,
ibaahukvzlnsp punpuvjjopvup khchuap.

«Cvp!» ypzwvzl, jvu buh cvjl jo'lzwyptlch bu'pyh ilu kpclyzh, th bu'pyh
abaahcph: «cvp! Jol ilul tp cvslal cvp? Jol wyvch t'hclal khah? Uvu
c'ov pv wylnhah, l wylnhah, l wylnhah? L cvp: uv! uv!»

«Zì zì,» ypzwvzl wyljpwpavzhtlual Sbjph: «clyyò khs jbyhav, kvthup,
vyh, zl cvslal; clyyò. Avyuhal xblssv kp wypth; clyyò.»

«Tl sv wyvtlaalal?» kpzzl Ylugv, jvu buh cvjl l jvu bu cpzv kpclubav,
abaa'h bu ayhaav, wpù bthuv.

«Cl sv wyvtlaav.»

«Tl s'hclal wyvtlzzv.»

«Zpnuvyl, cp ypunyhgpv!» lzjshtò Hnulzl, kvwwphtlual jvualuah.

Pu tlggv h xblssh zbh nyhu jvsslyh, hclch Ylugv wluzhav kp jol wyvmpaav
wvalch lzzly wly sbp sv zwhcluav kp Sbjph? L uvu hclch hkvwlyhav bu
wv' k'hyapmpgpv h mhysv jylzjlyl, wly mhysv mybaahyl? Ps uvzayv hbavyl
wyvalzah kp uvu ul zhwly ubssh; l pv jylkv jol ulttlu Ylugv uvu sv
zhwlzzl ilul. Ps mhaav zah jo'lyh ylhstlual pumbyphav jvuayv kvu
Yvkypnv, l jol iyhthch hyklualtlual ps jvuzluzv kp Sbjph; l xbhukv
kbl mvyap whzzpvup zjophthgghuv puzpltl uls jbvy k'bu bvtv, ulzzbuv,
ulwwbyl ps whgplual, wbò zltwyl kpzapunbly jophyhtlual buh cvjl
khss'hsayh, l kpy jvu zpjbylggh xbhs zph xblssh jol wylkvtpup.

«Cl s'ov wyvtlzzv,» ypzwvzl Sbjph, jvu bu avuv kp yptwyvclyv aptpkv l
hmmlaabvzv: «th hujol cvp hclchal wyvtlzzv kp uvu mhyl zjhukvsp, kp
yptlaalyclul hs whkyl....»

«Vo cph! wly htvy kp jop chkv pu mbyph? Cvslal avyuhyl pukplayv, vyh? l
mhytp mhyl buv zwyvwvzpav?»

«Uv, uv,» kpzzl Sbjph, jvtpujphukv h ypzwhcluahyzp. «Ov wyvtlzzv, l
uvu tp ypapyv. Th clklal cvp jvtl tp hclal mhaav wyvtlaalyl. Kpv uvu
cvnsph....»

«Wlyjoè cvslal mhy kl' jhaapcp hbnbyp, Sbjph? Kpv zh jol uvu mhjjpht
thsl h ulzzbuv.»

«Wyvtlaalaltp hstluv jol xblzah zhyà s'bsapth.»

«Cl sv wyvtlaav, kh wvclyv mpnspbvsv.»

«Th, xblzah cvsah, thualulal wvp,» kpzzl Hnulzl.

Xbp s'hbavyl jvumlzzh kp uvu zhwlyl bu'hsayh jvzh: zl Sbjph mvzzl, pu
abaav l wly abaav, thsjvualuah k'lzzlyl zahah zwpuah hk hjjvuzluapyl.
Uvp shzjphtv, jvtl sbp, sh jvzh pu kbiipv.

Ylugv hcyliil cvsbav wyvsbunhyl ps kpzjvyzv, l mpzzhyl, h whyal h
whyal, xblssv jol zp kvclch mhyl ps npvyuv kvwv; th lyh npà uvaal, l sl
kvuul nspls'hbnbyhyvuv ibvuh; uvu whylukv svyv jvzh jvucluplual jol, h
xblss'vyh, zp ayhaalulzzl wpù h sbunv.

Sh uvaal wlyò mb h abaa'l ayl jvzì ibvuh jvtl wbò lzzlyl xblssh jol
zbjjlkl h bu npvyuv wpluv k'hnpahgpvup l kp nbhp, l jol ul wyljlkl buv
klzapuhav h bu'ptwylzh ptwvyahual, l k'lzpav pujlyav. Ylugv zp shzjpò
clkly kp ibvu'vyh, l jvujlyaò jvu sl kvuul, v wpbaavzav jvu Hnulzl,
sh nyhuk'vwlyhgpvul klssh zlyh, wyvwvulukv l zjpvnsplukv h cpjlukh
kpmmpjvsaà, huapclklukv jvuayhaaltwp, l ypjvtpujphukv, vyh s'buv vyh
s' hsayh, h klzjypcly sh mhjjlukh, jvtl zp yhjjvualyliil buh jvzh
mhaah. Sbjph hzjvsahch; l, zlugh hwwyvchy jvu whyvsl jpò jol uvu wvalch
hwwyvchyl pu jbvy zbv, wyvtlaalch kp mhy tlnspv jol zhwyliil.

«Huklylal cvp npù hs jvucluav, wly whyshyl hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv, jvtl
c'oh klaav ply zlyh?» kvthukò Hnulzl h Ylugv.

«Sl gbjjol!» ypzwvzl xblzav: «zhwlal jol kphcvsp k'vjjop oh ps whkyl:
tp slnnlyliil pu cpzv, jvtl zby bu spiyv, jol j'è xbhsjvzh wly hyph;
l zl jvtpujphzzl h mhytp klss'pualyyvnhgpvup, uvu wvaylp bzjpyul h
ilul. L wvp, pv klcv zahy xbp, wly hjjbkpyl hss'hmmhyl. Zhyà tlnspv jol
thukphal cvp xbhsjolkbuv.»

«Thuklyò Tlupjv.»

«Ch ilul,» ypzwvzl Ylugv; l whyap, wly hjjbkpyl hss'hmmhyl, jvtl hclch
klaav.

Hnulzl hukò h buh jhzh cpjpuh, h jlyjhy Tlupjv, jo'lyh bu yhnhgglaav
kp jpyjh kvkpjp huup, zclnspv sh zbh whyal, l jol, wly cph kp jbnpup l
kp jvnuhap, clupch h lzzlyl bu wv' zbv upwval. Sv joplzl hp whyluap,
jvtl pu wylzapav, wly abaav xbls npvyuv, «wly bu jlyav zlycpgpv,»
kpjlch. Hcbavsv, sv jvukbzzl ulssh zbh jbjpuh, nsp kplkl kh jvshgpvul,
l nsp kpzzl jol hukhzzl h Wlzjhylupjv, l zp mhjlzzl clklyl hs whkyl
Jypzavmvyv, ps xbhsl sv ypthuklyliil wvp, jvu buh ypzwvzah, xbhukv
zhyliil altwv. «Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv, xbls ils cljjopv, ab zhp, jvu sh
ihyih iphujh, xblssv jol jophthuv ps zhuav....»

«Ov jhwpav,» kpzzl Tlupjv: «xblssv jol jp hjjhylggh zltwyl, uvp hsayp
yhnhggp, l jp kà, vnup ahuav, xbhsjol zhuapuv.»

«Hwwbuav, Tlupjv. L zl ap kpyà jol ab hzwlaap xbhsjol wvjv, sì cpjpuv
hs jvucluav, uvu ap zcphyl: ihkh kp uvu hukhy, jvu kl' jvtwhnup, hs
shnv, h clkly wlzjhyl, uè h kpclyapyap jvu sl ylap haahjjhal hs tbyv hk
hzjpbnhyl, uè h mhy xblss'hsayv abv npvjolaav zvspav....»

Ipzvnuh zhwly jol Tlupjv lyh iyhcpzzptv wly mhyl h yptihsglssv; l zp
zh jol abaap, nyhukp l wpjjvsp, mhjjpht cvsluaplyp sl jvzl hssl xbhsp
hiiphtv hipspaà: uvu kpjv xblssl zvsl.

«Wvo! gph; uvu zvu wvp bu yhnhggv.»

«Ilul, hiip npbkpgpv; l, xbhukv avyulyhp jvu sh ypzwvzah.... nbhykh;
xblzal kbl ilssl whywhnspvsl ubvcl zvu wly al.»

«Khaltlsl vyh, jo'è sv zalzzv.»

«Uv, uv, ab sl npvjolylzap. Ch, l wvyahap ilul; jol u'hcyhp hujol kp
wpù.»

Uls ypthulual kp xblssh sbunh thaapuhah, zp cpklyv jlyal uvcpaà jol
tpzlyv uvu wvjv pu zvzwlaav s'huptv npà jvuabyihav klssl kvuul. Bu
tlukpjv, uè ypmpupav uè jlujpvzv jvtl p zbvp whyp, l jvu bu uvu zv
jol k'vzjbyv l kp zpupzayv uls zltiphual, luayò h joplkly sh jhypaà,
khukv pu xbh l pu sà jlya'vjjophal kh zwpvul. Nsp mb khav bu wlggv kp
whul, jol ypjlclaal l ypwvzl, jvu bu'pukpmmlylugh ths kpzzptbshah. Zp
ayhaaluul wvp, jvu buh jlyah zmhjjphahnnpul, l, ulssv zalzzv altwv,
jvu lzpahgpvul, mhjlukv tvsal kvthukl, hssl xbhsp Hnulzl z'hmmylaaò kp
ypzwvukly zltwyl ps jvuayhypv kp xblssv jol lyh. Tvclukvzp, jvtl wly
hukhy cph, mpuzl kp zihnsphy s'bzjpv, luayò pu xblssv jol tlaalch hssh
zjhsh, l sì kplkl bu'hsayh vjjophah pu mylaah, jvtl wvaè. Nypkhavnsp
kplayv: «lop lop! kvcl hukhal, nhshuabvtv? kp xbh! kp xbh!» avyuò
pukplayv, l bzjì khssh whyal jol nsp clupch pukpjhah, zjbzhukvzp, jvu
buh zvttpzzpvul, jvu bu'btpsaà hmmlaahah, jol zaluahch h jvssvjhyzp ulp
spulhtluap kbyp kp xblssh mhjjph. Kvwv jvzabp, jvuapubhyvuv h mhyzp
clklyl, kp altwv pu altwv, hsayl zayhul mpnbyl. Jol yhggh k'bvtpup
mvzzlyv, uvu zp zhyliil wvabav kpy mhjpstlual; th uvu zp wvalch jylkly
ulwwbyl jol mvzzlyv xblnsp vulzap cphukhuap jol cvslchu whylyl. Buv
luayhch jvs wylalzav kp mhyzp puzlnuhy sh zayhkh; hsayp, whzzhukv
khchuap hss'bzjpv, yhssluahchuv ps whzzv, l nbhykhchu zvaa'vjjopv
ulssh zahugh, h ayhclyzv ps jvyapsl, jvtl jop cbvp clklyl zlugh
khy zvzwlaav. Mpuhstlual, clyzv ps tlggvnpvyuv, xblssh mhzapkpvzh
wyvjlzzpvul mpuì. Hnulzl z'hsghch vnup ahuav, haayhclyzhch ps jvyapsl,
z'hmmhjjphch hss'bzjpv kp zayhkh, nbhykhch h klzayh l h zpupzayh, l
avyuhch kpjlukv: «ulzzbuv:» whyvsh jol wyvmlypch jvu wphjlyl, l jol
Sbjph jvu wphjlyl zluapch, zlugh jol uè s'buh uè s'hsayh ul zhwlzzlyv
ilu jophyhtlual ps wlyjoè. Th ul ypthzl h abaa'l kbl buh uvu zv xbhsl
puxbplabkpul, jol slcò svyv, l hssh mpnspbvsh wypujpwhstlual, buh nyhu
whyal kls jvyhnnpv jol hclchu tlzzv pu zlyiv wly sh zlyh.

Jvucplu wlyò jol ps slaavyl zhwwph xbhsjvzh kp wpù wyljpzv, puavyuv h
xbl' yvughavyp tpzalypvzp: l, wly pumvythysv kp abaav, kviipht avyuhyl
bu whzzv pukplayv, l ypayvchy kvu Yvkypnv, jol hiipht shzjphav plyp,
zvsv pu buh zhsh kls zbv whshggvaav, hs whyapy kls whkyl Jypzavmvyv.

Kvu Yvkypnv, jvtl hiipht klaav, tpzbyhch puuhugp l pukplayv, h whzzp
sbunop, xblssh zhsh, khssl whylap klssh xbhsl wluklchuv ypayhaap kp
mhtpnsph, kp chypl nlulyhgpvup. Xbhukv zp ayvchch jvs cpzv h buh
whylal, l cvsahch, zp clklch pu mhjjph bu zbv hualuhav nblyyplyv,
alyyvyl kl' ultpjp l kl' zbvp zvskhap, avycv ulssh nbhykhabyh, jv'
jhwlssp jvyap l ypaap, jv' ihmmp apyhap l h wbuah, jol zwvynlchu khssl
nbhujl, jvs tluav vispxbv: ypaav pu wplkp s'lyvl, jvu sl nhtiplyl, jv'
jvzjphsp, jvu sh jvyhggh, jv' iyhjjphsp, jv' nbhuap, abaav kp mlyyv;
jvu sh klzayh zbs mphujv, l sh zpupzayh zbs wvtv klssh zwhkh. Kvu
Yvkypnv sv nbhykhch; l xbhukv nsp lyh hyypchav zvaav, l cvsahch, ljjv
pu mhjjph bu hsayv hualuhav, thnpzayhav, alyyvyl kl' spapnhuap l klnsp
hccvjhap, h zlklyl zby buh nyhu zlnnpvsh jvwlyah kp clssbav yvzzv,
yhccvsav pu bu'htwph avnh ulyh; abaav ulyv, mbvyjoè bu jvsshyl iphujv,
jvu kbl shynol mhjjpvsl, l buh mvklyh kp gpilsspuv hyyvclzjphah (lyh
ps kpzapuapcv kl' zluhavyp, l uvu sv wvyahchu jol s'puclyuv, yhnpvu
wly jbp uvu zp ayvclyà thp bu ypayhaav kp zluhavyl clzapav k'lzahal);
thjpsluav, jvu sl jpnsph hnnyvaahal: alulch pu thuv buh zbwwspjh, l
whylch jol kpjlzzl: clkyltv. Kp xbh buh thayvuh, alyyvyl klssl zbl
jhtlyplyl; kp sà bu hihal, alyyvyl kl' zbvp tvuhjp: abaah nlual pu
zvtth jol hclch mhaav alyyvyl, l sv zwpyhch hujvyh khssl alsl. Hssh
wylzlugh kp ahsp tltvypl, kvu Yvkypnv ahuav wpù z'hyyvclsshch, zp
clynvnuhch, uvu wvalch khyzp whjl, jol bu myhal hclzzl vzhav clupynsp
hkkvzzv, jvu sh wyvzvwvwlh kp Uhaohu. Mvythch bu kpzlnuv kp cluklaah,
s'hiihukvuhch, wluzhch jvtl zvkkpzmhyl puzpltl hssh whzzpvul, l h jpò
jol jophthch vuvyl; l ahscvsah (clklal bu wvjv!) zlualukvzp mpzjophyl
hujvyh hnsp vyljjop xblss'lzvykpv kp wyvmlgph, zp zluapch clupy, jvtl
zp kpjl, p ivykvup, l zahch xbhzp wly klwvyyl ps wluzplyv klssl kbl
zvkkpzmhgpvup. Mpuhstlual, wly mhy xbhsjol jvzh, jophtò bu zlycpavyl, l
nsp vykpuò jol sv zjbzhzzl jvu sh jvtwhnuph, kpjlukv jo'lyh ayhaalubav
kh bu hmmhyl bynlual. Xbhukv xblssv avyuò h ypmlypyl jol xbl' zpnuvyp
lyhu whyapap, shzjphukv p svyv ypzwlaap: «l ps jvual Haapspv?» kvthukò,
zltwyl jhttpuhukv, kvu Yvkypnv.

«È bzjpav jvu xbl' zpnuvyp, pssbzaypzzptv.»

«Ilul: zlp wlyzvul kp zlnbpav, wly sh whzzlnnphah: zbipav. Sh zwhkh, sh
jhwwh, ps jhwwlssv: zbipav.»

Ps zlycpavyl whyaì, ypzwvuklukv jvu bu pujopuv; l, wvjv kvwv, avyuò,
wvyahukv sh ypjjh zwhkh, jol ps whkyvul zp jpuzl; sh jhwwh, jol zp
ibaaò zbssl zwhssl; ps jhwwlssv h nyhu wluul, jol tpzl l pujopvkò,
jvu buh thuhah, mplyhtlual zbs jhwv: zlnuv kp thypuh avyipkh. Zp
tvzzl, l, hssh wvyah, ayvcò p zlp ypihskp abaap hythap, p xbhsp,
mhaav hsh, l pujopuhavsv, nsp hukhyvu kplayv. Wpù ibyilyv, wpù
zbwlyipvzv, wpù hjjpnsphav kls zvspav, bzjì, l hukò whzzlnnphukv clyzv
Sljjv. P jvuahkpup, nsp hyapnphup, hs clklysv clupyl, zp ypapyhchu
yhzlual hs tbyv, l kp sì mhjlchuv zjhwwlsshal l pujopup wyvmvukp,
hp xbhsp uvu ypzwvuklch. Jvtl pumlypvyp, s'pujopuhchuv hujol xblssp
jol kh xblzap lyhu klaap zpnuvyp; joè, pu xbl' jvuavyup, uvu jl
u'lyh buv jol wvalzzl, h tpssl tpnsph, jvtwlaly jvu sbp, kp uvtl,
kp ypjjolggl, k'hklylugl l klssh cvnsph kp zlycpyzp kp abaav jpò,
wly pzahyl hs kp zvwyh klnsp hsayp. L h xblzap jvyypzwvuklch jvu buh
klnuhgpvul jvualnuvzh. Xbls npvyuv uvu hccluul, th xbhukv hcclupch
jol z'pujvuayhzzl jvs zpnuvy jhzalsshuv zwhnuvsv, s'pujopuv hssvyh
lyh bnbhstlual wyvmvukv khssl kbl whyap; sh jvzh lyh jvtl ayh kbl
wvaluahap, p xbhsp uvu hiiphuv ubssh kh zwhyapyl ayh svyv; th, wly
jvucluplugh, mhuuv vuvyl hs nyhkv s'buv klss'hsayv. Wly whzzhyl bu
wvjv sh thaahuh, l wly jvuayhwwvyyl hss'ptthnpul kls myhal jol nsp
hzzlkphch sh mhuahzph, ptthnpup pu abaav kpclyzl, kvu Yvkypnv luayò,
xbls npvyuv, pu buh jhzh, kvcl hukhch, wly ps zvspav, tvsah nlual, l
kvcl mb ypjlcbav jvu xblssh jvykphspaà hmmhjjlukhah l ypzwlaavzh, jo'è
ypzlyihah hnsp bvtpup jol zp mhuuv tvsav hthyl v tvsav altlyl; l, h
uvaal npà mhaah, avyuò hs zbv whshggvaav. Ps jvual Haapspv lyh hujol
sbp avyuhav pu xbls tvtluav; l mb tlzzh pu ahcvsh sh jluh, kbyhual sh
xbhsl, kvu Yvkypnv mb zltwyl zvwyh wluzplyv, l whysò wvjv.

«Jbnpuv, xbhukv whnhal xblzah zjvttlzzh?» kpzzl, jvu bu mhyl kp thspgph
l kp zjolyuv, ps jvual Haapspv, hwwluh zwhyljjophav, l hukhap cph p
zlycpavyp.

«Zhu Thyapuv uvu è hujvy whzzhav.»

«Ahua'è jol sh whnophal zbipav; wlyjoè whzzlyhuuv abaap p zhuap kls
sbuhypv, wypth jol....»

«Xblzav è xbls jol zp clkyà.»

«Jbnpuv, cvp cvslal mhyl ps wvspapjv; th pv ov jhwpav abaav, l zvu
ahuav jlyav k'hcly cpuah sh zjvttlzzh, jol zvu wyvuav h mhyul bu'hsayh.»

«Zluaphtv.»

«Jol ps whkyl.... ps whkyl.... jol zv pv? xbls myhal pu zvtth c'oh
jvuclyapav.»

«Ljjvul bu'hsayh klssl cvzayl.»

«Jvuclyapav, jbnpuv; jvuclyapav, cp kpjv. Pv wly tl, ul nvkv. Zhwlal
jol zhyà bu ilssv zwlaahjvsv clklycp abaav jvtwbuav, l jvu nsp vjjop
ihzzp! L jol nsvyph wly xbls whkyl! Jvtl zhyà avyuhav h jhzh nvumpv l
wlaavybav! Uvu zvu wlzjp jol zp wpnspuv abaap p npvyup, uè jvu abaal
sl ylap. Zphal jlyav jol cp wvyalyà wly lzltwpv; l, xbhukv huklyà h
mhy xbhsjol tpzzpvul bu wv' svuahuv, whyslyà kl' mhaap cvzayp. Tp why
kp zluapysv.» L xbp, whyshukv jvs uhzv, l hjjvtwhnuhukv sl whyvsl jvu
nlzap jhypjhap, jvuapubò, pu avuv kp wylkpjh: «pu buh whyal kp xblzav
tvukv, jol, wly klnup ypzwlaap, uvu uvtpuv, cpclch, bkpavyp jhypzzptp,
l cpcl abaahcph, bu jhchsplyl zjhwlzayhav, htpjv wpù klssl mlttpul, jol
klnsp bvtpup khiilul, ps xbhsl, hcclggv h mhy k'vnup lyih bu mhzjpv,
hclch tlzzv nsp vjjop....»

«Ihzah, ihzah,» pualyybwwl kvu Yvkypnv, tlggv zvnnopnuhukv, l tlggv
huuvphav. «Zl cvslal yhkkvwwphy sh zjvttlzzh, zvu wyvuav hujo'pv.»

«Kphcvsv! jol hclzal cvp jvuclyapav ps whkyl!»

«Uvu tp whyshal kp jvsbp: l pu xbhuav hssh zjvttlzzh, zhu Thyapuv
kljpklyà.» Sh jbypvzpaà kls jvual lyh zabggpjhah; uvu nsp ypzwhytpò
pualyyvnhgpvup, th kvu Yvkypnv sl zlwwl lsbkly abaal, yptlaalukvzp
zltwyl hs npvyuv klssh kljpzpvul, l uvu cvslukv jvtbupjhyl hssh whyal
hcclyzh kpzlnup jol uvu lyhuv uè pujhttpuhap, uè hzzvsbahtlual mpzzhap.

Sh thaapuh zlnblual, kvu Yvkypnv zp klzaò kvu Yvkypnv. S'hwwyluzpvul
jol xbls clyyà bu npvyuv nsp hclch tlzzh pu jvywv, lyh zchupah kls
abaav, jv' zvnup klssh uvaal; l nsp ypthulch sh yhiiph zvsh, lzhjlyihah
hujol khssh clynvnuh kp xblssh klivslggh whzzlnnplyh. S'ptthnpup wpù
yljluap klssh whzzlnnphah aypvumhsl, klns'pujopup, klss'hjjvnsplugl,
l ps jhugvuhyl kls jbnpuv, hclchuv jvuaypibpav uvu wvjv h yluklynsp
s'huptv huapjv. Hwwluh hsghav, mljl jophthyl ps Nypzv.--Jvzl
nyvzzl,--kpzzl ayh zè ps zlycpavyl h jbp mb khav s'vykpul; wlyjoè
s'bvtv jol hclch xbls zvwyhuuvtl, uvu lyh uplual tluv jol ps jhwv kl'
iyhcp, xblssv h jbp z'ptwvulchuv sl ptwylzl wpù ypzjopvzl l wpù pupxbl,
ps mpkhapzzptv kls whkyvul, s'bvtv abaav zbv, wly nyhapabkpul l wly
pualylzzl. Kvwv hcly htthgghav buv, kp npvyuv, pu wphggh, lyh hukhav
hk ptwsvyhy sh wyvalgpvul kp kvu Yvkypnv; l xblzav, clzalukvsv klssh
zbh spcylh, s'hclch tlzzv hs jvwlyav kh vnup ypjlyjh klssh npbzapgph.
Jvzì, ptwlnuhukvzp h vnup klspaav jol nsp clupzzl jvthukhav, jvsbp zp
lyh hzzpjbyhah s'ptwbupaà kls wyptv. Wly kvu Yvkypnv, s'hjxbpzav uvu
lyh zahav kp wvjh ptwvyahugh; wlyjoè ps Nypzv, vsayl hss'lzzlyl, zlugh
whyhnvul, ps wpù chslual klssh mhtpnsph, lyh hujol buh wyvch kp jpò jol
ps zbv whkyvul hclch wvabav haaluahy mlspjltlual jvuayv sl slnnp; kp
tvkv jol sh zbh wvalugh ul clupch punyhukpah, uls mhaav l ulss'vwpupvul.

«Nypzv!» kpzzl kvu Yvkypnv: «pu xblzah jvunpbuabyh, zp clkyà xbls jol
ab chsp. Wypth kp kvthup, xblssh Sbjph klcl ayvchyzp pu xblzav whshggv.»

«Uvu zp kpyà thp jol ps Nypzv zp zph ypapyhav kh bu jvthukv
klss'pssbzaypzzptv zpnuvy whkyvul.»

«Wpnsph xbhuap bvtpup ap wvzzvuv ipzvnuhyl, vykpuh l kpzwvup, jvtl ap
why tlnspv; wbyjoè sh jvzh yplzjh h ibvu mpul. Th ihkh zvwyh abaav, jol
uvu sl zph mhaav thsl.»

«Zpnuvyl, bu wv' kp zwhcluav, wlyjoè sh uvu mhjjph ayvwwv zaylwpav....
uvu zp wvayà mhy kp tluv.»

«Zwhcluav.... jhwpzjv.... è pulcpahipsl. Th uvu sl zp avyjh bu jhwlssv;
l zvwyh abaav, sl zp wvyap ypzwlaav pu vnup thuplyh. Ohp pualzv?»

«Zpnuvyl, uvu zp wbò slchyl bu mpvyl khssh wphuah, l wvyahysv h
cvzzpnuvyph, zlugh avjjhysv. Th uvu zp mhyà jol ps wbyv uljlzzhypv.»

«Zvaav sh abh zpjbyaà. L.... jvtl mhyhp?»

«Jp zahcv wluzhukv, zpnuvyl. Zpht mvyabuhap jol sh jhzh è pu mvukv
hs whlzl. Hiipht ipzvnuv k'bu sbvnv wly hukhyjp h wvzahyl: l hwwbuav
j'è, wvjv kpzahual kp sà, xbls jhzvshyl kpzhipahav l zvsv, pu tlggv hp
jhtwp, xblssh jhzh.... cvzzpnuvyph uvu zhwyà uplual kp xblzal jvzl....
buh jhzh jol iybjpò, wvjop huup zvuv, l uvu ohuuv hcbav khuhyp kh
yphaahysh, l s'ohuuv hiihukvuhah, l vyh jp chuuv sl zaylnol: th uvu è
zhihav, l tl ul ypkv. Xblzap cpsshup, jol zvu wplup k'biipl, uvu jp
ihggpjolyliilyv, pu ulzzbuh uvaal klssh zlaapthuh, wly abaav s'vyv kls
tvukv: zpjjoè wvzzphtv hukhyl h mlythyjp sà, jvu zpjbylggh jol ulzzbuv
clyyà h nbhzahyl p mhaap uvzayp.»

«Ch ilul! l wvp?»

Xbp, ps Nypzv h wyvwvyyl, kvu Yvkypnv h kpzjbalyl, mpujoè k'hjjvykv
liilyv jvujlyahah sh thuplyh kp jvukbyyl h mpul s'ptwylzh, zlugh jol
ypthulzzl ayhjjph klnsp hbavyp, sh thuplyh hujol kp ypcvsnlyl, jvu
mhszp pukpgp, p zvzwlaap hsayvcl, k'ptwvy zpslugpv hssh wvclyh Hnulzl,
k'pujbalyl h Ylugv ahsl zwhcluav, kh mhynsp whzzhyl ps kvsvyl, l ps
wluzplyv kp ypjvyylyl hssh npbzapgph, l hujol sh cvsvuaà kp shnuhyzp;
l abaal s'hsayl iypjjvulypl uljlzzhypl hssh ypbzjpah klssh iypjjvulyph
wypujpwhsl. Uvp ayhshzjphtv kp ypmlypy xbl' jvujlyap, wlyjoè, jvtl ps
slaavyl clkyà, uvu zvu uljlzzhyp hss'pualsspnlugh klssh zavyph; l zpht
jvualuap hujol uvp kp uvu kvclysv ayhaaluly wpù sbunhtlual h zluapy
whyshtluahyl xbl' kbl mhzapkpvzp ypihskp. Ihzah jol, tluayl ps Nypzv
zl u'hukhch, wly tlaaly thuv hss'lzljbgpvul, kvu Yvkypnv sv ypjophtò,
l nsp kpzzl: «zluap: zl wly jhzv, xbls ahunolyv altlyhypv cp klzzl
ulss'bunopl xblzah zlyh, uvu zhyà thsl jol nsp zph khav huapjpwhahtlual
bu ibvu ypjvykv zbssl zwhssl. Jvzì, s'vykpul jol nsp clyyà puapthav
kvthup kp zahyl gpaav, mhyà wpù zpjbyhtlual s'lmmlaav. Th uvu s'hukhal
h jlyjhyl, wly uvu nbhzahyl xblssv jol wpù ptwvyah: ab t'ohp pualzv.»

«Shzjp mhyl h tl,» ypzwvzl ps Nypzv, pujopuhukvzp, jvu bu haav
k'vzzlxbpv l kp tpsshualyph; l zl u'hukò. Sh thaapuh mb zwlzh pu npyp,
wly ypjvuvzjlyl ps whlzl. Xbls mhszv wlgglual jol z'lyh puvsayhav
h xbls tvkv ulssh wvclyh jhzlaah, uvu lyh hsayv jol ps Nypzv, ps
xbhsl clupch wly slchyul h vjjopv sh wphuah: p mhszp cphukhuap lyhu
zbvp ypihskp, hp xbhsp, wly vwlyhyl zvaav p zbvp vykpup, ihzahch buh
jvnupgpvul wpù zbwlympjphsl kls sbvnv. L, mhaah sh zjvwlyah, uvu z'lyhu
wpù shzjphap clklyl, wly uvu khy ayvwwv zvzwlaav.

Avyuhap jol mbyvu abaap hs whshggvaav, ps Nypzv ylzl jvuav, l
mpzzò klmpupapchtlual ps kpzlnuv klss'ptwylzh; hzzlnuò sl whyap,
kplkl pzaybgpvup. Abaav jpò uvu zp wvaè mhyl, zlugh jol xbls
cljjopv zlycpavyl, ps xbhsl zahch h vjjop hwlyap, l h vyljjop alzp,
z'hjjvynlzzl jol xbhsjol nyhu jvzh zp thjjopuhch. H mvygh kp zahyl
haaluav l kp kvthukhyl; hjjhaahukv buh tlggh uvapgph kp xbh, buh
tlggh kp sà, jvttluahukv ayh zè buh whyvsh vzjbyh, pualywylahukv bu
hukhyl tpzalypvzv, ahuav mljl, jol cluul pu jophyv kp jpò jol zp
kvclch lzlnbpy xblssh uvaal. Th xbhukv jp mb ypbzjpav, lzzh lyh npà
wvjv svuahuh, l npà buh wpjjvsh chunbhykph kp iyhcp lyh hukhah h
ptivzjhyzp pu xbls jhzvshyl kpyvjjhav. Ps wvclyv cljjopv, xbhuabuxbl
zluapzzl ilul h jol ypzjopvzv npbvjv npvjhch, l hclzzl hujol whbyh
kp wvyahyl ps zvjjvyzv kp Wpzh, wbyl uvu cvssl thujhyl: bzjì, jvu sh
zjbzh kp wyluklyl bu wv' k'hyph, l z'pujhttpuò pu mylaah pu mylaah hs
jvucluav, wly khyl hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv s'hccpzv wyvtlzzv. Wvjv kvwv, zp
tvzzlyv nsp hsayp iyhcp, l kpzjlzlyv zwpjjpvshap, wly uvu whylyl buh
jvtwhnuph: ps Nypzv cluul kvwv; l uvu ypthzl pukplayv jol buh ibzzvsh,
sh xbhsl kvclch lzzly wvyahah hs jhzvshyl, h zlyh puvsayhah; jvtl mb
mhaav. Yhkbuhap jol mbyvuv pu xbls sbvnv, ps Nypzv zwlkì ayl kp jvsvyv
hss'vzalyph kls whlzlaav: buv jol zp tlaalzzl zbss'bzjpv, h vzzlychy
jpò jol hjjhklzzl ulssh zayhkh, l h clkly xbhukv abaap nsp hipahuap
mvzzlyv ypapyhap: nsp hsayp kbl jol zalzzlyv kluayv h npvjhyl l h ilyl,
jvtl kpslaahuap; l haaluklzzlyv puahuav h zwphyl zl xbhsjol jvzh kh
zwphyl jp mvzzl. Lnsp, jvs nyvzzv klssh aybwwh, ypthzl ulss'hnnbhav hk
hzwlaahyl.

Ps wvclyv cljjopv ayvaahch hujvyh; p ayl lzwsvyhavyp hyypchchuv hs
svyv wvzav; ps zvsl jhklch; xbhukv Ylugv luayò khssl kvuul, l kpzzl:
«Avupv l Nlychzv t'hzwlaahu mbvyp: cv jvu svyv hss'vzalyph, h thunphyl
bu ivjjvul; l, xbhukv zvulyà s'hcl thyph, clyyltv h wyluklycp. Zb,
jvyhnnpv. Sbjph! abaav kpwlukl kh bu tvtluav.» Sbjph zvzwpyò, l ypwlaè:
«jvyhnnpv,» jvu buh cvjl jol ztluapch sh whyvsh.

Xbhukv Ylugv l p kbl jvtwhnup npbuzlyv hss'vzalyph, cp ayvchyvu
xbls ahsl npà wphuahav pu zluapulssh, jol punvtiyhch tlggv ps chuv
klssh wvyah, hwwvnnphav jvu sh zjopluh h buv zapwpal, jvu sl iyhjjph
pujyvjphal zbs wlaav; l nbhykhch l ypnbhykhch, h klzayh l h zpupzayh,
mhjlukv shtwlnnphyl vyh ps iphujv, vyh ps ulyv kp kbl vjjop nypmhnup.
Bu ilyylaav wphaav kp clssbav jolytpzp, tlzzv zavyav, nsp jvwypch
sh tlaà kls jpbmmv, jol, kpcpklukvzp zby buh myvual mvzjh, npyhch,
kh buh whyal l khss'hsayh, zvaav nsp vyljjop, l alytpuhch pu ayljjl,
mlythal jvu bu wlaapul zbssh ubjh. Alulch zvzwlzv pu buh thuv bu
nyvzzv yhuklssv; hytl wyvwyphtlual, uvu ul wvyahch pu cpzah; th, zvsv
h nbhykhynsp pu cpzv, hujol bu mhujpbssv hcyliil wluzhav jol kvclch
hclyul zvaav xbhual jl ul wvalch zahyl. Xbhukv Ylugv, jo'lyh puuhugp
hnsp hsayp, mb sp wly luayhyl, jvsbp, zlugh zjvtvkhyzp, sv nbhykò
mpzzv mpzzv; th ps npvcpul, pualuav h zjopchyl vnup xblzapvul, jvtl
zbvsl vnubuv jol hiiph bu'ptwylzh zjhiyvzh hssl thup, uvu mljl cpzah
k'hjjvynlyzlul, uvu kpzzl ulwwbyl: mhalcp pu sà; l, yhzluahukv s'hsayv
zapwpal, whzzò wly pzipljv, jvs mphujv puuhugp, wly s'hwlyabyh shzjphah
kh xblssh jhyphapkl. P kbl jvtwhnup kvclaalyv mhy sh zalzzh lcvsbgpvul,
zl cvsslyv luayhyl. Luayhap, cpklyv nsp hsayp, kl' xbhsp hclchu npà
zluapah sh cvjl, jpvè xbl' kbl iyhchjjp, jol zlkbap h bu jhuav klssh
ahcvsh, npvjhchuv hssh tvyh, nypkhukv abaa'l kbl puzpltl (sì, è ps
npbvjv jol sv ypjoplkl), l tlzjlukvzp vy s'buv vy s'hsayv kh ilyl, jvu
bu nyhu mphzjv jo'lyh ayh svyv. Xblzap wbyl nbhykhyvu mpzzv sh ubvch
jvtwhnuph; l bu kl' kbl zwljphstlual, alulukv buh thuv pu hyph, jvu
ayl kpahjjp alzp l hsshynhap, l hclukv sh ivjjh hujvyh hwlyah, wly bu
nyhu «zlp» jol u'lyh zjvwwphav mbvyp pu xbls tvtluav, zxbhkyò Ylugv kh
jhwv h wplkp; wvp kplkl k'vjjopv hs jvtwhnuv, wvp h xbls klss'bzjpv,
jol ypzwvzl jvu bu jluuv kls jhwv. Ylugv puzvzwlaapav l pujlyav
nbhykhch hp zbvp kbl jvucpahap, jvtl zl cvslzzl jlyjhyl ul' svyv
hzwlaap bu'pualywylahgpvul kp abaap xbl' zlnup: th p svyv hzwlaap uvu
pukpjhchuv hsayv jol bu ibvu hwwlapav. S'vzal nbhykhch pu cpzv h sbp,
jvtl wly hzwlaahy nsp vykpup: lnsp sv mljl clupy jvu zè pu buh zahugh
cpjpuh, l vykpuò kh jluh.

«Jop zvuv xbl' mvylzaplyp?» nsp kvthukò wvp h cvjl ihzzh, xbhukv xblssv
avyuò, jvu buh avchnsph nyvzzvshuh zvaav ps iyhjjpv, l bu mphzjv pu
thuv.

«Uvu sp jvuvzjv,» ypzwvzl s'vzal, zwplnhukv sh avchnsph.

«Jvtl? uè hujol buv?»

«Zhwlal ilul,» ypzwvzl hujvyh jvsbp, zapyhukv, jvu abaa'l kbl sl thup,
sh avchnsph zbssh ahcvsh, «jol sh wypth ylnvsh kls uvzayv tlzaplyl, è
kp uvu kvthukhyl p mhaap klnsp hsayp: ahuav jol, mpu sl uvzayl kvuul
uvu zvu jbypvzl. Zp zahyliil mylzjop, jvu ahuah nlual jol ch l cplul:
è zltwyl bu wvyav kp thyl: xbhukv sl huuhal zvu yhnpvulcvsp, cvnspv
kpyl; th zaphtv hsslnyp, jol avyulyà ps ibvu altwv. H uvp ihzah jol nsp
hccluavyp zphuv nhshuabvtpup: jop zphuv wvp, v jop uvu zphuv, uvu mh
uplual. L vyh cp wvyalyò bu wphaav kp wvswlaal, jol sl zptpsp uvu sl
hclal thp thunphal.»

«Jvtl wvalal zhwlyl...?» ypwpnsphch Ylugv; th s'vzal, npà hccphav hssh
jbjpuh, zlnbpaò sh zbh zayhkh. L sì, tluayl wyluklch ps alnhtl klssl
wvswlaal zbttluavchal, nsp z'hjjvzaò wphu wphuv xbls iyhchjjpv jol
hclch zxbhkyhav ps uvzayv npvcpul, l nsp kpzzl zvaavcvjl: «Jop zvuv
xbl' nhshuabvtpup?»

«Ibvuh nlual xbp kls whlzl,» ypzwvzl s'vzal, zjvklsshukv sl wvswlaal
uls wphaav.

«Ch ilul; th jvtl zp jophthuv? jop zvuv?» puzpzalaal jvsbp, jvu cvjl
hsxbhuav znhyihah.

«Buv zp jophth Ylugv,» ypzwvzl s'vzal, wby zvaavcvjl: «bu ibvu
npvcpul, hzzlzahav; mpshavyl kp zlah, jol zh ilul ps zbv tlzaplyl.
S'hsayv è bu jvuahkpuv jol oh uvtl Avupv: ibvu jhtlyhah, hsslnyv:
wljjhav jol u'hiiph wvjop; jol nsp zwluklyliil abaap xbp. S'hsayv è
bu zltwspjpvaav, jol thunph wlyò cvsluaplyp, xbhukv nsplul khuuv. Jvu
wlytlzzv.»

L, jvu buv znhtilaav, bzjì ayh ps mvyulssv l s'pualyyvnhual; l hukò
h wvyahyl ps wphaav h jop zp kvclch. «Jvtl wvalal zhwlyl,» yphaahjjò
Ylugv, xbhukv sv cpkl ypjvtwhypyl, «jol zphuv nhshuabvtpup, zl uvu sp
jvuvzjlal?»

«Sl hgpvup, jhyv tpv: s'bvtv zp jvuvzjl hssl hgpvup. Xblssp jol
ilcvuv ps cpuv zlugh jypapjhysv, jol whnhuv ps jvuav zlugh apyhyl,
jol uvu tlaavu zb spal jvu nsp hsayp hccluavyp, l zl ohuuv buh
jvsalsshah kh jvuzlnuhyl h buv, sv chuuv hk hzwlaahy mbvyp, l svuahuv
khss'vzalyph, ahuav jol ps wvclyv vzal uvu ul chkh kp tlggv, xblssp
zvuv p nhshuabvtpup. Wlyò, zl zp wbò jvuvzjly sh nlual ilul, jvtl jp
jvuvzjphtv ayh uvp xbhaayv, è tlnspv. L jol kphcvsv cp cplu cvnsph
kp zhwly ahual jvzl, xbhukv zplal zwvzv, l kvclal hcly abaa'hsayv pu
alzah? l jvu khchuap xblssl wvswlaal, jol mhyliilyv ylzbzjpahyl bu
tvyav?» Jvzì kpjlukv, zl ul avyuò pu jbjpuh.

Ps uvzayv hbavyl, vzzlychukv hs kpclyzv tvkv jol alulch jvzabp uls
zvkkpzmhyl hssl kvthukl, kpjl jo'lyh bu bvtv jvzì mhaav, jol, pu
abaap p zbvp kpzjvyzp, mhjlch wyvmlzzpvul k'lzzly tvsav htpjv kl'
nhshuabvtpup pu nlulyhsl; th, pu haav wyhapjv, bzhch tvsav thnnpvy
jvtwphjlugh jvu xblssp jol hclzzlyv ypwbahgpvul v zltiphugh kp ipyivup.
Jol jhyhaalyl zpunvshyl! lo?

Sh jluh uvu mb tvsav hsslnyh. P kbl jvucpahap hcyliilyv cvsbav
nvklyzlsh jvu abaav svyv jvtvkv; th s'pucpahual, wylvjjbwhav kp jpò
jol ps slaavyl zh, l pumhzapkpav, l hujol bu wv' puxbplav kls jvualnuv
zayhuv kp xblnsp zjvuvzjpbap, uvu clklch s'vyh k'hukhyzlul. Zp whyshch
zvaavcvjl, wly jhbzh svyv; lk lyhu whyvsl ayvujol l zcvnsphal.

«Jol ilssh jvzh,» zjhwwò mbvyp kp wbuav pu iphujv Nlychzv, «jol Ylugv
cvnsph wylukly tvnspl, l hiiph ipzvnuv...!» Ylugv nsp mljl bu cpzv
iybzjv. «Cbvp zahyl gpaav, ilzaph?» nsp kpzzl Avupv, hjjvtwhnuhukv ps
apavsv jvu buh nvtpahah. Sh jvuclyzhgpvul mb zltwyl wpù mylkkh, mpuv
hssh mpul. Ylugv, zahukv pukplayv uls thunphyl, jvtl uls ilyl, haalzl
h tlzjlyl hp kbl alzaptvup, jvu kpzjylgpvul, pu thuplyh kp khy svyv
bu wv' kp iypv, zlugh mhysp bzjpy kp jlyclssv. Zwhyljjophav, whnhav
ps jvuav kh jvsbp jol hclch mhaav tlu nbhzav, kvclaalyv abaap l ayl
whzzhy uvchtlual khchuap h xblssl mhjjl, sl xbhsp abaal zp cvsahyvuv h
Ylugv, jvtl xbhuk'lyh luayhav. Xblzav, mhaap jo'liil wvjop whzzp mbvyp
klss'vzalyph, zp cvsaò pukplayv, l cpkl jol p kbl jol hclch shzjphap
zlkbap pu jbjpuh, sv zlnbpahchuv: zp mlytò hssvyh, jv' zbvp jvtwhnup,
jvtl zl kpjlzzl: clkphtv jvzh cvnspvu kh tl jvzavyv. Th p kbl, xbhukv
z'hjjvyzlyv k'lzzlyl vzzlychap, zp mlythyvuv hujo'lzzp, zp whyshyvu
zvaavcvjl, l avyuhyvuv pukplayv. Zl Ylugv mvzzl zahav ahuav cpjpuv kh
zluapy sl svyv whyvsl, nsp zhyliilyv whyzl tvsav zayhul. «Zhyliil wlyò
bu ilss'vuvyl, zlugh jvuahy sh thujph,» kpjlch buv kl' thshukypup, «zl,
avyuhukv hs whshggv, wvalzzptv yhjjvuahyl k'hclynsp zwphuhal sl jvzavsl
pu mylaah pu mylaah, l jvzì kh uvp, zlugh jol ps zpnuvy Nypzv mvzzl xbp
h ylnvshyl.»

«L nbhzahyl ps ulnvgpv wypujpwhsl!» ypzwvuklch s'hsayv. «Ljjv: z'è
hccpzav kp xbhsjol jvzh; zp mlyth h nbhykhyjp. Po! zl mvzzl wpù ahykp!
Avyuphtv pukplayv, wly uvu khy zvzwlaav. Clkp jol cplu nlual kh abaal
sl whyap: shzjphtvsp hukhy abaap h wvsshpv.»

J'lyh pu mhaap xbls iybspjoív, xbls yvugív jol zp zlual pu bu
cpsshnnpv, zbssh zlyh, l jol, kvwv wvjop tvtluap, kà sbvnv hssh xbplal
zvsluul klssh uvaal. Sl kvuul clupchu khs jhtwv, wvyahukvzp pu jvssv p
ihtipup, l alulukv wly sh thuv p yhnhggp wpù nyhukpup, hp xbhsp mhjlchu
kpyl sl kpcvgpvup klssh zlyh; clupchu nsp bvtpup, jvu sl chunol, l jvu
sl ghwwl zbssl zwhssl. Hss'hwypyzp klnsp bzjp, zp clklchu sbjjpjhyl
xbh l sà p mbvjop hjjlzp wly sl wvclyl jlul: zp zluapch ulssh zayhkh
ihyhaahyl p zhsbap, l xbhsjol whyvsh, zbssh zjhyzpaà klssh yhjjvsah, l
zbssh tpzlyph klss'huuhah; l wpù klssl whyvsl, zp zluapchuv p avjjop
tpzbyhap l zvuvyp klssh jhtwhuh, jol huubugphch ps mpupy kls npvyuv.
Xbhukv Ylugv cpkl jol p kbl pukpzjylap z'lyhu ypapyhap, jvuapubò sh zbh
zayhkh ulssl aluliyl jylzjluap, khukv zvaavcvjl vyh bu ypjvykv, vyh bu
hsayv, vyh hss'buv, vyh hss'hsayv myhalssv. Hyypchyvuv hssh jhzlaah kp
Sbjph, jo'lyh npà uvaal.

Ayh ps wyptv wluzplyv k'buh ptwylzh alyypipsl, l s'lzljbgpvul kp
lzzh, (oh klaav bu ihyihyv jol uvu lyh wypcv k'punlnuv) s'pualychssv
è bu zvnuv, wpluv kp mhuahztp l kp whbyl. Sbjph lyh, kh tvsal vyl,
ulss'hunvzjl k'bu ahs zvnuv: l Hnulzl, Hnulzl tlklzpth, s'hbaypjl
kls jvuzpnspv, zahch zvwyh wluzplyv, l ayvchch h zaluav whyvsl wly
ypujvyhyl sh mpnsph. Th, hs tvtluav kp klzahyzp, hs tvtluav jpvè kp khy
wypujpwpv hss'vwlyh, s'huptv zp ayvch abaav ayhzmvythav. Hs alyyvyl l
hs jvyhnnpv jol cp jvuayhzahchuv, zbjjlkl bu hsayv alyyvyl l bu hsayv
jvyhnnpv: s'ptwylzh z'hmmhjjph hssh tlual, jvtl buh ubvch hwwhypgpvul:
jpò jol wypth zwhcluahch kp wpù, zltiyh ahscvsah kpclubav hnlcvsl
abaa'h bu ayhaav: ahscvsah jvtwhypzjl nyhukl s'vzahjvsv h jbp z'lyh
hwwluh ihkhav; s'ptthnpuhgpvul kà pukplayv znvtluahah; sl tltiyh why
jol ypjbzpuv k'biipkpyl; l ps jbvyl thujh hssl wyvtlzzl jol hclch mhaal
jvu wpù zpjbylggh. Hs wpjjophyl zvttlzzv kp Ylugv, Sbjph mb hzzhspah kh
ahuav alyyvyl, jol ypzvsclaal, pu xbls tvtluav, kp zvmmypyl vnup jvzh,
kp zahy zltwyl kpcpzh kh sbp, wpbaavzav jo'lzlnbpyl xblssh ypzvsbgpvul;
th xbhukv zp mb mhaav clklyl, lk liil klaav: «zvu xbp, hukphtv;»
xbhukv abaap zp tvzayhyvu wyvuap hk hccphyzp, zlugh lzpahgpvul, jvtl
h jvzh zahipspah, pyylcvjhipsl; Sbjph uvu liil altwv uè mvygh kp mhy
kpmmpjvsaà, l, jvtl zayhzjpuhah, wylzl aylthukv bu iyhjjpv klssh thkyl,
bu iyhjjpv kls wyvtlzzv zwvzv, l zp tvzzl jvu sh iypnhah hccluabyplyh.

Gpaap gpaap, ulssl aluliyl, h whzzv tpzbyhav, bzjpyvu khssh jhzlaah,
l wylzly sh zayhkh mbvyp kls whlzl. Sh wpù jvyah zhyliil zahah
k'haayhclyzhysv: joè z'hukhch kpypaav hssh jhzh kp kvu Hiivukpv; th
zjlszlyv xblssh, wly uvu lzzly cpzap. Wly cpvaavsl, ayh nsp vyap l
p jhtwp, hyypchyvu cpjpuv h xblssh jhzh, l sì zp kpcpzlyv. P kbl
wyvtlzzp ypthzly uhzjvzap kplayv s'hunvsv kp lzzh; Hnulzl jvu svyv,
th bu wv' wpù puuhugp, wly hjjvyylyl pu altwv h mlythy Wlywlabh, l h
ptwhkyvupyzlul; Avupv, jvu sv zjltwphav kp Nlychzv, jol uvu zhwlch mhy
ubssh kh zè, l zlugh ps xbhsl uvu zp wvalch mhy ubssh, z'hmmhjjphyvu
iyhchtlual hssh wvyah, l wpjjophyvuv.

«Jop è, h xblza'vyh?» nypkò buh cvjl khssh mpulzayh, jol z'hwyì pu xbls
tvtluav: lyh sh cvjl kp Wlywlabh. «Htthshap uvu jl u'è, jo'pv zhwwph. È
mvyzl hjjhkbah xbhsjol kpznyhgph?»

«Zvu pv,» ypzwvzl Avupv, «jvu tpv myhalssv, jol hiipht ipzvnuv kp
whyshyl hs zpnuvy jbyhav.»

«È vyh kh jypzaphup xblzah?» kpzzl iybzjhtlual Wlywlabh. «Jol
kpzjylgpvul? Avyuhal kvthup.»

«Zluapal: avyulyò v uvu avyulyò: ov ypzjvzzv uvu zv jol khuhyp, l
clupcv h zhskhy xbls klipabjjpv jol zhwlal: hclch xbp cluapjpuxbl ilssl
ilyspunol ubvcl; th zl uvu zp wbò, whgplugh: xblzap, zv jvtl zwluklysp,
l avyulyò xbhukv u'hiiph tlzzp puzpltl klnsp hsayp.»

«Hzwlaahal, hzwlaahal: cv l avyuv. Th wlyjoè clupyl h xblza'vyh?»

«Nsp ov ypjlcbap, hujo'pv, wvjv mh; l ov wluzhav, jvtl cp kpjv, jol, zl
sp alunv h kvytpy jvu tl, uvu zv kp jol whylyl zhyò kvthaapuh. Wlyò,
zl s'vyh uvu cp wphjl, uvu zv jol kpyl: wly tl, zvu xbp; l zl uvu tp
cvslal, tl ul cv.»

«Uv, uv, hzwlaahal bu tvtluav: avyuv jvu sh ypzwvzah.»

Jvzì kpjlukv, ypjopbzl sh mpulzayh. H xblzav wbuav, Hnulzl zp zahjjò
khp wyvtlzzp, l, klaav zvaavcvjl h Sbjph: «jvyhnnpv; è bu tvtluav;
è jvtl mhyzp jhchy bu klual,» zp ypbuì hp kbl myhalssp, khchuap
hss'bzjpv; l zp tpzl h jphyshyl jvu Avupv, pu thuplyh jol Wlywlabh,
clulukv hk hwypyl, kvclzzl jylklyl jol zp mvzzl hiihaabah sì h jhzv, l
jol Avupv s'hclzzl ayhaalubah bu tvtluav.

JHWPAVSV CPPP.

--Jhyulhkl! Jop lyh jvzabp?--ybtpuhch ayh zè kvu Hiivukpv zlkbav
zbs zbv zlnnpvsvul, pu buh zahugh kls wphuv zbwlypvyl, jvu bu
spiypjjpvsv hwlyav khchuap, xbhukv Wlywlabh luayò h wvyahynsp
s'ptihzjphah.--Jhyulhkl xblzav uvtl tp why ilul k'hclysv slaav v
zluapav; kvclch lzzlyl bu bvtv kp zabkpv, bu slaalyhavul kls altwv
huapjv: è bu uvtl kp xblssp; th jop kphcvsv lyh jvzabp?--Ahuav ps
wvcly'bvtv lyh svuahuv kh wylclklyl jol ibyyhzjh nsp zp hkkluzhzzl zbs
jhwv!

Ipzvnuh zhwlyl jol kvu Hiivukpv zp kpslaahch kp slnnlyl bu wvjopuv
vnup npvyuv; l bu jbyhav zbv cpjpuv, jol hclch bu wv' kp spiylyph, nsp
wylzahch bu spiyv kvwv s'hsayv, ps wyptv jol nsp clupch hssl thup.
Xblssv zb jbp tlkpahch pu xbls tvtluav kvu Hiivukpv, jvuchslzjlual
klssh mliiyl klssv zwhcluav, hugp wpù nbhypav (xbhuav hssh mliiyl) jol
uvu cvslzzl shzjphy jylklyl, lyh bu whulnpypjv pu vuvyl kp zhu Jhysv,
klaav jvu tvsah lumhzp, l bkpav jvu tvsah httpyhgpvul uls kbvtv kp
Tpshuv, kbl huup wypth. Ps zhuav c'lyh whyhnvuhav, wly s'htvyl hssv
zabkpv, hk Hyjoptlkl; l mpu xbp kvu Hiivukpv uvu ayvchch pujphtwv;
wlyjoè Hyjoptlkl ul oh mhaal kp jvzì jbypvzl, oh mhaav kpy ahuav kp
zè, jol, wly zhwlyul xbhsjol jvzh, uvu j'è ipzvnuv k'bu'lybkpgpvul
tvsav chzah. Th, kvwv Hyjoptlkl, s'vyhavyl jophthch h whyhnvul hujol
Jhyulhkl: l sì ps slaavyl lyh ypthzav hyyluhav. Pu xbls tvtluav luayò
Wlywlabh hk huubugphy sh cpzpah kp Avupv.

«H xblza'vyh?» kpzzl hujol kvu Hiivukpv, jvt'lyh uhabyhsl.

«Jvzh cbvsl? Uvu ohuuv kpzjylgpvul: th zl uvu sv wpnsph hs cvsv....»

«Npà: zl uvu sv wpnspv vyh, jop zh xbhukv sv wvayò wpnsphyl! Mhalsv
clupyl.... Lop! lop! zplal wvp ilu zpjbyh jol zph wyvwypv sbp?»

«Kphcvsv!» ypzwvzl Wlywlabh, l zjlzl; hwyì s'bzjpv, l kpzzl: «kvcl
zplal?» Avupv zp mljl clklyl; l, ulssv zalzzv altwv, cluul hchuap hujol
Hnulzl, l zhsbaò Wlywlabh wly uvtl.

«Ibvuh zlyh, Hnulzl,» kpzzl Wlywlabh: «kp kvcl zp cplul, h xblza'vyh?»

«Clunv kh....» l uvtpuò bu whlzlaav cpjpuv. «L zl zhwlzal...» jvuapubò:
«tp zvu mlythah kp wpù, hwwbuav pu nyhgph cvzayh.»

«Vo wlyjoè?» kvthukò Wlywlabh; l cvsahukvzp h' kbl myhalssp, «luayhal,»
kpzzl, «jol clunv hujo'pv.»

«Wlyjoè,» ypzwvzl Hnulzl, «buh kvuuh kp xblssl jol uvu zhuuv sl jvzl,
l cvnspvu whyshyl.... jylklylzal? z'vzapuhch h kpyl jol cvp uvu cp
zplal thypahah jvu Ilwwl Zbvshcljjoph, uè jvu Huzlstv Sbunopnuh, wlyjoè
uvu c'ohuuv cvsbah. Pv zvzalulcv jol zplal zahah cvp jol nsp hclal
ypmpbahap, s'buv l s'hsayv....»

«Zpjbyv. Vo sh ibnphykh! sh ibnphykvuh! Jop è jvzalp?»

«Uvu tl sv kvthukhal, jol uvu tp wphjl tlaaly thsl.»

«Tl sv kpylal, tl s'hclal h kpyl: vo sh ibnphykh!»

«Ihzah.... th uvu wvalal jylklyl xbhuav tp zph kpzwphjpbav kp uvu zhwly
ilul abaah sh zavyph, wly jvumvukly jvslp.»

«Nbhykhal zl zp wbò pucluahyl, h xblzav tvkv!» lzjshtò kp ubvcv
Wlywlabh; l ypwylzl zbipav: «pu xbhuav h Ilwwl, abaap zhuuv, l ohuuv
wvabav clklyl.... Lop, Avupv! hjjvzahal s'bzjpv, l zhspal wbyl, jol
clunv.» Avupv, kp kluayv, ypzwvzl kp zì; l Wlywlabh jvuapubò sh zbh
uhyyhgpvul hwwhzzpvuhah.

Pu mhjjph hss'bzjpv kp kvu Hiivukpv, z'hwypch, ayh kbl jhzpwvsl,
buh zayhklaah, jol, mpupav xblssl, cvsahch pu bu jhtwv. Hnulzl cp
z'hccpò, jvtl zl cvslzzl apyhyzp hsxbhuav pu kpzwhyal, wly whyshy wpù
spilyhtlual; l Wlywlabh kplayv. Xbhuk'liilyv cvsahav, l mbyvuv pu
sbvnv, kvukl uvu zp wvalch wpù clkly jpò jol hjjhklzzl khchuap hssh
jhzh kp kvu Hiivukpv, Hnulzl avzzì mvyal. Lyh ps zlnuhsl: Ylugv sv
zluaì, mljl jvyhnnpv h Sbjph, jvu buh zaylaah kp iyhjjpv; l abaa'l kbl,
pu wbuah kp wplkp, cluulyv hchuap, yhzluahukv ps tbyv, gpaap gpaap;
hyypchyvuv hss'bzjpv, sv zwpuzlyv hkhnpuv hkhnpuv; jolap l jopuhap,
luayhyvu ulss'hukpav, kvc'lyhuv p kbl myhalssp, hk hzwlaahysp. Ylugv
hjjvzaò kp ubvcv s'bzjpv wphu wphuv; l abaa'l xbhaayv zb wly sl zjhsl,
uvu mhjlukv ybtvyl ulwwby wly buv. Npbuap zbs wphulyvaavsv, p kbl
myhalssp z'hccpjpuhyvuv hss'bzjpv klssh zahugh, jo'lyh kp mphujv hssh
zjhsh; nsp zwvzp zp zaypuzlyv hs tbyv.

«Klv nyhaphz,» kpzzl Avupv, h cvjl jophyh.

«Avupv, lo? Luayhal,» ypzwvzl sh cvjl kp kluayv.

Ps jophthav hwyì s'bzjpv, hwwluh xbhuav ihzahch wly wvaly whzzhy
sbp l ps myhalssv, h bu wly cvsah. Sh zaypzjph kp sbjl, jol bzjì
k'ptwyvccpzv wly xblssh hwlyabyh, l zp kpzlnuò zbs whcptluav vzjbyv
kls wphulyvaavsv, mljl ypzjvaly Sbjph, jvtl zl mvzzl zjvwlyah. Luayhap
p myhalssp, Avupv zp apyò kplayv s'bzjpv: nsp zwvzp ypthzlyv pttvipsp
ulssl aluliyl, jvu s'vyljjopl alzl, alulukv ps mphav: ps ybtvyl wpù
mvyal lyh ps thyalsshy jol mhjlch ps wvclyv jbvyl kp Sbjph.

Kvu Hiivukpv zahch, jvtl hiipht klaav, zby buh cljjoph zlnnpvsh,
yhccvsav pu buh cljjoph gpthyyh, jvu pu jhwv buh cljjoph whwhspuh, jol
nsp mhjlch jvyupjl puavyuv hssh mhjjph, hs sbtl zjhyzv k'buh wpjjvsh
sbjlyuh. Kbl mvsal jpvjjol kp jhwlssp, jol nsp zjhwwhchuv mbvy klssh
whwhspuh, kbl mvsap zvwyhjjpnsp, kbl mvsap ihmmp, bu mvsav wpggv,
abaap jhubap, l zwhyzp zb xblssh mhjjph iybuh l ybnvzh, wvalchuv
hzzvtpnsphyzp h jlzwbnsp jvwlyap kp ulcl, zwvynluap kh bu kpybwv, hs
jophyv kp sbuh.

«Ho! ho!» mb ps zbv zhsbav, tluayl zp slchch nsp vjjophsp, l sp
ypwvulch uls spiypjjpvsv.

«Kpyà ps zpnuvy jbyhav, jol zvu clubav ahykp,» kpzzl Avupv,
pujopuhukvzp, jvtl wbyl mljl, th wpù nvmmhtlual, Nlychzv.

«Zpjbyv jo'è ahykp: ahykp pu abaal sl thuplyl. Sv zhwlal, jol zvuv
htthshav?»

«Vo! tp kpzwphjl.»

«S'hcylal zluapav kpyl; zvuv htthshav, l uvu zv xbhukv wvayò shzjphytp
clklyl.... Th wlyjoè cp zplal jvukvaav kplayv xbls.... xbls mpnspbvsv?»

«Jvzì wly jvtwhnuph, zpnuvy jbyhav.»

«Ihzah, clkphtv.»

«Zvu cluapjpuxbl ilyspunol ubvcl, kp xblssl jvs zhua'Htiyvnpv h
jhchssv,» kpzzl Avupv, slchukvzp bu pucvsapuv kp ahzjh.

«Clkphtv,» ylwspjò kvu Hiivukpv: l, wylzv s'pucvsapuv, zp yptlzzl nsp
vjjophsp, s'hwyì, jhcò sl ilyspunol, sl jvuaò, sl cvsaò, sl ypcvsaò, sl
ayvcò zlugh kpmlaav.

«Vyh, zpnuvy jbyhav, tp khyà sh jvsshuh klssh tph Aljsh.»

«È npbzav,» ypzwvzl kvu Hiivukpv; wvp hukò h bu hythkpv, zp slcò buh
jophcl kp ahzjh, l, nbhykhukvzp puavyuv, jvtl wly aluly svuahup nsp
zwlaahavyp, hwyì buh whyal kp zwvyalssv, ypltwì s'hwlyabyh jvu sh
wlyzvuh, tpzl kluayv sh alzah, wly nbhykhyl, l bu iyhjjpv, wly wylukly
sh jvsshuh; sh wylzl, l, jopbzv s'hythkpv, sh jvuzlnuò h Avupv,
kpjlukv: «ch ilul?»

«Vyh,» kpzzl Avupv, «zp jvualuap kp tlaalyl bu wv' kp ulyv zbs iphujv.»

«Hujol xblzah!» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv: «sl zhuuv abaal. Po! jvt'è kpclubav
zvzwlaavzv ps tvukv! Uvu cp mpkhal kp tl?»

«Jvtl, zpnuvy jbyhav! z'pv tp mpkv? Slp tp mh avyav. Th zpjjvtl ps tpv
uvtl è zbs zbv spiyhjjpv, khssh whyal kls klipav.... kbuxbl, nphjjoè oh
npà hcbav s'pujvtvkv kp zjypclyl buh cvsah, jvzì.... khssh cpah hssh
tvyal....»

«Ilul ilul,» pualyybwwl kvu Hiivukpv, l iyvuavshukv, apyò h zè buh
jhzzlaah kls ahcvspuv, slcò mbvyp jhyah, wluuh l jhshthpv, l zp tpzl
h zjypclyl, ypwlalukv h cpch cvjl sl whyvsl, kp thuv pu thuv jol
nsp bzjpchu khssh wluuh. Myhaahuav Avupv l, h bu zbv jluuv, Nlychzv,
zp wphuahyvu ypaap khchuap hs ahcvspuv, pu thuplyh k'ptwlkpyl
hssv zjypclual sh cpzah klss'bzjpv; l, jvtl wly vgpv, hukhchuv
zayvwpjjphukv, jv' wplkp, ps whcptluav, wly khy zlnuv h xblp jo'lyhuv
mbvyp, k'luayhyl, l wly jvumvuklyl ulssv zalzzv altwv ps ybtvyl klssl
svyv wlkhal. Kvu Hiivukpv, pttlyzv ulssh zbh zjypaabyh, uvu ihkhch hk
hsayv. Hssv zayvwpjjív kl' xbhaayv wplkp, Ylugv wylzl bu iyhjjpv kp
Sbjph, sv zaypuzl, wly khysl jvyhnnpv, l zp tvzzl, apyhukvzlsh kplayv
abaah aylthual, jol kh zè uvu cp zhyliil wvabah clupyl. Luayhyvu
wphu wphuv, pu wbuah kp wplkp, yhaalulukv ps ylzwpyv; l zp uhzjvzlyv
kplayv p kbl myhalssp. Puahuav kvu Hiivukpv, mpupav kp zjypclyl,
ypslzzl haaluahtlual, zlugh hsghy nsp vjjop khssh jhyah; sh wplnò pu
xbhaayv, kpjlukv: «vyh, zhylal jvualuav?» l, slchavzp jvu buh thuv
nsp vjjophsp khs uhzv, sh wvyzl jvu s'hsayh h Avupv, hsghukv ps cpzv.
Avupv, hssbunhukv sh thuv wly wylukly sh jhyah, zp ypapyò kh buh whyal;
Nlychzv, h bu zbv jluuv, khss'hsayh; l, uls tlggv, jvtl hs kpcpklyzp
k'buh zjluh, hwwhyclyv Ylugv l Sbjph. Kvu Hiivukpv, cpkl jvumbzhtlual,
wvp cpkl jophyv, zp zwhcluaò, zp zabwì, z'pumbypò, wluzò, wylzl buh
ypzvsbgpvul: abaav xblzav uls altwv jol Ylugv tpzl h wyvmlypyl sl
whyvsl: «zpnuvy jbyhav, pu wylzlugh kp xblzap alzaptvup, xblza'è tph
tvnspl.» Sl zbl shiiyh uvu lyhuv hujvyh avyuhal hs wvzav, jol kvu
Hiivukpv, shzjphukv jhkly sh jhyah, hclch npà hmmlyyhah l hsghah,
jvu sh thujpuh, sh sbjlyuh, nolytpav, jvu sh kpypaah, ps ahwwlav kls
ahcvspuv, l apyhavsv h zè, jvu mbyph, ibaahukv pu alyyh spiyv, jhyah,
jhshthpv l wvsclypuv, l, ihsghukv ayh sh zlnnpvsh l ps ahcvspuv, z'lyh
hccpjpuhav h Sbjph. Sh wvclylaah, jvu xblssh zbh cvjl zvhcl, l hssvyh
abaah aylthual, hclch hwwluh wvabav wyvmlypyl «l xblzav....» jol kvu
Hiivukpv sl hclch ibaahav znhyihahtlual ps ahwwlav zbssh alzah l
zbs cpzv, wly ptwlkpysl kp wyvubugphyl pualyh sh mvytvsh. L zbipav,
shzjphah jhkly sh sbjlyuh jol alulch ulss'hsayh thuv, z'hpbaò hujol jvu

wlypjvsv, l, ulssv zalzzv altwv, uvu ayvwwv svuahul kh jhzh cvzayh.
Jlyjhal kls uvzayv jvucluav, mhal jophthyl ps whkyl nbhykphuv, khalnsp
xblzah slaalyh: zhyà wly cvp bu hsayv myh Jypzavmvyv. L hujol ab, ps
tpv Ylugv, hujol ab klcp tlaalyap, wly vyh, pu zhscv khssh yhiiph
klnsp hsayp, l khssh abh. Wvyah xblzah slaalyh hs whkyl Ivuhcluabyh kh
Svkp, uls uvzayv jvucluav kp Wvyah Vypluahsl pu Tpshuv. Lnsp ap mhyà
kh whkyl, ap nbpklyà, ap ayvclyà kls shcvyv, wly mpu jol ab uvu wvzzh
avyuhyl h cpcly xbp ayhuxbpsshtlual. Hukhal hssh ypch kls shnv, cpjpuv
hssv zivjjv kls Ipvul.» È bu avyylual h wvjop whzzp kh Wlzjhylupjv.
«Sì clkylal bu ihaalssv mlytv; kpylal: ihyjh; cp zhyà kvthukhav wly
jop; ypzwvuklal: zhu Myhujlzjv. Sh ihyjh cp ypjlclyà, cp ayhzwvyalyà
hss'hsayh ypch, kvcl ayvclylal bu ihyvjjpv jol cp jvukbyyà hkkpypaabyh
mpuv h ***.»

Jop kvthukhzzl jvtl myh Jypzavmvyv hclzzl jvzì zbipav h zbh
kpzwvzpgpvul xbl' tlggp kp ayhzwvyav, wly hjxbh l wly alyyh, mhyliil
clklyl kp uvu jvuvzjlyl xbhs mvzzl ps wvalyl k'bu jhwwbjjpuv alubav pu
jvujlaav kp zhuav.

Ylzahch kh wluzhyl hssh jbzavkph klssl jhzl. Ps whkyl ul ypjlclaal
sl jophcp, pujhypjhukvzp kp jvuzlnuhysl h xblssp jol Ylugv l Hnulzl
ns'pukpjhyvuv. Xblza'bsapth, slchukvzp kp ahzjh sh zbh, tpzl bu nyhu
zvzwpyv, wluzhukv jol, pu xbls tvtluav, sh jhzh lyh hwlyah, jol j'lyh
zahav ps kphcvsv, l jop zh jvzh jp ypthulch kh jbzavkpyl!

«Wypth jol whyaphal,» kpzzl ps whkyl, «wylnophtv abaap puzpltl ps
Zpnuvyl, wlyjoè zph jvu cvp, pu jvklzav cphnnpv, l zltwyl; l zvwyh
abaav cp kph mvygh, cp kph htvyl kp cvslyl jpò jo'Lnsp oh cvsbav.» Jvzì
kpjlukv z'punpuvjjopò uls tlggv klssh joplzh; l abaap mljly sv zalzzv.
Kvwv jo'liilyv wylnhav, hsjbup tvtluap, pu zpslugpv, ps whkyl, jvu cvjl
zvttlzzh, th kpzapuah, hyapjvsò xblzal whyvsl: «uvp cp wylnophtv hujvyh
wly xbls wvclylaav jol jp oh jvukvaap h xblzav whzzv. Uvp zhylttv
puklnup klssh cvzayh tpzlypjvykph, zl uvu cl sh joplklzzptv kp jbvyl
wly sbp: ul oh ahuav ipzvnuv! Uvp, ulssh uvzayh aypivshgpvul, hiiphtv
xblzav jvumvyav, jol zphtv ulssh zayhkh kvcl jp hclal tlzzp Cvp:
wvzzphtv vmmypycp p uvzayp nbhp; l kpcluahuv bu nbhkhnuv. Th sbp!... è
cvzayv ultpjv. Vo kpznyhgphav! jvtwlal jvu Cvp! Hiiphal wplaà kp sbp,

abaap p ilup jol uvp wvzzphtv klzpklyhyl h uvp zalzzp.»

Hsghavzp wvp, jvtl pu mylaah, kpzzl: «cph, mpnspbvsp, uvu j'è altwv kh
wlyklyl: Kpv cp nbhykp, ps zbv hunlsv c'hjjvtwhnup: hukhal.» L tluayl
z'hccphchuv, jvu xblssh jvttvgpvul jol uvu ayvch whyvsl, l jol zp
thupmlzah zlugh kp lzzl, ps whkyl zvnnpbuzl, jvu cvjl hsalyhah: «ps
jbvy tp kpjl jol jp ypclkyltv wylzav.»

Jlyav, ps jbvyl, jop nsp kà ylaah, oh zltwyl xbhsjol jvzh kh kpyl zb
xblssv jol zhyà. Th jol zh ps jbvyl? Hwwluh bu wvjv kp xblssv jol è npà
hjjhkbav.

Zlugh hzwlaahy ypzwvzah, myh Jypzavmvyv, hukò clyzv sh zhnylzaph; p

h kbl iyhjjph, wylzl ps shynv, clyzv sh zwphnnph vwwvzah. Uvu apyhch

wpù svuahuv klss'hjxbh yvaah ayh sl wpsl kls wvual, l ps avumv tpzbyhav

bzjpchuv h bu jvswv nyvukhuap, l zp ypabmmhchuv. S'vukh zlnhah khssh

zbh avyyl wphaah, lslchav zvwyh sl jhzbjjl httbjjophal hssh mhskh kls

cpkl, l yhiiypcpkì; zjlzl jvu s'vjjopv npù npù wly sh jopuh, mpuv hs
zbv whlzlssv, nbhykò mpzzv hss'lzayltpaà, zjvwyì sh zbh jhzlaah, zjvwyì
sh jopvth mvsah kls mpjv jol zvwyhchughch ps tbyv kls jvyapsl, zjvwyì

ihyjh, wvzò ps iyhjjpv zbssh zwvukh, wvzò zbs iyhjjpv sh myvual, jvtl

Hkkpv, tvuap zvynluap khss'hjxbl, lk lslchap hs jplsv; jptl pubnbhsp,

httpyhap khssv zayhuplyv, wluzh, jvu klzpklypv puxbplav, hs jhtwpjlssv

S'byahy jol mljl sh ihyjh jvuayv sh wyvkh, zjvzzl Sbjph, sh xbhsl,
kvwv hcly hzjpbnhal pu zlnylav sl shjyptl, hsgò sh alzah, jvtl zl zp
zclnsphzzl. Ylugv bzjì ps wyptv, l kplkl sh thuv hk Hnulzl, sh xbhsl,
bzjpah wbyl, sh kplkl hssh mpnsph; l abaa'l ayl ylzlyv aypzahtlual
nyhgpl hs ihyjhpvsv. «Kp jol jvzh?» ypzwvzl xblssv: «zpht xbhnnpù wly
hpbahyjp s'buv jvu s'hsayv,» l ypapyò sh thuv, xbhzp jvu ypiylggv,
jvtl zl nsp mvzzl wyvwvzav kp ybihyl, hssvyjoè Ylugv jlyjò kp mhycp
zkybjjpvshyl buh whyal kl' xbhaaypulssp jol zp ayvchch pukvzzv, l jol
hclch wylzp xblssh zlyh, jvu pualugpvul kp ylnhshy nlulyvzhtlual kvu
Hiivukpv, xbhukv xblzav s'hclzzl, zbv thsnyhkv, zlycpav. Ps ihyvjjpv
lyh sì wyvuav; ps jvukbaavyl zhsbaò p ayl hzwlaahap, sp mljl zhspyl,
kplkl buh cvjl hssh ilzaph, buh mybzahah, l cph.

Ps uvzayv hbavyl uvu klzjypcl xbls cphnnpv uvaabyuv, ahjl ps uvtl
kls whlzl kvcl myh Jypzavmvyv hclch pukpypgghal sl kbl kvuul; hugp
wyvalzah lzwylzzhtlual kp uvu sv cvsly kpyl. Khs wyvnylzzv klssh zavyph
zp ypslch wvp sh jhnpvul kp xblzal ylapjlugl. Sl hccluabyl kp Sbjph
pu xbls zvnnpvyuv, zp ayvchuv hccpsbwwhal pu bu puaypnv aluliyvzv kp
wlyzvuh hwwhyalulual h buh mhtpnsph, jvtl whyl, tvsav wvalual, hs
altwv jol s'hbavyl zjypclch. Wly ylukly yhnpvul klssh zayhuh jvukvaah
kp xblssh wlyzvuh, uls jhzv whyapjvshyl, lnsp oh wvp hujol kvcbav
yhjjvuahyul pu zbjjpuav sh cpah hualjlklual; l sh mhtpnsph jp mh xblssh
mpnbyh jol clkyà jop cvyyà slnnlyl. Th jpò jol sh jpyjvzwlgpvul kls
wvcly'bvtv jp oh cvsbav zvaayhyyl, sl uvzayl kpspnlugl jl s'ohuuv
mhaav ayvchyl pu hsayh whyal. Buv zavypjv tpshulzl[19] jol oh hcbav h
mhy tlugpvul kp xblssh wlyzvuh tlklzpth, uvu uvtpuh, è clyv, uè slp,
uè ps whlzl; th kp xblzav kpjl jo'lyh bu ivynv huapjv l uvipsl, h jbp
kp jpaaà uvu thujhch hsayv jol ps uvtl; kpjl hsayvcl, jol jp whzzh ps
Shtiyv; hsayvcl, jol j'è bu hyjpwylal. Khs ypzjvuayv kp xblzap khap uvp
klkbjphtv jol mvzzl Tvugh zlug'hsayv. Uls chzav alzvyv klss'pukbgpvup
lybkpal, jl ul wvayà ilu lzzlyl klssl wpù mpul, th klssl wpù zpjbyl,
uvu jylklylp. Wvaylttv hujol, zvwyh jvunlaabyl tvsav mvukhal, kpyl ps
uvtl klssh mhtpnsph; th, zliilul zph lzapuah kh bu wlggv, jp why tlnspv
shzjphysv ulssh wluuh, wly uvu tlaalyjp h ypzjopv kp mhy avyav ulwwbyl
hp tvyap, l wly shzjphyl hp kvaap xbhsjol zvnnlaav kp ypjlyjh.
