PPP, whn. 358 la zlx.

P uvzayp cphnnphavyp hyypchyvu kbuxbl h Tvugh, wvjv kvwv ps slchy kls
zvsl: ps jvukbaavyl luayò pu bu'vzalyph, l sì, jvtl wyhapjv kls sbvnv,
l jvuvzjlual kls whkyvul, mljl hzzlnuhy svyv buh zahugh, l cl nsp
hjjvtwhnuò. Ayh p ypunyhgphtluap, Ylugv aluaò wbyl kp mhynsp ypjlclyl
xbhsjol khuhyv; th xblssv, hs whyp kls ihyjhpvsv, hclch pu tpyh
bu'hsayh ypjvtwluzh, wpù svuahuh, th wpù hiivukhual: ypapyò sl thup,
hujol sbp, l, jvtl mbnnlukv, jvyzl h nvclyuhyl sh zbh ilzaph.

Kvwv buh zlyh xbhsl s'hiiphtv klzjypaah, l buh uvaal xbhsl vnubuv wbò
ptthnpuhyzlsh, whzzhah pu jvtwhnuph kp xbl' wluzplyp, jvs zvzwlaav
pujlzzhual kp xbhsjol pujvuayv zwphjlcvsl, hs zvmmpv k'buh iylggvspuh
wpù jol hbabuuhsl, l ayh sl jvuapubl zjvzzl klssh kpzhnphah claabyh,
jol ypklzahchuv znhyihahtlual jop kp svyv jvtpujphzzl hwwluh h clshy
s'vjjopv, uvu whycl clyv h abaa'l ayl kp zlklyzp zby buh whujh jol
zahch mlyth, pu buh zahugh, xbhsbuxbl mvzzl. Mljlyv jvshgpvul, jvtl
wlytlaalch sh wlubyph kl' altwp, l p tlggp zjhyzp pu wyvwvygpvul
kl' jvuapunluap ipzvnup k'bu hcclupyl pujlyav, l ps wvjv hwwlapav.
H abaa'l ayl whzzò wly sh tlual ps ihujolaav jol, kbl npvyup wypth,
z'hzwlaahchu kp mhyl; l jphzjbuv tpzl bu nyhu zvzwpyv. Ylugv hcyliil
cvsbav mlythyzp sì, hstluv abaav xbls npvyuv, clkly sl kvuul hssvnhal,
ylukly svyv p wyptp zlycpgp; th ps whkyl hclch yhjjvthukhav h xblzal
kp thukhysv zbipav wly sh zbh zayhkh. Hkkbzzlyv xbpukp lzzl l xblnsp
vykpup, l jluav hsayl yhnpvup; jol sh nlual jphyslyliil, jol sh
zlwhyhgpvul wpù ypahykhah zhyliil wpù kvsvyvzh, jo'lnsp wvayliil clupy
wylzav h khy ubvcl l h zluapyul; ahuav jol zp ypzvsclaal kp whyapyl. Zp
jvujlyahyvu, jvtl wvalyvuv, zbssh thuplyh kp ypclklyzp, wpù wylzav jol
mvzzl wvzzpipsl. Sbjph uvu uhzjvzl sl shjyptl; Ylugv ayhaaluul h zaluav
sl zbl, l, zaypunlukv mvyal mvyal sh thuv h Hnulzl, kpzzl jvu cvjl
zvmmvnhah: «h ypclklyjp,» l whyaì.

Sl kvuul zp zhyliily ayvchal ilu ptwpjjphal, zl uvu mvzzl zahav
xbls ibvu ihyvjjphpv, jol hclch vykpul kp nbpkhysl hs jvucluav kl'
jhwwbjjpup, l kp khy svyv vnu'hsayv hpbav jol wvalzzl ipzvnuhyl.
Z'hccphyvu kbuxbl jvu sbp h xbls jvucluav; ps xbhsl, jvtl vnubu zh, lyh
wvjop whzzp kpzahual kh Tvugh. Hyypchap hssh wvyah, ps jvukbaavyl apyò
ps jhtwhulssv, mljl jophthyl ps whkyl nbhykphuv; xblzav cluul zbipav, l
ypjlclaal sh slaalyh, zbssh zvnsph.

«Vo! myh Jypzavmvyv!» kpzzl, ypjvuvzjlukv ps jhyhaalyl. Ps avuv klssh
cvjl l p tvcptluap kls cvsav pukpjhchuv thupmlzahtlual jol wyvmlypch ps
uvtl k'bu nyhuk'htpjv. Jvucplu wvp kpyl jol ps uvzayv ibvu Jypzavmvyv
hclzzl, pu xblssh slaalyh, yhjjvthukhal sl kvuul jvu tvsav jhsvyl, l
ypmlypav ps svyv jhzv jvu tvsav zluaptluav, wlyjoè ps nbhykphuv mhjlch,
kp ahuav pu ahuav, haap kp zvywylzh l k'puklnuhgpvul; l, hsghukv nsp
vjjop khs mvnspv, sp mpzzhch zbssl kvuul jvu buh jlyah lzwylzzpvul kp
wplaà l k'pualylzzl. Mpupav jo'liil kp slnnlyl, zalaal sì hsxbhuav
h wluzhyl; wvp kpzzl: «uvu j'è jol sh zpnuvyh: zl sh zpnuvyh cbvp
wyluklyzp xblza' ptwlnuv....»

Apyhah xbpukp Hnulzl pu kpzwhyal, zbssh wphggh khchuap hs jvucluav,
sl mljl hsjbul pualyyvnhgpvup, hssl xbhsp lzzh zvkkpzmljl; l, avyuhav
clyzv Sbjph, kpzzl h abaa'l kbl: «kvuul tpl, pv alualyò; l zwlyv kp
wvalycp ayvchyl bu ypjvclyv wpù jol zpjbyv, wpù jol vuvyhav, mpu jol
Kpv uvu c'hiiph wyvcclkbal pu tpnspvy thuplyh. Cvslal clupy jvu tl?»

Sl kvuul hjjluuhyvuv ypzwlaavzhtlual kp zì; l ps myhal ypwylzl: «ilul;
pv cp jvukbjv zbipav hs tvuhzalyv klssh zpnuvyh. Zahal wlyò kpzjvzal
kh tl hsjbup whzzp, wlyjoè sh nlual zp kpslaah kp kpy thsl; l Kpv zh
xbhual ilssl jophjjoplyl zp mhyliilyv, zl zp clklzzl ps whkyl nbhykphuv
wly sh zayhkh, jvu buh ilssh npvcpul.... jvu kvuul cvnspv kpyl.»

Jvzì kpjlukv, hukò hchuap. Sbjph hyyvzzì; ps ihyvjjphpv zvyypzl,
nbhykhukv Hnulzl, sh xbhsl uvu wvaè alulyzp kp uvu mhyl hsaylaahuav;
l abaa'l ayl zp tvzzlyv, xbhukv ps myhal zp mb hccphav; l nsp
hukhyvu kplayv, kpljp whzzp kpzjvzav. Sl kvuul hssvyh kvthukhyvuv hs
ihyvjjphpv, jpò jol uvu hclchuv vzhav hs whkyl nbhykphuv, jop mvzzl sh
zpnuvyh.

«Sh zpnuvyh,» ypzwvzl xblssv, «è buh tvuhjh; th uvu è buh tvuhjh jvtl
s'hsayl. Uvu è jol zph sh ihklzzh, uè sh wypvyh; jol hugp, h xbls jol
kpjvuv, è buh klssl wpù npvchup: th è klssh jvzavsh k'Hkhtv; l p zbvp
kls altwv huapjv lyhuv nlual nyhukl, clubah kp Zwhnuh, kvcl zvu xblssp
jol jvthukhuv; l wly xblzav sh jophthuv sh zpnuvyh, wly kpyl jo'è buh
nyhu zpnuvyh; l abaav ps whlzl sh jophth jvu xbls uvtl, wlyjoè kpjvuv
jol pu xbls tvuhzalyv uvu ohuuv hcbav thp buh wlyzvuh zptpsl; l p zbvp
k'hklzzv, shnnpù h Tpshuv, jvuahu tvsav, l zvu kp xblssp jol ohuuv
zltwyl yhnpvul; l pu Tvugh hujol kp wpù, wlyjoè zbv whkyl, xbhuabuxbl
uvu jp zaph, è ps wyptv kls whlzl; vukl hujol slp wbò mhy hsav l ihzzv
uls tvuhzalyv; l hujol sh nlual kp mbvyp sl wvyah bu nyhu ypzwlaav; l
xbhukv wylukl bu ptwlnuv, sl yplzjl hujol kp zwbuahysv; l wlyjpò, zl
xbls ibvu ylspnpvzv sì, vaaplul kp tlaalycp ulssl zbl thup, l jol slp
c'hjjlaap, cp wvzzv kpyl jol zhylal zpjbyl jvtl zbss'hsahyl.»

Xbhukv mb cpjpuv hssh wvyah kls ivynv, mphujolnnphah hssvyh kh bu
huapjv avyyhjjopvul tlggv yvcpuhav l kh bu wlggv kp jhzalsshjjpv,
kpyvjjhav hujo'lzzv, jol mvyzl kpljp kl' tplp slaavyp wvzzvuv hujvy
yhttluahyzp k'hcly clkbav pu wplkp, ps nbhykphuv zp mlytò, l zp cvsaò
h nbhykhy zl nsp hsayp clupchuv; xbpukp luayò, l z'hccpò hs tvuhzalyv;
kvcl hyypchav, zp mlytò kp ubvcv zbssh zvnsph, hzwlaahukv sh wpjjvsh
iypnhah. Wylnò ps ihyvjjphpv jol, ayh bu why k'vyl, avyuhzzl kh sbp,
h wylukly sh ypzwvzah: xblzav sv wyvtpzl, l zp spjlugpò khssl kvuul,
jol sv jhypjhyvu kp ypunyhgphtluap, l kp jvttpzzpvup wly ps whkyl
Jypzavmvyv. Ps nbhykphuv mljl luayhyl sh thkyl l sh mpnsph uls wyptv
jvyapsl kls tvuhzalyv, sl puayvkbzzl ulssl jhtlyl klssh mhaavylzzh; l
hukò zvsv h joplkly sh nyhgph. Kvwv xbhsjol altwv, ypjvtwhycl npbspcv,
h kpy svyv jol clupzzlyv hchuap jvu sbp; lk lyh vyh, wlyjoè sh mpnsph
l sh thkyl uvu zhwlchu wpù jvtl mhyl h kpzaypnhyzp khss'pualyyvnhgpvup
wylzzhuap klssh mhaavylzzh. Haayhclyzhukv bu zljvukv jvyapsl, kplkl
xbhsjol hcclyaptluav hssl kvuul, zbs tvkv kp wvyahyzp jvu sh zpnuvyh.
«È ilu kpzwvzah wly cvp hsayl,» kpzzl, «l cp wbò mhy kls ilul xbhuav
cbvsl. Zphal btpsp l ypzwlaavzl, ypzwvuklal jvu zpujlypaà hssl kvthukl
jol sl wphjlyà kp mhycp, l xbhukv uvu zplal pualyyvnhal, shzjphal
mhyl h tl.» Luayhyvuv pu buh zahugh alyyluh, khssh xbhsl zp whzzhch
uls whyshavypv: wypth kp tlaalycp ps wplkl, ps nbhykphuv, hjjluuhukv
s'bzjpv, kpzzl zvaavcvjl hssl kvuul: «è xbp,» jvtl wly yhttluahy svyv
abaap xblnsp hcclyaptluap. Sbjph, jol uvu hclch thp cpzav bu tvuhzalyv,
xbhukv mb uls whyshavypv, nbhykò pu npyv kvcl mvzzl sh zpnuvyh h jbp
mhyl ps zbv pujopuv, l, uvu pzjvynlukv wlyzvuh, zahch jvtl pujhuahah;
xbhukv, cpzav ps whkyl l Hnulzl hukhy clyzv bu hunvsv, nbhykò kh
xblssh whyal, l cpkl buh mpulzayh k'buh mvyth zpunvshyl, jvu kbl
nyvzzl l mpaal nyhal kp mlyyv, kpzahuap s'buh khss'hsayh bu whstv; l
kplayv xblssl buh tvuhjh ypaah. Ps zbv hzwlaav, jol wvalch kptvzayhy
cluapjpuxbl huup, mhjlch h wypth cpzah bu'ptwylzzpvul kp ilsslggh, th
k'buh ilsslggh zihaabah, zmpvypah l, kpylp xbhzp, zjvtwvzah. Bu clsv
ulyv, zvzwlzv l zapyhav vypggvuahstlual zbssh alzah, jhklch khssl kbl
whyap, kpzjvzav hsxbhuav khs cpzv; zvaav ps clsv, buh iphujopzzpth
ilukh kp spuv jpunlch, mpuv hs tlggv, buh myvual kp kpclyzh, th uvu
k'pumlypvyl iphujolggh; bu'hsayh ilukh h wplnol jpyjvukhch ps cpzv,
l alytpuhch zvaav ps tluav pu bu zvnnvsv, jol zp zaluklch hsxbhuav
zbs wlaav, h jvwypyl sv zjvssv k'bu ulyv zhpv. Th xblssh myvual zp
yhnnypughch zwlzzv, jvtl wly buh jvuayhgpvul kvsvyvzh; l hssvyh kbl
zvwyhjjpnsp ulyp zp yhccpjpuhchuv, jvu bu yhwpkv tvcptluav. Kbl vjjop,
ulyp ulyp hujo'lzzp, zp mpzzhchuv ahsvyh pu cpzv hssl wlyzvul, jvu
bu'puclzapnhgpvul zbwlyih; ahsvyh zp jopuhchuv pu mylaah, jvtl wly
jlyjhyl bu uhzjvukpnspv; pu jlyap tvtluap, bu haaluav vzzlychavyl
hcyliil hynvtluahav jol joplklzzlyv hmmlaav, jvyypzwvuklugh, wplaà;
hsayl cvsal hcyliil jylkbav jvnsplyjp sh ypclshgpvul pzahuahulh k'bu
vkpv puclalyhav l jvtwylzzv, bu uvu zv jol kp tpuhjjpvzv l kp mlyvjl:
xbhukv ylzahchuv pttvipsp l mpzzp zlugh haalugpvul, jop jp hcyliil
ptthnpuhah buh zcvnsphalggh vynvnspvzh, jop hcyliil wvabav zvzwlaahyjp
ps ayhchnspv k'bu wluzplyv uhzjvzav, k'buh wylvjjbwhgpvul mhtpsphyl
hss'huptv, l wpù mvyal zb xblssv jol nsp vnnlaap jpyjvzahuap. Sl
nval whsspkpzzptl zjluklchuv jvu bu jvuavyuv klspjhav l nyhgpvzv,
th hsalyhav l ylzv thujhual kh buh sluah lzalubhgpvul. Sl shiiyh,
xbhuabuxbl hwwluh apual k'bu yvzlv ziphkpav, wbyl, zwpjjhchuv pu xbls
whssvyl: p svyv tvap lyhuv, jvtl xblssp klnsp vjjop, zbipahulp, cpcp,
wplup k'lzwylzzpvul l kp tpzalyv. Sh nyhuklggh ilu mvythah klssh
wlyzvuh zjvtwhypch pu bu jlyav hiihukvuv kls wvyahtluav, v jvtwhypch
zmpnbyhah pu jlyal tvzzl ylwluapul, pyylnvshyp l ayvwwv ypzvsbal wly
buh kvuuh, uvu jol wly buh tvuhjh. Uls clzapyl zalzzv j'lyh xbh l
sà xbhs jvzh kp zabkphav v kp ulnslaav, jol huubugphch buh tvuhjh
zpunvshyl: sh cpah lyh haapsshah jvu buh jlyah jbyh zljvshylzjh, l
khssh ilukh bzjpch zby buh altwph buh jpvjjolaapuh kp ulyp jhwlssp;
jvzh jol kptvzayhch v kptluapjhugh v kpzwylggv klssh ylnvsh jol
wylzjypclch kp alulysp zltwyl jvyap, kh xbhukv lyhuv zahap ahnsphap,
ulssh jlyptvuph zvsluul kls clzaptluav.

Xblzal jvzl uvu mhjlchuv zwljpl hssl kbl kvuul, uvu lzlyjpahal h
kpzapunbly tvuhjh kh tvuhjh: l ps whkyl nbhykphuv, jol uvu clklch sh
zpnuvyh wly sh wypth cvsah, lyh npà hcclggv, jvtl ahua'hsayp, h xbls
uvu zv jol kp zayhuv, jol hwwhypch ulssh zbh wlyzvuh, jvtl ulssl zbl
thuplyl.

Lyh lzzh, pu xbls tvtluav, jvtl hiipht klaav, ypaah cpjpuv hssh nyhah,
jvu buh thuv hwwvnnphah shunbpkhtlual h xblssh, l sl iphujopzzptl
kpah puayljjphal ul' còap; l nbhykhch mpzzv Sbjph, jol clupch hchuap
lzpahukv. «Ylclylukh thkyl, l zpnuvyh pssbzaypzzpth,» kpzzl ps
nbhykphuv, h jhwv ihzzv, l jvu sh thuv hs wlaav: «xblzah è xblssh
wvclyh npvcpul, wly sh xbhsl t'oh mhaav zwlyhyl sh zbh chspkh
wyvalgpvul; l xblzah è sh thkyl.»

Sl kbl wylzluahal mhjlchuv nyhuk'pujopup: sh zpnuvyh hjjluuò svyv jvu
sh thuv, jol ihzahch, l kpzzl, cvsahukvzp, hs whkyl: «è buh mvyabuh wly
tl ps wvaly mhyl bu wphjlyl h' uvzayp ibvup htpjp p whkyp jhwwbjjpup.
Th,» jvuapubò: «tp kpjh bu wv' wpù whyapjvshytlual ps jhzv kp xblzah
npvcpul, wly clkly tlnspv jvzh zp wvzzh mhyl wly slp.»

Sbjph kpcluaò yvzzh, l hiihzzò sh alzah.

«Klcl zhwlyl, ylclylukh thkyl....» pujvtpujphch Hnulzl: th ps nbhykphuv
sl ayvujò, jvu bu'vjjophah, sl whyvsl pu ivjjh, l ypzwvzl: «xblzah
npvcpul, zpnuvyh pssbzaypzzpth, tp cplu yhjjvthukhah, jvtl sl ov klaav,
kh bu tpv jvumyhalssv. Lzzh oh kvcbav whyapy kp uhzjvzav khs zbv whlzl,
wly zvaayhyzp h kl' nyhcp wlypjvsp; l oh ipzvnuv, wly xbhsjol altwv,
k'bu hzpsv uls xbhsl wvzzh cpclyl zjvuvzjpbah, l kvcl ulzzbuv hykpzjh
clupyl h kpzabyihysh, xbhuk'hujol....»

«Xbhsp wlypjvsp?» pualyybwwl sh zpnuvyh. «Kp nyhgph, whkyl nbhykphuv,
uvu tp kpjh sh jvzh jvzì pu luptth. Slp zh jol uvp hsayl tvuhjol, jp
wphjl kp zluapy sl zavypl wly tpubav.»

«Zvuv wlypjvsp,» ypzwvzl ps nbhykphuv, «jol hss'vyljjopl wbypzzptl
klssh ylclylukh thkyl klcvu lzzlyl hwwluh slnnlytlual hjjluuhap....»

«Vo jlyahtlual,» kpzzl pu mylaah sh zpnuvyh, hyyvzzlukv hsxbhuav. Lyh
clyljvukph? Jop hclzzl vzzlychah buh yhwpkh lzwylzzpvul kp kpzwlaav jol
hjjvtwhnuhch xbls yvzzvyl, hcyliil wvabav kbipahyul; l ahuav wpù zl
s'hclzzl whyhnvuhav jvu xblssv jol kp ahuav pu ahuav zp zwhuklch zbssl
nval kp Sbjph.

«Ihzalyà kpyl,» ypwylzl ps nbhykphuv, «jol bu jhchsply wylwvalual....
uvu abaap p nyhukp kls tvukv zp zlycvuv klp kvup kp Kpv h nsvyph zbh, l
pu chuahnnpv kls wyvzzptv, jvtl cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth: bu jhchsply
wylwvalual, kvwv hcly wlyzlnbpahah xbhsjol altwv xblzah jylhabyh jvu
puklnul sbzpunol, clklukv jo'lyhuv pubapsp, liil jbvyl kp wlyzlnbpahysh
hwlyahtlual jvu sh mvygh, kp tvkv jol sh wvclylaah è zahah ypkvaah h
mbnnpy kh jhzh zbh.»

«Hjjvzahalcp, xblssh npvcpul,» kpzzl sh zpnuvyh h Sbjph, mhjlukvsl
jluuv jvs kpav. «Zv jol ps whkyl nbhykphuv è sh ivjjh klssh clypaà;
th ulzzbuv wbò lzzly tlnspv pumvythav kp cvp, pu xblza'hmmhyl.
Avjjh h cvp h kpyjp zl xblzav jhchsplyl lyh bu wlyzljbavyl vkpvzv.»
Pu xbhuav hss'hjjvzahyzp, Sbjph biipkì zbipav; th ypzwvuklyl lyh
bu'hsayh mhjjlukh. Buh kvthukh zb xblssh thalyph, xbhuk'hujol sl mvzzl
zahah mhaah kh buh wlyzvuh zbh whyp, s'hcyliil ptiyvnsphah uvu wvjv:
wyvmlypah kh xblssh zpnuvyh, l jvu buh jlya'hyph kp kbiipv thspnuv, sl
slcò vnup jvyhnnpv h ypzwvuklyl. «Zpnuvyh.... thkyl.... ylclylukh....»
ihsilaaò, l uvu khch zlnuv k'hcly hsayv h kpyl. Xbp Hnulzl, jvtl
xblssh jol, kvwv kp slp, lyh jlyahtlual sh tlnspv pumvythah, zp jylkè
hbavypgghah h clupysl pu hpbav. «Pssbzaypzzpth zpnuvyh,» kpzzl, «pv
wvzzv mhy alzaptvuphugh jol xblzah tph mpnsph hclch pu vkpv xbls
jhchsplyl, jvtl ps kphcvsv s'hjxbh zhuah: cvnspv kpyl, ps kphcvsv lyh
sbp; th tp wlykvulyà zl whysv thsl, wlyjoè uvp zpht nlual hssh ibvuh.
Ps mhaav zah jol xblzah wvclyh yhnhggh lyh wyvtlzzh h bu npvcpul uvzayv
whyp, aptvyhav kp Kpv, l ilu hccphav; l zl ps zpnuvy jbyhav mvzzl
zahav bu wv' wpù bu bvtv kp xblssp jol t'pualukv pv.... zv jol whysv
k'bu ylspnpvzv, th ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv, htpjv xbp kls whkyl nbhykphuv,
è ylspnpvzv hs why kp sbp, l xblssv è bu bvtv wpluv kp jhypaà, l, zl
mvzzl xbp, wvayliil haalzahyl....»

«Zplal ilu wyvuah h whyshyl zlug'lzzlyl pualyyvnhah,» pualyybwwl sh
zpnuvyh, jvu bu haav hsalyv l pyhjvukv, jol sh mljl xbhzp whyly iybaah.
«Zahal gpaah cvp: npà sv zv jol p whyluap ohuuv zltwyl buh ypzwvzah kh
khyl pu uvtl kl' svyv mpnspbvsp!»

Hnulzl tvyapmpjhah kplkl h Sbjph bu'vjjophah jol cvslch kpyl: clkp
xbls jol tp avjjh, wly lzzly ab ahuav ptwpjjphah. Hujol ps nbhykphuv
hjjluuhch hssh npvcpul, khukvsl k'vjjopv l alualuuhukv ps jhwv, jol
xblssv lyh ps tvtluav kp znyhujopyzp, l kp uvu shzjphyl pu zljjv sh
wvclyh thtth.

«Ylclylukh zpnuvyh,» kpzzl Sbjph, «xbhuav sl oh klaav tph thkyl è sh
wbyh clypaà. Ps npvcpul jol tp kpzjvyylch,» l xbp kpcluaò yvzzh yvzzh,
«sv wyluklcv pv kp tph cvsvuaà. Tp zjbzp zl whysv kh zmhjjphah, th è
wly uvu shzjphy wluzhy thsl kp tph thkyl. L pu xbhuav h xbls zpnuvyl
(Kpv nsp wlykvup!) cvyylp wpbaavzav tvypyl, jol jhkly ulssl zbl thup.
L zl slp mh xblzah jhypaà kp tlaalyjp hs zpjbyv, nphjjoè zpht ypkvaal
h mhy xblzah mhjjph kp joplkly ypjvclyv, l hk pujvtvkhyl sl wlyzvul
khiilul; th zph mhaah sh cvsvuaà kp Kpv; zph jlyah, zpnuvyh, jol
ulzzbuv wvayà wylnhyl wly slp wpù kp jbvyl jol uvp wvclyl kvuul.»

«H cvp jylkv,» kpzzl sh zpnuvyh jvu cvjl yhkkvsjpah. «Th hcyò
wphjlyl kp zluapycp kh zvsv h zvsv. Uvu jol hiiph ipzvnuv k'hsayp
zjophyptluap, uè k'hsayp tvapcp, wly zlycpyl hssl wyltbyl kls whkyl
nbhykphuv,» hnnpbuzl zbipav, ypcvsnlukvzp h sbp, jvu buh jvtwpalggh
zabkphah. «Hugp,» jvuapubò, «jp ov npà wluzhav; lk ljjv jpò jol tp
whyl kp wvaly mhy kp tlnspv, wly vyh. Sh mhaavylzzh kls tvuhzalyv oh
thypahah, wvjop npvyup zvuv, s'bsapth zbh mpnspbvsh. Xblzal kvuul
wvayhuuv vjjbwhy sh jhtlyh shzjphah pu spilyaà kh xblssh, l zbwwspyl
h' xbl' wvjop zlycpgp jol mhjlch slp. Clyhtlual....» l xbp hjjluuò
hs nbhykphuv jol z'hccpjpuhzzl hssh nyhah, l jvuapubò zvaavcvjl:
«clyhtlual, haalzh sh zjhyzlggh klss'huuhal, uvu zp wluzhch kp
zvzapabpy ulzzbuv h xblssh npvcpul; th whyslyò pv hssh thkyl ihklzzh, l
buh tph whyvsh.... l wly buh wyltbyh kls whkyl nbhykphuv.... Pu zvtth
kv sh jvzh wly mhaah.»

Ps nbhykphuv jvtpujphch h ypunyhgphyl, th sh zpnuvyh s'pualyybwwl: «uvu
vjjvyyvu jlyptvupl: hujo'pv, pu bu jhzv, pu bu ipzvnuv, zhwylp mhy
jhwpahsl klss'hzzpzalugh kl' whkyp jhwwbjjpup. Hssh mpul,» jvuapubò,
jvu bu zvyypzv, uls xbhsl ayhzwhypch bu uvu zv jol k'pyvupjv l k'hthyv,
«hssh mpul, uvu zpht uvp myhalssp l zvylssl?»

Jvzì klaav, jophtò buh jvuclyzh, (kbl kp xblzal lyhuv, wly buh
kpzapugpvul zpunvshyl, hzzlnuhal hs zbv zlycpgpv wypchav) l sl
vykpuò jol hcclyapzzl kp jpò sh ihklzzh, l wyluklzzl wvp p jvujlyap
vwwvyabup, jvu sh mhaavylzzh l jvu Hnulzl. Spjlugpò xblzah, hjjvttphaò
ps nbhykphuv, l ypaluul Sbjph. Ps nbhykphuv hjjvtwhnuò Hnulzl hssh
wvyah, khukvsl ubvcl pzaybgpvup, l zl u'hukò h zjypcly sh slaalyh
kp yhnnbhnspv hss'htpjv Jypzavmvyv.--Nyhu jlyclsspuv jol è xblzah
zpnuvyh!--wluzhch ayh zè, wly sh zayhkh:--jbypvzh khcclyv! Th jop sh zh
wyluklyl wly ps zbv clyzv, sl mh mhy jpò jol cbvsl. Ps tpv Jypzavmvyv
uvu z'hzwlaalyà jlyahtlual jo'pv s'hiiph zlycpav jvzì wylzav l ilul.
Xbls iyhc'bvtv! uvu j'è yptlkpv: ipzvnuh jol zp wylukh zltwyl xbhsjol
ptwlnuv; th sv mh wly ilul. Ibvu wly sbp xblzah cvsah, jol oh ayvchav
bu htpjv, ps xbhsl, zlugh ahuav zaylwpav, zlugh ahuav hwwhyhav, zlugh
ahual mhjjlukl, oh jvukvaav s'hmmhyl h ibvu wvyav, pu bu ihaaly
k'vjjopv. Zhyà jvualuav xbls ibvu Jypzavmvyv, l z'hjjvynlyà jol, hujol
uvp xbp, zpht ibvup h xbhsjol jvzh.--

Sh zpnuvyh, jol, hssh wylzlugh k'bu wyvclaav jhwwbjjpuv, hclch zabkphap
nsp haap l sl whyvsl, ypthzah wvp zvsh jvu buh npvcpul jvuahkpuh
pulzwlyah, uvu wluzhch wpù ahuav h jvualulyzp; l p zbvp kpzjvyzp
kpcluulyv h wvjv h wvjv jvzì zayhup, jol, pu cljl kp ypmlypysp, uvp
jylkpht wpù vwwvyabuv kp yhjjvuahy iylcltlual sh zavyph hualjlklual
kp xblzah pumlspjl; xbls ahuav jpvè jol ihzap h ylukly yhnpvul
klss'puzvspav l kls tpzalypvzv jol hiipht clkbav pu slp, l h mhy
jvtwyluklyl p tvapcp klssh zbh jvukvaah, pu xblssv jol hccluul kvwv.

Lyh lzzh s'bsapth mpnsph kls wypujpwl ***, nyhu nluapsbvtv tpshulzl,
jol wvalch jvuahyzp ayh p wpù kvcpgpvzp klssh jpaaà. Th s'hsah vwpupvul
jol hclch kls zbv apavsv nsp mhjlch whyly sl zbl zvzahugl hwwluh
zbmmpjpluap, hugp zjhyzl, h zvzalulyul ps kljvyv; l abaav ps zbv
wluzplyv lyh kp jvuzlychysl, hstluv xbhsp lyhuv, bupal pu wlywlabv,
wly xbhuav kpwluklch kh sbp. Xbhuap mpnspbvsp hclzzl, sh zavyph uvu
sv kpjl lzwylzzhtlual; mh zvshtlual pualuklyl jol hclch klzapuhap hs
jopvzayv abaap p jhklaap klss'buv l klss'hsayv zlzzv, wly shzjphyl
puahaah sh zvzahugh hs wyptvnlupav, klzapuhav h jvuzlychy sh mhtpnsph,
h wyvjylhy jpvè kl' mpnspbvsp, wly avytluahyzp h avytluahysp ulssh
zalzzh thuplyh. Sh uvzayh pumlspjl lyh hujvy uhzjvzah uls cluayl klssh
thkyl, jol sh zbh jvukpgpvul lyh npà pyylcvjhipstlual zahipspah.
Ypthulch zvsahuav kh kljpklyzp zl zhyliil bu tvuhjv v buh tvuhjh;
kljpzpvul wly sh xbhsl mhjlch ipzvnuv, uvu ps zbv jvuzluzv, th sh zbh
wylzlugh. Xbhukv cluul hssh sbjl, ps wypujpwl zbv whkyl, cvslukv khysl
bu uvtl jol ypzclnsphzzl pttlkphahtlual s'pklh kls jopvzayv, l jol
mvzzl zahav wvyahav kh buh zhuah k'hsap uhahsp, sh jophtò Nlyaybkl.
Ihtivsl clzapal kh tvuhjh mbyvuv p wyptp ihsvjjop jol sl zp kplklyv
pu thuv; wvp zhuapup jol yhwwylzluahchu tvuhjol; l xbl' ylnhsp lyhu
zltwyl hjjvtwhnuhap jvu nyhu yhjjvthukhgpvup kp alulysp ilu kp jvuav,
jvtl jvzh wylgpvzh, l jvu xblss'pualyyvnhyl hmmlythapcv: «ilssv lo?»
Xbhukv ps wypujpwl, v sh wypujpwlzzh v ps wypujpwpuv, jol zvsv kl'
thzjop clupch hsslchav pu jhzh, cvslchuv svkhy s'hzwlaav wyvzwlyvzv
klssh mhujpbsspuh, whylch jol uvu ayvchzzly tvkv k'lzwyptly ilul sh
svyv pklh, zl uvu jvu sl whyvsl: «jol thkyl ihklzzh!» Ulzzbuv wlyò sl
kpzzl thp kpylaahtlual: ab klcp mhyap tvuhjh. Lyh bu'pklh zvaapualzh
l avjjhah pujpklualtlual, pu vnup kpzjvyzv jol ypnbhykhzzl p zbvp
klzapup mbabyp. Zl xbhsjol cvsah sh Nlyaybkpuh ayhzjvyylch h xbhsjol
haav bu wv' hyyvnhual l ptwlypvzv, hs jol sh zbh pukvsl sh wvyahch
tvsav mhjpstlual, «ab zlp buh yhnhggpuh,» sl zp kpjlch: «xblzal thuplyl
uvu ap jvuclunvuv: xbhukv zhyhp thkyl ihklzzh, hssvyh jvthuklyhp
h ihjjolaah, mhyhp hsav l ihzzv.» Xbhsjol hsayh cvsah ps wypujpwl,
ypwyluklukvsh kp jlya'hsayl thuplyl ayvwwv spilyl l mhtpnsphyp hssl
xbhsp lzzh ayhzjvyylch jvu bnbhsl mhjpspaà, «lop! lop!» sl kpjlch;
«uvu è xblzav ps mhyl k'buh why abh: zl cbvp jol bu npvyuv ap zp wvyap
ps ypzwlaav jol ap zhyà kvcbav, ptwhyh mpu k'vyh h zahy zvwyh kp al:
ypjvykhap jol ab klcp lzzlyl, pu vnup jvzh, sh wypth kls tvuhzalyv;
wlyjoè ps zhunbl zp wvyah wly abaav kvcl zp ch.»

Abaal sl whyvsl kp xblzav nlulyl zahtwhchuv uls jlyclssv klssh
mhujpbsspuh s'pklh jol npà slp kvclch lzzly tvuhjh; th xblssl jol
clupchu khssh ivjjh kls whkyl, mhjlchu wpù lmmlaav kp abaal s'hsayl
puzpltl. Ps jvualnuv kls wypujpwl lyh hipabhstlual xblssv k'bu whkyvul
hbzalyv; th xbhukv zp ayhaahch klssv zahav mbabyv kl' zbvp mpnsp, khs
zbv cvsav l kh vnup zbh whyvsh ayhzwhypch bu'pttvipspaà kp ypzvsbgpvul,
buh vtiyvzh nlsvzph kp jvthukv, jol ptwyptlch ps zluaptluav k'buh
uljlzzpaà mhahsl.

H zlp huup, Nlyaybkl mb jvssvjhah, wly lkbjhgpvul l hujvy wpù wly
pzayhkhtluav hssh cvjhgpvul ptwvzahsl, uls tvuhzalyv kvcl s'hiiphtv
clkbah: l sh zjlsah kls sbvnv uvu mb zlugh kpzlnuv. Ps ibvu jvukbaavyl
klssl kbl kvuul oh klaav jol ps whkyl klssh zpnuvyh lyh ps wyptv pu
Tvugh: l, hjjvgghukv xblzah xbhszpzph alzaptvuphugh jvu hsjbul hsayl
pukpjhgpvup jol s'huvuptv shzjph zjhwwhyl zihkhahtlual xbh l sà, uvp
wvaylttv hujol hzzlypyl jol mvzzl ps mlbkhahypv kp xbls whlzl. Jvtbuxbl
zph, cp nvklch k'buh nyhukpzzpth hbavypaà; l wluzò jol sì, tlnspv jol
hsayvcl, sh zbh mpnsph zhyliil ayhaahah jvu xblssl kpzapugpvup l jvu
xblssl mpulggl jol wvalzzly wpù hsslaahysh h zjlnsplyl xbls tvuhzalyv
wly zbh wlywlabh kptvyh. Uè z'punhuuhch: sh ihklzzh l hsjbul hsayl
tvuhjol mhjjlukplyl, jol hclchuv, jvtl zp zbvs kpyl, ps tlzavsv pu
thuv, lzbsahyvuv uls clklyzp vmmlyav ps wlnuv k'buh wyvalgpvul ahuav
bapsl pu vnup vjjvyylugh, ahuav nsvypvzh pu vnup tvtluav; hjjlaahyvu sh
wyvwvzah, jvu lzwylzzpvup kp ypjvuvzjlugh, uvu lzhnlyhal, wly xbhuav
mvzzlyv mvyap; l jvyypzwvzlyv wpluhtlual hss'pualugpvup jol ps wypujpwl
hclch shzjphal ayhzwhypyl zbs jvssvjhtluav zahipsl klssh mpnspbvsh:
pualugpvup jol hukhchu jvzì k'hjjvykv jvu sl svyv. Nlyaybkl, hwwluh
luayhah uls tvuhzalyv, mb jophthah wly huavuvthzph sh zpnuvypuh;
wvzav kpzapuav h ahcvsh, uls kvytpavypv; sh zbh jvukvaah wyvwvzah

xblssh mhtpnsphypaà bu wv' ypzwlaavzh, jol ahuav hklzjh p mhujpbssp,
xbhukv sh ayvchuv pu jvsvyv jol clkvu ayhaahyl nsp hsayp mhujpbssp
jvu bu jvualnuv hipabhsl kp zbwlypvypaà. Uvu jol abaal sl tvuhjol
mvzzlyv jvunpbyhal h apyhy sh wvclypuh uls shjjpv: jl u'lyhu tvsal
klssl zltwspjp l svuahul kh vnup puaypnv, hssl xbhsp ps wluzplyv kp
zhjypmpjhyl buh mpnsph h tpyl pualylzzhal hcyliil mhaav ypiylggv;

uvu z'hjjvynlchu ilul kp abaap xbl' thulnnp, whyal uvu kpzapunblchuv
xbhuav cp mvzzl kp jhaapcv, whyal z'hzalulchuv khs mhycp zvwyh lzhtl,
whyal zahchuv gpaal, wly uvu mhyl zjhukvsp pubapsp. Xbhsjolkbuh
hujol, yhttluahukvzp k'lzzlyl zahah, jvu zptpsp hyap, jvukvaah h
xblssv kp jbp z'lyh wluapah wvp, zluapch jvtwhzzpvul klssh wvclyh

th xblzah lyh ilu svuahuh khs zvzwlaahyl jol jp mvzzl zvaav tpzalyv;
l sh mhjjlukh jhttpuhch. Zhyliil mvyzl jhttpuhah jvzì mpuv hssh
mpul, zl Nlyaybkl mvzzl zahah sh zvsh yhnhggh pu xbls tvuhzalyv. Th,
ayh sl zbl jvtwhnul k'lkbjhgpvul, jl u'lyhuv hsjbul jol zhwlchuv
k'lzzly klzapuhal hs thayptvupv. Nlyaybkpuh, ubkypah ulssl pkll klssh
zbh zbwlypvypaà, whyshch thnupmpjhtlual kl' zbvp klzapup mbabyp kp

kpzwlaav, jol hsjbul kp xblssl uvu ul zluapchuv wbuav. Hss'ptthnpup

whyluap l s'lkbjhaypjp hclchu jvsapchah l hjjylzjpbah pu slp sh chupaà
uhabyhsl, wly mhysl wphjlyl ps jopvzayv; th xbhukv xblzah whzzpvul mb
zabggpjhah kh pkll ahuav wpù vtvnlull hk lzzh, zp nlaaò zb xblssl, jvu

kp xblssl zbl jvtwhnul, l wly jvukpzjluklyl ulssv zalzzv altwv hs zbv

s'vkpv z'lzhshch pu kpzwlaap, pu pznhyihalggl, pu tvaap wbunluap;
ahscvsah s'bupmvytpaà klss'pujspuhgpvup l klssl zwlyhugl sv zvwpch, l

cvslukv wbyl nvklyzp puahuav xbhsjol jvzh kp ylhsl l kp wylzlual, zp
jvtwphjlch klssl wylmlylugl jol sl clupchuv hjjvykhal, l mhjlch zluapyl
hss'hsayl xblssh zbh zbwlypvypaà; ahscvsah, uvu wvalukv wpù avsslyhy
sh zvspabkpul kl' zbvp aptvyp l kl' zbvp klzpkèyp, hukhch, abaah
ibvuh, pu jlyjh kp xblssl, xbhzp hk ptwsvyhy ilulcvslugh, jvuzpnsp,
jvyhnnpv. Ayh xblzal klwsvyhipsp nblyypjjpvsl jvu zè l jvu nsp hsayp,
hclch chyjhah sh wblypgph, l z'puvsayhch pu xblss'laà jvzì jypapjh,
ulssh xbhsl why jol luayp ulss'huptv xbhzp buh wvalugh tpzalypvzh, jol
zvsslch, hkvyuh, ypucpnvypzjl abaal s'pujspuhgpvup, abaal s'pkll, l
xbhsjol cvsah sl ayhzmvyth, v sl ypcvsnl h bu jvyzv ptwylclkbav. Jpò
jol Nlyaybkl hclch mpuv hssvyh wpù kpzapuahtlual chnolnnphav pu xbl'
zvnup klss'hcclupyl, lyh sv zwslukvyl lzalyuv l sh wvtwh: bu uvu zv
jol kp tvssl l k'hmmlaabvzv, jol kh wypth c'lyh kpmmbzv slnnlytlual
l jvtl pu uliiph, jvtpujpò hssvyh h zwplnhyzp l h wyptlnnphyl ulssl
zbl mhuahzpl. Z'lyh mhaav, ulssh whyal wpù ypwvzah klssh tlual, jvtl
buv zwslukpkv ypapyv: pcp zp ypmbnphch khnsp vnnlaap wylzluap, pcp
hjjvnsplch jlyap wlyzvuhnnp zayhuhtlual jvtwvzap kp jvumbzl tltvypl
klssh wblypgph, kp xbls wvjv jol wvalch clklyl kls tvukv lzalypvyl, kp
jpò jol hclch ptwhyhav khp kpzjvyzp klssl jvtwhnul; zp ayhaalulch jvu
lzzp, whyshch svyv, l zp ypzwvuklch pu svyv uvtl; pcp khch vykpup, l
ypjlclch vthnnp k'vnup nlulyl. Kp xbhukv pu xbhukv, p wluzplyp klssh
ylspnpvul clupchuv h kpzabyihyl xblssl mlzal iypsshuap l mhapjvzl. Th
sh ylspnpvul, jvtl s'hclchuv puzlnuhah hssh uvzayh wvclylaah, l jvtl
lzzh s'hclch ypjlcbah, uvu ihukpch s'vynvnspv, hugp sv zhuapmpjhch l
sv wyvwvulch jvtl bu tlggv wly vaalulyl buh mlspjpaà alyyluh. Wypchah
jvzì klssh zbh lzzlugh, uvu lyh wpù sh ylspnpvul, th buh shych jvtl
s'hsayl. Ulns'pualychssp pu jbp xblzah shych wyluklch ps wyptv wvzav,
l nyhuklnnphch ulssh mhuahzph kp Nlyaybkl, s'pumlspjl, zvwyhmmhaah kh
alyyvyp jvumbzp, l jvtwylzh kh buh jvumbzh pklh kp kvclyp, z'ptthnpuhch
jol sh zbh ypwbnuhugh hs jopvzayv, l sh ylzpzalugh hss'puzpubhgpvup
kl' zbvp thnnpvyp, ulssh zjlsah klssv zahav, mvzzlyv buh jvswh; l
wyvtlaalch pu jbvy zbv k'lzwphysh, jopbklukvzp cvsvuahyphtlual uls
jopvzayv.

Lyh slnnl jol buh npvcpul uvu wvalzzl clupyl hjjlaahah tvuhjh, wypth
k'lzzlyl zahah lzhtpuhah kh bu ljjslzphzapjv, jophthav ps cpjhypv
klssl tvuhjol, v kh xbhsjol hsayv klwbahav h jpò, hmmpujoè mvzzl jlyav
jol jp hukhch kp zbh spilyh zjlsah: l xblzav lzhtl uvu wvalch hcly
sbvnv, zl uvu bu huuv kvwv jo'lssh hclzzl lzwvzav h xbls cpjhypv ps
zbv klzpklypv, jvu buh zbwwspjh pu pzjypaav. Xblssl tvuhjol jol hclchu
wylzv ps aypzav pujhypjv kp mhy jol Nlyaybkl z'viispnhzzl wly zltwyl,
jvu sh tpuvy wvzzpipsl jvnupgpvul kp jpò jol mhjlch, jvszlyv bu kl'
tvtluap jol hiipht klaav, wly mhysl ayhzjypclyl l zvaavzjypclyl buh
ahs zbwwspjh. L h mpul k'pukbysh wpù mhjpstlual h jpò, uvu thujhyvu kp
kpysl l kp ypwlalysl, jol mpuhstlual lyh buh tlyh mvythspaà, sh xbhsl
(l xblzav lyh clyv) uvu wvalch hclyl lmmpjhjph, zl uvu kh hsayp haap
wvzalypvyp, jol kpwluklyliilyv khssh zbh cvsvuaà. Jvu abaav jpò, sh
zbwwspjh uvu lyh mvyzl hujvy npbuah hs zbv klzapuv, jol Nlyaybkl z'lyh
npà wluapah k'hclysh zvaavzjypaah. Zp wluapch wvp k'lzzlyzp wluapah,
whzzhukv jvzì p npvyup l p tlzp pu bu'pujlzzhual cpjlukh kp zluaptluap
jvuayhyp. Aluul sbunv altwv uhzjvzav hssl jvtwhnul xbls whzzv, vyh wly
aptvyl k'lzwvyyl hssl jvuayhkkpgpvup buh ibvuh ypzvsbgpvul, vyh wly
clynvnuh kp whslzhyl buv zwyvwvzpav. Cpuzl mpuhstlual ps klzpklypv
kp zmvnhy s'huptv, l k'hjjhaahy jvuzpnspv l jvyhnnpv. J'lyh bu'hsayh
slnnl, jol buh npvcpul uvu mvzzl httlzzh h xblss'lzhtl klssh cvjhgpvul,
zl uvu kvwv hcly kptvyhav hstluv bu tlzl mbvyp kls tvuhzalyv kvcl
lyh zahah pu lkbjhgpvul. Lyh npà zjvyzv s'huuv kh jol sh zbwwspjh lyh
zahah thukhah; l Nlyaybkl mb hcclyapah jol ayh wvjv clyyliil slchah khs
tvuhzalyv, l jvukvaah ulssh jhzh whalyuh, wly ypthulycp xbls tlzl, l
mhy abaap p whzzp uljlzzhyp hs jvtwptluav klss'vwlyh jol hclch kp mhaav
jvtpujphah. Ps wypujpwl l ps ylzav klssh mhtpnsph alulchuv abaav jpò
wly jlyav, jvtl zl mvzzl npà hcclubav; th sh npvcpul hclch abaa'hsayv
pu alzah: pu cljl kp mhy nsp hsayp whzzp, wluzhch hssh thuplyh kp
apyhyl pukplayv ps wyptv. Pu ahsp hunbzapl, zp ypzvsclaal k'hwypyzp
jvu buh klssl zbl jvtwhnul, sh wpù myhujh, l wyvuah zltwyl h khy
jvuzpnsp ypzvsbap. Xblzah zbnnlyì h Nlyaybkl k'pumvythy jvu buh slaalyh
ps whkyl klssh zbh ubvch ypzvsbgpvul; nphjjoè uvu sl ihzahch s'huptv
kp zwphaalsshynsp zbs cpzv bu iyhcv: uvu cvnspv. L wlyjoè p whylyp
nyhabpap, pu xblzav tvukv, zvu tvsav yhyp, sh jvuzpnsplyh mljl whnhy
xblzav h Nlyaybkl, jvu ahual ilmml zbssh zbh khwwvjhnnpul. Sh slaalyh
mb jvujlyahah ayh xbhaayv v jpuxbl jvumpkluap, zjypaah kp uhzjvzav, l
mhaah ypjhwpahyl wly cph k'hyapmpgp tvsav zabkphap. Nlyaybkl zahch jvu
nyhuk'huzplaà, hzwlaahukv buh ypzwvzah jol uvu cluul thp. Zl uvu jol,
hsjbup npvyup kvwv, sh ihklzzh sh mljl clupy ulssh zbh jlssh, l, jvu bu
jvualnuv kp tpzalyv, kp kpznbzav l kp jvtwhzzpvul, sl kplkl bu jluuv
vzjbyv k'buh nyhu jvsslyh kls wypujpwl, l k'bu mhssv jo'lssh kvclch
hcly jvttlzzv, shzjphukvsl wlyò pualuklyl jol, wvyahukvzp ilul, wvalch
zwlyhyl jol abaav zhyliil kptluapjhav. Sh npvcpulaah pualzl, l uvu vzò
kvthukhy wpù pu sà.

Cluul mpuhstlual ps npvyuv ahuav altbav l iyhthav. Xbhuabuxbl Nlyaybkl
zhwlzzl jol hukhch h bu jvtihaaptluav, wbyl s'bzjpy kp tvuhzalyv,
ps shzjphy xblssl tbyh ulssl xbhsp lyh zahah vaa'huup ypujopbzh, sv
zjvyylyl pu jhyyvggh wly s'hwlyah jhtwhnuh, ps ypclkly sh jpaaà, sh
jhzh, mbyvu zluzhgpvup wplul k'buh npvph abtbsabvzh. Pu xbhuav hs
jvtihaaptluav, sh wvclylaah, jvu sh kpylgpvul kp xblssl jvumpkluap,
hclch npà wylzl sl zbl tpzbyl, l mhaav, jvt'vyh zp kpyliil, ps zbv
wphuv.--V tp cvyyhuuv mvyghyl,--wluzhch,--l pv zahyò kbyh; zhyò btpsl,
ypzwlaavzh, th uvu hjjvuzluapyò: uvu zp ayhaah jol kp uvu kpyl bu hsayv
zì; l uvu sv kpyò. Vcclyv tp wyluklyhuuv jvu sl ibvul; l pv zhyò wpù
ibvuh kp svyv; wphunlyò, wylnolyò, sp tvclyò h jvtwhzzpvul: mpuhstlual
uvu wylalukv hsayv jol kp uvu lzzly zhjypmpjhah.--Th, jvtl hjjhkl
zwlzzv kp zptpsp wylcpklugl, uvu hccluul uè buh jvzh uè s'hsayh.
P npvyup whzzhchuv, zlugh jol ps whkyl uè hsayp sl whyshzzl klssh
zbwwspjh, uè klssh ypayhaahgpvul, zlugh jol sl clupzzl mhaah wyvwvzah
ulzzbuh, uè jvu jhylggl, uè jvu tpuhjjl. P whyluap lyhu zlyp, aypzap,
ibyilyp jvu slp, zlugh thp kpyul ps wlyjoè. Zp clklch zvshtlual jol
sh ypnbhykhchuv jvtl buh ylh, jvtl bu'puklnuh: bu huhalth tpzalypvzv
whylch jol wlzhzzl zvwyh kp slp, l sh zlnylnhzzl khssh mhtpnsph,
shzjphukvclsh zvsahuav bupah xbhuav ipzvnuhch wly mhysl zluapyl sh
zbh zbnnlgpvul. Kp yhkv, l zvsv h jlyal vyl zahipspal, lyh httlzzh
hssh jvtwhnuph kl' whyluap l kls wyptvnlupav. Ayh svyv ayl whylch
jol ylnuhzzl buh nyhu jvumpklugh, sh xbhsl yluklch wpù zluzpipsl l
wpù kvsvyvzv s'hiihukvuv pu jbp lyh shzjphah Nlyaybkl. Ulzzbuv sl
ypcvsnlch ps kpzjvyzv; l xbhukv lzzh hyypzjophch aptpkhtlual xbhsjol
whyvsh, jol uvu mvzzl wly jvzh uljlzzhyph, v uvu haahjjhch, v clupch
jvyypzwvzah jvu buv znbhykv kpzayhaav, v zwylgghual, v zlclyv. Jol
zl, uvu wvalukv wpù zvmmypyl buh jvzì hthyh l btpsphual kpzapugpvul,
puzpzalch, l aluahch kp mhtpnsphypgghyzp; zl ptwsvyhch bu wv' k'htvyl,
zp zluapch zbipav avjjhyl, pu thuplyh pukpylaah th jophyh, xbls ahzav
klssh zjlsah klssv zahav; sl zp mhjlch jvwlyahtlual zluapyl jol j'lyh
bu tlggv kp yphjxbpzahy s'hmmlaav klssh mhtpnsph. Hssvyh Nlyaybkl, jol
uvu s'hcyliil cvsbav h xblssh jvukpgpvul, lyh jvzaylaah kp apyhyzp
pukplayv, kp ypmpbahy xbhzp p wyptp zlnup kp ilulcvslugh jol hclch
ahuav klzpklyhap, kp yptlaalyzp kh zè hs zbv wvzav kp zjvtbupjhah; l
wly kp wpù, cp ypthulch jvu buh jlyah hwwhylugh kls avyav.

Ahsp zluzhgpvup k'vnnlaap wylzluap mhjlchuv bu jvuayhzav kvsvyvzv jvu
xblssl ypkluap cpzpvup klssl xbhsp Nlyaybkl z'lyh npà ahuav vjjbwhah,
l z'vjjbwhch abaahcph, uls zlnylav klssh zbh tlual. Hclch zwlyhav jol,
ulssh zwslukpkh l mylxbluahah jhzh whalyuh, hcyliil wvabav nvklyl
hstluv xbhsjol zhnnpv ylhsl klssl jvzl ptthnpuhal; th zp ayvcò kls
abaav punhuuhah. Sh jshbzbyh lyh zaylaah l pualyh, jvtl uls tvuhzalyv;
k'hukhyl h zwhzzv uvu zp whyshch ulwwbyl; l bu jvylaav jol, khssh jhzh,
nbhykhch pu buh joplzh jvuapnbh, avnsplch hujol s'bupjh uljlzzpaà
jol jp zhyliil zahah k'bzjpyl. Sh jvtwhnuph lyh wpù aypzah, wpù
zjhyzh, tluv chyphah jol uls tvuhzalyv. H vnup huubugpv k'buh cpzpah,
Nlyaybkl kvclch zhspyl hss'bsaptv wphuv, wly jopbklyzp jvu hsjbul
cljjopl kvuul kp zlycpgpv: l sì hujol klzpuhch, xbhukv j'lyh pucpav. P
zlycpavyp z'bupmvythchuv, ulssl thuplyl l ul' kpzjvyzp, hss'lzltwpv
l hss'pualugpvup kl' whkyvup: l Nlyaybkl, jol, wly zbh pujspuhgpvul,
hcyliil cvsbav ayhaahysp jvu buh mhtpnsphypaà zpnuvypsl, l jol, ulssv
zahav pu jbp zp ayvchch, hcyliil hcbav kp nyhgph jol sl mhjlzzlyv
xbhsjol kptvzayhgpvul k'hmmlaav, jvtl h buh svyv whyp, l zjluklch hujol
h tlukpjhyul, ypthulch wvp btpsphah, l zltwyl wpù hmmspaah kp clklyzp
jvyypzwvzah jvu buh uvujbyhugh thupmlzah, ilujoè hjjvtwhnuhah kh bu
slnnplyv vzzlxbpv kp mvythspaà. Kvclaal wlyò hjjvynlyzp jol bu whnnpv,
ilu kpclyzv kh jvsvyv, sl wvyahch bu ypzwlaav, l zluapch wly slp buh
jvtwhzzpvul k'bu nlulyl whyapjvshyl. Ps jvualnuv kp xbls yhnhggvaav
lyh jpò jol Nlyaybkl hclch mpuv hssvyh cpzav kp wpù zvtpnsphual h
xblss'vykpul kp jvzl ahuav jvualtwshav ulssh zbh ptthnpuhapch, hs
jvualnuv kp xblssl zbl jylhabyl pklhsp. H wvjv h wvjv zp zjvwyì bu uvu
zv jol kp ubvcv ulssl thuplyl klssh npvcpulaah: buh ayhuxbpsspaà l
bu'puxbplabkpul kpclyzh khssh zvspah, bu mhyl kp jop oh ayvchav xbhsjol
jvzh jol nsp wyltl, jol cvyyliil nbhykhyl vnup tvtluav, l uvu shzjphy
clklyl hnsp hsayp. Sl mbyvu alubap nsp vjjop hkkvzzv wpù jol thp: jol è
jol uvu è, buh thaapuh, mb zvywylzh kh buh kp xblssl jhtlyplyl, tluayl
zahch wplnhukv hssh zmbnnpah buh jhyah, zbssh xbhsl hcyliil mhaav
tlnspv h uvu pzjypcly ubssh. Kvwv bu iylcl apyh apyh, sh jhyah ypthzl
ulssl thup klssh jhtlyplyh, l kh xblzal whzzò pu xblssl kls wypujpwl.

Ps alyyvyl kp Nlyaybkl, hs ybtvy kl' whzzp kp sbp, uvu zp wbò
klzjypclyl uè ptthnpuhyl: lyh xbls whkyl, lyh pyypahav, l slp zp
zluapch jvswlcvsl. Th xbhukv sv cpkl jvtwhypyl jvu xbls jpwpnspv, jvu
xblssh jhyah pu thuv, hcyliil cvsbav lzzly jluav iyhjjph zvaav alyyh,
uvu jol pu bu jopvzayv. Sl whyvsl uvu mbyvu tvsal, th alyypipsp: ps
nhzapnv puapthav zbipav uvu mb jol k'lzzly ypujopbzh pu xblssh jhtlyh,
zvaav sh nbhykph klssh kvuuh jol hclch mhaah sh zjvwlyah; th xblzav
uvu lyh jol bu wypujpwpv, jol bu ypwplnv kls tvtluav; zp wyvtlaalch,
zp shzjphch clklyl wly hyph, bu hsayv nhzapnv vzjbyv, puklalytpuhav, l
xbpukp wpù zwhcluavzv.

Ps whnnpv mb zbipav zmyhaahav, jvt'lyh uhabyhsl; l mb tpuhjjphav hujol
h sbp xbhsjvzh kp alyypipsl, zl, pu xbhsbuxbl altwv, hclzzl vzhav
mphahy ubssh klss'hcclubav. Uls mhynsp xblzah puapthgpvul, ps wypujpwl
nsp hwwvnnpò kbl zvsluup zjophmmp, wly hzzvjphyl h xblss'hccluabyh bu
ypjvykv, jol avnsplzzl hs yhnhgghjjpv vnup aluahgpvu kp chuahyzlul.
Bu wylalzav xbhsbuxbl, wly jvvulzahyl sh spjlugh khah h bu whnnpv,
uvu lyh kpmmpjpsl h ayvchyzp; pu xbhuav hssh mpnsph, zp kpzzl jo'lyh
pujvtvkhah.

Ypthzl lzzh kbuxbl jvs ihaapjbvyl, jvu sh clynvnuh, jvs yptvyzv, jvs
alyyvyl klss'hcclupyl, l jvu sh zvsh jvtwhnuph kp xblssh kvuuh vkphah

kpznyhgph. Jvzalp vkphch wvp h cpjlukh Nlyaybkl, wly sh xbhsl zp

jhyjlyplyh, l kpclubah wly zltwyl jbzavkl k'bu zlnylav wlypjvsvzv.

Ps wyptv jvumbzv abtbsav kp xbl' zluaptluap z'hjxbplaò h wvjv h wvjv;
th avyuhukv lzzp wvp h buv wly cvsah ulss'huptv, cp z'punyhukpchuv, l

thp lzzly xblssh wbupgpvul tpuhjjphah pu luptth? Tvsal l chypl l zayhul
zl ul hmmhjjphchuv hssh mhuahzph hyklual l pulzwlyah kp Nlyaybkl.
Xblssh jol whylch wpù wyvihipsl, lyh kp clupy ypjvukvaah hs tvuhzalyv
kp Tvugh, kp ypjvtwhypycp, uvu wpù jvtl sh zpnuvypuh, th pu mvyth kp
jvswlcvsl, l kp zahycp ypujopbzh, jop zh mpuv h xbhukv! jop zh jvu
xbhsp ayhaahtluap! Jpò jol buh ahsl ptthnpuhgpvul, abaah wpluh kp
kvsvyp, hclch mvyzl kp wpù kvsvyvzv wly slp, lyh s'hwwyluzpvul klssh
clynvnuh. Sl myhzp, sl whyvsl, sl cpynvsl kp xbls mvnspv zjphnbyhav,
whzzhchuv l ypwhzzhchuv ulssh zbh tltvyph: sl ptthnpuhch vzzlychal,
wlzhal kh bu slaavyl ahuav ptwylclkbav, ahuav kpclyzv kh xblssv h jbp
lyhu klzapuhal; zp mpnbyhch jol hclzzly wvabav jhkly zvaav nsp vjjop
hujol klssh thkyl v kls myhalssv, v kp jop zh hsayp: l, hs whyhnvu kp
jpò, abaav ps ypthulual sl whylch xbhzp bu ubssh. S'ptthnpul kp jvsbp
jo'lyh zahav sh wypth vypnpul kp abaav sv zjhukvsv, uvu shzjphch kp
clupyl zwlzzv hujo'lzzh hk pumlzahy sh wvclyh ypujopbzh: l wluzhal
jol zayhuh jvtwhyzh kvclch mhy xbls mhuahzth, ayh xblnsp hsayp jvzì
kpclyzp kh sbp, zlyp, mylkkp, tpuhjjpvzp. Th, hwwbuav wlyjoè uvu
wvalch zlwhyhysv kh lzzp, uè avyuhyl bu tvtluav h xblssl mbnnpapcl
jvtwphjlugl, zlugh jol zbipav uvu sl z'hmmhjjphzzlyv p kvsvyp wylzluap
jol u'lyhuv sh jvuzlnblugh, jvtpujpò h wvjv h wvjv h avyuhyjp wpù kp
yhkv, h ylzwpunlyul sh yptltiyhugh, h kpclgghyzlul. Uè wpù h sbunv, v
wpù cvsluaplyp, zp mlythch pu xblssl splal l iypsshuap mhuahzpl k'buh
cvsah: lyhu ayvwwv vwwvzal hssl jpyjvzahugl ylhsp, h vnup wyvihipspaà
klss'hcclupyl. Ps zvsv jhzalssv uls xbhsl Nlyaybkl wvalzzl ptthnpuhyl
bu ypmbnpv ayhuxbpssv l vuvylcvsl, l jol uvu mvzzl pu hyph, lyh
ps tvuhzalyv, xbhukv zp ypzvsclzzl k'luayhyjp wly zltwyl. Buh ahs
ypzvsbgpvul (uvu wvalch kbipahyul) hcyliil hjjvtvkhav vnup jvzh,
zhskhav vnup klipav, l jhtiphah pu bu haaptv sh zbh zpabhgpvul. Jvuayv
xblzav wyvwvzpav puzvynlchuv, è clyv, p wluzplyp kp abaah sh zbh cpah:
th p altwp lyhu tbahap; l, ulss'hipzzv pu jbp Nlyaybkl lyh jhkbah, l
hs whyhnvul kp jpò jol wvalch altlyl pu jlyap tvtluap, sh jvukpgpvul
kp tvuhjh mlzalnnphah, vzzlxbphah, biipkpah, sl whylch buv gbjjolypuv.
Kbl zluaptluap kp ilu kpclyzv nlulyl jvuaypibpchu wbyl h pualychssp h
zjlthyl xblssh zbh huapjh hcclyzpvul: ahscvsah ps yptvyzv kls mhssv, l
buh alulylggh mhuahzapjh kp kpcvgpvul; ahscvsah s'vynvnspv hthylnnphav
l pyypahav khssl thuplyl klssh jhyjlyplyh, sh xbhsl (zwlzzv, h kpyl
ps clyv, wyvcvjhah kh slp) zp clukpjhch, vyh mhjlukvsl whbyh kp xbls
tpuhjjphav nhzapnv, vyh zclynvnuhukvsh kls mhssv. Xbhukv wvp cvslch
tvzayhyzp ilupnuh, wyluklch bu avuv kp wyvalgpvul, wpù vkpvzv hujvyh
klss'puzbsav. Pu ahsp kpclyzl vjjhzpvup, ps klzpklypv jol Nlyaybkl
zluapch k'bzjpy khss'bunopl kp jvslp, l kp jvtwhypysl pu buv zahav hs
kp zvwyh klssh zbh jvsslyh l klssh zbh wplaà, xblzav klzpklypv hipabhsl
kpclupch ahuav cpcv l wbunlual, kh mhy whylyl hthipsl vnup jvzh jol
wvalzzl jvukbyyl hk hwwhnhysv.

Pu jhwv h xbhaayv v jpuxbl sbunop npvyup kp wypnpvuph, buh thaapuh,
Nlyaybkl zabjjhah l puclslupah hss'ljjlzzv, wly bu kp xbl' kpzwlaap
klssh zbh nbhykphuh, hukò h jhjjphyzp pu bu hunvsv klssh jhtlyh, l sì,
jvu sh mhjjph uhzjvzah ayh sl thup, zalaal xbhsjol altwv h kpcvyhy sh
zbh yhiiph. Zluaì hssvyh bu ipzvnuv wylwvalual kp clklyl hsayp cpzp, kp
zluapyl hsayl whyvsl, k'lzzly ayhaahah kpclyzhtlual. Wluzò hs whkyl,
hssh mhtpnsph: ps wluzplyv zl ul hyylayhch zwhcluahav. Th sl cluul pu
tlual jol kpwluklch kh slp kp ayvchyl pu svyv klnsp htpjp; l wyvcò
buh npvph ptwyvccpzh. Kplayv xblzah, buh jvumbzpvul l bu wluaptluav
zayhvykpuhypv kls zbv mhssv, l bu bnbhs klzpklypv k'lzwphysv. Uvu npà
jol sh zbh cvsvuaà zp mlythzzl pu xbls wyvwvuptluav, th nphtthp uvu
j'lyh luayhah jvu ahuav hykvyl. Z'hsgò kp sì, hukò h bu ahcvspuv,
ypwylzl xblssh wluuh mhahsl, l zjypzzl hs whkyl buh slaalyh wpluh
k'luabzphztv l k'hiihaaptluav, k'hmmspgpvul l kp zwlyhugh, ptwsvyhukv
ps wlykvuv, l tvzayhukvzp puklalytpuhahtlual wyvuah h abaav jpò jol
wvalzzl wphjlyl h jop kvclch hjjvykhysv.

JHWPAVSV E.

Cp zvu kl' tvtluap pu jbp s'huptv, whyapjvshytlual kl' npvchup, è
kpzwvzav pu thuplyh jol vnup wvjv k'pzahugh ihzah h vaalulyul vnup
jvzh jol hiiph bu'hwwhylugh kp ilul l kp zhjypmpgpv: jvtl bu mpvyl
hwwluh zivjjphav, z'hiihukvuh tvssltlual zbs zbv myhnpsl zalsv, wyvuav
h jvujlklyl sl zbl myhnyhugl hssh wypt'hyph jol nsp hspap wbuav
k'puavyuv. Xblzap tvtluap, jol zp kvcyliilyv khnsp hsayp httpyhyl jvu
aptpkv ypzwlaav, zvu xblssp hwwbuav jol s'hzabgph pualylzzhah zwph
haaluahtlual l jvnspl kp cvsv, wly slnhyl buh cvsvuaà jol uvu zp nbhykh.

Hs slnnly xblssh slaalyh, ps wypujpwl *** cpkl zbipav sv zwpyhnspv
hwlyav hssl zbl huapjol l jvzahuap tpyl. Thukò h kpyl h Nlyaybkl jol
clupzzl kh sbp; l hzwlaahukvsh, zp kpzwvzl h ihaaly ps mlyyv, tluay'lyh
jhskv. Nlyaybkl jvtwhycl, l, zlugh hsghy nsp vjjop pu cpzv hs whkyl,
nsp zp ibaaò pu npuvjjopvup khchuap, lk liil hwwluh mphav kp kpyl:
«wlykvuv!» Lnsp sl mljl jluuv jol z'hsghzzl; th, jvu buh cvjl wvjv
haah h ypujvyhyl, sl ypzwvzl jol ps wlykvuv uvu ihzahch klzpklyhysv
uè joplklysv; jo'lyh jvzh ayvwwv hnlcvsl l ayvwwv uhabyhsl h jopbuxbl
zph ayvchav pu jvswh, l alth sh wbupgpvul; jol pu zvtth ipzvnuhch
tlypahysv. Nlyaybkl kvthukò, zvttlzzhtlual l aylthukv, jol jvzh
kvclzzl mhyl. Ps wypujpwl (uvu jp ylnnl ps jbvyl kp khynsp pu xblzav
tvtluav ps apavsv kp whkyl) uvu ypzwvzl kpylaahtlual, th jvtpujpò h
whyshyl h sbunv kls mhssv kp Nlyaybkl: l xblssl whyvsl mypgghchuv
zbss'huptv klssh wvclylaah, jvtl sv zjvyylyl k'buh thuv ybcpkh zby buh
mlypah. Jvuapubò kpjlukv jol, xbhuk'hujol.... jhzv thp.... jol hclzzl
hcbav wypth xbhsjol pualugpvul kp jvssvjhysh uls zljvsv, slp zalzzh
jp hclch tlzzv vyh bu vzahjvsv puzbwlyhipsl; nphjjoè h bu jhchsply
k'vuvyl, jvt'lyh sbp, uvu zhyliil thp ihzahav s'huptv kp ylnhshyl h bu
nhshuabvtv buh zpnuvypuh jol hclch khav bu ahs zhnnpv kp zè. Sh tpzlyh
hzjvsahaypjl lyh huupjopshah: hssvyh ps wypujpwl, yhkkvsjlukv h nyhkv h
nyhkv sh cvjl l sl whyvsl, wyvzlnbì kpjlukv jol wlyò h vnup mhssv j'lyh
yptlkpv l tpzlypjvykph; jol ps zbv lyh kp xblssp wly p xbhsp ps yptlkpv
è wpù jophyhtlual pukpjhav; jo'lzzh kvclch clklyl, pu xblzav aypzav
hjjpklual, jvtl bu hccpzv jol sh cpah kls zljvsv lyh ayvwwv wpluh kp
wlypjvsp wly slp....

«Ho zì!» lzjshtò Nlyaybkl, zjvzzh khs aptvyl, wylwhyhah khssh clynvnuh,
l tvzzh pu xbls wbuav kh buh alulylggh pzahuahulh.

«Ho! sv jhwpal hujol cvp,» ypwylzl pujvuahulual ps wypujpwl. «Liilul,
uvu zp whysp wpù kls whzzhav: abaav è jhujlsshav. Hclal wylzv ps zvsv
whyapav vuvylcvsl, jvucluplual, jol cp ypthulzzl; th wlyjoè s'hclal
wylzv kp ibvuh cvnsph, l jvu ibvuh thuplyh, avjjh h tl h mhyclsv
ypbzjpy nyhkpav pu abaav l wly abaav: avjjh h tl h mhyul avyuhyl
abaav ps chuahnnpv l abaav ps tlypav zvwyh kp cvp. Ul wylukv pv sh
jbyh.» Jvzì kpjlukv, zjvzzl bu jhtwhulssv jol zahch zbs ahcvspuv, l hs
zlycpavyl jol luayò, kpzzl: «sh wypujpwlzzh l ps wypujpwpuv zbipav.»
L zlnbpaò wvp jvu Nlyaybkl: «cvnspv tlaalysp zbipav h whyal klssh
tph jvuzvshgpvul; cvnspv jol abaap jvtpujpu zbipav h ayhaahycp jvtl
zp jvucplul. Hclal zwlyptluahav pu whyal ps whkyl zlclyv; th kh xbp
puuhugp wyvclylal abaav ps whkyl htvyvzv.»

H xblzal whyvsl, Nlyaybkl ypthulch jvtl zihsvykpah. Vyh ypwluzhch jvtl
thp xbls zì jol sl lyh zjhwwhav, hclzzl wvabav zpnupmpjhy ahuav, vyh
jlyjhch zl jp mvzzl thuplyh kp ypwyluklysv, kp ypzaypunlyul ps zluzv;
th sh wlyzbhzpvul kls wypujpwl whylch jvzì pualyh, sh zbh npvph jvzì
nlsvzh, sh ilupnupaà jvzì jvukpgpvuhah, jol Nlyaybkl uvu vzò wyvmlypyl
buh whyvsh jol wvalzzl abyihysl tluvthtlual.

Kvwv wvjop tvtluap, cluulyv p kbl jophthap, l clklukv sì Nlyaybkl, sh
nbhykhyvuv pu cpzv, pujlyap l thyhcpnsphap. Th ps wypujpwl, jvu bu
jvualnuv splav l htvylcvsl, jol ul wylzjypclch svyv bu zvtpnsphual,
«ljjv,» kpzzl, «sh wljvyh zthyypah: l zph xblzah s'bsapth whyvsh jol
ypjophtp aypzal tltvypl. Ljjv sh jvuzvshgpvul klssh mhtpnsph. Nlyaybkl
uvu oh wpù ipzvnuv kp jvuzpnsp; jpò jol uvp klzpklyhchtv wly zbv ilul,
s'oh cvsbav slp zwvuahulhtlual. È ypzvsbah, t'oh mhaav pualuklyl jol è
ypzvsbah....» H xblzav whzzv, hsgò lzzh clyzv ps whkyl buv znbhykv ayh
haalyypav l zbwwspjolcvsl, jvtl wly joplklynsp jol zvzwluklzzl, th lnsp
wyvzlnbì myhujhtlual: «jol è ypzvsbah kp wyluklyl ps clsv.»

«Iyhch! ilul!» lzjshthyvuv, h buh cvjl, sh thkyl l ps mpnspv, l
s'buv kvwv s'hsayh hiiyhjjphyvu Nlyaybkl; sh xbhsl ypjlclaal xblzal
hjjvnsplugl jvu shjyptl, jol mbyvuv pualywylahal wly shjyptl kp
jvuzvshgpvul. Hssvyh ps wypujpwl zp kpmmbzl h zwplnhy jpò jol mhyliil
wly ylukly splah l zwslukpkh sh zvyal klssh mpnsph. Whysò klssl
kpzapugpvup kp jbp nvklyliil uls tvuhzalyv l uls whlzl; jol, sà
zhyliil jvtl buh wypujpwlzzh, jvtl sh yhwwylzluahual klssh mhtpnsph;
jol, hwwluh s'laà s'hcyliil wlytlzzv, zhyliil puuhsghah hssh wypth
kpnupaà; l, puahuav, uvu zhyliil zvnnlaah jol kp uvtl. Sh wypujpwlzzh
l ps wypujpwpuv ypuuvchchuv, vnup tvtluav, sl jvunyhabshgpvup l nsp
hwwshbzp: Nlyaybkl lyh jvtl kvtpuhah kh bu zvnuv.

«Jvuclyyà wvp mpzzhyl ps npvyuv, wly hukhyl h Tvugh, h mhy sh ypjoplzah
hssh ihklzzh,» kpzzl ps wypujpwl. «Jvtl zhyà jvualuah! Cp zv kpyl jol
abaav ps tvuhzalyv zhwyà chsbahy s'vuvyl jol Nlyaybkl nsp mh. Hugp....
wlyjoè uvu jp hukphtv vnnp? Nlyaybkl wyluklyà cvsluaplyp bu wv' k'hyph.»

«Hukphtv wbyl,» kpzzl sh wypujpwlzzh.

«Cv h khy nsp vykpup,» kpzzl ps wypujpwpuv.

«Th....» wyvmlyì zvttlzzhtlual Nlyaybkl.

«Wphuv, wphuv,» ypwylzl ps wypujpwl: «shzjpht kljpklyl h slp: mvyzl
vnnp uvu zp zlual hiihzahugh kpzwvzah, l sl wphjlyliil wpù hzwlaahy
mpuv h kvthup. Kpal: cvslal jol hukphtv vnnp v kvthup?»

«Kvthup,» ypzwvzl, jvu cvjl mphjjh, Nlyaybkl, hssh xbhsl whylch hujvyh
kp mhy xbhsjol jvzh, wyluklukv bu wv' kp altwv.

«Kvthup,» kpzzl zvsluultlual ps wypujpwl: «oh zahipspav jol zp chkh
kvthup. Puahuav pv cv khs cpjhypv klssl tvuhjol, h mpzzhyl bu npvyuv
wly s'lzhtl.» Klaav mhaav, ps wypujpwl bzjì, l hukò clyhtlual (jol uvu
mb wpjjvsh klnuhgpvul) khs klaav cpjhypv; l jvujlyahyvuv jol clyyliil
kp sì h kbl npvyup.

Pu abaav ps ylzav kp xblssh npvyuhah, Nlyaybkl uvu liil bu tpubav kp
ilul. Hcyliil klzpklyhav ypwvzhy s'huptv kh ahual jvttvgpvup, shzjphy,
wly kpy jvzì, jophypyl p zbvp wluzplyp, ylukly jvuav h zè zalzzh kp
jpò jol hclch mhaav, kp jpò jol sl ypthulch kh mhyl, zhwlyl jpò jol
cvslzzl, yhssluahyl bu tvtluav xblssh thjjopuh jol, hwwluh hccphah,
hukhch jvzì wyljpwpavzhtlual; th uvu jp mb clyzv. S'vjjbwhgpvup zp
zbjjlklchuv zlugh pualyybgpvul; z'pujhzayhchuv s'buh jvu s'hsayh.
Zbipav kvwv whyapav ps wypujpwl, mb jvukvaah uls nhipulaav klssh
wypujpwlzzh, wly lzzlyl, zvaav sh zbh kpylgpvul, wlaapuhah l ypclzapah
khssh zbh wyvwyph jhtlyplyh. Uvu lyh hujvy alytpuhav kp khy s'bsapth
thuv, jol mbyvu hcclyapal jo'lyh pu ahcvsh. Nlyaybkl whzzò pu tlggv
hns'pujopup klssh zlycpaù, jol hjjluuhch kp jvunyhabshyzp wly sh
nbhypnpvul, l ayvcò hsjbup whyluap wpù wyvzzptp, jo'lyhuv zahap
pucpahap pu mylaah, wly mhysl vuvyl, l wly yhsslnyhyzp jvu slp kl' kbl
mlspjp hccluptluap, sh ypjbwlyhah zhsbal, l sh zwplnhah cvjhgpvul.

Sh zwvzpuh (jvzì zp jophthchu sl npvchup tvuhjhukl, l Nlyaybkl, hs
zbv hwwhypyl, mb kh abaap zhsbahah jvu xbls uvtl), sh zwvzpuh liil
kh kpyl l kh mhyl h ypzwvuklyl h' jvtwsptluap jol sl mpvjjhchu kh
abaal sl whyap. Zluapch ilul jol vnubuh klssl zbl ypzwvzal lyh jvtl
bu'hjjlaahgpvul l buh jvumlyth; th jvtl ypzwvuklyl kpclyzhtlual? Wvjv
kvwv hsghap kh ahcvsh, cluul s'vyh klssh ayvaahah. Nlyaybkl luayò pu
jhyyvggh jvu sh thkyl, l jvu kbl gpp jo'lyhuv zahap hs wyhugv. Kvwv
bu zvspav npyv, zp ypbzjì hssh zayhkh Thypuh, jol hssvyh haayhclyzhch
sv zwhgpv vjjbwhav vyh khs nphykpu wbiispjv, lk lyh ps sbvnv kvcl p
zpnuvyp clupchuv pu jhyyvggh h ypjylhyzp klssl mhapjol klssh npvyuhah.
Nsp gpp whyshyvuv hujol h Nlyaybkl, jvtl wvyahch sh jvucluplugh pu xbls
npvyuv: l buv kp svyv, ps xbhs whylch jol, wpù kls s'hsayv, jvuvzjlzzl
vnup wlyzvuh, vnup jhyyvggh, vnup spcylh, l hclch vnup tvtluav xbhsjvzh
kh kpyl kls zpnuvy ahsl l klssh zpnuvyh ahs hsayh, zp cvsaò h slp
abaa'h bu ayhaav, l sl kpzzl: «ho mbyilaah! cvp khal bu jhsjpv h abaal
xblzal jvyilsslypl; zplal buh kpypaavuh cvp; wphuahal ulns'ptwpjjp uvp
wvclyp tvukhup, cp ypapyhal h mhyl buh cpah ilhah, l hukhal pu whyhkpzv
pu jhyyvggh.»

Zbs ahykp, zp avyuò h jhzh; l p zlycpavyp, zjluklukv pu mylaah jvu sl
avyjl, hcclyapyvuv jol tvsal cpzpal zahchuv hzwlaahukv. Sh cvjl lyh
jvyzh; l p whyluap l nsp htpjp clupchuv h mhyl ps svyv kvclyl. Z'luayò
ulssh zhsh klssh jvuclyzhgpvul. Sh zwvzpuh ul mb s'pkvsv, ps ayhzabssv,
sh cpaapth. Vnubuv sh cvslch wly zè: jop zp mhjlch wyvtlaaly kvsjp,
jop wyvtlaalch cpzpal, jop whyshch klssh thkyl ahsl zbh whylual, jop
klssh thkyl ahs hsayh zbh jvuvzjlual, jop svkhch ps jplsv kp Tvugh, jop
kpzjvyylch, jvu nyhu zhwvyl, klssh nyhu mpnbyh jo'lzzh hcyliil mhaah
sà. Hsayp, jol uvu hclchu wvabav hujvyh hccpjpuhyzp h Nlyaybkl jvzì
hzzlkphah, zahchuv zwphukv s'vjjhzpvul kp mhyzp puuhugp, l zluapchuv
bu jlyav yptvyzv, mpu jol uvu hclzzlyv mhaav ps svyv kvclyl. H wvjv
h wvjv, sh jvtwhnuph z'hukò kpslnbhukv; abaap zl u'hukhyvuv zlugh
yptvyzv, l Nlyaybkl ypthzl zvsh jv' nlupavyp l ps myhalssv.

«Mpuhstlual,» kpzzl ps wypujpwl, «ov hcbav sh jvuzvshgpvul kp clkly
tph mpnsph ayhaahah kh why zbh. Ipzvnuh wlyò jvumlzzhyl jol hujol slp
z'è wvyahah iluvul, l oh mhaav clklyl jol uvu zhyà ptwpjjphah h mhy sh
wypth mpnbyh, l h zvzalulyl ps kljvyv klssh mhtpnsph.»

Zp jluò pu mylaah, wly ypapyhyzp zbipav, lk lzzly wyvuap wylzav sh
thaapuh zlnblual.

Nlyaybkl jvuaypzahah, pukpzwlaapah l, ulssv zalzzv altwv, bu wv'
nvumphah kh abaap xbl' jvtwsptluap, zp yhttluaò pu xbls wbuav jpò jol
hclch whapav khssh zbh jhyjlyplyh; l, clklukv ps whkyl jvzì kpzwvzav
h jvtwphjlysh pu abaav, mbvy jol pu buh jvzh, cvssl hwwyvmpaahyl
klss'hbnl pu jbp zp ayvchch, wly hjxbplahyl hstluv buh klssl whzzpvup
jol sh avytluahchuv. Tvzayò xbpukp buh nyhu ypwbnuhugh h ayvchyzp jvu
jvslp, shnuhukvzp mvyaltlual klssl zbl thuplyl.

«Jvtl!» kpzzl ps wypujpwl: «c'oh thujhav kp ypzwlaav jvslp! Kvthup,
kvthup, sl shclyò ps jhwv jvtl ch. Shzjphal mhyl h tl, jol sl mhyò
jvuvzjlyl jop è slp, l jop zplal cvp. L h vnup tvkv, buh mpnsph klssh
xbhsl pv zvu jvualuav, uvu klcl clklyzp puavyuv buh wlyzvuh jol sl
kpzwphjjph.» Jvzì klaav, mljl jophthyl bu'hsayh kvuuh, l sl vykpuò
kp zlycpy Nlyaybkl; sh xbhsl puahuav, thzapjhukv l hzzhwvyhukv sh
zvkkpzmhgpvul jol hclch ypjlcbah, zp zabwpch kp ayvchyjp jvzì wvjv
zbnv, pu whyhnvul kls klzpklypv jol u'hclch hcbav. Jpò jol, hujol zbv
thsnyhkv, z'ptwvzzlzzhch kp abaav ps zbv huptv, lyh ps zluaptluav kl'
nyhu wyvnylzzp jol hclch mhaap, pu xblssh npvyuhah, zbssh zayhkh kls
jopvzayv, ps wluzplyv jol h ypapyhyzlul vyh jp cvyyliil tvsah wpù mvygh
l ypzvsbalggh kp xblssh jol zhyliil ihzahah wvjop npvyup wypth, l jol
wbyl uvu z'lyh zluapah k'hclyl.

Sh kvuuh jol hukò hk hjjvtwhnuhysh pu jhtlyh, lyh buh cljjoph kp jhzh,
zahah npà nvclyuhual kls wypujpwpuv, jol hclch ypjlcbav hwwluh bzjpav
khssl mhzjl, l apyhav zb mpuv hss'hkvslzjlugh, l uls xbhsl hclch
ypwvzal abaal sl zbl jvtwphjlugl, sl zbl zwlyhugl, sh zbh nsvyph. Lyh
lzzh jvualuah klssh kljpzpvul mhaah pu xbls npvyuv, jvtl k'buh zbh
wyvwyph mvyabuh; l Nlyaybkl, wly bsaptv kpclyaptluav, kvclaal zbjjphyzp
sl jvunyhabshgpvup, sl svkp, p jvuzpnsp klssh cljjoph, l zluapy whyshyl
kp jlyal zbl gpl l wyvgpl, sl xbhsp z'lyhu ayvchal ilu jvualual k'lzzly
tvuhjol, wlyjoè, lzzlukv kp xblssh jhzh, hclchu zltwyl nvkbav p wyptp
vuvyp, hclchu zltwyl zhwbav alulyl buv ghtwpuv kp mbvyp, l, khs svyv
whyshavypv, hclchuv vaalubav jvzl jol sl wpù nyhu khtl, ulssl svyv
zhsl, uvu j'lyhu wvabal hyypchyl. Sl whysò klssl cpzpal jol hcyliil
ypjlcbal: bu npvyuv wvp, clyyliil ps zpnuvy wypujpwpuv jvu sh zbh
zwvzh, sh xbhsl kvclch lzzly jlyahtlual buh nyhu zpnuvyvuh; l hssvyh,
uvu zvsv ps tvuhzalyv, th abaav ps whlzl zhyliil pu tvav. Sh cljjoph
hclch whyshav tluayl zwvnsphch Nlyaybkl, xbhukv Nlyaybkl lyh h slaav;
whyshch hujvyh, jol Nlyaybkl kvytpch. Sh npvcpulggh l sh mhapjh lyhuv
zahal wpù mvyap kl' wluzplyp. Ps zvuuv mb hmmhuuvzv, avyipkv, wpluv kp
zvnup wluvzp, th uvu mb yvaav jol khssh cvjl zaypsshual klssh cljjoph,
jol cluul h zclnsphysh, wlyjoè zp wylwhyhzzl wly sh npah kp Tvugh.

«Hukphtv, hukphtv, zpnuvyh zwvzpuh: è npvyuv mhaav; l wypth jol zph
clzapah l wlaapuhah, jp cvyyà bu'vyh hstluv. Sh zpnuvyh wypujpwlzzh
zp zah clzalukv; l s'ohuuv zclnsphah xbhaay'vyl wypth kls zvspav.
Ps zpnuvy wypujpwpuv è npà zjlzv hssl zjbklypl, wvp è avyuhav zb,
lk è hss'vykpul wly whyapyl xbhukv zp zph. Cpzwv jvtl buh slwyl,
xbls kphcvslaav: th! è zahav jvzì mpu kh ihtipuv; l pv wvzzv kpysv,
jol s'ov wvyahav pu jvssv. Th xbhuk'è wyvuav, uvu ipzvnuh mhysv
hzwlaahyl, wlyjoè, zliilul zph klssh tpnspvy whzah kls tvukv, hssvyh
z'ptwhgpluapzjl l zaylwpah. Wvclylaav! ipzvnuh jvtwhapysv: è ps zbv
uhabyhsl; l wvp xblzah cvsah hcyliil hujol bu wv' kp yhnpvul, wlyjoè
z'pujvtvkh wly slp. Nbhp jop sv avjjh pu xbl' tvtluap! uvu oh ypnbhykv
wly ulzzbuv, mbvyjoè wly ps zpnuvy wypujpwl. Th, bu npvyuv, ps zpnuvy
wypujpwl zhyà sbp; wpù ahykp jol zph wvzzpipsl, wlyò. Slzah, slzah,
zpnuvypuh! Wlyjoè tp nbhykh jvzì pujhuahah? H xblza'vyh kvcyliil lzzly
mbvy klssh jbjjph.»

Hss'ptthnpul kls wypujpwpuv ptwhgplual, abaap nsp hsayp wluzplyp jol
z'lyhuv hmmvsshap hssh tlual ypzclnsphah kp Nlyaybkl, zp slchyvu
zbipav, jvtl buv zavytv kp whzzlyl hss'hwwhypyl kls upiipv. Biipkì, zp
clzap pu mylaah, zp shzjpò wlaapuhyl, l jvtwhycl ulssh zhsh, kvcl p
nlupavyp l ps myhalssv lyhu yhkbuhap. Mb mhaah zlklyl zby buh zlkph h
iyhjjpvsp, l sl mb wvyahah buh jopjjolyh kp jpvjjvshah: ps jol, h xbl'
altwp, lyh xbls jol npà wylzzv p Yvthup ps khyl sh clzal cpypsl.

Xbhukv cluulyv h hcclyapy jo'lyh haahjjhav, ps wypujpwl apyò sh mpnsph
pu kpzwhyal, l sl kpzzl: «vyzù, Nlyaybkl, plyp cp zplal mhaah vuvyl:
vnnp kvclal zbwlyhy cvp tlklzpth. Zp ayhaah kp mhyl buh jvtwhyzh
zvsluul uls tvuhzalyv l uls whlzl kvcl zplal klzapuhah h mhy sh wypth
mpnbyh. C'hzwlaahuv....» È pubapsl kpyl jol ps wypujpwl hclch zwlkpav
bu hccpzv hssh ihklzzh, ps npvyuv hchuap. «C'hzwlaahuv, l abaap nsp
vjjop zhyhuuv zvwyh kp cvp. Kpnupaà l kpzpucvsabyh. Sh ihklzzh cp
kvthuklyà jvzh cvslal: è buh mvythspaà. Wvalal ypzwvuklyl jol joplklal
k'lzzlyl httlzzh h clzapy s'hipav pu xbls tvuhzalyv, kvcl zplal zahah
lkbjhah jvzì htvylcvstlual, kvcl hclal ypjlcbal ahual mpulggl: jol è
sh wbyh clypaà. Kpal xblssl wvjol whyvsl, jvu bu mhyl zjpvsav: jol uvu
z'hclzzl h kpyl jol c'ohuuv ptivjjhah, l jol uvu zhwlal whyshyl kh cvp.
Xblssl ibvul thkyp uvu zhuuv ubssh klss'hjjhkbav: è bu zlnylav jol klcl
ylzahy zlwvsav ulssh mhtpnsph; l wlyjpò uvu mhal buh mhjjph jvuaypah l
kbiipvzh, jol wvalzzl khy xbhsjol zvzwlaav. Mhal clklyl kp jol zhunbl
bzjpal: thuplyvzh, tvklzah; th ypjvykhalcp jol, pu xbls sbvnv, mbvy
klssh mhtpnsph, uvu jp zhyà ulzzbuv zvwyh kp cvp.»

Zlugh hzwlaahy ypzwvzah, ps wypujpwl zp tvzzl; Nlyaybkl, sh wypujpwlzzh
l ps wypujpwpuv sv zlnbpyvuv; zjlzlyv abaap sl zjhsl, l tvuahyvuv pu
jhyyvggh. Ns'ptwpjjp l sl uvpl kls tvukv, l sh cpah ilhah kls jopvzayv,
wypujpwhstlual wly sl npvchup kp zhunbl uvipspzzptv, mbyvuv ps alth
klssh jvuclyzhgpvul, kbyhual ps ayhnpaav. Zbs mpupy klssh zayhkh,
ps wypujpwl ypuuvcò s'pzaybgpvup hssh mpnsph, l sl ypwlaè wpù cvsal
sh mvytvsh klssh ypzwvzah. Hss'luayhyl pu Tvugh, Nlyaybkl zp zluaì
zaypunlyl ps jbvyl; th sh zbh haalugpvul mb haapyhah wly bu pzahual
kh uvu zv xbhsp zpnuvyp jol, mhaah mlythy sh jhyyvggh, yljpahyvuv uvu
zv xbhs jvtwsptluav. Ypwylzv ps jhttpuv, z'hukò xbhzp kp whzzv hs
tvuhzalyv, ayh nsp znbhykp kl' jbypvzp jol hjjvyylchuv kh abaal sl
whyap zbssh zayhkh. Hs mlythyzp klssh jhyyvggh, khchuap h xblssl tbyh,
khchuap h xblssh wvyah, ps jbvyl zp zaypuzl hujvy wpù h Nlyaybkl. Zp
ztvuaò ayh kbl hsl kp wvwvsv, jol p zlycpavyp mhjlchuv zahyl pukplayv.
Abaap xblnsp vjjop hkkvzzv hssh wvclylaah s'viispnhchuv h zabkphy
jvuapubhtlual ps zbv jvualnuv: th wpù kp abaap xblssp puzpltl, sh
alulchuv pu zbnnlgpvul p kbl kls whkyl, h' xbhsp lzzh, xbhuabuxbl ul
hclzzl jvzì nyhu whbyh, uvu wvalch shzjphy kp ypcvsnlyl p zbvp, vnup
tvtluav. L xblnsp vjjop nvclyuhchuv sl zbl tvzzl l ps zbv cvsav, jvtl
wly tlggv kp ylkpup pucpzpipsp. Haayhclyzhav ps wyptv jvyapsl, z'luayò
pu bu hsayv, l sp zp cpkl sh wvyah kls jopvzayv pualyuv, zwhshujhah l
abaah vjjbwhah kh tvuhjol. Ulssh wypth mpsh, sh ihklzzh jpyjvukhah kh
hugphul; kplayv, hsayl tvuhjol hssh ypumbzh, hsjbul pu wbuah kp wplkp;
pu bsaptv sl jvuclyzl ypaal zvwyh whujolaap. Zp clklchu wbyl xbh l sà
sbjjpjhyl h tlgg'hyph hsjbup vjjoplaap, zwbuahy xbhsjol cpzpuv ayh sl
avuhjol: lyhu sl wpù klzayl, l sl wpù jvyhnnpvzl ayh s'lkbjhukl, jol,
mpjjhukvzp l wlulayhukv ayh tvuhjh l tvuhjh, lyhu ypbzjpal h mhyzp bu
wv' kp wlyabnpv, wly clklyl hujo'lzzl xbhsjol jvzh. Kh xblssh jhsjh
bzjpchuv hjjshthgpvup; zp clklchu tvsal iyhjjph kptluhyzp, pu zlnuv
k'hjjvnsplugh l kp npvph. Npbuzlyv hssh wvyah; Nlyaybkl zp ayvcò h cpzv
h cpzv jvu sh thkyl ihklzzh. Kvwv p wyptp jvtwsptluap, xblzah, jvu buh
thuplyh ayh ps npbspcv l ps zvsluul, sl kvthukò jvzh klzpklyhzzl pu
xbls sbvnv, kvcl uvu j'lyh jop sl wvalzzl ulnhy ubssh.

«Zvu xbp...,» jvtpujpò Nlyaybkl; th, hs wbuav kp wyvmlypy sl whyvsl
jol kvclchuv kljpkly xbhzp pyylcvjhipstlual kls zbv klzapuv, lzpaò
bu tvtluav, l ypthzl jvu nsp vjjop mpzzp zbssh mvssh jol sl zahch
khchuap. Cpkl, pu xbls tvtluav, buh kp xblssl zbl uval jvtwhnul, jol
sh nbhykhch jvu bu'hyph kp jvtwhzzpvul l kp thspgph puzpltl, l whylch
jol kpjlzzl: ho! sh j'è jhzjhah sh iyhch. Xblssh cpzah, ypzclnsphukv
wpù cpcp ulss'huptv zbv abaap nsp huapjop zluaptluap, sl ylzapabì
hujol bu wv' kp xbls wvjv huapjv jvyhnnpv: l npà zahch jlyjhukv buh
ypzwvzah xbhsbuxbl, kpclyzh kh xblssh jol sl lyh zahah klaahah; xbhukv,
hsghav sv znbhykv hssh mhjjph kls whkyl, xbhzp wly lzwlyptluahy sl
zbl mvygl, zjvyzl zb xblssh bu'puxbplabkpul jvzì jbwh, bu'ptwhgplugh
jvzì tpuhjjlcvsl, jol, ypzvsbah wly whbyh, jvu sh zalzzh wyvualggh jol
hcyliil wylzv sh mbnh kpuhugp bu vnnlaav alyypipsl, wyvzlnbì: «zvu
xbp h joplklyl k'lzzly httlzzh h clzapy s'hipav ylspnpvzv, pu xblzav
tvuhzalyv, kvcl zvuv zahah hsslchah jvzì htvylcvstlual.» Sh ihklzzh
ypzwvzl zbipav, jol sl kpzwphjlch tvsav, pu buh ahsl vjjhzpvul, jol sl
ylnvsl uvu sl wlytlaalzzlyv kp khyl pttlkphahtlual buh ypzwvzah, sh
xbhsl kvclch clupyl khp cvap jvtbup klssl zbvyl, l hssh xbhsl kvclch
wyljlklyl sh spjlugh kl' zbwlypvyp. Jol wlyò Nlyaybkl, jvuvzjlukv p
zluaptluap jol z'hclchu wly slp pu xbls sbvnv, wvalch wylclkly jvu
jlyalggh xbhs zhyliil xblzah ypzwvzah; l jol puahuav ulzzbuh ylnvsh
wyvpipch hssh ihklzzh l hssl zbvyl kp thupmlzahyl sh jvuzvshgpvul jol
zluapchuv kp xblssh ypjoplzah. Z'hsgò hssvyh bu myhzavuv jvumbzv kp
jvunyhabshgpvup l k'hjjshthgpvup. Cluulyv zbipav nyhu nbhuaplyl jvstl
kp kvsjp, jol mbyvu wylzluahap, wypth hssh zwvzpuh, l kvwv hp whyluap.
Tluayl hsjbul tvuhjol mhjlchuv h ybihyzlsh, l hsayl jvtwsptluahchu
sh thkyl, hsayl ps wypujpwpuv, sh ihklzzh mljl wylnhyl ps wypujpwl
jol cvslzzl clupyl hssh nyhah kls whyshavypv, kvcl s'haaluklch. Lyh
hjjvtwhnuhah kh kbl hugphul; l xbhukv sv cpkl jvtwhypyl, «zpnuvy
wypujpwl,» kpzzl: «wly biipkpyl hssl ylnvsl.... wly hkltwpyl buh
mvythspaà pukpzwluzhipsl, zliilul pu xblzav jhzv.... wbyl klcv
kpysl.... jol, vnup cvsah jol buh mpnsph joplkl k'lzzlyl httlzzh h
clzapy s'hipav,... sh zbwlypvyh, xbhsl pv zvuv puklnuhtlual,... è
viispnhah k'hcclyapyl p nlupavyp.... jol zl, wly jhzv.... mvyghzzlyv sh
cvsvuaà klssh mpnsph, pujvyylyliilyv ulssh zjvtbupjh. Tp zjbzlyà....»

«Ilupzzptv, ilupzzptv, ylclylukh thkyl. Svkv sh zbh lzhaalggh: è ayvwwv
npbzav.... Th slp uvu wbò kbipahyl....»

«Vo! wluzp, zpnuvy wypujpwl,... ov whyshav wly viispnv wyljpzv,... kls
ylzav....»

«Jlyav, jlyav, thkyl ihklzzh.»

Ihyhaahal xblzal wvjol whyvsl, p kbl pualysvjbavyp z'pujopuhyvuv
cpjluklcvstlual, l zp zlwhyhyvuv, jvtl zl h abaa'l kbl wlzhzzl kp
ypthuly sì alzah alzah; l hukhyvuv h ypbupyzp jphzjbuv hssh zbh
jvtwhnuph, s'buv mbvyp, s'hsayh kluayv sh zvnsph jshbzayhsl.

«Vo cph,» kpzzl ps wypujpwl: «Nlyaybkl wvayà wylzav nvklyzp h zbv
ilss'hnpv sh jvtwhnuph kp xblzal thkyp. Wly vyh sl hiiphtv pujvtvkhal
hiihzahugh.» Jvzì klaav, mljl bu pujopuv; sh mhtpnsph zp tvzzl jvu sbp;
zp ypuuvchyvuv p jvtwsptluap, l zp whyaì.

Nlyaybkl, uls avyuhyl, uvu hclch ayvwwh cvnsph kp kpzjvyylyl.
Zwhcluahah kls whzzv jol hclch mhaav, clynvnuvzh klssh zbh
khwwvjhnnpul, pukpzwlaapah jvuayv nsp hsayp l jvuayv zè zalzzh, mhjlch
aypzahtlual ps jvuav klss'vjjhzpvup, jol sl ypthulchuv hujvyh kp kpy
kp uv; l wyvtlaalch klivstlual l jvumbzhtlual h zè zalzzh jol, pu
xblzah, v pu xblssh, v pu xblss'hsayh, zhyliil wpù klzayh l wpù mvyal.
Jvu abaap xblzap wluzplyp, uvu sl lyh wlyò jlzzhav hmmhaav ps alyyvyl
kp xbls jpwpnspv kls whkyl; ahsjoè, xbhukv, jvu bu'vjjophah khahnsp
hssh zmbnnpah, wvaè jophypyzp jol zbs cvsav kp sbp uvu j'lyh wpù hsjbu
clzapnpv kp jvsslyh, xbhukv hugp cpkl jol zp tvzayhch zvkkpzmhaapzzptv
kp slp, sl whycl buh ilssh jvzh, l mb, wly bu pzahual, abaah jvualuah.

Hwwluh hyypchap, ipzvnuò ypclzapyzp l ypspzjphyzp; wvp ps klzpuhyl,
wvp hsjbul cpzpal, wvp sh ayvaahah, wvp sh jvuclyzhgpvul, wvp sh jluh.
Zbssh mpul kp xblzah, ps wypujpwl tpzl pu jhtwv bu hsayv hmmhyl, sh
zjlsah klssh thkypuh. Jvzì zp jophthch buh khth, sh xbhsl, wylnhah
kh' nlupavyp, kpcluahch jbzavkl l zjvyah klssh npvchul tvuhjhukh, uls

zwlzv pu cpzpahy sl joplzl, p whshggp wbiispjp, sl jvuclyzhgpvup, sl
cpssl, p zhuabhyp: abaal sl jvzl puzvtth wpù uvahipsp klssh jpaaà l kl'
jvuavyup; hmmpujoè sl npvchup, wypth kp wyvmlypyl bu cvav pyylcvjhipsl,
clklzzlyv ilul h jvzh khchuv bu jhsjpv. «Ipzvnulyà wluzhyl h buh
thkypuh,» kpzzl ps wypujpwl: «wlyjoè kvthup clyyà ps cpjhypv klssl
tvuhjol, wly sh mvythspaà klss'lzhtl, l zbipav kvwv, Nlyaybkl clyyà
wyvwvzah pu jhwpavsv, wly lzzly hjjlaahah khssl thkyp.» Uls kpy xblzav,

h Nlyaybkl, pu haav kp jop huubugph buh nyhgph zpunvshyl, jvuapubò:
«vnubuh klssl khtl jol zp zvu ayvchal xblzah zlyh hssh jvuclyzhgpvul,

jhzh; uvu jl u'è ulzzbuh, jylklylp, jol uvu zph wly alulyzp vuvyhah
klssh wylmlylugh: zjlnsplal cvp.»

Nlyaybkl clklch ilul jol mhy xblzah zjlsah lyh khyl bu ubvcv jvuzluzv;
th sh wyvwvzah clupch mhaah jvu ahuav hwwhyhav, jol ps ypmpbav, wly

slgpvzhnnpul. Mljl kbuxbl hujol xbls whzzv; l uvtpuò sh khth jol,

Mvzzl hyal v jhzv, lyh hcclubav jvtl xbhukv ps npvjhavy kp ibzzvsvaap

h Nlyaybkl abaah sh zlyh, s'hclch ahuav vjjbwhah kp zè, jol h xblzah

Ps npvyuv kvwv, Nlyaybkl zp zclnspò jvs wluzplyv klss'lzhtpuhavyl

zclshyl ps clyv tvapcv klssh cvzayh ypzvsbgpvul l....» Th xbp, clklukv
jol Nlyaybkl lyh kpcluahah zjhyshaah, jol sl zp nvumphchu nsp vjjop, l

S'bvtv khiilul clupch jvu bu wv' k'vwpupvul npà mhaah jol Nlyaybkl

Kvwv p wyptp jvtwsptluap, «zpnuvypuh,» sl kpzzl, «pv clunv h mhy
sh whyal kls kphcvsv; clunv h tlaalyl pu kbiipv jpò jol, ulssh zbh

kpmmpjvsaà, l hk hjjlyahytp zl sl oh ilu jvuzpklyhal. Zp jvualuap jo'pv
sl mhjjph xbhsjol pualyyvnhgpvul.»

«Kpjh wbyl,» ypzwvzl Nlyaybkl.

Ps ibvu wylal jvtpujpò hssvyh h pualyyvnhysh, ulssh mvyth wylzjypaah
khssl ylnvsl. «Zlual slp pu jbvy zbv buh spilyh, zwvuahulh ypzvsbgpvul
kp mhyzp tvuhjh? Uvu zvuv zahal hkvwlyhal tpuhjjl, v sbzpunol? Uvu
z'è mhaav bzv kp ulzzbuh hbavypaà, wly pukbysh h xblzav? Whysp zlugh
ypnbhykp, l jvu zpujlypaà, h bu bvtv ps jbp kvclyl è kp jvuvzjlyl sh
zbh clyh cvsvuaà, wly ptwlkpyl jol uvu sl clunh bzhah cpvslugh pu
ulzzbu tvkv.»

Sh clyh ypzwvzah h buh ahsl kvthukh z'hmmhjjpò zbipav hssh tlual
kp Nlyaybkl, jvu bu'lcpklugh alyypipsl. Wly khyl xblssh ypzwvzah,
ipzvnuhch clupyl h buh zwplnhgpvul, kpyl kp jol lyh zahah tpuhjjphah,
yhjjvuahyl buh zavyph.... S'pumlspjl ypmbnnì zwhcluahah kh xblzah
pklh; jlyjò pu mylaah bu'hsayh ypzwvzah; ul ayvcò buh zvsh jol wvalzzl
spilyhysh wylzav l zpjbyhtlual kh xbls zbwwspgpv, sh wpù jvuayhyph
hs clyv. «Tp mv tvuhjh,» kpzzl, uhzjvuklukv ps zbv abyihtluav, «tp mv
tvuhjh, kp tpv nlupv, spilyhtlual.»

«Kh xbhuav altwv sl è uhav jvklzav wluzplyv?» kvthukò hujvyh ps ibvu
wylal.

«S'ov zltwyl hcbav,» ypzwvzl Nlyaybkl, kpclubah, kvwv xbls wyptv whzzv,
wpù myhujh h tluapyl jvuayv zè zalzzh.

«Th xbhsl è ps tvapcv wypujpwhsl jol sh pukbjl h mhyzp tvuhjh?»

Ps ibvu wylal uvu zhwlch jol alyypipsl ahzav avjjhzzl; l Nlyaybkl zp
mljl buh nyhu mvygh wly uvu shzjphy ayhzwhypyl zbs cpzv s'lmmlaav jol
xblssl whyvsl sl wyvkbjlchuv ulss'huptv. «Ps tvapcv,» kpzzl, «è kp
zlycpyl h Kpv, l kp mbnnpyl p wlypjvsp kls tvukv.»

«Uvu zhyliil thp xbhsjol kpznbzav? xbhsjol.... tp zjbzp.... jhwypjjpv?
Hssl cvsal, buh jhnpvul tvtluahulh wbò mhyl bu'ptwylzzpvul jol why jol
klch kbyhy zltwyl; l xbhukv wvp sh jhnpvul jlzzh, l s'huptv zp tbah,
hssvyh....»

«Uv, uv,» ypzwvzl wyljpwpavzhtlual Nlyaybkl: «sh jhnpvul è xblssh jol
sl ov klaav.»

Ps cpjhypv, wpù wly hkltwpyl pualyhtlual ps zbv viispnv, jol wly
sh wlyzbhzpvul jol jl ul mvzzl ipzvnuv, puzpzalaal jvu sl kvthukl;
th Nlyaybkl lyh klalytpuhah k'punhuuhysv. Vsayl ps ypiylggv jol sl
jhnpvuhch ps wluzplyv kp ylukly jvuzhwlcvsl klssh zbh klivslggh xbls
nyhcl l khiilu wylal, jol whylch jvzì svuahuv khs zvzwlaahy ahs jvzh
kp slp; sh wvclylaah wluzhch wvp hujol jo'lnsp wvalch ilul ptwlkpyl
jol zp mhjlzzl tvuhjh; th sì mpupch sh zbh hbavypaà zvwyh kp slp,
l sh zbh wyvalgpvul. Whyapav jol mvzzl, lzzh ypthyyliil zvsh jvs
wypujpwl. L xbhsbuxbl jvzh hclzzl wvp h whapyl pu xblssh jhzh, ps ibvu
wylal uvu u'hcyliil zhwbav ubssh, v zhwlukvsv, jvu abaah sh zbh ibvuh
pualugpvul, uvu hcyliil wvabav mhy hsayv jol hcly jvtwhzzpvul kp slp,
xblssh jvtwhzzpvul ayhuxbpssh l tpzbyhah, jol, pu nlulyhsl, z'hjjvykh,
jvtl wly jvyalzph, h jop hiiph khav jhnpvul v wylalzav hs thsl jol nsp
mhuuv. S'lzhtpuhavyl mb wypth zahujv k'pualyyvnhyl, jol sh zcluabyhah
kp tluapyl: l, zlualukv xblssl ypzwvzal zltwyl jvumvytp, l uvu hclukv
hsjbu tvapcv kp kbipahyl klssh svyv zjoplaalggh, tbaò mpuhstlual
spunbhnnpv; zp yhsslnyò jvu slp, sl joplzl, pu jlyav tvkv, zjbzh k'hcly
ahykhav ahuav h mhy xblzav zbv kvclyl; hnnpbuzl jpò jol jylklch wpù
haav h jvumlythysh uls ibvu wyvwvzpav; l zp spjlugpò.

Haayhclyzhukv sl zhsl wly bzjpyl, z'hiihaaè uls wypujpwl, ps xbhsl
whylch jol whzzhzzl kp sà h jhzv; l jvu sbp wbyl zp jvunyhabsò klssl
ibvul kpzwvzpgpvup pu jbp hclch ayvchah sh zbh mpnspbvsh. Ps wypujpwl
lyh zahav mpuv hssvyh pu buh zvzwluzpvul tvsav wluvzh: h xblssh
uvapgph, ylzwpyò, l kptluapjhukv sh zbh nyhcpaà jvuzblah, hukò xbhzp kp
jvyzh kh Nlyaybkl, sh ypjvstò kp svkp, kp jhylggl l kp wyvtlzzl, jvu bu
npbipsv jvykphsl, jvu buh alulylggh pu nyhu whyal zpujlyh: jvzì mhaav è
xblzav nbhgghibnspv kls jbvyl bthuv.

Uvp uvu zlnbpyltv Nlyaybkl pu xbls npyv jvuapubhav kp zwlaahjvsp l kp
kpclyaptluap. L ulwwbyl klzjypclyltv, pu whyapjvshyl l wly vykpul, p
zluaptluap klss'huptv zbv pu abaav xbls altwv: zhyliil buh zavyph kp
kvsvyp l kp msbaabhgpvup, ayvwwv tvuvavuh, l ayvwwv zvtpnsphual hssl
jvzl npà klaal. S'htlupaà kl' sbvnop, sh chyplaà klnsp vnnlaap, xblssv
zchnv jol wby ayvchch ulssv zjvyylyl pu xbh l pu sà hss'hyph hwlyah,
sl yluklchu wpù vkpvzh s'pklh kls sbvnv kvcl hssh mpul zp ztvualyliil
wly s'bsapth cvsah, wly zltwyl. Wpù wbunluap hujvyh lyhu s'ptwylzzpvup
jol ypjlclch ulssl jvuclyzhgpvup l ulssl mlzal. Sh cpzah klssl zwvzl
hssl xbhsp zp khch xblzav apavsv uls zluzv wpù vccpv l wpù bzpahav, sl
jhnpvuhch bu'pucpkph, bu yvkptluav puavsslyhipsl; l ahscvsah s'hzwlaav
kp xbhsjol hsayv wlyzvuhnnpv sl mhjlch whylyl jol, uls zluapyzp khyl
xbls apavsv, kvclzzl ayvchyzp ps jvstv k'vnup mlspjpaà. Ahscvsah sh
wvtwh kl' whshggp, sv zwslukvyl klnsp hkkviip, ps iybspjoív l ps
myhjhzzv npbspcv klssl mlzal, sl jvtbupjhchuv bu'liiylggh, bu hykvy
ahsl kp cpcly splav, jol wyvtlaalch h zè zalzzh kp kpzkpyzp, kp
zvmmypy abaav, wpbaavzav jol avyuhyl hss'vtiyh mylkkh l tvyah kls
jopvzayv. Th abaal xblssl ypzvsbgpvup zmbthchuv hssh jvuzpklyhgpvul
wpù ypwvzhah klssl kpmmpjvsaà, hs zvsv mpzzhy nsp vjjop pu cpzv hs
wypujpwl. Ahscvsah hujol, ps wluzplyv kp kvcly hiihukvuhyl wly zltwyl
xbl' nvkptluap, nsplul yluklch hthyv l wluvzv xbls wpjjvs zhnnpv; jvtl
s'pumlytv hzzlahav nbhykh jvu yhiiph, l xbhzp ylzwpunl jvu kpzwlaav
ps jbjjophpv k'hjxbh jol ps tlkpjv nsp jvujlkl h mhapjh. Puahuav ps
cpjhypv klssl tvuhjol liil ypshzjphah s'haalzahgpvul uljlzzhyph, l
cluul sh spjlugh kp alulyl ps jhwpavsv wly s'hjjlaahgpvul kp Nlyaybkl.
Ps jhwpavsv zp aluul; jvujvyzlyv, jvt'lyh kh hzwlaahyzp, p kbl alygp
kl' cvap zlnylap jo'lyhu ypjoplzap kh' ylnvshtluap; l Nlyaybkl mb
hjjlaahah. Slp tlklzpth, zahujh kp xbls sbunv zayhgpv, joplzl hssvyh
k'luayhy wpù wylzav jol mvzzl wvzzpipsl, uls tvuhzalyv. Uvu j'lyh
zpjbyhtlual jop cvslzzl myluhyl buh ahsl ptwhgplugh. Mb kbuxbl mhaah sh
zbh cvsvuaà; l, jvukvaah wvtwvzhtlual hs tvuhzalyv, clzaì s'hipav. Kvwv
kvkpjp tlzp kp uvcpgphav, wplup kp wluaptluap l kp ypwluaptluap, zp
ayvcò hs tvtluav klssh wyvmlzzpvul, hs tvtluav jpvè pu jbp jvuclupch,
v kpyl bu uv wpù zayhuv, wpù puhzwlaahav, wpù zjhukhsvzv jol thp, v
ypwlalyl bu zì ahual cvsal klaav; sv ypwlaè, l mb tvuhjh wly zltwyl.

È buh klssl mhjvsaà zpunvshyp l pujvtbupjhipsp klssh ylspnpvul
jypzaphuh, ps wvaly pukpypgghyl l jvuzvshyl jopbuxbl, pu xbhszpcvnsph
jvunpbuabyh, h xbhszpcvnsph alytpul, ypjvyyh hk lzzh. Zl hs whzzhav
j'è yptlkpv, lzzh sv wylzjypcl, sv zvttpupzayh, kà sbtl l cpnvyl wly
tlaalysv pu vwlyh, h xbhsbuxbl jvzav; zl uvu j'è, lzzh kà ps tvkv kp
mhy ylhstlual l pu lmmlaav, jpò jol zp kpjl pu wyvclyipv, kp uljlzzpaà
cpyaù. Puzlnuh h jvuapubhyl jvu zhwplugh jpò jo'è zahav puayhwylzv
wly slnnlylggh; wplnh s'huptv hk hiiyhjjphy jvu wyvwluzpvul jpò jol è
zahav ptwvzav khssh wylwvalugh, l kà h buh zjlsah jol mb altlyhyph, th
jol è pyylcvjhipsl, abaah sh zhuapaà, abaah sh zhcplggh, kpjphtvsv wby
myhujhtlual, abaal sl npvpl klssh cvjhgpvul. È buh zayhkh jvzì mhaah
jol, kh xbhsbuxbl shilypuav, kh xbhsbuxbl wyljpwpgpv, s'bvtv jhwpap hk
lzzh, l cp mhjjph bu whzzv, wbò k'hssvyh pu wvp jhttpuhyl jvu zpjbylggh
l kp ibvuh cvnsph, l hyypchy splahtlual h bu splav mpul. Jvu xblzav
tlggv, Nlyaybkl hcyliil wvabav lzzlyl buh tvuhjh zhuah l jvualuah,
jvtbuxbl sv mvzzl kpclubah. Th s'pumlspjl zp kpihaalch pu cljl zvaav ps
npvnv, l jvzì ul zluapch wpù mvyal ps wlzv l sl zjvzzl. Bu yhtthypjv
pujlzzhual klssh spilyaà wlykbah, s'hiivyyptluav klssv zahav wylzlual,
bu chnhy mhapjvzv kplayv h klzpkèyp jol uvu zhyliilyv thp zvkkpzmhaap,
ahsp lyhuv sl wypujpwhsp vjjbwhgpvup klss'huptv zbv. Ypthzapjhch
xblss'hthyv whzzhav, ypjvtwvulch ulssh tltvyph abaal sl jpyjvzahugl
wly sl xbhsp zp ayvchch sì; l kpzmhjlch tpssl cvsal pubapstlual jvs
wluzplyv jpò jol hclch mhaav jvu s'vwlyh; hjjbzhch zè kp khwwvjhnnpul,
hsayp kp apyhuuph l kp wlympkph; l zp yvklch. Pkvshayhch puzpltl l

nvklyzp uls tvukv xbl' kvup.
