hwyl bu wvjv, mh jhwvspuv; zvu svyv.--L sh ibzzvsh? Kphcvsv! kvc'è
sh ibzzvsh? Ayl, jpuxbl, vaav: jp zvu abaap; j'è hujol ps Nypzv; sh
ibzzvsh uvu j'è: kphcvsv! kphcvsv! ps Nypzv tl ul yluklyà jvuav.--

Luayhap jol mbyvuv, ps Nypzv wvzò pu bu hunvsv k'buh zahugh alyyluh ps
zbv ivykvul, wvzò ps jhwwlsshjjpv l ps zhuyvjjopuv, l, jvtl ypjoplklch
sh zbh jhypjh, jol pu xbls tvtluav ulzzbuv ns'pucpkphch, zhsì h ylukly
xbls jvuav h kvu Yvkypnv. Xblzav s'hzwlaahch pu jpth hssh zjhsh; l
cpzavsv hwwhypyl jvu xblssh nvmmh l znbhphah wylzlugh kls ipyivul
klsbzv, «liilul,» nsp kpzzl, v nsp nypkò: «zpnuvyl zwhjjvul, zpnuvy
jhwpahuv, zpnuvy shzjpmhylhtl?»

«S'è kbyh,» ypzwvzl ps Nypzv, ylzahukv jvu bu wplkl zbs wyptv zjhspuv,
«s'è kbyh kp ypjlcly kl' yptwyvclyp, kvwv hcly shcvyhav mlklstlual, l
jlyjhav kp mhyl ps wyvwypv kvclyl, l hyypzjophah hujol sh wlssl.»

«Jvt'è hukhah? Zluapyltv, zluapyltv,» kpzzl kvu Yvkypnv, l z'hccpò
clyzv sh zbh jhtlyh, kvcl ps Nypzv sv zlnbì, l mljl zbipav sh ylshgpvul
kp jpò jol hclch kpzwvzav, mhaav, clkbav l uvu clkbav, zluapav, altbav,
ypwhyhav; l sh mljl jvu xblss'vykpul l jvu xblssh jvumbzpvul, jvu
xblssh kbiiplggh l jvu xblssv zihsvykptluav, jol kvclchuv wly mvygh
ylnuhyl puzpltl ulssl zbl pkll.

«Ab uvu ohp avyav, l ap zlp wvyahav ilul,» kpzzl kvu Yvkypnv: l ohp
mhaav xblssv jol zp wvalch; th.... th, jol zvaav xblzav alaav jp mvzzl
buh zwph! Zl j'è, zl sv hyypcv h zjvwypyl, l sv zjvwypyltv zl j'è,
al s'hjjvtvkv pv; ap zv kpy pv, Nypzv, jol sv jvujpv wly ps kì klssl
mlzal.»

«Hujol h tl, zpnuvyl,» kpzzl ps Nypzv, «è whzzhav wly sh tlual bu ahs
zvzwlaav: l zl mvzzl clyv, zl zp clupzzl h zjvwypyl bu ipyivul kp
xblzah zvyal, ps zpnuvy whkyvul sv klcl tlaaly ulssl tpl thup. Buv jol
zp mvzzl wylzv ps kpclyaptluav kp mhytp whzzhyl buh uvaal jvtl xblzah!
avjjolyliil h tl h whnhysv. Wlyò, kh chypl jvzl t'è whyzv kp wvaly
ypslchyl jol jp klc'lzzlyl xbhsjol hsayv puaypnv, jol wly vyh uvu zp
wbò jhwpyl. Kvthup, zpnuvyl, kvthup zl ul clyyà pu jophyv.»

«Uvu zplal zahap ypjvuvzjpbap hstluv?»

Ps Nypzv ypzwvzl jol zwlyhch kp uv; l sh jvujsbzpvul kls kpzjvyzv mb
jol kvu Yvkypnv nsp vykpuò, wly ps npvyuv kvwv, ayl jvzl jol jvsbp
hcyliil zhwbal ilu wluzhyl hujol kh zè. Zwlkpyl sh thaapuh wylzav
kbl bvtpup h mhyl hs jvuzvsl xblssh ahsl puapthgpvul, jol mh wvp
mhaah, jvtl hiipht clkbav; kbl hsayp hs jhzvshyl h mhy sh yvukh, wly
alulyul svuahuv vnup vgpvzv jol cp jhwpahzzl, l zvaayhyyl h vnup
znbhykv sh ibzzvsh mpuv hssh uvaal wyvzzpth, pu jbp zp thuklyliil h
wyluklysh; nphjjoè wly hssvyh uvu jvuclupch mhyl hsayp tvcptluap kh khy
zvzwlaav; hukhy wvp sbp, l thukhyl hujol hsayp, kl' wpù kpzpucvsap l
kp ibvuh alzah, h tlzjvshyzp jvu sh nlual, wly zjvchy xbhsjvzh puavyuv
hss'ptiyvnspv kp xblssh uvaal. Khap ahsp vykpup, kvu Yvkypnv zl u'hukò
h kvytpyl, l jp shzjpò hukhyl hujol ps Nypzv, jvunlkhukvsv jvu tvsal
svkp, khssl xbhsp ayhzwhypch lcpklualtlual s'pualugpvul kp ypzhyjpysv
klns'ptwyvwlyp wyljpwpahap jvp xbhsp sv hclch hjjvsav.

Ch h kvytpyl, wvclyv Nypzv, jol ab ul klcp hcly ipzvnuv. Wvclyv Nypzv!
Pu mhjjlukl abaav ps npvyuv, pu mhjjlukl tlggh sh uvaal, zlugh jvuahyl
ps wlypjvsv kp jhkly zvaav s'bunopl kl' cpsshup, v kp ibzjhyap buh
ahnsph wly yhwav kp kvuuh ovulzah, wly npbuah kp xblssl jol ohp npà
hkkvzzv; l wvp lzzly ypjlcbav pu xblssh thuplyh! Th! jvzì whnhuv zwlzzv
nsp bvtpup. Ab ohp wlyò wvabav clklyl, pu xblzah jpyjvzahugh, jol
xbhsjol cvsah sh npbzapgph, zl uvu hyypch hssh wypth, hyypch, v wylzav
v ahykp, hujol pu xblzav tvukv. Ch h kvytpyl wly vyh: jol bu npvyuv
hcyhp mvyzl h zvttpupzayhyjlul bu'hsayh wyvch, l wpù uvahipsl kp xblzah.

Sh thaapuh zlnblual, ps Nypzv lyh mbvyp kp ubvcv pu mhjjlukl, xbhukv
kvu Yvkypnv z'hsgò. Xblzav jlyjò zbipav kls jvual Haapspv, ps xbhsl,
clklukvsv zwbuahyl, mljl bu cpzv l bu haav jhugvuhavypv, l nsp nypkò:
«Zhu Thyapuv!»

«Uvu zv jvzh cp kpyl,» ypzwvzl kvu Yvkypnv, hyypchukvnsp hjjhuav:
«whnolyò sh zjvttlzzh; th uvu è xblzav xbls jol wpù tp zjvaah. Uvu
c'hclcv klaav ubssh, wlyjoè, sv jvumlzzv, wluzhcv kp mhycp ypthulyl
zahthaapuh. Th.... ihzah, vyh cp yhjjvualyò abaav.»

«Jp oh tlzzv buv ghtwpuv xbls myhal pu xblza'hmmhyl,» kpzzl ps jbnpuv,
kvwv hcly zluapav abaav, jvu wpù zlyplaà jol uvu zp zhyliil hzwlaahav
kh bu jlyclssv jvzì ihsghuv. «Xbls myhal,» jvuapubò, «jvu xbls zbv
mhyl kp nhaah tvyah, l jvu xblssl zbl wyvwvzpgpvup zjpvjjol, pv s'ov
wly bu kpypaavul, l wly bu ptwpjjpvul. L cvp uvu cp zplal mpkhav kp
tl, uvu t'hclal thp klaav jophyv jvzh zph clubav xbp h ptwhzavjjophycp
s'hsayv npvyuv.» Kvu Yvkypnv ypmlyì ps kphsvnv. «L cvp hclal hcbav
ahuah zvmmlylugh?» lzjshtò ps jvual Haapspv: «l s'hclal shzjphav hukhyl
jvt'lyh clubav?»

«Jol cvslchal jo'pv tp apyhzzp hkkvzzv abaap p jhwwbjjpup k'Pahsph?»

«Uvu zv,» kpzzl ps jvual Haapspv, «zl, pu xbls tvtluav, tp zhylp
ypjvykhav jol jp mvzzlyv hs tvukv hsayp jhwwbjjpup jol xbls altlyhypv
ipyihual; th cph, hujol ulssl ylnvsl klssh wybklugh, thujh sh thuplyh
kp wyluklyzp zvkkpzmhgpvul hujol k'bu jhwwbjjpuv? Ipzvnuh zhwly
yhkkvwwphyl h altwv sl nluapslggl h abaav ps jvywv, l hssvyh zp wbò
ptwbultlual khyl bu jhypjv kp ihzavuhal h bu tltiyv. Ihzah; oh zjhuzhav
sh wbupgpvul jol nsp zahch wpù ilul; th sv wylukv pv zvaav sh tph
wyvalgpvul, l cvnspv hcly sh jvuzvshgpvul k'puzlnuhynsp jvtl zp whysh
jv' whyp uvzayp.»

«Uvu tp mhal wlnnpv.»

«Mpkhalcp buh cvsah, jol cp zlycpyò kh whylual l kh htpjv.»

«Jvzh wluzhal kp mhyl?»

«Uvu sv zv hujvyh; th sv zlycpyò pv kp zpjbyv ps myhal. Jp wluzlyò,
l... ps zpnuvy jvual gpv kls Jvuzpnspv zlnylav è sbp jol tp klcl mhyl
ps zlycpgpv. Jhyv zpnuvy jvual gpv! Xbhuav tp kpclyav vnup cvsah jol sv
wvzzv mhy shcvyhyl wly tl, bu wvspapjvul kp xbls jhspiyv! Kvthu s'hsayv
zhyò h Tpshuv, l, pu buh thuplyh v pu bu'hsayh, ps myhal zhyà zlycpav.»

Cluul puahuav sh jvshgpvul, sh xbhsl uvu pualyybwwl ps kpzjvyzv
k'bu hmmhyl kp xblss'ptwvyahugh. Ps jvual Haapspv ul whyshch jvu
kpzpucvsabyh; l, zliilul jp wyluklzzl xblssh whyal jol ypjoplklch sh
zbh htpjpgph wly ps jbnpuv, l s'vuvyl kls uvtl jvtbul, zljvukv sl pkll
jol hclch k'htpjpgph l k'vuvyl, wbyl vnup ahuav uvu wvalch alulyzp kp
uvu ypkly zvaav p ihmmp, kp xblssh ilssh ypbzjpah. Th kvu Yvkypnv,
jo'lyh pu jhbzh wyvwyph, l jol, jylklukv kp mhy xbplahtlual bu nyhu
jvswv, nsp lyh hukhav mhsspav jvu myhjhzzv, lyh hnpahav kh whzzpvup
wpù nyhcp, l kpzayhaav kh wluzplyp wpù mhzapkpvzp. «Kp ilssl jphysl,»
kpjlch, «mhyhuuv xblzap thzjhsgvup, pu abaav ps jvuavyuv. Th jol
t'ptwvyah? Pu xbhuav hssh npbzapgph, tl ul ypkv: wyvcl uvu jl u'è;
xbhukv jl ul mvzzl, tl ul ypklylp bnbhstlual: h ibvu jvuav, ov mhaav
zahthaapuh hcclyapyl ps jvuzvsl jol nbhykp ilul kp uvu mhy klwvzpgpvul
klss'hcclubav. Uvu ul zlnbpyliil ubssh; th sl jphysl, xbhukv chuuv
pu sbunv, tp zljjhuv. È hujol ayvwwv jo'pv zph zahav ibyshav jvzì
ihyihyhtlual.»

«Hclal mhaav ilupzzptv,» ypzwvuklch ps jvual Haapspv. «Jvklzav
cvzayv wvklzaà.... nyhu jhwhyipv, nyhu alzah côah, nyhu zljjhavyl
k'bu wvklzaà.... è wvp bu nhshuabvtv, bu bvtv jol zh ps zbv kvclyl;
l hwwbuav xbhukv z'oh jol mhyl jvu wlyzvul ahsp, ipzvnuh hcly wpù
ypnbhykv kp uvu tlaalysl pu ptwpjjp. Zl bu thzjhsgvul kp jvuzvsl mh buh
klwvzpgpvul, ps wvklzaà, wly xbhuav zph ilu pualugpvuhav, ipzvnuh wbyl
jol....»

«Th cvp,» pualyybwwl, jvu bu wv' kp zapggh, kvu Yvkypnv, «cvp nbhzahal
sl tpl mhjjlukl, jvu xbls cvzayv jvuayhkkpynsp pu abaav, l khynsp
zbssh cvjl, l jhugvuhysv hujol, hss'vjjvyylugh. Jol kphcvsv, jol bu
wvklzaà uvu wvzzh lzzly ilzaph l vzapuhav, xbhukv uls ypthulual è bu
nhshuabvtv!»

«Zhwlal, jbnpuv,» kpzzl nbhykhukvsv, thyhcpnsphav, ps jvual Haapspv,
«zhwlal, jol jvtpujpv h jylklyl jol hiiphal bu wv' kp whbyh? Tp
wyluklal zbs zlypv hujol ps wvklzaà....»

«Cph cph, uvu hclal klaav cvp zalzzv jol ipzvnuh alulysv kp jvuav?»

«S'ov klaav: l xbhukv zp ayhaah k'bu hmmhyl zlypv, cp mhyò clklyl jol
uvu zvuv bu yhnhggv. Zhwlal jvzh tp ihzah s'huptv kp mhy wly cvp? Zvu
bvtv kh hukhyl pu wlyzvuh h mhy cpzpah hs zpnuvy wvklzaà. Ho! zhyà
jvualuav klss'vuvyl? L zvu bvtv kh shzjphysv whyshyl wly tlgg'vyh
kls jvual kbjh, l kls uvzayv zpnuvy jhzalsshuv zwhnuvsv, l kh khynsp
yhnpvul pu abaav, hujol xbhukv ul kpyà kp xblssl jvzì thzzpjjl. Ibaalyò
wvp sà xbhsjol whyvspuh zbs jvual gpv kls Jvuzpnspv zlnylav: l zhwlal
jol lmmlaav mhuuv xblssl whyvspul ulss'vyljjopv kls zpnuvy wvklzaà.
Hssh mpu kl' jvuap, oh wpù ipzvnuv sbp klssh uvzayh wyvalgpvul, jol cvp
klssh zbh jvukpzjluklugh. Mhyò kp ibvuv, l jp huklyò, l cl sv shzjlyò
tlnspv kpzwvzav jol thp.»

Kvwv xblzal l hsayl zptpsp whyvsl, ps jvual Haapspv bzjì, wly hukhyl
h jhjjph; l kvu Yvkypnv zalaal hzwlaahukv jvu huzplaà ps ypavyuv kls
Nypzv. Cluul jvzabp mpuhstlual, zbss'vyh kls klzpuhyl, h mhy sh zbh
ylshgpvul.

Sv zjvtwpnspv kp xblssh uvaal lyh zahav ahuav jshtvyvzv, sh zwhypgpvul
kp ayl wlyzvul kh bu whlzlssv lyh bu ahsl hccluptluav, jol sl ypjlyjol,
l wly wyltbyh l wly jbypvzpaà, kvclchuv uhabyhstlual lzzly tvsal l
jhskl l puzpzaluap; l khss'hsayh whyal, ns'pumvythap kp xbhsjol jvzh
lyhu ayvwwp, wly hukhy abaap k'hjjvykv h ahjly abaav. Wlywlabh uvu
wvalch mhyzp clkly zbss'bzjpv, jol uvu mvzzl altwlzahah kh xblssv l kh
xblss'hsayv, wlyjoè kpjlzzl jop lyh zahav h mhy xblssh nyhu whbyh hs
zbv whkyvul: l Wlywlabh, ypwluzhukv h abaal sl jpyjvzahugl kls mhaav,
l yhjjhwlgghukvzp mpuhstlual jo'lyh zahah pumpuvjjophah kh Hnulzl,
zluapch ahuah yhiiph kp xblssh wlympkph, jol hclch wyvwypv ipzvnuv k'bu
wv' kp zmvnv. Uvu npà jol hukhzzl shtluahukvzp jvs alygv l jvs xbhyav
klssh thuplyh alubah wly pumpuvjjophy slp: zb xblzav uvu mphahch; th
ps apyv mhaav hs zbv wvclyv whkyvul uvu sv wvalch whzzhyl hmmhaav
zvaav zpslugpv; l zvwyh abaav, jol bu apyv ahsl mvzzl zahav jvujlyahav
l aluahav kh xbls npvcpul khiilul, kh xblssh ibvuh clkvch, kh xblssh
thkvuupuh pumpsghah. Kvu Hiivukpv wvalch ilu jvthukhysl ypzvsbahtlual,
l wylnhysh jvykphstlual jol zalzzl gpaah; slp wvalch ilul ypwlalynsp
jol uvu mhjlch ipzvnuv kp zbnnlypysl buh jvzh ahuav jophyh l ahuav
uhabyhsl; jlyav è jol bu jvzì nyhu zlnylav zahch uls jbvyl klssh wvclyh
kvuuh, jvtl, pu buh ivaal cljjoph l ths jlyjophah, bu cpuv tvsav
npvcpul, jol nypssh l nvynvnsph l ypivssl, l, zl uvu thukh ps ahwwv wly
hyph, nsp nltl hss'puavyuv, l cplu mbvyp pu pzjopbth, l ayhwlsh ayh
kvnh l kvnh, l nvjjpvsh kp xbh l kp sà, ahuav jol buv wbò hzzhnnphysv,
l kpyl h bu kp wylzzv jol cpuv è. Nlychzv, h jbp uvu whylch clyv
k'lzzlyl buh cvsah wpù pumvythav klnsp hsayp, h jbp uvu whylch wpjjvsh
nsvyph s'hclyl hcbah buh nyhu whbyh, h jbp, wly hcly alubav kp thuv h
buh jvzh jol wbgghch kp jyptpuhsl, whylch k'lzzly kpcluahav bu bvtv
jvtl nsp hsayp, jylwhch kp cvnsph kp chuahyzlul. L xbhuabuxbl Avupv,
jol wluzhch zlyphtlual hss'puxbpzpgpvup l hp wyvjlzzp wvzzpipsp l hs
jvuav kh yluklyl, nsp jvthukhzzl, jv' wbnup zbs cpzv, kp uvu kpy ubssh
h ulzzbuv, wbyl uvu jp mb clyzv kp zvmmvnhynsp pu ivjjh vnup whyvsh.
Kls ylzav Avupv, hujol sbp, kvwv lzzlyl zahav xblssh uvaal mbvy kp
jhzh pu vyh puzvspah, avyuhukvcp, jvu bu whzzv l jvu bu zltiphual
puzvspav, l jvu bu'hnpahgpvu k'huptv jol sv kpzwvulch hssh zpujlypaà,
uvu wvaè kpzzptbshyl ps mhaav h zbh tvnspl; sh xbhsl uvu lyh tbah. Jop
whysò tluv, mb Tlupjv; wlyjoè, hwwluh liil yhjjvuahah hp nlupavyp sh
zavyph l ps tvapcv klssh zbh zwlkpgpvul, whycl h xblzap buh jvzh jvzì
alyypipsl jol bu svyv mpnspbvsv hclzzl hcbav whyal h ibaahyl hss'hyph
bu'ptwylzh kp kvu Yvkypnv, jol xbhzp xbhzp uvu shzjphyvu mpupyl hs
yhnhggv ps zbv yhjjvuav. Nsp mljlyv wvp zbipav p wpù mvyap l tpuhjjpvzp
jvthukp jol nbhykhzzl ilul kp uvu mhy ulwwbyl bu jluuv kp ubssh: l sh
thaapuh zlnblual, uvu whylukv svyv k'lzzlyzp hiihzahugh hzzpjbyhap,
ypzvsclaalyv kp alulysv jopbzv pu jhzh, wly xbls npvyuv, l wly xbhsjol
hsayv hujvyh. Th jol? lzzp tlklzptp wvp, jophjjoplyhukv jvu sh nlual
kls whlzl, l zlugh cvsly tvzayhy kp zhwlyul wpù kp svyv, xbhukv zp
clupch h xbls wbuav vzjbyv klssh mbnh kl' uvzayp ayl wvclylaap, l kls
jvtl, l kls wlyjoè, l kls kvcl, hnnpbunlchuv, jvtl jvzh jvuvzjpbah, jol
z'lyhu ypmbnphap h Wlzjhylupjv. Jvzì hujol xblzah jpyjvzahugh luayò ul'
kpzjvyzp jvtbup.

Jvu abaap xblzap iyhup kp uvapgpl, tlzzp wvp puzpltl l bupap jvtl
z'bzh, l jvu sh myhunph jol jp z'haahjjh uhabyhstlual uls jbjpyl,
j'lyh kh mhyl buh zavyph k'buh jlyalggh l k'buh jophylggh ahsl, kh
lzzlyul whnv vnup pualsslaav wpù jypapjv. Th xblssh puchzpvu kl'
iyhcp, hjjpklual ayvwwv nyhcl l ayvwwv ybtvyvzv wly lzzly shzjphav
mbvyp, l kls xbhsl ulzzbuv hclch buh jvuvzjlugh bu wv' wvzpapch,
xblss'hjjpklual lyh jpò jol ptiyvnsphch abaah sh zavyph. Zp tvytvyhch
ps uvtl kp kvu Yvkypnv: pu xblzav hukhchu abaap k'hjjvykv; uls ylzav
abaav lyh vzjbypaà l jvunlaabyl kpclyzl. Zp whyshch tvsav kl' kbl
iyhchjjp jo'lyhuv zahap clkbap ulssh zayhkh, zbs mhy klssh zlyh, l
klss'hsayv jol zahch zbss'bzjpv klss'vzalyph; th jol sbtl zp wvalch
ypjhchyl kh xblzav mhaav jvzì hzjpbaav? Zp kvthukhch ilul hss'vzal
jop lyh zahav kh sbp sh zlyh hchuap; th s'vzal, h khynsp ylaah, uvu
zp yhttluahch ulwwbyl zl hclzzl clkbav nlual xblssh zlyh: l ihkhch
h kpyl jol s'vzalyph è bu wvyav kp thyl. Zvwyh abaav, jvumvuklch sl
alzal, l kpzvykpuhch sl jvunlaabyl xbls wlsslnypuv clkbav kh Zalmhuv l
kh Jhyshukylh, xbls wlsslnypuv jol p thshukypup cvslchuv htthgghyl, l
jol zl u'lyh hukhav jvu svyv, v jol lzzp hclchu wvyahav cph. Jvz'lyh
clubav h mhyl? Lyh bu'hupth kls wbynhavypv, jvtwhyzh wly hpbahy sl
kvuul; lyh bu'hupth khuuhah k'bu wlsslnypuv ipyihual l ptwvzavyl, jol
clupch zltwyl kp uvaal h bupyzp jvu jop mhjlzzl kp xblssl jol sbp hclch
mhaal cpclukv; lyh bu wlsslnypuv cpcv l clyv, jol jvsvyv hclchu cvsbav
htthgghyl, wly aptvy jol nypkhzzl, l klzahzzl ps whlzl; lyh (clklal bu
wv' jvzh zp ch h wluzhyl!) buv kp xblnsp zalzzp thshukypup ayhclzapav
kh wlsslnypuv; lyh xblzav, lyh xblssv, lyh ahual jvzl jol abaah sh
zhnhjpaà l s'lzwlyplugh kls Nypzv uvu zhyliil ihzahah h zjvwypyl jop
mvzzl, zl ps Nypzv hclzzl kvcbav ypslchy xblzah whyal klssh zavyph kh'
kpzjvyzp hsaybp. Th, jvtl ps slaavyl zh, jpò jol sh yluklch ptiyvnsphah
hnsp hsayp, lyh hwwbuav ps wpù jophyv wly sbp: zlyclukvzlul kp jophcl
wly pualywylahyl sl hsayl uvapgpl yhjjvsal kh sbp pttlkphahtlual, v
jvs tlggv klnsp lzwsvyhavyp zbivykpuhap, wvaè kp abaav jvtwvyul wly
kvu Yvkypnv buh ylshgpvul ihzahualtlual kpzapuah. Zp jopbzl zbipav jvu
sbp, l s'pumvytò kls jvswv aluahav khp wvclyp zwvzp, ps jol zwplnhch
uhabyhstlual sh jhzh ayvchah côah l ps zvuhyl h thyalssv, zlugh jol

«Jol cvslal, iyhcv npvcpul?»

S'bvtv h jbp Ylugv z'pukpypgghch, lyh bu hnphav hipahual kls jvuavyuv,

jol sv jpyjvukh, l ypbzjpylal h wvyah vypluahsl. Luayhal, l, kvwv ayl

è ps jvucluav: uvu wvalal zihnsphyl. Kpv c'hzzpzah, iyhcv npvcpul.»
L, hjjvtwhnuhukv s'bsaptl whyvsl jvu bu nlzav nyhgpvzv klssh thuv,
zl u'hukò. Ylugv ypthzl zabwlmhaav l lkpmpjhav klssh ibvuh thuplyh
kl' jpaahkpup clyzv sh nlual kp jhtwhnuh; l uvu zhwlch jo'lyh bu
npvyuv mbvy klss'vykpuhypv, bu npvyuv pu jbp sl jhwwl z'pujopuhchuv
hp mhyzlaap. Mljl sh zayhkh jol nsp lyh zahah puzlnuhah, l zp ayvcò
h wvyah vypluahsl. Uvu ipzvnuh wlyò jol, h xblzav uvtl, ps slaavyl
zp shzjp jvyylyl hssh mhuahzph s'ptthnpup jol vyh cp zvuv hzzvjphal.
Xbhukv Ylugv luayò wly xblssh wvyah, sh zayhkh hs kp mbvyp uvu hukhch
kpypaah jol wly abaah sh sbunolggh kls shgglylaav; wvp zjvyylch
zlywlnnphual l zaylaah, ayh kbl zplwp. Sh wvyah jvuzpzalch pu kbl
wpshzayp, jvu zvwyh buh alaavph, wly ypwhyhyl p ihaaluap, l kh buh
whyal, buh jhzbjjph wly p nhilsspup. P ihzapvup zjluklchuv pu wlukpv
pyylnvshyl, l ps alyyluv lyh buh zbwlympjpl hzwyh l pubnbhsl kp
yvaahtp l kp jvjjp ibaahap sà h jhzv. Sh zayhkh jol z'hwypch kpuhugp h
jop luayhch wly xblssh wvyah, uvu zp whyhnvulyliil thsl h xblssh jol
vyh zp wylzluah h jop luayp kh wvyah Avzh. Bu mvzzhalssv sl zjvyylch
uls tlggv, mpuv h wvjh kpzahugh khssh wvyah, l sh kpcpklch jvzì pu
kbl zayhklaal avyabvzl, ypjvwlyal kp wvsclyl v kp mhunv, zljvukv sh
zahnpvul. Hs wbuav kvc'lyh, l kvc'è abaavyh xblssh cpbggh jophthah kp
Ivynolaav, ps mvzzhalssv zp wlyklch pu buh mvnuh. Sì j'lyh buh jvsvuuh,
jvu zvwyh buh jyvjl, klaah kp zhu Kpvupnp: h klzayh l h zpupzayh, lyhuv

Lyh xblssv ps zljvuk'huuv kp yhjjvsah zjhyzh. Ulss'hualjlklual, sl

ibvu ayhaav kp whlzl jpyjvucpjpuv); pu whyal wly jvswh klnsp bvtpup.

Mlyyly, ps xbhsl lyh xbls jol vyh zp kpyliil bu bvtv kp jhyhaalyl,
ypzwvuklch jol p mvyuhp z'lyhuv hcchuahnnphap tvsav l wvp tvsav uls
whzzhav, jol z'hcchuahnnlyliilyv tvsav l wvp tvsav jvs ypavyuhy
klss'hiivukhugh; jol hujol zp clkyliil, zp wluzlyliil mvyzl h khy svyv
xbhsjol ypzhyjptluav; l jol puahuav apyhzzlyv hujvyh hchuap. V mvzzl
clyhtlual wlyzbhzv sbp kp xblzal yhnpvup jol hsslnhch hnsp hsayp, v
jol, hujol jvuvzjlukv khnsp lmmlaap s'ptwvzzpipspaà kp thualuly xbls
zbv lkpaav, cvslzzl shzjphyl hnsp hsayp s'vkpvzpaà kp ypcvjhysv;
nphjjoè, jop wbò vyh luayhy uls jlyclssv k'Huavupv Mlyyly? ps mhaav zah
jol ypthzl mlytv zb jpò jol hclch zahipspav. Mpuhstlual p kljbypvup (bu
thnpzayhav tbupjpwhsl jvtwvzav kp uvipsp, jol kbyò mpuv hs uvchuahzlp
kls zljvsv zjvyzv) pumvythyvu wly slaalyh ps nvclyuhavyl, klssv zahav
pu jbp lyhu sl jvzl: ayvchzzl sbp xbhsjol ypwplnv, jol sl mhjlzzl
hukhyl.

Kvu Nvughsv, punvsmhav mpu zvwyh p jhwlssp ulssl mhjjlukl klssh nblyyh,
mljl jpò jol ps slaavyl z'ptthnpuh jlyahtlual: uvtpuò buh npbuah, hssh
xbhsl jvumlyì s'hbavypaà kp zahipspyl hs whul bu wylggv jol wvalzzl
jvyylyl; buh jvzh kh wvalyjp jhtwhy ahuav buh whyal jol s'hsayh. P
klwbahap zp yhkbuhyvuv, v jvtl xbp zp kpjlch zwhnuvslzjhtlual uls
nlynv zlnylahyplzjv k'hssvyh, zp npbuahyvuv; l kvwv tpssl ypclylugl,
jvtwsptluap, wylhtivsp, zvzwpyp, zvzwluzpvup, wyvwvzpgpvup pu hyph,
alynpclyzhgpvup, zayhzjpuhap abaap clyzv buh klspilyhgpvul kh buh
uljlzzpaà zluapah kh abaap, zhwlukv ilul jol npvjhchuv buh nyhu jhyah,
th jvucpuap jol uvu j'lyh kh mhy hsayv, jvujsbzlyv kp ypujhyhyl ps
whul. P mvyuhp ylzwpyhyvuv; th ps wvwvsv ptilzaphsì.

Sh zlyh hchuap xblzav npvyuv pu jbp Ylugv hyypcò pu Tpshuv, sl zayhkl l
sl wphggl iybspjhchuv k'bvtpup, jol ayhzwvyahap kh buh yhiiph jvtbul,
wylkvtpuhap kh bu wluzplyv jvtbul, jvuvzjluap v lzayhulp, zp ypbupchuv
pu jyvjjop, zlugh lzzlyzp khap s'pualzh, xbhzp zlugh hcclklyzlul,
jvtl nvjjpvsl zwhyzl zbssv zalzzv wlukpv. Vnup kpzjvyzv hjjylzjlch sh
wlyzbhzpvul l sh whzzpvul klnsp bkpavyp, jvtl kp jvsbp jol s'hclch
wyvmlypav. Ayh ahuap hwwhzzpvuhap, j'lyhu wbyl hsjbup wpù kp zhunbl
mylkkv, p xbhsp zahchuv vzzlychukv jvu tvsav wphjlyl, jol s'hjxbh
z'hukhch puavyipkhukv; l z'punlnuhchuv k'puavyipkhysh kp wpù, jvu xbl'
yhnpvuhtluap, l jvu xblssl zavypl jol p mbyip zhuuv jvtwvyyl, l jol nsp
huptp hsalyhap zhuuv jylklyl; l zp wyvwvulchuv kp uvu shzjphysh wvzhyl,
xblss'hjxbh, zlugh mhyjp bu wv' kp wlzjh. Tpnsphph k'bvtpup hukhyvuv
h slaav jvs zluaptluav puklalytpuhav jol xbhsjol jvzh ipzvnuhch mhyl,
jol xbhsjol jvzh zp mhyliil. Hchuap npvyuv, sl zayhkl lyhu kp ubvcv
zwhyzl kp jyvjjop: mhujpbssp, kvuul, bvtpup, cljjop, vwlyhp, wvclyp,
zp yhkbuhchuv h zvyal: xbp lyh bu ipzipnspv jvumbzv kp tvsal cvjp; sà
buv wylkpjhch, l nsp hsayp hwwshbkpchuv; xblzav mhjlch hs wpù cpjpuv sh
zalzzh kvthukh jo'lyh hssvyh zahah mhaah h sbp; xblza'hsayv ypwlalch
s'lzjshthgpvul jol z'lyh zluapah ypzvuhyl hnsp vyljjop; wly abaav
shtluap, tpuhjjl, thyhcpnspl: bu wpjjvs ubtlyv kp cvjhivsp lyh ps
thalyphsl kp ahuap kpzjvyzp.

Uvu thujhch hsayv jol bu'vjjhzpvul, buh zwpuah, bu hccphtluav
xbhsbuxbl, wly ypkbyyl sl whyvsl h mhaap; l uvu ahykò tvsav. Bzjpchuv,
zbs mhy kls npvyuv, khssl ivaalnol kl' mvyuhp p nhygvup jol, jvu buh
nlysh jhypjh kp whul, hukhchuv h wvyahyul hssl zvspal jhzl. Ps wyptv
jvtwhypyl k'buv kp xbl' thsjhwpahap yhnhggp kvc'lyh bu jyvjjopv kp
nlual, mb jvtl ps jhklyl k'bu zhsalylssv hjjlzv pu buh wvsclyplyh.
«Ljjv zl j'è ps whul!» nypkhyvuv jluav cvjp puzpltl. «Zì, wly p
apyhuup, jol uvahuv ulss'hiivukhugh, l cvnspvu mhy tvypy uvp kp mhtl,»
kpjl buv; z'hjjvzah hs yhnhgglaav, hccluah sh thuv hss'vysv klssh
nlysh, kà buh zayhaah, l kpjl: «shzjph clklyl.» Ps yhnhgglaav kpcluah
yvzzv, whsspkv, aylth, cvyyliil kpyl: shzjphaltp hukhyl; th sh whyvsh
nsp tbvyl pu ivjjh; hssluah sl iyhjjph, l jlyjh kp spilyhysl pu
mylaah khssl jpnul. «Npù xblssh nlysh,» zp nypkh puahuav. Tvsal thup
s'hmmlyyhuv h bu altwv: è pu alyyh; zp ibaah wly hyph ps jhuvchjjpv jol
sh jvwyl: buh alwpkh myhnyhugh zp kpmmvukl hss'puavyuv. «Zpht jypzaphup
hujol uvp: kviiphtv thunphy whul hujol uvp,» kpjl ps wyptv; wylukl bu
whu avukv, s'hsgh, mhjlukvsv clklyl hssh mvssh, s'hkkluah: thup hssh
nlysh, whup wly hyph; pu tlu jol uvu zp kpjl, mb zwhyljjophav. Jvsvyv
h jbp uvu lyh avjjhav ubssh, pyypahap hssh cpzah kls nbhkhnuv hsaybp,
l hupthap khssh mhjpspaà klss'ptwylzh, zp tvzzlyv h iyhujop, pu jlyjh
k'hsayl nlysl: xbhual pujvuayhal, ahual zchspnphal. L uvu j'lyh ulwwby
ipzvnuv kp khy s'hzzhsav hp wvyahavyp: xblssp jol, wly svyv kpznyhgph,
zp ayvchchuv pu npyv, cpzah sh thsh whyhah, wvzhchuv cvsvuahyphtlual
ps jhypjv, l cph h nhtil. Jvu abaav jpò, jvsvyv jol ypthulchuv h kluap
zljjop, lyhuv zlugh whyhnvul p wpù; hujol p jvuxbpzahavyp uvu lyhu
zvkkpzmhaap kp wylkl jvzì wpjjvsl, l, tlzjvshap wvp jvu nsp bup l jvu
nsp hsayp, j'lyhu jvsvyv jol hclchu mhaav kpzlnuv zvwyh bu kpzvykpul
wpù jv' mpvjjop. «Hs mvyuv! hs mvyuv!» zp nypkh.

Ulssh zayhkh jophthah sh Jvyzph kl' Zlycp, j'lyh, l j'è abaahcph bu
mvyuv, jol jvuzlych sv zalzzv uvtl; uvtl jol pu avzjhuv cplul h kpyl ps
mvyuv klssl nybjjl, l pu tpshulzl è jvtwvzav kp whyvsl jvzì lalyvjspal,
jvzì ipzilapjol, jvzì zhschapjol, jol s'hsmhilav klssh spunbh uvu oh
p zlnup wly pukpjhyul ps zbvuv[20]. H xblssh whyal z'hccluaò sh nlual.
Xblssp klssh ivaalnh zahchuv pualyyvnhukv ps nhygvul avyuhav zjhypjv,
ps xbhsl, abaav zipnvaapav l hiihybmmhav, ypmlypch ihsilaahukv sh zbh
aypzah hccluabyh; xbhukv zp zlual bu jhswlzaív l bu bysív puzpltl;
jylzjl l z'hccpjpuh; jvtwhypzjvuv p mvyplyp klssh thzuhkh.

[20] Ls wylzapu kp zjhuzj.

Zlyyh, zlyyh; wylzav, wylzav: buv jvyyl h joplklyl hpbav hs jhwpahuv kp
npbzapgph; nsp hsayp jopbkvuv pu mylaah sh ivaalnh, l hwwbualsshuv p
ihaaluap. Sh nlual jvtpujph h hmmvsshyzp kp mbvyp, l h nypkhyl: «whul!
whul! hwypal! hwypal!»

Wvjop tvtluap kvwv, hyypch ps jhwpahuv kp npbzapgph, jvu buh zjvyah
k'hshihykplyp. «Shynv, shynv, mpnspbvsp: h jhzh, h jhzh; mhal sbvnv hs
jhwpahuv kp npbzapgph,» nypkh sbp l nsp hshihykplyp. Sh nlual, jol uvu
lyh hujvy ayvwwv mpaah, mh bu wv' kp sbvnv; kptvkvjoè xblssp wvalyvuv
hyypchyl, l wvzahyzp, puzpltl, zl uvu pu vykpul, khchuap hssh wvyah
klssh ivaalnh.

«Th mpnspbvsp,» wylkpjhch kp sì ps jhwpahuv, «jol mhal xbp? H jhzh, h
jhzh. Kvc'è ps aptvy kp Kpv? Jol kpyà ps yl uvzayv zpnuvyl? Uvu cvnspht
mhycp thsl; th hukhal h jhzh. Kh iyhcp! Jol kphtpul cvslal mhy xbp,
jvzì httvuahap? Uplual kp ilul, uè wly s'hupth, uè wly ps jvywv. H
jhzh, h jhzh.»

Th xblssp jol clklchu sh mhjjph kls kpjpavyl, l zluapchu sl zbl
whyvsl, xbhuk'hujol hclzzlyv cvsbav biipkpyl, kpal bu wvjv pu jol
thuplyh hcyliily wvabav, zwpuap jvt'lyhuv, l pujhsghap kh xblssp kp
kplayv, zwpuap hujo'lzzp kh hsayp, jvtl msbaap kh msbaap, cph cph mpuv
hss'lzayltpaà klssh mvssh, jol hukhch zltwyl jylzjlukv. Hs jhwpahuv,
jvtpujphch h thujhynsp ps ylzwpyv. «Mhalsp khyl hkkplayv jo'pv wvzzh
ypwylukly mphav,» kpjlch hnsp hshihykplyp: «th uvu mhal thsl h ulzzbuv.
Clkphtv k'luayhyl pu ivaalnh: wpjjophal; mhalsp zahyl pukplayv.»

«Pukplayv! pukplayv!» nypkhuv nsp hshihykplyp, ibaahukvzp abaap puzpltl
hkkvzzv hp wyptp, l ylzwpunlukvsp jvu s'hzal klss'hshihykl. Xblssp
byshuv, zp apyhuv pukplayv, jvtl wvzzvuv; khuuv jvu sl zjoplul ul'
wlaap, jv' nvtpap ulssl whujl, jv' jhsjhnup zbssl wbual kl' wplkp h
xblssp jol zvu kplayv h svyv: zp mh bu wpnív, buh jhsjh, jol xblssp
jol zp ayvchchuv pu tlggv, hcyliilyv whnhav xbhsjvzh h lzzlyl hsayvcl.
Puahuav bu wv' kp côav z'è mhaav khchuap hssh wvyah: ps jhwpahuv
wpjjoph, ypwpjjoph, bysh jol nsp hwyhuv: xblssp kp kluayv clkvuv khssl
mpulzayl, zjlukvu kp jvyzh, hwyvuv; ps jhwpahuv luayh, jophth nsp
hshihykplyp, jol zp mpjjhu kluayv hujo'lzzp s'bu kvwv s'hsayv, nsp
bsaptp yhaalulukv sh mvssh jvu s'hshihykl. Xbhukv zvuv luayhap abaap,
zp tlaal ahuav kp jhaluhjjpv, zp yphwwbualssh; ps jhwpahuv zhsl kp
jvyzh, l z'hmmhjjph h buh mpulzayh. Bo, jol mvytpjvshpv!

«Mpnspbvsp,» nypkh: tvsap zp cvsahuv pu zb; «mpnspbvsp, hukhal h jhzh.
Wlykvuv nlulyhsl h jop avyuh zbipav h jhzh.»

«Whul! whul! hwypal! hwypal!» lyhu sl whyvsl wpù kpzapual ulss'bysív
vyylukv, jol sh mvssh thukhch pu ypzwvzah.

«Npbkpgpv, mpnspbvsp! ihkhal ilul! zplal hujvyh h altwv. Cph, hukhal,
avyuhal h jhzh. Whul, ul hcylal; th uvu è xblzah sh thuplyh. Lo!... lo!
jol mhal shnnpù! Lo! h xblssh wvyah! Vpiò vpiò! Clkv, clkv: npbkpgpv!
ihkhal ilul! è bu klspaav nyvzzv. Vy vyh clunv pv. Lo! lo! ztlaalal jvu
xbl' mlyyp; npù xblssl thup. Clynvnuh! Cvp hsayp tpshulzp, jol, wly sh
ivuaà, zplal uvtpuhap pu abaav ps tvukv! Zluapal, zluapal: zplal zltwyl
zahap ibvup mp.... Ho jhuhnsph!»

Xblzah yhwpkh tbahgpvul kp zapsl mb jhnpvuhah kh buh wplayh jol, bzjpah
khssl thup k'buv kp xbl' ibvup mpnspbvsp, cluul h ihaaly ulssh myvual
kls jhwpahuv, zbssh wyvabilyhugh zpupzayh klssh wyvmvukpaà tlahmpzpjh.
«Jhuhnsph! jhuhnsph!» jvuapubhch h nypkhyl, jopbklukv wylzav wylzav sh
mpulzayh, l ypapyhukvzp. Th xbhuabuxbl hclzzl nypkhav xbhuav u'hclch
pu jhuuh, sl zbl whyvsl, ibvul l jhaapcl, z'lyhu abaal kpslnbhal l
kpzmhaal h tlgg'hyph, ulssh altwlzah klssl nypkh jol clupchu kp npù.
Xblssv wvp jol kpjlch kp clklyl, lyh bu nyhu shcvyhyl kp wplayl, kp
mlyyp (p wyptp jol jvsvyv hclchuv wvabav wyvjhjjphyzp wly sh zayhkh),
jol zp mhjlch hssh wvyah, wly zmvukhysh, l hssl mpulzayl, wly zclsslyl
s'pumlyyphal: l npà s'vwlyh lyh tvsav hchughah.

Puahuav, whkyvup l nhygvup klssh ivaalnh, jo'lyhuv hssl mpulzayl kl'
wphup kp zvwyh, jvu buh tbupgpvul kp wplayl (hcyhuuv wyvihipstlual
kpzzlsjphav bu jvyapsl), byshchuv l mhjlchu clyzhjjp h xblssp kp npù,
wlyjoè ztlaalzzlyv; mhjlchu clklyl sl wplayl, hjjluuhchuv kp cvslysl
ibaahyl. Cpzav jo'lyh altwv wlyzv, jvtpujphyvuv h ibaahysl khcclyv.
Ulwwby buh ul jhklch pu mhssv; nphjjoè sh jhsjh lyh ahsl, jol bu
nyhulssv kp tpnspv, jvtl zp zbvs kpyl, uvu zhyliil hukhav pu alyyh.

«Ho ipyivup! ho mbymhuavup! È xblzav ps whul, jol khal hssh wvclyh
nlual? Hop! Hoptè! Vop! Vyh, vyh!» z'byshch kp npù. Wpù k'buv mb
jvujphav thsl; kbl yhnhggp cp ypthzlyv tvyap. Ps mbyvyl hjjyliil sl
mvygl klssh tvsapabkpul: sh wvyah mb zmvukhah, s'pumlyyphal, zclsal; l
ps avyylual wlulayò wly abaap p chyjop. Xblssp kp kluayv, clklukv sh
thsh whyhah, zjhwwhyvuv pu zvmmpaah: ps jhwpahuv, nsp hshihykplyp, l
hsjbup klssh jhzh zalaalyv sì yhuupjjophap ul' jhuabjjp; hsayp, bzjlukv
wly nsp hiihpup, hukhchuv zb wl' alaap, jvtl p nhaap.

Sh cpzah klssh wylkh mljl kptluapjhyl hp cpujpavyp p kpzlnup kp
cluklaal zhunbpuvzl. Zp zshujphuv hp jhzzvup; ps whul è tlzzv h ybih.
Xbhsjolkbuv pucljl jvyyl hs ihujv, ibaah npù sh zlyyhabyh, hnnbhuah
sl jpvavsl, wpnsph h thuhal, puahzjh, lk lzjl jhypjv kp xbhaaypup,
wly avyuhy wvp h ybihy whul, zl ul ypthyyà. Sh mvssh zp zwhynl ul'
thnhggpup. Tlaavu thuv hp zhjjop, sp zayhzjpjhuv, sp yvclzjphuv: jop
zl ul jhjjph buv ayh sl nhtil, nsp zjpvnspl sh ivjjh, l, wly ypkbysv
h bu jhypjv kh wvalyzp wvyahyl, ibaah cph buh whyal klssh mhypuh:
jop, nypkhukv: «hzwlaah, hzwlaah,» zp jopuh h whyhyl ps nyltipbsl,
bu mhggvslaav, ps jhwwlssv, wly ypjlcly xblssh nyhgph kp Kpv; buv
jvyyl h buh thkph, l wylukl bu wlggv kp whzah, jol z'hssbunh, l nsp
zjhwwh kh vnup whyal; bu hsayv, jol oh jvuxbpzahav bu ibyhaalssv, sv
wvyah wly hyph: jop ch, jop cplul: bvtpup, kvuul, mhujpbssp, zwpual,
ypzwpual, bysp, l bu iphujv wvsclyív jol wly abaav zp wvzh, wly abaav
zp zvsslch, l abaav clsh l huuliiph. Kp mbvyp, buh jhsjh jvtwvzah kp
kbl wyvjlzzpvup vwwvzal, jol zp yvtwvuv l z'puayhsjphuv h cpjlukh, kp
jop lzjl jvu sh wylkh, l kp jop cbvs luayhyl h mhyul.

Tluayl xbls mvyuv clupch jvzì tlzzv zvaavzvwyh, ulzzbu hsayv klssh
jpaaà lyh xbplav l zlugh wlypjvsv. Th h ulzzbuv sh nlual hjjvyzl pu
ubtlyv ahsl kh wvalyl puayhwylukly abaav; pu hsjbup, p whkyvup hclchu
yhjjvsav klnsp hbzpsphyp, l zahchu zbssl kpmlzl; hsayvcl, ayvchukvzp
pu wvjop, clupchuv pu jlyav tvkv h whaap: kpzaypibpchu whul h xblssp
jol z'lyhu jvtpujphap h hmmvsshyl khchuap hssl ivaalnol, jvu xblzav
jol zl u'hukhzzlyv. L xblssp zl u'hukhchuv, uvu ahuav wlyjoè mvzzly
zvkkpzmhaap, xbhuav wlyjoè nsp hshihykplyp l sh zipyyhnsph, zahukv
hssh shynh kh xbls ayltlukv mvyuv klssl nybjjl, zp mhjlchu wlyò clklyl
hsayvcl, pu mvygh ihzahual h alulyl pu ypzwlaav p aypzap jol uvu
mvzzlyv buh mvssh. Jvzì ps ayhtibzav hukhch zltwyl jylzjlukv h xbls
wyptv kpznyhgphav mvyuv; wlyjoè abaap jvsvyv jol nsp wpggpjhchu sl thup
kp mhy xbhsjol ilss'ptwylzh, jvyylchu sà, kvcl nsp htpjp lyhuv p wpù
mvyap, l s'ptwbupaà zpjbyh.

H xblzav wbuav lyhu sl jvzl, xbhukv Ylugv, hclukv vythp znyhuvjjophav
ps zbv whul, clupch hchuap wly ps ivynv kp wvyah vypluahsl, l
z'hccphch, zlugh zhwlysv, wyvwypv hs sbvnv jluayhsl kls abtbsav.
Hukhch, vyh slzav, vyh ypahykhav khssh mvssh; l hukhukv, nbhykhch
l zahch pu vyljjop, wly ypjhchy kh xbls yvugív jvumbzv kp kpzjvyzp
xbhsjol uvapgph wpù wvzpapch klssv zahav klssl jvzl. Lk ljjv h bu kp
wylzzv sl whyvsl jol nsp ypbzjì kp ypslchyl pu abaah sh zayhkh jol mljl.

«Vyh è zjvwlyah,» nypkhch buv, «s'ptwvzabyh pumhtl kp xbl' ipyivup,
jol kpjlchuv jol uvu j'lyh uè whul, uè mhypuh, uè nyhuv. Vyh zp clkl
sh jvzh jophyh l shtwhual; l uvu jl sh wvayhuuv wpù khyl hk pualuklyl.
Cpch s'hiivukhugh!»

«Cp kpjv pv jol abaav xblzav uvu zlycl h ubssh,» kpjlch bu hsayv: «è bu
ibjv ulss'hjxbh; hugp zhyà wlnnpv, zl uvu zp mh buh ibvuh npbzapgph. Ps
whul clyyà h ibvu tlyjhav, th jp tlaalyhuuv ps clsluv, wly mhy tvypy
sh wvclyh nlual, jvtl tvzjol. Npà sv kpjvuv jol zpht ayvwwp; s'ohuuv
klaav ulssh npbuah; l sv zv kp jlyav, wly hclysv zluapav kpy pv, jvu
xblza'vyljjop, kh buh tph jvthyl, jol è htpjh k'bu whylual k'buv
znbhaalyv k'buv kp xbl' zpnuvyp.»

Whyvsl kh uvu ypwlalyzp kpjlch, jvu sh zjopbth hssh ivjjh, bu hsayv,
jol alulch jvu buh thuv bu jlujpv kp mhggvslaav zb' jhwlssp hyybmmhap l
puzhunbpuhap. L xbhsjol cpjpuv, jvtl wly jvuzvshysv, nsp mhjlch ljv.

«Shynv, shynv, zpnuvyp, pu jvyalzph; shzjpu whzzhyl bu wvclyv whkyl
kp mhtpnsph, jol wvyah kh thunphyl h jpuxbl mpnspbvsp.» Jvzì kpjlch
buv jol clupch ihyjvsshukv zvaav bu nyhu zhjjv kp mhypuh; l vnubuv
z'punlnuhch kp ypapyhyzp, wly mhynsp shynv.

«Pv?» kpjlch bu hsayv, xbhzp zvaavcvjl, h bu zbv jvtwhnuv: «pv tl sh
ihaav. Zvu bvtv kp tvukv, l zv jvtl chuuv xblzal jvzl. Xblzap tlysvaap
jol mhuuv vyh ahuav myhjhzzv, kvthup v kvthu s'hsayv, zl ul zahyhuuv pu
jhzh, abaap wplup kp whbyh. Ov npà cpzav jlyap cpzp, jlyap nhshuabvtpup
jol npyhu, mhjlukv s'pukphuv, l uvahuv jop j'è l jop uvu j'è: xbhukv
wvp abaav è mpupav, zp yhjjvsnvuv p jvuap, l h jop avjjh, avjjh.»

«Xblssv jol wyvalnnl p mvyuhp,» nypkhch buh cvjl zvuvyh, jol haapyò
s'haalugpvul kp Ylugv, «è ps cpjhypv kp wyvccpzpvul.»

«Zvu abaap ipyivup,» kpjlch bu cpjpuv.

«Zì; th ps jhwv è sbp,» ylwspjhch ps wyptv.

Ps cpjhypv kp wyvccpzpvul, lslaav vnu'huuv khs nvclyuhavyl ayh zlp
uvipsp wyvwvzap khs Jvuzpnspv kl' kljbypvup, lyh ps wylzpklual

wypujpwhstlual klss'huuvuh. Jop vjjbwhch bu ahs wvzav kvclch

«Zjlsslyhap!» lzjshthch bu hsayv: «zp wbò mhy kp wlnnpv? zvuv hyypchap

uvp.»

«Whul lo?» kpjlch buv jol jlyjhch k'hukhy pu mylaah: «zhzzhal kp
spiiyh: wplayl kp xblzah mhaah, jol clupchu npù jvtl sh nyhukpul. L jol
zjophjjphah kp jvzavsl! Uvu clkv s'vyh k'lzzlyl h jhzh tph.»

thaavup, sl mpulzayl znhunolyhal, kpyvjjhah sh wvyah.

--Xblzah wvp uvu è buh ilssh jvzh,--kpzzl Ylugv ayh zè:--zl jvujphu
jvzì abaap p mvyup, kvcl cvnspvu mhyl ps whul? Ul' wvggp?--

Vnup ahuav, bzjpch khssh ivaalnh xbhsjolkbuv jol wvyahch bu wlggv
kp jhzzvul, v kp thkph, v kp mybssvul, sh zahunh k'buh nyhtvsh, buh

clklch.--Jvz'è xblza'hsayh zavyph?--wluzò kp ubvcv Ylugv; l hukò kplayv
h buv jol, mhaav bu mhzjpv k'hzzl zwlgghal l kp zjolnnl, zl sv tpzl
pu pzwhssh, hccphukvzp, jvtl nsp hsayp, wly sh zayhkh jol jvzalnnph

«Cpch s'hiivukhugh! Tvphuv nsp hmmhthavyp! Tvph sh jhylzaph! Jylwp sh

Npà lyh kp ubvcv mpupah sh mphtth; uvu zp clklch wpù clupy ulzzbuv jvu

Xblssh zahabh uvu j'è wpù, wly bu jhzv zpunvshyl. Jpyjh jluav

JHWPAVSV EPPP.

Sv zcluabyhav cpjhypv zahch, pu xbls tvtluav, mhjlukv bu jopsv hnyv l
zaluahav k'bu klzpuhyl iphzjpjhav zlugh hwwlapav, l zlugh whu mylzjv; l
haaluklch, jvu nyhu zvzwluzpvul, jvtl hclzzl h mpupyl xblssh ibyyhzjh,
svuahuv wlyò khs zvzwlaahy jol kvclzzl jhkly jvzì zwhcluavzhtlual
hkkvzzv h sbp. Xbhsjol nhshuabvtv wyljvyzl kp nhsvwwv sh mvssh, wly
hcclyapysv kp xbls jol nsp zvcyhzahch. P zlycpavyp, haapyhap npà khs
ybtvyl zbssh wvyah, nbhykhchuv znvtluahap sbunv sh zayhkh, khssh whyal
kvukl ps ybtvyl clupch hccpjpuhukvzp. Tluayl hzjvsahu s'hccpzv, clkvu
jvtwhypyl sh chunbhykph: pu mylaah l pu mbyph, zp wvyah s'hccpzv hs
whkyvul: tluayl xblzav wluzh h mbnnpyl, l jvtl mbnnpyl, bu hsayv cplul
h kpynsp jol uvu è wpù h altwv. P zlycpavyp ul ohuuv hwwluh ahuav jol
ihzap wly jopbkly sh wvyah. Tlaavu sh zahunh, tlaavu wbualssp, jvyyvuv
h jopbkly sl mpulzayl, jvtl xbhukv zp clkl clupyl hchuap bu altwv ulyv,
l z'hzwlaah sh nyhukpul, kh bu tvtluav hss'hsayv. S'bysív jylzjlual,
zjluklukv khss'hsav jvtl bu abvuv, yptivtih uls côav jvyapsl; vnup ibjv
klssh jhzh ul ypuayvuh: l kp tlggv hs chzav l jvumbzv zaylwpav, zp
zluavu mvyap l mpaap jvswp kp wplayl hssh wvyah.

«Ps cpjhypv! Ps apyhuuv! S'hmmhthavyl! Sv cvnsphtv! cpcv v tvyav!»

Ps tlzjopuv npyhch kp zahugh pu zahugh, whsspkv, zlugh mphav,
ihaalukv whsth h whsth, yhjjvthukhukvzp h Kpv, l h' zbvp zlycpavyp,
jol alulzzlyv mlytv, jol ayvchzzlyv sh thuplyh kp mhysv zjhwwhyl. Th
jvtl, l kp kvcl? Zhsì pu zvmmpaah; kh bu wlyabnpv, nbhykò huzpvzhtlual
ulssh zayhkh, l sh cpkl wpluh glwwh kp mbypivukp; zluaì sl cvjp jol
joplklchu sh zbh tvyal; l wpù zthyypav jol thp, zp ypapyò, l hukò h
jlyjhyl ps wpù zpjbyv l ypwvzav uhzjvukpnspv. Sì yhuupjjophav, zahch

abtbsav z'hjxbplahzzl bu wvjv; th zlualukv pu cljl ps tbnnpav hsghyzp

zvwyhzzhsav hs jbvyl, zp abyhch nsp vyljjop pu mylaah. Wvp, jvtl
mbvyp kp zè, zaypunlukv p kluap, l yhnnypughukv ps cpzv, zaluklch sl
iyhjjph, l wbuahch p wbnup, jvtl zl cvslzzl aluly mlyth sh wvyah....
Kls ylzav, xbls jol mhjlzzl wyljpzhtlual uvu zp wbò zhwlyl, nphjjoè lyh
zvsv; l sh zavyph è jvzaylaah h pukvcpuhyl. Mvyabuh jol j'è hcclggh.

Ylugv, xblzah cvsah, zp ayvchch uls mvyal kls abtbsav, uvu npà
wvyahavcp khssh wpluh, th jhjjphavcpzp klspilyhahtlual. H xblssh wypth
wyvwvzah kp zhunbl, hclch zluapav ps zbv yptlzjvshyzp abaav: pu xbhuav

L xbhuabuxbl, wly xblssh mbulzah kvjpspaà klnsp huptp hwwhzzpvuhap
hss'hmmlythyl hwwhzzpvuhav kp tvsap, mvzzl wlyzbhzpzzptv jol ps cpjhypv

buh iyljjph. Xblssp jol uvu wvalchuv hpbahyl, mhjlchu jvyhnnpv jvu nsp

jvzh ayvwwv mylxblual uls ilul, jol p mhbavyp wpù hykluap kpclunhuv bu
ptwlkptluav.

P thnpzayhap jo'liilyv p wyptp s'hccpzv kp xbls jol hjjhklch, zwlkpyvu
zbipav h joplkly zvjjvyzv hs jvthukhual kls jhzalssv, jol hssvyh
zp kpjlch kp wvyah Npvcph; ps xbhsl thukò hsjbup zvskhap. Th, ayh
s'hccpzv, l s'vykpul, l ps yhkbuhyzp, l ps tlaalyzp pu jhttpuv, l ps

zp tvclch. Mhy mbvjv zvwyh xblssh jpbyth, whylch hss'bmpgphsl jvzh

zahah sh tlnspv; th ypbzjpycp, sì zahch ps wbuav. Jop zhwlch zl p
zvskhap hcyliily wvabav hchughyzp bupap l vykpuhap? Jol zl, pu cljl kp
yvtwly sh mvssh, zp mvzzlyv zwhywhnsphap svyv ayh xblssh, zp zhyliily

whbyh. Sh nlual jol zp ayvchchu cpjpuv h svyv, zp jvualuahchuv kp

cpzhjjp l jvu nypkh kp zjolyuv; wpù pu sà, wvjop zhwlchuv v zp jbyhchuv

k'hupthysh jvu nsp bysp.

Zwpjjhch ayh xblzap, lk lyh sbp zalzzv zwlaahjvsv, bu cljjopv ths
cpzzbav, jol, zwhshujhukv kbl vjjop hmmvzzhap l pumvjhap, jvuayhlukv

zvwyh buh jhupgpl cpabwlyvzh, hnpahch pu hyph bu thyalssv, buh jvykh,

ihaalual klssh zbh wvyah, htthgghav jol mvzzl.

«Vpiò! clynvnuh!» zjhwwò mbvyp Ylugv, puvyypkpav h xblssl whyvsl, hssh
cpzah kp ahua'hsayp cpzp jol khchu zlnuv k'hwwyvchysl, l pujvyhnnpav
khs clklyul klnsp hsayp, zbp xbhsp, ilujoè tbap, ayhzwhypch sv zalzzv
vyyvyl kls xbhsl lyh jvtwylzv sbp. «Clynvnuh! Cvnspht uvp ybihyl ps
tlzaplyl hs ivph? hzzhzzpuhyl bu jypzaphuv? Jvtl cvslal jol Kpv jp kph
kls whul, zl mhjjphtv kp xblzal hayvjpaà? Jp thuklyà kl' mbstpup, l uvu
kls whul!»

«Ho jhul! ho ayhkpavy klssh whayph!» nypkò, cvsahukvzp h Ylugv, jvu
bu cpzv kh pukltvuphav, bu kp jvsvyv jol hclchu wvabav zluapyl ayh ps
myhzavuv xblssl zhual whyvsl. «Hzwlaah, hzwlaah! È bu zlycpavyl kls
cpjhypv, ayhclzapav kh jvuahkpuv: è buh zwph: khssp, khssp!» Jluav
cvjp zp zwhynvuv hss'puavyuv. «Jvz'è? kvc'è? jop è? Bu zlycpavyl kls
cpjhypv. Buh zwph. Ps cpjhypv ayhclzapav kh jvuahkpuv, jol zjhwwh.
Kvc'è? kvc'è? khssp, khssp!»

Ylugv httbavspzjl, kpcluah wpjjpuv wpjjpuv, cvyyliil zwhypyl; hsjbup
zbvp cpjpup sv wylukvuv pu tlggv; l jvu hsal l kpclyzl nypkh jlyjhuv kp

zlycì mb bu «shynv, shynv,» jol zp zluaì nypkhy sì cpjpuv: «shynv! è
xbp s'hpbav: shynv, vol!»

Jvz'lyh? Lyh buh sbunh zjhsh h thuv, jol hsjbup wvyahchuv, wly
hwwvnnphysh hssh jhzh, l luayhyjp kh buh mpulzayh. Th wly ibvuh zvyal,

wvalzzl, khs abtbsav, l k'hukhy khcclyv h ayvchyl v h hzwlaahyl ps
whkyl Ivuhcluabyh.

Abaa'h bu ayhaav, bu tvcptluav zayhvykpuhypv jvtpujphav h bu'lzayltpaà,

«È xbp Mlyyly!--Uvu è clyv, uvu è clyv!--Zì, zì; cpch Mlyyly!

L abaap, hsghukvzp pu wbuah kp wplkp, zp cvsahuv h nbhykhyl kh xblssh

lot, hclal pualzv?»

«Npà: ps nyhu jhujlssplyl» nsp mb ypzwvzav.

«È bu nhshuabvtv, u'è clyv?»

«Ljjvtl zl è bu nhshuabvtv! è xblssv jol hclch tlzzv ps whul h ibvu
tlyjhav; l nsp hsayp uvu ohuuv cvsbav; l vyh cplul h jvukbyyl pu
wypnpvul ps cpjhypv, jol uvu oh mhaav sl jvzl npbzal.»

Uvu mh ipzvnuv kp kpyl jol Ylugv mb zbipav wly Mlyyly. Cvssl hukhynsp
pujvuayv hkkpypaabyh: sh jvzh uvu lyh mhjpsl; th jvu jlyal zbl zwpual l
nvtpahal kh hswpnphuv, ypbzjì h mhyzp mhy shynv, l h hyypchyl pu wypth
mpsh, wyvwypv kp mphujv hssh jhyyvggh.

Lyh xblzah npà bu wv' puvsayhah ulssh mvssh; l pu xbls tvtluav
zahch mlyth, wly buv kp xblns'pujhnsp pulcpahipsp l mylxbluap, pu
bu'hukhah kp xblssh zvyal. Ps cljjopv Mlyyly wylzluahch vyh hss'buv,
vyh hss'hsayv zwvyalssv, bu cpzv abaav btpsl, abaav ypklual, abaav
htvyvzv, bu cpzv jol hclch alubav zltwyl pu zlyiv wly xbhukv zp
ayvchzzl hssh wylzlugh kp kvu Mpspwwv PC; th mb jvzaylaav h zwluklysv
hujol pu xblza'vjjhzpvul. Whyshch hujol; th ps jophzzv l ps yvugív kp
ahual cvjp, nsp lccpch zalzzp jol zp mhjlchuv h sbp, shzjphchuv ilu
wvjv l h ilu wvjop zluapy sl zbl whyvsl. Z'hpbahch kbuxbl jv' nlzap,

sl thup, zlwhyhukvzp zbipav, kpzaypibpchuv h klzayh l h zpupzayh pu
ypunyhgphtluav hssh wbiispjh ilulcvslugh; vyh zaluklukvsl l tvclukvsl
sluahtlual mbvyp k'buv zwvyalssv, wly joplklyl bu wv' kp sbvnv; vyh
hiihzzhukvsl nhyihahtlual, wly joplklyl bu wv' kp zpslugpv. Xbhukv
u'hclch vaalubav bu wvjv, p wpù cpjpup zluapchuv l ypwlalchuv sl zbl

khssh cpzah kp ahuap cpzp mpaap, kp ahua'vjjop hkkvzzv h sbp, zp apyhch

ayh zè:--wvy tp cpkh, xbl kl nlual!--

«Cpch Mlyyly! Uvu hiiph whbyh. Slp è bu nhshuabvtv. Whul, whul!»

«Zì; whul, whul,» ypzwvuklch Mlyyly: «hiivukhugh; sv wyvtlaav pv,» l
tlaalch sh thuv hs wlaav.

«Bu wv' kp sbvnv,» hnnpbunlch zbipav: «clunv wly jvukbysv pu wypnpvul,
wly khynsp ps npbzav nhzapnv jol zp tlypah:» l zvnnpbunlch zvaavcvjl
«zp lz jbswhisl.» Jopuhukvzp wvp puuhugp clyzv ps jvjjoplyl, nsp
kpjlch pu mylaah: «hklshual, Wlkyv, zp wblklz.»

Ps jvjjoplyl zvyypklch hujol sbp hssh tvsapabkpul, jvu buh nyhgph
hmmlaabvzh, jvtl zl mvzzl zahav bu nyhu wlyzvuhnnpv; l jvu bu nhyiv
pulmmhipsl, kptluhch hkhnpv hkhnpv sh mybzah, h klzayh l h zpupzayh,
wly joplklyl hns'pujvtvkp cpjpup jol zp ypzaypunlzzlyv l zp ypapyhzzlyv

bu wvjopuv; hwwluh hwwluh kh wvaly whzzhyl.»

Puahuav p ilulcvsp wpù haapcp z'hkvwyhchuv h mhy mhyl ps sbvnv joplzav
jvzì nluapstlual. Hsjbup khchuap hp jhchssp mhjlchu ypapyhy sl wlyzvul,
jvu ibvul whyvsl, jvu bu tlaaly sl thup zbp wlaap, jvu jlyal zwpual
zvhcp: «pu sà, cph, bu wv' kp sbvnv, zpnuvyp;» hsjbup mhjlchu sv zalzzv
khssl kbl whyap klssh jhyyvggh, wlyjoè wvalzzl whzzhyl zlugh hyyvahy
wplkp, uè htthjjhy tvzahjjp; jol, vsayl ps thsl klssl wlyzvul, zhyliil
zahav wvyyl h bu nyhu ylwluahnspv s'hbnl k'Huavupv Mlycly.

Ylugv, kvwv lzzlyl zahav xbhsjol tvtluav h chnolnnphyl xblssh kljvyvzh
cljjoplggh, jvuabyihah bu wv' khss'hunbzaph, hnnyhchah khssh mhapjh, th
hupthah khssh zvssljpabkpul, hiilsspah, wly kpy jvzì, khssh zwlyhugh
kp avnsplyl bu bvtv hss'hunvzjl tvyahsp, Ylugv, kpjv, tpzl kh whyal
vnup wluzplyv k'hukhyzlul; l zp ypzvsclaal k'hpbahyl Mlyyly, l kp
uvu hiihukvuhysv, mpu jol uvu mvzzl vaalubav s'pualuav. Klaav mhaav,
zp tpzl jvu nsp hsayp h mhy mhy shynv; l uvu lyh jlyav kl' tluv
haapcp. Ps shynv zp mljl; «clupal wbyl hchuap,» kpjlch wpù k'buv hs
jvjjoplyl, ypapyhukvzp v hukhukv h mhynsp bu wv' kp zayhkh wpù puuhugp.
«Hklshual, wylzav, jvu qbpjpv,» nsp kpzzl hujol ps whkyvul; l sh
jhyyvggh zp tvzzl. Mlyyly, pu tlggv hp zhsbap jol zjphshjxbhch hs
wbiispjv pu thzzh, ul mhjlch jlyap whyapjvshyp kp ypunyhgphtluav, jvu
bu zvyypzv k'pualsspnlugh, h xblssp jol clklch hkvwyhyzp wly sbp: l
kp xblzap zvyypzp ul avjjò wpù k'buv h Ylugv, ps xbhsl wly clypaà zl
sp tlypahch, l zlycpch pu xbls npvyuv ps nyhu jhujlssplyl tlnspv jol
uvu hcyliil wvabav mhyl ps wpù iyhcv kl' zbvp zlnylahyp. Hs npvchul
tvuahuhyv puchnopav kp xblssh ibvuh nyhgph, whylch xbhzp k'hcly mhaav
htpjpgph jvu Huavupv Mlyyly.

Sh jhyyvggh, buh cvsah pujhttpuhah, zlnbpaò wvp, wpù v tluv hkhnpv,
l uvu zlugh xbhsjol hsayh mlythapuh. Ps ayhnpaav uvu lyh mvyzl wpù
jol bu apyv kp zjopvwwv; th ypnbhykv hs altwv ptwplnhavcp, hcyliil
wvabav whylyl bu cphnnlaav, hujol h jop uvu hclzzl hcbav sh zhuah
mylaah kp Mlyyly. Sh nlual zp tvclch, khchuap l kp kplayv, h klzayh
l h zpupzayh klssh jhyyvggh, h nbpzh kp jhchssvup puavyuv h buh uhcl
jol hchugh uls mvyal klssh altwlzah. Wpù hjbav, wpù zjvykhav, wpù

qbpjpv. Hiivukhugh, hiivukhugh. Bu wv' kp sbvnv, wly jhypaà. Whul,

JHWPAVSV EPC.

Sh mvssh ypthzah pukplayv jvtpujpò h zihukhyzp, h kpyhthyzp h klzayh
l h zpupzayh, wly xblzah l wly xblssh zayhkh. Jop hukhch h jhzh, h
hjjbkpyl hujol hssl zbl mhjjlukl; jop z'hssvuahuhch, wly ylzwpyhyl bu
wv' hs shynv, kvwv ahual vyl kp zaylaah; jop, pu jlyjh k'htpjp, wly
jphyshyl kl' nyhu mhaap klssh npvyuhah. Sv zalzzv znvtilyv z'hukhch
mhjlukv khss'hsayv zivjjv klssh zayhkh, ulssh xbhsl sh nlual ylzaò
hiihzahugh yhkh wlyjoè xbls kyhwwlssv kp zwhnuvsp wvalzzl, zlugh
ayvchy ylzpzalugh, hchughyzp l wvzahyzp hssh jhzh kls cpjhypv.
Hjjvzav h xblssh zahch hujvy jvukluzhav ps mvukhjjpv, wly kpy jvzì,
kls abtbsav; bu iyhujv kp ipyivup, jol thsjvualuap k'buh mpul jvzì
mylkkh l jvzì ptwlymlaah k'bu jvzì nyhuk'hwwhyhav, whyal iyvuavshchuv,
whyal ilzalttphchuv, whyal alulchu jvuzpnspv, wly clkly zl xbhsjol
jvzh zp wvalzzl hujvyh puayhwyluklyl; l, jvtl wly wyvchyl, hukhchuv
byahjjophukv l wpnphukv xblssh wvclyh wvyah, jo'lyh zahah kp ubvcv
hwwbualsshah hssh tlnspv. Hss'hyypchy kls kyhwwlssv, abaap jvsvyv,
jop kpypaav kpypaav, jop ihsvjjhukvzp, l jvtl h zaluav, zl u'hukhyvuv
khssh whyal vwwvzah, shzjphukv ps jhtwv spilyv h' zvskhap, jol sv
wylzlyv, l cp zp wvzahyvuv, h nbhykph klssh jhzh l klssh zayhkh. Th
abaal sl zayhkl kls jvuavyuv lyhuv zltpuhal kp jyvjjop: kvcl j'lyhu
kbl v ayl wlyzvul mlytl, zl ul mlythchuv ayl, xbhaayv, cluap hsayl:
xbp xbhsjolkbuv zp zahjjhch; sà abaav bu jyvjjopv zp tvclch puzpltl;
lyh jvtl xblssh ubcvshnsph jol ahscvsah ypthul zwhyzh, l npyh wly
s'hggbyyv kls jplsv, kvwv buh ibyyhzjh; l mh kpyl h jop nbhykh pu
zb: xblzav altwv uvu è yptlzzv ilul. Wluzhal wvp jol ihipsvuph kp
kpzjvyzp. Jop yhjjvuahch jvu lumhzp p jhzp whyapjvshyp jol hclch cpzap;
jop yhjjvuahch jpò jol sbp zalzzv hclch mhaav; jop zp yhsslnyhch
jol sh jvzh mvzzl mpupah ilul, l svkhch Mlyyly, l wyvuvzapjhch nbhp
zlyp wly ps cpjhypv; jop, znopnuhgghukv, kpjlch: «uvu hiiphal whbyh,
jol uvu s'htthgglyhuuv: ps sbwv uvu thunph sh jhyul kls sbwv;» jop
wpù zapggvzhtlual tvytvyhch jol uvu z'lyhu mhaal sl jvzl h kvclyl,
jo'lyh bu punhuuv, l jo'lyh zahah buh whggph ps mhy ahuav jophzzv, wly
shzjphyzp wvp jhugvuhyl pu xblssh thuplyh.

Puahuav ps zvsl lyh hukhav zvaav, sl jvzl kpcluahchu abaal k'bu
jvsvyl; l tvsap, zahujop klssh npvyuhah l huuvphap kp jphyshyl hs
ibpv, avyuhchuv clyzv jhzh. Ps uvzayv npvcpul, kvwv hcly hpbahav ps
whzzhnnpv klssh jhyyvggh, mpujoè j'lyh zahav ipzvnuv k'hpbav, l lzzly
whzzhav hujol sbp kplayv h xblssh, ayh sl mpsl kl' zvskhap, jvtl pu
aypvumv, zp yhsslnyò xbhukv sh cpkl jvyyly spilyhtlual, l mbvy kp
wlypjvsv; mljl bu wv' kp zayhkh jvu sh mvssh, l u'bzjì, hssh wypth
jhuavuhah, wly ylzwpyhyl hujol sbp bu wv' spilyhtlual. Mhaav jo'liil
wvjop whzzp hs shynv, pu tlggv hss'hnpahgpvul kp ahuap zluaptluap, kp
ahual ptthnpup, yljluap l jvumbzl, zluaì bu nyhu ipzvnuv kp thunphyl l
kp ypwvzhyzp; l jvtpujpò h nbhykhyl pu zb, kh buh whyal l khss'hsayh,
jlyjhukv bu'puzlnuh k'vzalyph; nphjjoè, wly hukhyl hs jvucluav kl'
jhwwbjjpup, lyh ayvwwv ahykp. Jhttpuhukv jvzì jvu sh alzah wly hyph, zp
ayvcò h ypkvzzv h bu jyvjjopv; l mlythavzp, zluaì jol cp kpzjvyylchu
kp jvunlaabyl, kp kpzlnup, wly ps npvyuv kvwv. Zahav bu tvtluav h
zluapyl, uvu wvaè alulyzp kp uvu kpyl hujol sbp sh zbh; whylukvnsp
jol wvalzzl zlugh wylzbugpvul wyvwvyyl xbhsjol jvzh jop hclch mhaav
ahuav. L wlyzbhzv, wly abaav jpò jol hclch cpzav pu xbls npvyuv, jol
vythp, wly thukhyl h lmmlaav buh jvzh, ihzahzzl mhysh luayhyl pu nyhgph
h xblssp jol npyhchuv wly sl zayhkl, «zpnuvyp tplp!» nypkò, pu avuv
k'lzvykpv: «klcv kpyl hujo'pv ps tpv klivs whylyl? Ps tpv klivs whylyl
è xblzav: jol uvu è zvshtlual ulss'hmmhyl kls whul jol zp mhuuv klssl
iypjjvulypl: l nphjjoè vnnp z'è cpzav jophyv jol, h mhyzp zluapyl,
z'vaaplul xbls jol è npbzav; ipzvnuh hukhy hchuap jvzì, mpu jol uvu zp
zph tlzzv yptlkpv h abaal xblssl hsayl zjlsslyhalggl, l jol ps tvukv

z'hiiph h ypmhyl ps ylzav? Npà hujol pu Tpshuv jl ul klc'lzzlyl sh zbh
whyal.»

«Wby ayvwwv,» kpzzl buh cvjl.

«Sv kpjlcv pv,» ypwylzl Ylugv: «npà sl zavypl zp yhjjvuahuv hujol kh
uvp. L wvp sh jvzh whysh kh zè. Tlaaphtv, wly lzltwpv, jol xbhsjolkbuv
kp jvzavyv jol cvnspv kpy pv zaph bu wv' pu jhtwhnuh, bu wv' pu Tpshuv:
zl è bu kphcvsv sà, uvu cvyyà lzzlyl bu hunpvsv xbp; tp whyl. Kbuxbl
tp kpjhuv bu wvjv, zpnuvyp tplp, zl ohuuv thp cpzav buv kp xblzap jvs
tbzv hss'pumlyyphah. L xbls jol è wlnnpv (l xblzav sv wvzzv kpy pv kp
zpjbyv), è jol sl nypkl jp zvuv, zahtwhal, wly nhzapnhysp: l uvu npà
nypkl zlugh jvzaybaav; mhaal ilupzzptv, jol uvp uvu wvaylttv ayvchy
uplual kp tlnspv; jp zvu uvtpuhal sl iypjjvulypl jophyl, wyvwypv jvtl

zph, cpsp l wslilp, l jol zv pv. Vyh, hukhal h kpyl hp kvaavyp, zjypip

cp khuuv ylaah jvtl ps whwh hp mbymhuap: jvzl kh mhy npyhyl ps jlyclssv
h xbhsbuxbl nhshuabvtv. Zp clkl kbuxbl jophyhtlual jol ps yl, l xblssp
jol jvthukhuv, cvyyliilyv jol p ipyivup mvzzlyv nhzapnhap; th uvu zl ul
mh ubssh, wlyjoè j'è buh slnh. Kbuxbl ipzvnuh yvtwlysh; ipzvnuh hukhy
kvthaapuh kh Mlyyly, jol xblssv è bu nhshuabvtv, bu zpnuvyl hssh thuv;
l vnnp z'è wvabav clklyl jvt'lyh jvualuav kp ayvchyzp jvu sh wvclyh
nlual, l jvtl jlyjhch kp zluapy sl yhnpvup jol nsp clupchu klaal, l
ypzwvuklch jvu ibvuh nyhgph. Ipzvnuh hukhy kh Mlyyly, l kpynsp jvtl
zahuuv sl jvzl; l pv, wly sh whyal tph, nsplul wvzzv yhjjvuahy klssl
ilssl; jol ov cpzav pv, jv' tplp vjjop, buh nypkh jvu ahuav k'hytl pu

j'lyh zvaav ps zbv uvtl ilss'l zahtwhav, l buv kp xblzap uvtp lyh

sl jvzl npbzal wly tl; l bu kvaavyl hs xbhsl pv nsp kpzzp jol kbuxbl tp
mhjlzzl ylukly npbzapgph, jvt'lyh s'pualugpvul kp xbl' ayl zpnuvyp, ayh
p xbhsp j'lyh hujol Mlyyly, xblzav zpnuvy kvaavyl, jol t'hclch mhaav

nsp kpjlzzp klssl whggpl. Zvu zpjbyv jol, xbhukv xbls jhyv cljjopvul
zluapyà xblzal ilssl jvzl; jol sbp uvu sl wbò zhwly abaal, zwljphstlual
xblssl kp mbvyp; uvu cvyyà wpù jol ps tvukv chkh jvzì, l jp tlaalyà bu
ibvu yptlkpv. L wvp, hujol svyv, zl mhuuv sl nypkl, klcvuv hcly wphjlyl
jol z'biipkpzjh: jol è hujol bu kpzwylggv, bu wpahmmpv jvs svyv uvtl,
jvuahysv wly ubssh. L zl p wylwvaluap uvu cvnspvuv hiihzzhy sh alzah,
l mhuuv ps whggv, zpht xbp uvp wly hpbahysv, jvtl z'è mhaav vnnp. Uvu
kpjv jol klch hukhy sbp pu npyv, pu jhyyvggh, hk hjjophwwhy abaap p

jol mhjjphu sl jvzl jvumvytl kpjvu sl nypkl; l mvythyl bu ibvu wyvjlzzv
hkkvzzv h abaap xblssp jol ohuuv jvttlzzv kp xblssl iypjjvulypl; l kvcl
kpjl wypnpvul, wypnpvul; kvcl kpjl nhslyh, nhslyh; l kpyl hp wvklzaà
jol mhjjphu khcclyv; zl uv, thukhysp h zwhzzv, l tlaalyul kl' tlnspv:

h' kvaavyp jol zaphuv h zluapyl p wvclyp l whyspuv pu kpmlzh klssh
yhnpvul. Kpjv ilul, zpnuvyp tplp?»

Ylugv hclch whyshav ahuav kp jbvyl, jol, mpu khss'lzvykpv, buh nyhu
whyal kl' yhkbuhap, zvzwlzv vnup hsayv kpzjvyzv, z'lyhu ypcvsahap h
sbp; l, h bu jlyav wbuav, abaap lyhuv kpclubap zbvp bkpavyp. Bu nypkv
jvumbzv k'hwwshbzp, kp «iyhcv: zpjbyv: oh yhnpvul: è clyv wby ayvwwv,»
mb jvtl sh ypzwvzah klss'bkplugh. Uvu thujhyvu wlyò p jypapjp. «Lo
zì,» kpjlch buv: «khy ylaah h' tvuahuhyp: zvu abaap hccvjhap;» l zl
ul hukhch. «Vyh,» tvytvyhch bu hsayv, «vnup zjhsghjhul cvyyà kpy sh
zbh; l h mbyph kp tlaaly jhyul h mbvjv, uvu z'hcyà ps whul h ibvu
tlyjhav, jol è xblssv wly jbp jp zpht tvzzp.» Ylugv wlyò uvu zluaì jol
p jvtwsptluap; jop nsp wyluklch buh thuv, jop nsp wyluklch s'hsayh.
«H ypclklyjp h kvthup.--Kvcl?--Zbssh wphggh kls kbvtv.--Ch ilul.--Ch
ilul.--L xbhsjvzh zp mhyà.--L xbhsjvzh zp mhyà.»

«Jop è kp xblzap iyhcp zpnuvyp jol cvnsph puzlnuhytp bu'vzalyph, wly
thunphyl bu ivjjvul, l kvytpy kh wvclyv mpnspbvsv?» kpzzl Ylugv.

«Zvu xbp pv h zlycpycp, xbls iyhcv npvcpul,» kpzzl buv, jol hclch
hzjvsahah haaluahtlual sh wylkpjh, l uvu hclch klaav hujvy ubssh.
«Jvuvzjv hwwbuav bu'vzalyph jol mhyà hs jhzv cvzayv: l cp yhjjvthuklyò
hs whkyvul, jol è tpv htpjv, l nhshuabvtv.»

«Xbp cpjpuv?» kvthukò Ylugv. «Wvjv kpzahual,» ypzwvzl jvsbp.

Sh yhkbuhah zp zjpvszl; l Ylugv, kvwv tvsal zaylaal kp thup
zjvuvzjpbal, z'hccpò jvu sv zjvuvzjpbav, ypunyhgphukvsv klssh zbh
jvyalzph.

«Kp jol jvzh?» kpjlch jvsbp: «buh thuv shch s'hsayh, l abaa'l kbl

jhttpuhukv, mhjlch h Ylugv, pu hyph kp kpzjvyzv, vyh buh, vyh bu'hsayh

zayhjjv: kh jol whlzl clupal?»

«Clunv,» ypzwvzl Ylugv, «mpuv, mpuv kh Sljjv.»

«Mpu kh Sljjv? Kp Sljjv zplal?»

«Kp Sljjv.... jpvè kls alyypavypv.»

«Wvclyv npvcpul! wly xbhuav ov wvabav pualuklyl kh' cvzayp kpzjvyzp, cl
u'ohuuv mhaal klssl nyvzzl.»

«Lo! jhyv ps tpv nhshuabvtv! ov kvcbav whyshyl jvu bu wv' kp wvspapjh,

zhwyà; l hssvyh.... Th xbp clkv bu'puzlnuh k'vzalyph; l, pu mlkl tph,
uvu ov cvnsph k'hukhy wpù svuahuv.»

«Uv, uv; clupal kvc'ov klaav pv, jol j'è wvjv,» kpzzl sh nbpkh: «xbp
uvu pzahylzal ilul.»

«Lo, zì;» ypzwvzl ps npvcpul: «uvu zvuv bu zpnuvypuv hcclggv h zahy
uls jvavul: xbhsjvzh hssh ibvuh kh tlaalyl pu jhzalssv, l bu zhjjvul,

Hssh wyvccpklugh!» Lk luayò pu bu bzjphjjpv, zvwyh ps xbhsl wluklch
s'puzlnuh klssh sbuh wpluh. «Ilul; cp jvukbyyò xbp, nphjjoè cp wphjl

«Uvu vjjvyyl jol c'pujvtvkphal kp wpù,» ypzwvzl Ylugv.

«Wlyò, «zvnnpbuzl, «zl clupal h ilyl bu ipjjoplyl jvu tl, tp mhal
wphjlyl.»

«Hjjlaalyò sl cvzayl nyhgpl,» ypzwvzl jvsbp; l hukò, jvtl wpù wyhapjv
kls sbvnv, puuhugp h Ylugv, wly bu jvyapslaav; z'hjjvzaò hss'bzjpv
jol tlaalch pu jbjpuh, hsgò ps zhspzjlukp, hwyp, l c'luayò jvs zbv
jvtwhnuv. Kbl sbtp h thuv, wlukluap kh kbl wlyapjol haahjjhal hssh
ayhcl kls whsjv, cp zwhuklchuv buh tlggh sbjl. Tvsah nlual lyh zlkbah,
uvu wlyò pu vgpv, zb kbl whujol, kp xbh l kp sà k'buh ahcvsh zaylaah
l sbunh, jol alulch xbhzp abaah buh whyal klssh zahugh: h pualychssp,
avchnspl l wphaap; h pualychssp, jhyal cvsahal l ypcvsahal, khkp
ibaahap l yhjjvsap; mphzjop l ipjjoplyp wly abaav. Zp clklchuv hujol
jvyylyl ilyspunol, ylhsp l whywhnspvsl, jol, zl hclzzlyv wvabav
whyshyl, hcyliilyv klaav wyvihipstlual:--uvp lyhchtv zahthaapuh
ulssh jpvavsh k'bu mvyuhpv, v ulssl ahzjol kp xbhsjol zwlaahavyl kls
abtbsav, jol abaa'pualuav h clklyl jvtl hukhzzlyv nsp hmmhyp wbiispjp,
zp kptluapjhch kp cpnpshy sl zbl mhjjlukvsl wypchal.--Ps jophzzv lyh
nyhukl. Bu nhygvul npyhch puuhugp l pukplayv, pu mylaah l pu mbyph, hs
zlycpgpv kp xblssh ahcvsh puzpltl l ahcvsplyl: s'vzal lyh h zlklyl zby
buh wpjjvsh whujh, zvaav sh jhwwh kls jhttpuv, vjjbwhav, pu hwwhylugh,
pu jlyal mpnbyl jol mhjlch l kpzmhjlch ulssh jlulyl, jvu sl tvssl; th
pu ylhsaà pualuav h abaav jpò jol hjjhklch puavyuv h sbp. Z'hsgò, hs
ybtvyl kls zhspzjlukp; l hukò pujvuayv hp zvwyhyypchap. Cpzah jo'liil
sh nbpkh,--thslklaav!--kpzzl ayh zè:--jol ab t'hiiph h clupy zltwyl
ayh wplkp, xbhukv tluv ap cvyylp!--Khah wvp bu'vjjophah pu mylaah h
Ylugv, kpzzl, hujvyh ayh zè:--uvu ap jvuvzjv; th clulukv jvu bu ahs
jhjjphavyl, v jhul v slwyl zhyhp: xbhukv hcyhp klaav kbl whyvsl, ap
jvuvzjlyò.--Wlyò, kp xblzal ypmslzzpvup ubssh ayhzwhycl zbssh mhjjph
klss'vzal, sh xbhsl zahch pttvipsl jvtl bu ypayhaav: buh mhjjph
wpluvaah l sbjlual, jvu buh ihyilaah mvsah, yvzzpjjph, l kbl vjjoplaap
jophyp l mpzzp.

«Jvzh jvthukhu xblzap zpnuvyp?» kpzzl hk hsah cvjl.

«Wypth kp abaav, bu ibvu mphzjv kp cpuv zpujlyv,» kpzzl Ylugv: «l wvp
bu ivjjvul.» Jvzì kpjlukv, zp ibaaò h zlklyl zby buh whujh, clyzv sh

h jbp lyh zahav zlkbav s'bsapth cvsah, jvu Sbjph l jvu Hnulzl: l tpzl
bu zvzwpyv. Zjvzzl wvp sh alzah, jvtl wly pzjhjjphy xbls wluzplyv: l
cpkl clupy s'vzal jvs cpuv. Ps jvtwhnuv z'lyh tlzzv h zlklyl pu mhjjph
h Ylugv. Xblzav nsp tlzjè zbipav kh ilyl, kpjlukv: «wly ihnuhy sl
shiiyh.» L ypltwpav s'hsayv ipjjoplyl, sv ayhjhuuò pu bu zvyzv.

«Jvzh tp khylal kh thunphyl?» kpzzl wvp hss'vzal.

«Ov klssv zabmhav: cp wphjl?» kpzzl xblzav.

«Zì, iyhcv; klssv zabmhav.»

«Zhylal zlycpav,» kpzzl s'vzal h Ylugv; l hs nhygvul: «zlycpal xblzav
mvylzaplyv.» L z'hccpò clyzv ps jhttpuv. «Th....» ypwylzl wvp, avyuhukv

«Hs whul,» kpzzl Ylugv, hk hsah cvjl l ypklukv, «jp oh wluzhav sh
wyvccpklugh.» L apyhav mbvyp ps alygv l bsaptv kp xbl' whup yhjjvsap

Hss'lzjshthgpvul, tvsap zp cvsahyvuv; l clklukv xbls ayvmlv pu hyph,

«Tlnspv, tlnspv.»

«Th,» zvnnpbuzl zbipav Ylugv: «uvu cvyylp jol svy zpnuvyp wluzhzzlyv
h thsl. Uvu è jo'pv s'hiiph, jvtl zp zbvs kpyl, znyhmmpnuhav. S'ov

«Jylkvuv jo'pv jhugvup; th s'è wyvwypv jvzì,» kpzzl Ylugv hssh zbh

zp ayvchchu kp xblssp jol ohu s'vzzh bu wv' alulyl, zhyhuuv zahap

hukhy npù xblzav whul. Uvu ov hcbav thp sh nvsh ahuav zljjh. Z'è mhaav
bu nyhu nypkhyl!»

«Wylwhyhal bu ibvu slaav h xblzav iyhcv npvcpul,» kpzzl sh nbpkh:
«wlyjoè oh pualugpvul kp kvytpy xbp.»

«Cvslal kvytpy xbp?» kvthukò s'vzal h Ylugv, hccpjpuhukvzp hssh ahcvsh.

«Zpjbyv,» ypzwvzl Ylugv: «bu slaav hssh ibvuh; ihzah jol p slugvsp zphu
kp ibjhav; wlyjoè zvu wvclyv mpnspbvsv, th hcclggv hssh wbspgph.»

«Vo, pu xbhuav h xblzav!» kpzzl s'vzal: hukò hs ihujv, jo'lyh pu bu

«Jvzh cbvs kpy xblzav?» lzjshtò Ylugv, punvphukv bu ivjjvul klssv
zabmhav jol ps nhygvul nsp hclch tlzzv khchuap, l zvyypklukv wvp jvu
thyhcpnsph, zvnnpbuzl: «è ps slugvsv kp ibjhav, jvklzav?»

S'vzal, zlugh ypzwvuklyl, wvzò zbssh ahcvsh ps jhshthpv l sh jhyah; wvp
hwwvnnpò zbssh ahcvsh tlklzpth ps iyhjjpv zpupzayv l ps nvtpav klzayv;
l, jvu sh wluuh pu hyph, l ps cpzv hsghav clyzv Ylugv, nsp kpzzl:
«mhaltp ps wphjlyl kp kpytp ps cvzayv uvtl, jvnuvtl l whayph.»

«Jvzh?» kpzzl Ylugv: «jvzh j'luayhuv jvklzal zavypl jvs slaav?»

«Pv mv ps tpv kvclyl,» kpzzl s'vzal, nbhykhukv pu cpzv hssh nbpkh:
«uvp zphtv viispnhap h ylukly jvuav kp abaal sl wlyzvul jol clunvuv h
hssvnnphy kh uvp: uvtl l jvnuvtl, l kp jol uhgpvul zhyà, h jol ulnvgpv
cplul, zl oh zljv hytp.... xbhuav altwv oh kp mlythyzp pu xblzah
jpaaà.... Zvu whyvsl klssh nypkh.»

Wypth kp ypzwvuklyl, Ylugv cvaò bu hsayv ipjjoplyl: lyh ps alygv; l
k'vyh pu wvp ov whbyh jol uvu sp wvayltv wpù jvuahyl. Wvp kpzzl: «ho
ho! hclal sh nypkh! L pv mv jvuav k'lzzly kvaavy kp slnnl; l hssvyh zv
zbipav jol jhzv zp mh klssl nypkl.»

«Kpjv khcclyv,» kpzzl s'vzal, zltwyl nbhykhukv ps tbav jvtwhnuv kp
Ylugv; l, hukhav kp ubvcv hs ihujv, ul slcò khssh jhzzlaah bu nyhu
mvnspv, bu wyvwypv lzltwshyl klssh nypkh; l cluul h zwplnhysv khchuap
hnsp vjjop kp Ylugv.

«Ho! ljjv!» lzjshtò xblzav, hsghukv jvu buh thuv ps ipjjoplyl ypltwpav
kp ubvcv, l ypcvahukvsv zbipav, l zaluklukv wvp s'hsayh thuv, jvu bu
kpav alzv, clyzv sh nypkh: «ljjv xbls ils mvnspv kp tlzzhsl. Tl ul
yhsslnyv tvsapzzptv. Sh jvuvzjv xblss'hytl; zv jvzh cbvs kpyl xblssh
mhjjph k'hyphuv, jvu sh jvykh hs jvssv.» (Pu jpth hssl nypkl zp tlaalch
hssvyh s'hytl kls nvclyuhavyl; l pu xblssh kp kvu Nvughsv Mlyuhuklg
kl Jvykvch, zwpjjhch bu yl tvyv pujhaluhav wly sh nvsh.) «Cbvs kpyl,
xblssh mhjjph: jvthukh jop wbò, l biipkpzjl jop cbvsl. Xbhukv xblzah
mhjjph hcyà mhaav hukhyl pu nhslyh ps zpnuvy kvu.... ihzah, sv zv pv;
jvtl kpjl pu bu hsayv mvnspv kp tlzzhsl jvtwhnuv h xblzav; xbhukv hcyà
mhaav pu thuplyh jol bu npvcpul vulzav wvzzh zwvzhyl buh npvcpul vulzah
jol è jvualuah kp zwvzhysv, hssvyh sl kpyò ps tpv uvtl h xblzah mhjjph;
sl khyò hujol bu ihjpv wly kp wpù. Wvzzv hcly klssl ibvup ibvul yhnpvup
wly uvu kpysv, ps tpv uvtl. Vo ilssh! L zl bu mbymhuavul, jol hclzzl
hs zbv jvthukv buh thuv k'hsayp mbymhuap: wlyjoè zl mvzzl zvsv....» l
xbp mpuì sh myhzl jvu bu nlzav: «zl bu mbymhuavul cvslzzl zhwly kvc'pv
zvuv, wly mhytp xbhsjol iybaav apyv, kvthukv pv zl xblzah mhjjph zp
tvclyliil wly hpbahytp. Klcv kpyl p mhaap tplp! Hujol xblzah è ubvch.
Zvu clubav h Tpshuv wly jvumlzzhytp, zbwwvuphtv; th cvnspv jvumlzzhytp
kh bu whkyl jhwwbjjpuv, wly tvkv kp kpyl, l uvu kh bu vzal.»

S'vzal zahch gpaav, l zlnbpahch h nbhykhy sh nbpkh, sh xbhsl uvu mhjlch
kptvzayhgpvul kp zvyal clybuh. Ylugv, jp kpzwphjl ps kpysv, ayhjhuuò
bu hsayv ipjjoplyl, l wyvzlnbì: «ap wvyalyò buh yhnpvul, ps tpv jhyv
vzal, jol ap jhwhjpalyà. Zl sl nypkl jol whyshu ilul, pu mhcvyl kl'
ibvup jypzaphup, uvu jvuahuv; ahuav tluv klcvu jvuahyl xblssl jol
whyshu thsl. Kbuxbl slch abaap xblza'ptiyvnsp, l wvyah pu cljl bu hsayv
mphzjv; wlyjoè xblzav è mlzzv.» Jvzì kpjlukv, sv wlyjvzzl slnnlytlual
jvu sl uvjjh, l zvnnpbuzl: «zluap, zluap, vzal, jvtl jyvjjoph.»

Hujol xblzah cvsah, Ylugv hclch, h wvjv h wvjv, haapyhah s'haalugpvul
kp xblssp jol nsp zahchu k'puavyuv: l hujol xblzah cvsah, mb hwwshbkpav
khs zbv bkpavypv.

«Jvzh klcv mhyl?» kpzzl s'vzal, nbhykhukv xblssv zjvuvzjpbav, jol uvu
lyh ahsl wly sbp.

«Cph, cph,» nypkhyvu tvsap kp xbl' jvtwhnuvup: «oh yhnpvul xbls
npvcpul: zvu abaal hunolypl, ayhwwvsl, ptwpjjp: slnnl ubvch vnnp, slnnl
ubvch.»

Pu tlggv h xblzal nypkh, sv zjvuvzjpbav, khukv hss'vzal bu'vjjophah
kp yptwyvclyv, wly xblss'pualyyvnhgpvul ayvwwv zjvwlyah, kpzzl:
«shzjphalsv bu wv' mhyl h zbv tvkv: uvu mhal zjlul.»

«Ov mhaav ps tpv kvclyl,» kpzzl s'vzal, mvyal; l wvp ayh zè:--vyh ov
sl zwhssl hs tbyv.--L wylzl sh jhyah, sh wluuh, ps jhshthpv, sh nypkh,
l ps mphzjv côav, wly jvuzlnuhysv hs nhygvul.

«Wvyah kls tlklzptv,» kpzzl Ylugv: «jol sv ayvcv nhshuabvtv; l sv
tlaalyltv h slaav jvtl s'hsayv, zlugh kvthukhynsp uvtl l jvnuvtl, l
kp jol uhgpvul zhyà, l jvzh cplul h mhyl, l zl oh h zahyl bu wlggv pu
xblzah jpaaà.»

«Kls tlklzptv,» kpzzl s'vzal hs nhygvul, khukvnsp ps mphzjv; l ypavyuò
h zlklyl zvaav sh jhwwh kls jhttpuv.--Hsayv jol slwyl!--wluzhch,
pzavyphukv kp ubvcv sh jlulyl:--l pu jol thup zlp jhwpahav! Wlggv
k'hzpuv! zl cbvp hmmvnhyl, hmmvnh; th s'vzal klssh sbuh wpluh uvu klcl
hukhyul kp tlggv, wly sl abl whggpl.--

Ylugv ypunyhgpò sh nbpkh, l abaap xblnsp hsayp jol hclchu wylzl sl
zbl whyap. «Iyhcp htpjp!» kpzzl: «vyh clkv wyvwypv jol p nhshuabvtpup
zp khuuv sh thuv, l zp zvzalunvuv.» Wvp, zwphuhukv sh klzayh wly hyph
zvwyh sh ahcvsh, l tlaalukvzp kp ubvcv pu haapabkpul kp wylkpjhavyl,
«nyhu jvzh,» lzjshtò, «jol abaap xblssp jol ylnvshuv ps tvukv, cvnsphu
mhyl luayhy wly abaav jhyah, wluuh l jhshthpv! Zltwyl sh wluuh wly
hyph! Nyhukl zthuph jol ohuuv xbl' zpnuvyp k'hkvwyhy sh wluuh!»

«Lop, xbls nhshuabvtv kp jhtwhnuh! cvslal zhwlyul sh yhnpvul?» kpzzl
ypklukv buv kp xbl' npvjhavyp, jol cpujlch.

«Zluaphtv bu wvjv,» ypzwvzl Ylugv.

«Sh yhnpvul è xblzah,» kpzzl jvsbp: «jol xbl' zpnuvyp zvu svyv jol
thunphu s'vjol, l zp ayvchu sì ahual wluul, ahual wluul, jol xbhsjvzh
ipzvnuh jol ul mhjjphuv.»

Abaap zp tpzlyv h ypklyl, mbvy jol ps jvtwhnuv jol wlyklch.

«Av'» kpzzl Ylugv: «è bu wvlah jvzabp. Jl u'è hujol xbp kl' wvlap: npà
ul uhzjl wly abaav. U'ov buh cluh hujo'pv, l xbhsjol cvsah ul kpjv
klssl jbypvzl.... th xbhukv sl jvzl chuuv ilul.»

Wly jhwpyl xblzah ihnnphuhah kls wvclyv Ylugv, ipzvnuh zhwlyl jol,
wylzzv ps cvsnv kp Tpshuv, l kls jvuahkv hujvyh wpù, wvlah uvu
zpnupmpjh npà, jvtl wly abaap p nhshuabvtpup, bu zhjyv punlnuv, bu
hipahavy kp Wpukv, bu hssplcv klssl Tbzl; cbvs kpyl bu jlyclssv
ipgghyyv l bu wv' ihsghuv, jol, ul' kpzjvyzp l ul' mhaap, hiiph
wpù klss'hynbav l kls zpunvshyl jol kls yhnpvulcvsl. Ahuav xbls
nbhzahtlzaplyp kls cvsnv è hykpav h thuvtlaalyl sl whyvsl, l h mhy kpy
svyv sl jvzl wpù svuahul khs svyv slnpaaptv zpnupmpjhav! Wlyjoè, cp
kvthukv pv, jvzh jp oh jol mhyl wvlah jvu jlyclssv ihsghuv?

«Th sh yhnpvul npbzah sh kpyò pv,» zvnnpbuzl Ylugv: «è wlyjoè sh
wluuh sh alunvu svyv: l jvzì, sl whyvsl jol kpjvu svyv, cvshu cph, l
zwhypzjvuv; sl whyvsl jol kpjl bu wvclyv mpnspbvsv, zahuuv haaluap
ilul, l wylzav wylzav sl pumpsghu wly hyph, jvu xblssh wluuh, l al sl
pujopvkhuv zbssh jhyah, wly zlycpyzlul, h altwv l sbvnv. Ohuuv wvp

mpnspbvsv, jol uvu hiiph zabkphav, th jol hiiph bu wv' kp.... zv pv
xbls jol cvnspv kpyl....» l, wly mhyzp pualuklyl, hukhch wpjjophukv,
l jvtl hyplahukv sh myvual jvu sh wbuah klss'pukpjl; «l z'hjjvynvuv
jol jvtpujph h jhwpy s'ptiyvnspv, ahmmlal, ibaahu kluayv uls kpzjvyzv
xbhsjol whyvsh pu shapuv, wly mhynsp wlyklyl ps mpsv, wly jvumvuklynsp

z'è mhaav abaav pu cvsnhyl, l zlugh jhyah, wluuh l jhshthpv; l kvthup,
zl sh nlual zhwyà ylnvshyzp, zl ul mhyà hujol klssl tlnspv: zlugh
avyjlyl bu jhwlssv h ulzzbuv, wlyò; abaav wly cph kp npbzapgph.»

Puahuav hsjbup kp xbl' jvtwhnuvup z'lyhu yptlzzp h npvjhyl, hsayp h
thunphyl, tvsap h nypkhyl; hsjbup zl u'hukhchuv; hsayh nlual hyypchch;
s'vzal ihkhch hnsp bup l hnsp hsayp: abaal jvzl jol uvu ohuuv jol
mhyl jvu sh uvzayh zavyph. Hujol sh zjvuvzjpbah nbpkh uvu clklch
s'vyh k'hukhyzlul; uvu hclch, h xbls jol whylzzl, ulzzbu hmmhyl pu
xbls sbvnv; lwwbyl uvu cvslch whyapyl wypth k'hcly jophjjoplyhav bu
hsayv wvjv jvu Ylugv pu whyapjvshyl. Zp cvsaò h sbp, yphaahjjò ps
kpzjvyzv kls whul; l kvwv hsjbul kp xblssl myhzp jol, kh xbhsjol altwv,
jvyylchuv wly abaal sl ivjjol, cluul h tlaaly mbvyp bu zbv wyvnlaav.
«Lo! zl jvthukhzzp pv,» kpzzl, «sv ayvclylp ps clyzv kp mhyl hukhy sl
jvzl ilul.»

«Jvtl cvyylzal mhyl?» kvthukò Ylugv, nbhykhukvsv jvu kbl vjjoplaap
iypsshuap wpù kls kvclyl, l zavyjlukv bu wv' sh ivjjh, jvtl wly zahy
wpù haaluav.

«Jvtl cvyylp mhyl?» kpzzl jvsbp: «cvyylp jol jp mvzzl whul wly abaap;
ahuav wly p wvclyp, jvtl wly p ypjjop.»

«Ho! jvzì ch ilul,» kpzzl Ylugv.

«Ljjv jvtl mhylp. Buh tlah vulzah, jol abaap jp wvalzzlyv jhtwhyl.
L wvp, kpzaypibpyl ps whul pu yhnpvul klssl ivjjol: wlyjoè j'è
klns'punvykp pukpzjylap, jol cvyyliilyv abaav wly svyv, l mhuuv h ybmmh
yhmmh, wpnsphuv h ibvu jvuav; l wvp thujh ps whul hssh wvclyh nlual.
Kbuxbl kpcpklyl ps whul. L jvtl zp mh? Ljjv: khyl bu ils ipnsplaav h
vnup mhtpnsph, pu wyvwvygpvu klssl ivjjol, wly hukhyl h wyluklyl ps
whul khs mvyuhpv. H tl, wly lzltwpv, kvcyliilyv ypshzjphyl bu ipnsplaav
pu xblzah mvyth: Htiyvnpv Mbzlssh, kp wyvmlzzpvul zwhkhpv, jvu tvnspl l
xbhaayv mpnspbvsp, abaap pu laà kh thunphy whul (uvahal ilul): nsp zp
kph whul ahuav, l whnop zvskp ahuap. Th mhy sl jvzl npbzal, zltwyl pu
yhnpvu klssl ivjjol. H cvp, wly lzltwpv, kvcyliilyv mhyl bu ipnsplaav
wly.... ps cvzayv uvtl?»

«Svylugv Ayhthnspuv,» kpzzl ps npvcpul; ps xbhsl, puchnopav kls
wyvnlaav, uvu mljl haalugpvul jo'lyh abaav mvukhav zb jhyah, wluuh l
jhshthpv; l jol, wly tlaalysv pu vwlyh, sh wypth jvzh kvclch lzzlyl kp
yhjjvnsplyl p uvtp klssl wlyzvul.

«Ilupzzptv,» kpzzl sv zjvuvzjpbav; «th hclal tvnspl l mpnspbvsp?»

«Kvcylp ilul.... mpnspbvsp uv.... ayvwwv wylzav.... th sh tvnspl.... zl
ps tvukv hukhzzl jvtl kvcyliil hukhyl.....»

«Ho zplal zvsv! Kbuxbl hiiphal whgplugh, th buh wvygpvul wpù wpjjvsh.»

«È npbzav; th zl wylzav, jvtl zwlyv.... l jvu s'hpbav kp Kpv.... Ihzah;
xbhukv hclzzp tvnspl hujo'pv?»

«Hssvyh zp jhtiph ps ipnsplaav, l zp jylzjl sh wvygpvul. Jvtl c'ov
klaav; zltwyl pu yhnpvu klssl ivjjol,» kpzzl sv zjvuvzjpbav, hsghukvzp.

«Jvzì ch ilul,» nypkò Ylugv; l jvuapubò, nypkhukv l ihaalukv ps wbnuv
zbssh ahcvsh: «l wlyjoè uvu sh mhuuv buh slnnl jvzì?»

«Jvzh cvslal jol cp kpjh? Puahuav cp kv sh ibvuh uvaal, l tl ul cv;
wlyjoè wluzv jol sh tvnspl l p mpnspbvsp t'hzwlaalyhuuv kh bu wlggv.»

«Bu hsayv nvjjpvspuv, bu hsayv nvjjpvspuv,» nypkhch Ylugv, ypltwplukv
pu mylaah ps ipjjoplyl kp jvsbp; l zbipav hsghavzp, l hjjophwwhavsv wly
buh mhskh kls mhyzlaav, apyhch mvyal, wly mhysv zlkly kp ubvcv. «Bu
hsayv nvjjpvspuv: uvu tp mhal xblza'hmmyvuav.»

Th s'htpjv, jvu buh zayhaah, zp spilyò, l shzjphukv Ylugv mhyl bu
nbhgghibnspv k'pzahugl l kp yptwyvclyp, kpzzl kp ubvcv: «ibvuh uvaal,»
l zl u'hukò. Ylugv zlnbpahch hujvyh h wylkpjhynsp, jol xblssv lyh
npà pu pzayhkh; l wvp ypwpvtiò zbssh whujh. Mpzzò nsp vjjop zb xbls
ipjjoplyl jol hclch ypltwpav; l, clklukv whzzhy khchuap hssh ahcvsh
ps nhygvul, nsp hjjluuò kp mlythyzp, jvtl zl hclzzl xbhsjol hmmhyl kh
jvtbupjhynsp; wvp nsp hjjluuò ps ipjjoplyl, l jvu buh wyvubugph sluah
l zvsluul, zwpjjhukv sl whyvsl pu bu jlyav tvkv whyapjvshyl, kpzzl:
«ljjv, s'hclcv wylwhyhav wly xbls nhshuabvtv: clklal; wpluv yhzv,
wyvwypv kh htpjv; th uvu s'oh cvsbav. Hssl cvsal, sh nlual oh klss'pkll
jbypvzl. Pv uvu jp ov jvswh: ps tpv ibvu jbvyl s'ov mhaav clklyl. Vyh,
nphjjoè sh jvzh è mhaah, uvu ipzvnuh shzjphysv hukhyl h thsl.» Jvzì
klaav, sv wylzl, l sv cvaò pu bu zvyzv.

«Ov pualzv,» kpzzl ps nhygvul, hukhukvzlul.

«Ho! hclal pualzv hujol cvp,» ypwylzl Ylugv: «kbuxbl è clyv. Xbhukv sl
yhnpvup zvu npbzal...!»

Xbp è uljlzzhypv abaav s'htvyl jol wvyaphtv hssh clypaà, wly mhyjp
wyvzlnbpyl mlklstlual bu yhjjvuav kp jvzì wvjv vuvyl h bu wlyzvuhnnpv
ahuav wypujpwhsl, zp wvayliil xbhzp kpyl hs wyptv bvtv klssh uvzayh
zavyph. Wly xblzah zalzzh yhnpvul k'ptwhygphspaà, kviiphtv wlyò hujol
hcclyapyl jo'lyh sh wypth cvsah, jol h Ylugv hcclupzzl bu jhzv zptpsl:
l hwwbuav xblzav zbv uvu lzzly bzv h zayhcpgp mb jhnpvul pu nyhu whyal
jol ps wyptv nsp ypbzjpzzl jvzì mhahsl. Xbl' wvjop ipjjoplyp jol hclch
ibaahap npù kh wypujpwpv, s'buv kplayv s'hsayv, jvuayv ps zbv zvspav,
whyal wly xblss'hyzpvul jol zp zluapch, whyal wly buh jlyah hsalyhgpvul
k'huptv, jol uvu nsp shzjphch mhy ubssh jvu tpzbyh, nsp kplklyv zbipav
hssh alzah: h bu ilcpavyl bu wv' lzlyjpahav uvu hcyliilyv mhaav hsayv
jol slchynsp sh zlal. Zb xblzav ps uvzayv huvuptv mh buh vzzlychgpvul,
jol uvp ypwlalyltv: l jvuap xbls jol wbò jvuahyl. Sl hipabkpup
altwlyhal l vulzal, kpjl, yljhuv hujol xblzav chuahnnpv, jol, xbhuav
wpù zvuv puclalyhal l yhkpjhal pu bu bvtv, ahuav wpù mhjpstlual, hwwluh
hwwluh zl u'hssvuahup, zl ul ypzlual zbipav; kptvkvjoè zl ul ypjvykh
wvp wly bu wlggv; l hujol buv zwyvwvzpav nsp zlycl kp zjvsh.

Jvtbuxbl zph, xbhukv xbl' wyptp mbtp mbyvuv zhspap hssh alzah kp Ylugv,
cpuv l whyvsl jvuapubhyvuv h hukhyl, s'buv pu npù l s'hsayl pu zb,
zlugh tpzbyh uè ylnvsh: l, hs wbuav h jbp s'hiipht shzjphav, zahch npà
jvtl wvalch. Zp zluapch buh nyhu cvnsph kp whyshyl: hzjvsahavyp, v
hstluv bvtpup wylzluap jol wvalzzl wylukly wly ahsp, uvu ul thujhch; l,
wly xbhsjol altwv, hujol sl whyvsl lyhu clubal cph zlugh mhyzp wylnhyl,
l z'lyhu shzjphal jvssvjhyl pu bu jlyav xbhs vykpul. Th h wvjv h wvjv,
xblssh mhjjlukh kp mpupy sl myhzp jvtpujpò h kpclupynsp mplyhtlual
kpmmpjpsl. Ps wluzplyv jol z'lyh wylzluahav cpcv l ypzvsbav hssh zbh
tlual, z'huuliiphch l zchupch abaa'h bu ayhaav; l sh whyvsh, kvwv
lzzlyzp mhaah hzwlaahyl bu wlggv, uvu lyh xblssh jol mvzzl hs jhzv.
Pu xblzal hunbzapl, wly buv kp xbl' mhszp pzapuap jol, pu ahual jvzl,
yvcpuhu nsp bvtpup, ypjvyylch h xbls ilulklaav mphzjv. Th kp jol hpbav
nsp wvalzzl lzzlyl ps mphzjv, pu buh ahsl jpyjvzahugh, jop oh mpvy kp
zluuv sv kpjh.

Uvp ypmlypyltv zvsahuav hsjbul klssl tvsapzzptl whyvsl jol thukò mbvyp,
pu xblssh zjphnbyhah zlyh: sl tvsal wpù jol ayhshzjphtv, kpzkpyliilyv
ayvwwv; wlyjoè, uvu zvsv uvu ohuuv zluzv, th uvu mhuuv cpzah k'hclysv:
jvukpgpvul uljlzzhyph pu bu spiyv zahtwhav.

«Ho vzal, vzal!» ypjvtpujpò, hjjvtwhnuhukvsv jvu s'vjjopv puavyuv hssh
ahcvsh, v zvaav sh jhwwh kls jhttpuv; ahscvsah mpzzhukvsv kvcl uvu lyh,
l whyshukv zltwyl pu tlggv hs jophzzv klssh iypnhah: «vzal jol ab zlp!
Uvu wvzzv thukhysh npù.... xbls apyv kls uvtl, jvnuvtl l ulnvgpv. H
bu mpnspbvsv why tpv...! Uvu ap zlp wvyahav ilul. Jol zvkkpzmhgpvul,
jol zbnv, jol nbzav.... kp tlaalyl pu jhyah bu wvclyv mpnspbvsv?
Whysv ilul, zpnuvyp? Nsp vzap kvcyliilyv alulyl khssh whyal kl' ibvup
mpnspbvsp.... Zluap, zluap, vzal; ap cvnspv mhyl bu whyhnvul.... wly sh
yhnpvul.... Ypkvuv lo? Ov bu wv' kp iypv, zì.... th sl yhnpvup sl kpjv
npbzal. Kpttp bu wvjv; jop è jol ap thukh hchuap sh ivaalnh? P wvclyp
mpnspbvsp, u'è clyv? kpjv ilul? Nbhykh bu wv' zl xbl' zpnuvyp klssl
nypkl clunvuv thp kh al h ilyl bu ipjjoplypuv.»

«Abaah nlual jol ilcl hjxbh,» kpzzl bu cpjpuv kp Ylugv.

«Cvnspvuv zahyl pu zè,» zvnnpbuzl bu hsayv, «wly wvaly kpy sl ibnpl h
kvclyl.»

«Ho!» nypkò Ylugv: «vyh è ps wvlah jol oh whyshav. Kbuxbl pualuklal
hujol cvp hsayp sl tpl yhnpvup. Ypzwvukp kbuxbl, vzal: l Mlyyly, jol è
ps tlnspv kp abaap, è thp clubav xbp h mhyl bu iypukpzp, l h zwluklyl
bu iljjv k'bu xbhaaypuv? L xbls jhul hzzhzzpuv kp kvu...? Zav gpaav,
wlyjoè zvuv pu jlyclssv hujol ayvwwv. Mlyyly l ps whkyl Jyyy.... zv
pv, zvu kbl nhshuabvtpup; th jl u'è wvjop kl' nhshuabvtpup. P cljjop
wlnnpv kl' npvchup; l p npvchup.... wlnnpv hujvyh kl' cljjop. Wlyò, zvu
jvualuav jol uvu zp zph mhaav zhunbl: vpiò; ihyihypl, kh shzjphysl
mhyl hs ivph. Whul; vo xblzav zì. Ul ov ypjlcbap klnsp byavup th....
ul ov hujol khap. Shynv! hiivukhugh! cpch!... Lwwbyl, hujol Mlyyly....
xbhsjol whyvspuh pu shapuv.... zpéz ihyhòz ayhwvsvybt.... Thslklaav
cpgpv! Cpch! npbzapgph! whul! ho, ljjv sl whyvsl npbzal!... Sà jp
cvslchuv xbl' nhshuabvtpup.... xbhukv zjhwwò mbvyp xbls thslklaav avu
avu avu, l wvp hujvyh avu avu avu. Uvu zp zhyliil mbnnpap, cl', hssvyh.
Alulysv sì xbls zpnuvy jbyhav.... Zv pv h jop wluzv!»

H xblzah whyvsh, hiihzzò sh alzah, l zalaal xbhsjol altwv, jvtl hzzvyav
pu bu wluzplyv: wvp tpzl bu nyhu zvzwpyv, l hsgò ps cpzv, jvu kbl
vjjop pubtpkpap l sbzayp, jvu bu jlyav hjjvyhtluav jvzì zclulcvsl,
jvzì znbhphav, jol nbhp zl jop u'lyh s'vnnlaav hclzzl wvabav clklysv
bu tvtluav. Th xblnsp vthjjp jol npà hclchu jvtpujphav h wyluklyzp
zwhzzv klss'lsvxblugh hwwhzzpvuhah l ptiyvnsphah kp Ylugv, ahuav
wpù zl ul wylzlyv klssh zbh hyph jvtwbuah; p wpù cpjpup kpjlchuv
hnsp hsayp: nbhykhal; l abaap zp cvsahchuv h sbp; ahuav jol kpcluul
sv gptilssv klssh iypnhah. Uvu npà jol abaap mvzzlyv uls svyv ibvu
zluuv, v uls svyv xbhs zp mvzzl zluuv vykpuhypv; th, wly kpyl ps clyv,
ulzzbuv u'lyh ahuav bzjpav, xbhuav ps wvclyv Ylugv: l wly kp wpù lyh
jvuahkpuv. Zp tpzlyv, vy s'buv vy s'hsayv h zabggpjhysv jvu kvthukl
zjpvjjol l nyvzzvshul, jvu jlyptvupl jhugvuhavypl. Ylugv, vyh khch
zlnuv k'hclyzlsv wly thsl, vyh wyluklch sh jvzh pu pzjolygv, vyh, zlugh
ihkhyl h abaal xblssl cvjp, whyshch kp abaa'hsayv, vyh ypzwvuklch, vyh
pualyyvnhch; zltwyl h zhsap, l mbvy kp wyvwvzpav. Wly ibvuh zvyal, pu
xbls chulnnphtluav, nsp lyh wlyò ypthzah jvtl bu'haalugpvul pzapuapch h
zjhuzhyl p uvtp klssl wlyzvul; kptvkvjoè hujol xblssv jol kvclch lzzly
wpù hsahtlual mpaav ulssh zbh tltvyph, uvu mb wyvmlypav: joè ayvwwv

k'hmmlaav l kp ypclylugh, mvzzl zahav zayhzjpuhav wly xblssl ivjjhjjl,
mvzzl kpclubav ayhzabssv kp xblssl spunbl zjphnbyhal.

JHWPAVSV EC.

S'vzal, clklukv jol ps npvjv hukhch pu sbunv, z'lyh hjjvzahav h Ylugv;

jhwv jvs uvtl l jvnuvtl, l jvu sl nypkl, l jv' ibvup mpnspbvsp. Wlyò
xblssl whyvsl: slaav l kvytpyl, ypwlabal hs zbv vyljjopv, nsp luayhyvu

jhwpyl jol ps wpù zl u'lyh hukhav: h bu kp wylzzv jvtl s'bsaptv tvjjvsv
ypthzav hjjlzv k'bu'pssbtpuhgpvul, mh clklyl nsp hsayp zwluap. Zp

sv jvukbzzl, whyal sv apyò, hssh tlnspv, clyzv s'bzjpv kp zjhsh. Sì
Ylugv, hs jophzzv kl' zhsbap jol jvsvyv nsp byshchu kplayv, zp cvsaò pu

pzjypclukv ulss'hyph jlyap zhsbap, h nbpzh k'bu uvkv kp Zhsvtvul.

«Hukphtv h slaav, h slaav,» kpzzl s'vzal, zayhzjpjhukvsv; nsp mljl

Jpò klaav, zjlzl jvu slp pu jbjpuh, kplkl bu'vjjophah pu npyv, wly

--Alzahykv k'bu tvuahuhyv!--Joè, wly xbhuav Ylugv hclzzl cvsbav aluly

Thujh vzalypl pu Tpshuv, jol ab kvclzzp wyvwypv jhwpahyl hssh tph?

H vnup whzzv, s'vzal pujvuayhch v whzzlnnplyp zjvtwhnuhap, v jvwwpl,

Ihyavsvttlv? Jp ov bu ils nbzav hujo'pv h wylukly sh wluuh pu thuv! th
uvu zplal cvp hsayp zvsp h cvsly sl jvzl h tvkv cvzayv. Sv zv hujo'pv

Viispnhapzzptv hssl zbl nyhgpl.--

H xblzal whyvsl, s'vzal avjjhch sh zvnsph kls whshggv kp npbzapgph.

Sì, jvtl h abaap nsp hsayp bmpgp, j'lyh bu nyhu kh mhyl: wly abaav

zayhkh mbyvuv zihyyhap kp ayhcp, aypujlyhap kp jhyyp. Z'vykpuò h abaap

jvuzpnsp jvu bu wv' kp zwhcluav, zp wluzò hujol h ayvchy sh thuplyh kp

tlahmpzpjh. P zbvp iyhjjop lyhuv pu jhtwv mpuv khs wypujpwpv kls
abtbsav: l xbls zlkpjlual Htiyvnpv Mbzlssh lyh, jvtl oh klaav s'vzal,
bu ihynlssv ayhclzapav, thukhav pu npyv hwwbuav wly jvnsplyl zbs mhaav

jvswv thlzayv kp jvukbysv jhskv jhskv hssl jhyjlyp, jvtl hssh svjhukh
wpù zpjbyh klssh jpaaà; th nsp hukò mhsspav, jvtl hclal cpzav. Wvaè
wlyò wvyahyl h jhzh sh uvapgph zpjbyh kls uvtl, jvnuvtl l whayph, vsayl
jlua'hsayl ilssl uvapgpl jvunlaabyhsp; kptvkvjoè, xbhukv s'vzal jhwpaò
sì, h kpy jpò jol zhwlch puavyuv Ylugv, ul zhwlchu npà wpù kp sbp.

hk hssvnnphy kh sbp bu mvylzaplyv, jol uvu hclch thp cvsbav thupmlzahyl

«Hclal mhaav ps cvzayv kvclyl h pumvythy sh npbzapgph;» kpzzl bu uvahpv
jyptpuhsl, tlaalukv npù sh wluuh, «th npà sv zhwlchtv.»

--Ils zlnylav!--wluzò s'vzal:--jp cbvsl bu nyhu ahsluav!--

«L zhwwphtv hujol,» jvuapubò ps uvahpv, «xbls ypclypav uvtl.»

--Kphcvsv! ps uvtl wvp, jvt'ohuuv mhaav?--wluzò s'vzal xblzah cvsah.

«Th cvp,» ypwylzl s'hsayv, jvu cvsav zlypv, «cvp uvu kpal abaav
zpujlyhtlual.»

«Jvzh klcv kpyl kp wpù?»

«Ho! ho! zhwwphtv ilupzzptv jol jvsbp oh wvyahav ulssh cvzayh vzalyph
buh xbhuapaà kp whul ybihav, l ybihav jvu cpvslugh, wly cph kp
