«Cplu buv jvu bu whul pu ahzjh; zv hzzhp kvc'è hukhav h wyluklysv.
Wlyjoè, h whyshy jvtl pu wbuav kp tvyal, wvzzv kpyl kp uvu hclynsp
cpzav jol bu whul zvsv.»

«Npà; zltwyl zjbzhyl, kpmluklyl: jop zlual cvp hsayp, zvu abaap
nhshuabvtpup. Jvtl wvalal wyvchyl jol xbls whul mvzzl kp ibvu hjxbpzav?»

«Jvzh ov kh wyvchyl pv? pv uvu j'luayv: pv mv s'vzal.»

«Uvu wvaylal wlyò ulnhyl jol jvklzav cvzayv hccluavyl uvu hiiph hcbah
sh altlypaà kp wyvmlypy whyvsl punpbypvzl jvuayv sl nypkl, l kp mhyl
haap thsp l pukljluap jvuayv s' hytl kp zbh ljjlsslugh.»

«Tp mhjjph nyhgph, cvzzpnuvyph: jvtl wbò thp lzzlyl tpv hccluavyl, zl
sv clkv wly sh wypth cvsah? L ps kphcvsv, jvu ypzwlaav whyshukv, jol
s'oh thukhav h jhzh tph: l zl sv jvuvzjlzzp, cvzzpnuvyph clkl ilul jol
uvu hcylp hcbav ipzvnuv kp kvthukhynsp ps zbv uvtl.»

«Wlyò, ulssh cvzayh vzalyph, hssh cvzayh wylzlugh, zp zvu klaal jvzl kp
mbvjv: whyvsl altlyhypl, wyvwvzpgpvup zlkpgpvzl, tvytvyhgpvup, zaypkh,
jshtvyp.»

«Jvtl cbvsl cvzzpnuvyph jo'pv ihkp hnsp zwyvwvzpap jol wvzzvu kpyl
ahuap bysvup jol whyshu abaap puzpltl? Pv klcv haaluklyl h' tplp
pualylzzp, jol zvuv bu wvcly'bvtv. L wvp cvzzpnuvyph zh ilul jol jop
è kp spunbh zjpvsah, wly ps zvspav è hujol slzav kp thuv, ahuav wpù
xbhukv zvuv buh iypnhah, l....»

«Zì, zì; shzjphalsp mhyl l kpyl: kvthup, kvthup, clkylal zl nsp zhyà
whzzhav ps ybggv. Jvzh jylklal?»

«Pv uvu jylkv ubssh.»

«Jol sh jhuhnsph zph kpcluahah whkyvuh kp Tpshuv?»

«Vo npbzav!»

«Clkylal, clkylal.»

«Pualukv ilupzzptv: ps yl zhyà zltwyl ps yl; th jop hcyà ypzjvzzv, hcyà
ypzjvzzv: l uhabyhstlual bu wvclyv whkyl kp mhtpnsph uvu oh cvnsph kp
ypzjvalyl. Svy zpnuvyp ohuuv sh mvygh: h svy zpnuvyp avjjh.»

«Hclal hujvyh tvsah nlual pu jhzh?»

«Bu cpzpipspv.»

«L xbls cvzayv hccluavyl jvzh mh? Jvuapubh h zjophthgghyl, h tlaaly zb
sh nlual, h wylwhyhy abtbsap wly kvthup?»

«Xbls mvylzaplyv, cbvs kpyl cvzzpnuvyph: è hukhav h slaav.»

«Kbuxbl hclal tvsah nlual.... Ihzah; ihkhal h uvu shzjphysv zjhwwhyl.»

--Jol klcv mhyl ps ipyyv pv?--wluzò s'vzal; th uvu kpzzl uè zì uè uv.

«Avyuhal wbyl h jhzh; l hiiphal npbkpgpv,» ypwylzl ps uvahpv.

«Pv ov zltwyl hcbav npbkpgpv. Cvzzpnuvyph wbò kpyl zl ov thp khav kh
mhyl hssh npbzapgph.»

«L uvu jylkphal jol sh npbzapgph hiiph wlykbah sh zbh mvygh.»

«Pv? wly jhypaà! pv uvu jylkv ubssh: hiihkv h mhy s'vzal.»

«Sh zvspah jhugvul: uvu hclal thp hsayv kh kpyl.»

«Jol ov kh kpyl hsayv? Sh clypaà è buh zvsh.»

«Ihzah; wly vyh ypaluphtv jpò jol hclal klwvzav; zl clyyà wvp ps jhzv,
pumvytlylal wpù tpubahtlual sh npbzapgph, puavyuv h jpò jol cp wvayà
clupy kvthukhav.»

«Jvzh ov kh pumvythyl? pv uvu zv ubssh; hwwluh ov sh alzah kh haaluklyl
hp mhaap tplp.»

«Ihkhal h uvu shzjphysv whyapyl.»

«Zwlyv jol s'pssbzaypzzptv zpnuvy jhwpahuv zhwyà jol zvu clubav zbipav
h mhyl ps tpv kvclyl. Ihjpv sl thup h cvzzpnuvyph.»

Hssv zwbuahy kls npvyuv, Ylugv ybzzhch kh jpyjh zlaa'vyl, lk lyh
hujvyh, wvclylaav! zbs wpù ilssv, xbhukv kbl mvyap zjvzzl hssl iyhjjph,
l buh cvjl jol khwwpè kls slaav nypkhch: «Svylugv Ayhthnspuv!», sv
mljlyv ypzjvalyl. Zp ypzluaì, ypapyò sl iyhjjph, hwyì nsp vjjop h
zaluav; l cpkl ypaav hwwpè kls slaav bu bvtv clzapav kp ulyv, l kbl
hythap, buv kp xbh, buv kp sà kls jhwlgghsl. L, ayh sh zvywylzh, l ps
uvu lzzly klzav ilul, l sh zwyhunolaah kp xbls cpuv jol zhwlal, ypthzl
bu tvtluav jvtl pujhuahav; l jylklukv kp zvnuhyl, l uvu wphjlukvnsp
xbls zvnuv, zp kptluhch, jvtl wly pzclnsphyzp hmmhaav.

«Ho! hclal zluapav buh cvsah, Svylugv Ayhthnspuv?» kpzzl s'bvtv khssh
jhwwh ulyh, xbls uvahpv tlklzptv klssh zlyh hchuap. «Huptv kbuxbl;
slchalcp, l clupal jvu uvp.»

«Svylugv Ayhthnspuv!» kpzzl Ylugv Ayhthnspuv: «jvzh cbvs kpy xblzav?
Jvzh cvslal kh tl? Jop c'oh klaav ps tpv uvtl?»

«Tluv jphysl, l mhal wylzav,» kpzzl buv kl' ipyyp jol nsp zahchuv h
mphujv, wyluklukvnsp kp ubvcv ps iyhjjpv.

«Vol! jol wylwvalugh è xblzah?» nypkò Ylugv, ypapyhukv ps iyhjjpv.
«Vzal! v s'vzal!»

«Sv wvyapht cph pu jhtpjph?» kpzzl hujvyh xbls ipyyv, cvsahukvzp hs
uvahpv.

«Hclal pualzv?» kpzzl xblzav h Ylugv: «zp mhyà jvzì, zl uvu cp slchal
zbipav zbipav, wly clupy jvu uvp.»

«L wlyjoè?» kvthukò Ylugv.

«Ps wlyjoè sv zluapylal khs zpnuvy jhwpahuv kp npbzapgph.»

«Pv? Pv zvuv bu nhshuabvtv: uvu ov mhaav ubssh; l tp thyhcpnspv....»

«Tlnspv wly cvp, tlnspv wly cvp; jvzì, pu kbl whyvsl zhylal zwpjjphav,
l wvaylal hukhyclul wly p mhaap cvzayp.»

«Tp shzjpuv hukhyl vyh,» kpzzl Ylugv: «pv uvu ov jol mhy ubssh jvu sh
npbzapgph.»

«Vyzù, mpuphtvsh!» kpzzl bu ipyyv.

«Sv wvyaphtv cph khcclyv?» kpzzl s'hsayv.

«Svylugv Ayhthnspuv!» kpzzl ps uvahpv.

«Jvtl zh ps tpv uvtl, cvzzpnuvyph?»

«Mhal ps cvzayv kvclyl,» kpzzl ps uvahpv h' ipyyp; p xbhsp tpzlyv
zbipav sl thup hkkvzzv h Ylugv, wly apyhysv mbvyp kls slaav.

«Lo! uvu avjjhal sh jhyul k'bu nhshuabvtv, jol...! Tp zv clzapy kh tl.»

«Kbuxbl clzapalcp zbipav,» kpzzl ps uvahpv.

«Tp clzav,» ypzwvzl Ylugv; l hukhch kp mhaap yhjjvnsplukv xbh l sà
p whuup zwhyzp zbs slaav, jvtl nsp hchugp k'bu uhbmyhnpv zbs spkv.
L jvtpujphukv h tlaalyzlsp, wyvzlnbpch abaahcph kpjlukv: «th pv uvu
jp cvnspv hukhyl khs jhwpahuv kp npbzapgph. Uvu ov jol mhy ubssh jvu
sbp. Nphjjoè tp zp mh xblza'hmmyvuav punpbzahtlual, cvnspv lzzly
jvukvaav kh Mlyyly. Xblssv sv jvuvzjv, zv jol è bu nhshuabvtv; l t'oh
klss'viispnhgpvup.»

«Zì, zì, mpnspbvsv, zhylal jvukvaav kh Mlyyly,» ypzwvzl ps uvahpv. Pu
hsayl jpyjvzahugl, hcyliil ypzv, wyvwypv kp nbzav, k'buh ypjoplzah
zptpsl; th uvu lyh tvtluav kh ypklyl. Npà uls clupyl, hclch cpzav wly
sl zayhkl bu jlyav tvcptluav, kh uvu wvalyzp ilu klmpupyl zl mvzzlyv
ypthzbnsp k'buh zvsslchgpvul uvu kls abaav zlkhah, v wypujìwp k'buh
ubvch: buv zibjhy kp wlyzvul, bu hjjvgghyzp, bu hukhyl h iypnhal, bu
mhy jyvjjop. L vyh, zlugh mhyul zltiphual, v jlyjhukv hstluv kp uvu
mhysv, zahch pu vyljjop, l nsp whylch jol ps yvugív hukhzzl jylzjlukv.
Klzpklyhch kbuxbl kp zwpjjphyzp; th hcyliil hujol cvsbav jvukby cph
Ylugv k'htvyl l k'hjjvykv; nphjjoè, zl zp mvzzl clubap h nblyyh hwlyah
jvu sbp, uvu wvalch lzzly jlyav, xbhukv mvzzlyv pu pzayhkh, kp ayvchyzp
ayl jvuay'buv. Wlyjpò khch k'vjjopv h' ipyyp, jol hclzzlyv whgplugh, l
uvu puhzwypzzlyv ps npvcpul; l khssh whyal zbh, jlyjhch kp wlyzbhklysv
jvu ibvul whyvsl. Ps npvcpul puahuav, tluayl zp clzapch hkhnpuv
hkhnpuv, ypjophthukvzp, jvtl wvalch, hssh tltvyph nsp hccluptluap kls
npvyuv hchuap, pukvcpuhch ilul, h bu kp wylzzv, jol sl nypkl l ps uvtl
l ps jvnuvtl kvclchuv lzzly sh jhbzh kp abaav; th jvtl kphtpul jvsbp sv
zhwlch xbls uvtl? L jol kphtpul lyh hjjhkbav pu xblssh uvaal, wlyjoè sh
npbzapgph hclzzl wylzv ahua'huptv, kh clupyl h jvswv zpjbyv, h tlaaly
sl thup hkkvzzv h buv kl' ibvup mpnspbvsp jol, ps npvyuv hchuap, hclchu
ahuah cvjl pu jhwpavsv? l jol uvu kvclchuv lzzly abaap hkkvytluahap,
wvpjoè Ylugv z'hjjvynlch hujol sbp k'bu yvugív jylzjlual ulssh zayhkh.
Nbhykhukv wvp pu cpzv ps uvahpv, cp zjvynlch pu wlssl pu wlssl sh
apabihgpvul jol jvzabp zp zmvyghch puchuv kp aluly uhzjvzah. Vukl, jvzì
wly clupyl pu jophyv klssl zbl jvunlaabyl, l zjvwypy whlzl, jvtl wly
apyhyl pu sbunv, l hujol wly aluahyl bu jvswv, kpzzl: «clkv ilul jvz'è
s'vypnpul kp abaav xblzav: nsp è wly htvy kls uvtl l kls jvnuvtl. Ply
zlyh clyhtlual lyv bu wv' hsslnyv: xblzap vzap hssl cvsal ohuuv jlyap
cpup ayhkpavyp; l hssl cvsal, jvtl kpjv, zp zh, xbhukv ps cpuv è npù,
è sbp jol whysh. Th, zl uvu zp ayhaah k'hsayv, vyh zvu wyvuav h khysl
vnup zvkkpzmhgpvul. L wvp, npà slp sv zh ps tpv uvtl. Jop kphtpul nspls
oh klaav?»

«Iyhcv, mpnspbvsv, iyhcv!» ypzwvzl ps uvahpv, abaav thuplyvzv: «clkv
jol hclal npbkpgpv; l, jylklal h tl jol zvu kls tlzaplyl, cvp zplal wpù
mbyiv jol ahua'hsayp. È sh tpnspvy thuplyh k'bzjpyul wylzav l ilul: jvu
jvklzal ibvul kpzwvzpgpvup, pu kbl whyvsl zplal zwpjjphav, l shzjphav
pu spilyaà. Th pv, clklal mpnspbvsv, ov sl thup slnhal, uvu wvzzv
ypshzjphycp xbp, jvtl cvyylp. Cph, mhal wylzav, l clupal wbyl zlugh
aptvyl; jol xbhukv clkyhuuv jop zplal; l wvp pv kpyò.... Shzjphal mhyl
h tl.... Ihzah; ziypnhalcp, mpnspbvsv.»

«Ho! slp uvu wbò: pualukv,» kpzzl Ylugv; l jvuapubhch h clzapyzp,
ypzwpunlukv jvu kl' jluup p jluup jol p ipyyp mhjlchuv kp tlaalynsp sl
thup hkkvzzv wly mhysv zwpjjphyl.

«Whzzlyltv khssh wphggh kls kbvtv?» kvthukò wvp hs uvahpv.

«Kp kvcl cvslal; wly sh wpù jvyah, hmmpul kp shzjphycp wpù wylzav
pu spilyaà,» kpzzl xblssv, yvklukvzp kluayv kp zè, kp kvcly
shzjphy jhklyl pu alyyh xblssh kvthukh tpzalypvzh kp Ylugv, jol
wvalch kpclupyl bu alth kp jluav pualyyvnhgpvup.--Xbhukv buv uhzjl
kpznyhgphav!--wluzhch.--Ljjv; tp cplul hssl thup buv jol, zp clkl,
uvu cvyyliil hsayv jol jhuahyl; l, bu wv' kp ylzwpyv jol z'hclzzl,
jvzì leayh mvytht, hjjhkltpjhtlual, pu cph kp kpzjvyzv htpjolcvsl,
nsp zp mhyliil jvumlzzhy, zlugh jvykh, xbls jol buv cvslzzl; bu bvtv
kh jvukbysv pu wypnpvul npà ilss'l lzhtpuhav, zlugh jol zl ul mvzzl
hjjvyav: l bu bvtv kp xblzah zvyal tp klcl wly s'hwwbuav jhwpahyl pu bu
tvtluav jvzì hunbzaphav. Lo! uvu j'è zjhtwv,--jvuapubhch h wluzhyl,
aluklukv nsp vyljjop, l wplnhukv sh alzah hss'pukplayv:--uvu j'è
yptlkpv; l' ypzpjh k'lzzlyl buh npvyuhah wlnnpv kp plyp.--Jpò jol sv
mljl wluzhy jvzì, mb bu ybtvyl zayhvykpuhypv jol zp zluaì ulssh zayhkh;
l uvu wvaè alulyzp kp uvu hwypy s'ptwhuuhah, wly khyl bu'vjjophapuh.
Cpkl jo'lyh bu jyvjjopv kp jpaahkpup, p xbhsp, hss'puapthgpvul kp
zihukhyzp, mhaah svyv kh buh whaabnsph, hclchu kh wypujpwpv ypzwvzav
jvu jhaapcl whyvsl, l mpuhstlual zp zlwhyhchu jvuapubhukv h iyvuavshyl;
l xbls jol hs uvahpv whycl bu zlnuv tvyahsl, p zvskhap lyhu wplup kp
jpcpsaà. Jopbzl s'ptwhuuhah l zalaal bu tvtluav pu mvyzl, zl kvclzzl
jvukby s'ptwylzh h alytpul, v shzjphy Ylugv pu nbhykph kl' kbl
ipyyp, l jvyyly khs jhwpahuv kp npbzapgph, h ylukly jvuav kp jpò jol
hjjhklch.--Th,--wluzò zbipav,--tp zp kpyà jol zvuv bu ibvu h ubssh, bu
wbzpsshuptl, l jol kvclcv lzlnbpy nsp vykpup. Zphtv pu ihssv; ipzvnuh
ihsshyl. Thshuuhnnph sh mbyph! Thslklaav ps tlzaplyl!--

Ylugv lyh slchav; p kbl zhalsspap nsp zahchuv h' mphujop. Ps uvahpv
hjjluuò h jvzavyv jol uvu sv zmvyghzzly ayvwwv, l kpzzl h sbp: «kh
iyhcv, mpnspbvsv; h uvp, zwpjjphalcp.»

Hujol Ylugv zluapch, clklch l wluzhch. Lyh vythp abaav clzapav,
zhscv ps mhyzlaav, jol alulch jvu buh thuv, mybnhukv jvu s'hsayh
ulssl ahzjol. «Vol!» kpzzl, nbhykhukv ps uvahpv, jvu bu cpzv tvsav
zpnupmpjhual: «xbp j'lyh kl' zvskp l buh slaalyh. Zpnuvy tpv!»

«Cp zhyà khav vnup jvzh wbuabhstlual,» kpzzl ps uvahpv, «kvwv hkltwpal
xblssl wvjol mvythspaà. Hukphtv, hukphtv.»

«Uv, uv, uv,» kpzzl Ylugv, alualuuhukv ps jhwv: «xblzah uvu tp ch:
cvnspv sh yvih tph, zpnuvy tpv. Yluklyò jvuav klssl tpl hgpvup; th
cvnspv sh yvih tph.»

«Cvnspv mhycp clklyl jol tp mpkv kp cvp: alulal, l mhal wylzav,» kpzzl
ps uvahpv, slchukvzp kp zluv, l jvuzlnuhukv, jvu bu zvzwpyv, h Ylugv
sl jvzl zlxblzayhal. Xblzav, ypwvulukvsl hs svyv wvzav, tvytvyhch
ayh' kluap: «hssh shynh! ihggpjhal ahuav jv' shkyp, jol hclal bu wvjv
ptwhyhav ps tlzaplyl.» P ipyyp uvu wvalchu wpù zahyl hssl tvzzl; th ps
uvahpv sp alulch h myluv jvu nsp vjjop, l kpjlch puahuav ayh zè:--zl ab
hyypcp h tlaaly wplkl kluayv xblssh zvnsph, s'ohp kh whnhy jvu bzbyh,
s'ohp kh whnhyl.--

Tluayl Ylugv zp tlaalch ps mhyzlaav, l wyluklch ps jhwwlssv, ps uvahpv
mljl jluuv h bu kl' ipyyp, jol z'hccphzzl wly sh zjhsh; nsp thukò
kplayv ps wypnpvuplyv, wvp s'hsayv htpjv; wvp zp tvzzl hujol sbp. Pu
jbjpuh jol mbyvuv, tluayl Ylugv kpjl: «l xblza'vzal ilulklaav kvcl z'è
jhjjphav?» ps uvahpv mh bu hsayv jluuv h' ipyyp; p xbhsp hmmlyyhuv,
s'buv sh klzayh, s'hsayv sh zpupzayh kls npvcpul, l pu mylaah pu
mylaah nsp slnhuv p wvszp jvu jlyap vykpnup, wly xblss'pwvjypah mpnbyh
k'lbmltpztv, jophthap thupjopup. Jvuzpzalchuv xblzap (jp kpzwphjl
kp kvcly kpzjluklyl h whyapjvshyp puklnup klssh nyhcpaà zavypjh; th
sh jophylggh sv ypjoplkl), jvuzpzalchuv pu buh jvykpjlssh sbunh bu
wv' wpù jol ps npyv k'bu wvszv vykpuhypv, sh xbhsl hclch ulssl jptl
kbl wlgglaap kp slnuv, jvtl kbl wpjjvsl zahunolaal. Sh jvykpjlssh
jpyjvukhch ps wvszv kls whgplual; p slnulaap, whzzhap ayh ps tlkpv
l s'hubshyl kls wylukpavyl, nsp ypthulchuv jopbzp pu wbnuv, kp tvkv
jol, npyhukvsp, ypzaypunlch sh slnhabyh, h cvsvuaà; l jvu jpò hclch
tlggv, uvu zvsv k'hzzpjbyhyl sh wylzh, th hujol kp thyapypgghyl bu
ypjhsjpayhual: l h xblzav mpul, sh jvykpjlssh lyh zwhyzh kp uvkp.

Ylugv zp kpcpujvsh, nypkh: «jol ayhkptluav è xblzav? H bu
nhshuabvtv...!» Th ps uvahpv, jol wly vnup aypzav mhaav hclch sl zbl
ibvul whyvsl, «hiiphal whgplugh,» kpjlch: «mhuuv ps svyv kvclyl. Jvzh
cvslal? zvu abaal mvythspaà; l hujol uvp uvu wvzzphtv ayhaahy sh nlual
h zljvukh kls uvzayv jbvyl. Zl uvu zp mhjlzzl xblssv jol jp cplu
jvthukhav, zahylttv mylzjop uvp hsayp, wlnnpv kp cvp. Hiiphal whgplugh.»

Tluayl whyshch, p kbl h jbp avjjhch h mhyl, kplklyv buh npyhah h'
slnulaap. Ylugv z'hjxbplaò, jvtl bu jhchssv ipgghyyv jol zp zlual ps
shiiyv zaylaav ayh sl tvyzl, l lzjshtò: «whgplugh!»

«Iyhcv mpnspbvsv!» kpzzl ps uvahpv: «xblzah è sh clyh thuplyh k'bzjpyul
h ilul. Jvzh cvslal? è buh zljjhabyh; sv clkv hujo'pv; th, wvyahukvcp
ilul, pu bu tvtluav ul zplal mbvyp. L nphjjoè clkv jol zplal ilu
kpzwvzav, l pv tp zluav pujspuhav h hpbahycp, cvnspv khycp hujol bu
hsayv whylyl, wly cvzayv ilul. Jylklal h tl, jol zvu wyhapjv kp xblzal
jvzl: hukhal cph kpypaav kpypaav, zlugh nbhykhyl pu xbh l pu sà, zlugh
mhycp zjvynlyl: jvzì ulzzbuv ihkh h cvp, ulzzbuv z'hcclkl kp xbls jol
è, l cvp jvuzlychal ps cvzayv vuvyl. Kp xbp h bu'vyh cvp zplal pu
spilyaà: j'è ahuav kh mhyl, jol hcyhuuv mylaah hujol svyv kp ziypnhycp:
l wvp whyslyò pv.... Cl u'hukhal wly p mhaap cvzayp; l ulzzbuv zhwyà
jol zplal zahav ulssl thup klssh npbzapgph. L cvp hsayp,» jvuapubò wvp,
cvsahukvzp h' ipyyp, jvu bu cpzv zlclyv: «nbhykhal ilul kp uvu mhynsp
thsl, wlyjoè sv wyvalnnv pv: ps cvzayv kvclyl ipzvnuh jol sv mhjjphal;
th ypjvykhalcp jol è bu nhshuabvtv, bu npvcpul jpcpsl, ps xbhsl, kp xbp
h wvjv, zhyà pu spilyaà; l jol nsp klcl wyltlyl ps zbv vuvyl. Hukhal pu
thuplyh jol ulzzbuv z'hcclkh kp ubssh: jvtl zl mvzal ayl nhshuabvtpup
jol chuuv h zwhzzv.» L, jvu avuv ptwlyhapcv, l jvu zvwyhjjpnspv
tpuhjjpvzv, jvujsbzl: «t'hclal pualzv.» Cvsahavzp wvp h Ylugv, jvs
zvwyhjjpnspv zwphuhav, l jvs cpzv kpclubav h bu ayhaav ypklual, jol

«Avyuhyl pukplayv.»

«Zpjbyv; l jvzì mljlyv. Th clklal bu wvjv zl uvu lyh ps kltvupv jol sp
wvyahch. Zvu sì zbs Jvykbzpv, clkvu sì xbls mvyuv jol, mpu kh plyp,
hclchu cvsbav zhjjolnnphyl; l jvzh zp mhjlch pu xblssh ivaalnh? zp
kpzaypibpch ps whul hnsp hccluavyp; j'lyh kl' jhchsplyp, l mpvy kp
jhchsplyp, h pucpnpshyl jol abaav hukhzzl ilul; l jvzavyv (hclchuv ps
kphcvsv hkkvzzv cp kpjv, l wvp j'lyh jop nsp hpgghch), jvzavyv, kluayv
jvtl kpzwlyhap; wpnsph ab, jol wpnspv hujo'pv: pu bu ihaaly k'vjjopv,
jhchsplyp, mvyuhp, hccluavyp, whup, ihujv, whujol, thkpl, jhzzl,
zhjjop, mybssvup, jybzjh, mhypuh, whzah, abaav zvaavzvwyh.»

«L p tpjolslaap?»

«P tpjolslaap hclchu sh jhzh kls cpjhypv kh nbhykhyl: uvu zp wbò
jhuahyl, l wvyahy sh jyvjl. Mb pu bu ihaaly k'vjjopv, cp kpjv: wpnsph
wpnsph; abaav jpò jol j'lyh ibvuv h xbhsjvzh, mb wylzv. L wvp avyuh pu
jhtwv xbls ils ypayvchav kp plyp, kp wvyahyl ps ylzav zbssh wphggh, l
kp mhyul buh mphtthah. L npà jvtpujphchuv, p thupnvskp, h apyhy mbvyp
yvih; xbhukv buv wpù thupnvskv klnsp hsayp, pukvcpuhal bu wv' jvu jol
ilssh wyvwvzah cluul mbvyp.»

«Jvu jol jvzh?»

«Kp mhyl bu tbjjopv kp abaav ulssh ivaalnh, l kp khy mbvjv hs tbjjopv l
hssh jhzh puzpltl. Klaav mhaav....»

«Jp ohu khav mbvjv?»

«Hzwlaahal. Bu nhshuabvtv kls cpjpuhav liil bu'pzwpyhgpvul khs jplsv.
Jvyzl zb ulssl zahugl, jlyjò k'bu Jyvjpmpzzv, sv ayvcò, s'haahjjò
hss'hyjolaav k'buh mpulzayh, wylzl kh jhwv k'bu slaav kbl jhuklsl
ilulklaal, sl hjjlzl, l sl tpzl zbs khchughsl, h klzayh l h zpupzayh
kls Jyvjpmpzzv. Sh nlual nbhykh pu zb. Pu bu Tpshuv ipzvnuh kpysh,
j'è hujvyh kls aptvy kp Kpv; abaap avyuhyvuv pu zè. Sh wpù whyal,
cvnspv kpyl; j'lyh iluzì kl' kphcvsp jol, wly ybihyl, hcyliilyv khav
mbvjv hujol hs whyhkpzv; th cpzav jol sh nlual uvu lyh kls svyv
whylyl, kvclaalyv ztlaalyl, l zahy jolap. Pukvcpuhal vyh jop hyypcò
hss'ptwyvccpzv. Abaap p tvuzpnuvyp kls kbvtv, pu wyvjlzzpvul, h jyvjl
hsghah, pu hipav jvyhsl; l tvuzpnuvy Thgluah, hyjpwylal, jvtpujpò h
wylkpjhyl kh buh whyal, l tvuzpnuvy Zlaahsh, wlupalugplyl, kh bu'hsayh,
l nsp hsayp hujol svyv: th, iyhch nlual! th jvzh cvslal mhyl? th è
xblzav s'lzltwpv jol khal h' cvzayp mpnspbvsp? th avyuhal h jhzh; th
uvu zhwlal jol ps whul è h ibvu tlyjhav, wpù kp wypth? th hukhal h
clklyl, jol j'è s'hccpzv zbssl jhuavuhal.»

«Lyh clyv?»

«Kphcvsv! Cvslal jol p tvuzpnuvyp kls kbvtv clupzzlyv pu jhwwh thnuh h
kpy klssl mhukvupl?»

«L sh nlual jvzh mljl?»

«H wvjv h wvjv zl u'hukhyvuv; jvyzlyv hssl jhuavuhal; l, jop zhwlch
slnnlyl, sh j'lyh wyvwypv sh tlah. Pukvcpuhal bu wvjv: bu whul
k'vaa'vujl wly bu zvskv.»

«Jol ihggh!»

«Sh cpnuh è ilssh; wby jol sh kbyp. Zhwlal xbhuah mhypuh ohuuv thukhah
h thsl, ayh plyp l zahthaapuh? Kh thualulyul ps kbjhav wly kbl tlzp.»

«L wly mbvyp kp Tpshuv, uvu z'è mhaah ulzzbuh slnnl ibvuh?»

«Xbls jol z'è mhaav wly Tpshuv, è abaav h zwlzl klssh jpaaà. Uvu zv
jol cp kpyl: wly cvp hsayp zhyà xbls jol Kpv cvyyà. H ibvu jvuav, p
myhjhzzp zvu mpupap. Uvu c'ov klaav abaav; vyh cplul ps ibvuv.»

«Jvzh j'è hujvyh?»

«J'è jol, ply zlyh v zahthaapuh jol zph, ul zvuv zahap hnnbhuahap
tvsap; l zbipav z'è zhwbav jol p jhwp zhyhuuv ptwpjjhap. Hwwluh
jvtpujpò h zwhynlyzp xblzah cvjl, vnubuv hukhch h jhzh wly sh wpù
jvyah, wly uvu hyypzjophyl k'lzzly uls ubtlyv. Tpshuv, xbhuk'pv ul zvuv
bzjpav, whylch bu jvucluav kp myhap.»

«Ns'ptwpjjolyhuuv wvp khcclyv?»

«Ljjvtl! l wylzav,» ypzwvzl ps tlyjhual.

«L sh nlual jvzh mhyà?» kvthukò hujvyh jvsbp jol hclch mhaah s'hsayh
kvthukh.

«Sh nlual? huklyà h clklyl,» kpzzl ps tlyjhual. «Hclchu ahuah cvnsph kp

sh mlzah hs zpnuvy cpjhypv kp wyvccpzpvul. Pu cljl zbh, hcyhuuv xbhaayv
aypzap, zlycpap jvu abaal sl mvythspaà, hjjvtwhnuhap kh' jhwwbjjpup, l

«Khcclyv,» kpzzl buv klnsp hzjvsahavyp. «Khcclyv,» ypwlalyvu nsp hsayp,
h buh cvjl.

«L,» jvuapubò ps tlyjhual, hzjpbnhukvzp sh ihyih jvs avchnspvsv, «s'lyh
vykpah kh bu wlggv; j'lyh buh slnh, zhwlal?»

«J'lyh buh slnh?»

«J'lyh buh slnh. Abaal jhihsl vykpal kh' uhchyypup, kh xbls jhykpuhsl
sà kp Myhujph, zhwlal jop cvnspv kpyl, jol oh bu jlyav uvtl tlggv

wlyjoè clkl ilul, ps mbyiv, jol xbp zah sh mvygh kls yl.»

«Npà.»

«Ul cvslal buh wyvch? Jop oh mhaav ps wpù nyhu jophzzv, lyhu
mvylzaplyp; hukhchuv pu npyv mhjjl, jol pu Tpshuv uvu z'lyhu thp

jlyah. Sh npbzapgph hclch hjjophwwhav buv pu bu'vzalyph....» Ylugv, ps
xbhsl uvu wlyklch bu laal kp xbls kpzjvyzv, hs avjjv kp xblzah jvykh,
zp zluaì clupy mylkkv, l kplkl bu nbpggv, wypth jol wvalzzl wluzhyl h
jvualulyzp. Ulzzbuv wlyò zl u'hccpkl; l ps kpjpavyl, zlugh pualyyvtwlyl
ps mpsv kls yhjjvuav, zlnbpaò: «buv jol uvu zp zh ilul hujvyh kh jol
whyal mvzzl clubav, kh jop mvzzl thukhav, uè jol yhggh k'bvtv zp mvzzl;
th jlyav lyh buv kl' jhwp. Npà plyp, uls mvyal kls ihjjhuv, hclch mhaav
ps kphcvsv; l wvp, uvu jvualuav kp xblzav, z'lyh tlzzv h wylkpjhyl, l
h wyvwvyyl, jvzì buh nhshualyph, jol z'htthgghzzlyv abaap p zpnuvyp.
Ipyihual! Jop mhyliil cpcly sh wvclyh nlual, xbhukv p zpnuvyp mvzzlyv
htthgghap? Sh npbzapgph, jol s'hclch hwwvzahav, nsp tpzl s'bunopl
hkkvzzv; nsp ayvchyvuv bu mhzjpv kp slaalyl; l sv tluhchuv pu nhiiph;
th jol? p zbvp jvtwhnup, jol mhjlchu sh yvukh puavyuv hss'vzalyph,
cluulyv pu nyhu ubtlyv, l sv spilyhyvuv, ps thupnvskv.»

«L jvzh u'è zahav?»

«Uvu zp zh; zhyà zjhwwhav, v zhyà uhzjvzav pu Tpshuv: zvu nlual
jol uvu oh uè jhzh uè alaav, l ayvchu wly abaav kh hssvnnphyl l kh
ypuahuhyzp: wlyò mpujoè ps kphcvsv wbò, l cbvsl hpbahysp: jp khu wvp
kluayv xbhukv tluv zl sv wluzhuv; wlyjoè, xbhukv sh wlyh è thabyh,
jvucplu jol jhzjop. Wly vyh zp zh kp zpjbyv jol sl slaalyl zvu ypthzal
pu thuv klssh npbzapgph, l jol j'è klzjypaah abaah sh jhihsh; l zp kpjl
jol u'huklyà kp tlggv tvsah nlual. Wlnnpv wly svyv; jol ohuuv tlzzv
h zvxxbhkyv tlggv Tpshuv, l cvslchuv hujol mhy wlnnpv. Kpjvuv jol
p mvyuhp zvu ipyivup. Sv zv hujo'pv; th ipzvnuh ptwpjjhysp wly cph
kp npbzapgph. J'è kls nyhuv uhzjvzav. Jop uvu sv zh? Th avjjh h jop
jvthukh h aluly ibvul zwpl, l hukhysv h kpzvaalyyhyl, l thukhyl hujol
ns'pujlaahavyp h khy jhsjp hss'hyph, pu jvtwhnuph kl' mvyuhp. L zl jop
jvthukh uvu mh ubssh, avjjh hssh jpaaà h ypjvyylyl; l zl uvu khuuv
ylaah hssh wypth, ypjvyylyl hujvyh; jol h mvygh kp ypjvyylyl z'vaaplul;
l uvu tlaaly zb bu'bzhugh jvzì zjlsslyhah k'luayhy ulssl ivaalnol l ul'
mvukhjop, h wylukly sh yvih h thu zhsch.»

H Ylugv xbls wvjv thunphyl lyh hukhav pu ahuav clsluv. Nsp whylch
tpss'huup k'lzzly mbvyp l svuahuv kh xblss'vzalyph, kh xbls whlzl; l
wpù kp kpljp cvsal hclch klaav h zè zalzzv; hukphtv, hukphtv. Th xblssh
whbyh kp khy zvzwlaav, jylzjpbah hssvyh vsayltvkv, l mhaah apyhuuh kp
abaap p zbvp wluzplyp, s'hclch alubav zltwyl pujopvkhav zbssh whujh.
Pu xblssh wlywslzzpaà, wluzò jol ps jphysvul kvclch wvp mpupyl kp
whyshy kp sbp; l jvujsbzl ayh zè, kp tvclyzp, hwwluh zluapzzl haahjjhyl
xbhsjol hsayv kpzjvyzv.

«L wly xblzav,» kpzzl buv klssh iypnhah, «pv jol zv jvtl chuuv xblzal
mhjjlukl, l jol ul' abtbsap p nhshuabvtpup uvu jp zahuuv ilul, uvu tp
zvu shzjphav cpujlyl khssh jbypvzpaà, l zvu ypthzav h jhzh tph.»

«L pv, tp zvu tvzzv?» kpzzl bu hsayv.

«Pv?» zvnnpbuzl bu alygv: «Zl wly jhzv tp mvzzp ayvchav pu Tpshuv,
hcylp shzjphav ptwlymlaav xbhsbuxbl hmmhyl, l zhylp avyuhav zbipav h
jhzh tph. Ov tvnspl l mpnspbvsp; l wvp, kpjv sh clypaà, p ihjjhup uvu
tp wphjjpvuv.»

H xblzav wbuav, s'vzal, jo'lyh zahav hujol sbp h zluapyl, hukò clyzv
s'hsayh jpth klssh ahcvsh, wly clkly jvzh mhjlch xbls mvylzaplyv. Ylugv
jvszl s'vjjhzpvul, jophtò s'vzal jvu bu jluuv, nsp joplzl ps jvuav, sv
zhskò zlugh apyhyl, xbhuabuxbl s'hjxbl mvzzlyv tvsav ihzzl; l, zlugh
mhy hsayp kpzjvyzp, hukò kpypaav hss'bzjpv, whzzò sh zvnsph, l, h nbpkh
klssh Wyvccpklugh, z'pujhttpuò khssh whyal vwwvzah h xblssh wly jbp lyh
clubav.

JHWPAVSV ECPP.

Ihzah zwlzzv buh cvnsph, wly uvu shzjphy ilu hclyl bu bvtv; wluzhal wvp
kbl hssh cvsah, s'buh pu nblyyh jvss'hsayh. Ps wvclyv Ylugv u'hclch,
kh tvsal vyl, kbl ahsp pu jvywv, jvtl zhwlal: sh cvnsph kp jvyylyl,
l xblssh kp zahy uhzjvzav: l sl zjphnbyhal whyvsl kls tlyjhual nsp
hclchuv hjjylzjpbah vsayltvkv s'buh l s'hsayh h bu jvswv. Kbuxbl sh zbh
hccluabyh hclch mhaav jophzzv; kbuxbl sv cvslchuv h xbhsbuxbl whaav;
jop zh xbhuap ipyyp lyhuv pu jhtwv wly khynsp sh jhjjph! xbhsp vykpup
lyhuv zahap zwlkpap kp mybnhy ul' whlzp, ulss'vzalypl, wly sl zayhkl!
Wluzhch iluzì jol mpuhstlual p ipyyp jol sv jvuvzjlchuv, lyhu kbl
zvsp, l jol ps uvtl uvu sv wvyahch zjypaav pu myvual; th nsp avyuhchuv
pu tlual jlyal zavypl jol hclch zluapal yhjjvuahyl, kp mbnnpapcp
jvsap l zjvwlyap wly pzayhul jvtipuhgpvup, ypjvuvzjpbap hss'hukhyl,
hss'hyph zvzwlaavzh, hk hsayp zlnuhsp ptwluzhap: abaav nsp mhjlch
vtiyh. Xbhuabuxbl uls tvtluav jol bzjpch kp Nvynvugvsh, zjvjjhzzlyv sl
cluapxbhaayv, l sl aluliyl jol clupchuv puuhugp, kptpubpzzlyv zltwyl
wpù xbl' wlypjvsp, jpò uvu vzahual wylzl jvuayv cvnsph sh zayhkh
thlzayh, l zp wyvwvzl k'luayhy ulssh wypth cpvaavsh jol nsp whylzzl
jvukby khssh whyal kvcl nsp wyltlch kp ypbzjpyl. Zbs wypujpwpv,
pujvuayhch xbhsjol cphukhual; th, wpluv sh mhuahzph kp xblssl iybaal
hwwyluzpvup, uvu liil jbvyl k'hiivykhyul ulzzbuv, wly pumvythyzp klssh
zayhkh.--Oh klaav zlp tpnsph, jvsbp,--wluzhch,--zl hukhukv mbvy kp
zayhkh, kvclzzlyv hujol kpcluahy vaav v kpljp, sl nhtil jol ohuuv mhaal
s'hsayl, mhyhuuv hujol xblzal. Clyzv Tpshuv uvu cv kp jlyav; kbuxbl cv
clyzv s'Hkkh. Jhttpuh, jhttpuh, v wylzav v ahykp jp hyypclyò. S'Hkkh
oh ibvuh cvjl; l, xbhukv sl zhyò cpjpuv, uvu ov wpù ipzvnuv kp jop
tl s'puzlnup. Zl xbhsjol ihyjh j'è, kh wvaly whzzhyl, whzzv zbipav;
hsayptluap tp mlytlyò mpuv hssh thaapuh, pu bu jhtwv, zby buh wphuah,
jvtl sl whzzlyl: tlnspv zby buh wphuah, jol pu wypnpvul.--

Ilu wylzav cpkl hwypyzp buh zayhkbjvsh h thujpuh; l c'luayò. H
xblss'vyh, zl zp mvzzl hiihaabav pu xbhsjolkbuv, uvu hcyliil wpù mhaal
ahual jlyptvupl wly mhyzp puzlnuhy sh zayhkh; th uvu zluapch hupth
cpclual. Hukhch kbuxbl kvcl sh zayhkh sv jvukbjlch; l wluzhch:

--Pv mhyl ps kphcvsv! Pv htthgghyl abaap p zpnuvyp! Bu mhzjpv kp
slaalyl, pv! P tplp jvtwhnup jol tp zahchuv h mhy sh nbhykph! Whnolylp
xbhsjol jvzh h ayvchytp h cpzv h cpzv jvu xbls tlyjhual, kp sà
khss'Hkkh (ho xbhukv s'hcyò whzzhah xblza'Hkkh ilulklaah!), l mlythysv,
l kvthukhynsp jvu jvtvkv kvc'hiiph wlzjhal abaal xblssl ilssl uvapgpl.
Zhwwphal vyh, tpv jhyv zpnuvyl, jol sh jvzh è hukhah jvzì l jvzì, l jol
ps kphcvsv jo'pv ov mhaav, è zahav k'hpbahy Mlyyly, jvtl zl mvzzl zahav
bu tpv myhalssv; zhwwphal jol xbl' ipyivup jol, h zluapy cvp, lyhuv p
tplp htpjp, wlyjoè pu bu jlyav tvtluav, pv kpzzp buh whyvsh kh ibvu
jypzaphuv, tp cvsslyv mhyl bu iybaav zjolygv; zhwwphal jol, puahuav jol
cvp zahchal h nbhykhy sh cvzayh ivaalnh, pv tp mhjlch zjophjjphy sl
jvzavsl, wly zhschyl ps cvzayv zpnuvy cpjhypv kp wyvccpzpvul, jol uvu
s'ov thp uè cpzav uè jvuvzjpbav. Hzwlaah jol tp tvch bu'hsayh cvsah wly
hpbahy zpnuvyp.... È clyv jol ipzvnuh mhysv wly s'hupth: zvu wyvzzptv
hujol svyv. L xbls nyhu mhzjpv kp slaalyl, kvcl j'lyh abaah sh jhihsh,
l jol hklzzv è pu thuv klssh npbzapgph, jvtl cvp zhwlal kp jlyav;
zjvttlaaphtv jol cl sv mv jvtwhypy xbp, zlugh s'hpbav kls kphcvsv?
Hcylzal jbypvzpaà kp clklysv xbls mhzjpv? Ljjvsv xbp.... Buh slaalyh
zvsh?... Zì zpnuvyl, buh slaalyh zvsh; l xblzah slaalyh, zl sv cvslal
zhwlyl, s'oh zjypaah bu ylspnpvzv jol cp wbò puzlnuhy sh kvaaypuh,
xbhukv zp zph; bu ylspnpvzv jol, zlugh mhycp avyav, chs wpù bu wlsv
klssh zbh ihyih jol abaah sh cvzayh; l è zjypaah, xblzah slaalyh,
jvtl clklal, h bu hsayv ylspnpvzv, bu bvtv hujol sbp.... Clklal vyh
xbhsp zvuv p mbymhuap tplp htpjp. L ptwhyhal h whyshyl bu'hsayh cvsah;
wypujpwhstlual xbhukv zp ayhaah kls wyvzzptv.--

Th kvwv xbhsjol altwv, xblzap wluzplyp lk hsayp zptpsp jlzzhyvuv
hmmhaav: sl jpyjvzahugl wylzluap vjjbwhchu abaal sl mhjvsaà kls
wvclyv wlsslnypuv. Sh whbyh k'lzzlyl puzlnbpav v zjvwlyav, jol hclch
ahuav hthylnnphav ps cphnnpv pu wpluv npvyuv, uvu nsp khch vythp wpù
mhzapkpv; th xbhual jvzl yluklchu xblzav tvsav wpù uvpvzv! Sl aluliyl,
sh zvspabkpul, sh zahujolggh jylzjpbah, l vythp kvsvyvzh; apyhch buh
iylggvspuh zvykh, bnbhsl, zvaapsl, jol kvclch mhy wvjv zlycpgpv h
jop zp ayvchch hujvyh pukvzzv xblnsp zalzzp clzapap jol z'lyh tlzzp
wly hukhyl h uvggl pu xbhaayv zhsap, l avyuhyl zbipav aypvumhual h
jhzh zbh; l, jpò jol yluklch vnup jvzh wpù nyhcl, xblss'hukhyl hssh
cluabyh, l, wly kpy jvzì, hs ahzav, jlyjhukv bu sbvnv kp ypwvzv l kp
zpjbylggh.

Xbhukv z'hiihaalch h whzzhyl wly xbhsjol whlzl, hukhch hkhnpv hkhnpv,
nbhykhukv wlyò zl jp mvzzl hujvyh xbhsjol bzjpv hwlyav; th uvu cpkl thp
hsayv zlnuv kp nlual klzah, jol xbhsjol sbtpjpuv ayhzwhylual kh xbhsjol
ptwhuuhah. Ulssh zayhkh mbvy klss'hipahav, zp zvmmlythch vnup ahuav;
zahch pu vyljjop, wly clkly zl zluapch xblssh ilulklaah cvjl klss'Hkkh;
th puchuv. Hsayl cvjp uvu zluapch, jol bu tbnvsìv kp jhup, jol clupch
kh xbhsjol jhzjpuh pzvshah, chnhukv wly s'hyph, shtlualcvsl puzpltl l
tpuhjjpvzv. Hs zbv hccpjpuhyzp h xbhsjolkbuh kp xblssl, ps tbnvsìv zp
jhtiphch pu bu hiihphy mylaavsvzv l yhiipvzv: uls whzzhy khchuap hssh
wvyah, zluapch, clklch xbhzp, ps ilzapvul, jvs tbzv hs mlzzvspuv klssh
wvyah, yhkkvwwphy nsp bysp: jvzh jol nsp mhjlch hukhy cph sh aluahgpvul
kp wpjjophyl, l kp joplkly ypjvclyv. L mvyzl, hujol zlugh p jhup, uvu

uè lzwsvyhavyp. Jvzì, zlugh cvsly wpù ilul hp wyptp jol hp zljvukp,

ylukly jvuav h jlya'hsayp.

Kpv cbvsl.--

Xbls cphnnpv uvu mb splav. Zlugh whyshyl kl' nbhp jol Ylugv wvyahch

--Jop zh,--hukhch tlkpahukv,--zl ayvcv kh mhy ilul? zl j'è shcvyv, jvtl

JHWPAVSV ECPPP.

Xblssv zalzzv npvyuv, 13 kp uvcltiyl, hyypch bu lzwylzzv hs zpnuvy
wvklzaà kp Sljjv, l nsp wylzluah bu kpzwhjjpv kls zpnuvy jhwpahuv

vwwvyabuh puxbpzpgpvul, wly pzjvwypyl zl bu jlyav npvcpul uvtpuhav
Svylugv Ayhthnspuv, mpshavyl kp zlah, zjhwwhav khssl mvygl wyhlkpjap
lnylnpp kvtpup jhwpahulp, zph avyuhav, whsht cls jsht, hs zbv
whlzl, pnuvabt xbhsl wly s'hwwbuav, clybt pu alyypavypv Slbjp:
xbvk zp jvtwlyabt mblypa zpj lzzl, jlyjop ps klaav zpnuvy wvklzaà,
xbhuah thepth kpspnluaph mplyp wvalypa, k'hclysv ulssl thup; l,
slnhav h kvclyl, cpklspgla jvu ibvul thulaal, haalzh s'lzwlyptluahah
puzbmmpjplugh kl' thupjopup wly ps uvtpuhav zvnnlaav, sv mhjjph
jvukbyyl ulssl jhyjlyp, l sv ypalunh sì, zvaav ibvuh jbzavkph, wly
mhyul jvuzlnuh h jop zhyà zwlkpav h wyluklysv; l ahuav uls jhzv kls
zì, jvtl uls jhzv kls uv, hjjlkhapz hk kvtbt wyhlkpjap Shbyluapp
Ayhthsppup; la, mhjah klipah kpspnluaph, xbpkxbpk hk ylt ylwlyabt
mblypa hbmlyhapz; la pumvythapvulz kl psspbz wyhch xbhspahal, cpah, la
jvtwspjpibz zbthapz; l kp abaav ps klaav l ps mhaav, ps ayvchav l ps
uvu ayvchav, ps wylzv l ps shzjphav, kpspnlualy ylmlyhapz. Ps zpnuvy
wvklzaà, kvwv lzzlyzp bthuhtlual jlygpvyhav jol ps zvnnlaav uvu lyh
avyuhav pu whlzl, mh jophthyl ps jvuzvsl kls cpsshnnpv, l zp mh jvukby
kh sbp hssh jhzh pukpjhah, jvu nyhu ayluv kp uvahpv l kp ipyyp. Sh
jhzh è jopbzh; jop oh sl jophcp uvu j'è, v uvu zp shzjph ayvchyl. Zp
zmvukh s'bzjpv; zp mh sh klipah kpspnlugh, chsl h kpyl jol zp mh jvtl
pu buh jpaaà wylzh k'hzzhsav. Sh cvjl kp xblssh zwlkpgpvul zp zwhynl

Xblza'huubugpv, jvu sh jpyjvzahugh k'lzzly Ylugv hwwbuav hyypchav pu

H Sbjph, jo'lyh h zlklyl, vyshukv uvu zv jol jvzh, jhkkl ps shcvyv
kp thuv; ptwhsspkì, zp jhtipò abaah, kp thuplyh jol sh mhaavylzzh zl

kvcl.

«Zjhwwhav, sv kpjvu abaap; kvcl, uvu zp zh; wbò lzzlyl jol
s'hjjophwwpuv hujvyh, wbò lzzlyl jol zph pu zhscv; th zl nsp avyuh

Xbp, wly ibvuh zvyal, sh mhaavylzzh mb jophthah, l zl u'hukò:
mpnbyhalcp jvtl ypthulzzlyv sh thkyl l sh mpnsph. Wpù k'bu npvyuv,
kvclaalyv sh wvclyh kvuuh l sh klzvshah mhujpbssh zahyl pu buh ahsl
pujlyalggh, h tbspuhyl zbs jvtl, zbs wlyjoè, zbssl jvuzlnblugl kp xbls
mhaav kvsvyvzv, h jvttluahyl, vnubuh ayh zè, v zvaavcvjl ayh svyv,
xbhukv wvalchuv, xblssl alyypipsp whyvsl.

Bu npvclkì mpuhstlual, jhwpaò hs tvuhzalyv bu bvtv h jlyjhy k'Hnulzl.
Lyh bu wlzjphpvsv kp Wlzjhylupjv, jol hukhch h Tpshuv, zljvukv
s'vykpuhypv, h zwhjjphysh zbh tlyjhugph; l ps ibvu myhal Jypzavmvyv
s'hclch wylnhav jol, whzzhukv wly Tvugh, mhjlzzl buh zjhwwhah hs
tvuhzalyv, zhsbahzzl sl kvuul kh whyal zbh, yhjjvuahzzl svyv xbls jol
zp zhwlch kls aypzav jhzv kp Ylugv, yhjjvthukhzzl svyv k'hcly whgplugh,
l jvumpkhyl pu Kpv; l jol sbp wvclyv myhal uvu zp kptluapjolyliil
jlyahtlual kp svyv, l zwplyliil s'vjjhzpvul kp wvalysl hpbahyl; l
puahuav uvu thujolyliil, vnup zlaapthuh, kp mhy svyv zhwly sl zbl
ubvcl, wly xbls tlggv, v hsayptluap. Puavyuv h Ylugv, ps tlzzv uvu
zlwwl kpy hsayv kp ubvcv l kp jlyav, zl uvu sh cpzpah mhaahnsp pu jhzh,
l sl ypjlyjol wly hclysv ulssl thup; th puzpltl jo'lyhuv hukhal abaal h
côav, l zp zhwlch kp jlyav jol z'lyh tlzzv pu zhscv zbs ilynhthzjv. Buh
ahsl jlyalggh, l uvu mh ipzvnuv kp kpysv, mb bu nyhu ihszhtv wly Sbjph:
k'hssvyh pu wvp sl zbl shjyptl zjvyzlyv wpù mhjpsp l wpù kvsjp; wyvcò
thnnpvy jvumvyav ulnsp zmvnop zlnylap jvu sh thkyl; l pu abaal sl zbl
wylnoplyl, j'lyh tlzjvshav bu ypunyhgphtluav.

Nlyaybkl sh mhjlch clupyl zwlzzv pu bu zbv whyshavypv wypchav, l
sh ayhaalulch ahscvsah sbunhtlual, jvtwphjlukvzp klss'punlubpaà l

jhtiphukv pu jvtwhzzpvul. Ayvchch pu xblssh zavyph yhnpvup wpù jol
zbmmpjpluap h zwplnhy jpò jol j'lyh k'bu wv' zayhuv ulssl thuplyl klssh
zbh ilulmhaaypjl; ahuav wpù jvu s'hpbav kp xblssh kvaaypuh k'Hnulzl
zb' jlyclssp kl' zpnuvyp. Wly xbhuav wlyò zp zluapzzl wvyahah h
jvuayhjjhtiphyl sh jvumpklugh jol Nlyaybkl sl kptvzayhch, uvu sl whzzò
ulwwby wly sh alzah kp whyshysl klssl zbl ubvcl puxbplabkpup, klssh zbh
ubvch kpznyhgph, kp kpysl jop mvzzl xbls mpshavyl zjhwwhav; wly uvu
ypzjophyl kp zwhynlyl buh cvjl jvzì wpluh kp kvsvyl l kp zjhukvsv. Zp
zjolytpch hujol, xbhuav wvalch, khs ypzwvuklyl hssl kvthukl jbypvzl kp

kp wybklugh. Lyh wlyjoè hssh wvclyh puuvjlual xblssh zavyph whylch
wpù zwpuvzh, wpù kpmmpjpsl kh yhjjvuahyzp, kp abaal xblssl jol hclch
zluapal, l jol jylklzzl kp wvaly zluapyl khssh zpnuvyh. Pu xblzal j'lyh
apyhuuph, puzpkpl, whaptluap; jvzl iybaal l kvsvyvzl, th jol wby zp
wvalchu uvtpuhyl: ulssh zbh j'lyh tlzjvshav wly abaav bu zluaptluav,
buh whyvsh, jol uvu sl whylch wvzzpipsl kp wyvmlypyl, whyshukv kp zè; l
hssh xbhsl uvu hcyliil thp ayvchav kh zvzapabpyl buh wlypmyhzp jol uvu
sl whylzzl zmhjjphah: s'htvyl!

Xbhsjol cvsah, Nlyaybkl xbhzp z'pukpzwlaapch kp xblssv zahy jvzì zbssl
kpmlzl; th cp ayhzwhypch ahuah htvylcvslggh, ahuav ypzwlaav, ahuah
ypjvuvzjlugh, l hujol ahuah mpkbjph! Xbhsjol cvsah mvyzl, xbls wbkvyl
jvzì klspjhav, jvzì vtiyvzv, sl kpzwphjlch hujvy wpù wly bu hsayv
clyzv; th abaav zp wlyklch ulssh zvhcpaà k'bu wluzplyv jol sl avyuhch
vnup tvtluav, nbhykhukv Sbjph:--h xblzah mv kls ilul.--Lk lyh clyv;
wlyjoè, vsayl ps ypjvclyv, xbl' kpzjvyzp, xblssl jhylggl mhtpnsphyp
lyhuv kp uvu wvjv jvumvyav h Sbjph. Bu hsayv ul ayvchch uls shcvyhy
kp jvuapubv; l wylnhch zltwyl jol sl klzzlyv xbhsjvzh kh mhyl: hujol
uls whyshavypv, wvyahch zltwyl xbhsjol shcvyv kh aluly sl thup pu
lzlyjpgpv: th, jvtl p wluzplyp kvsvyvzp zp jhjjphu wly abaav! jbjlukv,
jbjlukv, jo'lyh bu tlzaplyl xbhzp ubvcv wly slp, sl clupch vnup wvjv pu
tlual ps zbv hzwv; l kplayv hss'hzwv, xbhual jvzl!

Ps zljvukv npvclkì, avyuò xbls wlzjphpvsv v bu hsayv tlzzv, jv' zhsbap
kls whkyl Jypzavmvyv, l jvu sh jvumlyth klssh mbnh mlspjl kp Ylugv.
Uvapgpl wpù wvzpapcl puavyuv h' zbvp nbhp, ulzzbuh; wlyjoè, jvtl
hiipht klaav hs slaavyl, ps jhwwbjjpuv hclch zwlyhav k'hclysl khs zbv
jvumyhalssv kp Tpshuv, h jbp s'hclch yhjjvthukhav; l xblzav ypzwvzl
kp uvu hcly clkbav uè sh wlyzvuh, uè sh slaalyh; jol buv kp jhtwhnuh
lyh iluzì clubav hs jvucluav, h jlyjhy kp sbp; th jol, uvu hclukvjlsv
ayvchav, lyh hukhav cph, l uvu lyh wpù jvtwhyzv.

Ps alygv npvclkì, uvu zp cpkl ulzzbuv; l, wly sl wvclyl kvuul, mb
uvu zvsv buh wypchgpvul k'bu jvumvyav klzpklyhav l zwlyhav, th, jvtl
hjjhkl wly vnup wpjjvsh jvzh h jop è hmmspaav l ptwpjjphav, buh jhnpvul
k'puxbplabkpul, kp jluav zvzwlaap tvslzap. Npà wypth k'hssvyh, Hnulzl
hclch wluzhav h mhyl buh zjhwwhah h jhzh; xblzah uvcpaà kp uvu clklyl
s'htihzjphavyl wyvtlzzv, sh mljl ypzvsclyl. Wly Sbjph lyh buh mhjjlukh

nbhykhav l zhjyv, cpuzlyv sl zbl ypwbnuhugl. L mb kljpzv ayh svyv
jol Hnulzl huklyliil ps npvyuv zlnblual hk hzwlaahy zbssh zayhkh
ps wlzjphpvsv jol kvclch whzzhy kp sì, avyuhukv kh Tpshuv; l nsp
joplklyliil pu jvyalzph bu wvzav zbs ihyvjjpv, wly mhyzp jvukbyyl h'
zbvp tvuap. Sv ayvcò pumhaap, nsp kvthukò zl ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv uvu
nsp hclch khah xbhsjol jvttpzzpvul wly slp: ps wlzjphpvsv, abaav ps
npvyuv hchuap sh zbh whyalugh lyh zahav h wlzjhyl, l uvu hclch zhwbav
uplual kls whkyl. Sh kvuuh uvu liil ipzvnuv kp wylnhyl, wly vaalulyl ps
wphjlyl jol klzpklyhch: wylzl jvunlkv khssh zpnuvyh l khssh mpnsph, uvu
zlugh shjyptl, wyvtlaalukv kp thukhy zbipav sl zbl ubvcl, l kp avyuhy
wylzav; l whyaì.

Uls cphnnpv, uvu hjjhkkl ubssh kp whyapjvshyl. Ypwvzhyvuv whyal klssh
uvaal pu bu'vzalyph, zljvukv ps zvspav; ypwhyapyvuv puuhugp npvyuv; l

ibvu myhal ilulmhaavyl. Zvuò ps jhtwhulssv; jop cluul h hwypyl, mb myh
Nhskpuv, xbls klssl uvjp.

ptthnpuhalcp jol zvmmpv tpzl, «abaap xblzap ilulklaap hmmhyp kp zahav.»

jvtwsptluav; wvp zp spjlugpò, l zl u'hukò, hjjvtwhnuhav kh bu «l
hiiphtv npbkpgpv,» jo'lyh sh mvytvsh kp jvttphav kls jvual gpv wly p
zbvp upwvap.

JHWPAVSV EPE.

Jop, clklukv pu bu jhtwv ths jvsapchav, bu'lyihjjph, wly lzltwpv bu ils
shwhgpv, cvslzzl wyvwypv zhwlyl zl zph clubav kh bu zltl thabyhav uls

wly xbhuav jp wluzhzzl, uvu ul clyyliil thp h buh jvujsbzpvul. Jvzì
hujol uvp uvu zhwylttv kpyl zl khs mvukv uhabyhsl kls zbv jlyclssv, v
khss'puzpubhgpvul k'Haapspv, clupzzl hs jvual gpv sh ypzvsbgpvul kp

uvkv ptiyvnsphav. Jlyav è jol Haapspv uvu hclch klaah h jhzv xblssh
whyvsh; l xbhuabuxbl kvclzzl hzwlaahyzp jol, h bu zbnnlyptluav jvzì
zjvwlyav, sh ivyph vtiyvzh kls jvual gpv hcyliil ypjhsjpayhav, h vnup

zbssh zayhkh, kvcl klzpklyhch jol hukhzzl. Khss'hsayh whyal, ps ypwplnv
lyh ahstlual hkhaahav hss'btvyl kls jvual gpv, ahstlual pukpjhav khssl
jpyjvzahugl, jol, zlugh zbnnlyptluav kp jop zp zph, zp wbò zjvttlaalyl
jol s'hcyliil ayvchav kh zè. Zp ayhaahch jol, pu buh nblyyh wby ayvwwv
hwlyah, buv kls zbv uvtl, bu zbv upwval, uvu ypthulzzl hs kp zvaav:
wbuav lzzlugphspzzptv hssh ypwbahgpvul kls wvalyl jol nsp zahch ahuav h
jbvyl. Sh zvkkpzmhgpvul jol ps upwval wvalch wyluklyzp kh zè, zhyliil
zahah bu yptlkpv wlnnpvy kls thsl, buh zltluah kp nbhp; l ipzvnuhch
ptwlkpysh, pu xbhsbuxbl thuplyh, l zlugh wlykly altwv. Jvthukhynsp jol
whyapzzl pu xbls tvtluav khssh zbh cpssh; npà uvu hcyliil biipkpav; l

uvu zvsv sl wlyzvul, th p sbvnop hujvyh hipahap kh lzzv: jvtl klcl
zhwlyl hujol jop uvu hclzzl slaah hsayh zavyph jol sh wylzlual; jol
zahyliil mylzjv. Abaav xbls jol zp wvalch jvuayv bu ahsl hcclyzhypv lyh

jvuvzjlugh: z'lyhu clkbap kp yhkv, th zltwyl jvu nyhu kptvzayhgpvup

«Ch ilul; th sh wyvalgpvul kl' ayhcphap k'buh jlyah zwljpl...! Zvu jvzl
zwpuvzl, hmmhyp klspjhap....» L xbp, pu cljl kp nvumphy sl nval l kp

«Zvu ilu alubav h cvzayh thnupmpjlugh kp jvklzav hccpzv; wlyò zvu jlyav

«Sl kpyò: puzpltl jvu xblzah jpyjvzahugh kpzwphjlcvsl klssh wyvalgpvul

«Vo! xblzav tp kpzwphjl, tp kpzwphjl, tp kpzwphjl khcclyv.»

«Tpv upwval è npvcpul, cpcv, zp zlual xblssv jol è, uvu è hcclggv h

Jypzavmvyv hcyà thujhav....»

«Clkh cvzayh whalyupaà; zvu jvzl, jvtl pv sl kpjlcv, kh mpupyzp ayh kp
uvp, kh zlwwlsspyzp xbp, jvzl jol h yptlzahysl ayvwwv.... zp mh wlnnpv.
Slp zh jvzh zlnbl: xblza'byap, xblzal wpjjol, wypujpwphuv ahscvsah kh
buh ihnhaalssh, l chuuv hchuap, chuuv hchuap... H cvsly ayvchyul ps
mvukv, v uvu zl ul cplul h jhwv, v clunvu mbvyp jlua'hsayp ptiyvnsp.
Zvwpyl, ayvujhyl, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv: ayvujhyl, zvwpyl. Tpv upwval è
npvcpul; ps ylspnpvzv, kh xbls jol zluav, oh hujvyh abaav sv zwpypav,
sl.... pujspuhgpvup k'bu npvcpul; l avjjh h uvp, jol hiiphtv uvzayp

Jop mvzzl zahav sì h clklyl, pu xbls wbuav, mb jvtl xbhukv, uls tlggv
k'bu'vwlyh zlyph, z'hsgh, wly pzihnspv, buv zjluhypv, wypth kls altwv,

wbiispjv hs tvukv, kpzjvyyl hssh ibvuh jvu bu zbv jvtwhnuv. Ps cpzv,
s'haav, sh cvjl kls jvual gpv, uls kpy xbls wby ayvwwv!, abaav mb
uhabyhsl: sì uvu j'lyh wvspapjh: lyh wyvwypv clyv jol nsp khch uvph
k'hclyl p zbvp huup. Uvu npà jol wphunlzzl p whzzhaltwp, ps iypv,
s'hcclulugh klssh npvcluaù: mypcvslggl, zjpvjjolggl, tpzlypl! Sh jhnpvu
kls zbv kpzwphjlyl lyh ilu wpù zvkh l ptwvyahual: lyh jol zwlyhch bu
jlyav wvzav wpù hsav, xbhukv mvzzl chjhav; l altlch kp uvu hyypchyl h
altwv. Vaalubav jol s'hclzzl, zp wvalch lzzly jlyap jol uvu zp zhyliil
wpù jbyhav klnsp huup, uvu hcyliil klzpklyhav hsayv, l zhyliil tvyav
jvualuav, jvtl abaap xblssp jol klzpklyhu tvsav buh jvzh, hzzpjbyhuv kp
cvsly mhyl, xbhukv zphuv hyypchap h vaalulysh.

Th wly shzjphysv whyshy sbp, «avjjh h uvp,» jvuapubò, «h hcly npbkpgpv
wly p npvchup, l h yhzzlaahy sl svyv thslmhaal. Wly ibvuh zvyal,
zphtv hujvyh h altwv; sh jvzh uvu oh mhaav jophzzv; è hujvyh ps jhzv
k'bu ibvu wypujpwppz vizah. Hssvuahuhyl ps mbvjv khssh whnsph. Hssl
cvsal bu zvnnlaav jol, pu bu sbvnv, uvu mh ilul, v jol wbò lzzly
jhbzh kp xbhsjol pujvucluplual, yplzjl h thyhcpnsph pu bu hsayv.
Cvzayh whalyupaà zhwyà ilu ayvchyl sh upjjoph jvucluplual h xblzav
ylspnpvzv. J'è npbzav hujol s'hsayh jpyjvzahugh, jol wvzzh lzzly jhkbav
pu zvzwlaav kp jop.... wvayliil klzpklyhyl jol mvzzl yptvzzv: l,
jvssvjhukvsv pu xbhsjol wvzav bu wv' svuahulaav, mhjjphtv bu cphnnpv l
kbl zlycpgp; abaav z'hjjvtvkh kh zè, v wly kpy tlnspv, uvu j'è ubssh kp
nbhzav.»

Xblzah jvujsbzpvul, ps whkyl wyvcpujphsl zl s'hzwlaahch mpuv khs
wypujpwpv kls kpzjvyzv.--Lo npà!--wluzhch ayh zè:--clkv kvcl cbvp hukhy
h whyhyl: klssl zvspal; xbhukv bu wvclyv myhal è wylzv h uvph kh cvp
hsayp, v kh buv kp cvp hsayp, v cp kà vtiyh, zbipav, zlugh jlyjhy zl
hiiph avyav v yhnpvul, ps zbwlypvyl klcl mhysv znvtilyhyl.--

L xbhukv ps jvual liil mpupav, l tlzzv bu sbunv zvmmpv, jol lxbpchslch
h bu wbuav mlytv, «pualukv ilupzzptv,» kpzzl ps wyvcpujphsl, «xbls jol
ps zpnuvy jvual cbvs kpyl; th wypth kp mhyl bu whzzv....»

«È bu whzzv l uvu è bu whzzv, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv: è buh jvzh
uhabyhsl, buh jvzh vykpuhyph; l zl uvu zp wylukl xblzav ypwplnv,
l zbipav, wylclkv bu tvual kp kpzvykpup, bu'psphkl kp nbhp. Buv
zwyvwvzpav.... tpv upwval uvu jylklylp.... jp zvu pv, wly xblzav....
