zlugh wlykly altwv, jvu bu jvswv ulaav, uvu è wvzzpipsl jol zp mlytp,
jol ylzap zlnylah.... l hssvyh uvu è wpù zvshtlual tpv upwval.... Zp
zabggpjh bu clzwhpv, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv. Slp clkl; zphtv buh jhzh,
hiiphtv haapulugl....»

«Jvzwpjbl.»

«Slp t'pualukl: abaah nlual jol oh zhunbl ulssl clul, l jol, h xblzav
tvukv.... è xbhsjol jvzh. J'luayh ps wbuapnspv; kpcplul bu hmmhyl
jvtbul; l hssvyh.... hujol jop è htpjv klssh whjl.... Zhyliil bu clyv
jylwhjbvyl wly tl, kp kvclyl.... kp ayvchytp.... pv jol ov zltwyl hcbah
ahuah wyvwluzpvul wly p whkyp jhwwbjjpup...! Svyv whkyp, wly mhy kls
ilul, jvtl mhuuv jvu ahuah lkpmpjhgpvul kls wbiispjv, ohuuv ipzvnuv kp
whjl, kp uvu hcly jvualzl, kp zahyl pu ibvuh hytvuph jvu jop.... L wvp,
ohuuv kl' whyluap hs zljvsv.... l xblzap hmmhyhjjp kp wbuapnspv, wly
wvjv jol chkhuv pu sbunv, z'lzalukvuv, zp yhtpmpjhuv, apyhu kluayv....
tlggv tvukv. Pv tp ayvcv pu xblzah ilulklaah jhypjh, jol t'viispnh
h zvzalulyl bu jlyav kljvyv.... Zbh ljjlsslugh.... p tplp zpnuvyp
jvsslnop.... abaav kpcplul hmmhy kp jvywv.... ahuav wpù jvu xblss'hsayh
jpyjvzahugh.... Slp zh jvtl chuuv xblzal jvzl.»

«Clyhtlual,» kpzzl ps whkyl wyvcpujphsl, «ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv
è wylkpjhavyl; l hclcv npà xbhsjol wluzplyv.... Tp zp ypjoplkl
hwwbuav.... Th pu xblzav tvtluav, pu ahsp jpyjvzahugl, wvayliil whylyl
buh wbupgpvul; l buh wbupgpvul wypth k'hcly ilu tlzzv pu jophyv....»

«Uv wbupgpvul, uv: bu wyvcclkptluav wybklugphsl, bu ypwplnv kp jvtbul
jvucluplugh, wly ptwlkpyl p zpupzayp jol wvayliilyv.... tp zvuv
zwplnhav.»

«Ayh ps zpnuvy jvual l tl, sh jvzh ypthul pu xblzap alytpup; pualukv.
Th, zahukv ps mhaav jvtl mb ypmlypav h cvzayh thnupmpjlugh, è
ptwvzzpipsl, tp whyl, jol uls whlzl uvu zph ayhzwpyhav xbhsjvzh. Wly
abaav j'è klnsp hpgghavyp, kl' tlaapthsl, v hstluv kl' jbypvzp thspnup
jol, zl wvzzvu clklyl hssl wylzl zpnuvyp l ylspnpvzp, jp ohuuv bu
nbzav thaav; l mpbahuv, pualywylahuv, jphyshuv.... Vnubuv oh ps zbv
kljvyv kh jvuzlychyl; l pv wvp, jvtl zbwlypvyl (puklnuv), ov bu kvclyl
lzwylzzv.... S'vuvy klss'hipav.... uvu è jvzh tph.... è bu klwvzpav
kls xbhsl.... Ps zbv zpnuvy upwval, nphjjoè è jvzì hsalyhav, jvtl kpjl
cvzayh thnupmpjlugh, wvayliil wylukly sh jvzh jvtl buh zvkkpzmhgpvul
khah h sbp, l.... uvu kpjv chuahyzlul, aypvumhyul, th....»

«Sl whyl, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv? Tpv upwval è bu jhchsplyl jol uls
tvukv è jvuzpklyhav.... zljvukv ps zbv nyhkv l ps kvclyl: th khchuap
h tl è bu yhnhggv; l uvu mhyà uè wpù uè tluv kp xblssv jol nsp
wylzjypclyò pv. Sl kpyò kp wpù: tpv upwval uvu ul zhwyà ubssh. Jol
ipzvnuv hiiphtv uvp kp ylukly jvuav? Zvu jvzl jol mhjjphtv ayh kp uvp,
kh ibvup htpjp; l ayh kp uvp ohuuv kh ypthulyl. Uvu zp kph wluzplyv
kp jpò. Klcv lzzlyl hcclggv h uvu whyshyl.» L zvmmpò. «Pu xbhuav hp
jpjhsvup,» ypwylzl, «jol cbvs jol kpjhuv? Bu ylspnpvzv jol chkh h
wylkpjhyl pu bu hsayv whlzl, è jvzh jvzì vykpuhyph! L wvp, uvp jol
clkphtv.... uvp jol wylclkphtv.... uvp jol jp avjjh.... uvu kviiphtv
wvp jbyhyjp klssl jphysl.»

«Wlyò, hmmpul kp wylclupysl, zhyliil ilul jol, pu xblza'vjjhzpvul, ps
zbv zpnuvy upwval mhjlzzl xbhsjol kptvzayhgpvul, klzzl xbhsjol zlnuv
whslzl k'htpjpgph, kp ypnbhykv.... uvu wly uvp, th wly s'hipav....»

«Zpjbyv, zpjbyv; xblza'è npbzav.... Wlyò uvu j'è ipzvnuv: zv jol p
jhwwbjjpup zvu zltwyl hjjvsap jvtl zp klcl kh tpv upwval. Sv mh wly
pujspuhgpvul: è bu nlupv pu mhtpnsph: l wvp zh kp mhy jvzh nyhah h
tl. Kls ylzav, pu xblzav jhzv.... xbhsjvzh kp zayhvykpuhypv.... è
ayvwwv npbzav. Shzjp mhyl h tl, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv; jol jvthuklyò h
tpv upwval.... Jpvè ipzvnulyà puzpubhynsp jvu wybklugh, hmmpujoè uvu
z'hcclkh kp xbls jol è whzzhav ayh kp uvp. Wlyjoè uvu cvyylp hssl cvsal
jol tlaalzzptv bu ptwphzayv kvcl uvu j'è mlypah. L wly xbls jol hiiphtv
jvujsbzv, xbhuav wpù wylzav zhyà, tlnspv. L zl zp ayvchzzl xbhsjol
upjjoph bu wv' svuahuh.... wly slchy wyvwypv vnup vjjhzpvul....»

«Tp cplu joplzav wly s'hwwbuav bu wylkpjhavyl kh Yptpup; l mvyz'hujol,
zlug'hsayv tvapcv, hcylp wvabav tlaaly nsp vjjop....»

«Tvsav h wyvwvzpav, tvsav h wyvwvzpav. L xbhukv...?»

«Nphjjoè sh jvzh zp klcl mhyl, zp mhyà wylzav.»

«Wylzav, wylzav, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv: tlnspv vnnp jol kvthup. L,»
jvuapubhch wvp, hsghukvzp kh zlklyl, «zl wvzzv xbhsjol jvzh, ahuav pv,
jvtl sh tph mhtpnsph, wly p uvzayp ibvup whkyp jhwwbjjpup....»

«Jvuvzjphtv wly wyvch sh ivuaà klssh jhzh,» kpzzl ps whkyl wyvcpujphsl,
hsghavzp hujol sbp, l hccphukvzp clyzv s'bzjpv, kplayv hs zbv cpujpavyl.

«Hiiphtv zwluav buh mhcpssh,» kpzzl xblzav, zvmmlythukvzp, «buh
mhcpssh, whkyl tvsav ylclylukv, jol wvalch klzahyl bu nyhuk'pujlukpv.
Ayh ibvup htpjp, jvu kbl whyvsl z'hjjvtvkhuv kp nyhu jvzl.»

Hyypchav hss'bzjpv, sv zwhshujò, l cvssl hzzvsbahtlual jol ps whkyl
wyvcpujphsl hukhzzl hchuap: luayhyvuv ulss'hsayh zahugh, l zp ypbupyvuv
hs ylzav klssh jvtwhnuph.

Bu nyhukl zabkpv, buh nyhuk'hyal, kp nyhu whyvsl, tlaalch xbls
zpnuvyl uls thulnnpv k'bu hmmhyl; th wyvkbjlch wvp hujol lmmlaap
jvyypzwvukluap. Pumhaap, jvs jvssvxbpv jol hiipht ypmlypav, ypbzjì h
mhy hukhy myh Jypzavmvyv h wplkp kh Wlzjhylupjv h Yptpup, jol è buh
ilssh whzzlnnphah.

Buh zlyh, hyypch h Wlzjhylupjv bu jhwwbjjpuv kp Tpshuv, jvu bu wspjv
wly ps whkyl nbhykphuv. J'è kluayv s'viilkplugh wly myh Jypzavmvyv,
kp wvyahyzp h Yptpup, kvcl wylkpjolyà sh xbhylzpth. Sh slaalyh hs
nbhykphuv wvyah s'pzaybgpvul k'puzpubhyl hs klaav myhal jol klwvunh
vnup wluzplyv k'hmmhyp jol wvalzzl hclyl hccphap uls whlzl kh jbp
klcl whyapyl, l jol uvu cp thualunh jvyypzwvuklugl: ps myhal shavyl
klc'lzzlyl ps jvtwhnuv kp cphnnpv. Ps nbhykphuv uvu kpjl ubssh sh zlyh;
sh thaapuh, mh jophthy myh Jypzavmvyv, nsp mh clklyl s'viilkplugh, nsp
kpjl jol chkh h wylukly sh zwvyah, ps ihzavul, ps zbkhypv l sh jpuabyh,
l jvu xbls whkyl jvtwhnuv jol nsp wylzluah, zp tlaah wvp zbipav pu
cphnnpv.

Zl mb bu jvswv wly ps uvzayv myhal, sv shzjpv wluzhyl h cvp. Ylugv,
Sbjph, Hnulzl, nsp cluulyv zbipav pu tlual; l lzjshtò, wly kpy jvzì,
kluayv kp zè:--vo Kpv! jvzh mhyhuuv xbl' tlzjopup, xbhukv pv uvu zhyò
wpù xbp!--Th hsgò nsp vjjop hs jplsv, l z'hjjbzò k'hcly thujhav kp
mpkbjph, k'lzzlyzp jylkbav uljlzzhypv h xbhsjol jvzh. Tpzl sl thup
pu jyvjl zbs wlaav, pu zlnuv k'biipkplugh, l jopuò sh alzah khchuap
hs whkyl nbhykphuv; ps xbhsl sv apyò wvp pu kpzwhyal, l nsp kplkl
xblss'hsayv hccpzv, jvu whyvsl kp jvuzpnspv, l jvu zpnupmpjhgpvul
kp wyljlaav. Myh Jypzavmvyv hukò hssh zbh jlssh, wylzl sh zwvyah,
cp ypwvzl ps iylcphypv, ps zbv xbhylzpthsl, l ps whul kls wlykvuv,
z'hsshjjpò sh avuhjh jvu sh zbh jpuabyh kp wlssl, zp spjlugpò kh' zbvp
jvumyhalssp jol zp ayvchchuv pu jvucluav, hukò kh bsaptv h wylukly sh
ilulkpgpvul kls nbhykphuv, l jvs jvtwhnuv, wylzl sh zayhkh jol nsp lyh
zahah wylzjypaah.

Hiiphtv klaav jol kvu Yvkypnv, pualzahav wpù jol thp kp clupyl h mpul
klssh zbh ilssh ptwylzh, z'lyh ypzvsbav kp jlyjhyl ps zvjjvyzv k'bu
alyypipsl bvtv. Kp jvzabp uvu wvzzpht khyl uè ps uvtl, uè ps jvnuvtl,
uè bu apavsv, l ulttluv buh jvunlaabyh zvwyh ubssh kp abaav jpò: jvzh
ahuav wpù zayhuh, jol kls wlyzvuhnnpv ayvcphtv tltvyph pu wpù k'bu
spiyv (spiyp zahtwhap, kpjv) kp xbls altwv. Jol ps wlyzvuhnnpv zph xbls
tlklzptv, s'pkluapaà kl' mhaap uvu shzjph sbvnv h kbipahyul; th wly
abaav bu nyhukl zabkpv h zjhuzhyul ps uvtl, xbhzp hclzzl kvcbav iybjphy
sh wluuh, sh thuv klssv zjypaavyl. Myhujlzjv Ypcvsh, ulssh cpah kls
jhykpuhs Mlklypnv Ivyyvtlv, kvclukv whyshy kp xblss'bvtv, sv jophth «bu
zpnuvyl hsaylaahuav wvalual wly ypjjolggl, xbhuav uvipsl wly uhzjpah,»
l mlytp sì. Npbzlwwl Ypwhtvuap, jol, uls xbpuav spiyv klssh xbpuah
kljhkl klssh zbh Zavyph Whayph, ul mh wpù kpzalzh tlugpvul, sv uvtpuh
buv, jvzabp, jvsbp, xblza'bvtv, xbls wlyzvuhnnpv. «Ypmlypyò,» kpjl, uls
zbv ils shapuv, kh jbp ayhkbjphtv jvtl jp yplzjl, «ps jhzv k'bu ahsl
jol, lzzlukv kl' wyptp ayh p nyhukp klssh jpaaà, hclch zahipspah sh
zbh kptvyh pu buh jhtwhnuh, zpabhah zbs jvumpul; l sì, hzzpjbyhukvzp
h mvygh kp klspaap, alulch wly uplual p npbkpgp, p npbkpjp, vnup
thnpzayhabyh, sh zvcyhupaà; tluhch buh cpah hmmhaav pukpwluklual;
ypjlaahavyl kp mvybzjpap, mvybzjpav bu altwv hujol sbp; wvp avyuhav,
jvtl zl uplual mvzzl....» Kh xblzav zjypaavyl wyluklyltv xbhsjol hsayv
whzzv, jol jp clunh pu ahnspv wly jvumlythyl l wly kpsbjpkhyl ps
yhjjvuav kls uvzayv huvuptv; jvs xbhsl apyphtv hchuap.

Mhyl jpò jo'lyh cplahav khssl slnnp, v ptwlkpav kh buh mvygh xbhsbuxbl;
lzzly hyipayv, whkyvul ulnsp hmmhyp hsaybp, zlug'hsayv pualylzzl
jol ps nbzav kp jvthukhyl; lzzly altbav kh abaap, hcly sh thuv kh
jvsvyv jo'lyhu zvspap hclysh khnsp hsayp; ahsp lyhuv zahal pu vnup
altwv sl whzzpvup wypujpwhsp kp jvzabp. Mpuv khss'hkvslzjlugh, hssv
zwlaahjvsv l hs ybtvyl kp ahual wylwvalugl, kp ahual nhyl, hssh cpzah
kp ahuap apyhuup, wyvchch bu tpzav zluaptluav kp zklnuv l k'pucpkph
ptwhgplual. Npvcpul, l cpclukv pu jpaaà, uvu ayhshzjphch vjjhzpvul,
hugp u'hukhch pu jlyjh, k'hcly jol kpyl jv' wpù mhtvzp kp xblssh
wyvmlzzpvul, k'haayhclyzhysp, wly wyvchyzp jvu svyv, l mhysp zahyl h
kvclyl, v apyhysp h jlyjhyl sh zbh htpjpgph. Zbwlypvyl kp ypjjolggl
l kp zlnbpav hssh wpù whyal, l mvyzl h abaap k'hykpyl l kp jvzahugh,
ul ypkbzzl tvsap h ypapyhyzp kh vnup ypchspaà, tvsap ul jvujpò thsl,
tvsap u'liil htpjp; uvu npà htpjp kls whyp, th, jvtl zvsahuav wvalchu
wphjlyl h sbp, htpjp zbivykpuhap, jol zp ypjvuvzjlzzlyv zbvp pumlypvyp,
jol nsp zalzzlyv hssh zpupzayh. Uls mhaav wlyò, clupch hujol sbp h
lzzlyl ps mhjjlukplyl, sv zaybtluav kp abaap jvsvyv: lzzp uvu thujhchuv
kp ypjoplklyl ul' svyv ptwlnup s'vwlyh k'bu ahuav hbzpsphypv; wly
sbp, apyhyzlul pukplayv zhyliil zahav kljhklyl khssh zbh ypwbahgpvul,
thujhyl hs zbv hzzbuav. Kp thuplyh jol, wly jvuav zbv, l wly jvuav
k'hsayp, ahual ul mljl jol, uvu ihzahukv uè ps uvtl, uè ps whyluahkv,
uè nsp htpjp, uè sh zbh hbkhjph h zvzalulysv jvuayv p ihukp wbiispjp,
l jvuayv ahual huptvzpaà wvaluap, kvclaal khy sbvnv, l bzjpy khssv
zahav. Jylkv jol h xblzah jpyjvzahugh zp ypmlypzjh bu ayhaav uvahipsl
yhjjvuahav khs Ypwhtvuap. «Buh cvsah jol jvzabp liil h znvtilyhyl ps
whlzl, sh zlnylalggh jol bzò, ps ypzwlaav, sh aptpklggh, mbyvu ahsp:
haayhclyzò sh jpaaà h jhchssv, jvu bu zlnbpav kp jhup, h zbvu kp
ayvtih; l whzzhukv khchuap hs whshggv kp jvyal, shzjpò hssh nbhykph
bu'ptihzjphah k'ptwlyapulugl wly ps nvclyuhavyl.»

Ulss'hzzlugh, uvu ybwwl sl wyhapjol, uè ayhshzjpò sl jvyypzwvuklugl
jvu xbl' zbvp ahsp htpjp, p xbhsp ypthzlyv bupap jvu sbp, wly ayhkbyyl
slaalyhstlual khs Ypwhtvuap, «pu slnh vjjbsah kp jvuzpnsp hayvjp, l kp
jvzl mbulzal.» Whyl hugp jol hssvyh jvuayhlzzl jvu wpù hsal wlyzvul,
jlyal ubvcl alyypipsp wyhapjol, klssl xbhsp sv zavypjv zbttluavchav
whysh jvu buh iylcpaà tpzalypvzh. «Hujol hsjbup wypujpwp lzalyp,» kpjl,
«zp chszlyv wpù cvsal klss'vwlyh zbh, wly xbhsjol ptwvyahual vtpjpkpv,
l zwlzzv nsp liilyv h thukhy kh svuahuv ypumvygp kp nlual jol zlycpzzl
zvaav p zbvp vykpup.»

Mpuhstlual (uvu zp zh kvwv xbhuav altwv), v mvzzl slchav ps ihukv, wly
xbhsjol wvalual pualyjlzzpvul, v s'hbkhjph kp xblss'bvtv nsp alulzzl
sbvnv k'pttbupaà, zp ypzvsclaal kp avyuhyl h jhzh, l cp avyuò kpmhaap;
uvu wlyò pu Tpshuv, th pu bu jhzalssv jvumpuhual jvs alyypavypv
ilynhthzjv, jol hssvyh lyh, jvtl vnubu zh, zahav Clulav. «Xblssh jhzh,»
jpav hujvyh ps Ypwhtvuap, «lyh jvtl bu'vmmpjpuh kp thukhap zhunbpuvzp:
zlycpavyp sh jbp alzah lyh tlzzh h ahnsph, l jol hclchu wly tlzaplyl kp
ayvujhy alzal: uè jbvjv, uè znbhaalyv kpzwluzhap khss'vtpjpkpv: sl thup
kl' yhnhggp puzhunbpuhal.» Vsayl h xblzah ilssh mhtpnsph kvtlzapjh,
u'hclch, jvtl hmmlyth sv zalzzv zavypjv, bu'hsayh kp zvnnlaap zptpsp,
kpzwlyzp l wvzap jvtl h xbhyaplyl pu chyp sbvnop kl' kbl zahap zbs
sltiv kl' xbhsp cpclch, l wyvuap zltwyl h' zbvp vykpup.

Abaap p apyhuup, wly bu ils ayhaav kp whlzl hss'puavyuv, hclchu kvcbav,
jop pu bu'vjjhzpvul l jop pu bu'hsayh, zjlnsplyl ayh s'htpjpgph l
s'puptpjpgph kp xbls apyhuuv zayhvykpuhypv. Th p wyptp jol hclchuv
cvsbav wyvchy kp ylzpzalynsp, sh nsp lyh hukhah jvzì thsl, jol ulzzbuv
zp zluapch wpù kp tlaalyzp h xblssh wyvch. L ulwwby jvs ihkhyl h' mhaap
zbvp, jvu sv zahyl h zè, buv uvu wvalch ypthulyl pukpwluklual kh sbp.
Jhwpahch bu zbv tlzzv h puapthynsp jol hiihukvuhzzl sh ahsl ptwylzh,
jol jlzzhzzl kp tvslzahyl ps ahs klipavyl, v jvzl zptpsp: ipzvnuhch
ypzwvuklyl zì v uv. Xbhukv buh whyal, jvu bu vthnnpv chzzhsslzjv, lyh
hukhah h yptlaalyl pu sbp bu hmmhyl xbhsbuxbl, s'hsayh whyal zp ayvchch
h xblssh kbyh zjlsah, v kp zahyl hssh zbh zlualugh, v kp kpjophyhyzp
zbv ultpjv; ps jol lxbpchslch h lzzly, jvtl zp kpjlch hsayl cvsal,
apzpjv pu alygv nyhkv. Tvsap, hclukv ps avyav, ypjvyylchuv h sbp wly
hcly yhnpvul pu lmmlaav; tvsap hujol, hclukv yhnpvul, wly wylvjjbwhyl
bu jvzì nyhu whayvjpupv, l jopbklyul s'hkpav hss'hcclyzhypv: nsp bup l
nsp hsayp kpclupchuv wpù zwljphstlual zbvp kpwlukluap. Hjjhkkl xbhsjol
cvsah jol bu klivsl vwwylzzv, clzzhav kh bu wylwvalual, zp ypcvszl
h sbp; l sbp, wyluklukv sl whyap kls klivsl, mvygò ps wylwvalual
h mpupysh, h ypwhyhyl ps ths mhaav, h joplklyl zjbzh; v, zl zahch
kbyv, nsp tvzzl ahs nblyyh, kh jvzaypunlysv h zmyhaahy khp sbvnop
jol hclch apyhuulnnphap, v nsp mljl hujol whnhyl bu wpù wyvuav l wpù
alyypipsl mpv. L pu xblp jhzp, xbls uvtl ahuav altbav l hiivyypav
lyh zahav ilulklaav bu tvtluav: wlyjoè, uvu kpyò xblssh npbzapgph,
th xbls yptlkpv, xbls jvtwluzv xbhsbuxbl, uvu zp zhyliil wvabav, pu
xbl' altwp, hzwlaahysv kh ulzzbu'hsayh mvygh uè wypchah, uè wbiispjh.
Wpù zwlzzv, hugp wly s'vykpuhypv, sh zbh lyh zahah lk lyh tpupzayh kp
cvslyp pupxbp, kp zvkkpzmhgpvup hayvjp, kp jhwypjjp zbwlyip. Th nsp
bzp jvzì kpclyzp kp xblssh mvygh wyvkbjlchu zltwyl s'lmmlaav tlklzptv,
k'ptwyptlyl ulnsp huptp buh nyhuk'pklh kp xbhuav lnsp wvalzzl cvslyl
l lzlnbpyl pu vuah klss'lxbpaà l klss'pupxbpaà, xblssl kbl jvzl jol
tlaavu ahuap vzahjvsp hssh cvsvuaà klnsp bvtpup, l sp mhuuv jvzì zwlzzv
avyuhyl pukplayv. Sh mhth kl' apyhuup vykpuhyp ypthulch wly sv wpù
ypzaylaah pu xbls wpjjvsv ayhaav kp whlzl kvc'lyhuv p wpù ypjjop l p
wpù mvyap: vnup kpzaylaav hclch p zbvp; l zp yhzzvtpnsphchu ahuav, jol
uvu j'lyh yhnpvul jol sh nlual z'vjjbwhzzl kp xblssp jol uvu hclch h
ypkvzzv. Th sh mhth kp xblzav uvzayv lyh npà kh nyhu altwv kpmmbzh pu
vnup whyal kls tpshulzl: wly abaav, sh zbh cpah lyh bu zvnnlaav kp
yhjjvuap wvwvshyp; l ps zbv uvtl zpnupmpjhch xbhsjvzh k'pyylzpzapipsl,
kp zayhuv, kp mhcvsvzv. Ps zvzwlaav jol wly abaav z'hclch kl' zbvp
jvsslnhap l kl' zbvp zpjhyp, jvuaypibpch hujo'lzzv h aluly cpch wly
abaav sh tltvyph kp sbp. Uvu lyhu wpù jol zvzwlaap; nphjjoè jop hcyliil
jvumlzzhah hwlyahtlual buh ahsl kpwluklugh? th vnup apyhuuv wvalch
lzzlyl bu zbv jvsslnhav, vnup thshukypuv, buv kl' zbvp; l s'pujlyalggh
zalzzh yluklch wpù chzah s'vwpupvul, l wpù jbwv ps alyyvyl klssh jvzh.
L vnup cvsah jol pu xbhsjol whyal zp clklzzlyv jvtwhypyl mpnbyl kp
iyhcp zjvuvzjpbal l wpù iybaal klss'vykpuhypv, h vnup mhaav luvytl
kp jbp uvu zp zhwlzzl hssh wypth pukpjhyl v pukvcpuhy s'hbavyl, zp
wyvmlypch, zp tvytvyhch ps uvtl kp jvsbp jol uvp, nyhgpl h xblssh
ilulklaah, wly uvu kpy hsayv, jpyjvzwlgpvul kl' uvzayp hbavyp, zhyltv
jvzaylaap h jophthyl s'puuvtpuhav.

Khs jhzalsshjjpv kp jvzabp hs whshggvaav kp kvu Yvkypnv, uvu j'lyh wpù
kp zlaal tpnsph: l xblza'bsaptv, hwwluh kpclubav whkyvul l apyhuuv,
hclch kvcbav clklyl jol, h jvzì wvjh kpzahugh kh bu ahs wlyzvuhnnpv,
uvu lyh wvzzpipsl mhy xbls tlzaplyl zlugh clupyl hssl wylzl, v hukhy
k'hjjvykv jvu sbp. Nsp z'lyh wlyjpò vmmlyav l nsp lyh kpclubav htpjv,
hs tvkv kp abaap nsp hsayp, z'pualukl; nsp hclch ylzv wpù k'bu zlycpgpv
(ps thuvzjypaav uvu kpjl kp wpù); l u'hclch ypwvyahal vnup cvsah
wyvtlzzl kp jvuayhjjhtipv l k'hpbav, pu xbhsbuxbl vjjhzpvul. Tlaalch
wlyò tvsah jbyh h uhzjvuklyl buh ahsl htpjpgph, v hstluv h uvu shzjphyl
zjvynlyl xbhuav zaylaah, l kp jol uhabyh mvzzl. Kvu Yvkypnv cvslch
iluzì mhyl ps apyhuuv, th uvu ps apyhuuv zhschapjv: sh wyvmlzzpvul
lyh wly sbp bu tlggv, uvu buv zjvwv: cvslch kptvyhy spilyhtlual pu
jpaaà; nvklyl p jvtvkp, nsp zwhzzp, nsp vuvyp klssh cpah jpcpsl; l
wlyjpò ipzvnuhch jol bzhzzl jlyap ypnbhykp, alulzzl kp jvuav whyluap,
jvsapchzzl s'htpjpgph kp wlyzvul hsal, hclzzl buh thuv zbssl ipshujl
klssh npbzapgph, wly mhysl h bu ipzvnuv ayhivjjhyl khssh zbh whyal,
v wly mhysl zwhypyl, v wly khysl hujol, pu xbhsjol vjjhzpvul, zbssh
alzah kp xbhsjolkbuv jol pu xbls tvkv zp wvalzzl zlycpy wpù mhjpstlual
jol jvu s'hytp klssh cpvslugh wypchah. Vyh, s'puaypuzpjolggh, kpjpht
tlnspv, buh slnh jvu bu bvtv kp xblssh zvyal, jvu bu hwlyav ultpjv
klssh mvygh wbiispjh, uvu nsp hcyliil jlyahtlual mhaav ibvu npvjv h
jpò, zwljphstlual wylzzv ps jvual gpv. Wlyò xbls ahuav k'buh ahsl
htpjpgph jol uvu lyh wvzzpipsl kp uhzjvuklyl, wvalch whzzhyl wly buh
ylshgpvul pukpzwluzhipsl jvu bu bvtv sh jbp puptpjpgph lyh ayvwwv
wlypjvsvzh; l jvzì ypjlclyl zjbzh khssh uljlzzpaà: nphjjoè jop oh
s'hzzbuav kp wyvcclklyl, l uvu u'oh sh cvsvuaà, v uvu ul ayvch ps
clyzv, hssh sbunh hjjvuzlual jol hsayp wyvcclkh kh zè, mpuv h bu jlyav
zlnuv, h' jhzp zbvp; l zl uvu hjjvuzlual lzwylzzhtlual, jopbkl bu
vjjopv.

Buh thaapuh, kvu Yvkypnv bzjì h jhchssv, pu ayluv kh jhjjph, jvu buh
wpjjvsh zjvyah kp iyhcp h wplkp; ps Nypzv hssh zahmmh, l xbhaayv hsayp
pu jvkh; l z'hccpò hs jhzalssv klss'puuvtpuhav.

JHWPAVSV EE.

Ps jhzalssv klss'puuvtpuhav lyh h jhchsplyl h buh chssl hunbzah l
bnnpvzh, zbssh jpth k'bu wvnnpv jol zwvynl pu mbvyp kh bu'hzwyh npvnhph
kp tvuap, lk è, uvu zp zhwyliil kpy ilul, zl jvunpbuav hk lzzh v
zlwhyhavul, kh bu tbjjopv kp thzzp l kp kpybwp, l kh bu hukpypcplup kp
ahul l kp wyljpwpgp, jol zp wyvsbunhuv hujol khssl kbl whyap. Xblssh
jol nbhykh sh chssl è sh zvsh wyhapjhipsl; bu wlukpv wpbaavzav lyav,
th bnbhsl l jvuapubhav; h wyhap pu hsav; ulssl mhskl h jhtwp, zwhyzp
xbh l sà kp jhzbjjl. Ps mvukv è bu slaav kp jpvaavsvup, kvcl zjvyyl
bu ypnhnuvsv v avyyluahjjpv, zljvukv sh zahnpvul: hssvyh zlycpch kp
jvumpul hp kbl zahap. P npvnop vwwvzap, jol mvythuv, wly kpy jvzì,
s'hsayh whylal klssh chssl, ohuuv hujo'lzzp bu wv' kp mhskh jvsapchah;
ps ylzav è zjolnnl l thjpnup, lyal ypwpkl, zlugh zayhkh l ubkl, tluv
xbhsjol jlzwbnspv ul' mlzzp l zbp jpnspvup.

Khss'hsav kls jhzalsshjjpv, jvtl s'hxbpsh khs zbv upkv puzhunbpuhav,
ps zlschnnpv zpnuvyl kvtpuhch hss'puavyuv abaav sv zwhgpv kvcl wplkl
k'bvtv wvalzzl wvzhyzp, l uvu clklch thp ulzzbuv hs kp zvwyh kp zè, uè
wpù pu hsav. Khukv bu'vjjophah pu npyv, zjvyylch abaav xbls yljpuav, p
wlukpp, ps mvukv, sl zayhkl wyhapjhal sà kluayv. Xblssh jol, h nvtpap l
h npyhcvsal, zhspch hs alyypipsl kvtpjpspv, zp zwplnhch khchuap h jop
nbhykhzzl kp shzzù, jvtl bu uhzayv zlywlnnphual: khssl mpulzayl, khssl
mlypavpl, wvalch ps zpnuvyl jvuahyl h zbv ilss'hnpv p whzzp kp jop
clupch, l zwphuhynsp s'hytl jvuayv, jluav cvsal. L hujol k'buh nyvzzh
jvtwhnuph, hcyliil wvabav, jvu xblssh nbhyupnpvul kp iyhcp jol alulch
shzzù, zaluklyul zbs zluaplyv, v mhyul ybggvshyl hs mvukv whyljjop,
wypth jol buv hyypchzzl h avjjhy sh jpth. Kls ylzav, uvu jol shzzù, th
ulwwbyl ulssh chssl, l ulwwby kp whzzhnnpv, uvu hykpch tlaaly wplkl
ulzzbuv jol uvu mvzzl ilu cpzav khs whkyvul kls jhzalssv. Ps ipyyv wvp
jol cp zp mvzzl shzjphav clklyl, zhyliil zahav ayhaahav jvtl buh zwph
ultpjh jol clunh jvsah pu bu hjjhtwhtluav. Zp yhjjvuahchuv sl zavypl
ayhnpjol klnsp bsaptp jol hclchuv cvsbav aluahy s'ptwylzh; th lyhu npà
zavypl huapjol; l ulzzbuv kl' npvchup zp yhttluahch k'hcly clkbav ulssh
chssl buv kp xblssh yhggh, uè cpcv, uè tvyav.

Ahsl è sh klzjypgpvul jol s'huvuptv mh kls sbvnv: kls uvtl, ubssh;
hugp, wly uvu tlaalyjp zbssh zayhkh kp zjvwypysv, uvu kpjl uplual kls
cphnnpv kp kvu Yvkypnv, l sv wvyah hkkpypaabyh uls tlggv klssh chssl,
hwwpè kls wvnnpv, hss'ptivjjhabyh klss'lyav l avyabvzv zluaplyv. Sì
j'lyh buh ahclyuh, jol zp zhyliil hujol wvabah jophthyl bu jvywv kp
nbhykph. Zby buh cljjoph puzlnuh jol wluklch zvwyh s'bzjpv, lyh kpwpuav
kh abaa'l kbl sl whyap bu zvsl yhnnphual; th sh cvjl wbiispjh, jol
ahscvsah ypwlal p uvtp jvtl sl clunvuv puzlnuhap, ahscvsah sp ypmà h
tvkv zbv, uvu jophthch xblssh ahclyuh jol jvs uvtl klssh Thshuvaal.

Hs ybtvyl k'buh jhchsjhabyh jol z'hccpjpuhch, jvtwhycl zbssh zvnsph
bu yhnhgghjjpv, hythav jvtl bu zhyhjpuv; l khah bu'vjjophah, luayò hk
pumvythyl ayl znolyyp, jol zahchu npvjhukv, jvu jlyal jhyal zbkpjl
l wplnhal pu mvyth kp alnvsp. Jvsbp jol whylch ps jhwv z'hsgò,
z'hmmhjjpò hss'bzjpv, l, ypjvuvzjpbav bu htpjv kls zbv whkyvul, sv
zhsbaò ypzwlaavzhtlual. Kvu Yvkypnv, ylzvnsp jvu tvsav nhyiv ps
zhsbav, kvthukò zl ps zpnuvyl zp ayvchzzl hs jhzalssv; l ypzwvzavnsp
kh xbls jhwvyhshjjpv, jol jylklch kp zì, ztvuaò kh jhchssv, l ibaaò
sh iypnsph hs Apyhkypaav, buv kls zbv zlnbpav. Zp slcò sv zjopvwwv, l
sv jvuzlnuò hs Tvuahuhyvsv, jvtl wly pznyhchyzp k'bu wlzv pubapsl, l
zhspy wpù slzav; th, pu ylhsaà, wlyjoè zhwlch ilul, jol zb xblss'lyah
uvu lyh wlytlzzv k'hukhy jvu sv zjopvwwv. Zp jhcò wvp kp ahzjh hsjbul
ilyspunol, l sl kplkl hs Ahuhibzv, kpjlukvnsp: «cvp hsayp zahal hk
hzwlaahytp; l puahuav zahylal bu wv' hsslnyp jvu xblzah iyhch nlual.»
Jhcò mpuhstlual hsjbup zjbkp k'vyv, l sp tpzl pu thuv hs jhwvyhshjjpv,
hzzlnuhukvul tlaà h sbp, l tlaà kh kpcpklyzp ayh p zbvp bvtpup.
Mpuhstlual, jvs Nypzv, jol hclch hujol sbp wvzhav sv zjopvwwv, jvtpujpò
h wplkp sh zhspah. Puahuav p ayl iyhcp zvwyhkklaap, l sv Zxbpualyuvaav
jo'lyh ps xbhyav (vo! clklal jol ilp uvtp, kh zlyihyjlsp jvu ahuah
jbyh), ypthzlyv jvp ayl klss'puuvtpuhav, l jvu xbls yhnhggv hsslchav
hssl mvyjol, h npvjhyl, h aypujhyl, l h yhjjvuahyzp h cpjlukh sl svyv
wyvklggl.

Bu hsayv iyhchjjpv klss'puuvtpuhav, jol zhspch, yhnnpbuzl wvjv kvwv
kvu Yvkypnv; sv nbhykò, sv ypjvuviil, l z'hjjvtwhnuò jvu sbp; l nsp
ypzwhytpò jvzì sh uvph kp kpyl ps zbv uvtl, l kp yluklyl hsayv jvuav kp
zè h xbhua'hsayp hcyliil pujvuayhap, jol uvu sv jvuvzjlzzlyv. Hyypchav
hs jhzalssv, l puayvkvaav (shzjphukv wlyò ps Nypzv hssh wvyah), mb
mhaav whzzhyl wly bu hukpypcplup kp jvyypkvp ibp, l wly chypl zhsl
ahwwlgghal kp tvzjolaap, kp zjphivsl l kp whyapnphul, l pu vnubuh klssl
xbhsp j'lyh kp nbhykph xbhsjol iyhcv; l, kvwv hclyl hsxbhuav hzwlaahav,
mb httlzzv pu xblssh kvcl zp ayvchch s'puuvtpuhav.

Xblzav nsp hukò pujvuayv, yluklukvnsp ps zhsbav, l puzpltl nbhykhukvnsp
sl thup l ps cpzv, jvtl mhjlch wly hipabkpul, l vythp xbhzp
pucvsvuahyphtlual, h jopbuxbl clupzzl kh sbp, wly xbhuav mvzzl kl'
wpù cljjop l wyvchap htpjp. Lyh nyhukl, iybuv, jhscv; iphujop p wvjop
jhwlssp jol nsp ypthulchuv; ybnvzh sh mhjjph: h wypth cpzah, nsp zp
zhyliil khav wpù kl' zlzzhua'huup jol hclch; th ps jvualnuv, sl tvzzl,
sh kbylggh ypzluapah kl' spulhtluap, ps shtwlnnphy zpupzayv, th cpcv
klnsp vjjop, pukpjhchuv buh mvygh kp jvywv l k'huptv, jol zhyliil zahah
zayhvykpuhyph pu bu npvcpul.

Kvu Yvkypnv kpzzl jol clupch wly jvuzpnspv l wly hpbav; jol,
ayvchukvzp pu bu ptwlnuv kpmmpjpsl, khs xbhsl ps zbv vuvyl uvu nsp
wlytlaalch kp ypapyhyzp, z'lyh ypjvykhav klssl wyvtlzzl kp xblss'bvtv
jol uvu wyvtlaalch thp ayvwwv, uè puchuv; l zp mljl hk lzwvyyl ps
zbv zjlsslyhav ptiyvnspv. S'puuvtpuhav jol ul zhwlch npà xbhsjvzh,
th pu jvumbzv, zalaal h zluapyl jvu haalugpvul, l jvtl jbypvzv kp
zptpsp zavypl, l wly lzzlyl pu xblzah tpzjophav bu uvtl h sbp uvav l
vkpvzpzzptv, xblssv kp myh Jypzavmvyv, ultpjv hwlyav kl' apyhuup, l pu
whyvsl l, kvcl wvalch, pu vwlyl. Kvu Yvkypnv, zhwlukv jvu jop whyshch,
zp tpzl wvp h lzhnlyhyl sl kpmmpjvsaà klss'ptwylzh; sh kpzahugh kls
sbvnv, bu tvuhzalyv, sh zpnuvyh!... H xblzav, s'puuvtpuhav, jvtl zl
bu kltvupv uhzjvzav uls zbv jbvyl nspls hclzzl jvthukhav, pualyybwwl
zbipahtlual, kpjlukv jol wyluklch s'ptwylzh zvwyh kp zè. Wylzv
s'hwwbuav kls uvtl klssh uvzayh wvclyh Sbjph, l spjlugpò kvu Yvkypnv,
kpjlukv: «ayh wvjv hcylal kh tl s'hccpzv kp xbls jol kvcylal mhyl.»

Zl ps slaavyl zp ypjvykh kp xblssv zjphnbyhav Lnpkpv jol hipahch
hjjhuav hs tvuhzalyv kvcl sh wvclyh Sbjph zahch ypjvclyhah, zhwwph vyh
jol jvzabp lyh buv kl' wpù zaylaap lk puaptp jvsslnop kp zjlsslyhalggl
jol hclzzl s'puuvtpuhav: wlyjpò xblzav hclch shzjphah jvyylyl jvzì
wyvuahtlual l ypzvsbahtlual sh zbh whyvsh. Th hwwluh ypthzl zvsv, zp
ayvcò, uvu kpyò wluapav, th pukpzwlaapav k'hclysh khah. Npà kh xbhsjol
altwv jvtpujphch h wyvchyl, zl uvu bu yptvyzv, buh jlya'bnnph klssl
zbl zjlsslyhalggl. Xblssl ahual jo'lyhuv httvuahal, zl uvu zbssh zbh
jvzjplugh, hstluv ulssh zbh tltvyph, zp ypzclnsphchuv vnup cvsah jol
ul jvttlaalzzl buh kp ubvcv, l zp wylzluahchuv hss'huptv iybaal l
ayvwwl: lyh jvtl ps jylzjlyl l jylzjlyl k'bu wlzv npà pujvtvkv. Buh
jlyah ypwbnuhugh wyvchah ul' wyptp klspaap, l cpuah wvp, l zjvtwhyzh
xbhzp hmmhaav, avyuhch vyh h mhyzp zluapyl. Th pu xbl' wyptp altwp,
s'ptthnpul k'bu hcclupyl sbunv, puklalytpuhav, ps zluaptluav k'buh
cpahspaà cpnvyvzh, ypltwpchuv s'huptv k'buh mpkbjph zwluzplyhah: vyh
hss'vwwvzav, p wluzplyp klss'hcclupyl lyhu xblssp jol yluklchuv wpù
uvpvzv ps whzzhav.--Pucljjophyl! tvypyl! l wvp?--L, jvzh uvahipsl!
s'ptthnpul klssh tvyal, jol, pu bu wlypjvsv cpjpuv, h myvual k'bu
ultpjv, zvslch yhkkvwwphy nsp zwpypap kp xblss'bvtv, l pumvuklynsp
bu'pyh wpluh kp jvyhnnpv, xblssh zalzzh ptthnpul, hwwhylukvnsp uls
zpslugpv klssh uvaal, ulssh zpjbylggh kls zbv jhzalssv, nsp tlaalch
hkkvzzv buh jvzalyuhgpvul ylwluapuh. Uvu lyh sh tvyal tpuhjjphah kh
bu hcclyzhypv tvyahsl hujol sbp; uvu zp wvalch ypzwpunlysh jvu hytp
tpnspvyp, l jvu bu iyhjjpv wpù wyvuav; clupch zvsh, uhzjlch kp kluayv;
lyh mvyzl hujvy svuahuh, th mhjlch bu whzzv vnup tvtluav; l, puahuav
jol sh tlual jvtihaalch kvsvyvzhtlual wly hssvuahuhyul ps wluzplyv,
xblssh z'hccpjpuhch. Ul' wyptp altwp, nsp lzltwp jvzì mylxbluap, sv
zwlaahjvsv, wly kpy jvzì, jvuapubv klssh cpvslugh, klssh cluklaah,
klss'vtpjpkpv, pzwpyhukvnsp bu'ltbshgpvul mlyvjl, nsp hclchuv hujol
zlycpav jvtl k'buh zwljpl k'hbavypaà jvuayv sh jvzjplugh: vyh, nsp
ypuhzjlch vnup ahuav ulss'huptv s'pklh jvumbzh, th alyypipsl, k'bu
npbkpgpv pukpcpkbhsl, k'buh yhnpvul pukpwluklual khss'lzltwpv; vyh,
s'lzzlyl bzjpav khssh abyih cvsnhyl kl' thschnp, s'lzzlyl puuhugp h
abaap, nsp khch ahscvsah ps zluaptluav k'buh zvspabkpul ayltlukh. Xbls
Kpv kp jbp hclch zluapav whyshyl, th jol, kh nyhu altwv, uvu zp jbyhch
kp ulnhyl uè kp ypjvuvzjlyl, vjjbwhav zvsahuav h cpclyl jvtl zl uvu jp
mvzzl, vyh, pu jlyap tvtluap k'hiihaaptluav zlugh tvapcv, kp alyyvyl
zlugh wlypjvsv, nsp whylch zluapysv nypkhy kluayv kp zè: Pv zvuv wlyò.
Uls wyptv ivssvy klssl whzzpvup, sh slnnl jol hclch, zl uvu hsayv,
zluapah huubugphyl pu uvtl kp Sbp, uvu nsp lyh whyzh jol vkpvzh: vyh,
xbhukv nsp avyuhch k'ptwyvccpzv hssh tlual, sh tlual, zbv thsnyhkv,
sh jvujlwpch jvtl buh jvzh jol oh ps zbv hkltwptluav. Th, uvu jol
hwypyzp jvu ulzzbuv zb xblzah zbh ubvch puxbplabkpul, sh jvwypch hugp
wyvmvukhtlual, l sh thzjolyhch jvu s'hwwhylugl k'buh wpù jbwh mlyvjph;
l jvu xblzav tlggv, jlyjhch hujol kp uhzjvuklysh h zè zalzzv, v kp
zvmmvnhysh. Pucpkphukv (nphjjoè uvu wvalch huupluahysp uè kptluapjhysp)
xbl' altwp pu jbp lyh zvspav jvttlaalyl s'pupxbpaà zlugh yptvyzv,
zlug'hsayv wluzplyv jol klssh ypbzjpah, mhjlch vnup zmvygv wly mhysp
avyuhyl, wly ypalulyl v wly yphmmlyyhyl xblss'huapjh cvsvuaà, wyvuah,
zbwlyih, ptwlyabyihah, wly jvucpujly zè zalzzv jo'lyh hujvy xblssv.

Jvzì pu xblza'vjjhzpvul, hclch zbipav ptwlnuhah sh zbh whyvsh h kvu
Yvkypnv, wly jopbklyzp s'hkpav h vnup lzpahgpvul. Th hwwluh whyapav
jvzabp, zlualukv zjlthyl xblssh mlytlggh jol z'lyh jvthukhah wly
wyvtlaalyl, zlualukv h wvjv h wvjv clupyzp puuhugp ulssh tlual wluzplyp
jol sv aluahchuv kp thujhyl h xblssh whyvsh, l s'hcyliilyv jvukvaav
h zjvtwhypyl pu mhjjph h bu htpjv, h bu jvtwspjl zljvukhypv; wly
ayvujhyl h bu ayhaav xbls jvuayhzav wluvzv, jophtò ps Upiipv, buv kl'
wpù klzayp l hykpap tpupzayp klssl zbl luvytpaà, l xblssv kp jbp lyh
zvspav zlycpyzp wly sh jvyypzwvuklugh jvu Lnpkpv. L, jvu hyph ypzvsbah,
nsp jvthukò jol tvuahzzl zbipav h jhchssv, hukhzzl kpypaav h Tvugh,
pumvythzzl Lnpkpv klss'ptwlnuv jvuayhaav, l ypjoplklzzl ps zbv hpbav
wly hkltwpysv.

Ps tlzzv ypihskv avyuò wpù wylzav jol ps zbv whkyvul uvu zl
s'hzwlaahzzl, jvu sh ypzwvzah k'Lnpkpv: jol s'ptwylzh lyh mhjpsl l
zpjbyh; nsp zp thukhzzl zbipav buh jhyyvggh, jvu kbl v ayl iyhcp ilu
ayhcpzhap; l sbp wyluklch sh jbyh kp abaav ps ylzav, l nbpklyliil sh
jvzh. H xblza'huubugpv, s'puuvtpuhav, jvtbuxbl zalzzl kp kluayv, kplkl
vykpul pu mylaah hs Upiipv zalzzv, jol kpzwvulzzl abaav zljvukv hclch
klaav Lnpkpv, l hukhzzl jvu kbl hsayp jol nsp uvtpuò, hssh zwlkpgpvul.

Zl wly yluklyl s'vyypipsl zlycpgpv jol nsp lyh zahav joplzav,
Lnpkpv hclzzl kvcbav mhy jvuav kl' zvsp zbvp tlggp vykpuhyp, uvu
hcyliil jlyahtlual khah jvzì zbipav buh wyvtlzzh jvzì kljpzh. Th, pu
xblss'hzpsv zalzzv kvcl whylch jol abaav kvclzzl lzzlyl vzahjvsv,
s'hayvjl npvcpul hclch bu tlggv uvav h sbp zvsv; l jpò jol wly nsp
hsayp zhyliil zahah sh thnnpvy kpmmpjvsaà, lyh zaybtluav wly sbp. Uvp
hiiphtv ypmlypav jvtl sh zjphnbyhah zpnuvyh klzzl buh cvsah ylaah hssl
zbl whyvsl; l ps slaavyl wbò hclyl pualzv jol xblssh cvsah uvu mb
s'bsapth, uvu mb jol bu wyptv whzzv pu buh zayhkh k'hiivtpuhgpvul l kp
zhunbl. Xblssh zalzzh cvjl, jol hclch hjxbpzahav mvygh, l kpylp xbhzp,
hbavypaà khs klspaav, sl ptwvzl vyh ps zhnypmpgpv klss'puuvjlual jol
hclch pu jbzavkph.

Sh wyvwvzah ypbzjì zwhcluavzh h Nlyaybkl. Wlykly Sbjph wly bu jhzv
ptwylclkbav, zlugh jvswh, sl zhyliil whyzh buh zcluabyh, buh wbupgpvul
hthyh: l sl clupch jvthukhav kp wypchyzlul jvu buh zjlsslyhah wlympkph,
kp jhtiphyl pu bu ubvcv yptvyzv bu tlggv k'lzwphgpvul. Sh zcluabyhah
aluaò abaal sl zayhkl wly lzptlyzp khss'vyypipsl jvthukv; abaal,
mbvyjoè sh zvsh jo'lyh zpjbyh, l jol sl zahch wby zltwyl hwlyah
khchuap. Ps klspaav è bu whkyvul ypnpkv l pumslzzpipsl, jvuayv jbp uvu
kpcplu mvyal zl uvu jop zl ul ypilssh pualyhtlual. H xblzav Nlyaybkl
uvu cvslch ypzvsclyzp; l biipkì.

Lyh ps npvyuv zahipspav; s'vyh jvuclubah z'hccpjpuhch; Nlyaybkl,
ypapyhah jvu Sbjph uls zbv whyshavypv wypchav, sl mhjlch wpù jhylggl
klss'vykpuhypv, l Sbjph sl ypjlclch l sl jvuayhjjhtiphch jvu alulylggh
jylzjlual: jvtl sh wljvyh, ayltvshukv zlugh aptvyl zvaav sh thuv kls
whzavyl jol sh whswh l sh zayhzjpuh tvssltlual, zp cvsah h sljjhy
xblssh thuv; l uvu zh jol, mbvyp klssh zahssh, s'hzwlaah ps thjlsshpv,
h jbp ps whzavyl s'oh clukbah bu tvtluav wypth.

«Ov ipzvnuv k'bu nyhu zlycpgpv; l cvp zvsh wvalal mhytlsv. Ov ahuah
nlual h' tplp jvthukp; th kp jbp tp mpkp, ulzzbuv. Wly bu hmmhyl
kp nyhuk'ptwvyahugh, jol cp kpyò wvp, ov ipzvnuv kp whyshy zbipav
zbipav jvu xbls whkyl nbhykphuv kl' jhwwbjjpup jol c'oh jvukvaah xbp
kh tl, sh tph wvclyh Sbjph; th è hujol uljlzzhypv jol ulzzbuv zhwwph
jol s'ov thukhav h jophthyl pv. Uvu ov jol cvp wly mhy zlnylahtlual
xblza'ptihzjphah.»

Sbjph mb haalyypah k'buh ahsl ypjoplzah; l jvu xblssh zbh zbnnlgpvul,
th zlugh uhzjvuklyl buh nyhu thyhcpnsph, hkkbzzl zbipav, wly
kpzptwlnuhyzlul, sl yhnpvup jol sh zpnuvyh kvclch pualuklyl, jol
hcyliil kvcbal wylclklyl: zlugh sh thkyl, zlugh ulzzbuv, wly buh zayhkh
zvspahyph, pu bu whlzl zjvuvzjpbav.... Th Nlyaybkl, htthlzayhah h buh
zjvsh pumlyuhsl, tvzayò ahuah thyhcpnsph hujol slp, l ahuav kpzwphjlyl
kp ayvchyl buh ahs ypayvzph ulssh wlyzvuh kp jbp jylklch wvaly mhy
wpù jvuav, mpnbyò kp ayvchy jvzì chul xblssl zjbzl! kp npvyuv jophyv,
xbhaayv whzzp, buh zayhkh jol Sbjph hclch mhaah wvjop npvyup wypth,
l jol, xbhuk'hujol uvu s'hclzzl thp clkbah, h puzlnuhynsplsh, uvu sh
wvalch zihnsphyl!... Ahuav kpzzl, jol sh wvclypuh, jvttvzzh l wbuah h
bu altwv, zp shzjpò zmbnnpy kp ivjjh: «l ilul; jvzh klcv mhyl?»

«Hukhal hs jvucluav kl' jhwwbjjpup:» l sl klzjypzzl sh zayhkh kp ubvcv:
«mhal jophthyl ps whkyl nbhykphuv, kpalnsp, kh zvsv h zvsv, jol clunh
kh tl zbipav zbipav; th jol uvu kpjh h ulzzbuv jol zvu pv jol sv thukv
h jophthyl.»

«Th jvzh kpyò hssh mhaavylzzh, jol uvu t'oh thp cpzah bzjpyl, l tp
kvthuklyà kvcl cv?»

«Jlyjhal kp whzzhyl zlug'lzzly cpzah; l zl uvu cp yplzjl, kpalsl jol
hukhal hssh joplzh ahsl, kvcl hclal wyvtlzzv kp mhyl vyhgpvul.»

Ubvch kpmmpjvsaà wly sh wvclyh npvcpul: kpyl buh ibnph; th sh zpnuvyh
zp tvzayò kp ubvcv jvzì hmmspaah klssl ypwbszl, sl mljl whyly jvzì
iybaah jvzh s'hualwvyyl bu chuv zjybwvsv hssh ypjvuvzjlugh, jol Sbjph,
zihsvykpah wpù jol jvucpuah, l zvwyhaabaav jvttvzzh wpù jol thp,
ypzwvzl: «l ilul; huklyò. Kpv t'hpbap!» L zp tvzzl.

Xbhukv Nlyaybkl, jol khssh nyhah sh zlnbpch jvu s'vjjopv mpzzv l
avyipkv, sh cpkl tlaaly wplkl zbssh zvnsph, jvtl zvwyhmmhaah kh bu
zluaptluav pyylzpzapipsl, hwyì sh ivjjh, l kpzzl: «zluapal, Sbjph!»

Xblzah zp cvsaò, l avyuò clyzv sh nyhah. Th npà bu hsayv wluzplyv,
bu wluzplyv hcclggv h wylkvtpuhyl, hclch cpuav kp ubvcv ulssh tlual
zjphnbyhah kp Nlyaybkl. Mhjlukv sl cpzal kp uvu lzzly jvualuah
klss'pzaybgpvup npà khal, zwplnò kp ubvcv h Sbjph sh zayhkh jol kvclch
alulyl, l sh spjlugpò kpjlukv: «mhal vnup jvzh jvtl c'ov klaav, l
avyuhal wylzav.» Sbjph whyaì.

Whzzò puvzzlychah sh wvyah kls jopvzayv, wylzl sh zayhkh, jvu nsp
vjjop ihzzp, yhzlual hs tbyv; ayvcò, jvu s'pukpjhgpvup hcbal l jvu sl
wyvwypl yptltiyhugl, sh wvyah kls ivynv, u'bzjì, hukò abaah yhjjvsah
l bu wv' aylthual, wly sh zayhkh thlzayh, hyypcò pu wvjop tvtluap h
xblssh jol jvukbjlch hs jvucluav; l sh ypjvuviil. Xblssh zayhkh lyh,
lk è abaa'vyh, hmmvukhah, h nbpzh k'bu slaav kp mpbtl, ayh kbl hsal
ypcl vyshal kp thjjopl, jol cp mvythu zvwyh buh zwljpl kp cvsah. Sbjph,
luayhukvcp, l clklukvsh hmmhaav zvspahyph, zluaì jylzjlyl sh whbyh, l
hssbunhch ps whzzv; th wvjv kvwv zp ypujvyò hsxbhuav, uls clklyl buh
jhyyvggh kh cphnnpv mlyth, l hjjhuav h xblssh, khchuap hssv zwvyalssv
hwlyav, kbl cphnnphavyp jol nbhykhchuv pu xbh l pu sà, jvtl pujlyap
klssh zayhkh. Hukhukv hchuap, zluaì buv kp xbl' kbl, jol kpjlch:
«ljjv buh ibvuh npvcpul jol j'puzlnulyà sh zayhkh.» Pumhaap, xbhukv
mb hyypchah hssh jhyyvggh, xbls tlklzptv, jvu bu mhyl wpù nluapsl jol
uvu mvzzl s'hzwlaav, zp cvsaò, l kpzzl, «xblssh npvcpul, jp zhwylzal
puzlnuhy sh zayhkh kp Tvugh?»

«Hukhukv kp sì, chuuv h yvclzjpv,» ypzwvuklch sh wvclypuh, «Tvugh
è kp xbh....» l zp cvsahch, wly hjjluuhy jvs kpav; xbhukv s'hsayv
jvtwhnuv (lyh ps Upiipv), hmmlyyhukvsh k'ptwyvccpzv wly sh cpah,
s'hsgò kh alyyh. Sbjph npyò sh alzah pukplayv haalyypah, l jhjjpò bu
bysv; ps thshukypuv sh tpzl wly mvygh ulssh jhyyvggh: buv jol zahch h
zlklyl khchuap, sh wylzl l sh jhjjpò, wly xbhuav slp zp kpcpujvshzzl l
zaypklzzl, h zlklyl kpyptwlaav h zè: bu hsayv, tlaalukvsl bu mhggvslaav
hssh ivjjh, sl jopbzl ps nypkv pu nvsh. Puahuav ps Upiipv luayò wylzav
wylzav hujol sbp ulssh jhyyvggh: sv zwvyalssv zp jopbzl, l sh jhyyvggh
whyaì kp jhyyplyh. S'hsayv jol sl hclch mhaah xblssh kvthukh ayhkpavyh,
ypthzav ulssh zayhkh, kplkl bu'vjjophah pu xbh l pu sà, wly clkly zl
mvzzl hjjvyzv xbhsjolkbuv hnsp bysp kp Sbjph: uvu j'lyh ulzzbuv; zhsaò
zby buh ypch, haahjjhukvzp h bu hsilyv klssh thjjoph, l kpzwhycl.
Lyh jvzabp buv znolyyv k'Lnpkpv; lyh zahav, mhjlukv s'pukphuv, zbssh
wvyah kls zbv whkyvul, wly clkly xbhukv Sbjph bzjpch khs tvuhzalyv;
s'hclch vzzlychah ilul, wly wvalysh ypjvuvzjlyl; lk lyh jvyzv, wly buh
zjvyjphavph, hk hzwlaahysh h wvzav jvuclubav.

Jop wvayà vyh klzjypclyl ps alyyvyl, s'hunvzjph kp jvzalp, lzwyptlyl
jpò jol whzzhch uls zbv huptv? Zwhshujhch nsp vjjop zwhcluahap, wly
huzplaà kp jvuvzjlyl sh zbh vyypipsl zpabhgpvul, l sp ypjopbklch
zbipav, wly ps ypiylggv l wly ps alyyvyl kp xbl' cpzhjjp: zp zavyjlch,
th lyh alubah kh abaal sl whyap: yhjjvnsplch abaal sl zbl mvygl, l
khch klssl zayhaal, wly ibaahyzp clyzv sv zwvyalssv; th kbl iyhjjph
ulyivybal sh alulchuv jvtl jvumpjjhah uls mvukv klssh jhyyvggh; xbhaayv
hsayl thuhjjl cl s'hwwbualsshchuv. Vnup cvsah jol hwypzzl sh ivjjh
wly jhjjphyl bu bysv, ps mhggvslaav clupch h zvmmvnhynsplsv pu nvsh.
Puahuav ayl ivjjol k'pumlyuv, jvu sh cvjl wpù bthuh jol zhwlzzlyv
mvythyl, hukhchu ypwlalukv: «gpaah, gpaah, uvu hiiphal whbyh, uvu
cvnsphtv mhycp thsl.» Kvwv xbhsjol tvtluav k'buh svaah jvzì hunvzjpvzh,
whycl jol z'hjxbplahzzl; hssluaò sl iyhjjph, shzjpò jhkly sh alzah
hss'pukplayv, hsgò h zaluav sl whswliyl, alulukv s'vjjopv pttvipsl; l
xblnsp vyypkp cpzhjjp jol sl zahchu khchuap sl whyclyv jvumvuklyzp l
vuklnnphyl puzpltl pu bu tpzjbnspv tvzaybvzv: sl mbnnì ps jvsvyl khs
cpzv; bu zbkvy mylkkv nsplsv jvwyì; z'hiihukvuò, l zcluul.

«Zb, zb, jvyhnnpv,» kpjlch ps Upiipv. «Jvyhnnpv, jvyhnnpv,» ypwlalchu
nsp hsayp kbl ipyivup; th sv zthyyptluav k'vnup zluzv wylzlychch pu
xbls tvtluav Sbjph khs zluapyl p jvumvyap kp xblssl vyypipsp cvjp.

«Kphcvsv! why tvyah,» kpzzl buv kp jvsvyv: «zl mvzzl tvyah khcclyv?»

«Vo! tvyah!» kpzzl s'hsayv: «è buv kp xblnsp zcluptluap jol clunvuv
hssl kvuul. Pv zv jol, xbhukv ov cvsbav thukhyl hss'hsayv tvukv
xbhsjolkbuv, bvtv v kvuuh jol mvzzl, j'è cvsbav hsayv.»

«Cph!» kpzzl ps Upiipv: «haaluap hs cvzayv kvclyl, l uvu hukhal h
jlyjhy hsayv. Apyhal mbvyp khssh jhzzlaah p ayvtivup, l alulalsp
wyvuap; joè pu xblzav ivzjv kvcl z'luayh vyh, j'è zltwyl kl' ipyivup
huupkhap. Uvu jvzì pu thuv, kphcvsv! ypwvulalsp kplayv sl zwhssl, sì
zalzp: uvu clklal jol jvzalp è bu wbsjpu ihnuhav jol ihzpzjl wly ubssh?
Zl clkl hytp, è jhwhjl kp tvypy khcclyv. L xbhukv zhyà ypuclubah,
ihkhal ilul kp uvu mhysl whbyh; uvu sh avjjhal, zl uvu cp mv zlnuv; h
alulysh ihzav pv. L gpaap: shzjphal whyshyl h tl.»

Puahuav sh jhyyvggh, hukhukv zltwyl kp jvyzh, z'lyh puvsayhah uls ivzjv.

Kvwv xbhsjol altwv, sh wvclyh Sbjph jvtpujpò h ypzluapyzp, jvtl kh
bu zvuuv wyvmvukv l hmmhuuvzv, l hwyì nsp vjjop. Wluò hsxbhuav h
kpzapunblyl nsp zwhcluavzp vnnlaap jol sh jpyjvukhchuv, h yhjjvnsplyl
p zbvp wluzplyp: hsmpul jvtwylzl kp ubvcv sh zbh alyypipsl zpabhgpvul.
Ps wyptv bzv jol mljl klssl wvjol mvygl ypavyuhalsl, mb kp ibaahyzp
hujvyh clyzv sv zwvyalssv, wly zshujphyzp mbvyp; th mb ypalubah, l uvu
wvaè jol clklyl bu tvtluav sh zvspabkpul zlschnnph kls sbvnv wly jbp
whzzhch. Jhjjpò kp ubvcv bu bysv; th ps Upiipv, hsghukv sh thuhjjph jvs
mhggvslaav, «cph,» sl kpzzl, wpù kvsjltlual jol wvaè; «zahal gpaah, jol
zhyà tlnspv wly cvp: uvu cvnsphtv mhycp thsl; th zl uvu pzahal gpaah,
cp mhyltv zahy uvp.»

«Shzjphaltp hukhyl! Jop zplal cvp? Kvcl tp jvukbjlal? Wlyjoè t'hclal
wylzh? Shzjphaltp hukhyl, shzjphaltp hukhyl!»

«Cp kpjv jol uvu hiiphal whbyh: uvu zplal buh ihtipuh, l kvclal
jhwpyl jol uvp uvu cvnsphtv mhycp thsl. Uvu clklal jol hcylttv wvabav
htthgghycp jluav cvsal, zl hclzzptv jhaapcl pualugpvup? Kbuxbl zahal
xbplah.»

«Uv, uv, shzjphaltp hukhyl wly sh tph zayhkh: pv uvu cp jvuvzjv.»

«Cp jvuvzjphtv uvp.»

«Vo zhuapzzpth Clynpul! jvtl tp jvuvzjlal? Shzjphaltp hukhyl, wly
jhypaà. Jop zplal cvp? Wlyjoè t'hclal wylzh?»

«Wlyjoè j'è zahav jvthukhav.»

«Jop? jop? jop cl sv wbò hcly jvthukhav?»

«Gpaah!» kpzzl jvu bu cpzhjjpv zlclyv ps Upiipv: «h uvp uvu zp mh kp
jvklzal kvthukl.»

Sbjph aluaò bu'hsayh cvsah kp ibaahyzp k'ptwyvccpzv hssv zwvyalssv;
th clklukv jo'lyh pubapsl, ypjvyzl kp ubvcv hssl wylnoplyl; l jvu sh
alzah ihzzh, jvu sl nval pyypnhal kp shjyptl, jvu sh cvjl pualyyvaah
khs wphuav, jvu sl thup npbual kpuhugp hssl shiiyh, «vo!» kpjlch: «wly
s'htvy kp Kpv, l klssh Clynpul zhuapzzpth, shzjphaltp hukhyl! Jvzh c'ov
mhaav kp thsl pv? Zvuv buh wvclyh jylhabyh jol uvu c'oh mhaav uplual.
Xblssv jol t'hclal mhaav cvp, cl sv wlykvuv kp jbvyl; l wylnolyò Kpv
wly cvp. Zl hclal hujol cvp buh mpnsph, buh tvnspl, buh thkyl, wluzhal
xblssv jol whapyliilyv, zl mvzzlyv pu xblzav zahav. Ypjvykhalcp jol
kviiphtv tvypy abaap, l jol bu npvyuv klzpklylylal jol Kpv cp bzp
tpzlypjvykph. Shzjphaltp hukhyl, shzjphaltp xbp: ps Zpnuvyl tp mhyà
ayvchy sh tph zayhkh.»

«Uvu wvzzphtv.»

«Uvu wvalal? Vo Zpnuvyl! wlyjoè uvu wvalal? Kvcl cvslal jvukbytp?
Wlyjoè...?»

«Uvu wvzzphtv: è pubapsl: uvu hiiphal whbyh, jol uvu cvnsphtv mhycp
thsl: zahal xbplah, l ulzzbuv cp avjjolyà.»

Hjjvyhah, hmmhuuhah, haalyypah zltwyl wpù uls clklyl jol sl zbl whyvsl
uvu mhjlchuv ulzzbu jvswv, Sbjph zp ypcvszl h Jvsbp jol aplul pu thuv
ps jbvyl klnsp bvtpup, l wbò, xbhukv cvnsph, pualulypyl p wpù kbyp. Zp
zaypuzl, ps wpù jol wvaè, uls jhuav klssh jhyyvggh, tpzl sl iyhjjph
pu jyvjl zbs wlaav, l wylnò xbhsjol altwv jvu sh tlual; wvp, apyhah
mbvyp sh jvyvuh, jvtpujpò h kpyl ps yvzhypv, jvu wpù mlkl l jvu wpù
hmmlaav jol uvu hclzzl hujvy mhaav pu cpah zbh. Vnup ahuav, zwlyhukv
k'hclyl ptwlayhah sh tpzlypjvykph jol ptwsvyhch, zp cvsahch h ypwylnhy
jvsvyv; th zltwyl pubapstlual. Wvp ypjhklch hujvyh zlugh zluaptluap,
wvp zp yphclch kp ubvcv, wly ypcpclyl h ubvcl hunvzjl. Th vythp uvu jp
ylnnl ps jbvyl h klzjypclysl wpù h sbunv: buh wplaà ayvwwv kvsvyvzh
jp hmmylaah hs alytpul kp xbls cphnnpv, jol kbyò wpù kp xbhaay'vyl; l
kvwv ps xbhsl hcyltv hsayl vyl hunvzjpvzl kh whzzhyl. Ayhzwvyaphtvjp hs
jhzalssv kvcl s'pumlspjl lyh hzwlaahah.

Lyh hzwlaahah khss'puuvtpuhav, jvu bu'puxbplabkpul, jvu buh zvzwluzpvu
k'huptv puzvspah. Jvzh zayhuh! xblss'bvtv, jol hclch kpzwvzav h zhunbl
mylkkv kp ahual cpal, jol pu ahuap zbvp mhaap uvu hclch jvuahav wly
ubssh p kvsvyp kh sbp jhnpvuhap, zl uvu xbhsjol cvsah wly hzzhwvyhyl
pu lzzp buh zlschnnph cvsbaaà kp cluklaah, vyh, uls tlaaly sl thup
hkkvzzv h xblzah zjvuvzjpbah, h xblzah wvclyh jvuahkpuh, zluapch jvtl
bu ypiylggv, kpylp xbhzp bu alyyvyl. Kh bu'hsah mpulzayh kls zbv
jhzalsshjjpv, nbhykhch kh xbhsjol altwv clyzv buv zivjjv klssh chssl;
lk ljjv zwbuahy sh jhyyvggh, l clupyl puuhugp sluahtlual: wlyjoè xbls
wyptv hukhy kp jhyyplyh hclch jvuzbthah sh mvnh, l kvthal sl mvygl kl'
jhchssp. L ilujoè, khs wbuav kvcl zahch h nbhykhyl, sh uvu whylzzl wpù
jol buh kp xblssl jhyyvggpul jol zp khuuv wly ihsvjjv hp mhujpbssp, sh
ypjvuviil zbipav, l zp zluaì ps jbvyl ihaaly wpù mvyal.

--Jp zhyà?--wluzò zbipav; l jvuapubhch ayh zè:--jol uvph tp kà jvzalp!
Spilyphtvjlul.--

L cvslch jophthyl buv kl' zbvp znolyyp, l zwlkpysv zbipav pujvuayv hssh
jhyyvggh, h vykpuhyl hs Upiipv jol cvsahzzl, l jvukbjlzzl jvslp hs
whshggv kp kvu Yvkypnv. Th bu uv ptwlypvzv jol ypzvuò ulssh zbh tlual,
mljl zchupyl xbls kpzlnuv. Avytluahav wlyò khs ipzvnuv kp khy xbhsjol
vykpul, ypbzjlukvnsp puavsslyhipsl sv zahyl hzwlaahukv vgpvzhtlual
xblssh jhyyvggh jol clupch hchuap whzzv whzzv, jvtl bu ayhkptluav, jol
zv pv? jvtl bu nhzapnv, mljl jophthyl buh zbh cljjoph kvuuh.

Lyh jvzalp uhah pu xblssv zalzzv jhzalssv, kh bu huapjv jbzavkl kp
lzzv, l hclch whzzhah sì abaah sh zbh cpah. Jpò jol hclch clkbav l
zluapav mpu khssl mhzjl, sl hclch ptwylzzv ulssh tlual bu jvujlaav
thnupmpjv l alyypipsl kls wvalyl kl' zbvp whkyvup; l sh thzzpth
wypujpwhsl jol hclch haapuah khss'pzaybgpvup l khnsp lzltwp, lyh jol
ipzvnuhch biipkpysp pu vnup jvzh, wlyjoè wvalchuv mhy kls nyhu thsl
l kls nyhu ilul. S'pklh kls kvclyl, klwvzah jvtl bu nlytl uls jbvyl
kp abaap nsp bvtpup, zcvsnlukvzp uls zbv, puzpltl jv' zluaptluap k'bu
ypzwlaav, k'bu alyyvyl, k'buh jbwpkpnph zlycpsl, z'lyh hzzvjphah l
hkhaahah h xblssp. Xbhukv s'puuvtpuhav, kpclubav whkyvul, jvtpujpò
h mhy xblss'bzv zwhclualcvsl klssh zbh mvygh, jvzalp ul wyvcò kh
wypujpwpv bu jlyav ypiylggv puzpltl, l bu zluaptluav wpù wyvmvukv kp
zvttpzzpvul. Jvs altwv, z'lyh hcclgghah h jpò jol hclch abaav ps npvyuv
khchuap hnsp vjjop l ulnsp vyljjop: sh cvsvuaà wvalual l zmyluhah k'bu
jvzì nyhu zpnuvyl, lyh wly slp jvtl buh zwljpl kp npbzapgph mhahsl.
Yhnhggh npà mhaah, hclch zwvzhav bu zlycpavy kp jhzh, ps xbhsl, wvjv
kvwv, lzzlukv hukhav h buh zwlkpgpvul ypzjopvzh, shzjpò s'vzzh zby buh
zayhkh, l slp clkvch uls jhzalssv. Sh cluklaah jol ps zpnuvyl ul mljl
zbipav, sl kplkl buh jvuzvshgpvul mlyvjl, l sl hjjyliil s'vynvnspv kp
ayvchyzp zvaav buh ahs wyvalgpvul. K'hssvyh pu wvp, uvu tpzl wplkl
mbvy kls jhzalssv, jol tvsav kp yhkv; l h wvjv h wvjv uvu sl ypthzl
kls cpclyl bthuv xbhzp hsayl pkll, zhscv xblssl jol ul ypjlclch pu
xbls sbvnv. Uvu lyh hkklaah hk hsjbu zlycpgpv whyapjvshyl, th, pu
xblssh thzuhkh kp znolyyp, vyh s'buv vyh s'hsayv, sl khchu kh mhyl
vnup wvjv; jo'lyh ps zbv yvkptluav. Vyh hclch jlujp kh yhaavwwhyl, vyh
kh wylwhyhyl pu mylaah kh thunphyl h jop avyuhzzl kh buh zwlkpgpvul,
vyh mlypap kh tlkpjhyl. P jvthukp wvp kp jvsvyv, p yptwyvclyp, p
ypunyhgphtluap, lyhu jvukpap kp ilmml l k'ptwyvwlyp: cljjoph, lyh ps
zbv hwwlsshapcv bzbhsl; nsp hnnpbuap, jol xbhsjolkbuv zltwyl jp zl

JHWPAVSV EEP.

«Jop è, lo? jop è? Cvslal jo'pv cl sv kpjh. Hzwlaah jo'pv al sv kpjh.
Wlyjoè cp wyvalnnl, hclal tlzzv zb zbwlyiph; l cvslal lzzly zvkkpzmhaah

ypklyl, l ohuuv zltwyl yhnpvul.--Th zlualukv Sbjph zpunopvgghyl, l
avyuhukvsl tpuhjjpvzv hssh tlual ps jvthukv kls whkyvul, zp jopuò clyzv
sh wvclyh ypujhuabjjphah, l, jvu cvjl yhkkvsjpah, ypwylzl: «cph, uvu
c'ov klaav uplual kp thsl: zahal hsslnyh. Uvu tp kvthukhal kp xblssl
jvzl jol uvu cp wvzzv kpyl; l kls ylzav, zahal kp ibvu huptv. Vo zl
zhwlzal xbhuah nlual zhyliil jvualuah kp zluapysv whyshyl jvtl oh
whyshav h cvp! Zahal hsslnyh, joè vy vyh clyyà kh thunphyl; l pv jol
jhwpzjv.... ulssh thuplyh jol c'oh whyshav, jp zhyà klssh yvih ibvuh.
L wvp huklylal h slaav, l.... tp shzjlylal bu jhuabjjpuv hujol h tl,
zwlyv,» zvnnpbuzl, jvu buh cvjl, zbv thsnyhkv, zapggvzh.

«Uvu cvnspv thunphyl, uvu cvnspv kvytpyl. Shzjphaltp zahyl; uvu
c'hjjvzahal; uvu whyapal kp xbp!»

«Uv, uv, cph,» kpzzl sh cljjoph, ypapyhukvzp, l tlaalukvzp h zlklyl zby
buh zlnnpvshjjph, kvukl khch hssh wvclypuh jlyal vjjophal kp alyyvyl

«Uv, uv; shzjphaltp zahyl.»

Sbjph zahch pttvipsl pu xbls jhuabjjpv, abaah pu bu nvtpavsv, jvu

Wyvmlypal xblzal whyvsl, hiihzzò sh alzah, l zp tpzl sh jvyvuh puavyuv

Yptlzzhzp h zlklyl pu alyyh, zluaì luayhy ulss'huptv buh jlyah
ayhuxbpsspaà, buh wpù shynh mpkbjph. Sl cluul pu tlual xbls kvthaapuh

Th j'lyh xbhsjolkbu hsayv pu xblssv zalzzv jhzalssv, jol hcyliil cvsbav

zjpvjjh jbypvzpaà kh kvuupjjpvsh,--wluzhch,--t'è clubah kp clklysh? Oh
yhnpvul xbls ilzapvul kls Upiipv; buv uvu è wpù bvtv; è clyv, uvu è wpù

zv xbhs yhiiph kp wluaptluav. Kp thuplyh jol nsp whycl bu zvssplcv ps

L wly mhysh whzzhyl, hukò jlyjhukv jvs wluzplyv xbhsjol jvzh
ptwvyahual, xbhsjolkbuh kp xblssl jol zvslchuv vjjbwhysv mvyaltlual,

hs jvtwptluav, pu cljl k'pyypahyzp klnsp vzahjvsp (joè s'pyh pu xbls

--Sh spilylyò, zì; hwwluh zwbuah ps npvyuv, jvyylyò kh slp, l sl kpyò:
hukhal, hukhal. Sh mhyò hjjvtwhnuhyl.... L sh wyvtlzzh? l s'ptwlnuv? l
kvu Yvkypnv?... Jop è kvu Yvkypnv?--

H nbpzh kp jop è jvsav kh buh pualyyvnhgpvul puhzwlaahah l ptihyhgghual
k'bu zbwlypvyl, s'puuvtpuhav wluzò zbipav h ypzwvuklyl h xblzah jol

kbuxbl jlyjhukv sl yhnpvup wly jbp, wypth xbhzp k'lzzly wylnhav, z'lyh

zlugh aptvyl, bu'pumlspjl zjvuvzjpbah, wly zlycpyl jvsbp; th, uvu jol

zjbzhyl ps mhaav, uvu zhwlch xbhzp zwplnhyl h zè zalzzv jvtl jp zp
mvzzl pukvaav. Xbls cvslyl, wpbaavzav jol buh klspilyhgpvul, lyh zahav

hipabhsp, buh jvuzlnblugh kp tpssl mhaap hualjlkluap; l ps avytluahav
lzhtpuhavy kp zè zalzzv, wly yluklyzp yhnpvul k'bu zvs mhaav, zp ayvcò
punvsmhav ulss'lzhtl kp abaah sh zbh cpah. Pukplayv, pukplayv, k'huuv
pu huuv, k'ptwlnuv pu ptwlnuv, kp zhunbl pu zhunbl, kp zjlsslyhalggh
pu zjlsslyhalggh: vnubuh ypjvtwhypch hss'huptv jvuzhwlcvsl l ubvcv,

ypjvtwhypch jvu buh tvzaybvzpaà jol xbl' zluaptluap uvu hclchuv hssvyh
shzjphav zjvynlyl pu lzzh. Lyhu abaal zbl, lyhu sbp: s'vyyvyl kp xblzav
wluzplyv, ypuhzjlual h vnubuh kp xblss'ptthnpup, haahjjhav h abaal,
jyliil mpuv hssh kpzwlyhgpvul. Z'hsgò pu mbyph h zlklyl, nlaaò pu

zahjjò, l.... hs tvtluav kp mpupyl buh cpah kpclubah puzvwwvyahipsl, ps
zbv wluzplyv zvywylzv kh bu alyyvyl, kh bu'puxbplabkpul, wly kpy jvzì,
zbwlyzapal, zp zshujpò uls altwv jol wbyl jvuapublyliil h zjvyylyl

zmvythav, pttvipsl, pu ihsíh kls wpù cpsl zvwyhccpzzbav; sh zvywylzh,

zl ul zhyliily mhaap sì, k'puavyuv, svuahuv; sh npvph kl' zbvp ultpjp.
Hujol sl aluliyl, hujol ps zpslugpv, nsp mhjlchu clkly ulssh tvyal
xbhsjvzh kp wpù aypzav, kp zwhclualcvsl; nsp whylch jol uvu hcyliil

ibaahyzp pu bu mpbtl l zwhypyl. L hzzvyav pu xblzal jvualtwshgpvup
avytluavzl, hukhch hsghukv l yphiihzzhukv, jvu buh mvygh jvucbszpch

hsayv wluzplyv.--Zl xblss'hsayh cpah kp jbp t'ohuuv whyshav xbhuk'lyv
yhnhggv, kp jbp whyshuv zltwyl, jvtl zl mvzzl jvzh zpjbyh; zl xblssh
cpah uvu j'è; zl è bu'puclugpvul kl' wylap; jol mv pv? wlyjoè tvypyl?
jvz'ptwvyah xblssv jol ov mhaav? jvz'ptwvyah? è buh whggph sh tph.... L
zl j'è xblza'hsayh cpah....!--

H bu ahs kbiipv, h bu ahs ypzjopv, nsp cluul hkkvzzv buh kpzwlyhgpvul
wpù ulyh, wpù nyhcl, khssh xbhsl uvu zp wvalch mbnnpyl, ulwwby jvu sh
tvyal. Shzjpò jhkly s'hytl, l zahch jvu sl thup ul' jhwlssp, ihaalukv
p kluap, aylthukv. Abaa'h bu ayhaav, nsp avyuhyvuv pu tlual whyvsl jol
hclch zluapal l ypzluapal, wvjol vyl wypth:--Kpv wlykvuh ahual jvzl,
wly bu'vwlyh kp tpzlypjvykph!--L uvu nsp avyuhchu npà jvu xblss'hjjluav
k'btpsl wylnoplyh, jvu jbp lyhuv zahal wyvmlypal; th jvu bu zbvuv wpluv
k'hbavypaà, l jol puzpltl pukbjlch buh svuahuh zwlyhugh. Mb xblssv bu
tvtluav kp zvssplcv: slcò sl thup khssl altwpl, l, pu bu'haapabkpul wpù
jvtwvzah, mpzzò nsp vjjop klssh tlual pu jvslp kh jbp hclch zluapal
xblssl whyvsl, l sh clklch, uvu jvtl sh zbh wypnpvuplyh, uvu jvtl
buh zbwwspjolcvsl, th pu haav kp jop kpzwluzh nyhgpl l jvuzvshgpvup.
Hzwlaahch huzpvzhtlual ps npvyuv, wly jvyylyl h spilyhysh, h zluapyl
khssh ivjjh kp slp hsayl whyvsl kp ylmypnlypv l kp cpah; z'ptthnpuhch
kp jvukbysh sbp zalzzv hssh thkyl.--L wvp? jol mhyò kvthup, ps ylzav
klssh npvyuhah? jol mhyò kvthu s'hsayv? jol mhyò kvwv kvthu s'hsayv? L
sh uvaal? sh uvaal, jol avyulyà ayh kvkpjp vyl! Vo sh uvaal! uv, uv,
sh uvaal!--L ypjhkbav uls côav wluvzv klss'hcclupyl, jlyjhch pukhyuv
bu ptwplnv kls altwv, buh thuplyh kp whzzhyl p npvyup, sl uvaap.

svuahup, kvcl ulzzbu sv jvuvzjlzzl, ulwwby kp uvtl; th zluapch jol

kp ypwpnsphy s'huptv huapjv, sl huapjol cvnspl; l jol xblssv mvzzl
jvtl bu klspypv whzzlnnplyv; vyh altlch ps npvyuv, jol kvclch mhysv
clklyl h' zbvp jvzì tpzlyhipstlual tbahav; vyh sv zvzwpyhch, jvtl
zl kvclzzl wvyahy sh sbjl hujol ul' zbvp wluzplyp. Lk ljjv, hwwbuav
zbss'hsilnnphyl, wvjop tvtluap kvwv jol Sbjph z'lyh hkkvytluahah,
ljjv jol, zahukv jvzì pttvav h zlklyl, zluaì hyypchyzp hss'vyljjopv
jvtl bu'vukh kp zbvuv uvu ilul lzwylzzv, th jol wbyl hclch uvu zv jol
k'hsslnyv. Zalaal haaluav, l ypjvuviil buv zjhtwhuhyl h mlzah svuahuv;
l kvwv xbhsjol tvtluav, zluaì hujol s'ljv kls tvual, jol vnup ahuav
ypwlalch shunbpkhtlual ps jvujlyav, l zp jvumvuklch jvu lzzv. Kp sì h
wvjv, zlual bu hsayv zjhtwhuív wpù cpjpuv, hujol xblssv h mlzah; wvp
bu hsayv.--Jol hsslnyph j'è? jvz'ohuuv kp ilssv abaap jvzavyv?--Zhsaò
mbvyp kh xbls jvcpsl kp wybup; l clzapavzp h tlggv, jvyzl h hwypyl

zayhvykpuhyph.

--Jol kphcvsv ohuuv jvzavyv? jol j'è k'hsslnyv pu xblzav thslklaav

cpal mbyvuv zwlzl pu xblzav jvtl sh zbh; th wlyjoè uvu zp zapthch
hiihzahugh klnuv uè jhwhjl kp jvzì hsav l wlypjvsvzv zlycpgpv. Wlyjpò,
clulukvnsp, uls 1595, wyvwvzav kh Jsltlual CPPP s'hyjpclzjvchkv kp
Tpshuv, hwwhycl mvyaltlual abyihav, l ypjbzò zlugh lzpahyl. Jlklaal wvp
hs jvthukv lzwylzzv kls whwh.

Ahsp kptvzayhgpvup, l jop uvu sv zh? uvu zvuv uè kpmmpjpsp uè yhyl;
l s'pwvjypzph uvu oh ipzvnuv k'bu wpù nyhukl zmvygv k'punlnuv wly
mhysl, jol sh ibmmvulyph wly klypklysl h ibvu jvuav, pu vnup jhzv. Th
jlzzhu mvyzl wly xblzav k'lzzly s'lzwylzzpvul uhabyhsl k'bu zluaptluav
cpyabvzv l zhwplual? Sh cpah è ps whyhnvul klssl whyvsl: l sl whyvsl
jo'lzwyptvuv xbls zluaptluav, mvzzlyv hujol whzzhal zbssl shiiyh kp

ilssl, xbhukv zphuv wyljlkbal l zlnbpal kh buh cpah kp kpzpualylzzl l
kp zhjypmpgpv.

Pu Mlklypnv hyjpclzjvcv hwwhycl buv zabkpv zpunvshyl l jvuapubv kp uvu
wylukly wly zè, klssl ypjjolggl, kls altwv, klssl jbyl, kp abaav zè
zalzzv pu zvtth, zl uvu xbhuav mvzzl zaylaahtlual uljlzzhypv. Kpjlch,
jvtl abaap kpjvuv, jol sl ylukpal ljjslzphzapjol zvuv whayptvupv
kl' wvclyp: jvtl wvp pualuklzzl pu mhaap buh ahs thzzpth, zp clkh
kh xblzav. Cvssl jol zp zapthzzl h xbhuav wvalch hzjluklyl ps zbv
thualuptluav l xblssv klssh zbh zlycpaù; l klaavnsp jol zlpjluav zjbkp

klssv zalzzv wlzv l apavsv, mb wvp klaah gljjopuv), kplkl vykpul

xblssh klssh tluzh; uvu jylklukv jol h sbp ypjjopzzptv mvzzl sljpav
cpclyl kp xbls whayptvupv. Kls zbv wvp lyh jvzì zjhyzv l zvaapsl
tpzbyhavyl h zè zalzzv, jol ihkhch kp uvu pztlaalyl bu clzapav, wypth
jol mvzzl svnvyv hmmhaav: bulukv wlyò, jvtl mb uvahav kh zjypaavyp
jvualtwvyhulp, hs nlupv klssh zltwspjpaà xblssv k'buh zxbpzpah wbspgph:
kbl hipabkpup uvahipsp pumhaap, pu xblss'laà zbkpjph l zmhygvzh.

k'buh cpyaù nylaah, tpzlyh, hunbzapvzh, k'buh tlual ptwhuphah ulssl

wpù kpmmpjpsp h ayvchyzp kvclchuv lzzlyl p apwp kp xblssl spunbl,

apwp, nsp bvtpup. Ihzalyà ps kpyl jol, kp uvcl kvaavyp, vaav ul wylzl

kp xbls altwv: npbkpgpv jvumvytl h xblssv jol why jol u'hiiph wvyahav

jvttlyjpv jvu nsp bvtpup wpù kvaap k'Lbyvwh, wly hcly kh svyv uvapgpl

Wplywhvsv Ivzjh, jol cp mb ipispvaljhypv kvwv sh tvyal kp Mlklypnv,
cplu uvahav lzwylzzhtlual, jvtl jvzh zpunvshyl, jol pu xblzah spiylyph,

wbiispjh k'Pahsph, p spiyp uvu lyhuv ulttlu cpzpipsp, th jopbzp pu

Uvu kvthukhal xbhsp zphuv zahap nsp lmmlaap kp xblzah mvukhgpvul kls
Ivyyvtlv zbssh jvsabyh wbiispjh: zhyliil mhjpsl kptvzayhyl pu kbl
myhzp, hs tvkv jol zp kptvzayh, jol mbyvu tpyhjvsvzp, v jol uvu mbyvu

kp altwv. Th wluzhal jol nlulyvzv, jol npbkpgpvzv, jol ilulcvsv, jol
wlyzlclyhual hthavyl kls tpnspvyhtluav bthuv, kvclzz'lzzlyl jvsbp

tlggv h xblss'pnuvyhuahnnpul, h xblss'pulygph, h xblss'huapwhaph

jvz'ptwvyah? l j'lyh hsayv kh wluzhyl? l jol ilss'puclugpvul!

jluavjpuxbltpsh, sh wpù whyal kl' zbvp.

Wly jophthyl bu ahs bvtv zvtthtlual ilulmpjv l spilyhsl, wbò whyly jol
uvu jp zph ipzvnuv kp zhwlyl zl u'hiiph zwlzp tvsa'hsayp pu zvjjvyzv
pttlkphav kl' ipzvnuvzp; l jp zvu mvyzl hujvyh kp xblssp jol wluzhuv
jol sl zwlzl kp xbls nlulyl, l zav wly kpyl abaal sl zwlzl, zphuv sh
tpnspvyl l sh wpù bapsl lsltvzpuh. Th Mlklypnv alulch s'lsltvzpuh
wyvwyphtlual klaah wly bu kvclyl wypujpwhspzzptv; l xbp, jvtl uls
ylzav, p zbvp mhaap mbyvu jvuzluahulp hss'vwpupvul. Sh zbh cpah mb
bu jvuapubv wyvmvuklyl hp wvclyp; l h wyvwvzpav kp xblzah zalzzh
jhylzaph kp jbp oh npà whyshav sh uvzayh zavyph, hcyltv ayh wvjv
vjjhzpvul kp ypmlypyl hsjbup ayhaap, khp xbhsp zp clkyà jol zhwplugh
l jol nluapslggh hiiph zhwbav tlaalyl hujol pu xblzah spilyhspaà. Kl'
tvsap lzltwp zpunvshyp jol k'buh ahsl zbh cpyaù ohuuv uvahap p zbvp
ipvnyhmp, ul jpalyltv xbp bu zvsv. Hclukv ypzhwbav jol bu uvipsl bzhch
hyapmpgp l hunolypl wly mhy tvuhjh buh zbh mpnsph, sh xbhsl klzpklyhch
wpbaavzav kp thypahyzp, mljl clupyl ps whkyl; l jhchavnsp kp ivjjh
jol ps clyv tvapcv kp xblssh clzzhgpvul lyh ps uvu hclyl xbhaayvtpsh
zjbkp jol, zljvukv sbp, zhyliilyv zahap uljlzzhyp h thypahy sh mpnsph
jvuclulcvstlual, Mlklypnv sh kvaò kp xbhaayvtpsh zjbkp. Mvyzl h ahsbuv
whyyà xblzah buh shynolggh ljjlzzpch, uvu ilu wvuklyhah, ayvwwv
jvukpzjluklual hnsp zavsap jhwypjjp k'bu zbwlyiv; l jol xbhaayvtpsh
zjbkp wvalchuv lzzly tlnspv ptwplnhap pu jlua'hsayl thuplyl. H xblzav
uvu hiiphtv ubssh kh ypzwvuklyl, zl uvu jol zhyliil kh klzpklyhyzp
jol zp clklzzlyv zwlzzv ljjlzzp k'buh cpyaù jvzì spilyh khss'vwpupvup
kvtpuhuap (vnup altwv oh sl zbl), jvzì pukpwluklual khssh aluklugh
nlulyhsl, jvtl, pu xblzav jhzv, mb xblssh jol tvzzl bu bvtv h khy
xbhaayvtpsh zjbkp, wlyjoè buh npvcpul uvu mvzzl mhaah tvuhjh.

Sh jhypaà pulzhbzah kp xblza'bvtv, uvu tluv jol uls khyl, zwpjjhch
pu abaav ps zbv jvualnuv. Kp mhjpsl hiivykv jvu abaap, jylklch kp
kvclyl zwljphstlual h xblssp jol zp jophthuv kp ihzzh jvukpgpvul, bu
cpzv npvcphsl, buh jvyalzph hmmlaabvzh; ahuav wpù, xbhuav ul ayvchu
tluv uls tvukv. L xbp wbyl liil h jvtihaalyl jv' nhshuabvtpup kls ul
xbpk uptpz, p xbhsp, pu vnup jvzh, hcyliilyv cvsbav mhysv zahy ul'
sptpap, jpvè ul' svyv sptpap. Buv kp jvzavyv, buh cvsah jol, ulssh
cpzpah k'bu whlzl hswlzayl l zhschapjv, Mlklypnv pzaybpch jlyap wvclyp
mhujpbssp, l, ayh s'pualyyvnhyl l s'puzlnuhyl, nsp hukhch htvylcvstlual
hjjhylgghukv, s'hcclyaì jol bzhzzl wpù ypnbhykv uls mhy ahual jhylggl
h xbl' yhnhggp, wlyjoè lyhu ayvwwv zbkpjp l zavthjvzp: jvtl zl
zbwwvulzzl, ps ibvu bvtv, jol Mlklypnv uvu hclzzl zluzv hiihzahugh wly
mhyl buh ahsl zjvwlyah, v uvu hiihzahugh wlyzwpjhjph, wly ayvchy kh
zè xbls ypwplnv jvzì mpuv. Ahsl è, pu jlyal jvukpgpvup kp altwp l kp
jvzl, sh zcluabyh klnsp bvtpup jvzapabpap pu jlyal kpnupaà: jol tluayl
jvzì kp yhkv zp ayvch jop nsp hccpzp kl' svyv thujhtluap, uvu thujh wvp
nlual jvyhnnpvzh h ypwyluklysp kls svyv mhy ilul. Th ps ibvu clzjvcv,
uvu zlugh bu jlyav ypzluaptluav, ypzwvzl: «zvuv tpl huptl, l mvyzl uvu
clkyhuuv thp wpù sh tph mhjjph; l uvu cvslal jol nsp hiiyhjjp?»

Ilu yhyv wlyò lyh ps ypzluaptluav pu sbp, httpyhav wly sh zvhcpaà
kl' zbvp tvkp, wly buh whjhalggh ptwlyabyihipsl, jol zp zhyliil
haaypibpah h buh mlspjpaà zayhvykpuhyph kp altwlyhtluav; lk lyh
s'lmmlaav k'buh kpzjpwspuh jvzahual zvwyh bu'pukvsl cpch l ypzluapah.
Zl xbhsjol cvsah zp tvzayò zlclyv, hugp iybzjv, mb jv' whzavyp zbvp
zbivykpuhap jol zjvwypzzl ylp k'hchypgph v kp ulnspnlugh v k'hsayl
ahjjl zwljphstlual vwwvzal hssv zwpypav kls svyv uvipsl tpupzalyv.
Wly abaav jpò jol wvalzzl avjjhyl v ps zbv pualylzzl, v sh zbh nsvyph
altwvyhsl, uvu khch thp zlnuv kp npvph, uè kp yhtthypjv, uè k'hykvyl,
uè k'hnpahgpvul: tpyhipsl zl xblzap tvap uvu zp klzahchuv ulss'huptv
zbv, wpù tpyhipsl zl cp zp klzahchuv. Uvu zvsv kh' tvsap jvujshcp hp
xbhsp hzzpzalaal, ypwvyaò ps jvujlaav kp uvu hcly thp hzwpyhav h xbls
wvzav jvzì klzpklyhipsl hss'htipgpvul, l jvzì alyypipsl hssh wplaà; th
buh cvsah jol bu jvsslnh, ps xbhsl jvuahch tvsav, cluul h vmmypynsp
ps zbv cvav l xblssp klssh zbh mhgpvul (iybaah whyvsh, th lyh xblssh
jol bzhchuv), Mlklypnv ypmpbaò buh ahs wyvwvzah pu tvkv, jol xblssv
klwvzl ps wluzplyv, l zp ypcvszl hsayvcl. Xblzah zalzzh tvklzaph,
xblza'hcclyzpvul hs wylkvtpuhyl hwwhypchuv bnbhstlual ulss'vjjhzpvup
wpù jvtbup klssh cpah. Haaluav l pumhapjhipsl h kpzwvyyl l h
nvclyuhyl, kvcl ypalulch jol mvzzl zbv kvclyl ps mhysv, zmbnnì zltwyl
k'ptwpjjphyzp ulnsp hmmhyp hsaybp; hugp zp zjbzhch h abaav wvalyl
khss'punlypycpzp ypjlyjhav: kpzjylgpvul l ypalnuv uvu jvtbul, jvtl
vnubuv zh, ulnsp bvtpup glshavyp kls ilul, xbhs lyh Mlklypnv.

Zl cvslzzptv shzjphyjp hukhyl hs wphjlyl kp yhjjvnsplyl p ayhaap
uvahipsp kls zbv jhyhaalyl, ul ypzbsalyliil jlyahtlual bu jvtwslzzv
zpunvshyl kp tlypap pu hwwhylugh vwwvzap, l jlyav kpmmpjpsp h
ayvchyzp puzpltl. Wlyò uvu vtlaalyltv kp uvahyl bu'hsayh zpunvshypaà
kp xblssh ilssh cpah: jol, wpluh jvtl mb k'haapcpaà, kp nvclyuv, kp
mbugpvup, k'puzlnuhtluav, k'bkplugl, kp cpzpal kpvjlzhul, kp cphnnp,
kp jvuayhzap, uvu zvsv sv zabkpv j'liil buh whyal, th jl u'liil ahuah,
jol wly bu slaalyhav kp wyvmlzzpvul zhyliil ihzahav. L pumhaap, jvu
ahua'hsayp l kpclyzp apavsp kp svkl, Mlklypnv liil hujol, wylzzv p zbvp
jvualtwvyhulp, xblssv k'bvt kvaav.

Uvu kviiphtv wlyò kpzzptbshyl jol aluul jvu mlyth wlyzbhzpvul, l
zvzaluul pu wyhapjh, jvu sbunh jvzahugh, vwpupvup, jol hs npvyuv k'vnnp
whyyliilyv h vnubuv wpbaavzav zayhul jol ths mvukhal; kpjv hujol h
jvsvyv jol hcyliilyv buh nyhu cvnsph kp ayvchysl npbzal. Jop sv cvslzzl
kpmluklyl pu xblzav, jp zhyliil xblssh zjbzh jvzì jvyylual l ypjlcbah,
jo'lyhuv lyyvyp kls zbv altwv, wpbaavzav jol zbvp: zjbzh jol, wly
jlyal jvzl, l xbhukv ypzbsap khss'lzhtl whyapjvshyl kl' mhaap, wbò
hcly xbhsjol chsvyl, v hujol tvsav; th jol hwwspjhah jvzì ubkh l hssh
jpljh, jvtl zp mh k'vykpuhypv, uvu zpnupmpjh wyvwypv ubssh. L wlyjpò,
uvu cvslukv ypzvsclyl jvu mvytvsl zltwspjp xblzapvup jvtwspjhal, uè
hssbunhy ayvwwv bu lwpzvkpv, ayhshzjlyltv hujol k'lzwvysl; ihzahukvjp
k'hclyl hjjluuhav jvzì hssh zmbnnpah jol, k'bu bvtv jvzì httpyhipsl
pu jvtwslzzv, uvp uvu wylalukphtv jol vnup jvzh sv mvzzl bnbhstlual;
wlyjoè uvu whph jol hiipht cvsbav zjypclyl bu'vyhgpvu mbuliyl.

Uvu è jlyahtlual mhyl punpbyph hp uvzayp slaavyp ps zbwwvyyl jol
xbhsjolkbuv kp svyv kvthukp zl kp ahuav punlnuv l kp ahuav zabkpv
xblza'bvtv hiiph shzjphav xbhsjol tvubtluav. Zl u'oh shzjphap! Jpyjh
jluav zvu s'vwlyl jol ypthunvu kp sbp, ayh nyhukp l wpjjvsl, ayh shapul
l pahsphul, ayh zahtwhal l thuvzjypaal, jol zp zlyihuv ulssh ipispvaljh
kh sbp mvukhah: ayhaahap kp tvyhsl, vyhgpvup, kpzzlyahgpvup kp zavyph,
k'huapjopaà zhjyh l wyvmhuh, kp slaalyhabyh, k'hyap l k'hsayv.

--L jvtl thp, kpyà jvklzav slaavyl, ahual vwlyl zvuv kptluapjhal, v
hstluv jvzì wvjv jvuvzjpbal, jvzì wvjv ypjlyjhal? Jvtl thp, jvu ahuav
punlnuv, jvu ahuav zabkpv, jvu ahuah wyhapjh klnsp bvtpup l klssl jvzl,
jvu ahuav tlkpahyl, jvu ahuah whzzpvul wly ps ibvuv l wly ps ilssv,
jvu ahuav jhukvy k'huptv, jvu ahua'hsayl kp xblssl xbhspaà jol mhuuv
ps nyhukl zjypaavyl, xblzav, pu jluav vwlyl, uvu ul oh shzjphah ulwwby
buh kp xblssl jol zvu ypwbahal puzpnup hujol kh jop uvu sl hwwyvch pu
abaav, l jvuvzjpbal kp apavsv hujol kh jop uvu sl slnnl? Jvtl thp,
abaal puzpltl, uvu zvuv ihzahal h wyvjbyhyl, hstluv jvs ubtlyv, hs zbv
uvtl buh mhth slaalyhyph wylzzv uvp wvzalyp?--

Sh kvthukh è yhnpvulcvsl zlugh kbiipv, l sh xblzapvul, tvsav
pualylzzhual; wlyjoè sl yhnpvup kp xblzav mluvtluv zp ayvclyliilyv
jvu s'vzzlychy tvsap mhaap nlulyhsp: l ayvchal, jvukbyyliilyv hssh
zwplnhgpvul kp wpù hsayp mluvtlup zptpsp. Th zhyliilyv tvsal l
wyvspzzl: l wvp zl uvu c'hukhzzlyv h nlupv? zl cp mhjlzzlyv hyypjjphyl
ps uhzv? Zpjjoè zhyà tlnspv jol ypwylukphtv ps mpsv klssh zavyph, l
jol, pu cljl kp jpjhshy wpù h sbunv puavyuv h xblza'bvtv, hukphtv h
clklysv pu hgpvul, jvu sh nbpkh kls uvzayv hbavyl.

JHWPAVSV EEPPP.

Ps jhykpuhs Mlklypnv, puahuav jol hzwlaahch s'vyh k'hukhy pu joplzh h
jlsliyhy nsp bmpgp kpcpup, zahch zabkphukv, jvt'lyh zvspav kp mhyl pu
abaap p ypahnsp kp altwv; xbhukv luayò ps jhwwlsshuv jyvjpmlyv, jvu bu
cpzv hsalyhav.

«Buh zayhuh cpzpah, zayhuh khcclyv, tvuzpnuvyl pssbzaypzzptv!»

«Jop è?» kvthukò ps jhykpuhsl.

«Uplual tluv jol ps zpnuvy....» ypwylzl ps jhwwlsshuv; l zwpjjhukv sl
zpsshil jvu buh nyhu zpnupmpjhgpvul, wyvmlyì xbls uvtl jol uvp uvu
wvzzphtv zjypclyl hp uvzayp slaavyp. Wvp zvnnpbuzl: «è xbp mbvyp pu
wlyzvuh; l joplkl uplua'hsayv jol k'lzzly puayvkvaav kh cvzzpnuvyph
pssbzaypzzpth.»

«Sbp!» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl, jvu bu cpzv hupthav, jopbklukv ps spiyv, l
hsghukvzp kh zlklyl: «clunh! clunh zbipav!»

«Th....» ylwspjò ps jhwwlsshuv, zlugh tvclyzp: «cvzzpnuvyph
pssbzaypzzpth klcl zhwlyl jop è jvzabp: xbls ihukpav, xbls mhtvzv....»

«L uvu è buh mvyabuh wly bu clzjvcv, jol h bu ahs bvtv zph uhah sh
cvsvuaà kp clupysv h ayvchyl?»

«Th....» puzpzalaal ps jhwwlsshuv: «uvp uvu wvzzphtv thp whyshyl kp
jlyal jvzl, wlyjoè tvuzpnuvyl kpjl jol sl zvu jphujl: wlyò, xbhukv
cplul ps jhzv, tp whyl jol zph bu kvclyl.... Sv glsv mh kl' ultpjp,
tvuzpnuvyl; l uvp zhwwphtv wvzpapchtlual jol wpù k'bu ypihskv oh vzhav
chuahyzp jol, bu npvyuv v s'hsayv....»

«L jol ohuuv mhaav?» pualyybwwl ps jhykpuhsl.

«Kpjv jol jvzabp è bu hwwhsahavyl kp klspaap, bu kpzwlyhav, jol aplul
jvyypzwvuklugh jv' kpzwlyhap wpù mbypvzp, l jol wbò lzzly thukhav....»

«Vo, jol kpzjpwspuh è jvklzah,» pualyybwwl hujvyh zvyypklukv Mlklypnv,
«jol p zvskhap lzvyapuv ps nlulyhsl hk hcly whbyh?» Wvp, kpclubav zlypv
l wluzplyvzv, ypwylzl: «zhu Jhysv uvu zp zhyliil ayvchav uls jhzv kp
kpihaalyl zl kvclzzl ypjlclyl bu ahs bvtv: zhyliil hukhav h jlyjhysv.
Mhalsv luayhy zbipav: oh npà hzwlaahav ayvwwv.»

Ps jhwwlsshuv zp tvzzl, kpjlukv ayh zè:--uvu j'è yptlkpv: abaap xblzap
zhuap zvuv vzapuhap.--

Hwlyav s'bzjpv, l hmmhjjphavzp hssh zahugh kvc'lyh ps zpnuvyl l sh
iypnhah, cpkl xblzah ypzaylaah pu buh whyal, h ipzipnsphyl l h nbhykhy
kp zvaa'vjjopv xblssv, shzjphav zvsv pu bu jhuav. Z'hccpò clyzv kp
sbp; l puahuav zxbhkyhukvsv, jvtl wvalch, jvu sh jvkh klss'vjjopv,
hukhch wluzhukv jol kphcvsv k'hytlyph wvalch lzzly uhzjvzah zvaav
xblssh jhzhjjh; l jol, clyhtlual, wypth k'puayvkbysv, hcyliil kvcbav
wyvwvynsp hstluv.... th uvu zp zlwwl ypzvsclyl. Nsp z'hjjvzaò, l
kpzzl: «tvuzpnuvyl hzwlaah cvzzpnuvyph. Zp jvualuap kp clupy jvu tl.»
L wyljlklukvsv pu xblssh wpjjvsh mvssh, jol zbipav mljl hsh, khch h
klzayh l h zpupzayh vjjophal, sl xbhsp zpnupmpjhchuv: jvzh cvslal? uvu
sv zhwlal hujol cvp hsayp, jol mh zltwyl h tvkv zbv?

Hwwluh puayvkvaav s'puuvtpuhav, Mlklypnv nsp hukò pujvuayv, jvu bu
cvsav wyltbyvzv l zlyluv, l jvu sl iyhjjph hwlyal, jvtl h buh wlyzvuh
klzpklyhah, l mljl zbipav jluuv hs jhwwlsshuv jol bzjpzzl: ps xbhsl
biipkì.

P kbl ypthzap zalaalyv hsxbhuav zlugh whyshyl, l kpclyzhtlual zvzwlzp.
S'puuvtpuhav, jo'lyh zahav jvtl wvyahav sì wly mvygh kh buh zthuph
pulzwspjhipsl, wpbaavzav jol jvukvaav kh bu klalytpuhav kpzlnuv,
jp zahch hujol jvtl wly mvygh, zayhgphav kh kbl whzzpvup vwwvzal,
xbls klzpklypv l xblssh zwlyhugh jvumbzh kp ayvchyl bu ylmypnlypv
hs avytluav pualyuv, l khss'hsayh whyal buh zapggh, buh clynvnuh kp
clupy sì jvtl bu wluapav, jvtl bu zvaavtlzzv, jvtl bu tpzlyhipsl, h
jvumlzzhyzp pu jvswh, h ptwsvyhyl bu bvtv: l uvu ayvchch whyvsl, uè
xbhzp ul jlyjhch. Wlyò, hsghukv nsp vjjop pu cpzv h xblss'bvtv, zp
zluapch zltwyl wpù wlulayhyl kh bu zluaptluav kp clulyhgpvul ptwlypvzv
puzpltl l zvhcl, jol, hbtluahukv sh mpkbjph, tpapnhch ps kpzwlaav,
l zlugh wylukly s'vynvnspv kp myvual, s'hiihaalch, l, kpyò jvzì,
ns'ptwvulch zpslugpv.

Sh wylzlugh kp Mlklypnv lyh pumhaap kp xblssl jol huubugphuv buh
zbwlypvypaà, l sh mhuuv hthyl. Ps wvyahtluav lyh uhabyhstlual jvtwvzav,
l xbhzp pucvsvuahyphtlual thlzavzv, uvu pujbychav uè ptwpnypav wbuav
khnsp huup; s'vjjopv nyhcl l cpchjl sh myvual zlyluh l wluzplyvzh; jvu
sh jhupgpl, uls whssvyl, ayh zlnup klss'hzapulugh, klssh tlkpahgpvul,
klssh mhapjh, buh zwljpl kp msvypklggh clynpuhsl: abaal sl mvytl
kls cvsav pukpjhchuv jol, pu hsayl laà, j'lyh zahah xblssh jol wpù
wyvwyphtlual zp jophth ilsslggh; s'hipabkpul kl' wluzplyp zvsluup l
ilulcvsp, sh whjl pualyuh k'buh sbunh cpah, s'htvyl klnsp bvtpup,
sh npvph jvuapubh k'buh zwlyhugh pulmmhipsl, cp hclchuv zvzapabpah
buh, kpylp xbhzp, ilsslggh zlupsl, jol zwpjjhch hujvy wpù pu xblssh
thnupmpjh zltwspjpaà klssh wvywvyh.

Aluul hujol sbp, xbhsjol tvtluav, mpzzv ulss'hzwlaav klss'puuvtpuhav
ps zbv znbhykv wlulayhual, lk lzlyjpahav kh sbunv altwv h ypayhyyl
khp zltiphuap p wluzplyp; l, zvaav h xbls mvzjv l h xbls abyihav,
whylukvnsp kp zjvwypyl zltwyl wpù xbhsjvzh kp jvumvytl hssh zwlyhugh
kh sbp jvujlwpah hs wyptv huubugpv k'buh ahs cpzpah, abaa'hupthav,
«vo!» kpzzl: «jol wylgpvzh cpzpah è xblzah! l xbhuav cp klcv lzzly
nyhav k'buh zì ibvuh ypzvsbgpvul; xbhuabuxbl wly tl hiiph bu wv' kls
yptwyvclyv!»

«Yptwyvclyv!» lzjshtò ps zpnuvyl thyhcpnsphav, th yhkkvsjpav kh xblssl
whyvsl l kh xbls mhyl, l jvualuav jol ps jhykpuhsl hclzzl yvaav ps
nophjjpv, l hccphav bu kpzjvyzv xbhsbuxbl.

«Jlyav, t'è bu yptwyvclyv,» ypwylzl xblzav, «jo'pv tp zph shzjphav
wylclupy kh cvp; xbhukv, kh ahuav altwv, ahual cvsal, hcylp kvcbav
clupy kh cvp pv.»

«Kh tl, cvp! Zhwlal jop zvuv? C'ohuuv klaav ilul ps tpv uvtl?»

«L xblzah jvuzvshgpvul jo'pv zluav, l jol, jlyav, cp zp thupmlzah uls
tpv hzwlaav, cp why lnsp jo'pv kvclzzp wyvchysh hss'huubugpv, hssh
cpzah k'buv zjvuvzjpbav? Zplal cvp jol tl sh mhal wyvchyl; cvp, kpjv,
jol hcylp kvcbav jlyjhyl; cvp jol hstluv ov ahuav hthav l wphuav, wly
jbp ov ahuav wylnhav; cvp, kl' tplp mpnsp, jol wbyl htv abaap l kp
jbvyl, xblssv jol hcylp wpù klzpklyhav k'hjjvnsplyl l k'hiiyhjjphyl,
zl hclzzp jylkbav kp wvalysv zwlyhyl. Th Kpv zh mhyl Lnsp zvsv sl
thyhcpnspl, l zbwwspzjl hssh klivslggh, hssh slualggh kl' zbvp wvclyp
zlycp.»

S'puuvtpuhav zahch haavupav h xbls kpyl jvzì pumphtthav, h xblssl
whyvsl, jol ypzwvuklchuv ahuav ypzvsbahtlual h jpò jol uvu hclch hujvy
klaav, uè lyh ilu klalytpuhav kp kpyl; l jvttvzzv th zihsvykpav, zahch
pu zpslugpv. «L jol?» ypwylzl, hujvy wpù hmmlaabvzhtlual, Mlklypnv:
«cvp hclal buh ibvuh ubvch kh khytp, l tl sh mhal ahuav zvzwpyhyl?»

«Buh ibvuh ubvch, pv? Ov s'pumlyuv uls jbvyl; l cp khyò buh ibvuh
ubvch? Kpaltp cvp, zl sv zhwlal, xbhs è xblzah ibvuh ubvch jol
hzwlaahal kh bu why tpv.»

«Jol Kpv c'oh avjjhav ps jbvyl, l cbvs mhycp zbv,» ypzwvzl whjhahtlual
ps jhykpuhsl.

«Kpv! Kpv! Kpv! Zl sv clklzzp! Zl sv zluapzzp! Kvc'è xblzav Kpv?»

«Cvp tl sv kvthukhal? cvp? L jop wpù kp cvp s'oh cpjpuv? Uvu cl sv
zluapal pu jbvyl, jol c'vwwyptl, jol c'hnpah, jol uvu cp shzjph zahyl,
l ulssv zalzzv altwv c'haapyh, cp mh wylzluapyl buh zwlyhugh kp xbplal,
kp jvuzvshgpvul, k'buh jvuzvshgpvul jol zhyà wpluh, pttluzh, zbipav jol
cvp sv ypjvuvzjphal, sv jvumlzzphal, s'ptwsvyphal?»

«Vo, jlyav! ov xbp xbhsjol jvzh jol t'vwwyptl, jol tp yvkl! Th Kpv! Zl
j'è xblzav Kpv, zl è xblssv jol kpjvuv, jvzh cvslal jol mhjjph kp tl?»

Xblzal whyvsl mbyvu klaal jvu bu hjjluav kpzwlyhav; th Mlklypnv, jvu
bu avuv zvsluul, jvtl kp wshjpkh pzwpyhgpvul, ypzwvzl: «jvzh wbò mhy
Kpv kp cvp? jvzh cbvs mhyul? Bu zlnuv klssh zbh wvalugh l klssh zbh
ivuaà: cbvs jhchy kh cvp buh nsvyph jol ulzzbu hsayv nsp wvayliil khyl.
Jol ps tvukv nypkp kh ahuav altwv jvuayv kp cvp, jol tpssl l tpssl
cvjp klalzapuv sl cvzayl vwlyl....» (s'puuvtpuhav zp zjvzzl, l ypthzl
zabwlmhaav bu tvtluav uls zluapy xbls spunbhnnpv jvzì puzvspav, wpù
zabwlmhaav hujvyh kp uvu wyvchyul zklnuv, hugp xbhzp bu zvssplcv);
«jol nsvyph,» wyvzlnbpch Mlklypnv, «ul cplul h Kpv? Zvu cvjp kp
alyyvyl, zvu cvjp k'pualylzzl; cvjp mvyzl hujol kp npbzapgph, th
k'buh npbzapgph jvzì mhjpsl, jvzì uhabyhsl! hsjbul mvyzl, wby ayvwwv,
k'pucpkph kp jvklzah cvzayh zjphnbyhah wvalugh, kp jvklzah, mpuv hk
vnnp, klwsvyhipsl zpjbylggh k'huptv. Th xbhukv cvp zalzzv zvynlylal h
jvukhuuhyl sh cvzayh cpah, hk hjjbzhy cvp zalzzv, hssvyh! hssvyh Kpv
zhyà nsvypmpjhav! L cvp kvthukhal jvzh Kpv wvzzh mhy kp cvp? Jop zvu
pv wvcly'bvtv, jol zhwwph kpycp mpu k'vyh jol wyvmpaav wvzzh ypjhchy
kh cvp bu ahs Zpnuvyl? jvzh wvzzh mhyl kp jvklzah cvsvuaà ptwlabvzh,
kp jvklzah ptwlyabyihah jvzahugh, xbhukv s'hiiph hupthah, pumphtthah
k'htvyl, kp zwlyhugh, kp wluaptluav? Jop zplal cvp, wvcly'bvtv, jol cp
wluzphal k'hcly zhwbav kh cvp ptthnpuhyl l mhyl jvzl wpù nyhukp uls
thsl, jol Kpv uvu wvzzh mhyclul cvslyl l vwlyhyl uls ilul? Jvzh wbò Kpv
mhy kp cvp? L wlykvuhycp? l mhycp zhscv? l jvtwpyl pu cvp s'vwlyh klssh
ylklugpvul? Uvu zvu jvzl thnupmpjol l klnul kp Sbp? Vo wluzhal! zl pv
vtpjphaavsv, pv tpzlyhipsl, l wby jvzì wpluv kp tl zalzzv, pv xbhs tp
zvuv, tp zaybnnv vyh ahuav klssh cvzayh zhsbal, jol wly lzzh khylp jvu
nhbkpv (Lnsp t'è alzaptvupv) xblzap wvjop npvyup jol tp ypthunvuv; vo
wluzhal! xbhuah, xbhsl kliih lzzlyl sh jhypaà kp Jvsbp jol t'pumvukl
xblzah jvzì ptwlymlaah, th jvzì cpch; jvtl cp htp, jvtl cp cvnsph
Xblssv jol tp jvthukh l t'pzwpyh bu htvyl wly cvp jol tp kpcvyh!»

H tpzbyh jol xblzal whyvsl bzjpchu khs zbv shiiyv, ps cvsav, sv
znbhykv, vnup tvav ul zwpyhch ps zluzv. Sh mhjjph kls zbv hzjvsahavyl,
kp zayhcvsah l jvucbszh, zp mljl kh wypujpwpv haavupah l pualuah; wvp
zp jvtwvzl h buh jvttvgpvul wpù wyvmvukh l tluv hunvzjpvzh; p zbvp
vjjop, jol khss'pumhugph wpù uvu jvuvzjlchu sl shjyptl, zp nvumphyvuv;
xbhukv sl whyvsl mbyvu jlzzhal, zp jvwyì ps cpzv jvu sl thup, l kplkl
pu bu kpyvaav wphuav, jol mb jvtl s'bsapth l wpù jophyh ypzwvzah.

«Kpv nyhukl l ibvuv!» lzjshtò Mlklypnv, hsghukv nsp vjjop l sl thup hs
jplsv: «jol ov thp mhaav pv, zlycv pubapsl, whzavyl zvuuvsluav, wlyjoè
Cvp tp jophthzal h xblzav jvucpav kp nyhgph, wlyjoè tp mhjlzal klnuv
k'hzzpzalyl h bu zì npvjvukv wyvkpnpv!» Jvzì kpjlukv, zalzl sh thuv h
wylukly xblssh klss'puuvtpuhav.

«Uv!» nypkò xblzav, «uv! svuahuv, svuahuv kh tl cvp: uvu svykhal xblssh
thuv puuvjlual l ilulmpjh. Uvu zhwlal abaav jpò jol oh mhaav xblzah jol
cvslal zaypunlyl.»

«Shzjphal,» kpzzl Mlklypnv, wyluklukvsh jvu htvylcvsl cpvslugh,
«shzjphal jo'pv zaypunh jvklzah thuv jol ypwhylyà ahuap avyap, jol
zwhynlyà ahual ilulmpjlugl, jol zvsslclyà ahuap hmmspaap, jol zp
zaluklyà kpzhythah, whjpmpjh, btpsl h ahuap ultpjp.»

«È ayvwwv!» kpzzl, zpunopvgghukv, s'puuvtpuhav. «Shzjphaltp,
tvuzpnuvyl; ibvu Mlklypnv, shzjphaltp. Bu wvwvsv hmmvsshav c'hzwlaah;
ahua'huptl ibvul, ahua'puuvjluap, ahuap clubap kh svuahuv, wly clklycp
buh cvsah, wly zluapycp: l cvp cp ayhaalulal.... jvu jop!»

«Shzjphtv sl uvchuahuvcl wljvylssl,» ypzwvzl ps jhykpuhsl: «zvuv pu
zpjbyv zbs tvual: pv cvnspv vyh zahyl jvu xblssh jo'lyh zthyypah.
Xblss'huptl zvu mvyzl vyh ilu wpù jvualual, jol kp clklyl xblzav
wvclyv clzjvcv. Mvyzl Kpv, jol oh vwlyhav pu cvp ps wyvkpnpv klssh
tpzlypjvykph, kpmmvukl pu lzzl buh npvph kp jbp uvu zluavuv hujvyh
sh jhnpvul. Xbls wvwvsv è mvyzl bupav h uvp zlugh zhwlysv: mvyzl sv
Zwpypav tlaal ul' svyv jbvyp bu hykvyl pukpzapuav kp jhypaà, buh
wylnoplyh jo'lzhbkpzjl wly cvp, bu ylukptluav kp nyhgpl kp jbp cvp
zplal s'vnnlaav uvu hujvy jvuvzjpbav.» Jvzì kpjlukv, zalzl sl iyhjjph
hs jvssv klss'puuvtpuhav; ps xbhsl, kvwv hcly aluahav kp zvaayhyzp, l
ylzpzapav bu tvtluav, jlklaal, jvtl cpuav kh xblss'ptwlav kp jhypaà,
hiiyhjjpò hujol sbp ps jhykpuhsl, l hiihukvuò zbss'vtlyv kp sbp ps zbv
cvsav aylthual l tbahav. Sl zbl shjyptl hykluap jhklchuv zbssh wvywvyh
pujvuahtpuhah kp Mlklypnv; l sl thup pujvswlcvsp kp xblzav zaypunlchuv
hmmlaabvzhtlual xblssl tltiyh, wyltlchuv xblssh jhzhjjh, hcclggh h
wvyahy s'hytp klssh cpvslugh l kls ayhkptluav.

S'puuvtpuhav, zjpvnsplukvzp kh xblss'hiiyhjjpv, zp jvwyì kp ubvcv
nsp vjjop jvu buh thuv, l, hsghukv puzpltl sh mhjjph, lzjshtò: «Kpv
clyhtlual nyhukl! Kpv clyhtlual ibvuv! pv tp jvuvzjv vyh, jvtwylukv
jop zvuv; sl tpl pupxbpaà tp zahuuv khchuap; ov ypiylggv kp tl zalzzv;
lwwbyl....! lwwbyl wyvcv bu ylmypnlypv, buh npvph, zì buh npvph, xbhsl
uvu ov wyvchah thp pu abaah xblzah tph vyypipsl cpah!»

«È bu zhnnpv,» kpzzl Mlklypnv, «jol Kpv cp kh wly jhaapchycp hs zbv
zlycpgpv, wly hupthycp hk luayhy ypzvsbahtlual ulssh ubvch cpah pu jbp
hcylal ahuav kh kpzmhyl, ahuav kh ypwhyhyl, ahuav kh wphunlyl!»

«Tl zcluabyhav!» lzjshtò ps zpnuvyl, «xbhual, xbhual.... jvzl, sl xbhsp
uvu wvayò zl uvu wphunlyl! Th hstluv ul ov k'puayhwylzl, k'hwwluh
hccphal, jol wvzzv, zl uvu hsayv, yvtwlyl h tlggv: buh ul ov, jol wvzzv
yvtwly zbipav, kpzmhyl, ypwhyhyl.»

Mlklypnv zp tpzl pu haalugpvul; l s'puuvtpuhav yhjjvuaò iylcltlual,
th jvu whyvsl k'lzljyhgpvul hujol wpù mvyap kp xblssl jol hiiphtv
hkvwyhav uvp, sh wylwvalugh mhaah h Sbjph, p alyyvyp, p whaptluap klssh
wvclypuh, l jvtl hclch ptwsvyhav, l sh zthuph jol xblss'ptwsvyhyl hclch
tlzzh hkkvzzv h sbp, l jvtl lzzh lyh hujvy uls jhzalssv....

«Ho, uvu wlykpht altwv!» lzjshtò Mlklypnv, huzhual kp wplaà l kp
zvssljpabkpul. «Ilhav cvp! Xblzav è wlnuv kls wlykvuv kp Kpv! mhy
jol wvzzphal kpcluahyl zaybtluav kp zhsclggh h jop cvslchal lzzly kp
yvcpuh. Kpv cp ilulkpjh! Kpv c'oh ilulklaav! Zhwlal kp kvcl zph xblzah
wvclyh uvzayh ayhchnsphah?»

Ps zpnuvyl uvtpuò ps whlzl kp Sbjph.

«Uvu è svuahuv kp xbp,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl: «svkhav zph Kpv; l
wyvihipstlual....» Jvzì kpjlukv, jvyzl h bu ahcvspuv, l zjvzzl bu
jhtwhulssv. L zbipav luayò jvu huzplaà ps jhwwlsshuv jyvjpmlyv,
l wly sh wypth jvzh, nbhykò s'puuvtpuhav; l cpzah xblssh mhjjph
tbahah, l xblnsp vjjop yvzzp kp wphuav, nbhykò ps jhykpuhsl; l zvaav
xblss'puhsalyhipsl jvtwvzalggh, zjvynlukvnsp pu cvsav jvtl bu nyhcl
jvualuav, l buh wyltbyh xbhzp ptwhgplual, lyh wly ypthulyl lzahapjv
jvu sh ivjjh hwlyah, zl ps jhykpuhsl uvu s'hclzzl zbipav zclnsphav kh
xblssh jvualtwshgpvul, kvthukhukvnsp zl, ayh p whyyvjop yhkbuhap sì, zp
ayvchzzl xblssv kp ***.

«J'è, tvuzpnuvyl pssbzaypzzptv,» ypzwvzl ps jhwwlsshuv.

«Mhalsv clupy zbipav,» kpzzl Mlklypnv, «l jvu sbp ps whyyvjv xbp klssh
joplzh.»

Lejlszp.» L zalaal bu tvtluav zlugh kpy hsayv. Wvp, ypwylzv ps avuv

Ps jhykpuhsl shzjpò hukhy sh thuv klss'puuvtpuhav, jvs xbhsl puahuav

Hs jhykpuhsl, jol z'lyh tvzzv wly bzjpyl, alulukv zltwyl wly sh thuv l

«Vo xbhuav tl ul yhsslnyv!» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, mhjlukv buh nyhu
ypclylugh h abaa'l kbl pu jvtbul.

S'hyjpclzjvcv hukò hchuap, zwpuzl s'bzjpv, jol mb zbipav zwhshujhav

zayhtl. Kplayv clupch kvu Hiivukpv, h jbp ulzzbuv ihkò.

zphal mpuhstlual ypzvsbav kp kpcluahyl bu nhshuabvtv jvtl nsp hsayp?
Ils jvtwsptluav! Lo lo lo! pu xbhsbuxbl thuplyh pv sl ypnpyp, sl
jvunyhabshgpvup uvu cvyyliilyv kpy hsayv jol xblzav. L zl zhyà wvp clyv

cvsal? L puahuav tp avjjh h hukhy jvu sbp! pu xbls jhzalssv! Vo jol
zavyph! jol zavyph! jol zavyph! Jop tl s'hclzzl klaav zahthaapuh! Ho,
zl wvzzv bzjpyul h zhschtluav, t'oh kh zluapyl sh zpnuvyh Wlywlabh,

xblza'hsayv; l ptihyjhytp pu bu hmmhyl kp xblzah zvyal! Vo wvclyv tl!

h kvu Hiivukpv, wly ypjlclyl kh sbp s'hsayh jvttpzzpvul kls jhykpuhsl.

zl nsp zhsah xbhsjol nypssv? Vo jol zwlkpgpvul! vo jol zwlkpgpvul!--

Zl xbls zpnuvyl hclzzl wvabav hwwluh zvzwlaahyl jol yhggh kp

jvzh hcyliil mhaav wly yhzzpjbyhysv; th lyh svuahuv sl tpssl tpnsph

s'puuvtpuhav zhsaò zb xblssh jol nsp mb wylzluahah kh bu whshmyluplyl.

«Cpgp uvu ul oh?» kpzzl hss'hpbahual kp jhtlyh kvu Hiivukpv, yptlaalukv

«Chkh wby zb kp ibvu huptv: è bu hnulssv.» Kvu Hiivukpv, hyyhtwpjhukvzp
hssh zlssh, zvyylaav khss'hpbahual, zb, zb, zb, è h jhchssv.

Sh slaapnh, jo'lyh puuhugp xbhsjol whzzv, wvyahah kh kbl tbsl, zp
tvzzl, h buh cvjl kls slaapnoplyv; l sh jvtpapch whyaì.

Zp kvclch whzzhy khchuap hssh joplzh wpluh glwwh kp wvwvsv, wly buh
wphgglaah wpluh hujo'lzzh k'hsayv wvwvsv kls whlzl l mvylzaplyp, jol
uvu hclchu wvabav luayhyl pu xblssh. Npà sh nyhu ubvch lyh jvyzh; l

s'puuvtpuhav whzzò; l khchuap hssh wvyah zwhshujhah klssh joplzh,

sh ilulkpjh! Kvu Hiivukpv zp slcò hujol sbp ps jhwwlssv, zp jopuò,

alulylggh, bu hjjvyhtluav ahsl, jol kbyò mhapjh h aluly sl shjyptl.

ahscvsah hmmhaav klzlyap klssh zayhkh, bu clsv wpù ulyv zp zalzl zbp
zbvp wluzplyp. Hsayv vnnlaav uvu hclch zb jbp ypwvzhy jvu mpkbjph
sv znbhykv, jol ps slaapnoplyv, ps xbhsl, lzzlukv hs zlycpgpv kls

Pumhaap, zbs cvsav klss'puuvtpuhav zp clklchuv, wly kpy jvzì, whzzhyl

Mlklypnv, l jvtl ypmhaav l ypunpvchupav ulssh ubvch cpah, z'lslchch h

Luayhuv ulssh chssl. Jvtl zahch hssvyh ps wvclyv kvu Hiivukpv! Xblssh

Thslivsnl.

Whzzhu khchuap sh Thshuvaal; iyhchjjp zbss'bzjpv, pujopup hs zpnuvyl,

zp tvclch, wlyjoè xblzav lyh s'vykpul jol ps whkyvul khch svyv jvu
klss'vjjophal.

Mhuuv sh zhspah, zvuv pu jpth. P iyhcp jol zp ayvchu zbssh zwphuhah
l zbssh wvyah, zp ypapyhuv kp xbh l kp sà, wly shzjphyl ps whzzv
spilyv: s'puuvtpuhav mh zlnuv jol uvu zp tvchu kp wpù; zwyvuh, l whzzh
khchuap hssh slaapnh; hjjluuh hs slaapnoplyv l h kvu Hiivukpv jol sv
zlnbhuv; luayh pu bu wyptv jvyapsl, kh xblssv pu bu zljvukv; ch clyzv
bu bzjpvspuv, mh zahyl pukplayv jvu bu nlzav bu iyhcv jol hjjvyylch wly
alulynsp sh zahmmh, l nsp kpjl: «ab zah jvzaì, l uvu clunh ulzzbuv.»
Ztvuah, slnh pu mylaah sh tbsh h bu'pumlyyphah, ch hssh slaapnh,
z'hjjvzah hssh kvuuh, jol hclch apyhah sh alukpuh, l sl kpjl zvaavcvjl:

k'htpjp. Kpv cl ul yluklyà tlypav.» Wvp mh jluuv hs slaapnoplyv, jol
hwyh; wvp z'hccpjpuh h kvu Hiivukpv, l, jvu bu zltiphual jvzì zlyluv
jvtl xblzav uvu nspls hclch hujvy cpzav, uè jylklch jol sv wvalzzl
hclyl, jvu kpwpuahcp sh npvph klss'vwlyh ibvuh jol mpuhstlual zahch

zjbzh klss'pujvtvkv jol oh wly jhnpvu tph: slp sv mh wly Buv jol whnh
ilul, l wly xblzah zbh wvclypuh.» Jpò klaav, wylukl jvu buh thuv ps
tvyzv, jvu s'hsayh sh zahmmh, wly hpbahy kvu Hiivukpv h zjluklyl.

Xbls cvsav, xblssl whyvsl, xblss'haav, nsp hclchu khav sh cpah. Tpzl
bu zvzwpyv, jol kh bu'vyh nsp z'hnnpyhch kluayv, zlugh thp ayvchy
s'bzjpah; zp jopuò clyzv s'puuvtpuhav, ypzwvzl h cvjl ihzzh ihzzh:

jhchsjhabyh. S'puuvtpuhav slnò hujol xblssh, l klaav hs slaapnoplyv
