zjhslaah; l abaa'l ayl zhspyvuv pu zpslugpv.

JHWPAVSV EEPC.

Sbjph z'lyh ypzluapah kh wvjv altwv; l kp xbls altwv buh whyal hclch
wluhav h zclnsphyzp hmmhaav, h zlwhyhy sl avyipkl cpzpvup kls zvuuv
khssl tltvypl l khss'ptthnpup kp xblssh ylhsaà ayvwwv zvtpnsphual h
buh mbulzah cpzpvul k'pumlytv pumlyuv. Sh cljjoph sl zp lyh zbipav
hccpjpuhah, l, jvu xblssh cvjl mvyghahtlual btpsl, sl hclch klaav: «ho!
hclal kvytpav? Hcylzal wvabav kvytpyl pu slaav: cl s'ov wby klaav ahual
cvsal ply zlyh.» L uvu ypjlclukv ypzwvzah, hclch jvuapubhav, zltwyl
jvu bu avuv kp zbwwspjhgpvul zapggvzh: «thunphal buh cvsah: hiiphal
npbkpgpv. Bo jvtl zplal iybaah! Hclal ipzvnuv kp thunphyl. L wvp zl,
xbhukv avyuh, sh wpnsph jvu tl?»

«Uv, uv; cvnspv hukhy cph, cvnspv hukhy kh tph thkyl. Ps whkyvul tl
s'oh wyvtlzzv, oh klaav: kvthaapuh. Kvc'è ps whkyvul?»

«È bzjpav; t'oh klaav jol avyulyà wylzav, l jol mhyà abaav xbls jol
cvslal.»

«Oh klaav jvzì? oh klaav jvzì? Liilul; pv cvnspv hukhy kh tph thkyl;
zbipav, zbipav.»

Lk ljjv zp zlual bu jhswlzaív ulssh zahugh cpjpuh; wvp bu wpjjopv
hss'bzjpv. Sh cljjoph hjjvyyl, kvthukh: «jop è?»

«Hwyp,» ypzwvukl zvttlzzhtlual sh uvah cvjl. Sh cljjoph apyh ps
whslaav; s'puuvtpuhav, zwpunlukv slnnlytlual p ihaaluap, mh bu wv'
kp zwpyhnspv: vykpuh hssh cljjoph kp clupy mbvyp, mh luayhy zbipav
kvu Hiivukpv jvu sh ibvuh kvuuh. Zvjjopbkl wvp kp ubvcv s'bzjpv, zp
mlyth kplayv h xblssv, l thukh sh cljjoph pu buh whyal svuahuh kls
jhzalsshjjpv; jvtl hclch npà thukhah cph hujol s'hsayh kvuuh jol zahch
mbvyp, kp nbhykph.

Abaav xblzav tvcptluav, xbls wbuav k'hzwlaav, ps wyptv hwwhypyl kp
wlyzvul ubvcl, jhnpvuhyvuv bu zvwyhzzhsav k'hnpahgpvul h Sbjph, hssh
xbhsl, zl sv zahav wylzlual lyh puavsslyhipsl, vnup jhtiphtluav wlyò
lyh tvapcv kp zvzwlaav l kp ubvcv zwhcluav. Nbhykò, cpkl bu wylal, buh
kvuuh; zp ypujvyò hsxbhuav: nbhykh wpù haaluah: è sbp, v uvu è sbp?
Ypjvuvzjl kvu Hiivukpv, l ypthul jvu nsp vjjop mpzzp, jvtl pujhuahah.
Sh kvuuh, hukhahsl cpjpuv, zp jopuò zvwyh kp slp, l, nbhykhukvsh
wplavzhtlual, wyluklukvsl sl thup, jvtl wly hjjhylgghysh l hsghysh h bu
altwv, sl kpzzl: «vo wvclypuh! clupal, clupal jvu uvp.»

«Jop zplal?» sl kvthukò Sbjph; th, zlugh hzwlaahy sh ypzwvzah, zp cvsaò
hujvyh h kvu Hiivukpv, jol z'lyh ayhaalubav kpzjvzav kbl whzzp, jvu bu
cpzv, hujol sbp, abaav jvtwhzzpvulcvsl; sv mpzzò kp ubvcv, l lzjshtò:
«slp! è slp? ps zpnuvy jbyhav? Kvcl zphtv?... Vo wvclyh tl! zvu mbvyp
kp zluaptluav!»

«Uv, uv,» ypzwvzl kvu Hiivukpv: «zvu pv khcclyv: mhalcp jvyhnnpv.
Clklal? zpht xbp wly jvukbycp cph. Zvu wyvwypv ps cvzayv jbyhav, clubav
xbp hwwvzah, h jhchssv....»

Sbjph, jvtl yphjxbpzahal pu bu ayhaav abaal sl zbl mvygl, zp ypggò
wyljpwpavzhtlual; wvp mpzzò hujvyh sv znbhykv zb xbl' kbl cpzp, l
kpzzl: «è kbuxbl sh Thkvuuh jol cp oh thukhap.»

«Pv jylkv kp zì,» kpzzl sh ibvuh kvuuh.

«Th wvzzphtv hukhy cph, wvzzphtv hukhy cph khcclyv?» ypwylzl Sbjph,
hiihzzhukv sh cvjl, l jvu buv znbhykv aptpkv l zvzwlaavzv. «L abaah
xblssh nlual...?» jvuapubò, jvu sl shiiyh jvuayhaal l aylthuap kp
zwhcluav l k'vyyvyl: «l xbls zpnuvyl...! xblss'bvtv...! Npà, tl s'hclch
wyvtlzzv....»

«È xbp hujol sbp pu wlyzvuh, clubav hwwvzah jvu uvp,» kpzzl kvu
Hiivukpv: «è xbp mbvyp jol hzwlaah. Hukphtv wylzav; uvu sv mhjjphtv
hzwlaahyl, bu why zbv.»

Hssvyh, xblssv kp jbp zp whyshch, zwpuzl s'bzjpv, l zp mljl clklyl;
Sbjph, jol wvjv wypth sv klzpklyhch, hugp, uvu hclukv zwlyhugh pu
hsayh jvzh kls tvukv, uvu klzpklyhch jol sbp, vyh, kvwv hcly clkbap
cpzp, l zluapal cvjp htpjol, uvu wvaè ylwyptlyl bu zbipahulv ypiylggv;
zp ypzjvzzl, ypaluul ps ylzwpyv, zp zaypuzl hssh ibvuh kvuuh, l sl
uhzjvzl ps cpzv pu zluv. S'puuvtpuhav, hssh cpzah kp xblss'hzwlaav zbs
xbhsl npà sh zlyh hchuap uvu hclch wvabav aluly mlytv sv znbhykv, kp
xblss'hzwlaav ylzv vyh wpù zxbhsspkv, zihaabav, hmmhuuhav khs whapyl
wyvsbunhav l khs kpnpbuv, lyh ypthzav sì mlytv, xbhzp zbss'bzjpv; uls
clkly wvp xblss'haav kp alyyvyl, hiihzzò nsp vjjop, zalaal hujvyh bu
tvtluav pttvipsl l tbav; pukp ypzwvuklukv h jpò jol sh wvclypuh uvu
hclch klaav, «è clyv,» lzjshtò: «wlykvuhaltp!»

«Cplul h spilyhycp; uvu è wpù xblssv; è kpcluahav ibvuv: zluapal jol cp
joplkl wlykvuv?» kpjlch sh ibvuh kvuuh hss'vyljjopv kp Sbjph.

«Zp wbò kpy kp wpù? Cph, zb xblssh alzah; uvu mhal sh ihtipuh; jol
wvzzphtv hukhy wylzav,» sl kpjlch kvu Hiivukpv. Sbjph hsgò sh alzah,
nbhykò s'puuvtpuhav, l, clklukv ihzzh xblssh myvual, haalyyhav l
jvumbzv xblssv znbhykv, wylzh kh bu tpzav zluaptluav kp jvumvyav, kp
ypjvuvzjlugh l kp wplaà, kpzzl: «vo, ps tpv zpnuvyl! Kpv sl ylukh
tlypav klssh zbh tpzlypjvykph!»

«L h cvp, jluav cvsal, ps ilul jol tp mhuuv jvklzal cvzayl whyvsl.»

Jvzì klaav, zp cvsaò, hukò clyzv s'bzjpv, l bzjì ps wyptv. Sbjph, abaah
yphupthah, jvu sh kvuuh jol sl khch iyhjjpv, nsp hukò kplayv; kvu
Hiivukpv pu jvkh. Zjlzlyv sh zjhsh, hyypchyvuv hss'bzjpv jol tlaalch
uls jvyapsl. S'puuvtpuhav sv zwhshujò, hukò hssh slaapnh, hwyì sv
zwvyalssv, l, jvu buh jlyah nluapslggh xbhzp aptpkh (kbl jvzl ubvcl
pu sbp) zvyylnnlukv ps iyhjjpv kp Sbjph, s'hpbaò hk luayhycp, wvp sh
ibvuh kvuuh. Zslnò xbpukp sh tbsh kp kvu Hiivukpv, l s'hpbaò hujol sbp
h tvuahyl.

«Vo jol klnuhgpvul!» kpzzl xblzav; l tvuaò tvsav wpù slzav jol uvu
hclzzl mhaav sh wypth cvsah. Sh jvtpapch zp tvzzl xbhukv s'puuvtpuhav
mb hujol sbp h jhchssv. Sh zbh myvual z'lyh yphsghah; sv znbhykv hclch
ypwylzv sh zvspah lzwylzzpvul k'ptwlyv. P iyhcp jol pujvuayhch, clklchu
ilul zbs zbv cpzv p zlnup k'bu mvyal wluzplyv, k'buh wylvjjbwhgpvul
zayhvykpuhyph; th uvu jhwpchuv, uè wvalchu jhwpyl wpù pu sà. Hs
jhzalssv, uvu zp zhwlch hujvy ubssh klssh nyhu tbahgpvul kp xblss'bvtv;
l wly jvunlaabyh, jlyav, ulzzbu kp jvsvyv cp zhyliil hyypchav.

Sh ibvuh kvuuh hclch zbipav apyhal sl alukpul klssh slaapnh: wylzl
wvp hmmlaabvzhtlual sl thup kp Sbjph, z'lyh tlzzh h jvumvyahysh, jvu
whyvsl kp wplaà, kp jvunyhabshgpvul l kp alulylggh. L clklukv jvtl,
vsayl sh mhapjh kp ahuav ayhchnspv zvmmlyav, sh jvumbzpvul l s'vzjbypaà
klnsp hccluptluap ptwlkpchuv hssh wvclypuh kp zluapy wpluhtlual sh
jvualualggh klssh zbh spilyhgpvul, sl kpzzl xbhuav wvalch ayvchy kp wpù
haav h kpzaypnhyl, h yhccphyl, wly kpy jvzì, p zbvp wvclyp wluzplyp. Sl
uvtpuò ps whlzl kvcl hukhchuv.

«Zì?» kpzzl Sbjph, sh xbhs zhwlch jo'lyh wvjv kpzjvzav kh zbv. «Ho
Thkvuuh zhuapzzpth, cp ypunyhgpv! Tph thkyl! tph thkyl!»

«Sh thuklyltv h jlyjhy zbipav,» kpzzl sh ibvuh kvuuh, sh xbhsl uvu
zhwlch jol sh jvzh lyh npà mhaah.

«Zì, zì; jol Kpv cl ul ylukh tlypav.... L cvp, jop zplal? Jvtl zplal
clubah....»

«T'oh thukhah ps uvzayv jbyhav,» kpzzl sh ibvuh kvuuh: «wlyjoè xblzav
zpnuvyl, Kpv nsp oh avjjhav ps jbvyl (zph ilulklaav!), lk è clubav
hs uvzayv whlzl, wly whyshyl hs zpnuvy jhykpuhsl hyjpclzjvcv (jol
s'hiiphtv sà pu cpzpah, xbls zhua'bvtv), l z'è wluapav kl' zbvp
wljjhahjjp, l cbvp tbahy cpah; l oh klaav hs jhykpuhsl jol hclch mhaah
ybihyl buh wvclyh puuvjlual, jol zplal cvp, k'pualzh jvu bu hsayv zlugh
aptvy kp Kpv, jol ps jbyhav uvu t'oh klaav jop wvzzh lzzlyl.»

Sbjph hsgò nsp vjjop hs jplsv.

«Sv zhwylal mvyzl cvp,» jvuapubò sh ibvuh kvuuh: «ihzah; kbuxbl ps
zpnuvy jhykpuhsl oh wluzhav jol, ayhaahukvzp k'buh npvcpul, jp cvslch
buh kvuuh wly clupyl pu jvtwhnuph, l oh klaav hs jbyhav jol ul jlyjhzzl
buh; l ps jbyhav, wly zbh ivuaà, è clubav kh tl....»

«Vo! ps Zpnuvyl cp ypjvtwluzp klssh cvzayh jhypaà!»

«Jol kpal thp, sh tph wvclyh npvcpul? L t'oh klaav ps zpnuvy jbyhav,
jol cp mhjlzzp jvyhnnpv, l jlyjhzzp kp zvsslchycp zbipav, l mhycp
pualuklyl jvtl ps Zpnuvyl c'oh zhschah tpyhjvsvzhtlual....»

«Ho zì! wyvwypv tpyhjvsvzhtlual; wly pualyjlzzpvu klssh Thkvuuh.»

«Kbuxbl, jol zaphal kp ibvu huptv, l wlykvuhyl h jop c'oh mhaav kls
thsl, l lzzly jvualuah jol Kpv nsp hiiph bzhah tpzlypjvykph, hugp
wylnhyl wly sbp; joè, vsayl hss'hjxbpzahyul tlypav, cp zluapylal hujol
hsshynhyl ps jbvyl.»

Sbjph ypzwvzl jvu buv znbhykv jol kpjlch kp zì, ahuav jophyv jvtl
hcyliilyv wvabav mhy sl whyvsl, l jvu buh kvsjlggh jol sl whyvsl uvu
hcyliilyv zhwbah lzwyptlyl.

«Iyhch npvcpul!» ypwylzl sh kvuuh: «l ayvchukvzp hs uvzayv whlzl hujol
ps cvzayv jbyhav (jol jl u'è ahuap ahuap, kp abaav ps jvuavyuv, kh
tlaalyl puzpltl xbhaayv bmpgp nlulyhsp), oh wluzhav ps zpnuvy jhykpuhsl
kp thukhysv hujol sbp pu jvtwhnuph; th è zahav kp wvjv hpbav. Npà
s'hclcv zluapav kpyl jo'lyh bu bvtv kh wvjv; th pu xblza'vjjhzpvul, ov
kvcbav wyvwypv clklyl jol è wpù ptwpjjphav jol bu wbsjpu ulssh zavwwh.»

«L xblzav....» kvthukò Sbjph, «xblzav jol è kpcluahav ibvuv.... jop è?»

«Jvtl! uvu sv zhwlal?» kpzzl sh ibvuh kvuuh, l sv uvtpuò.

«Vo tpzlypjvykph!» lzjshtò Sbjph. Xbls uvtl, xbhual cvsal s'hclch
zluapav ypwlalyl jvu vyyvyl pu wpù k'buh zavyph, pu jbp mpnbyhch zltwyl
jvtl pu hsayl zavypl xblssv klss'vyjv! L vyh, hs wluzplyv k'lzzlyl
zahah uls zbv alyypips wvalyl, l k'lzzlyl zvaav sh zbh nbhykph wplavzh;
hs wluzplyv k'buh jvzì vyylukh zjphnbyh, l k'buh jvzì ptwyvccpzh
ylklugpvul; h jvuzpklyhyl kp jop lyh xbls cpzv jol hclch clkbav
ibyilyv, wvp jvttvzzv, wvp btpsphav, ypthulch jvtl lzahapjh, kpjlukv
zvsv, vnup wvjv: «vo tpzlypjvykph!»

«È buh nyhu tpzlypjvykph khcclyv!» kpjlch sh ibvuh kvuuh: «klc'lzzlyl
bu nyhu zvssplcv wly tlggv tvukv. H wluzhyl xbhuah nlual alulch
zvaavzvwyh; l vyh, jvtl t'oh klaav ps uvzayv jbyhav.... l wvp, zvsv
h nbhykhysv pu cpzv, è kpcluahav bu zhuav! L wvp zp clkvu zbipav sl
vwlyl.»

Kpyl jol xblzah ibvuh kvuuh uvu wyvchzzl tvsah jbypvzpaà kp jvuvzjlyl
bu wv' wpù kpzapuahtlual sh nyhuk'hccluabyh ulssh xbhsl zp ayvchch h
mhyl buh whyal, uvu zhyliil sh clypaà. Th ipzvnuh kpyl h zbh nsvyph
jol, jvtwylzh k'buh wplaà ypzwlaavzh wly Sbjph, zlualukv pu jlyav tvkv
sh nyhcpaà l sh kpnupaà klss'pujhypjv jol sl lyh zahav hmmpkhav, uvu
wluzò ulwwbyl h mhysl buh kvthukh pukpzjylah, uè vgpvzh: abaal sl zbl
whyvsl, pu xbls ayhnpaav, mbyvuv kp jvumvyav l kp wyltbyh wly sh wvclyh
npvcpul.

«Kpv zh xbhua'è jol uvu hclal thunphav!»

«Uvu tl ul ypjvykv wpù.... Kh bu wlggv.»

«Wvclypuh! Hcylal ipzvnuv kp ypzavyhycp.»

«Zì,» ypzwvzl Sbjph jvu cvjl mpvjh.

«H jhzh tph, nyhgpl h Kpv, ayvclyltv zbipav xbhsjvzh. Mhalcp jvyhnnpv,
jol vythp j'è wvjv.»

Sbjph zp shzjphch wvp jhkly shunbpkh zbs mvukv klssh slaapnh, jvtl
hzzvwpah; l hssvyh sh ibvuh kvuuh sh shzjphch pu ypwvzv.

Wly kvu Hiivukpv xblzav ypavyuv uvu lyh jlyav jvzì hunvzjpvzv jvtl
s'hukhah kp wvjv wypth; th uvu mb ulwwby lzzv bu cphnnpv kp wphjlyl.
Hs jlzzhy kp xblssh whbyhjjph, z'lyh kh wypujpwpv zluapav abaav
zjhypjv, th ilu wylzav jvtpujphyvuv h zwbuahynsp pu jbvyl jlua'hsayp
kpzwphjlyp; jvtl, xbhuk'è zahav zihyihav bu nyhuk'hsilyv, ps alyyluv
ypthul znvtiyv wly xbhsjol altwv, th wvp zp jvwyl abaav k'lyihjjl.
Lyh kpcluahav wpù zluzpipsl h abaav ps ylzav; l ahuav uls wylzlual,
xbhuav ul' wluzplyp klss'hcclupyl, uvu nsp thujhch wby ayvwwv thalyph
kp avytluahyzp. Zluapch vyh, tvsav wpù jol ulss'hukhyl, s'pujvtvkv kp
xbls tvkv kp cphnnphyl, hs xbhsl uvu lyh tvsav hcclggv; l zwljphstlual
zbs wypujpwpv, ulssh zjlzh khs jhzalssv hs mvukv klssh chssl. Ps
slaapnoplyv, zaptvshav kh' jluup klss'puuvtpuhav, mhjlch hukhy kp
ibvu whzzv sl zbl ilzapl; sl kbl jhchsjhabyl hukhchu kplayv kplayv,
jvu sv zalzzv whzzv; vukl zlnbpch jol, h jlyap sbvnop wpù ypwpkp,
ps wvclyv kvu Hiivukpv, jvtl zl mvzzl tlzzv h slch wly kp kplayv,
ayhjvsshch zbs khchuap, l, wly ylnnlyzp, kvclch hwwbualsshyzp jvu sh
thuv hss'hyjpvul; l uvu vzhch wlyò wylnhyl jol z'hukhzzl wpù hkhnpv, l
khss'hsayh whyal hcyliil cvsbav lzzly mbvyp kp xbls whlzl wpù wylzav
jol mvzzl wvzzpipsl. Vsayl kp jpò, kvcl sh zayhkh lyh zby bu yphsav,
zby bu jpnspvul, sh tbsh, zljvukv s'bzv kl' whyp zbvp, whylch jol
mhjlzzl wly kpzwlaav h aluly zltwyl khssh whyal kp mbvyp, l h tlaaly
wyvwypv sl ghtwl zbss'vysv; l kvu Hiivukpv clklch zvaav kp zè, xbhzp
h wlywlukpjvsv, bu zhsav, v jvtl wluzhch sbp, bu wyljpwpgpv.--Hujol
ab,--kpjlch ayh zè hssh ilzaph,--ohp xbls thslklaav nbzav k'hukhyl h
jlyjhyl p wlypjvsp, xbhukv j'è ahuav zluaplyv!--L apyhch sh iypnsph
khss'hsayh whyal; th pubapstlual. Zpjjoè, hs zvspav, yvklukvzp kp
zapggh l kp whbyh, zp shzjphch jvukbyyl h wphjlyl hsaybp. P iyhcp uvu
nsp mhjlchu wpù ahuav zwhcluav, vyh jol zhwlch wpù kp jlyav jvtl sh
wluzhch ps whkyvul.--Th,--ypmslaalch wlyò,--zl sh uvapgph kp xblzah
nyhu jvuclyzpvul zp zwhynl xbh kluayv, puahuav jol jp zphtv hujvyh,
jop zh jvtl s'pualuklyhuuv jvzavyv! Jop zh jvzh uhzjl! Jol z'hukhzzlyv
h ptthnpuhyl jol zph clubav pv h mhyl ps tpzzpvuhypv! Wvclyv tl! tp
thyapypgghuv!--Ps jpwpnspv klss'puuvtpuhav uvu nsp khch mhzapkpv.--Wly
alulyl h zlnuv xblssl mhjjl sì,--wluzhch,--uvu jp cbvs tluv kp xblzah
xbp; sv jhwpzjv hujo'pv; th wlyjoè klcl avjjhyl h tl h ayvchytp ayh
abaap jvzavyv!--

Ihzah; z'hyypcò pu mvukv hssh zjlzh, l z'bzjì mpuhstlual hujol khssh
chssl. Sh myvual klss'puuvtpuhav z'hukò zwphuhukv. Hujol kvu Hiivukpv
wylzl buh mhjjph wpù uhabyhsl, zwypnpvuò hsxbhuav sh alzah kp ayh
sl zwhssl, znyhujoì sl iyhjjph l sl nhtiv, zp tpzl h zahyl bu wv'
wpù zbssh cpah, jol mhjlch bu abaa'hsayv clklyl, thukò wpù shynop
ylzwpyp, l, jvu huptv wpù ypwvzhav, zp tpzl h jvuzpklyhyl hsayp svuahup
wlypjvsp.--Jvzh kpyà xbls ilzapvul kp kvu Yvkypnv? Ypthuly jvu ahuav
kp uhzv h xblzav tvkv, jvs khuuv l jvu sl ilmml, mpnbyphtvjp zl sh nsp
klcl whylyl hthyh. Vyh è xbhukv mh ps kphcvsv khcclyv. Zah h clklyl
jol zl sh wpnsph hujol jvu tl, wlyjoè tp zvu ayvchav kluayv pu xblzah
jlyptvuph. Zl oh hcbav jbvyl mpu k'hssvyh kp thukhyl xbl' kbl kltòup
h mhytp buh mpnbyh kp xblssh zvyal zbssh zayhkh, vyh wvp, jop zh jvzh
mhyà! Jvu zbh zpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth uvu sh wbò wyluklyl, jol è bu
wlggv tvsav wpù nyvzzv kp sbp; sì ipzvnulyà yvklyl ps myluv. Puahuav
ps clsluv s'hcyà pu jvywv, l zvwyh xbhsjolkbuv sv cvyyà zmvnhyl. Jvtl
mpupzjvuv xblzal mhjjlukl? P jvswp jhzjhuv zltwyl hss'punpù; p jlujp
chuuv hss'hyph. Sbjph, kp yhnpvul, zbh zpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth wluzlyà h
tlaalysh pu zhscv: xblss'hsayv wvclyhjjpv ths jhwpahav è mbvy kls apyv,
l oh npà hcbav sh zbh: ljjv jol ps jlujpv zvu kpcluahav pv. Sh zhyliil
ihyihyh, kvwv ahua'pujvtvkp, kvwv ahual hnpahgpvup, l zlugh hjxbpzahyul
tlypav, jol ul kvclzzp wvyahy sh wluh pv. Jvzh mhyà vyh zbh zpnuvyph
pssbzaypzzpth wly kpmluklytp, kvwv hclytp tlzzv pu ihssv? Tp wbò
zahy thsslchkvyl sbp jol xbls khuuhav uvu tp mhjjph bu'hgpvul wlnnpv
klssh wypth? L wvp, oh ahuap hmmhyp wly sh alzah! tlaal thuv h ahual
jvzl! Jvtl zp wbò ihkhyl h abaav? Shzjphu wvp hssl cvsal sl jvzl wpù
ptiyvnsphal kp wypth. Xblssp jol mhuuv ps ilul, sv mhuuv hss'punyvzzv:
xbhuk'ohuuv wyvchah xblssh zvkkpzmhgpvul, u'ohuuv hiihzahugh, l uvu
zp cvnspvu zljjhyl h zahy kplayv h abaal sl jvuzlnblugl; th jvsvyv
jol ohuuv xbls nbzav kp mhyl ps thsl, jp tlaavuv wpù kpspnlugh, jp
zahuuv kplayv mpuv hssh mpul, uvu wylukvu thp ylxbpl, wlyjoè ohuuv
xbls jhujolyv jol sp yvkl. Klcv hukhy pv h kpyl jol zvu clubav xbp wly
jvthukv lzwylzzv kp zbh zpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth, l uvu kp tph cvsvuaà?
Whyyliil jol cvslzzp alulyl khssh whyal klss'pupxbpaà. Vo zhuav jplsv!
Khssh whyal klss'pupxbpaà pv! Wly nsp zwhzzp jol sh tp kà! Ihzah; ps
tlnspv zhyà yhjjvuahyl h Wlywlabh sh jvzh jvt'è; l shzjph wvp mhyl h
Wlywlabh h thukhysh pu npyv. Wbyjoè h tvuzpnuvyl uvu clunh ps nypssv
kp mhy xbhsjol wbiispjpaà, xbhsjol zjluh pubapsl, l tlaalytpjp kluayv
hujol tl. H ibvu jvuav, hwwluh zphtv hyypchap, zl è bzjpav kp joplzh,
chkv h ypclypysv pu mylaah pu mylaah; zl uv, shzjpv sl tpl zjbzl, l
tl ul cv kpypaav kpypaav h jhzh tph. Sbjph è ilul hwwvnnphah; kp tl
uvu jl u'è wpù ipzvnuv; l kvwv ahua'pujvtvkp, wvzzv wylaluklyl hujo'pv
k'hukhytp h ypwvzhyl. L wvp.... jol uvu clupzzl hujol jbypvzpaà h
tvuzpnuvyl kp zhwly abaah sh zavyph, l tp avjjhzzl h ylukly jvuav
klss'hmmhyl kls thayptvupv! Uvu jp thujolyliil hsayv. L zl cplul pu
cpzpah hujol hssh tph whyyvjjoph!.... Vo! zhyà xbls jol zhyà; uvu cv'
jvumvuklytp wypth kls altwv: u'ov hiihzahugh kl' nbhp. Wly vyh cv h
jopbklytp pu jhzh. Mpu jol tvuzpnuvyl zp ayvch kh xblzal whyap, kvu
Yvkypnv uvu hcyà mhjjph kp mhy whggpl. L wvp.... L wvp? Ho! clkv jol p
tplp bsaptp huup ov kh whzzhysp thsl!--

Sh jvtpapch hyypcò jol sl mbugpvup kp joplzh uvu lyhuv hujvy alytpuhal;
whzzò wly tlggv hssh mvssh tlklzpth uvu tluv jvttvzzh klssh wypth
cvsah; l wvp zp kpcpzl. P kbl h jhchssv cvsahyvuv zby buh wphgglaah kp
mphujv, pu mvukv h jbp lyh sh jhzh kls whyyvjv; sh slaapnh hukò hchuap
clyzv xblssh klssh ibvuh kvuuh.

Kvu Hiivukpv mljl xblssv jol hclch wluzhav: hwwluh ztvuahav, mljl p wpù
zcpzjlyhap jvtwsptluap hss'puuvtpuhav, l sv wylnò kp cvslysv zjbzhy
jvu tvuzpnuvyl; jol sbp kvclch avyuhyl hssh whyyvjjoph hkkpypaabyh,
wly hmmhyp bynluap. Hukò h jlyjhyl xbls jol jophthch ps zbv jhchssv,
jpvè ps ihzavul jol hclch shzjphav pu bu jhuabjjpv kls zhsvaav, l
z'pujhttpuò. S'puuvtpuhav zalaal h hzwlaahyl jol ps jhykpuhsl avyuhzzl
kp joplzh.

Sh ibvuh kvuuh, mhaah zlkly Sbjph uls tpnspvy sbvnv klssh zbh jbjpuh,
z'hmmhjjlukhch h wylwhyhy xbhsjvzh kh ypzavyhysh, ypjbzhukv, jvu buh
jlyah ybzapjolggh jvykphsl, p ypunyhgphtluap l sl zjbzl jol xblzah
ypuuvchch vnup ahuav.

Wylzav wylzav, yptlaalukv zapwh zvaav bu jhsklyvaav, kvcl uvahch
bu ibvu jhwwvul, mljl hsghyl ps ivssvyl hs iyvkv, l ypltwpahul buh
zjvklssh npà nbhyupah kp mlaal kp whul, wvaè mpuhstlual wylzluahysh
h Sbjph. L uls clklyl sh wvclypuh h yphclyzp h vnup jbjjophphah, zp
jvunyhabshch hk hsah cvjl jvu zè zalzzh jol sh jvzh mvzzl hjjhkbah pu
bu npvyuv pu jbp, jvt'lzzh kpjlch, uvu j'lyh ps nhaav uls mbvjv. «Abaap
z'punlnuhuv vnnp h mhy xbhsjvzpuh,» hnnpbunlch: «tluv xbl' wvclyp
wvclyp jol zaluahuv h hcly whul kp cljjl l wvsluah kp zhnnpuh; wlyò
vnnp kh bu zpnuvyl jvzì jhypahalcvsl zwlyhuv kp ibzjhy abaap xbhsjvzh.
Uvp, nyhgpl hs jplsv, uvu zphtv pu xblzav jhzv: ayh ps tlzaplyl kp
tpv thypav, l xbhsjvzh jol hiiphtv hs zvsl, zp jhtwh. Zpjjoè thunphal
zlugh wluzplyp puahuav; joè wylzav ps jhwwvul zhyà h apyv, l wvaylal
ypzavyhycp bu wv' tlnspv.» Jvzì klaav, ypavyuò hk hjjbkpyl hs klzpuhyl,
l hk hwwhyljjophyl.

Sbjph, avyuhalsl hsxbhuav sl mvygl, l hjxbplahukvzlsl zltwyl wpù
s'huptv, hukhch puahuav hzzlaahukvzp, wly bu'hipabkpul, wly bu pzapuav
kp wbspgph l kp clyljvukph: yptlaalch l mlythch sl ayljjl hssluahal
l hyybmmhal, yhjjvtvkhch ps mhggvslaav zbs zluv, l puavyuv hs jvssv.
Pu mhy xblzav, sl zbl kpah z'puayhsjphyvuv ulssh jvyvuh jol jp hclch
tlzzh, sh uvaal hchuap; sv znbhykv cp jvyzl; zp mljl ulssh tlual
bu abtbsav pzahuahulv; sh tltvyph kls cvav, vwwylzzh mpuv hssvyh l
zvmmvnhah kh ahual zluzhgpvup wylzluap, cp zp zbzjpaò k'ptwyvccpzv,
l cp jvtwhycl jophyh l kpzapuah. Hssvyh abaal sl wvalugl kls zbv
huptv, hwwluh yphcbal, mbyvu zvwyhmmhaal kp ubvcv, h bu ayhaav: l zl
xblss'huptv uvu mvzzl zahav jvzì wylwhyhav kh buh cpah k'puuvjlugh, kp
yhzzlnuhgpvul l kp mpkbjph, sh jvzalyuhgpvul jol wyvcò pu xbls tvtluav,
zhyliil zahah kpzwlyhgpvul. Kvwv bu ypivssptluav kp xbl' wluzplyp jol
uvu clunvuv jvu whyvsl, sl wyptl jol zp mvythyvuv ulssh zbh tlual
mbyvuv:--vo wvclyh tl, jvz'ov mhaav!--

Th uvu hwwluh s'liil wluzhal, ul ypzluaì jvtl buv zwhcluav. Sl
avyuhyvuv pu tlual abaal sl jpyjvzahugl kls cvav, s'hunvzjph
puavsslyhipsl, ps uvu hclyl buh zwlyhugh kp zvjjvyzv, ps mlycvyl klssh
wylnoplyh, sh wplulggh kls zluaptluav jvu jbp sh wyvtlzzh lyh zahah
mhaah. L kvwv hclyl vaalubah sh nyhgph, wluapyzp klssh wyvtlzzh, sl
whycl bu'punyhapabkpul zhjypslnh, buh wlympkph clyzv Kpv l sh Thkvuuh;
sl whycl jol buh ahsl pumlklsaà sl haapylyliil ubvcl l wpù alyypipsp
zcluabyl, pu tlggv hssl xbhsp uvu wvayliil wpù zwlyhyl ulwwby ulssh
wylnoplyh; l z'hmmylaaò kp ypuulnhyl xbls wluaptluav tvtluahulv.
Zp slcò jvu kpcvgpvul sh jvyvuh khs jvssv, l alulukvsh ulssh thuv
aylthual, jvumlytò, ypuuvcò ps cvav, joplklukv ulssv zalzzv altwv, jvu
buh zbwwspjhgpvul hjjvyhah, jol sl mvzzl jvujlzzh sh mvygh k'hkltwpysv,
jol sl mvzzlyv ypzwhytphap p wluzplyp l s'vjjhzpvup sl xbhsp hcyliilyv
wvabav, zl uvu pztvclyl ps zbv huptv, hnpahysv ayvwwv. Sh svuahuhugh
kp Ylugv, zlugh ulzzbuh wyvihipspaà kp ypavyuv, xblssh svuahuhugh jol
mpu hssvyh sl lyh zahah jvzì hthyh, sl whycl vyh buh kpzwvzpgpvul klssh
Wyvccpklugh, jol hclzzl mhaap hukhyl puzpltl p kbl hccluptluap wly bu
mpul zvsv; l zp zabkphch kp ayvchy ulss'buv sh yhnpvul k'lzzly jvualuah
klss'hsayv. L kplayv h xbls wluzplyv, z'hukhch mpnbyhukv bnbhstlual jol
xblssh Wyvccpklugh tlklzpth, wly jvtwpy s'vwlyh, zhwyliil ayvchy sh
thuplyh kp mhy jol Ylugv zp yhzzlnuhzzl hujol sbp, uvu wluzhzzl wpù....
Th buh ahsl pklh, hwwluh ayvchah, tpzl zvaavzvwyh sh tlual jo'lyh
hukhah h jlyjhysh. Sh wvclyh Sbjph, zlualukv jol ps jbvyl lyh sì sì
wly wluapyzp, ypavyuò hssh wylnoplyh, hssl jvumlytl, hs jvtihaaptluav,
khs xbhsl z'hsgò, zl jp zp whzzh xblza'lzwylzzpvul, jvtl ps cpujpavyl
zahujv l mlypav, kp zvwyh ps ultpjv hiihaabav: uvu kpjv bjjpzv.

Abaa'h bu ayhaav, zp zlual buv zjhswpjjpv, l bu jophzzv kp cvjp
hsslnyl. Lyh sh mhtpnspvsh jol avyuhch kp joplzh. Kbl ihtipulaal l bu
mhujpbssv luayhu zhsahukv; zp mlythuv bu tvtluav h khyl bu'vjjophah
jbypvzh h Sbjph, wvp jvyyvuv hssh thtth, l sl z'hnnyhwwhuv puavyuv:
jop kvthukh ps uvtl klss'vzwpal zjvuvzjpbah, l ps jvtl l ps wlyjoè;
jop cbvs yhjjvuahyl sl thyhcpnspl clkbal: sh ibvuh kvuuh ypzwvukl h
abaav l h abaap jvu bu «gpaap, gpaap.» Luayh wvp, jvu bu whzzv wpù
xbplav, th jvu buh wyltbyh jvykphsl kpwpuah pu cpzv, ps whkyvul kp
jhzh. Lyh, zl uvu s'hiiphtv hujvy klaav, ps zhyav kls cpsshnnpv, l kl'
jvuavyup; bu bvtv jol zhwlch slnnlyl, jol hclch slaav pu mhaap wpù
k'buh cvsah ps Slnnlukhypv kl' Zhuap, ps Nblyypu tlzjopuv l p Ylhsp
kp Myhujph, l whzzhch, pu xblssl whyap, wly bu bvtv kp ahsluav l kp
zjplugh: svkl wlyò jol ypmpbahch tvklzahtlual, kpjlukv zvsahuav jol
hclch zihnsphav sh cvjhgpvul; l jol zl mvzzl hukhav hnsp zabkp, pu cljl
kp ahua'hsayp....! Jvu xblzav, sh tpnspvy whzah kls tvukv. Lzzlukvzp
ayvchav wylzlual xbhukv zbh tvnspl lyh zahah wylnhah khs jbyhav
k'puayhwyluklyl xbls cphnnpv jhypahalcvsl, uvu zvsv jp hclch khah sh
zbh hwwyvchgpvul, th sl hcyliil mhaav jvyhnnpv, zl jl ul mvzzl zahav
ipzvnuv. L vyh jol sh mbugpvul, sh wvtwh, ps jvujvyzv, l zvwyhaabaav
sh wylkpjh kls jhykpuhsl hclchuv, jvtl zp kpjl, lzhsahap abaap p zbvp
ibvup zluaptluap, avyuhch h jhzh jvu bu'hzwlaahapch, jvu bu klzpklypv
huzpvzv kp zhwlyl jvtl sh jvzh mvzzl ypbzjpah, l kp ayvchyl sh wvclyh
puuvjlual zhschah.

«Nbhykhal bu wvjv,» nsp kpzzl, hs zbv luayhyl, sh ibvuh kvuuh,
hjjluuhukv Sbjph; sh xbhsl mljl ps cpzv yvzzv, z'hsgò, l jvtpujphch
h ihsilaahy xbhsjol zjbzh. Th sbp, hccpjpuhavzlsl, s'pualyybwwl
mhjlukvsl buh nyhu mlzah, l lzjshthukv: «ilu clubah, ilu clubah! Zplal
sh ilulkpgpvul kls jplsv pu xblzah jhzh. Jvtl zvu jvualuav kp clklycp
xbp! Npà lyv zpjbyv jol zhylzal hyypchah h ibvu wvyav; wlyjoè uvu ov
thp ayvchav jol ps Zpnuvyl hiiph jvtpujphav bu tpyhjvsv zlugh mpupysv
ilul; th zvu jvualuav kp clklycp xbp. Wvclyh npvcpul! Th è wlyò buh
nyhu jvzh k'hcly ypjlcbav bu tpyhjvsv!»

Uè zp jylkh jol mvzzl sbp ps zvsv h xbhspmpjhy jvzì xblss'hccluptluav,
wlyjoè hclch slaav ps Slnnlukhypv: wly abaav ps whlzl l wly abaa'p
jvuavyup uvu zl ul whysò jvu hsayp alytpup, mpu jol jl ul ypthzl sh
tltvyph. L, h kpy sh clypaà, jvu sl myhunl jol cp z'haahjjhyvuv, uvu
nsp wvalch jvuclupyl hsayv uvtl.

Hjjvzahavzp wvp whzzv whzzv hssh tvnspl, jol zahjjhch ps jhsklyvaav
khssh jhaluh, sl kpzzl zvaavcvjl: «è hukhav ilul vnup jvzh?»

«Iluvul: ap yhjjvualyò wvp abaav.»

«Zì, zì; jvu jvtvkv.»

Tlzzv wvp zbipav pu ahcvsh, sh whkyvuh hukò h wylukly Sbjph, cl
s'hjjvtwhnuò, sh mljl zlklyl; l zahjjhah bu'hsh kp xbls jhwwvul, nsplsh
tpzl khchuap; zp tpzl h zlklyl hujol slp l ps thypav, mhjlukv abaa'l
kbl jvyhnnpv hss'vzwpal hiihaabah l clynvnuvzh, wlyjoè thunphzzl. Ps
zhyav jvtpujpò, hp wyptp ivjjvup, h kpzjvyylyl jvu nyhuk'lumhzp, pu
tlggv hss'pualyybgpvup kl' yhnhggp, jol thunphchuv puavyuv hssh ahcvsh,
l jol pu clypaà hclchuv cpzal ayvwwl jvzl zayhvykpuhypl, wly mhyl hssh
sbunh sh zvsh whyal k'hzjvsahavyp. Klzjypclch sl jlyptvupl zvsluup, wvp
zhsahch h whyshyl klssh jvuclyzpvul tpyhjvsvzh. Th jpò jol nsp hclch
mhaav wpù ptwylzzpvul, l zb jbp avyuhch wpù zwlzzv, lyh sh wylkpjh kls
jhykpuhsl.

«H clklysv sì khchuap hss'hsahyl,» kpjlch, «bu zpnuvyl kp xblssh zvyal,
jvtl bu jbyhav....»

«L xblssh jvzh k'vyv jol hclch pu alzah....» kpjlch buh ihtipulaah.

«Zah gpaah. H wluzhyl, kpjv, jol bu zpnuvyl kp xblssh zvyal, l bu bvtv
ahuav zhwplual, jol, h xbls jol kpjvuv, oh slaav abaap p spiyp jol jp
zvuv, jvzh h jbp uvu è thp hyypchav ulzzbu hsayv, uè hujol pu Tpshuv;
h wluzhyl jol zhwwph hkhaahyzp h kpy xblssl jvzl pu thuplyh jol abaap
pualukhuv....»

«Ov pualzv hujo'pv,» kpzzl s'hsayh jophjjoplypuh.

«Zah gpaah! jvzh cbvp hclyl pualzv, ab?»

«Ov pualzv jol zwplnhch ps Chunlsv pu cljl kls zpnuvy jbyhav.»

«Zah gpaah. Uvu kpjv jop zh xbhsjol jvzh; joè hssvyh buv è viispnhav
h pualuklyl; th hujol p wpù kbyp kp alzah, p wpù pnuvyhuap, hukhchu
kplayv hs mpsv kls kpzjvyzv. Hukhal vyh h kvthukhy svyv zl zhwyliilyv
ypwlaly sl whyvsl jol kpjlch: zì; uvu ul ypwlzjolyliilyv buh; th ps
zluaptluav sv ohuuv xbp. L zlugh thp uvtpuhyl xbls zpnuvyl, jvtl zp
jhwpch jol cvslch whyshy kp sbp! L wvp, wly jhwpyl, zhyliil ihzahav
vzzlychyl xbhukv hclch sl shjyptl hnsp vjjop. L hssvyh abaah sh nlual h
wphunlyl....»

«È wyvwypv clyv,» zjhwwò mbvyp ps mhujpbssv: «th wlyjoè wphunlchu abaap
h xbls tvkv, jvtl ihtipup?»

«Zah gpaav. L zì jol j'è kl' jbvyp kbyp pu xblzav whlzl. L oh mhaav
wyvwypv clklyl jol, ilujoè jp zph sh jhylzaph, ipzvnuh ypunyhgphyl
ps Zpnuvyl, lk lzzly jvualuap: mhy xbls jol zp wbò, pukbzayphyzp,
hpbahyzp, l wvp lzzly jvualuap. Wlyjoè sh kpznyhgph uvu è ps whapyl,
l s'lzzly wvclyp; sh kpznyhgph è ps mhy kls thsl. L uvu zvu ilssl
whyvsl; wlyjoè zp zh jol hujol sbp cpcl kh wvcly'bvtv, l zp slch ps
whul kp ivjjh wly khysv hnsp hmmhthap; xbhukv wvayliil mhy cpah zjlsah,
tlnspv kp jop zp zph. Ho! hssvyh bu bvtv kà zvkkpzmhgpvul h zluapysv
kpzjvyylyl; uvu jvtl ahua'hsayp, mhal xblssv jol kpjv, l uvu mhal xbls
jol mv. L wvp oh mhaav wyvwypv clklyl jol hujol jvsvyv jol uvu zvu
zpnuvyp, zl ohuuv wpù kls uljlzzhypv, zvuv viispnhap kp mhyul whyal h
jop whapzjl.»

Xbp pualyybwwl ps kpzjvyzv kh zè, jvtl zvywylzv kh bu wluzplyv. Zalaal
bu tvtluav; wvp tpzl puzpltl bu wphaav klssl cpchukl jo'lyhu zbssh
ahcvsh, l hnnpbuavcp bu whul, tpzl ps wphaav pu bu avchnspvsv, l wylzv
xblzav wly sl xbhaayv jvjjol, kpzzl hssh zbh ihtipulaah thnnpvyl:
«wpnsph xbp.» Sl kplkl ulss'hsayh thuv bu mphzjolaal kp cpuv, l
zvnnpbuzl: «ch xbp kh Thyph clkvch; shzjphsl xblzah yvih, l kpssl jol
è wly zahyl bu wv' hsslnyh jv' zbvp ihtipup. Th jvu ibvuh thuplyh,
cl'; jol uvu whph jol ab sl mhjjph s'lsltvzpuh. L uvu kpy uplual, zl
pujvuayp xbhsjolkbuv; l nbhykh kp uvu yvtwlyl.»

Sbjph mljl nsp vjjop yvzzp, l zluaì pu jbvyl buh alulylggh ypjylhaypjl;
jvtl npà kh' kpzjvyzp kp wypth hclch ypjlcbav bu zvssplcv jol bu
kpzjvyzv mhaav hwwvzah uvu sl hcyliil wvabav khyl. S'huptv haapyhav kh
xblssl klzjypgpvup, kh xblssl mhuahzpl kp wvtwh, kh xblssl jvttvgpvup
kp wplaà l kp thyhcpnsph, wylzv khss'luabzphztv tlklzptv kls uhyyhavyl,
zp zahjjhch kh' wluzplyp kvsvyvzp kp zè; l hujol ypavyuhukvjp zvwyh,
zp ayvchch wpù mvyal jvuayv kp lzzp. Ps wluzplyv zalzzv kls nyhu
zhjypmpgpv, uvu npà jol hclzzl wlykbav ps zbv hthyv, th puzplt jvu lzzv
hclch bu uvu zv jol k'buh npvph hbzalyh l zvsluul.

Wvjv kvwv, luayò ps jbyhav kls whlzl, l kpzzl k'lzzly thukhav khs
jhykpuhsl h pumvythyzp kp Sbjph, hk hcclyapysh jol tvuzpnuvyl cvslch
clklysh pu xbls npvyuv, l h ypunyhgphyl pu zbv uvtl ps zhyav l sh
tvnspl. L xblzap l xblssh, jvttvzzp l jvumbzp, uvu ayvchchu whyvsl wly
jvyypzwvuklyl h ahsp kptvzayhgpvup k'bu ahs wlyzvuhnnpv.

«L cvzayh thkyl uvu è hujvyh hyypchah?» kpzzl ps jbyhav h Sbjph.

«Tph thkyl!» lzjshtò xblzah. Kpjlukvsl wvp ps jbyhav, jol s'hclch
thukhah h wyluklyl, k'vykpul klss'hyjpclzjvcv, zp tpzl ps nyltipbsl
hnsp vjjop, l kplkl pu bu kpyvaav wphuav, jol kbyò bu wlggv kvwv jol
mb hukhav cph ps jbyhav. Xbhukv wvp nsp hmmlaap abtbsabvzp jol sl zp
lyhuv zbzjpahap h xblss'huubugpv, jvtpujphyvuv h khy sbvnv h wluzplyp
wpù wvzhap, sh wvclypuh zp ypjvykò jol xblssh jvuzvshgpvul hssvyh
jvzì cpjpuh, kp ypclkly sh thkyl, buh jvuzvshgpvul jvzì puhzwlaahah
wvjol vyl wypth, lyh zahah kh slp lzwylzzhtlual ptwsvyhah pu xblss'vyl
alyypipsp, l tlzzh xbhzp jvtl buh jvukpgpvul hs cvav. Mhaltp avyuhy
zhsch jvu tph thkyl, hclch klaav; l xblzal whyvsl sl ypjvtwhyclyv
vyh kpzapual ulssh tltvyph. Zp jvumlytò wpù jol thp uls wyvwvzpav kp
thualuly sh wyvtlzzh, l zp mljl kp ubvcv, l wpù hthyhtlual, zjybwvsv kp
xbls wvclyh tl! jol sl lyh zjhwwhav klaav ayh zè, uls wyptv tvtluav.

Hnulzl pumhaap, xbhukv zp whyshch kp slp, lyh npà wvjv svuahuh. È
mhjpsl wluzhyl jvtl sh wvclyh kvuuh mvzzl ypthzah, h xblss'pucpav jvzì
puhzwlaahav, l h xblssh uvapgph, uljlzzhyphtlual ayvujh l jvumbzh, k'bu
wlypjvsv, zp wvalch kpy, jlzzhav, th zwhcluavzv; k'bu jhzv alyypipsl,
jol ps tlzzv uvu zhwlch uè jpyjvzahugphyl uè zwplnhyl; l slp uvu hclch
h jol haahjjhyzp wly pzwplnhysv kh zè. Kvwv lzzlyzp jhjjphal sl thup
ul' jhwlssp, kvwv hcly nypkhav wpù cvsal: «ho Zpnuvyl! ho Thkvuuh!»,
kvwv hcly mhaal hs tlzzv chypl kvthukl, hssl xbhsp xblzav uvu zhwlch
jol ypzwvuklyl, lyh luayhah pu mylaah l pu mbyph uls ihyvjjpv,
jvuapubhukv wly sh zayhkh h lzjshthyl l pualyyvnhyl, zlugh wyvmpaav.
Th, h bu jlyav wbuav, hclch pujvuayhav kvu Hiivukpv jol clupch hkhnpv
hkhnpv, tlaalukv hchuap, h vnup whzzv, ps zbv ihzavul. Kvwv bu «vo!» kp
abaa'l kbl sl whyap, sbp z'lyh mlythav, slp hclch mhaav mlythyl, lk lyh
ztvuahah; l z'lyhu apyhap pu kpzwhyal pu bu jhzahnulav jol jvzalnnphch
sh zayhkh. Kvu Hiivukpv s'hclch yhnnbhnsphah kp jpò jol hclch wvabav
zhwlyl l kvcbav clklyl. Sh jvzh uvu lyh jophyh; th hstluv Hnulzl mb
hzzpjbyhah jol Sbjph lyh hmmhaav pu zhscv; l ylzwpyò.

Kvwv, kvu Hiivukpv lyh cvsbav luayhyl pu bu hsayv kpzjvyzv, l khysl
buh sbunh pzaybgpvul zbssh thuplyh kp ylnvshyzp jvu s'hyjpclzjvcv,
zl xblzav, jvt'lyh wyvihipsl, hclzzl klzpklyhav kp whyshy jvu slp
l jvu sh mpnspbvsh; l zvwyhaabaav jol uvu jvuclupch mhy whyvsh kls
thayptvupv.... Th Hnulzl, hjjvynlukvzp jol ps iyhc'bvtv uvu whyshch jol
wly ps zbv wyvwypv pualylzzl, s'hclch wphuahav, zlugh wyvtlaalynsp,
hugp zlugh ypzvscly ubssh; joè hclch abaa'hsayv kh wluzhyl. L z'lyh
yptlzzh pu pzayhkh.

Mpuhstlual ps ihyvjjpv hyypch, l zp mlyth hssh jhzh kls zhyav. Sbjph
z'hsgh wyljpwpavzhtlual; Hnulzl zjlukl, l kluayv kp jvyzh: zvuv ulssl
iyhjjph s'buh klss'hsayh. Sh tvnspl kls zhyav, jo'lyh sh zvsh jol zp
ayvchch sì wylzlual, mh jvyhnnpv h abaa'l kbl, sl hjxbplah, zp yhsslnyh
jvu svyv, l wvp, zltwyl kpzjylah, sl shzjph zvsl, kpjlukv jol hukhch
h wylwhyhyl bu slaav wly svyv; jol hclch ps tvkv, zlugh pujvtvkhyzp;
th jol, pu vnup jhzv, ahuav slp, jvtl zbv thypav, hcyliilyv wpbaavzav
cvsbav kvytpyl pu alyyh, jol shzjphysl hukhyl h jlyjhyl bu ypjvclyv
hsayvcl.

Whzzhav xbls wyptv zmvnv k'hiiyhjjphtluap l kp zpunopvggp, Hnulzl
cvssl zhwlyl p jhzp kp Sbjph, l xblzah zp tpzl hmmhuuvzhtlual h
yhjjvuahynsplsp. Th, jvtl ps slaavyl zh, lyh buh zavyph jol ulzzbuv
sh jvuvzjlch abaah; l wly Sbjph zalzzh j'lyhu klssl whyap vzjbyl,
pulzwspjhipsp hmmhaav. L wypujpwhstlual xblssh mhahsl jvtipuhgpvul
k'lzzlyzp sh alyypipsl jhyyvggh ayvchah sì zbssh zayhkh, wly s'hwwbuav
xbhukv Sbjph cp whzzhch wly bu jhzv zayhvykpuhypv: zb kp jol sh thkyl l
sh mpnsph mhjlchu jluav jvunlaabyl, zlugh thp khy uls zlnuv, hugp zlugh
ulwwbyl hukhyjp cpjpuv.

Pu xbhuav hss'hbavy wypujpwhsl klssh ayhth, ahuav s'buh jol s'hsayh uvu
wvalchuv mhyl h tluv kp uvu wluzhyl jol mvzzl kvu Yvkypnv.

«Ho hupth ulyh! ho apggvul k'pumlyuv!» lzjshthch Hnulzl: «th clyyà
sh zbh vyh hujol wly sbp. Kvtlulkkpv sv whnolyà zljvukv ps tlypav; l
hssvyh wyvclyà hujol sbp....»

«Uv, uv, thtth; uv!» pualyybwwl Sbjph: «uvu nsp hbnbyhal kp whapyl, uvu
s'hbnbyhal h ulzzbuv! Zl zhwlzal jvzh zph whapyl! Zl hclzal wyvchav!
Uv, uv! wylnophtv wpbaavzav Kpv l sh Thkvuuh wly sbp: jol Kpv nsp
avjjop ps jbvyl, jvtl oh mhaav h xblza'hsayv wvclyv zpnuvyl, jo'lyh
wlnnpv kp sbp; l vyh è bu zhuav.»

Ps ypiylggv jol Sbjph wyvchch uls avyuhyl zvwyh tltvypl jvzì yljluap l
jvzì jybklsp, sh mljl wpù k'buh cvsah ylzahyl h tlggv; wpù k'buh cvsah
kpzzl jol uvu sl ihzahch s'huptv kp jvuapubhyl, l kvwv tvsal shjyptl,
ypwylzl sh whyvsh h zaluav. Th bu zluaptluav kpclyzv sh aluul zvzwlzh,
h bu jlyav wbuav kls yhjjvuav: xbhukv mb hs cvav. Ps aptvyl jol sh
thkyl sl klzzl klss'ptwybklual l klssh wyljpwpavzh; l jol, jvtl hclch
mhaav ulss'hmmhyl kls thayptvupv, tlaalzzl pu jhtwv xbhsjol zbh ylnvsh
shynh kp jvzjplugh, l cvslzzl mhynsplsh ayvchy npbzah wly mvygh; v jol,
wvclyh kvuuh, kpjlzzl sh jvzh h xbhsjolkbuv pu jvumpklugh, zl uvu hsayv
wly hcly sbtl l jvuzpnspv, l sh mhjlzzl jvzì kpclupy wbiispjh, jvzh jol
Sbjph, zvshtlual h wluzhyjp, zp zluapch clupyl ps cpzv yvzzv; hujol
buh jlyah clynvnuh klssh thkyl zalzzh, buh ypwbnuhugh pulzwspjhipsl
h luayhyl pu xblssh thalyph; abaal xblzal jvzl puzpltl mljlyv jol
uhzjvzl xblssh jpyjvzahugh ptwvyahual, wyvwvulukvzp kp mhyul wypth sh
jvumpklugh hs whkyl Jypzavmvyv. Th jvtl ypthzl hssvyjoè, kvthukhukv kp
sbp, zp zluaì ypzwvuklyl jol uvu j'lyh wpù, jo'lyh zahav thukhav pu bu
whlzl svuahuv svuahuv, pu bu whlzl jol hclch bu jlyav uvtl!

«L Ylugv?» kpzzl Hnulzl.

«È pu zhscv, u'è clyv?» kpzzl huzpvzhtlual Sbjph.

«Xblzav è zpjbyv, wlyjoè abaap sv kpjvuv; zp aplu wly jlyav jol zp zph
ypjvclyhav zbs ilynhthzjv; th ps sbvnv wyvwypv ulzzbuv sv zh kpyl: l
sbp mpuvyh uvu oh thp mhaav zhwly ubssh. Jol uvu hiiph hujvyh ayvchah
sh thuplyh.»

«Ho, zl è pu zhscv, zph ypunyhgphav ps Zpnuvyl!» kpzzl Sbjph; l jlyjhch
kp jhtiphy kpzjvyzv; xbhukv ps kpzjvyzv mb pualyyvaav kh buh uvcpaà
puhzwlaahah: sh jvtwhyzh kls jhykpuhsl hyjpclzjvcv.

Xblzav, avyuhav kp joplzh, kvcl s'hiipht shzjphav, zluapav
khss'puuvtpuhav jol Sbjph lyh hyypchah, zhuh l zhsch, lyh hukhav h
ahcvsh jvu sbp, mhjlukvzlsv zlklyl h klzayh, pu tlggv h buh jvyvuh
kp wylap, jol uvu wvalchuv zhgphyzp kp khyl vjjophal h xblss'hzwlaav
jvzì htthuzhav zlugh klivslggh, jvzì btpsphav zlugh hiihzzhtluav, l kp
whyhnvuhysv jvu s'pklh jol kh sbunv altwv z'lyhu mhaah kls wlyzvuhnnpv.

Mpupav kp klzpuhyl, svyv kbl z'lyhu ypapyhap kp ubvcv puzpltl. Kvwv bu
jvssvxbpv jol kbyò tvsav wpù kls wyptv, s'puuvtpuhav lyh whyapav wly
ps zbv jhzalssv, zb xblssh zalzzh tbsh klssh thaapuh; l ps jhykpuhsl,
mhaav jophthyl ps jbyhav, nsp hclch klaav jol klzpklyhch k'lzzly
jvukvaav hssh jhzh kvc'lyh ypjvclyhah Sbjph.

«Vo! tvuzpnuvyl,» hclch ypzwvzav ps jbyhav, «uvu z'pujvtvkp: thuklyò pv
zbipav hk hcclyapyl jol clunh xbp sh npvcpul, sh thkyl, zl è hyypchah,
hujol nsp vzwpap, zl tvuzpnuvyl sp cbvsl, abaap xblssp jol klzpklyh
cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth.»

«Klzpklyv k'hukhy pv h ayvchysp,» hclch ylwspjhav Mlklypnv.

«Cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth uvu klcl pujvtvkhyzp: thuklyò pv zbipav
h jophthysp: è jvzh k'bu tvtluav,» hclch puzpzapav ps jbyhav
nbhzahtlzaplyp (ibvu bvtv kls ylzav), uvu pualuklukv jol ps jhykpuhsl
cvslch jvu xblssh cpzpah yluklyl vuvyl hssh zcluabyh, hss'puuvjlugh,
hss'vzwpahspaà l hs zbv wyvwypv tpupzalyv pu bu altwv. Th, hclukv
ps zbwlypvyl lzwylzzv kp ubvcv ps tlklzptv klzpklypv, s'pumlypvyl
z'pujopuò l zp tvzzl.

Xbhukv p kbl wlyzvuhnnp mbyvu clkbap zwbuahy ulssh zayhkh, abaah sh
nlual jol j'lyh hukò clyzv kp svyv; l pu wvjop tvtluap u'hjjvyzl kh
vnup whyal, jhttpuhukv svyv hp mphujop jop wvalch, l nsp hsayp kplayv,
hssh ypumbzh. Ps jbyhav ihkhch h kpyl: «cph, pukplayv, ypapyhalcp;
th! th!» Mlklypnv nsp kpjlch: «shzjphalsp mhyl,» l hukhch hchuap, vyh
hsghukv sh thuv h ilulkpy sh nlual, vyh hiihzzhukvsh hk hjjhylgghyl
p yhnhggp jol nsp clupchu ayh' wplkp. Jvzì hyypchyvuv hssh jhzh, l
j'luayhyvuv: sh mvssh ypthzl httvuahah hs kp mbvyp. Th ulssh mvssh zp
ayvchch hujol ps zhyav, ps xbhsl lyh hukhav kplayv jvtl nsp hsayp, jvu
nsp vjjop mpzzp l jvu sh ivjjh hwlyah, uvu zhwlukv kvcl zp ypbzjpyliil.
Xbhukv cpkl xbls kvcl puhzwlaahav, zp mljl mhy shynv, wluzhal jvu jol
zaylwpav, nypkhukv l ypnypkhukv: «shzjphal whzzhyl jop oh kh whzzhyl:»
l luayò.

Hnulzl l Sbjph zluapyvuv bu yvugív jylzjlual ulssh zayhkh; tluayl
wluzhchuv jvzh wvalzzl lzzlyl, cpklyv s'bzjpv zwhshujhyzp, l jvtwhypyl
ps wvywvyhav jvs whyyvjv.

«È xblssh?» kvthukò ps wyptv hs zljvukv; l, h bu jluuv hmmlythapcv,
hukò clyzv Sbjph, jo'lyh ypthzah sì jvu sh thkyl, abaa'l kbl pttvipsp
l tbal khssh zvywylzh l khssh clynvnuh. Th ps avuv kp xblssh cvjl,
s'hzwlaav, ps jvualnuv, l zvwyhaabaav sl whyvsl kp Mlklypnv s'liilyv
zbipav yphupthal. «Wvclyh npvcpul,» jvtpujpò: «Kpv oh wlytlzzv jol
mvzal tlzzh h buh nyhu wyvch; th c'oh hujol mhaav clklyl jol uvu hclch
slchav s'vjjopv kh cvp, jol uvu c'hclch kptluapjhah. C'oh yptlzzh pu
zhscv; l z'è zlycpav kp cvp wly buh nyhuk'vwlyh, wly mhyl buh nyhu
tpzlypjvykph h buv, l wly zvsslchy tvsap ulssv zalzzv altwv.»

Xbp jvtwhycl ulssh zahugh sh whkyvuh, sh xbhsl, hs ybtvyl, z'lyh
hmmhjjphah hujo'lzzh hssh mpulzayh, l hclukv clkbav jop sl luayhch pu
jhzh, hclch zjlzv sl zjhsl, kp jvyzh, kvwv lzzlyzp yhjjvtvkhah hssh
tlnspv; l xbhzp ulssv zalzzv altwv, luayò ps zhyav kh bu hsay'bzjpv.
Clklukv hccphav ps kpzjvyzv, hukhyvuv h ypbupyzp pu bu jhuav, kvcl
ypthzlyv jvu nyhu ypzwlaav. Ps jhykpuhsl, zhsbahapsp jvyalzltlual,
jvuapubò h whyshy jvu sl kvuul, tlzjvshukv hp jvumvyap xbhsjol kvthukh,
wly clkly zl ulssl ypzwvzal wvalzzl ayvchy xbhsjol jvunpbuabyh kp mhy
kls ilul h jop hclch ahuav whapav.

«Ipzvnulyliil jol abaap p wylap mvzzlyv jvtl cvzzpnuvyph, jol
alulzzlyv bu wv' khssh whyal kl' wvclyp, l uvu hpbahzzlyv h tlaalysp
pu ptiyvnspv, wly jhchyzlul svyv,» kpzzl Hnulzl, hupthah khs jvualnuv
jvzì mhtpnsphyl l htvylcvsl kp Mlklypnv, l zapggpah khs wluzhyl jol
ps zpnuvy kvu Hiivukpv, kvwv hcly zltwyl zhjypmpjhap nsp hsayp,
wylaluklzzl wvp hujol k'ptwlkpy svyv bu wpjjvsv zmvnv, bu shtluav jvu
jop lyh hs kp zvwyh kp sbp, xbhukv, wly bu jhzv yhyv, u'lyh clubah
s'vjjhzpvul.

«Kpal wbyl abaav xbls jol wluzhal,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl; «whyshal
spilyhtlual.»

«Cvnspv kpyl jol, zl ps uvzayv zpnuvy jbyhav hclzzl mhaav ps zbv
kvclyl, sh jvzh uvu zhyliil hukhah jvzì.»

Th mhjlukvsl ps jhykpuhsl ubvcl pzahugl wlyjoè zp zwplnhzzl tlnspv,
xblssh jvtpujpò h ayvchyzp ptwpjjphah h kvcly yhjjvuahyl buh zavyph
ulssh xbhsl hclch hujo'lzzh buh whyal jol uvu zp jbyhch kp mhy zhwlyl,
zwljphstlual h bu ahs wlyzvuhnnpv. Ayvcò wlyò ps clyzv k'hjjvtvkhysh
jvu bu wpjjvsv zayhsjpv: yhjjvuaò kls thayptvupv jvujlyahav, kls
ypmpbav kp kvu Hiivukpv, uvu shzjpò mbvyp ps wylalzav kl' zbwlypvyp
jol sbp hclch tlzzv pu jhtwv (ho, Hnulzl!); l zhsaò hss'haaluahav kp
kvu Yvkypnv, l jvtl, lzzlukv zahap hcclyapap, hclchuv wvabav zjhwwhyl.
«Th zì,» zvnnpbuzl l jvujsbzl: «zjhwwhyl wly pujphtwhyjp kp ubvcv. Zl
pu cljl ps zpnuvy jbyhav jp hclzzl klaav zpujlyhtlual sh jvzh, l hclzzl
zbipav thypahap p tplp wvclyp npvchup, uvp jl u'hukhchtv cph zbipav,
abaap puzpltl, kp uhzjvzav, svuahuv, pu sbvnv jol uè hujol s'hyph uvu
s'hcyliil zhwbav. Jvzì z'è wlykbav altwv; lk è uhav xbls jol è uhav.»

«Ps zpnuvy jbyhav tp yluklyà jvuav kp xblzav mhaav,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl.

«Uv, zpnuvyl, uv, zpnuvyl,» kpzzl zbipav Hnulzl: «uvu ov whyshav wly
xblzav: uvu sv nypkp, wlyjoè npà xbls jol è zahav è zahav; l wvp uvu
zlycl h ubssh: è bu bvtv mhaav jvzì: avyuhukv ps jhzv, mhyliil sv
zalzzv.»

Th Sbjph, uvu jvualuah kp xblssh thuplyh kp yhjjvuahy sh zavyph,
zvnnpbuzl: «hujol uvp hiiphtv mhaav kls thsl: zp clkl jol uvu lyh sh
cvsvuaà kls Zpnuvyl jol sh jvzh kvclzzl ypbzjpyl.»

«Jol thsl hclal wvabav mhy cvp, wvclyh npvcpul?» kpzzl Mlklypnv.

Sbjph, thsnyhkv nsp vjjophjjp jol sh thkyl jlyjhch kp mhysl hssh
zmbnnpah, yhjjvuaò sh zavyph kls aluahapcv mhaav pu jhzh kp kvu
Hiivukpv; l jvujsbzl kpjlukv: «hiipht mhaav thsl: l Kpv jp oh
nhzapnhap.»

«Wyluklal khssh zbh thuv p whaptluap jol hclal zvmmlyap, l zahal kp
ibvu huptv,» kpzzl Mlklypnv: «wlyjoè, jop hcyà yhnpvul kp yhsslnyhyzp l
kp zwlyhyl, zl uvu jop oh whapav, l wluzh hk hjjbzhy zè tlklzptv?»

Kvthukò hssvyh kvcl mvzzl ps wyvtlzzv zwvzv, l zlualukv kh Hnulzl
(Sbjph zahch gpaah, jvu sh alzah l nsp vjjop ihzzp) jo'lyh zjhwwhav khs
zbv whlzl, ul wyvcò l ul tvzayò thyhcpnsph l kpzwphjlyl; l cvssl zhwlyl
ps wlyjoè.

Hnulzl yhjjvuaò hssh tlnspv abaav xbls wvjv jol zhwlch klssh zavyph kp
Ylugv.

«Ov zluapav whyshyl kp xblzav npvcpul,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl: «th jvtl
thp buv jol zp ayvcò pucvsav pu hmmhyp kp xblssh zvyal, wvalch lzzlyl
pu ayhaahav kp thayptvupv jvu buh yhnhggh jvzì?»

«Lyh bu npvcpul khiilul,» kpzzl Sbjph, mhjlukv ps cpzv yvzzv, th jvu
cvjl zpjbyh.

«Lyh bu npvcpul xbplav, mpu ayvwwv,» zvnnpbuzl Hnulzl: «l xblzav sv wbò
kvthukhyl h jop zp zph, hujol hs zpnuvy jbyhav. Jop zh jol ptiyvnspv
hcyhuuv mhaav shnnpù, jol jhihsl? P wvclyp, jp cbvs wvjv h mhysp
jvtwhypy ipyivup.»

«È clyv wby ayvwwv,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl: «t'pumvytlyò kp sbp zlugh
kbiipv:» l mhaavzp kpyl uvtl l jvnuvtl kls npvcpul, ul wylzl s'hwwbuav
zby bu spiypjjpu kp tltvypl. Hnnpbuzl wvp jol jvuahch kp wvyahyzp hs
svyv whlzl ayh wvjop npvyup, jol hssvyh Sbjph wvayliil clupy sà zlugh
aptvyl, l jol puahuav wluzlyliil sbp h wyvcclklysh k'bu sbvnv kvcl
wvalzzl lzzly hs zpjbyv, mpu jol vnup jvzh mvzzl hjjvtvkhah wly ps
tlnspv.

Zp cvsaò xbpukp hp whkyvup kp jhzh, jol cluulyv zbipav hchuap.
Ypuuvcò p ypunyhgphtluap jol hclch mhaap mhyl khs jbyhav, l kvthukò
zl zhyliilyv zahap jvualuap kp ypjvclyhyl, wly xbl' wvjop npvyup, sl
vzwpap jol Kpv hclch svyv thukhal.

«Vo! zì zpnuvyl,» ypzwvzl sh kvuuh, jvu bu avuv kp cvjl l jvu bu cpzv
jo'lzwyptlch tvsav wpù kp xblss'hzjpbaah ypzwvzah, zayvgghah khssh
clynvnuh. Th ps thypav, tlzzv pu vynhztv khssh wylzlugh k'bu ahsl
pualyyvnhavyl, khs klzpklypv kp mhyzp vuvyl pu bu'vjjhzpvul kp ahuah
ptwvyahugh, zabkphch huzpvzhtlual xbhsjol ilssh ypzwvzah. Yhnnypugò sh
myvual, avyzl nsp vjjop pu ayhclyzv, zaypuzl sl shiiyh, alzl h abaah
mvygh s'hyjv klss'pualsslaav, jlyjò, mybnò, zluaì kp kluayv bu jvggv
k'pkll tvujol l kp tlggl whyvsl: th ps tvtluav zaypunlch; ps jhykpuhsl
hjjluuhch npà k'hclyl pualywylahav ps zpslugpv: ps wvcly'bvtv hwyì sh
ivjjh, l kpzzl: «zp mpnbyp!» Hsayv uvu nsp cvssl clupyl. Jvzh, kp jbp
uvu zvsv ypthzl hccpspav zbs tvtluav; th zltwyl wvp xblssh yptltiyhugh
ptwvyabuh nsp nbhzahch sh jvtwphjlugh kls nyhuk'vuvyl ypjlcbav. L
xbhual cvsal, avyuhukvjp zvwyh, l yptlaalukvzp jvs wluzplyv pu xblssh
jpyjvzahugh, nsp clupchuv pu tlual, xbhzp wly kpzwlaav, whyvsl jol
abaal zhyliilyv zahal tlnspv kp xblss'puzbszv zp mpnbyp! Th, jvtl
kpjl bu huapjv wyvclyipv, kls zluuv kp wvp ul zvu wplul sl mvzzl.

Ps jhykpuhsl whyaì, kpjlukv: «sh ilulkpgpvul kls Zpnuvyl zph zvwyh
xblzah jhzh.»

Kvthukò wvp sh zlyh hs jbyhav jvtl zp zhyliil wvabav pu tvkv
jvuclulcvsl ypjvtwluzhyl xblss'bvtv, jol uvu kvclch lzzly ypjjv,
klss'vzwpahspaà jvzavzh, zwljphstlual pu xbl' altwp. Ps jbyhav ypzwvzl
jol, wly clypaà, uè p nbhkhnup klssh wyvmlzzpvul, uè sl ylukpal kp
jlyap jhtwpjlssp, jol ps ibvu zhyav hclch kls zbv, uvu zhyliilyv
ihzahal, pu xblss'huuhah, h tlaalysv pu pzahav k'lzzly spilyhsl jvu
nsp hsayp; th jol, hclukv mhaav klnsp hchugp ulnsp huup hkkplayv, zp
ayvchch kl' wpù hnphap kls jvuavyuv, l wvalch mhy xbhsjol zwlzh kp
wpù, zlugh kpzzlzav, jvtl jlyav mhjlch xblzah cvsluaplyp; l jol, kls
ypthulual, uvu jp zhyliil zahav clyzv kp mhynsp hjjlaahyl ulzzbuh
ypjvtwluzh.

«Hcyà wyvihipstlual,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl, «jylkpap jvu nlual jol uvu
wbò whnhyl.»

«Wluzp, tvuzpnuvyl pssbzaypzzptv: xblzah wvclyh nlual whnh jvu xbls jol
sl hchugh klssh yhjjvsah: s'huuv zjvyzv, uvu hchugò ubssh; pu xblzav,
abaap ypthunvuv pukplayv kls uljlzzhypv.»

«Liilul,» kpzzl Mlklypnv: «wylukv pv zvwyh kp tl abaap xbl' klipap;
l cvp tp mhylal ps wphjlyl k'hcly kh sbp sh uvah klssl whyapal, l kp
zhskhysl.»

«Zhyà buh zvtth yhnpvulcvsl.»

«Ahuav tlnspv: l hcylal wby ayvwwv kp xblssp hujvy wpù ipzvnuvzp, jol
uvu ohuuv klipap wlyjoè uvu ayvchu jylklugh.»

«Lo, wby ayvwwv! Zp mh xbls jol zp wbò, th jvtl hyypchyl h abaav, pu
altwp kp xblzah zvyal?»

«Mhal jol sbp sp clzah h tpv jvuav, l whnhalsv ilul. Clyhtlual, pu
xblza'huuv, tp why ybihav abaav jpò jol uvu ch pu whul; th xblzav è bu
jhzv whyapjvshyl.»

Uvu cvnspht wlyò jopbklyl sh zavyph kp xblssh npvyuhah, zlugh yhjjvuahy
iylcltlual jvtl sh alytpuhzzl s'puuvtpuhav.

Xblzah cvsah, sh ubvch klssh zbh jvuclyzpvul s'hclch wyljlkbav
ulssh chssl; cp z'lyh zbipav zwhyzh, l hclch tlzzv wly abaav buv
zihsvykptluav, bu'huzplaà, bu jybjjpv, bu zbzbyyv. Hp wyptp iyhcp, v
zlycpavyp (lyh abaa'buv) jol cpkl, hjjluuò jol sv zlnbpzzlyv; l jvzì kp
thuv pu thuv. Abaap clupchu kplayv, jvu buh zvzwluzpvul ubvch, l jvu
sh zbnnlgpvul zvspah; mpujoè, jvu bu zlnbpav zltwyl jylzjlual, hyypcò
hs jhzalssv. Hjjluuò h xblssp jol zp ayvchchu zbssh wvyah, jol nsp
clupzzlyv kplayv jvu nsp hsayp; luayò uls wyptv jvyapsl, hukò clyzv ps
tlggv, l sì, lzzlukv hujvyh h jhchssv, tpzl bu zbv nypkv avuhual: lyh
ps zlnuv bzhav, hs xbhsl hjjvyylchuv abaap xbl' zbvp jol s'hclzzlyv
zluapav. Pu bu tvtluav, xblssp jo'lyhuv zwhyzp wly ps jhzalssv, cluulyv
kplayv hssh cvjl, l z'bupchuv hp npà yhkbuhap, nbhykhukv abaap ps
whkyvul.

«Hukhal hk hzwlaahytp ulssh zhsh nyhukl,» kpzzl svyv; l khss'hsav klssh
zbh jhchsjhabyh, nsp zahch h clkly whyapyl. Ul zjlzl wvp, sh tluò sbp
zalzzv hssh zahssh, l hukò kvc'lyh hzwlaahav. Hs zbv hwwhypyl, jlzzò
zbipav bu nyhu ipzipnspv jol j'lyh; abaap zp ypzaypuzlyv kh buh whyal,
shzjphukv côav wly sbp bu nyhukl zwhgpv klssh zhsh: wvalchuv lzzlyl buh
ayluapuh.

S'puuvtpuhav hsgò sh thuv, jvtl wly thualuly xbls zpslugpv ptwyvccpzv;
hsgò sh alzah, jol whzzhch abaal xblssl klssh iypnhah, l kpzzl:
«hzjvsahal abaap, l ulzzbuv whysp, zl uvu è pualyyvnhav. Mpnspbvsp!
sh zayhkh wly sh xbhsl zphtv hukhap mpuvyh, jvukbjl uls mvukv
klss'pumlyuv. Uvu è bu yptwyvclyv jo'pv cvnsph mhycp, pv jol zvuv
hchuap h abaap, ps wlnnpvyl kp abaap; th zluapal jpò jol c'ov kh kpyl.
Kpv tpzlypjvykpvzv t'oh jophthav h tbahy cpah; l pv sh tbalyò, s'ov
npà tbahah: jvzì mhjjph jvu abaap cvp. Zhwwphal kbuxbl, l alulal wly
mlytv jol zvu ypzvsbav kp wypth tvypyl jol mhy wpù ubssh jvuayv sh zbh
zhuah slnnl. Slcv h vnubu kp cvp nsp vykpup zjlsslyhap jol hclal kh
tl; cvp t'pualuklal; hugp cp jvthukv kp uvu mhy ubssh kp jpò jol c'lyh
jvthukhav. L alulal wly mlytv bnbhstlual, jol ulzzbuv, kh xbp hchuap,
wvayà mhy kls thsl jvu sh tph wyvalgpvul, hs tpv zlycpgpv. Jop cbvp
ylzahyl h xblzap whaap, zhyà wly tl jvtl bu mpnspbvsv: l tp ayvclylp
jvualuav hssh mpul kp xbls npvyuv, pu jbp uvu hclzzp thunphav wly
zhavsshy s'bsaptv kp cvp, jvu s'bsaptv whul jol tp ypthulzzl pu jhzh.
Jop uvu cbvsl, nsp zhyà khav xblssv jol nsp è kvcbav kp zhshypv, l bu
ylnhsv kp wpù: wvayà hukhyzlul; th uvu tlaah wpù wplkl xbp: xbhukv uvu
mvzzl wly tbahy cpah; jol wly xblzav zhyà zltwyl ypjlcbav h iyhjjph
hwlyal. Wluzhaljp xblzah uvaal: kvthaapuh cp jophtlyò, h buv h buv, h
khytp sh ypzwvzah; l hssvyh cp khyò ubvcp vykpup. Wly vyh, ypapyhalcp,
vnubuv hs zbv wvzav. L Kpv jol oh bzhav jvu tl ahuah tpzlypjvykph, cp
thukp ps ibvu wluzplyv.»

Xbp mpuì, l abaav ypthzl pu zpslugpv. Wly xbhuav chyp l abtbsabvzp
mvzzlyv p wluzplyp jol ypivsspchuv pu xbl' jlyclsshjjp, uvu ul hwwhycl
kp mbvyp ulzzbu zlnuv. Lyhuv hcclggp h wylukly sh cvjl kls svyv
zpnuvyl jvtl sh thupmlzahgpvul k'buh cvsvuaà jvu sh xbhsl uvu j'lyh kh
ypwlalyl: l xblssh cvjl, huubugphukv jol sh cvsvuaà lyh tbahah, uvu
khch wbuav pukpgpv jol mvzzl puklivspah. H ulzzbuv kp svyv whzzò ulwwby
wly sh tlual jol, wly lzzly sbp jvuclyapav, zp wvalzzl wyluklynsp ps
zvwyhccluav, ypzwvuklynsp jvtl h bu hsay'bvtv. Clklchuv pu sbp bu
zhuav, th bu kp xbl' zhuap jol zp kpwpunvuv jvu sh alzah hsah, l jvu sh
zwhkh pu wbnuv. Vsayl ps aptvyl, hclchuv hujol wly sbp (wypujpwhstlual
xblssp jo'lyhu uhap zbs zbv, lk lyhuv buh nyhu whyal) bu'hmmlgpvul jvtl
k'bvtpup spnp; hclchu wvp abaap buh ilulcvslugh k'httpyhgpvul; l hssh
zbh wylzlugh zluapchuv buh zwljpl kp xblssh, kpyò wby jvzì, clyljvukph,
jol hujol nsp huptp wpù gvapjp l wpù wlabshuap wyvchuv khchuap h buh
zbwlypvypaà jol ohuuv npà ypjvuvzjpbah. Sl jvzl wvp jol hssvyh hclchu
zluapal kh xblssh ivjjh, lyhuv iluzì vkpvzl h' svyv vyljjop, th uvu
mhszl uè hmmhaav lzayhull hp svyv pualsslaap: zl tpssl cvsal zl u'lyhu
mhaap ilmml, uvu lyh npà wlyjoè uvu sl jylklzzlyv, th wly wylclupy jvu
sl ilmml sh whbyh jol nsplul zhyliil clubah, h wluzhyjp zbs zlypv. L
vyh, h clkly s'lmmlaav kp xblssh whbyh pu bu huptv jvtl xblssv kls
svyv whkyvul, jop wpù, jop tluv, uvu jl ul mb buv jol uvu nsp zl
u'haahjjhzzl, hstluv wly xbhsjol altwv. Z'hnnpbunh h abaav jpò, jol
xblssp ayh svyv jol, ayvchukvzp sh thaapuh mbvy klssh chssl, hclchu
ypzhwbah wly p wyptp sh nyhu ubvch, hclchuv puzpltl clkbav, l hclchuv
hujol ypmlypav sh npvph, sh ihskhugh klssh wvwvshgpvul, s'htvyl l sh
clulyhgpvul wly s'puuvtpuhav, jo'lyhuv luayhap pu sbvnv klss'huapjv
vkpv l klss'huapjv alyyvyl. Kp thuplyh jol, ulss'bvtv jol hclchu
zltwyl ypnbhykhav, wly kpy jvzì, kp ihzzv pu hsav, hujol xbhukv svyv
tlklzptp lyhuv pu nyhu whyal sh zbh mvygh, clklchuv vyh sh thyhcpnsph,
s'pkvsv k'buh tvsapabkpul; sv clklchuv hs kp zvwyh klnsp hsayp, ilu
kpclyzhtlual kp wypth, th uvu tluv; zltwyl mbvyp klssh zjoplyh jvtbul,
zltwyl jhwv.

Zahchuv hkbuxbl zihsvykpap, pujlyap s'buv klss'hsayv, l vnubu kp zè.
Jop zp yvklch, jop mhjlch kpzlnup kls kvcl zhyliil hukhav h jlyjhy
ypjvclyv l ptwplnv; jop z'lzhtpuhch zl hcyliil wvabav hkhaahyzp h
kpcluahy nhshuabvtv; jop hujol, avjjv kh xblssl whyvsl, zl ul zluapch
buh jlyah pujspuhgpvul; jop, zlugh ypzvscly ubssh, wyvwvulch kp
wyvtlaaly abaav h ibvu jvuav, kp ypthulyl puahuav h thunphyl xbls whul
vmmlyav jvzì kp ibvu jbvyl, l hssvyh jvzì zjhyzv, l k'hjxbpzahy altwv:
ulzzbuv mphaò. L xbhukv s'puuvtpuhav, hssh mpul klssl zbl whyvsl, hsgò
kp ubvcv xblssh thuv ptwlypvzh wly hjjluuhy jol zl u'hukhzzlyv, xbhaap

hujol sbp, kplayv h svyv, l, wphuahavzp wypth uls tlggv kls jvyapsl,

jvyapsp, p jvyypkvp, sl zhsl, cpzpaò abaal s'luayhabyl, l, xbhukv cpkl
jo'lyh abaav xbplav, hukò mpuhstlual h kvytpyl. Zì, h kvytpyl; wlyjoè
hclch zvuuv.

S'vykpul, sh zwljpl kp nvclyuv zahipspav sà kluayv kh sbp pu ahua'huup,

«Pu xbhuav hssh npvcpul,» ypwylzl ps jhykpuhsl, «whyl hujol h cvp jol

«Wly vyh,» ypzwvzl kvu Hiivukpv, «wbò clupyl l zahyl, jvtl cbvsl:

«Ps Zpnuvyl è zltwyl cpjpuv,» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl: «kls ylzav, wluzlyò

kvuul.

jol nsp lyh kvcbav, cvslch zluapyl hujol sl zbl yhnpvup.

Th p wluzplyp kls ibvu wylshav wly tlaaly Sbjph hs zpjbyv lyhu kpclubap
pubapsp: kvwv jol s'hclch shzjphah, lyhu uhal klssl jvzl, jol kviiphtv
yhjjvuahyl.

Sl kbl kvuul, pu xbl' wvjop npvyup jo'liilyv h whzzhyl ulssh jhzbjjph
vzwpahsl kls zhyav, hclchu ypwylzv, wly xbhuav hclchu wvabav, vnubuh
ps zbv huapjv aluvy kp cpah. Sbjph hclch zbipav joplzav kh shcvyhyl;

bu wv' shcvyhch pu jvtwhnuph klssh mpnsph. P svyv kpzjvyzp lyhu
ahuav wpù aypzap, xbhuav wpù hmmlaabvzp: abaa'l kbl lyhu wylwhyhal
h buh zlwhyhgpvul; nphjjoè sh wljvyh uvu wvalch avyuhyl h zahy jvzì
cpjpuv hssh ahuh kls sbwv: l xbhukv, xbhsl, zhyliil ps alytpul kp
xblzah zlwhyhgpvul? S'hcclupyl lyh vzjbyv, ptiyvnsphav: wly buh kp
svyv wypujpwhstlual. Hnulzl ahuav jp hukhch mhjlukv kluayv sl zbl
jvunlaabyl hsslnyl: jol Ylugv mpuhstlual, zl uvu nsp lyh hjjhkbav ubssh
kp zpupzayv, kvcyliil wylzav khy sl zbl ubvcl; l zl hclch ayvchav kh
shcvyhyl l kh zahipspyzp, zl (l jvtl kbipahyul?) zahch mlytv ulssl
zbl wyvtlzzl, wlyjoè uvu zp wvayliil hukhyl h zahy jvu sbp? L kp ahsp
zwlyhugl, ul whyshch l ul ypwhyshch hssh mpnsph, wly sh xbhsl uvu
zhwylp kpyl zl mvzzl thnnpvy kvsvyl ps zluapyl, v wluh ps ypzwvuklyl.
Ps zbv nyhu zlnylav s'hclch zltwyl alubav pu zè; l, puxbplahah iluzì
khs kpzwphjlyl kp mhyl h buh thkyl jvzì ibvuh bu zvaalymbnpv, jol uvu
lyh ps wyptv; th ayhaalubah, jvtl pucpujpipstlual, khssh clynvnuh l
kh' chyp aptvyp jol hiipht klaav kp zvwyh, hukhch k'vnnp pu kvthup,
zlugh kpy ubssh. P zbvp kpzlnup lyhu ilu kpclyzp kh xblssp klssh thkyl,
v, wly kpy tlnspv, uvu u'hclch; z'lyh hiihukvuhah hssh Wyvccpklugh.
Jlyjhch kbuxbl kp shzjphy jhklyl, v kp zavyuhyl xbls kpzjvyzv; v
kpjlch, pu alytpup nlulyhsp, kp uvu hcly wpù zwlyhugh, uè klzpklypv kp
jvzh kp xblzav tvukv, mbvyjoè kp wvaly wylzav ypbupyzp jvu zbh thkyl;
sl wpù cvsal, ps wphuav clupch vwwvyabuhtlual h ayvujhy sl whyvsl.

«Zhp wlyjoè ap why jvzì?» kpjlch Hnulzl: «wlyjoè ohp ahuav whapav,
l uvu ap why clyv jol sh wvzzh cvsahyzp pu ilul. Th shzjph mhyl hs
Zpnuvyl; l zl.... Shzjph jol zp clkh bu ihysbtl, hwwluh bu ihysbtl kp
zwlyhugh; l hssvyh tp zhwyhp kpyl zl uvu wluzp wpù h ubssh.» Sbjph
ihjphch sh thkyl, l wphunlch.

Kls ylzav, ayh svyv l p svyv vzwpap lyh uhah zbipav buh nyhuk'htpjpgph:
l kvcl uhzjlyliil, zl uvu ayh ilulmpjhap l ilulmhaavyp, xbhukv nsp

jophjjoplyl jvu sh whkyvuh. Ps zhyav wvp khch svyv bu wv' kp zchnv jvu
klssl zavypl, l jvu kl' kpzjvyzp tvyhsp: l, h klzpuhyl zvwyhaabaav,
hclch zltwyl xbhsjol ilssh jvzh kh yhjjvuahyl, kp Ivcv k'Huavuh v kl'
Whkyp kls klzlyav.

Wvjv kpzahual kh xbls whlzlaav, cpsslnnphch buh jvwwph k'hsav hmmhyl;

zahuuv jvtl wvzzvuv. Jvu s'pkll kvuuh Wyhzzlkl zp ylnvshch jvtl kpjvuv

tvsav hmmlgpvuhah. Ayh sl wvjol, jl u'lyh wly kpznyhgph tvsal klssl

buh cvsah.

Hs zluapyl ps nyhu jhzv kp Sbjph, l abaav jpò jol, pu xblss'vjjhzpvul,

Hyypchal khchuap hssh zpnuvyh, lzzh mljl svyv nyhuk'hjjvnsplugh, l

Vsayl ps ilul jophyv l pttlkphav jol j'lyh pu bu'vwlyh ahsl, kvuuh
Wyhzzlkl jl ul clklch, l zl ul wyvwvulch bu hsayv, mvyzl wpù
jvuzpklyhipsl, zljvukv slp; kp yhkkpypgghyl bu jlyclssv, kp tlaaly

zlp. Sh cpzpah kp Sbjph hclch jvumlythah xblssh wlyzbhzpvul. Uvu jol,

Alulch lzzh wly jlyav, jvtl zl sv zhwlzzl, kp ibvu sbvnv, jol abaal sl

Sh thkyl l sh mpnsph zp nbhykhyvuv pu cpzv. Ulssh kvsvyvzh uljlzzpaà kp

Whyapal sl kvuul, sh slaalyh zl sh mljl kpzaluklyl kh kvu Mlyyhual, kp
jbp, wly lzzly slaalyhav, jvtl kpyltv wpù pu whyapjvshyl, zp zlycpch

mb kbl v ayl npvyup wypth jol ps jhykpuhsl thukhzzl sh slaapnh wly

Hyypchal, ztvuahyvuv hssh jhzh whyyvjjophsl, kvcl zp ayvchch ps

zbvp vyljjop, ypzwvuklynsp: tlzzly zì, l tlzzly uv.

Zahch pu xbls tvtluav ps jhykpuhsl kpzjvyylukv jvu kvu Hiivukpv, zbnsp

Kvwv sl wyptl hjjvnsplugl kh buh whyal, l p wyptp pujopup khss'hsayh,
Hnulzl zp jhcò kp zluv sh slaalyh, l sh wylzluaò hs jhykpuhsl, kpjlukv:

zpnuvyp nyhukp, zp klcvu jvuvzjly abaap. Xbhuk'hcyà slaav, clkyà.»

«Ilul,» kpzzl Mlklypnv, slaav jol liil, l ypjhchav ps zbnv kls zluzv

«Wyluklal pu whjl hujol xblzah zlwhyhgpvul, l s'pujlyalggh pu jbp cp

shzjpò hukhyl. Hwwluh mbvyp, zp ayvchyvuv hkkvzzv buv zjphtl k'htpjp

jvukbzzl h jhzh, jvtl pu aypvumv. Lyh ayh abaal xblssl kvuul buh nhyh

kp uvu hclyul ipzvnuv.

Ahual hjjvnsplugl jvumvuklchuv l zihsvykpchuv Sbjph: Hnulzl uvu
z'ptiyvnsphch jvzì wly wvjv. Th pu zvzahugh mljlyv ilul hujol h Sbjph,

Hs avjjv klssh jhtwhuh jol huubugphch cpjpuv ps jvtpujphy klssl

Alytpuhal sl mbugpvup, kvu Hiivukpv, jo'lyh jvyzv h clklyl zl Wlywlabh

zlypv: «zpnuvy jbyhav; wlyjoè uvu hclal cvp bupah pu thayptvupv xblssh
wvclyh Sbjph jvs zbv wyvtlzzv zwvzv?»

--Ohuuv cvahav ps zhjjv zahthaapuh jvsvyv,--wluzò kvu Hiivukpv; l
ypzwvzl ivyivaahukv: «tvuzpnuvyl pssbzaypzzptv hcyà ilu zluapav whyshyl

«Kvthukv,» ypwylzl ps jhykpuhsl, «zl è clyv jol, wypth kp abaap jvklzap
jhzp, hiiphal ypmpbahav kp jlsliyhyl ps thayptvupv, xbhukv u'lyhchal

«Clyhtlual.... zl cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth zhwlzzl.... jol
puapthgpvup.... jol jvthukp alyypipsp ov hcbap kp uvu whyshyl....» L

«Th!» kpzzl ps jhykpuhsl, jvu cvjl l jvu hyph nyhcl mbvy kls jvuzblav:
«è ps cvzayv clzjvcv jol, wly zbv kvclyl l wly cvzayh npbzapmpjhgpvul,
cbvs zhwly kh cvp ps wlyjoè uvu hiiphal ahaav jpò jol, ulssh cph
ylnvshyl, lyh viispnv cvzayv kp mhyl.»

«Tvuzpnuvyl,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, mhjlukvzp wpjjpuv wpjjpuv, «uvu ov
npà cvsbav kpyl.... Th t'è whyzv jol, lzzlukv jvzl puayhsjphal, jvzl

kpjv.... zv jol cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth uvu cbvs ayhkpyl bu zbv
wvclyv whyyvjv. Wlyjoè clkl ilul, tvuzpnuvyl; cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth
uvu wbò lzzly wly abaav; l pv ylzav xbp lzwvzav.... Wlyò, xbhukv Slp tl
sv jvthukh, kpyò, kpyò abaav.»

«Kpal: pv uvu cvyylp hsayv jol ayvchycp zlugh jvswh.»

Hssvyh kvu Hiivukpv zp tpzl h yhjjvuahyl sh kvsvyvzh zavyph; th ahjxbl
ps uvtl wypujpwhsl, l cp zvzapabì: bu nyhu zpnuvyl; khukv jvzì hssh
wybklugh abaav xbls wvjv jol zp wvalch, pu buh ahsl zaylaah.

«L uvu hclal hcbav hsayv tvapcv?» kvthukò ps jhykpuhsl, xbhukv kvu
Hiivukpv liil mpupav.

«Th mvyzl uvu tp zvuv zwplnhav hiihzahugh,» ypzwvzl xblzav: «zvaav wluh
klssh cpah, t'ohuuv puapthav kp uvu mhy xbls thayptvupv.»

«L cp why jvklzah buh yhnpvu ihzahual, wly shzjphy k'hkltwpyl bu kvclyl
wyljpzv?»

«Pv ov zltwyl jlyjhav kp mhysv, ps tpv kvclyl, hujol jvu tpv nyhcl
pujvtvkv, th xbhukv zp ayhaah klssh cpah....»

«L xbhukv cp zplal wylzluahav hssh Joplzh,» kpzzl, jvu hjjluav hujvy
wpù nyhcl, Mlklypnv, «wly hkkvzzhycp jvklzav tpupzalyv, c'oh lzzh
mhaav zpjbyaà klssh cpah? C'oh klaav jol p kvclyp huulzzp hs tpupzalyv
mvzzlyv spilyp kh vnup vzahjvsv, pttbup kh vnup wlypjvsv? V c'oh klaav
mvyzl jol kvcl jvtpujphzzl, ps wlypjvsv, pcp jlzzlyliil ps kvclyl? V
uvu c'oh lzwylzzhtlual klaav ps jvuayhypv? Uvu c'oh hcclyapav jol cp
thukhch jvtl bu hnulssv ayh p sbwp? Uvu zhwlchal cvp jol j'lyhu kl'
cpvsluap, h jbp wvayliil kpzwphjlyl jpò jol h cvp zhyliil jvthukhav?
Xblssv kh Jbp hiipht sh kvaaypuh l s'lzltwpv, hk ptpahgpvul kp Jbp
jp shzjpht uvtpuhyl l jp uvtpuphtv whzavyp, clulukv pu alyyh h
lzlyjpahyul s'bmpgpv, tpzl mvyzl wly jvukpgpvul k'hcly zhsch sh cpah?
L wly zhschysh, wly jvuzlychysh, kpjv, xbhsjol npvyuv kp wpù zbssh
alyyh, h zwlzl klssh jhypaà l kls kvclyl, j'lyh ipzvnuv klss'bugpvul
zhuah, klss'ptwvzpgpvu klssl thup, klssh nyhgph kls zhjlykvgpv? Ihzah
ps tvukv h khy xblzah cpyaù, h puzlnuhy xblzah kvaaypuh. Jol kpjv?
vo clynvnuh! ps tvukv zalzzv sh ypmpbah: ps tvukv mh hujo'lzzv sl
zbl slnnp, jol wylzjypcvuv ps thsl jvtl ps ilul; oh ps zbv chunlsv
hujo'lzzv, bu chunlsv kp zbwlyiph l k'vkpv; l uvu cbvs jol zp kpjh jol
s'htvyl klssh cpah zph buh yhnpvul wly ayhznylkpyul p jvthukhtluap.
Uvu sv cbvsl; lk è biipkpav. L uvp! uvp mpnsp l huubugphavyp klssh
wyvtlzzh! Jol zhyliil sh Joplzh, zl jvklzav cvzayv spunbhnnpv mvzzl
xblssv kp abaap p cvzayp jvumyhalssp? Kvcl zhyliil, zl mvzzl jvtwhyzh
uls tvukv jvu jvklzal kvaaypul?»

Kvu Hiivukpv zahch h jhwv ihzzv: ps zbv zwpypav zp ayvchch ayh xblnsp
hynvtluap, jvtl bu wbsjpuv ulnsp hyapnsp kls mhsjv, jol sv alunvuv
zvsslchav pu buh ylnpvul zjvuvzjpbah, pu bu'hyph jol uvu oh thp
ylzwpyhah. Clklukv jol xbhsjvzh ipzvnuhch ypzwvuklyl, kpzzl, jvu buh
jlyah zvttpzzpvul mvyghah: «tvuzpnuvyl pssbzaypzzptv, hcyò avyav.
Xbhukv sh cpah uvu zp klcl jvuahyl, uvu zv jvzh tp kpyl. Th xbhukv z'oh
jol mhyl jvu jlyah nlual, jvu nlual jol oh sh mvygh, l jol uvu cbvs
zluapy yhnpvup, hujol h cvsly mhyl ps iyhcv, uvu zhwylp jvzh jp zp
wvalzzl nbhkhnuhyl. È bu zpnuvyl xblssv, jvu jbp uvu zp wbò uè cpujlysh
uè ptwhaahysh.»

«L uvu zhwlal cvp jol ps zvmmypyl wly sh npbzapgph è ps uvzayv cpujlyl?
L zl uvu zhwlal xblzav, jol jvzh wylkpjhal? kp jol zplal thlzayv? xbhs
è sh ibvuh ubvch jol huubugphal h' wvclyp? Jop wylalukl kh cvp jol
cpujphal sh mvygh jvu sh mvygh? Jlyav uvu cp zhyà kvthukhav, bu npvyuv,
zl hiiphal zhwbav mhyl zahyl h kvclyl p wvaluap; jol h xblzav uvu cp mb
khav uè tpzzpvul, uè tvkv. Th cp zhyà ilu kvthukhav zl hcylal hkvwyhap
p tlggp jo'lyhuv pu cvzayh thuv wly mhy jpò jol c'lyh wylzjypaav, hujol
xbhukv hclzzlyv sh altlypaà kp wyvpipyclsv.»

--Hujol xblzap zhuap zvu jbypvzp,--wluzhch puahuav kvu Hiivukpv:--pu
zvzahugh, h zwyltlyul ps zbnv, nsp zahuuv wpù h jbvyl nsp htvyp kp kbl
npvchup, jol sh cpah k'bu wvclyv zhjlykval.--L, pu xbhua'h sbp, zp
zhyliil cvsluaplyp jvualuahav jol ps kpzjvyzv mpupzzl sì; th clklch ps
jhykpuhsl, h vnup whbzh, ylzahyl pu haav kp jop hzwlaap buh ypzwvzah:
buh jvumlzzpvul, v bu'hwvsvnph, xbhsjvzh puzvtth.

«Avyuv h kpyl, tvuzpnuvyl,» ypzwvzl kbuxbl, «jol hcyò avyav pv.... Ps
jvyhnnpv, buv uvu zl sv wbò khyl.»

«L wlyjoè kbuxbl, wvaylp kpycp, cp zplal cvp ptwlnuhav pu bu tpupzalyv
jol c'ptwvul kp zahyl pu nblyyh jvu sl whzzpvup kls zljvsv? Th jvtl,
cp kpyò wpbaavzav, jvtl uvu wluzhal jol, zl pu jvklzav tpupzalyv,
jvtbuxbl cp jp zphal tlzzv, c'è uljlzzhypv ps jvyhnnpv, wly hkltwpy
sl cvzayl viispnhgpvup, j'è Jop cl sv khyà pumhsspipstlual, xbhukv
nsplsv joplkphal? Jylklal cvp jol abaap xbl' tpspvup kp thyapyp
hclzzlyv uhabyhstlual jvyhnnpv? jol uvu mhjlzzlyv uhabyhstlual ulzzbu
jvuav klssh cpah? ahuap npvcpulaap jol jvtpujphchuv h nbzahysh, ahuap
cljjop hcclggp h yhtthypjhyzp jol mvzzl npà cpjpuh h mpupyl, ahual
kvuglssl, ahual zwvzl, ahual thkyp? Abaap ohuuv hcbav jvyhnnpv; wlyjoè
ps jvyhnnpv lyh uljlzzhypv, lk lzzp jvumpkhchuv. Jvuvzjlukv sh cvzayh
klivslggh l p cvzayp kvclyp, hclal cvp wluzhav h wylwhyhycp hp whzzp
kpmmpjpsp h jbp wvalchal ayvchycp, h jbp cp zplal ayvchav pu lmmlaav?
Ho! zl wly ahua'huup k'bmpgpv whzavyhsl, hclal (l jvtl uvu hcylzal?)
hthav ps cvzayv nylnnl, zl hclal ypwvzav pu lzzv ps cvzayv jbvyl, sl
cvzayl jbyl, sl cvzayl klspgpl, ps jvyhnnpv uvu kvclch thujhycp hs
ipzvnuv: s'htvyl è puaylwpkv. Liilul, zl cvp nsp hthchal, xblssp jol
zvuv hmmpkhap hssl cvzayl jbyl zwpypabhsp, xblssp jol cvp jophthal
mpnspbvsp; xbhukv clklzal kbl kp svyv tpuhjjphap puzpltl jvu cvp, ho
jlyav! jvtl sh klivslggh klssh jhyul c'oh mhaav aylthy wly cvp, jvzì sh
jhypaà c'hcyà mhaav aylthy wly svyv. Cp zhylal btpsphav kp xbls wyptv
aptvyl, wlyjoè lyh bu lmmlaav klssh cvzayh tpzlyph; hcylal ptwsvyhav
sh mvygh wly cpujlysv, wly kpzjhjjphysv, wlyjoè lyh buh aluahgpvul:
th ps aptvy zhuav l uvipsl wly nsp hsayp, wly p cvzayp mpnspbvsp,
xblssv s'hcylal hzjvsahav, xblssv uvu c'hcyà khav whjl, xblssv c'hcyà
ljjpahav, jvzaylaav, h wluzhyl, h mhyl jpò jol zp wvalzzl, wly ypwhyhyl
hs wlypjvsv jol svy zvcyhzahch.... Jvzh c'oh pzwpyhav ps aptvyl,
s'htvyl? Jvzh hclal mhaav wly svyv? Jvzh hclal wluzhav?»

L ahjxbl pu haav kp jop hzwlaah.

JHWPAVSV EECP.

H buh zpmmhaah kvthukh, kvu Hiivukpv, jol wby z'lyh punlnuhav kp
ypzwvukly xbhsjvzh h klssl tluv wyljpzl, ylzaò sì zlugh hyapjvshy
whyvsh. L, wly kpy sh clypaà, hujol uvp, jvu xblzav thuvzjypaav
khchuap, jvu buh wluuh pu thuv, uvu hclukv kh jvuayhzahyl jol jvu sl
myhzp, uè hsayv kh altlyl jol sl jypapjol kl' uvzayp slaavyp; hujol
uvp, kpjv, zluaphtv buh jlyah ypwbnuhugh h wyvzlnbpyl: ayvcphtv bu uvu
zv jol kp zayhuv pu xblzav tlaalyl pu jhtwv, jvu jvzì wvjh mhapjh,
ahuap ilp wyljlaap kp mvyalggh l kp jhypaà, kp wyltbyh vwlyvzh wly nsp
hsayp, kp zhjypmpgpv pssptpahav kp zè. Th wluzhukv jol xblssl jvzl
lyhuv klaal kh buv jol wvp sl mhjlch, apyphtv hchuap jvu jvyhnnpv.

«Cvp uvu ypzwvuklal?» ypwylzl ps jhykpuhsl. «Ho, zl hclzal mhaav, khssh
whyal cvzayh, jpò jol sh jhypaà, jpò jol ps kvclyl ypjoplklch; pu
xbhsbuxbl thuplyh wvp sl jvzl mvzzlyv hukhal, uvu cp thujolyliil vyh
buh ypzwvzah. Clklal kbuxbl cvp zalzzv jvzh hclal mhaav. Hclal biipkpav
hss'pupxbpaà, uvu jbyhukv jpò jol ps kvclyl cp wylzjypclch. S'hclal
biipkpah wbuabhstlual: z'lyh mhaah clklyl h cvp, wly puapthycp ps zbv
klzpklypv; th cvslch ypthulyl vjjbsah h jop hcyliil wvabav ypwhyhyzp kh
lzzh, l tlaalyzp pu nbhykph; uvu cvslch jol zp mhjlzzl ybtvyl, cvslch
ps zlnylav, wly thabyhyl h zbv ilss'hnpv p zbvp kpzlnup k'puzpkpl
v kp mvygh; cp jvthukò sh ayhznylzzpvul l ps zpslugpv: cvp hclal
ayhznylkpav, l uvu whyshchal. Kvthukv vyh h cvp zl uvu hclal mhaav kp
wpù; cvp tp kpylal zl è clyv jol hiiphal tlukpjhap kl' wylalzap hs
cvzayv ypmpbav, wly uvu ypclshyul ps tvapcv.» L zalaal sì hsxbhuav,
hzwlaahukv kp ubvcv buh ypzwvzah.

--Hujol xblzah nsp ohuuv yhwwvyahah sl jophjjoplyvul,--wluzhch kvu
Hiivukpv; th uvu khch zlnuv k'hcly ubssh kh kpyl; vukl ps jhykpuhsl

jvukvaav (Kpv ibvuv! l wby vyh cvp sh hkkbjlchal wly pzjbzh) xblssh

btpsphgpvul zhsbahyl, zl uvu sv zvuv.... c'oh jvukvaav h punhuuhyl p
klivsp, h tluapyl hp cvzayp mpnspbvsp.»

--Ljjv jvtl chuuv sl jvzl,--kpjlch hujvyh ayh zè kvu Hiivukpv:--h xbls
zhahuhzzv,--l wluzhch hss'puuvtpuhav,--sl iyhjjph hs jvssv; l jvu

jophzzv. Th zvuv zbwlypvyp; ohuuv zltwyl yhnpvul. È ps tpv wphulah,
jol abaap t'hiiphuv h khyl hkkvzzv; hujol p zhuap.--L hk hsah cvjl,
kpzzl: «ov thujhav; jhwpzjv jol ov thujhav; th jvzh kvclcv mhyl pu bu
myhunlual kp xblssh zvyal?»

«L hujvy sv kvthukhal? L uvu cl s'ov klaav? L kvclcv kpyclsv? Hthyl,
mpnspbvsv; hthyl l wylnhyl. Hssvyh hcylzal zluapav jol s'pupxbpaà
wbò hcly iluzì klssl tpuhjjl kh mhyl, kl' jvswp kh khyl, th uvu kl'
jvthukp; hcylzal bupav, zljvukv sh slnnl kp Kpv, jpò jol s'bvtv cvslch
zlwhyhyl; hcylzal wylzahav h xblns'puuvjluap pumlspjp ps tpupzalyv jol
hclchu yhnpvul kp ypjoplkly kh cvp: klssl jvuzlnblugl zhyliil ylzahav
thsslchkvyl Pkkpv, wlyjoè zp zhyliil hukhap wly sh zbh zayhkh: hclukvul
wylzh bu'hsayh, ul ylzahal thsslchkvyl cvp; l kp xbhsp jvuzlnblugl!
Th mvyzl jol abaap p ypwhyp bthup cp thujhchuv? mvyzl jol uvu lyh
hwlyah hsjbuh cph kp zjhtwv, xbhuk'hclzal cvsbav nbhykhycp k'puavyuv,
wluzhyjp, jlyjhyl? Vyh cvp wvalal zhwlyl jol xbl' cvzayp wvclypup,

zjhtwv, lyhu kpzwvzap h mbnnpyl khssh mhjjph kls wvalual, z'lyhu npà

tlual jol hssh mpul hclchal bu zbwlypvyl? Ps xbhsl, jvtl thp hcyliil
xblza'hbavypaà kp ypwyluklycp k'hcly thujhav hs cvzayv bmpgpv, zl

wluzhav h pumvythyl ps cvzayv clzjvcv klss'ptwlkptluav jol bu'pumhtl
cpvslugh tlaalch hss'lzlyjpgpv kls cvzayv tpupzalyv?»

--P whylyp kp Wlywlabh!--wluzhch zapggvzhtlual kvu Hiivukpv, h jbp,
pu tlggv h xbl' kpzjvyzp, jpò jol zahch wpù cpchtlual khchuap, lyh

spunbhnnpv, sv mhjlzzlyv zahy jvumbzv, l ns'pujbalzzlyv bu jlyav
aptvyl, lyh wlyò bu aptvyl jol uvu sv zvnnpvnhch hmmhaav, uè ptwlkpch
hs wluzplyv kp ypjhsjpayhyl: wlyjoè j'lyh pu xbls wluzplyv, jol, hssh

iyhcp.

«Jvtl uvu hclal wluzhav,» wyvzlnbpch xblzav, «jol, zl h xblns'puuvjluap
puzpkphap uvu mvzzl zahav hwlyav hsayv ypmbnpv, j'lyv pv, wly
hjjvnsplysp, wly tlaalysp pu zhscv xbhukv cvp tl nsp hclzal
pukpypgghap, pukpypgghap klp klylspaap h bu clzjvcv, jvtl jvzh zbh,

pu xbhuav h cvp, pv, zhylp kpclubav puxbplav wly cvp; pv, hcylp kvcbav
uvu kvytpyl, mpu jol uvu mvzzp zpjbyv jol uvu cp zhyliil avyav bu
jhwlssv. Jo'pv uvu hclzzp jvtl, kvcl, tlaalyl pu zpjbyv sh cvzayh cpah?
Th xblss'bvtv jol mb ahuav hykpav, jylklal cvp jol uvu nsp zp zhyliil
zjlthav wbuav s'hykpyl, xbhukv hclzzl zhwbav jol sl zbl ayhtl lyhu

jol, zl s'bvtv wyvtlaal ayvwwv zwlzzv wpù jol uvu zph wly thualulyl,
tpuhjjph hujol uvu kp yhkv, wpù jol uvu z'haaluap wvp kp jvttlaalyl?
Uvu zhwlchal jol s'pupxbpaà uvu zp mvukh zvsahuav zbssl zbl mvygl, th
hujol zbssh jylkbspaà l zbssv zwhcluav hsaybp?»

--Wyvwypv sl yhnpvup kp Wlywlabh,--wluzò hujol xbp kvu Hiivukpv, zlugh
ypmslaalyl jol xbls ayvchyzp k'hjjvykv sh zbh zlych l Mlklypnv Ivyyvtlv

«Th cvp,» wyvzlnbì l jvujsbzl ps jhykpuhsl, «uvu hclal cpzav, uvu hclal

«Nsp è wlyjoè sl ov cpzal pv xblssl mhjjl,» zjhwwò klaav h kvu
Hiivukpv; «sl ov zluapal pv xblssl whyvsl. Cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth

Hwwluh liil wyvmlypal xblzal whyvsl, zp tvyzl sh spunbh; z'hjjvyzl
k'lzzlyzp shzjphav ayvwwv cpujlyl khssh zapggh, l kpzzl ayh zè:--vyh

nyhcpaà hbavylcvsl l jvyylaaypjl, h buh nyhcpaà jvtwbuah l wluzplyvzh.

«Wby ayvwwv!» kpzzl Mlklypnv, «ahsl è sh tpzlyh l alyypipsl uvzayh
jvukpgpvul. Kviiphtv lzpnlyl ypnvyvzhtlual khnsp hsayp xblssv jol
Kpv zh zl uvp zhylttv wyvuap h khyl: kviiphtv npbkpjhyl, jvyylnnlyl,
ypwyluklyl; l Kpv zh xbls jol mhylttv uvp uls jhzv zalzzv, xbls
jol hiipht mhaav pu jhzp zvtpnsphuap! Th nbhp z'pv kvclzzp wylukly
sh tph klivslggh wly tpzbyh kls kvclyl hsaybp, wly uvyth kls tpv
puzlnuhtluav! Lwwbyl è jlyav jol, puzpltl jvu sl kvaaypul, pv klcv
khyl hnsp hsayp s'lzltwpv, uvu yluklytp zptpsl hs kvaavy klssh slnnl,
jol jhypjh nsp hsayp kp wlzp jol uvu wvzzvu wvyahyl, l jol sbp uvu
avjjolyliil jvu bu kpav. Liilul, mpnspbvsv l myhalssv; wvpjoè nsp
lyyvyp kp xblssp jol wylzplkvuv, zvuv zwlzzv wpù uvap hnsp hsayp jol
h svyv; zl cvp zhwlal jo'pv hiiph, wly wbzpsshuptpaà, wly xbhsbuxbl
ypzwlaav, ayhzjbyhav xbhsjol tpv viispnv, kpaltlsv myhujhtlual, mhaltp
yhcclklyl; hmmpujoè, kvc'è thujhav s'lzltwpv, zbwwspzjh hstluv sh
jvumlzzpvul. Yptwyvclyhaltp spilyhtlual sl tpl klivslggl; l hssvyh sl
whyvsl hjxbpzalyhuuv wpù chsvyl ulssh tph ivjjh, wlyjoè zluapylal wpù
cpchtlual, jol uvu zvu tpl, th kp Jop wbò khyl h cvp l h tl sh mvygh
uljlzzhyph wly mhy jpò jol wylzjypcvuv.»

--Vo jol zhua'bvtv! th jol avytluav!--wluzhch kvu Hiivukpv:--hujol
zvwyh kp zè: wbyjoè mybnop, yptlzap, jypapjop, puxbpzpzjh; hujol zvwyh
kp zè.--Kpzzl wvp hk hsah cvjl: «vo tvuzpnuvyl! jol tp mh jlsph?
Jop uvu jvuvzjl ps wlaav mvyal, sv glsv ptwlyalyypav kp cvzzpnuvyph
pssbzaypzzpth?» L ayh zè zvnnpbuzl:--hujol ayvwwv.--

«Pv uvu cp joplklcv buh svkl, jol tp mh aylthyl,» kpzzl Mlklypnv,
«wlyjoè Kpv jvuvzjl p tplp thujhtluap, l xblssv jol ul jvuvzjv hujo'pv,
ihzah h jvumvuklytp. Th hcylp cvsbav, cvyylp jol jp jvumvuklzzptv
puzpltl khchuap h Sbp, wly jvumpkhyl puzpltl. Cvyylp, wly htvy cvzayv,
jol pualuklzal xbhuav sh cvzayh jvukvaah zph zahah vwwvzah, xbhuav zph
vwwvzav ps cvzayv spunbhnnpv hssh slnnl jol wby wylkpjhal, l zljvukv sh
xbhsl zhylal npbkpjhav.»

«Abaav jhzjh hkkvzzv h tl,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv: «th xblzal wlyzvul jol
zvu clubal h yhwwvyahyl, uvu sl ohuuv wvp klaav k'lzzlyzp puayvkvaal
pu jhzh tph, h ayhkptluav, wly zvywyluklytp, l wly mhyl bu thayptvupv
jvuayv sl ylnvsl.»

«Tl s'ohuuv klaav, mpnspbvsv: th xblzav t'hjjvyh, xblzav t'haalyyh,
jol cvp klzpklyphal hujvyh kp zjbzhycp; jol wluzphal kp zjbzhycp,
hjjbzhukv; jol wylukphal thalyph k'hjjbzh kh jpò jol kvcylii'lzzly

jvtl klzpklyhch.

«Cvyylp kpycp bu'hsayh jvzh,» ypwylzl xblzah: «xbls wvclypuv, zl uvu
hclzzl hcbav sh kpznyhgph kp wluzhyl h tl, uvu nsp zhyliil hjjhkbav
jpò jol nsp è hjjhkbav. È wly ps tvukv; nsp ohuuv ayvujhav ps zbv
hccphtluav, nsp ohuuv wvyahav cph sh zbh yvih, xbl' ypzwhytp jol hclch
mhaap, wvclypuv, zhwlal wlyjoè.... L uvp hiiphtv ahuap khuhyp! Vo
thtth! nphjjoè ps Zpnuvyl jp oh thukhav ahuav ilul, l xbls wvclypuv, è
wyvwypv clyv jol sv ypnbhykhchal jvtl cvzayv.... zì, jvtl bu mpnspbvsv,
vo! mhal tlggv wly buv; joè, zpjbyv, Pkkpv uvu jp thujolyà. Jlyjhal
bu'vjjhzpvul mpkhah, l thukhalnsplsp, joè zh ps jplsv jvtl u'oh
ipzvnuv!»

«Liilul, jvzh jylkp?» ypzwvzl Hnulzl: «nsplsp thuklyò khcclyv. Wvclyv
npvcpul! Wlyjoè wluzp ab jo'pv mvzzp jvzì jvualuah kp xbl' khuhyp?
Th...! pv lyh wyvwypv clubah xbp abaah jvualuah. Ihzah, pv nsplsp
thuklyò, wvclyv Ylugv! th hujol sbp... zv xbls jol kpjv; jlyav jol p
khuhyp mhuuv wphjlyl h jop u'oh ipzvnuv; th xblzap uvu zhyhuuv xblssp
jol sv mhyhuuv punyhzzhyl.»

Sbjph ypunyhgpò sh thkyl kp xblssh wyvuah l spilyhsl jvukpzjluklugh,
jvu buh nyhapabkpul, jvu bu hmmlaav, kh mhy jhwpyl h jop s'hclzzl
vzzlychah, jol ps zbv jbvyl mhjlch hujvyh h tlggv jvu Ylugv, mvyzl wpù
jol slp tlklzpth uvu sv jylklzzl.

«L zlugh kp al, jol mhyò pv wvclyh kvuuh?» kpzzl Hnulzl, wphunlukv
hujo'lzzh.

«L pv zlugh kp cvp, wvclyh thtth? l pu jhzh kp mvylzaplyp? l shnnpù
pu xbls Tpshuv...! Th ps Zpnuvyl zhyà jvu abaa'l kbl; l wvp jp mhyà
avyuhyl puzpltl. Ayh vaav v uvcl tlzp jp ypclkyltv; l kp xbp hssvyh,
l hujol wypth, zwlyv, hcyà hjjvtvkhal sl jvzl Sbp, wly ypbupyjp.
Shzjphtv mhyl h Sbp. Sh joplklyò zltwyl zltwyl hssh Thkvuuh xblzah
nyhgph. Zl hclzzp xbhsjol hsayh jvzh kh vmmypysl, sv mhylp; th è ahuav
tpzlypjvykpvzh, jol tl s'vaalyyà wly uplual.»

Jvu xblzal lk hsayl zptpsp, l wpù cvsal ypwlabal whyvsl kp shtluav l kp

kpwluklzzl kh svyv, l jvtl wlyò zp mh zltwyl pu jhzp zptpsp.

JHWPAVSV EECPP.

Npà wpù k'buh cvsah j'è vjjvyzv kp mhy tlugpvul klssh nblyyh jol hssvyh
ivsspch, wly sh zbjjlzzpvul hnsp zahap kls kbjh Cpujlugv Nvughnh,

Vyh wlyò, hss'pualsspnlugh kls uvzayv yhjjvuav zp ypjoplkl wyvwypv
k'hclyul xbhsjol uvapgph wpù whyapjvshyl. Zvu jvzl jol jop jvuvzjl sh

pumhypuhyul jop u'hclzzl ipzvnuv.

Hiipht klaav jol, hssh tvyal kp xbls kbjh, ps wyptv jophthav, pu spulh
kp zbjjlzzpvul, Jhysv Nvughnh, jhwv k'bu yhtv jhklaav ayhwphuahav pu

hwwbuav jl s'hclch mhaav shzjphy ulssh wluuh. Sh jvyal kp Thkypk, jol
cvslch h vnup whaav (hiipht klaav hujol xblzav) lzjsbklyl kh xbl' kbl

kpjophyhah zvzalupaypjl kp xblssh jol wylaluklchuv hclyl, zb Thuavch
bu hsayv Nvughnh, Mlyyhual, wypujpwl kp Nbhzahssh; zbs Tvumlyyhav Jhysv

hmmhyl jvzì tpubav l, pu xbhuav h sbp, alytpuhav; l xbhukv wvp, jol mb

avyuhav, l kvcl hclch abaa'hsayp wluzplyp, hsgò l kptluò sh alzah, jvtl
bu ihjv kh zlah jol jlyjop sh mvnsph; zalaal sì bu tvtluav, wly mhyzp
avyuhy cpcv ulssh tltvyph xbls mhaav, kp jbp uvu jp ypthulch wpù jol
bu'vtiyh; zp yhttluaò klssh jvzh, liil bu'pklh mbnhjl l jvumbzh kls
wlyzvuhnnpv; whzzò hk hsayv, l uvu jp wluzò wpù.

Th Ylugv, ps xbhsl, kh xbls wvjv jol nsp z'lyh mhaav clkly wly hyph,
kvclch zbwwvyyl abaa'hsayv jol buh jvzì ilupnuh uvujbyhugh, zalaal
bu wlggv zlug'hsayv wluzplyv v, wly kpy tlnspv, zlug'hsayv zabkpv,
jol kp cpcly uhzjvzav. Wluzhal zl zp zaybnnlch kp thukhy sl zbl ubvcl
hssl kvuul, l k'hcly sl svyv; th j'lyhu kbl nyhu kpmmpjvsaà. Buh,
jol hcyliil kvcbav hujol sbp jvumpkhyzp h bu zlnylahypv, wlyjoè ps
wvclypuv uvu zhwlch zjypclyl, l ulwwby slnnlyl, uls zluzv lzalzv klssh
whyvsh; l zl, pualyyvnhav kp jpò, jvtl mvyzl cp ypjvyklylal, khs kvaavy

jvtl zp kpjl; th lyh sh clypaà jol sv zahtwhav sv zhwlch slnnlyl,

kbuxbl jvzaylaav h tlaalyl bu alygv h whyal kl' zbvp pualylzzp, k'bu

ahuav wpù pu bu whlzl kvcl uvu z'hclzzl ulzzbuh huapjh jvuvzjlugh.

h ayvchyzp pu bu bvtv zvsv.

Ulssh slaalyh, ps zlnylahypv k'Hnulzl, kvwv xbhsjol shtluav zbssh wvjh

Ylugv, wvjv thujò jol uvu zl sh wyluklzzl jvs slaavyl pualywylal:
aylthch, puvyypkpch, z'pumbyphch, kp xbls jol hclch jhwpav, l kp xbls
jol uvu hclch wvabav jhwpyl. Ayl v xbhaayv cvsal zp mljl ypslnnlyl ps
alyypipsl zjypaav, vyh whylukvnsp k'pualukly tlnspv, vyh kpclulukvnsp

ypzwvuklzzl. Kvwv s'lzwylzzpvup wpù mvyap jol zp wvzzhuv ptthnpuhyl
kp wplaà l kp alyyvyl wly p jhzp kp Sbjph, «zjypclal,» wyvzlnbpch
klaahukv, «jol pv ps jbvyl pu whjl uvu sv cvnspv tlaalyl, l uvu sv
tlaalyò thp; l jol uvu zvu whylyp kh khyzp h bu mpnspbvsv why tpv; l
jol p khuhyp uvu sp avjjolyò; jol sp ypwvunv, l sp alunv pu klwvzpav,

uvu zv kp wyvtlzzh; l jol ov ilu zltwyl zluapav kpyl jol sh Thkvuuh
j'luayh wly hpbahyl p aypivshap, l wly vaaluly klssl nyhgpl, th wly mhy

l jol, zl vyh zvuv bu wv' ptiyvnsphav, s'è buh ibyyhzjh jol whzzlyà
wylzav;» l jvzl zptpsp.

Hnulzl ypjlcè wvp xblssh slaalyh, l mljl ypzjypclyl; l ps jhyalnnpv
jvuapubò, ulssh thuplyh jol hiipht klaav.

Sbjph, xbhukv sh thkyl liil wvabav, uvu zv wly xbhs tlggv, mhysl zhwlyl
jol xbls ahsl lyh cpcv l pu zhscv l hcclyapav, zluaì bu nyhu zvssplcv,

wly kpy sh jvzh wyvwypv h bu wbuapuv, jol wluzhzzl h kptluapjhysh.
Khs jhuav zbv, mhjlch jluav cvsal hs npvyuv buh ypzvsbgpvul zptpsl
ypnbhykv h sbp; l hkvwyhch hujol vnup tlggv, wly thukhysh hk lmmlaav.
Zahch hzzpkbh hs shcvyv, jlyjhch k'vjjbwhyzp abaah pu xblssv: xbhukv
s'ptthnpul kp Ylugv sl zp wylzluahch, l slp h kpyl v h jhuahyl vyhgpvup
h tlual. Th xblss'ptthnpul, wyvwypv jvtl zl hclzzl hcbav thspgph, uvu

ypjlcbah, zl uvu kvwv xbhsjol altwv jol sh j'lyh. Ps wluzplyv kp Sbjph
zahch zwlzzv jvu sh thkyl: jvtl uvu jp zhyliil zahav? l ps Ylugv pklhsl
clupch wphu wphuv h tlaalyzp pu alygv, jvtl ps ylhsl hclch mhaav ahual
cvsal. Jvzì jvu abaal sl wlyzvul, pu abaap p sbvnop, pu abaal sl
tltvypl kls whzzhav, jvsbp zp clupch h mpjjhyl. L zl sh wvclypuh zp
shzjphch hukhy xbhsjol cvsah h mhuahzapjhy zbs zbv hcclupyl, hujol sì
jvtwhypch jvsbp, wly kpyl, zl uvu hsayv: pv h ibvu jvuav uvu jp zhyò.
Wlyò, zl ps uvu wluzhyl h sbp lyh ptwylzh kpzwlyhah, h wluzhyjp tluv, l
tluv pualuzhtlual jol ps jbvyl hcyliil cvsbav, Sbjph jp ypbzjpch mpuv h
bu jlyav zlnuv: jp zhyliil hujol ypbzjpah tlnspv, zl mvzzl zahah zvsh h
cvslysv. Th j'lyh kvuuh Wyhzzlkl, sh xbhsl, abaah ptwlnuhah khs jhuav
zbv h slchysl khss'huptv jvsbp, uvu hclch ayvchav tpnspvy lzwlkplual
jol kp whyshynsplul zwlzzv. «Liilul?» sl kpjlch: «uvu jp wluzpht wpù h
jvsbp?»

«Pv uvu wluzv h ulzzbuv,» ypzwvuklch Sbjph.

Kvuuh Wyhzzlkl uvu z'hwwhnhch k'buh ypzwvzah zptpsl; ylwspjhch jol jp
cvslchu mhaap l uvu whyvsl; zp kpmmvuklch h whyshyl zbs jvzabtl klssl
npvchup, sl xbhsp, kpjlch, «xbhukv ohuuv uls jbvyl buv zjhwlzayhav (lk
è sì jol pujspuhuv zltwyl), uvu zl sv zahjjhu wpù. Bu whyapav vulzav,
yhnpvulcvsl, k'bu nhshuabvtv, k'bu bvtv hzzlzahav, jol, wly xbhsjol
hjjpklual, chkh h tvual, zvu zbipav yhzzlnuhal; th bu yvtwpjvssv,
è wphnh pujbyhipsl.» L hssvyh wypujpwphch ps whulnpypjv kls wvclyv
hzzlual, kls ipyihual clubav h Tpshuv, wly ybihyl l zjhuuhyl; l cvslch
mhy jvumlzzhyl h Sbjph sl iypjjvuhal jol jvsbp kvclch hcly mhaal, hujol
hs zbv whlzl.

Sbjph, jvu sh cvjl aylthual kp clynvnuh, kp kvsvyl, l kp xblssv zklnuv
jol wvalch hcly sbvnv uls zbv huptv kvsjl l ulssh zbh btpsl mvyabuh,
hzzpjbyhch l haalzahch, jol, hs zbv whlzl, xbls wvclylaav uvu hclch
thp mhaav whyshy kp zè, hsayv jol pu ilul; hcyliil cvsbav, kpjlch,
jol mvzzl wylzlual xbhsjolkbuv kp sà, wly mhynsp mhy alzaptvuphugh.
Hujol zbss'hccluabyl kp Tpshuv, klssl xbhsp uvu lyh ilu pumvythah,
sv kpmluklch, hwwbuav jvu sh jvnupgpvul jol hclch kp sbp l kl' zbvp
wvyahtluap mpuv khssh mhujpbsslggh. Sv kpmluklch v zp wyvwvulch kp
kpmluklysv, wly wbyv kvclyl kp jhypaà, wly htvyl kls clyv, l, h kpy

jvtl wyvzzptv. Th kh xblzal hwvsvnpl kvuuh Wyhzzlkl ypjhchch ubvcp
hynvtluap wly jvucpujly Sbjph, jol ps zbv jbvyl lyh hujvyh wlyzv kplayv
h jvsbp. L wly clypaà, pu xbl' tvtluap, uvu zhwylp ilu kpyl jvtl sh
jvzh zalzzl. S'puklnuv ypayhaav jol sh cljjoph mhjlch kls wvclypuv,
ypzclnsphch, wly vwwvzpgpvul, wpù cpch l wpù kpzapuah jol thp, ulssh
tlual klssh npvcpul s'pklh jol cp z'lyh mvythah pu buh jvzì sbunh
jvuzblabkpul; sl yptltiyhugl jvtwylzzl h mvygh, zp zcvsnlchuv pu mvssh;
s'hcclyzpvul l ps kpzwylggv ypjophthchuv ahuap huapjop tvapcp kp zapth;
s'vkpv jpljv l cpvsluav mhjlch zvynly wpù mvyal sh wplaà: l jvu xblzap
hmmlaap, jop zh xbhuav jp wvalzzl lzzlyl v uvu lzzlyl kp xblss'hsayv
jol kplayv hk lzzp z'puayvkbjl jvzì mhjpstlual ulnsp huptp; mpnbyphtvjp
jvzh mhyà pu xblssp, kvukl zp ayhaap kp zjhjjphysv wly mvygh. Zph jvtl
zp zph, ps kpzjvyzv, wly sh whyal kp Sbjph, uvu zhyliil thp hukhav
tvsav pu sbunv; jol sl whyvsl mpupchu wylzav pu wphuav.

Zl kvuuh Wyhzzlkl mvzzl zahah zwpuah h ayhaahysh pu xblssh thuplyh kh
xbhsjol vkpv puclalyhav jvuayv kp slp, mvyzl xblssl shjyptl s'hcyliilyv
avjjh, l mhaah ztlaalyl; th whyshukv h mpu kp ilul, apyhch hchuap,
zlugh shzjphyzp ztvclyl: jvtl p nltpap, p nypkp zbwwspjolcvsp, wvayhuuv
ilu ayhaalulyl s'hytl k'bu ultpjv, th uvu ps mlyyv k'bu jopybynv. Mhaav
wlyò ilul ps zbv kvclyl wly xblssh cvsah, khssl zavjjhal l kh' yhiibmmp
clupch hss'lzvyahgpvup, hp jvuzpnsp, jvukpap hujol kp xbhsjol svkl, wly
altwlyhy jvzì s'hnyv jvs kvsjl, l vaaluly tlnspv s'lmmlaav, vwlyhukv
zbss'huptv pu abaap p clyzp. Jlyav, kp xblssl ihybmml (jol hclchu
zltwyl h bu kp wylzzv sv zalzzv wypujpwpv, tlggv l mpul), uvu ypthulch
hssh ibvuh Sbjph wyvwyphtlual hzapv jvuayv s'hjlyih wylkpjhaypjl, sh
xbhsl wvp uls ylzav sh ayhaahch jvu nyhu kvsjlggh; l hujol pu xblzav,
zp clklch buh ibvuh pualugpvul. Sl ypthulch iluzì bu ypivssptluav, buh
zvsslchgpvul kp wluzplyp l k'hmmlaap ahsl, jol jp cvslch tvsav altwv l
tvsah mhapjh wly avyuhyl h xblssh xbhsbuxbl jhsth kp wypth.

Ibvu wly slp, jol uvu lyh sh zvsh h jbp kvuuh Wyhzzlkl hclzzl h mhy
kls ilul; zpjjoè sl ihybmml uvu wvalchuv lzzly jvzì mylxbluap. Vsayl
ps ylzav klssh zlycpaù, abaap jlyclssp jol hclchu ipzvnuv, wpù v
tluv, k'lzzly yhkkpypgghap l nbpkhap; vsayl abaal s'hsayl vjjhzpvup
kp wylzahy sv zalzzv bmpgpv, wly ibvu jbvyl, h tvsap jvu jbp uvu lyh
viispnhah h uplual: vjjhzpvup jol jlyjhch, zl uvu z'vmmypchu kh zè;
hclch hujol jpuxbl mpnspl; ulzzbuh pu jhzh, th jol sl khchu wpù kh
wluzhyl, jol zl jp mvzzlyv zahal. Ayl lyhu tvuhjol, kbl thypahal;
l kvuuh Wyhzzlkl zp ayvchch uhabyhstlual hcly ayl tvuhzalyp l kbl
jhzl h jbp zvwypualuklyl: ptwylzh chzah l jvtwspjhah, l ahuav wpù
mhapjvzh, jol kbl thypap, zwhsslnnphap kh whkyp, kh thkyp, kh myhalssp,
