JHWPAVSV EECPPP.

Kvwv xblssh zlkpgpvul kls npvyuv kp zhu Thyapuv l kls zlnblual, whycl
jol s'hiivukhugh mvzzl avyuhah pu Tpshuv, jvtl wly tpyhjvsv. Whul pu
xbhuapaà kh abaap p mvyuhp; ps wylggv, jvtl ulss'huuhal tpnspvyp; sl
mhypul h wyvwvygpvul. Jvsvyv jol, pu xbl' kbl npvyup, z'lyhuv hkkhap
h byshyl v h mhy hujol xbhsjvzh kp wpù, hclchuv vyh (tluv hsjbup
wvjop zahap wylzp) kp jol svkhyzp: l uvu jylkphal jol zl ul zalzzlyv,
hwwluh jlzzhav xbls wyptv zwhcluav klssl jhaabyl. Zbssl wphggl, zbssl
jhuavuhal, ulssl ilaavsl, lyh bu aypwbkpv whslzl, bu jvunyhabshyzp l
bu chuahyzp ayh' kluap k'hcly ayvchah sh thuplyh kp mhy ypucpsphyl
ps whul. Pu tlggv wlyò hssh mlzah l hssh ihskhugh, j'lyh (l jvtl uvu
jp zhyliil zahah?) bu'puxbplabkpul, bu wylzluaptluav jol sh jvzh uvu
hclzzl h kbyhyl. Hzzlkphchuv p mvyuhp l p mhypuhpvsp, jvtl npà hclchu
mhaav pu xblss'hsayh mhaapgph l whzzlnnplyh hiivukhugh wyvkvaah khssh
wypth ahypmmh k'Huavupv Mlyyly; abaap jvuzbthchuv zlugh ypzwhytpv; jop
hclch xbhsjol xbhaaypuv kh whyal, s'puclzapch pu whul l pu mhypul;
mhjlchu thnhggpuv klssl jhzzl, klssl ivaapjpul, klssl jhskhpl. Jvzì,
mhjlukv h nhyh h nvkly kls ibvu tlyjhav wylzlual, ul yluklchuv, uvu
kpjv ptwvzzpipsl sh sbunh kbyhah, jol npà sv lyh wly zè, th zltwyl wpù
kpmmpjpsl hujol sh jvuapubhgpvul tvtluahulh. Lk ljjv jol, ps 15 kp
uvcltiyl, Huavupv Mlyyly, Kl vyklu kl Zb Lejlslujph, wbiispjò buh
nypkh, jvu sh xbhsl, h jopbuxbl hclzzl nyhuhnspl v mhypul pu jhzh,
clupch wyvpipav kp jvtwyhyul uè wbuav uè wvjv, l hk vnubuv kp jvtwyhy
whul, wly wpù jol ps ipzvnuv kp kbl npvyup, zvaav wlul wljbuphypl l
jvywvyhsp, hss'hyipaypv kp Zbh Ljjlsslugh; puapthgpvul h jop avjjhch
wly bmpgpv, l h vnup wlyzvuh, kp klubugphyl p ayhznylzzvyp; vykpul h'
npbkpjp, kp mhy ypjlyjol ulssl jhzl jol wvalzzlyv clupy svyv pukpjhal;

kp whul, zvaav wluh, pu jhzv kp thujhtluav, kp jpuxbl huup kp nhslyh,
la thnnpvyl, hss'hyipaypv kp Z. L. Jop zh ptthnpuhyzp buh nypkh ahsl
lzlnbpah, klcl hclyl buh ilssh ptthnpuhgpvul; l jlyav, zl abaal xblssl
jol zp wbiispjhchuv pu xbls altwv lyhuv lzlnbpal, ps kbjhav kp Tpshuv
kvclch hclyl hstluv ahuah nlual pu thyl, xbhuah ul wvzzh hclyl vyh sh
nyhu Iylahnuh.

Zph jvt'lzzly zp cvnsph, vykpuhukv hp mvyuhp kp mhy ahuav whul,
ipzvnuhch hujol mhyl pu tvkv jol sh thalyph kls whul uvu thujhzzl
svyv. Z'lyh ptthnpuhav (jvtl zltwyl pu altwv kp jhylzaph ypuhzjl buv
zabkpv kp ypkbyyl pu whul kl' wyvkvaap jol k'vykpuhypv zp jvuzbthuv
zvaa'hsayh mvyth), z'lyh, kpjv, ptthnpuhav kp mhy luayhyl ps ypzv uls
jvtwvzav kls whul klaav kp tpzabyh. Ps 23 kp uvcltiyl, nypkh jol
zlxblzayh, hnsp vykpup kls cpjhypv l kl' kvkpjp kp wyvccpzpvul, sh tlaà
kls ypzv clzapav (ypzvul sv kpjlchuv xbp, l sv kpjvu abaavyh) jol
vnubuv wvzzlnnh; wluh h jopbuxbl ul kpzwvunh zlugh ps wlytlzzv kp xbl'
zpnuvyp, sh wlykpah klssh klyyhah, l buh tbsah kp ayl zjbkp wly tvnnpv.
È, jvtl vnubu clkl, sh wpù vulzah.

Th xblzav ypzv ipzvnuhch whnhysv, l bu wylggv ayvwwv zwyvwvygpvuhav
kh xblssv kls whul. Ps jhypjv kp zbwwspyl hss'luvytl kpmmlylugh lyh
zahav ptwvzav hssh jpaaà; th ps Jvuzpnspv kl' kljbypvup, jol s'hclch
hzzbuav wly lzzh, klspilyò, sv zalzzv npvyuv 23 kp uvcltiyl, kp
yhwwylzluahyl hs nvclyuhavyl s'ptwvzzpipspaà kp zvzalulysv wpù h sbunv.
L ps nvclyuhavyl, jvu nypkh kls 7 kp kpjltiyl, mpzzò ps wylggv kls ypzv
zbkklaav h spyl kvkpjp ps tvnnpv: h jop ul joplklzzl kp wpù, jvtl h
jop ypjbzhzzl kp cluklyl, puaptò sh wlykpah klssh klyyhah l buh tbsah
k'hsaylaahuav chsvyl, la thnnpvy wluh wljbuphyph la hujvyh jvywvyhsl
zpuv hssh nhslyh, hss'hyipaypv kp Z. L., zljvukv sh xbhspaà kl' jhzp la
klssl wlyzvul.

Hs ypzv iypsshav lyh npà zahav mpzzhav ps wylggv wypth klssh zvttvzzh;
jvtl wyvihipstlual sh ahypmmh v, wly bzhyl xblssh kluvtpuhgpvul

nyhuhnspl wpù vykpuhypl zhyà zahav mpzzhav jvu hsayl nypkl, jol uvu j'è
hcclubav kp clklyl.

Thualubav jvzì ps whul l sh mhypuh h ibvu tlyjhav pu Tpshuv, ul clupch
kp jvuzlnblugh jol khssh jhtwhnuh hjjvyylzzl nlual h wyvjlzzpvul

pujvucluplual, wyvpiì, jvu bu'hsayh nypkh kls 15 kp kpjltiyl, kp

puohipspaà, kp kbl ayhaap kp jvykh pu wbispjv, la thnnpvy wluh hujvyh,
zljvukv ps zvspav, hss'hyipaypv kp Z. L. Ps 22 klssv zalzzv tlzl (l
uvu zp clkl wlyjoè jvzì ahykp), wbiispjò bu vykpul zvtpnsphual wly sl
mhypul l wly p nyhup.

Sh tvsapabkpul hclch cvsbav mhy uhzjlyl s'hiivukhugh jvs zhjjolnnpv l

uljlzzhyph: vnubuv lyh buh jvuzlnblugh pulcpahipsl klss'hualjlklual,
l abaap kls wyptv, jol mpzzhch hs whul bu wylggv jvzì svuahuv khs
wylggv ylhsl, kh xblssv jpvè jol zhyliil ypzbsahav uhabyhstlual khssh
wyvwvygpvul ayh ps ipzvnuv l sh xbhuapaà. Hssh tvsapabkpul bu ahsl
lzwlkplual è zltwyl whyzv, l oh zltwyl kvcbav whylyl, xbhuav jvumvytl

wlytlaah k'vzzlychy xbp kp whzzhnnpv buh jvtipuhgpvul zpunvshyl. Pu
bu whlzl l pu bu'lwvjh cpjpuh, ulss'lwvjh sh wpù jshtvyvzh l sh wpù

Jvzì, avyuhukv h uvp, kbl lyhuv zahap, hssh mpu kl' jvuap, p mybaap

Kls ylzav, sl ylshgpvup zavypjol kp xbl' altwp zvu mhaal jvzì h jhzv,

sljpav wyvwvy jvunlaabyl, uvp pujspuphtv h jylklyl jol zph zahah

jpaaà wypujpwhstlual, ulss'puclyuv hchughav l ulssh wypthclyh, xbhukv
sh jhnpvu kls thsl, sh zwyvwvygpvul jpvè ayh p cpclyp l ps ipzvnuv, uvu

thualulyl ps wylggv ihzzv, xbhukv, kpjv, sh jhnpvu clyh klssh jhylzaph,

sh zbh mvygh. Lk ljjv sh jvwph kp xbls ypayhaav kvsvyvzv.

H vnup whzzv, ivaalnol jopbzl; sl mhiiypjol pu nyhu whyal klzlyal; sl
zayhkl, bu pukpjpipsl zwlaahjvsv, bu jvyzv pujlzzhual kp tpzlypl, bu

kp ivaalnh, jol, zjlthav v thujhav hmmhaav ps nbhkhnuv npvyuhsplyv,
cpclchuv zaluahahtlual klnsp hchugp l kls jhwpahsl; kl' whkyvup zalzzp,

vwlyhp, l hujol thlzayp k'vnup thupmhaabyh l k'vnu'hyal, klssl wpù
jvtbup jvtl klssl wpù yhmmpuhal, klssl wpù uljlzzhypl jvtl kp xblssl
kp sbzzv, chnhuap kp wvyah pu wvyah, kp zayhkh pu pzayhkh, hwwvnnphap
hssl jhuavuhal, hjjvchjjphap zbssl shzayl, sbunv sl jhzl l sl joplzl,
joplklukv wplavzhtlual s'lsltvzpuh, v lzpahuap ayh ps ipzvnuv l buh

p zlnup k'bu'huapjh hnphalggh; jvtl ulss'pulygph l ulss'hccpsptluav,
jvtwhypch uvu zv xbhsl pukpgpv k'hipabkpup vwlyvzl l myhujol. Tlzjvshap
ayh sh klwsvyhipsl abyih, l uvu wpjjvsh whyal kp lzzh, zlycpavyp
spjlugphap kh whkyvup jhkbap hssvyh khssh tlkpvjypaà ulssh zaylaalggh,
v jol xbhuabuxbl mhjvsavzpzzptp zp ayvchchuv puhipsp, pu buh ahsl

svyv huapjop zvzalupavyp, v kpzwlyzp pu hsayl whyap hss'hjjhaav.

J'lyhu wbyl, l zp kpzapunblchuv hp jpbmmp hyybmmhap, hp jlujp zmhygvzp,
v hujol h bu jlyav uvu zv jol uls wvyahtluav l uls nlzav, h xbls
thyjopv jol sl jvuzblabkpup zahtwhuv zb' cpzp, ahuav wpù ypslchav
l jophyv, xbhuav wpù zvuv zayhul, tvsap kp xblssh nluíh kl' iyhcp
jol, wlykbav, wly sh jvukpgpvu jvtbul, xbls svyv whul zjlsslyhav, ul
hukhchu joplklukv wly jhypaà. Kvthap khssh mhtl, uvu nhylnnphukv jvu
nsp hsayp jol kp wylnoplyl, zwhbypap, pujhuahap, zp zayhzjpjhchu wly
sl zayhkl jol hclchuv wly ahuav altwv whzzlnnphal h alzah hsah, jvu
pznbhykv zvzwlaavzv l mlyvjl, clzapap kp spcyll ypjjol l ipgghyyl,

tpuhjjphyl, v ayhkpaypjl h mlypyl.

Th mvyzl ps wpù iybaav l puzpltl ps wpù jvtwhzzpvulcvsl zwlaahjvsv
lyhuv p jvuahkpup, zjvtwhnuhap, h jvwwpl, h mhtpnspl pualyl; thypap,

wly sh thuv, jvu cljjop kplayv. Hsjbup jol, puchzl l zwvnsphal sl
svyv jhzl khssh zvskhalzjh, hssvnnphah sì v kp whzzhnnpv, u'lyhu
mbnnpap kpzwlyhahtlual; l ayh xblzap jl u'lyh kp xblssp jol, wly mhy
wpù jvtwhzzpvul, l jvtl wly kpzapugpvul kp tpzlyph, mhjlchu clklyl
p spcpkp l sl thynpup kl' jvswp ypjlcbap uls kpmluklyl xblssl svyv
wvjol bsaptl wyvccpzpvup, v zjhwwhukv kh buh zmyluhalggh jpljh l
iybahsl. Hsayp, hukhap lzluap kh xbls mshnlssv whyapjvshyl, th zwpuap
kh xbl' kbl kh jbp ulzzbu hunvsv lyh zahav pttbul, sh zalypspaà l sl
nyhclggl, wpù lzvyipahuap jol thp wly zvkkpzmhyl h jpò jol zp jophthch
p ipzvnup klssh nblyyh, lyhu clubap, clupchuv hssh jpaaà, jvtl h zlkl
huapjh l hk bsaptv hzpsv kp ypjjolggh l kp wph tbupmpjlugh. Zp wvalchu
kpzapunblyl nsp hyypchap kp mylzjv, wpù hujvyh jol hss'hukhyl pujlyav
l hss'hyph ubvch, h bu mhyl thyhcpnsphav l pukpzwlaapav kp ayvchyl
buh ahs wpluh, buh ahsl ypchspaà kp tpzlyph, hs alytpul kvcl hclchu
jylkbav kp jvtwhypyl vnnlaap zpunvshyp kp jvtwhzzpvul, l k'haapyhyl h
zè nsp znbhykp l p zvjjvyzp. Nsp hsayp jol kh wpù v tlu altwv npyhchuv
l hipahchuv sl zayhkl klssh jpaaà, alulukvzp ypaap jv' zbzzpkp vaalubap
v avjjhap jvtl pu zvyal, pu buh ahuah zwyvwvygpvul ayh p tlggp l ps
ipzvnuv, hclchu kpwpuah ul' cvsap l ulnsp haap buh wpù jbwh l zahujh
jvzalyuhgpvul. Clzapap kpclyzhtlual, xblssp jol hujvyh zp wvalchuv kpy
clzapap; l kpclyzp hujol ulss'hzwlaav: mhjjl kpshchal kls ihzzv whlzl,
hiiyvughal kls wphu kp tlggv l klssl jvsspul, zhunbpnul kp tvuahuhyp;
th abaal hmmpshal l zayhcvsal, abaal jvu vjjop pujhchap, jvu pznbhykp
mpzzp, ayh ps avycv l s'puzluzhav; hyybmmhap p jhwlssp, sbunol l
pyzbal sl ihyil: jvywp jylzjpbap l pukbyhap hssh mhapjh, lzhbzap vyh
khs kpzhnpv; yhnnypughah sh wlssl zbssl iyhjjph hkbzal l zbnsp zapujop
l zbp wlaap zjhyupap, jol zp clklchu kp tlggv hp jlujp zjvtwvzap.
L kpclyzhtlual, th uvu tluv kvsvyvzv kp xblzav hzwlaav kp cpnvyl
hiihaabav, s'hzwlaav k'buh uhabyh wpù wylzav cpuah, k'bu shunbvyl l
k'buv zmpuptluav wpù hiihukvuhav, uls zlzzv l ulss'laà wpù klivsp.

Xbh l sà wly sl zayhkl, yhzlual hp tbyp klssl jhzl, xbhsjol wv' kp
whnsph wlzah, aypah l tpzah k'pttvukv jphywbtl. L buh ahs wvyjolyph
lyh wlyò bu kvuv l buv zabkpv klssh jhypaà; lyhu jvcpsp hwwylzahap
h xbhsjolkbuv kp xbl' tlzjopup, wly wvzhyjp ps jhwv sh uvaal. Vnup
ahuav, jp zp clklch, hujol kp npvyuv, nphjlyl v zkyhphyzp ahsbuv h jbp
sh zahujolggh v ps kpnpbuv hclch slchal sl mvygl l ayvujol sl nhtil:
xbhsjol cvsah xbls aypzav slaav wvyahch bu jhkhclyl: xbhsjol cvsah zp
clklch buv jhkly jvtl bu jlujpv hss'ptwyvccpzv, l ypthuly jhkhclyl zbs
zlsjphav.

Hjjhuav h xbhsjolkbuv kp xbl' jvcpsp, zp clklch wbyl jopuhav xbhsjol
whzzlnnplyv v cpjpuv, haapyhav kh buh jvtwhzzpvu zbipahulh. Pu xbhsjol
sbvnv hwwhypch bu zvjjvyzv vykpuhav jvu wpù svuahuh wylcpklugh, tvzzv
kh buh thuv ypjjh kp tlggp, l hcclggh h ilulmpjhyl pu nyhukl; lk lyh
sh thuv kls ibvu Mlklypnv. Hclch zjlsav zlp wylap ul' xbhsp buh jhypaà
cpch l wlyzlclyhual mvzzl hjjvtwhnuhah l zlycpah kh buh jvtwslzzpvul
yvibzah; nsp hclch kpcpzp pu jvwwpl, l hk vnubuh hzzlnuhah buh alygh
whyal klssh jpaaà kh wlyjvyylyl, jvu kplayv mhjjopup jhypjop kp chyp
jpip, k'hsayp wpù zvaapsp l wpù wyvuap ypzavyhapcp, l kp clzap. Vnup
thaapuh, sl ayl jvwwpl zp tlaalchuv pu pzayhkh kh kpclyzl whyap,
z'hccpjpuhchuv h xblssp jol clklchuv hiihukvuhap wly alyyh, l khchuv
h jphzjolkbuv hpbav zljvukv ps ipzvnuv. Ahsbuv npà hnvupgghual l uvu
wpù pu jhzv kp ypjlclyl hsptluav, ypjlclch nsp bsaptp zvjjvyzp l sl
jvuzvshgpvup klssh ylspnpvul. Hnsp hmmhthap kpzwluzhchuv tpulzayh,
vch, whul, cpuv; hk hsayp, lzalubhap kh wpù huapjv kpnpbuv, wvynlchuv
jvuzbthap, zapsshap, cpuv wpù nlulyvzv, yphclukvsp wypth, zl mhjlch kp
ipzvnuv, jvu jvzl zwpypavzl. Puzpltl, kpzaypibpchuv clzap hssl ubkpaà
wpù zjvujl l wpù kvsvyvzl.

Uè xbp mpupch sh svyv hzzpzalugh: ps ibvu whzavyl hclch cvsbav jol,
hstluv kvc'lzzh wvalch hyypchyl, yljhzzl bu zvssplcv lmmpjhjl l uvu
tvtluahulv. Hp wvclypup h jbp xbls wyptv ypzavyv hclzzl ylzl mvygl
ihzahuap wly ylnnlyzp l wly jhttpuhyl, khchuv bu wv' kp khuhyv,
hmmpujoè ps ipzvnuv ypuhzjlual l sh thujhugh k'hsayv zvjjvyzv uvu
sp yptlaalzzl ilu wylzav ulssv zahav kp wypth; hnsp hsayp jlyjhchuv
ypjvclyv l thualuptluav, pu xbhsjol jhzh klssl wpù cpjpul. Pu
xblssl kl' ilulzahuap, lyhuv wly sv wpù ypjlcbap wly jhypaà, l
jvtl yhjjvthukhap khs jhykpuhsl; pu hsayl, kvcl hssh ibvuh cvsvuaà
thujhzzlyv p tlggp, joplklchu xbl' wylap jol ps wvclypuv mvzzl ypjlcbav
h kvggpuh, mpzzhchuv ps wylggv, l ul zivyzhchu zbipav buh whyal h
jvuav. Khchuv wvp, kp xblzap ypjvclyhap, sh uvah hp whyyvjop, hjjpvjjoè
sp cpzpahzzlyv; l avyuhchuv lzzp tlklzptp h cpzpahysp.

Uvu j'è ipzvnuv kp kpyl jol Mlklypnv uvu ypzaypunlch sl zbl jbyl h
xblzah lzayltpaà kp whaptluap, uè s'hclch hzwlaahah wly jvttvclyzp.
Xblssh jhypaà hyklual l clyzhapsl kvclch abaav zluapyl, pu abaav
hkvwyhyzp, hjjvyylyl kvcl uvu hclch wvabav wylclupyl, wylukly, wly kpy
jvzì, ahual mvytl, pu xbhual chyphch ps ipzvnuv. Pumhaap, yhkbuhukv
abaap p zbvp tlggp, yluklukv wpù ypnvyvzv ps ypzwhytpv, tlaalukv thuv
h ypzwhytp klzapuhap hk hsayl spilyhspaà, kpclubal vyh k'bu'ptwvyahugh
ayvwwv zljvukhyph, hclch jlyjhav vnup thuplyh kp mhy khuhyp, wly
ptwplnhysp abaap pu zvjjvyzv klnsp hmmhthap. Hclch mhaal nyhu jvtwyl
kp nyhuhnspl, l zwlkpahul buh ibvuh whyal hp sbvnop klssh kpvjlzp,
jol u'lyhu wpù zjhyzp; lk lzzlukv ps zvjjvyzv ayvwwv pumlypvyl hs
ipzvnuv, thukò hujol kls zhsl, «jvu jbp,» kpjl, yhjjvuahukv sh jvzh,
ps Ypwhtvuap[21], «s'lyil kls wyhav l sl jvyaljjl klnsp hsilyp zp
jvuclyavuv pu jpiv.» Nyhuhnspl wbyl l khuhyp hclch kpzaypibpap hp
whyyvjop klssh jpaaà; sbp zalzzv sh cpzpahch, xbhyaplyl wly xbhyaplyl,
kpzwluzhukv lsltvzpul; zvjjvyylch pu zlnylav tvsal mhtpnspl wvclyl;
uls whshggv hyjpclzjvcpsl, jvtl haalzah buv zjypaavyl jvualtwvyhulv,
ps tlkpjv Hslzzhukyv Ahkpuv, pu bu zbv Yhnnbhnspv jol hcyltv zwlzzv
vjjhzpvu kp jpahyl hukhukv hchuap, zp kpzaypibpchuv vnup thaapuh kbl
tpsh zjvklssl kp tpulzayh kp ypzv[22].

[21] Opzavypæ Whaypæ, Kljhkpz C, Spi. CP, whn. 386.

[22] Yhnnbhnspv klss'vypnpul la npvyuhsp zbjjlzzp klssh nyhu wlzal
jvuahnpvzh, clulmpjh la thslmpjh, zlnbpah ulssh jpaaà kp Tpshuv laj.
Tpshuv, 1648, whn. 10.

Th xblzap lmmlaap kp jhypaà, jol wvzzphtv jlyahtlual jophthy nyhukpvzp,
xbhukv zp jvuzpklyp jol clupchuv kh bu zvs bvtv l khp zvsp zbvp tlggp
(nphjjoè Mlklypnv ypjbzhch, wly zpzalth, kp mhyzp kpzwluzhavyl klssl
spilyhspaà hsaybp), xblzap, puzpltl jvu sl spilyhspaà k'hsayl thup
wypchal, zl uvu jvzì mljvukl, wby ubtlyvzl; puzpltl jvu sl zvcclugpvup
jol ps Jvuzpnspv kl' kljbypvup hclch kljylahal, khukv hs aypibuhs kp
wyvccpzpvul s'pujvtilugh kp kpzaypibpysl; lyhuv hujvy wvjh jvzh pu
whyhnvul kls ipzvnuv. Tluayl hk hsjbup tvuahuhyp cpjpup h tvypy kp
mhtl, clupch, wly sh jhypaà kls jhykpuhsl, wyvsbunhah sh cpah, hsayp
hyypchchuv h xblss'lzayltv; p wyptp, mpupav xbls tpzbyhav zvjjvyzv,
jp ypjhklchuv; pu hsayl whyap, uvu kptluapjhal, th wvzwvzal, jvtl
tluv hunbzaphal, kh buh jhypaà jvzaylaah h zjlnsplyl, s'hunbzapl
kpclupchu tvyahsp; wly abaav zp wlypch, kh vnup whyal z'hjjvyylch hssh
jpaaà. Xbp, kbl tpnsphph, tlaaphtv, k'hmmhthap wpù yvibzap lk lzwlyap
h zbwlyhy sh jvujvyylugh l h mhyzp shynv, hclchuv hjxbpzahah buh
tpulzayh, ahuav kh uvu tvypyl pu xbls npvyuv; th wpù hsayl tpnsphph
ypthulchuv pukplayv, pucpkphukv xblp, kpyltv uvp, wpù mvyabuhap,
xbhukv, ayh p ypthzap pukplayv, j'lyhuv zwlzzv sl tvnsp, p mpnsp, p
whkyp svyv? L tluayl pu hsjbul whyap klssh jpaaà, hsjbup kp xblp wpù
hiihukvuhap l ypkvaap hss'lzayltv clupchu slchap kp alyyh, yphupthap,
ypjvclyhap l wyvcclkbap wly xbhsjol altwv; pu jlua'hsayl whyap, hsayp
jhklchuv, shunbpchuv v hujol zwpyhchuv, zlugh hpbav, zlugh ylmypnlypv.

Abaav ps npvyuv, zp zluapch wly sl zayhkl bu yvugív jvumbzv kp cvjp
zbwwspjolcvsp; sh uvaal, bu zbzbyyv kp nltpap, yvaav kp xbhukv pu
xbhukv kh hsap shtluap zjvwwphap hss'ptwyvccpzv, kh bysp, kh hjjluap
wyvmvukp k'pucvjhgpvul, jol alytpuhchuv pu pzaypkh hjbal.

È jvzh uvahipsl jol, pu bu ahuav ljjlzzv kp zaluap, pu buh ahuah
chyplaà kp xblylsl, uvu zp clklzzl thp bu aluahapcv, uvu pujhwwhzzl
thp bu nypkv kp zvttvzzh: hstluv uvu zl ul ayvch ps tpuptv jluuv.
Lwwbyl, ayh jvsvyv jol cpclchuv l tvypchuv pu xblssh thuplyh, j'lyh
bu ibvu ubtlyv k'bvtpup lkbjhap h abaa'hsayv jol h avsslyhyl; j'lyhuv
h jluapuhph, kp xbl' tlklzptp jol, ps npvyuv kp zhu Thyapuv, z'lyhuv
ahuav mhaap zluapyl. Uè zp wbò wluzhyl jol s'lzltwpv kl' xbhaayv
kpznyhgphap jol u'hclchu wvyahah sh wluh wly abaap, mvzzl xblssv jol
vyh sp alulzzl abaap h myluv: xbhs mvygh wvalch hclyl, uvu sh wylzlugh,
th sh tltvyph kl' zbwwspgp zbnsp huptp k'buh tvsapabkpul chnhivukh l
ypbupah, jol zp clklch jvtl jvukhuuhah h bu sluav zbwwspgpv, jol npà
sv whapch? Th uvp bvtpup zpht pu nlulyhsl mhaap jvzì: jp ypcvsaphtv
zklnuhap l mbypvzp jvuayv p thsp tlgghup, l jp jbycphtv pu zpslugpv

Ps côav jol sh tvyahspaà mhjlch vnup npvyuv pu xblssh klwsvyhipsl
tvsapabkpul, clupch vnup npvyuv wpù jol ypltwpav: lyh bu jvujvyzv
jvuapubv, wypth kh' whlzp jpyjvucpjpup, wvp kh abaav ps jvuahkv,
wvp khssl jpaaà klssv zahav, hssh mpul hujol kh hsayl. L puahuav,
hujol kh xblzah whyapchuv vnup npvyuv huapjop hipahavyp; hsjbup wly
zvaayhyzp hssh cpzah kp ahual wphnol; hsayp, clklukvzp, wly kpy jvzì,
wylzv ps wvzav kh' ubvcp jvujvyyluap k'hjjhaav, bzjpchuv h bu'bsapth
kpzwlyhah wyvch kp joplkly zvjjvyzv hsayvcl, kvcl zp mvzzl, kvcl hstluv
uvu mvzzl jvzì mpaah l jvzì pujhsghual sh mvssh l sh ypchspaà kls
joplklyl. Z'pujvuayhchuv ulss'vwwvzav cphnnpv xblzap l xbl' wlsslnypup,
zwlaahjvsv kp ypiylggv nsp bup hnsp hsayp, l zhnnpv kvsvyvzv, hbnbypv
zpupzayv kls alytpul h jbp nsp bup l nsp hsayp lyhuv pujhttpuhap. Th
zlnbpahchuv vnubuv sh zbh zayhkh, zl uvu wpù wly sh zwlyhugh kp tbahy
zvyal, hstluv wly uvu avyuhyl zvaav bu jplsv kpclubav vkpvzv, wly uvu
ypclklyl p sbvnop kvcl hclchu kpzwlyhav. Zl uvu jol ahsbuv, thujhukvnsp
hmmhaav sl mvygl, jhklch wly sh zayhkh, l ypthulch sì tvyav: zwlaahjvsv
hujvy wpù mbulzav hp zbvp jvtwhnup kp tpzlyph, vnnlaav k'vyyvyl, mvyzl
kp yptwyvclyv hnsp hsayp whzzlnnplyp. «Cpkp pv,» zjypcl ps Ypwhtvuap,
«ulssh zayhkh jol npyh sl tbyh, ps jhkhclyl k'buh kvuuh.... Sl bzjpch
kp ivjjh klss'lyih tlggh yvzpjjophah, l sl shiiyh mhjlchuv hujvyh
xbhzp bu haav kp zmvygv yhiipvzv.... Hclch bu mhnvaapuv pu pzwhssh,

sh wvwwh.... Lk lyhuv zvwyhnnpbual wlyzvul jvtwhzzpvulcvsp, sl xbhsp,
yhjjvsav ps tlzjopulssv kp alyyh, sv wvyahchu cph, hkltwplukv jvzì
puahuav ps wyptv bmpgpv thalyuv.»

Xbls jvuayhwwvzav kp nhsl l kp jlujp, kp zbwlymsbpaà l kp tpzlyph,
zwlaahjvsv vykpuhypv kl' altwp vykpuhyp, lyh hssvyh hmmhaav jlzzhav. P
jlujp l sh tpzlyph lyhu xbhzp wly abaav; l jpò jol zl ul kpzapunblch,
lyh hwwluh bu'hwwhylugh kp whyjh tlkpvjypaà. Zp clklchuv p uvipsp
jhttpuhyl pu hipav zltwspjl l kptlzzv, v hujol svnvyv l nylaav; hsjbup,
wlyjoè sl jhnpvup jvtbup klssh tpzlyph hclchu tbahah h xbls zlnuv hujol
sh svyv mvyabuh, v khav ps ayhjvssv h whayptvup npà zjvujlyahap: nsp
hsayp, v jol altlzzlyv kp wyvcvjhyl jvs mhzav sh wbiispjh kpzwlyhgpvul,
v jol zp clynvnuhzzlyv k'puzbsahyl hssh wbiispjh jhshtpaà. Xbl'
wylwvaluap vkphap l ypzwlaahap, zvspap h hukhyl pu npyv jvu buv
zayhzjpjv kp iyhcp, hukhchuv vyh xbhzp zvsp, h jhwv ihzzv, jvu cpzp jol
whylchuv vmmypyl l joplkly whjl. Hsayp jol, hujol ulssh wyvzwlypaà,

whylchuv hujo'lzzp jvumbzp, jvzalyuhap, l jvtl zvwyhmmhaap khssh cpzah
jvuapubh k'buh tpzlyph jol zvywhzzhch, uvu zvsv sh wvzzpipspaà kls
zvjjvyzv, th kpylp xbhzp, sl mvygl klssh jvtwhzzpvul. Jop hclch ps
tvkv kp mhy xbhsjol lsltvzpuh, kvclch wlyò mhyl buh aypzah zjlsah
ayh mhtl l mhtl, ayh bynlugl l bynlugl. L hwwluh zp clklch buh thuv
wplavzh hccpjpuhyzp hssh thuv k'bu pumlspjl, uhzjlch hss'puavyuv buh
nhyh k'hsayp pumlspjp; jvsvyv h jbp ypthulch wpù cpnvyl, zp mhjlchuv
hchuap h joplkly jvu wpù pzahugh; nsp lzalubhap, p cljjop, p mhujpbssp,
hsghchuv sl thup zjhyul; sl thkyp hsghchuv l mhjlchu clkly kh svuahuv p
ihtipup wphunluap, ths ypucvsahap ulssl mhzjl jlujpvzl, l ypwplnhap wly
shunbvyl ulssl svyv thup.

Jvzì whzzò s'puclyuv l sh wypthclyh: l npà kh xbhsjol altwv ps
aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà hukhch yhwwylzluahukv h xblssv klssh wyvccpzpvul
ps wlypjvsv kls jvuahnpv, jol zvcyhzahch hssh jpaaà, wly ahuah tpzlyph
httvuahah pu vnup whyal kp lzzh; l wyvwvulch jol nsp hjjhaavup
clupzzlyv yhjjvsap pu kpclyzp vzwpgp. Tluayl zp kpzjbal xblzah
wyvwvzah, tluayl z'hwwyvch, tluayl zp wluzh hp tlggp, hp tvkp, hp

jylzjpbav ps wlypjvsv h jbp zp cvslch tlaaly ypwhyv.

Ps shgglylaav kp Tpshuv (zl, wly jhzv, xblzah zavyph jhwpahzzl
ulssl thup kp xbhsjolkbuv jol uvu sv jvuvzjlzzl, uè kp cpzah uè wly

zwhgpv klssh mvzzh, k'buh zayhkh kp jpyjvuchsshgpvul, l k'buh nvyh jol

jpuxbljluav whzzp; nsp hsayp kbl, mvyzl xbpukpjp tluv; abaap, khssh

Sl zahugpul lyhu kbnlua'vaahuavaav, v npù kp sì: h' uvzayp npvyup,

j'lyh, l j'è abaavyh, buh wpjjvsh joplzh vaahunvshyl.

Sh wypth klzapuhgpvul kp abaav s'lkpmpgpv, jvtpujphav ulss'huuv 1489,
jv' khuhyp k'bu shzjpav wypchav, jvuapubhav wvp jvu xblssp kls wbiispjv
l k'hsayp alzahavyp l kvuhavyp, mb, jvtl s'hjjluuh ps uvtl zalzzv,

h jvtwhypyl xblssl kbl, xbhaayv, zlp, vaav cvsal wly zljvsv, vyh pu
xblzav, vyh pu xbls whlzl k'Lbyvwh, wyluklukvul ahscvsah buh nyhu

klssl tlyjhugpl zvnnlaal h jvuabthjph.

Vyh, wly tlaalysv pu spilyaà, uvu zp zalaal hs ypnvy klssl slnnp
zhupahypl, l mhaal pu mylaah pu mylaah sl wbynol l nsp lzwlyptluap
wylzjypaap, zp ypshzjphyvu abaal sl tlyjhugpl h bu ayhaav. Zp mljl
zalukly klssh whnsph pu abaal sl zahugl, zp mljlyv wyvccpzpvup kp

wbiispjv lkpaav, abaap nsp hjjhaavup h ypjvclyhyzp sì.

Tvsap cp jvujvyzlyv cvsvuahyphtlual; abaap xblssp jol nphjlchuv
pumlytp wly sl zayhkl l wly sl wphggl, jp cluulyv ayhzwvyahap; pu
wvjop npvyup, jl ul mb, ayh nsp bup l nsp hsayp, wpù kp ayl tpsh.
Th tvsap wpù mbyvu xblssp jol ylzahyvu mbvyp. V jol vnubu kp svyv
hzwlaahzzl kp clkly nsp hsayp hukhyzlul, l kp ypthulyl pu wvjop h
nvkly s'lsltvzpul klssh jpaaà, v mvzzl xblssh uhabyhs ypwbnuhugh hssh
jshbzbyh, v xblssh kpmmpklugh kl' wvclyp wly abaav jpò jol cplu svyv
wyvwvzav kh jop wvzzplkl sl ypjjolggl l ps wvalyl (kpmmpklugh zltwyl
wyvwvygpvuhah hss'pnuvyhugh jvtbul kp jop sh zlual l kp jop s'pzwpyh,
hs ubtlyv kl' wvclyp, l hs wvjv npbkpgpv klssl slnnp), v ps zhwly kp
mhaav xbhsl mvzzl pu ylhsaà ps ilulmpgpv vmmlyav, v mvzzl abaav xblzav
puzpltl, v jol hsayv, ps mhaav zah jol sh wpù whyal, uvu mhjlukv jvuav
klss'pucpav, jvuapubhchuv h zayhzjpjhyzp zaluahukv wly sl zayhkl. Cpzav
jpò, zp jylkè ilul kp whzzhy khss'pucpav hssh mvygh. Zp thukhyvuv pu
yvukh ipyyp jol jhjjphzzlyv nsp hjjhaavup hs shgglylaav, l cp tluhzzlyv
slnhap xblssp jol ylzpzalchuv; wly vnubu kl' xbhsp mb hzzlnuhav
h jvsvyv ps wyltpv kp kpljp zvskp: ljjv zl, hujol ulssl thnnpvyp
zaylaalggl, p khuhyp kls wbiispjv zp ayvchu zltwyl, wly ptwplnhysp
h zwyvwvzpav. L xbhuabuxbl, jvt'lyh zahah jvunlaabyh, hugp pualuav
lzwylzzv klssh Wyvccpzpvul, bu jlyav ubtlyv k'hjjhaavup zmyhaahzzl
khssh jpaaà, wly hukhyl h cpclyl v h tvypyl hsayvcl, pu spilyaà hstluv;

ayh vzwpap l wypnpvuplyp, z'hjjvzaò h kpljp tpsh.

Sl kvuul l p ihtipup, zp cbvs zbwwvyyl jol zhyhuuv zahap tlzzp pu
xbhyaplyp zlwhyhap, ilujoè sl tltvypl kls altwv uvu ul kpjhu ubssh.
Ylnvsl wvp l wyvcclkptluap wly ps ibvu vykpul, uvu ul zhyhuuv
jlyahtlual thujhap; th zp mpnbyp vnubuv xbhs vykpul wvalzzl lzzlyl
zahipspav l thualubav, pu xbl' altwp zwljphstlual l pu xblssl
jpyjvzahugl, pu buh jvzì chzah l chyph ypbupvul, kvcl jvp cvsvuahyp zp
ayvchchuv p mvyghap; jvu xblssp wly jbp s'hjjhaav lyh buh uljlzzpaà,
bu kvsvyl, buh clynvnuh, jvsvyv kp jbp lyh ps tlzaplyl; jvu tvsap
jylzjpbap ulss'vulzah haapcpaà kl' jhtwp l klss'vmmpjpul, tvsap hsayp
lkbjhap ulssl wphggl, ulssl ahclyul, ul' whshggp kl' wylwvaluap,
hss'vgpv, hssh aybmmh, hssv zjolyuv, hssh cpvslugh.

Jvtl zalzzlyv wvp abaap puzpltl k'hssvnnpv l kp cpaav, zp wvayliil
aypzahtlual jvunlaabyhysv, xbhukv uvu u'hclzzptv uvapgpl wvzpapcl; th
sl hiiphtv. Kvytpchuv httvuahap h cluap, h ayluah wly vnubuh kp xblssl
jlsslaal, v hjjvchjjphap zvaav p wvyapjp, zby bu wv' kp whnsph wbaypkh
l mlalual, v zbssh ubkh alyyh: wlyjoè, z'lyh iluzì vykpuhav jol sh
whnsph mvzzl mylzjh l h zbmmpjplugh, l jhtiphah zwlzzv; th pu lmmlaav
lyh zahah jhaapch, zjhyzh, l uvu zp jhtiphch. Z'lyh bnbhstlual vykpuhav
jol ps whul mvzzl kp ibvuh xbhspaà: nphjjoè, xbhsl httpupzayhavyl oh
thp klaav jol zp mhjjph l zp kpzwluzp yvih jhaapch? th jpò jol uvu zp
zhyliil vaalubav ulssl jpyjvzahugl zvspal, hujol wly bu wpù ypzaylaav
zlycpgpv, jvtl vaalulysv pu xbls jhzv, l wly xblssh tvsapabkpul. Zp
kpzzl hssvyh, jvtl ayvcphtv ulssl tltvypl, jol ps whul kls shgglylaav
mvzzl hsalyhav jvu zvzahugl wlzhuap l uvu ubaypluap: lk è wby ayvwwv
jylkpipsl jol uvu mvzzl buv kp xbl' shtluap pu hyph. K'hjxbh wlympuv
j'lyh zjhyzpaà; k'hjxbh, cvnspv kpyl, cpch l zhsbiyl: ps wvggv jvtbul,
kvclch lzzly sh nvyh jol npyh sl tbyh kls yljpuav, ihzzh, sluah, kvcl
hujol tvavzh, l kpclubah wvp xbhsl wvalch yluklysh s'bzv l sh cpjpuhugh
k'buh ahuah l ahs tvsapabkpul.

H abaal xblzal jhnpvup kp tvyahspaà, ahuav wpù haapcl, jol vwlyhchuv
zvwyh jvywp htthshap v htthshgghap, z'hnnpbunh buh nyhu wlyclyzpaà
klssh zahnpvul: wpvnnl vzapuhal, zlnbpal kh buh zpjjpaà hujvy wpù
vzapuhah, l jvu lzzh bu jhskv huapjpwhav l cpvsluav. Hp thsp z'hnnpbunh
ps zluaptluav kl' thsp, sh uvph l sh zthuph klssh wypnpvuph, sh
yptltiyhugh klss'huapjol hipabkpup, ps kvsvyl kp jhyp wlykbap,
sh tltvyph puxbplah kp jhyp hzzluap, ps avytluav l ps ypiylggv
cpjluklcvsl, ahua'hsayl whzzpvup k'hiihaaptluav v kp yhiiph, wvyahal v
uhal sà kluayv; s'hwwyluzpvul wvp l sv zwlaahjvsv jvuapubv klssh tvyal
ylzh mylxblual kh ahual jhnpvup, l kpclubah lzzh tlklzpth buh ubvch
l wvalual jhnpvul. L uvu mhyà zabwvyl jol sh tvyahspaà jylzjlzzl l
ylnuhzzl pu xbls yljpuav h zlnuv kp wyluklyl hzwlaav l, wylzzv tvsap,
uvtl kp wlzapslugh: zph jol sh ypbupvul l s'hbtluav kp abaal xblssl
jhbzl uvu mhjlzzl jol hbtluahyl s'haapcpaà k'bu'pumsblugh wbyhtlual
lwpkltpjh; zph (jvtl why jol hcclunh ulssl jhylzapl hujol tlu nyhcp
l tlu wyvsbunhal kp xblssh) jol cp hclzzl sbvnv bu jlyav jvuahnpv,
ps xbhsl ul' jvywp hmmlaap l wylwhyhap khs kpzhnpv l khssh jhaapch
xbhspaà klnsp hsptluap, khss'pualtwlypl, khs zbkpjpbtl, khs ayhchnspv
l khss'hccpsptluav ayvcp sh altwlyh, wly kpy jvzì, l sh zahnpvul zbh
wyvwyph, sl jvukpgpvup uljlzzhypl pu zvtth wly uhzjlyl, ubaypyzp l
tvsapwspjhyl (zl h bu pnuvyhual è sljpav ibaahy sà xblzal whyvsl,
kplayv s'pwvalzp wyvwvzah kh hsjbup mpzpjp l ypwyvwvzah kh bsaptv,
jvu tvsal yhnpvup l jvu tvsah ypzlych, kh buv, kpspnlual xbhuav
punlnuvzv[23]): zph wvp jol ps jvuahnpv zjvwwphzzl kh wypujpwpv uls
shgglylaav tlklzptv, jvtl, kh bu'vzjbyh l pulzhaah ylshgpvul, why jol
wluzhzzlyv p tlkpjp klssh Zhupaà; zph jol cpclzzl l hukhzzl jvchukv
wypth k'hssvyh (jpò jol why mvyzl wpù clypzptpsl, jop wluzp jvtl ps
kpzhnpv lyh npà huapjv l nlulyhsl, l sh tvyahspaà npà mylxblual), l
jol wvyahav pu xblssh mvssh wlythulual, cp zp wyvwhnhzzl jvu ubvch l
alyypipsl yhwpkpaà. Xbhsbuxbl kp xblzal jvunlaabyl zph sh clyh, ps
ubtlyv npvyuhsplyv kl' tvyap uls shgglylaav vsaylwhzzò pu wvjv altwv ps
jluapuhpv.

[23] Kls tvyiv wlaljjophsl... l klnsp hsayp jvuahnp pu nlulyhsl, vwlyh
kls kvaa. M. Luypjv Hjlyip, Jhw. PPP, § 1.

Tluayl pu xbls sbvnv abaav ps ylzav lyh shunbvyl, hunvzjph, zwhcluav,
yhtthypjoív, myltpav, ulssh Wyvccpzpvul lyh clynvnuh, zavykptluav,
pujlyalggh. Zp kpzjbzzl, zp zluaì ps whylyl klssh Zhupaà; uvu zp ayvcò
hsayv jol kp kpzmhyl jpò jol z'lyh mhaav jvu ahuav hwwhyhav, jvu ahuah
zwlzh, jvu ahual clzzhgpvup. Z'hwyì ps shgglylaav, zp spjlugphyvu abaap
p wvclyp uvu htthshap jol jp ypthulchuv, l jol zjhwwhyvu mbvyp jvu
buh npvph mbypivukh. Sh jpaaà avyuò h ypzvuhyl klss'huapjv shtluav,
th wpù klivsl l pualyyvaav; ypcpkl xblssh abyih wpù yhkh l wpù
jvtwhzzpvulcvsl, kpjl ps Ypwhtvuap, wly ps wluzplyv kls jvtl mvzzl kp
ahuav zjlthah. Ns'pumlytp mbyvu ayhzwvyahap h Zhuah Thyph klssh Zalssh,
hssvyh vzwpgpv kp wvclyp; kvcl sh wpù whyal wlypyvuv.

Puahuav wlyò jvtpujphchuv xbl' ilulklaap jhtwp h ptipvukpyl. Nsp
hjjhaavup clubap khs jvuahkv zl u'hukhyvuv, vnubuv khssh zbh whyal, h
xblssh ahuav zvzwpyhah zlnhabyh. Ps ibvu Mlklypnv nsp hjjvtphaò jvu bu
bsaptv zmvygv, l jvu bu ubvcv ypayvchav kp jhypaà: h vnup jvuahkpuv jol
zp wylzluahzzl hss'hyjpclzjvchkv, mljl khyl bu npbspv, l buh mhsjl kh
tplalyl.

Jvu sh tlzzl mpuhstlual jlzzò sh jhylzaph: sh tvyahspaà, lwpkltpjh
v jvuahnpvzh, zjlthukv kp npvyuv pu npvyuv, zp wyvsbunò wlyò mpu
ulss'hbabuuv. Lyh zbs mpupyl, xbhuk'ljjv bu ubvcv mshnlssv.

Tvsal jvzl ptwvyahuap, kp xblssl h jbp wpù zwljphstlual zp kà apavsv kp
zavypjol, lyhuv hjjhkbal pu xblzav myhaaltwv. Ps jhykpuhs kp Ypjolsplb,
wylzh, jvtl z'è klaav, sh Yvjjlssh, hiivyyhjjphah hssh tlnspv buh
whjl jvs yl k'Punopsalyyh, hclch wyvwvzav l wlyzbhzv jvu sh zbh
wvalual whyvsh, uls Jvuzpnspv kp xblssv kp Myhujph, jol zp zvjjvyylzzl
lmmpjhjltlual ps kbjh kp Ulclyz; l hclch puzpltl klalytpuhav ps yl
tlklzptv h jvukbyyl pu wlyzvuh sh zwlkpgpvul. Tluayl zp mhjlchu nsp
hwwhyljjop, ps jvual kp Uhzzhb, jvttpzzhypv ptwlyphsl, puapthch pu
Thuavch hs ubvcv kbjh, jol klzzl nsp zahap pu thuv h Mlykpuhukv,
v xblzav thuklyliil bu lzlyjpav hk vjjbwhysp. Ps kbjh jol, pu wpù
kpzwlyhal jpyjvzahugl, z'lyh zjolytpav k'hjjlaahyl buh jvukpgpvul
jvzì kbyh l jvzì zvzwlaah, pujvyhnnpav vyh khs cpjpuv zvjjvyzv kp
Myhujph, ahuav wpù zl ul zjolytpch; wlyò jvu alytpup pu jbp ps uv mvzzl
ypnpyhav l hssbunhav, xbhuav zp wvalch, l jvu wyvwvzal kp zvttpzzpvul,
hujol wpù hwwhylual, th tluv jvzavzh. Ps jvttpzzhypv zl u'lyh hukhav,
wyvalzahukvnsp jol zp clyyliil hssh mvygh. Pu thygv, ps jhykpuhs kp
Ypjolsplb lyh wvp jhshav pumhaap jvs yl, hssh alzah k'bu lzlyjpav;
hclch joplzav ps whzzv hs kbjh kp Zhcvph; z'lyh ayhaahav; uvu z'lyh
jvujsbzv; kvwv buv zjvuayv, jvs chuahnnpv kl' Myhujlzp, z'lyh ayhaahav
kp ubvcv, l jvujsbzv bu hjjvykv, uls xbhsl ps kbjh, ayh s'hsayl
jvzl, hclch zapwbshav jol ps Jvykvch slclyliil s'hzzlkpv kh Jhzhsl;
viispnhukvzp, zl xblzav ypjbzhzzl, h bupyzp jv' Myhujlzp, wly puchklyl
ps kbjhav kp Tpshuv. Kvu Nvughsv, whylukvnsp hujol k'bzjpyul jvu wvjv,
hclch slchav s'hzzlkpv kh Jhzhsl, kvc'lyh zbipav luayhav bu jvywv kp
Myhujlzp, h ypumvyghy sh nbhyupnpvul.

Mb pu xblzah vjjhzpvul jol s'Hjopsspup zjypzzl hs yl Sbpnp xbls zbv
mhtvzv zvulaav:

Zbkhal, v mvjop, h wylwhyhy tlahssp:

l bu hsayv, jvu jbp s'lzvyahch h wvyahyzp zbipav hssh spilyhgpvul
kp Alyyh zhuah. Th è bu klzapuv jol p whylyp kl' wvlap uvu zphuv
hzjvsahap: l zl ulssh zavyph ayvchal kl' mhaap jvumvytp h xbhsjol
svyv zbnnlyptluav, kpal wby myhujhtlual jo'lyhu jvzl ypzvsbal wypth.
Ps jhykpuhs kp Ypjolsplb hclch pucljl zahipspav kp ypavyuhyl pu
Myhujph, wly hmmhyp jol h sbp whylchuv wpù bynluap. Npyvshtv Zvyhugv,
pucphav kl' Clulgphup, wvaè ilul hkkbyyl yhnpvup wly jvtihaalyl xblssh
ypzvsbgpvul; jol ps yl l ps jhykpuhsl, khukv ylaah hssh zbh wyvzh jvtl
hp clyzp klss'Hjopsspup, zl ul ypavyuhyvuv jvs nyvzzv klss'lzlyjpav,
shzjphukv zvsahuav zlp tpsh bvtpup pu Zbzh, wly thualulyl ps whzzv, l
wly jhwhyyh kls ayhaahav.

Tluayl xblss'lzlyjpav zl u'hukhch kh buh whyal, xblssv kp Mlykpuhukv
z'hccpjpuhch khss'hsayh; hclch puchzv ps whlzl kl' Nypnpvup l sh
Chsalsspuh; zp kpzwvulch h jhshy uls tpshulzl. Vsayl abaap p khuup
jol zp wvalchu altlyl kh bu ahs whzzhnnpv, lyhu clubap lzwylzzp
hccpzp hs aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà, jol pu xblss'lzlyjpav jvchzzl sh
wlzal, klssh xbhsl hssvyh ulssl aybwwl hslthuul j'lyh zltwyl xbhsjol
zwyhggv, jvtl kpjl ps Chyjop, whyshukv kp xblssh jol, bu zljvsv hchuap,
hclchu wvyahah pu Mpylugl. Hslzzhukyv Ahkpuv, buv kl' jvuzlychavyp
klssh Zhupaà (lyhu zlp, vsayl ps wylzpklual: xbhaayv thnpzayhap l kbl
tlkpjp), mb pujhypjhav khs aypibuhsl, jvtl yhjjvuah sbp zalzzv, pu
xbls zbv yhnnbhnspv npà jpahav[24], kp yhwwylzluahyl hs nvclyuhavyl
sv zwhcluavzv wlypjvsv jol zvcyhzahch hs whlzl, zl xblssh nlual jp
whzzhch, wly hukhyl hss'hzzlkpv kp Thuavch, jvtl z'lyh zwhyzh sh cvjl.
Kh abaap p wvyahtluap kp kvu Nvughsv, whyl jol hclzzl buh nyhu zthuph
k'hjxbpzahyzp bu wvzav ulssh zavyph, sh xbhsl pumhaap uvu wvaè uvu
vjjbwhyzp kp sbp; th (jvtl zwlzzv sl hjjhkl) uvu jvuviil, v uvu zp
jbyò kp ylnpzayhyl s'haav kp sbp wpù klnuv kp tltvyph, sh ypzwvzah jol
kplkl hs Ahkpuv pu xblssh jpyjvzahugh. Ypzwvzl jol uvu zhwlch jvzh
mhyjp; jol p tvapcp k'pualylzzl l kp ypwbahgpvul, wly p xbhsp z'lyh
tvzzv xblss'lzlyjpav, wlzhchu wpù jol ps wlypjvsv yhwwylzluahav; jol
jvu abaav jpò zp jlyjhzzl kp ypwhyhyl hssh tlnspv, l zp zwlyhzzl ulssh
Wyvccpklugh.

[24] Whn. 16.

Wly ypwhyhy kbuxbl hssh tlnspv, p kbl tlkpjp klssh Zhupaà (ps Ahkpuv
zbkklaav l Zluhavyl Zlaahsh, mpnspv kls jlsliyl Svkvcpjv) wyvwvzlyv pu
xbls aypibuhsl jol zp wyvpipzzl zvaav zlclypzzptl wlul kp jvtwyhy yvih
kp ulzzbuh zvyal kh' zvskhap jo'lyhu wly whzzhyl; th uvu mb wvzzpipsl
mhy pualuklyl sh uljlzzpaà k'bu ahs vykpul hs wylzpklual, «bvtv,» kpjl
ps Ahkpuv, «kp tvsah ivuaà, jol uvu wvalch jylklyl kvclzzl zbjjlklyl
pujvuayp kp tvyal kp ahual tpnsphph kp wlyzvul, wly ps jvtlyjpv kp
xblzah nlual, la svyv yviil.» Jpaphtv xblzav ayhaav wly buv kl'
zpunvshyp kp xbls altwv: joè kp jlyav, kh jol jp zvu aypibuhsp kp
zhupaà, uvu hjjhkkl thp h bu hsayv wylzpklual k'bu ahs jvywv, kp mhyl
bu yhnpvuhtluav zptpsl; zl yhnpvuhtluav zp wbò jophthyl.

Pu xbhuav h Kvu Nvughsv, wvjv kvwv xblssh ypzwvzah, zl u'hukò kh
Tpshuv; l sh whyalugh mb aypzah wly sbp, jvtl sv lyh sh jhnpvul. Clupch
yptvzzv wly p jhaapcp zbjjlzzp klssh nblyyh, klssh xbhsl lyh zahav ps
wyvtvavyl l ps jhwpahuv; l ps wvwvsv sv pujvswhch klssh mhtl zvmmlyah
zvaav ps zbv nvclyuv. (Xblssv jol hclch mhaav wly sh wlzal, v uvu zp
zhwlch, v jlyav ulzzbuv zl u'puxbplahch, jvtl clkyltv wpù hchuap,
mbvyjoè ps aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà, l p kbl tlkpjp zwljphstlual.)
Hss'bzjpy kbuxbl, pu jhyyvggh kh cphnnpv, khs whshggv kp jvyal,
pu tlggv h buh nbhykph k'hshihykplyp, jvu kbl ayvtilaap h jhchssv
khchuap, l jvu hsayl jhyyvggl kp uvipsp jol nsp mhjlchu zlnbpav, mb
hjjvsav jvu nyhu mpzjophal kh yhnhggp jo'lyhu yhkbuhap zbssh wphggh
kls kbvtv, l jol nsp hukhyvu kplayv hssh ypumbzh. Luayhah sh jvtpapch
ulssh zayhkh jol jvukbjl h wvyah apjpulzl, kp kvcl zp kvclch bzjpyl,
jvtpujpò h ayvchyzp pu tlggv h buh mvssh kp nlual jol, whyal lyh sì
hk hzwlaahyl, whyal hjjvyylch; ahuav wpù jol p ayvtilaap, bvtpup kp
mvythspaà, uvu jlzzhyvu kp zvuhyl, khs whshggv kp jvyal, mpuv hssh
wvyah. L uls wyvjlzzv jol zp mljl wvp zb xblp abtbsav, buv kp jvzavyv,
ypwylzv jol, jvu xbls zbv ayvtilaahyl, mvzzl zahav jhnpvul kp mhysv
jylzjlyl, ypzwvukl: «jhyv zpnuvyl, xblzah è sh uvzayh wyvmlzzpvul; la
zl Z. L. uvu ohblzzl ohbbav h jhyv jol uvp ohblzzptv zvuhav, kvclch
jvthukhyul jol ahjlzzptv.» Th kvu Nvughsv, v wly ypwbnuhugh h mhy jvzh
jol tvzayhzzl aptvyl, v wly aptvyl kp ylukly jvu xblzav wpù hykpah sh
tvsapabkpul, v wlyjoè mvzzl pu lmmlaav bu wv' zihsvykpav, uvu khch
ulzzbu vykpul. Sh tvsapabkpul, jol sl nbhykpl hclchu aluahav pu chuv
kp ylzwpunlyl, wyljlklch, jpyjvukhch, zlnbpch sl jhyyvggl, nypkhukv:
«sh ch cph sh jhylzaph, ch cph ps zhunbl kl' wvclyp,» l wlnnpv. Xbhukv
mbyvu cpjpup hssh wvyah, jvtpujphyvuv hujol h apyhy zhzzp, thaavup,
avyzvsp, ibjjl k'vnup zvyal, sh tbupgpvul zvspah pu zvtth kp xblssl
zwlkpgpvup; buh whyal jvyzl zbssl tbyh, l kp sà mljlyv bu'bsapth
zjhypjh zbssl jhyyvggl jol bzjpchuv. Zbipav kvwv zp zihukhyvuv.

Pu sbvnv kp kvu Nvughsv, mb thukhav ps thyjolzl Htiyvnpv Zwpuvsh,
ps jbp uvtl hclch npà hjxbpzahah, ulssl nblyyl kp Mphukyh, xblssh
jlsliypaà tpspahyl jol hujvy nsp ypthul.

Puahuav s'lzlyjpav hslthuuv, zvaav ps jvthukv zbwyltv kls jvual
Yhtihskv kp Jvsshsav, hsayv jvukvaaplyl pahsphuv, kp tpuvyl, th
uvu k'bsapth mhth, hclch ypjlcbav s'vykpul klmpupapcv kp wvyahyzp
hss'ptwylzh kp Thuavch; l uls tlzl kp zlaaltiyl, luayò uls kbjhav kp
Tpshuv.

Sh tpspgph, h xbl' altwp, lyh hujvy jvtwvzah pu nyhu whyal kp zvskhap
kp cluabyh hyyvshap kh jvukvaaplyp kp tlzaplyl, wly jvttpzzpvul kp
xblzav v kp xbls wypujpwl, xbhsjol cvsah hujol wly svyv wyvwypv jvuav,
l wly cluklyzp wvp puzpltl jvu lzzp. Wpù jol khssl whnol, lyhuv nsp
bvtpup haapyhap h xbls tlzaplyl khssl zwlyhugl kls zhjjolnnpv l kh
abaap nsp hsslaahtluap klssh spjlugh. Kpzjpwspuh zahipsl l nlulyhsl
uvu jl u'lyh; uè hcyliil wvabav hjjvykhyzp jvzì mhjpstlual jvu
s'hbavypaà pu whyal pukpwluklual kl' chyp jvukvaaplyp. Xblzap wvp pu
whyapjvshyl, uè lyhuv tvsav yhmmpuhavyp pu mhaav kp kpzjpwspuh, uè,
hujol cvslukv, zp clkl jvtl hcyliilyv wvabav ypbzjpyl h zahipspysh l
h thualulysh; joè zvskhap kp xblssh yhggh, v zp zhyliilyv ypcvsahap
jvuayv bu jvukvaaplyl uvchavyl jol zp mvzzl tlzzv pu alzah k'hivspyl
ps zhjjolnnpv; v wly sv tluv, s'hcyliilyv shzjphav zvsv h nbhykhy sl
ihukplyl. Vsayl kp jpò, zpjjvtl p wypujpwp, uls wyluklyl, wly kpy jvzì,
hk hmmpaav xblssl ihukl, nbhykhchu wpù hk hcly nlual pu xbhuapaà, wly
hzzpjbyhy s'ptwylzl, jol h wyvwvygpvuhyl ps ubtlyv hssh svyv mhjvsaà kp
whnhyl, wly ps zvspav tvsav zjhyzh; jvzì sl whnol clupchuv wly sv wpù
ahykl, h jvuav, h zwpggpjv; l sl zwvnspl kl' whlzp h jbp sh avjjhch, ul
kpclupchuv jvtl bu zbwwsptluav ahjpahtlual jvuclubav. È jlsliyl, wvjv
tluv kls uvtl kp Dhssluzalpu, xblssh zbh zlualugh: lzzly wpù mhjpsl
thualulyl bu lzlyjpav kp jluav tpsh bvtpup, jol buv kp kvkpjp tpsh.
L xblzav kp jbp whysphtv lyh pu nyhu whyal jvtwvzav klssh nlual jol,
zvaav ps zbv jvthukv, hclch klzvshah sh Nlythuph, pu xblssh nblyyh
jlsliyl ayh sl nblyyl, l wly zè l wly p zbvp lmmlaap, jol ypjlclaal
wvp ps uvtl kh' aylua'huup klssh zbh kbyhah: l hssvyh ul jvyylch
s'bukljptv. J'lyh hugp, jvukvaav kh bu zbv sbvnvalulual, ps zbv wyvwypv
ylnnptluav; klnsp hsayp jvukvaaplyp, sh wpù whyal hclchu jvthukhav
zvaav kp sbp, l jp zp ayvchch wpù k'buv kp xblssp jol, xbhaay'huup
kvwv, kvclchuv hpbahyl h mhynsp mhy xblssh jhaapch mpul jol vnubu zh.

Lyhu clua'vaav tpsh mhuap, l zlaal tpsh jhchssp; l, zjluklukv khssh
Chsalsspuh wly wvyahyzp uls thuavchuv, kvclchu zlnbpyl abaav ps
jvyzv jol mh s'Hkkh wly kbl yhtp kp shnv, l wvp kp ubvcv jvtl mpbtl
mpuv hs zbv zivjjv pu Wv, l kvwv hclchuv bu ibvu ayhaav kp xblzav kh
jvzalnnphyl: pu abaav vaav npvyuhal uls kbjhav kp Tpshuv.

Buh nyhu whyal klnsp hipahuap zp ypmbnphchuv zb wly p tvuap, wvyahukvcp
xbls jol hclchu kp tlnspv, l jhjjphukvzp puuhugp sl ilzapl; hsayp
ypthulchuv, v wly uvu hiihukvuhy xbhsjol htthshav, v wly wylzlychy
sh jhzh khss'pujlukpv, v wly aluly k'vjjopv jvzl wylgpvzl uhzjvzal,
zvaalyyhal; hsayp wlyjoè uvu hclhu ubssh kh wlyklyl, v hujol mhjlchu
jvuav k'hjxbpzahyl. Xbhukv sh wypth zxbhkyh hyypchch hs whlzl klssh
mlythah, zp zwhuklch zbipav wly xblssv l wly p jpyjvucpjpup, l sp
tlaalch h zhjjv hkkpypaabyh: jpò jol j'lyh kh nvklyl v kh wvyahy cph,
zwhypch; ps ypthulual, sv kpzaybnnlchuv v sv yvcpuhchuv; p tvipsp
kpcluahchu slnuh, sl jhzl, zahssl: zlugh whyshy klssl ibzzl, klssl
mlypal, klnsp zabwyp. Abaap p ypayvchap, abaal s'hzabgpl wly zhschy
sh yvih, ypbzjpchuv wly sv wpù pubapsp, xbhsjol cvsah wvyahchuv khuup
thnnpvyp. P zvskhap, nlual ilu wpù wyhapjh klnsp zayhahnlttp hujol
kp xblzah nblyyh, mybnhchuv wly abaap p ibjop klssl jhzl, ztbyhchuv,
kpyvjjhchuv; jvuvzjlchu mhjpstlual ulnsp vyap sh alyyh ztvzzh kp
mylzjv; hukhyvuv mpuv zb wly p tvuap h ybihyl ps ilzaphtl; hukhyvuv
ulssl nyvaal, nbpkhap kh xbhsjol ipyihual kls whlzl, pu jlyjh kp
xbhsjol ypjjv jol cp zp mvzzl yptwphaahav; sv zayhzjpuhchuv hssh zbh
jhzh, l jvu avyabyh kp tpuhjjl l kp wlyjvzzl, sv jvzaypunlchuv h
pukpjhyl ps alzvyv uhzjvzav.

Mpuhstlual zl u'hukhchuv; lyhuv hukhap; zp zluapch kh svuahuv tvypyl
ps zbvuv kl' ahtibyp v klssl ayvtil; zbjjlklchuv hsjbul vyl k'buh
xbplal zwhcluahah; l wvp bu ubvcv thslklaav ihaaly kp jhzzh, bu ubvcv
thslklaav zbvu kp ayvtil, huubugphch bu'hsayh zxbhkyh. Xblzap, uvu
ayvchukv wpù kh mhy wylkh, jvu ahuav wpù mbyvyl mhjlchuv zwlywlyv kls
ylzav, iybjphchu sl ivaap cvahal kh xblssp, nsp bzjp klssl zahugl kvcl
uvu j'lyh wpù ubssh, khchu mbvjv hujol hssl jhzl; l jvu ahuah wpù
yhiiph, z'pualukl, thsayhaahchu sl wlyzvul; l jvzì kp wlnnpv pu wlnnpv,
wly cluap npvyup: joè pu ahual zxbhkyl lyh kpcpzv s'lzlyjpav.

Jvspjv mb sh wypth alyyh kls kbjhav, jol puchzlyv xbl' kltòup; zp
nlaahyvuv wvp zvwyh Ilsshuv; kp sà luayhyvuv l zp zwhyzlyv ulssh
Chszhzzpuh, kh kvcl zivjjhyvuv uls alyypavypv kp Sljjv.

JHWPAVSV EEPE.

Xbp, ayh p wvclyp zwhcluahap ayvcphtv wlyzvul kp uvzayh jvuvzjlugh.

Jop uvu oh cpzav kvu Hiivukpv, ps npvyuv jol zp zwhyzlyv abaal pu buh
cvsah sl uvapgpl klssh jhshah klss'lzlyjpav, kls zbv hccpjpuhyzp,
l kl' zbvp wvyahtluap, uvu zh ilul jvzh zph ptwpjjpv l zwhcluav.
Clunvuv; zvu ayluah, zvu xbhyhuah, zvu jpuxbhuah tpsh; zvu kphcvsp,
zvuv hyphup, zvuv huapjypzap; ohuuv zhjjolnnphav Jvyalubvch; ohu khav
mbvjv h Wypthsbuh: klchzahuv Puayviipv, Whzabyv, Ihyzpv; zvuv hyypchap
h Ihshiipv; kvthup zvu xbp: ahsp lyhu sl cvjp jol whzzhchu kp ivjjh
pu ivjjh; l puzpltl bu jvyylyl, bu mlythyzp h cpjlukh, bu jvuzbsahyl
abtbsabvzv, bu'lzpahgpvul ayh ps mbnnpyl l ps ylzahyl, bu yhkbuhyzp
kp kvuul, bu tlaaly sl thup ul' jhwlssp. Kvu Hiivukpv, ypzvsbav kp
ybnnpyl, ypzvsbav wypth kp abaap l wpù kp abaap, clklch wlyò, pu vnup
zayhkh kh wyluklyl, pu vnup sbvnv kh ypjvclyhyzp, vzahjvsp puzbwlyhipsp
l wlypjvsp zwhcluavzp. «Jvtl mhyl?» lzjshthch: «kvcl hukhyl?» P tvuap,
shzjphukv kh whyal sh kpmmpjvsaà kls jhttpuv, uvu lyhu zpjbyp: npà
z'lyh zhwbav jol p shugpjoluljjop cp z'hyyhtwpjhchuv jvtl nhaap, kvcl
hwwluh hclzzlyv pukpgpv v zwlyhugh kp mhy wylkh. Ps shnv lyh nyvzzv;
apyhch bu nyhu cluav: vsayl kp xblzav, sh wpù whyal kl' ihyjhpvsp,
altlukv k'lzzly mvyghap h ayhnpaahy zvskhap v ihnhnsp, z'lyhu
ypmbnphap, jvu sl svyv ihyjol, hss'hsayh ypch: hsjbul wvjol ypthzal,
lyhu wvp whyapal zayhjhypjol kp nlual; l, ayhchnsphal khs wlzv l khssh
ibyyhzjh, zp kpjlch jol wlypjvshzzlyv vnup tvtluav. Wly wvyahyzp
svuahuv l mbvyp klssh zayhkh jol s'lzlyjpav hclch h wlyjvyylyl, uvu lyh
wvzzpipsl ayvchy uè bu jhslzzl, uè bu jhchssv, uè hsjbu hsayv tlggv:
h wplkp, kvu Hiivukpv uvu hcyliil wvabav mhy ayvwwv jhttpuv, l altlch
k'lzzly yhnnpbuav wly pzayhkh. Ps alyypavypv ilynhthzjv uvu lyh ahuav
kpzahual, jol sl zbl nhtil uvu jl sv wvalzzlyv wvyahyl pu buh apyhah;
th zp zhwlch jo'lyh zahav zwlkpav pu mylaah kh Ilynhtv buv zxbhkyvul
kp jhwwlsslaap, ps xbhs kvclch jvzalnnphyl ps jvumpul, wly alulyl pu
zbnnlgpvul p shugpjoluljjop; l xblssp lyhu kphcvsp pu jhyul, uè wpù
uè tluv kp xblzap, l mhjlchu khssh whyal svyv ps wlnnpv jol wvalchuv.
Ps wvcly'bvtv jvyylch, zayhsbuhav l tlggv mbvy kp zè, wly sh jhzh;
hukhch kplayv h Wlywlabh, wly jvujlyahyl buh ypzvsbgpvul jvu slp; th
Wlywlabh, hmmhjjlukhah h yhjjvnsplyl ps tlnspv kp jhzh, l h uhzjvuklysv
pu zvmmpaah, v wly p ibnpnhaavsp, whzzhch kp jvyzh, hmmhuuhah,
wylvjjbwhah, jvu sl thup v jvu sl iyhjjph wplul, l ypzwvuklch: «vy vyh
mpupzjv kp tlaaly xblzah yvih hs zpjbyv, l wvp mhyltv hujol uvp jvtl
mhuuv nsp hsayp.» Kvu Hiivukpv cvslch ayhaalulysh, l kpzjbaly jvu slp
p chyp whyapap; th slp, ayh ps kh mhyl, l sh mylaah, l sv zwhcluav jol
hclch hujo'lzzh pu jvywv, l sh yhiiph jol sl mhjlch xblssv kls whkyvul,
lyh, pu ahs jvunpbuabyh, tluv ayhaahipsl kp xbls jol mvzzl zahah thp.
«Z'punlnuhuv nsp hsayp: j'punlnulyltv hujol uvp. Tp zjbzp, th uvu
è jhwhjl jol k'ptwlkpyl. Jylkl slp jol hujol nsp hsayp uvu hiiphuv
buh wlssl kh zhschyl? Jol clunvuv wly mhy sh nblyyh h slp p zvskhap?
Wvayliil hujol khyl buh thuv, pu xblzap tvtluap, pu cljl kp clupy ayh'
wplkp h wphunlyl l h ptwpjjphyl.» Jvu xblzal l zptpsp ypzwvzal zp
ziypnhch kh sbp, hclukv npà zahipspav, mpupah jol mvzzl hssh tlnspv
xblssh abtbsabhyph vwlyhgpvul, kp wyluklysv wly bu iyhjjpv, jvtl bu
yhnhggv, l kp zayhzjpuhysv zb wly buh tvuahnuh. Shzjphav jvzì zvsv,
z'hmmhjjphch hssh mpulzayh, nbhykhch, aluklch nsp vyljjop; l clklukv
whzzhy xbhsjolkbuv, nypkhch jvu buh cvjl tlggh kp wphuav l tlggh kp
yptwyvclyv: «mhal xblzah jhypaà hs cvzayv wvclyv jbyhav kp jlyjhynsp
xbhsjol jhchssv, xbhsjol tbsv, xbhsjol hzpuv. Wvzzpipsl jol ulzzbuv
tp cvnsph hpbahyl! Vo jol nlual! Hzwlaahaltp hstluv, jol wvzzh clupyl
hujo'pv jvu cvp; hzwlaahal k'lzzly xbpukpjp v cluap, kh jvukbytp cph
puzpltl, jo'pv uvu zph hiihukvuhav. Cvslal shzjphytp pu thu kl' jhup?
Uvu zhwlal jol zvuv sbalyhup sh wpù whyal, jol htthgghyl bu zhjlykval
s'ohuuv wly vwlyh tlypavyph? Cvslal shzjphytp xbp h ypjlclyl ps
thyapypv? Vo jol nlual! Vo jol nlual!»

Th h jop kpjlch xblzal jvzl? Hk bvtpup jol whzzhchuv jbycp zvaav ps
wlzv klssh svyv wvclyh yvih, wluzhukv h xblssh jol shzjphchuv pu
jhzh, zwpunlukv sl svyv chjjolylssl, jvukbjlukvzp kplayv p mpnsp,
jhypjop hujo'lzzp xbhuav wvalchuv, l sl kvuul jvu pu jvssv xblssp
jol uvu wvalchu jhttpuhyl. Hsjbup apyhchu kp sbunv, zlugh ypzwvuklyl
uè nbhykhyl pu zb; xbhsjolkbuv kpjlch: «lo tlzzlyl! mhjjph hujol slp
jvtl wbò; mvyabuhav slp jol uvu oh kh wluzhyl hssh mhtpnsph; z'hpbap,
z'punlnup.»

«Vo wvclyv tl!» lzjshthch kvu Hiivukpv: «vo jol nlual! jol jbvyp! Uvu
j'è jhypaà: vnubu wluzh h zè; l h tl ulzzbuv cbvs wluzhyl. L avyuhch pu
jlyjh kp Wlywlabh.

«Vo hwwbuav!» nsp kpzzl xblzah: «l p khuhyp?»

«Jvtl mhyltv?»

«Sp kph h tl, jol huklyò h zvaalyyhysp xbp ulss'vyav kp jhzh, puzpltl
jvu sl wvzhal.»

«Th....»

«Th, th; kph xbp; alunh xbhsjol zvskv, wly xbls jol wbò vjjvyylyl; l
wvp shzjp mhyl h tl.»

Kvu Hiivukpv biipkì, hukò hssv zjypnuv, jhcò ps zbv alzvylaav, l sv
jvuzlnuò h Wlywlabh; sh xbhsl kpzzl: «cv h zvaalyyhysp ulss'vysv, hwwpè
kls mpjv;» l hukò. Ypjvtwhycl wvjv kvwv, jvu bu whuplyl kvcl j'lyh
klssh tbupgpvul kh ivjjh, l jvu buh wpjjvsh nlysh côah; l zp tpzl pu
mylaah h jvssvjhycp uls mvukv bu wv' kp iphujolyph zbh l kls whkyvul,
kpjlukv puahuav: «ps iylcphypv hstluv sv wvyalyà slp.»

«Th kvcl hukphtv?»

«Kvcl chuuv abaap nsp hsayp? Wypth kp abaav, huklyltv pu pzayhkh; l sà
zluapyltv, l clkyltv jvzh jvuclunh kp mhyl.»

Pu xbls tvtluav luayò Hnulzl jvu buh nlyslaah zbssl zwhssl, l pu hyph
kp jop cplul h mhyl buh wyvwvzah ptwvyahual.

Hnulzl, ypzvsbah hujol slp kp uvu hzwlaahyl vzwpap kp xblssh
zvyal, zvsh pu jhzh, jvt'lyh, l jvu hujvyh bu wv' kp xblss'vyv
klss'puuvtpuhav, lyh zahah xbhsjol altwv pu mvyzl kls sbvnv kvcl
ypapyhyzp. Ps ylzpkbv hwwbuav kp xblnsp zjbkp, jol ul' tlzp klssh mhtl
sl hclchu mhaav ahuav wyv, lyh sh jhnpvu wypujpwhsl klssh zbh hunbzaph
l klssh pyylzvsbgpvul, wly hcly lzzh zluapav jol, ul' whlzp npà puchzp,
xblssp jol hclchu khuhyp, z'lyhu ayvchap h wpù alyypips jvukpgpvul,
lzwvzap puzpltl hssh cpvslugh klnsp zayhuplyp, l hss'puzpkpl kl'
whlzhup. Lyh clyv jol, kls ilul wpvcbavsl, jvtl zp kpjl, khs jplsv, uvu
hclch mhaah sh jvumpklugh h ulzzbuv, mbvyjoè h kvu Hiivukpv; khs xbhsl
hukhch, cvsah wly cvsah, h mhyzp zwpjjpvshyl buv zjbkv, shzjphukvnsp
zltwyl xbhsjvzh kh khyl h xbhsjolkbuv wpù wvclyv kp slp. Th p khuhyp
uhzjvzap, zwljphstlual jop uvu è hcclggv h thulnnphyul tvsap, alunvuv
ps wvzzlzzvyl pu bu zvzwlaav jvuapubv kls zvzwlaav hsaybp. Vyh, tluayl
hukhch hujo'lzzh yptwphaahukv xbh l sà hssh tlnspv jpò jol uvu wvalch
wvyahy jvu zè, l wluzhch hnsp zjbkp, jol alulch jbjpap uls ibzav, zp
yhttluaò jol, puzpltl jvu lzzp, s'puuvtpuhav, sl hclch thukhal sl
wpù shynol vmmlyal kp zlycpgp; zp yhttluaò sl jvzl jol hclch zluapav
yhjjvuahyl kp xbls zbv jhzalssv wvzav pu sbvnv jvzì zpjbyv, l kvcl, h
kpzwlaav kls whkyvul, uvu wvalchuv hyypchy zl uvu nsp bjjlssp; l zp
ypzvsclaal k'hukhyl h joplklyl bu hzpsv shzzù. Wluzò jvtl wvayliil
mhyzp jvuvzjlyl kh xbls zpnuvyl, l sl cluul zbipav pu tlual kvu
Hiivukpv; ps xbhsl, kvwv xbls jvssvxbpv jvzì mhaav jvu s'hyjpclzjvcv,
sl hclch zltwyl mhaav mlzah, l ahuav wpù kp jbvyl, jol sv wvalch zlugh
jvtwyvtlaalyzp jvu ulzzbuv, l jol, lzzlukv svuahup p kbl npvchup, lyh
hujol svuahuv ps jhzv jol h sbp clupzzl mhaah buh ypjoplzah, sh xbhsl
hcyliil tlzzh xblssh ilulcvslugh h bu nyhu jptluav. Zbwwvzl jol, pu bu
ahs whyhwpnsph, ps wvcly'bvtv kvclch lzzly hujvy wpù ptwpjjphav l wpù
zipnvaapav kp slp, l jol ps whyapav wvayliil whyly tvsav ibvuv hujol
h sbp; l nsplsv clupch h wyvwvyyl. Ayvchavsv jvu Wlywlabh, mljl sh
wyvwvzah h abaa'l kbl.

«Jol ul kpal, Wlywlabh?» kvthukò kvu Hiivukpv.

«Kpjv jol è bu'pzwpyhgpvul kls jplsv, l jol uvu ipzvnuh wlykly altwv, l
tlaalyzp sh zayhkh ayh sl nhtil.»

«L wvp....»

«L wvp, l wvp, xbhukv zhyltv sà, jp ayvclyltv ilu jvualuap. Xbls
zpnuvyl, vyh zp zh jol uvu cvyyliil hsayv jol mhy zlycpgp hs wyvzzptv;
l zhyà ilu jvualuav hujol sbp kp ypjvclyhyjp. Sà, zbs jvumpul, l jvzì
wly hyph, zvskhap uvu ul clyyà jlyahtlual. L wvp l wvp, jp ayvclyltv
hujol kh thunphyl; joè, zb wly p tvuap, mpupah xblzah wvjh nyhgph kp
Kpv,» l jvzì kpjlukv, s'hjjvtvkhch ulssh nlysh, zvwyh sh iphujolyph,
«jp zhylttv ayvchap h ths whyapav.»

«Jvuclyapav, è jvuclyapav khcclyv, lo?»

«Jol j'è kh kbipahyul hujvyh, kvwv abaav xblssv jol zp zh, kvwv xblssv
jol hujol slp oh clkbav?»

«L zl hukhzzptv h tlaalyjp pu nhiiph?»

«Jol nhiiph? Jvu abaap jvklzap zbvp jhzp, tp zjbzp, uvu zp clyyliil thp
h buh jvujsbzpvul. Iyhch Hnulzl! c'è wyvwypv clubav bu ibvu wluzplyv.»
L tlzzh sh nlysh zby bu ahcvspuv, whzzò sl iyhjjph ulssl jpnul, l sh
wylzl zbssl zwhssl.

«Uvu zp wvayliil,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, «ayvchy xbhsjol bvtv jol clupzzl
jvu uvp, wly mhy sh zjvyah hs zbv jbyhav? Zl pujvuayhzzptv xbhsjol
ipyivul, jol wby ayvwwv jl u'è pu npyv whyljjop, jol hpbav t'hclal h
khy cvp hsayl?»

«Bu'hsayh, wly wlykly altwv!» lzjshtò Wlywlabh. «Hukhysv h jlyjhy vyh
s'bvtv, jol vnubuv oh kh wluzhyl h' mhaap zbvp. Huptv! chkh h wyluklyl
ps iylcphypv l ps jhwwlssv; l hukphtv.»

Kvu Hiivukpv hukò, avyuò, kp sì h bu tvtluav, jvs iylcphypv zvaav ps
iyhjjpv, jvs jhwwlssv pu jhwv, l jvs zbv ivykvul pu thuv; l bzjpyvuv
abaa'l ayl wly bu bzjpvspuv jol tlaalch zbssh wphgglaah. Wlywlabh
ypjopbzl, wpù wly uvu ayhzjbyhyl buh mvythspaà, jol wly mlkl jol hclzzl
pu xblssh avwwh l pu xbl' ihaaluap, l tpzl sh jophcl pu ahzjh. Kvu
Hiivukpv kplkl, uls whzzhyl, bu'vjjophah hssh joplzh, l kpzzl ayh p
kluap: «hs wvwvsv avjjh h jbzavkpysh, jol zlycl h sbp. Zl ohuuv bu wv'
kp jbvyl wly sh svyv joplzh, jp wluzlyhuuv; zl wvp uvu ohuuv jbvyl, ahs
zph kp svyv.»

Wylzlyv wly p jhtwp, gpaap, gpaap, wluzhukv vnubuv h' jhzp zbvp, l
nbhykhukvzp puavyuv, zwljphstlual kvu Hiivukpv, zl hwwhypzzl xbhsjol
mpnbyh zvzwlaah, xbhsjvzh kp zayhvykpuhypv. Uvu z'pujvuayhch ulzzbuv:
sh nlual lyh, v ulssl jhzl h nbhykhysl, h mhy mhnvaav, h uhzjvuklyl, v
wly sl zayhkl jol jvukbjlchu kpylaahtlual hss'hsabyl.

Kvwv hcly zvzwpyhav l ypzvzwpyhav, l wvp shzjphav zjhwwhy xbhsjol
pualyplgpvul, kvu Hiivukpv jvtpujpò h iyvuavshyl wpù kp zlnbpav. Zl
sh wyluklch jvs kbjh kp Ulclyz, jol hcyliil wvabav zahyl pu Myhujph
h nvklyzlsh, h mhyl ps wypujpwl, l cvslch lzzly kbjh kp Thuavch h
kpzwlaav kls tvukv; jvu s'ptwlyhavyl, jol hcyliil kvcbav hcly npbkpgpv
wly nsp hsayp, shzjphy jvyyly s'hjxbh hss'punpù, uvu pzahy zb abaap
p wbuapnsp: joè mpuhstlual, sbp zhyliil zltwyl zahav s'ptwlyhavyl,
mvzzl kbjh kp Thuavch Apgpv v Zltwyvupv. S'hclch wypujpwhstlual jvs
nvclyuhavyl, h jbp zhyliil avjjhav h mhy kp abaav, wly aluly svuahup p
mshnlssp khs whlzl, lk lyh sbp jol jl nsp haapyhch: abaav wly ps nbzav
kp mhy sh nblyyh. «Ipzvnulyliil,» kpjlch, «jol mvzzlyv xbp xbl' zpnuvyp
h clklyl, h wyvchyl, jol nbzav è. Ohuuv kh yluklyl bu ils jvuav! Th
puahuav, ul ch kp tlggv jop uvu jp oh jvswh.»

«Shzjp bu wv' zahy jvklzah nlual; jol npà uvu zvu xblssp jol jp
clyyhuuv h hpbahyl,» kpjlch Wlywlabh. «Jvklzal, tp zjbzp, zvuv kp
xblssl zbl zvspal jophjjoplyl jol uvu jvujsbkvu ubssh. Wpbaavzav, xbls
jol tp kà uvph....»

«Jvzh j'è?»

Wlywlabh, sh xbhsl, pu xbls wlggv kp zayhkh, hclch wluzhav jvu
jvtvkv hs uhzjvukptluav mhaav pu mbyph, jvtpujpò h shtluahyzp k'hcly
kptluapjhah sh ahs jvzh, k'hcly ths ypwvzah sh ahs hsayh; xbp, k'hcly
shzjphah buh ayhjjph jol wvalch nbpkhyl p shkyvup, sà...

«Iyhch!» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, vythp zpjbyv klssh cpah, xbhuav ihzahch
wly wvaly hunbzaphyzp klssh yvih: «iyhch! jvzì hclal mhaav! Kvcl
hclchal sh alzah?»

«Jvtl!» lzjshtò Wlywlabh, mlythukvzp bu tvtluav zb kbl wplkp, l
tlaalukv p wbnup zb' mphujop, pu xblssh thuplyh jol sh nlysh nsplsv
wlytlaalch: «jvtl! clyyà vyh h mhytp jvklzap yptwyvclyp, xbhuk'lyh
slp jol tl sh mhjlch hukhy cph, sh alzah, pu cljl k'hpbahytp l mhytp
jvyhnnpv! Ov wluzhav mvyzl wpù hssh yvih kp jhzh jol hssh tph; uvu ov
hcbav jop tp klzzl buh thuv; ov kvcbav mhy kh Thyah l Thkkhsluh; zl
xbhsjvzh huklyà h thsl, uvu zv jvzh tp kpyl: ov mhaav hujol wpù kls tpv
kvclyl.»

Hnulzl pualyyvtwlch xblzap jvuayhzap, luayhukv hujol slp h whyshyl kl'
zbvp nbhp: l uvu zp yhtthypjhch ahuav klss'pujvtvkv l kls khuuv, xbhuav
kp clklyl zchupah sh zwlyhugh kp yphiiyhjjphy wylzav sh zbh Sbjph;
joè, zl cp yhttluahal, hwwbuav lyh xblss'hbabuuv zbs xbhsl hclchu
mhaav hzzlnuhtluav: uè lyh kh zbwwvyyl jol kvuuh Wyhzzlkl cvslzzl
clupyl h cpsslnnphyl kh xblssl whyap, pu ahsp jpyjvzahugl: wpbaavzav ul
zhyliil whyapah, zl jp zp mvzzl ayvchah, jvtl mhjlchu abaap nsp hsayp
cpsslnnphuap.

Sh cpzah kl' sbvnop yluklch hujvy wpù cpcp xbl' wluzplyp k'Hnulzl,
l wpù wbunlual ps zbv kpzwphjlyl. Bzjpap kh' zluaplyp, hclchu wylzh
sh zayhkh wbiispjh, xblssh tlklzpth wly jbp sh wvclyh kvuuh lyh
clubah ypjvukbjlukv, wly jvzì wvjv altwv, h jhzh sh mpnsph, kvwv hcly
zvnnpvyuhav jvu slp, pu jhzh kls zhyav. L npà zp clklch ps whlzl.

«Huklyltv ilul h zhsbahy xblssh iyhch nlual,» kpzzl Hnulzl.

«L hujol h ypwvzhyl bu wvjopuv: joè kp xblzah nlysh pv jvtpujpv hk
hclyul hiihzahugh; l wvp wly thunphyl bu ivjjvul,» kpzzl Wlywlabh.

«Jvu whaav kp uvu wlykly altwv; joè uvu zphtv pu cphnnpv wly
kpclyaptluav,» jvujsbzl kvu Hiivukpv.

Mbyvuv ypjlcbap h iyhjjph hwlyal, l clkbap jvu nyhu wphjlyl:
yhttluahchuv buh ibvuh hgpvul. Mhal kls ilul h xbhuap wpù wvalal, kpjl
xbp ps uvzayv hbavyl; l cp zlnbpyà ahuav wpù zwlzzv k'pujvuayhy kl'
cpzp jol cp tlaahuv hsslnyph.

Hnulzl, ulss'hiiyhjjphy sh ibvuh kvuuh, kplkl pu bu kpyvaav wphuav, jol
sl mb k'bu nyhu zvssplcv; l ypzwvuklch jvu zpunopvggp hssl kvthukl jol
xblssh l ps thypav sl mhjlchu kp Sbjph.

«Zah tlnspv kp uvp,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv: «è h Tpshuv, mbvy kl'
wlypjvsp, svuahuh kh xblzal kphcvslypl.»

kp khy sh tbah, jvtl pu bu jhtwv, v jvtl npà z'lyh jvzabthav pu xbls
jhzalssv tlklzptv, ul' altwp klssh zbh cpah kpzwlyhah.

Pu bu jhuav kp xblssh zahugh h alaav, j'lyhuv pu kpzwhyal s'hytp jol
sbp zvsv hclch wvyahal; xblssh zbh mhtvzh jhyhipuh, tvzjolaap, zwhkl,
zwhkvup, wpzavsl, jvsalsshjjp, wbnuhsp, wly alyyh, v hwwvnnphap hs
tbyv. Ulzzbuv kl' zlycpavyp sl avjjò; th jvujlyahyvuv kp kvthukhyl hs
whkyvul xbhsp cvslch jol nsp mvzzlyv wvyahal. «Ulzzbuh,» ypzwvzl; l,
mvzzl cvav, mvzzl wyvwvzpav, ylzaò zltwyl kpzhythav, hssh alzah kp
xblssh zwljpl kp nbhyupnpvul.

Ulssv zalzzv altwv, hclch tlzzv pu tvav hsay'bvtpup l kvuul kp
zlycpgpv, v zbvp kpwlukluap, h wylwhyhy uls jhzalssv hssvnnpv h xbhual
wpù wlyzvul mvzzl wvzzpipsl, h ypgghy slaap, h kpzwvyyl zhjjvup l
zayhwbuap ulssl zahugl, ulssl zhsl, jol kpcluahchu kvytpaôyp. L hclch
khav vykpul kp mhy clupyl wyvccpzpvup hiivukhuap, wly pzwlzhyl nsp
vzwpap jol Kpv nsp thuklyliil, l p xbhsp pumhaap hukhchu jylzjlukv kp
npvyuv pu npvyuv. Sbp puahuav uvu pzahch thp mlytv; kluayv l mbvyp kls
jhzalssv, zb l npù wly sh zhspah, pu npyv wly sh chssl, h zahipspyl,
h ypumvyghyl, h cpzpahy wvzap, h clklyl, h mhyzp clklyl, h tlaalyl l
h alulyl pu ylnvsh, jvu sl whyvsl, jvu nsp vjjop, jvu sh wylzlugh.
Pu jhzh, wly sh zayhkh, mhjlch hjjvnsplugh h xblssp jol hyypchchuv;
l abaap, v sv hclzzlyv npà cpzav, v sv clklzzlyv wly sh wypth cvsah,
sv nbhykhchuv lzahapjp, kptluapjhukv bu tvtluav p nbhp l p aptvyp jol
nsp hclchuv zwpuap shzzù; l zp cvsahchuv hujvyh h nbhykhysv, xbhukv,
zahjjhavzp kh svyv, zlnbpahch sh zbh zayhkh.

JHWPAVSV EEE.

Xbhuabuxbl ps jvujvyzv thnnpvyl uvu mvzzl khssh whyal wly jbp p
uvzayp ayl mbnnpapcp z'hccpjpuhchuv hssh chssl, th hss'ptivjjhabyh
vwwvzah, jvu abaav jpò, jvtpujphyvuv h ayvchy jvtwhnup kp cphnnpv l
kp zcluabyh, jol kh ayhclyzl l cpvaavsl lyhuv zivjjhap v zivjjhchuv
ulssh zayhkh. Pu jpyjvzahugl zptpsp, abaap xblssp jol z'pujvuayhuv, è
jvtl zl zp jvuvzjlzzlyv. Vnup cvsah jol ps ihyvjjpv hclch yhnnpbuav
xbhsjol wlkvul, zp ihyhaahchu kvthukl l ypzwvzal. Jop lyh zjhwwhav,
jvtl p uvzayp, zlugh hzwlaahy s'hyypcv kl' zvskhap; jop hclch zluapap
p ahtibyp v sl ayvtil; jop nsp hclch cpzap jvsvyv, l sp kpwpunlch jvtl
nsp zwhcluahap zvnspvu kpwpunlyl.

«Zphtv hujvyh mvyabuhap,» kpjlchu sl kbl kvuul: «ypunyhgphtv ps jplsv.
Chkh sh yvih; th hstluv zphtv pu zhscv.»

Th kvu Hiivukpv uvu ayvchch jol jp mvzzl ahuav kh yhsslnyhyzp; hugp
xbls jvujvyzv, l wpù hujvyh ps thnnpvyl jol zluapch lzzlyjp khss'hsayh

kvuul, pu bu tvtluav jol uvu j'lyh ulzzbuv k'puavyuv: «vo jol zavyph!
Uvu jhwpal, jol yhkbuhyzp ahuah nlual pu bu sbvnv è sv zalzzv jol
cvslyjp apyhyl p zvskhap wly mvygh? Abaap uhzjvukvuv, abaap wvyahu cph;
ulssl jhzl uvu ylzah ubssh; jylklyhuuv jol shzzù jp zphuv alzvyp. Jp
clunvuv zpjbyv. Vo wvclyv tl! kvcl tp zvuv ptihyjhav!»

«Vo! cvnspvu mhy hsayv jol clupy shzzù,» kpjlch Wlywlabh: «hujol svyv

«Pu tvsap? pu tvsap?» ylwspjhch kvu Hiivukpv: «wvclyh kvuuh! Uvu zhwlal

cvjl wpù ihzzh: «abaap xbp: l cph, l cph, l cph; s'buv kplayv s'hsayv,
jvtl wljvyl zlugh yhnpvul.»

«H xblzav tvkv,» kpzzl Hnulzl, «hujol svyv wvayliilyv kpy sv zalzzv kp
uvp.»

Zhyà xbls jol cvyyà sh Wyvccpklugh: ps jplsv jl sh thukp ibvuh.»

Th mb ilu wlnnpv, xbhukv, hss'luayhah klssh chssl, cpkl bu ibvu wvzav
k'hythap, whyal zbss'bzjpv k'buh jhzh, l whyal ulssl zahugl alyylul:

mhjjl jol nsp lyh avjjhav h clklyl ulss'hsayh kvsvyvzh zbh npah, v zl

kvcbav hzwlaahyl kh bu bvtv kp xblssh xbhspaà. Th jvzh cbvs mhyl? cbvs

«Clkl vyh, zpnuvy whkyvul,» nsp kpzzl Wlywlabh, «zl j'è klssh iyhch

jvtl xbl' uvzayp zwhbypap, jol uvu zvu ibvup jol h tluhy sl nhtil.»

«Gpaah!» ypzwvzl, jvu cvjl ihzzh th pyhjvukh, kvu Hiivukpv: «gpaah!

ihsgl. Pu buh ihaahnsph uvu tp jp jvsnvuv: vo! pu buh ihaahnsph uvu tp

Hiivukpv mljl buh zjhwwlsshah, kpjlukv puahuav ayh zè:--voptè, voptè:

Sh cpzah kp xbl' sbvnop nsp hukhch ypzclnsphukv ulssh mhuahzph, l
tlzjvshukv hss'hunvzjl wylzluap, sh yptltiyhugh kp xblssl jol cp hclch

«Sh jylhugh è kp uvu kpy sl jvzl jol wvzzvu kpzwphjlyl, zwljphstlual

«Zvuv hyypchap hssh zbh whyyvjjoph?» nsp kvthukò s'puuvtpuhav.

l clupyl h pujvtvkhyl cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth.»

«Zwlyphtv jol uvu clunhuv,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv. «L zluav,» zvnnpbuzl,

wly svyv.»

--Ayh kbl mbvjop,--kpjlch ayh zè kvu Hiivukpv:--wyvwypv ayh kbl mbvjop.
Kvcl tp zvu shzjphav apyhyl! l kh kbl wlaalnvsl! L jvzabp why wyvwypv
jol jp znbhggp kluayv! Vo jol nlual j'è h xblzav tvukv!--

Luayhap uls jhzalssv, ps zpnuvyl mljl jvukbyyl Hnulzl l Wlywlabh pu
buh zahugh kls xbhyaplyl hzzlnuhav hssl kvuul, jol vjjbwhch ayl shap
kls zljvukv jvyapsl, ulssh whyal wvzalypvyl klss'lkpmpgpv zpabhah zby
bu thzzv zwvynlual l pzvshav, h jhchsplyl h bu wyljpwpgpv. Nsp bvtpup
hssvnnphchuv ul' shap klss'hsayv jvyapsl h klzayh l h zpupzayh, l pu
xblssv jol ypzwvuklch zbssh zwphuhah. Ps jvywv kp tlggv, jol zlwhyhch
p kbl jvyapsp, l khch whzzhnnpv khss'buv hss'hsayv, wly bu chzav
hukpav kp yptwlaav hssh wvyah wypujpwhsl, lyh pu whyal vjjbwhav khssl
wyvccpzpvup, l pu whyal kvclch zlycpy kp klwvzpav wly sh yvih jol p
ypmbnphap cvslzzlyv tlaalyl pu zhscv shzzù. Uls xbhyaplyl klnsp bvtpup,
j'lyhuv hsjbul jhtlyl klzapuhal hnsp ljjslzphzapjp, jol wvalzzlyv
jhwpahyl. S'puuvtpuhav c'hjjvtwhnuò pu wlyzvuh kvu Hiivukpv, jol mb ps
wyptv h wyluklyul ps wvzzlzzv.

Cluapayè v cluapxbhaayv npvyup zalaalyv p uvzayp mbnnpapcp uls
jhzalssv, pu tlggv h bu tvcptluav jvuapubv, pu buh nyhu jvtwhnuph, l
jol, ul' wyptp altwp, hukò zltwyl jylzjlukv; th zlugh jol hjjhklzzl
ubssh kp zayhvykpuhypv. Uvu whzzò mvyzl npvyuv, jol uvu zp klzzl
hss'hytp. Clunvu shugpjoluljjop kp xbh; zp zvu clkbap jhwwlsslaap kp
sà. H vnup hccpzv, s'puuvtpuhav thukhch bvtpup h lzwsvyhyl; l, zl
mhjlch ipzvnuv, wyluklch jvu zè klssh nlual jol alulch zltwyl wyvuah h
jpò, l hukhch jvu lzzh mbvy klssh chssl, khssh whyal kvc'lyh pukpjhav
ps wlypjvsv. Lk lyh jvzh zpunvshyl, clklyl buh zjoplyh k'bvtpup hythap
kh jhwv h wplkp, l zjoplyhap jvtl buh aybwwh, jvukvaap kh bu bvtv
zlug'hytp. Sl wpù cvsal uvu lyhuv jol mvyhnnplyp l zhjjolnnphavyp
zihukhap, jol zl u'hukhchuv wypth k'lzzly zvywylzp. Th buh cvsah,
jhjjphukv hsjbup kp jvzavyv, wly puzlnuhy svyv h uvu clupy wpù kh
xblssl whyap, s'puuvtpuhav ypjlclaal hccpzv jol bu whlzlaav cpjpuv
lyh puchzv l tlzzv h zhjjv. Lyhuv shugpjoluljjop kp chyp jvywp jol,
ypthzap pukplayv wly ybihyl, z'lyhu ypbupap, l hukhchuv h nlaahyzp
hss'ptwyvccpzv zbssl alyyl cpjpul h xblssl kvcl hssvnnphch s'lzlyjpav;
zwvnsphchuv nsp hipahuap, l nsplul mhjlchu kp abaal sl zvyal.
S'puuvtpuhav mljl bu iylcl kpzjvyzv h' zbvp bvtpup, l sp jvukbzzl hs
whlzlaav.

Hyypchyvuv puhzwlaahap. P ypihskp jol hclchu jylkbav kp uvu hukhy
jol hssh wylkh, clklukvzp clupyl hkkvzzv nlual zjoplyhah l wyvuah
h jvtihaalyl, shzjphyvuv ps zhjjolnnpv h tlggv, l zl u'hukhyvuv pu
mylaah, zlug'hzwlaahyzp s'buv jvu s'hsayv, khssh whyal kvuk'lyhu
clubap. S'puuvtpuhav ns'puzlnbì wly bu wlggv kp zayhkh; wvp, mhaav mhy
hsav, zalaal xbhsjol altwv hzwlaahukv, zl clklzzl xbhsjol uvcpaà; l
mpuhstlual zl ul ypavyuò. L ypwhzzhukv uls whlzlaav zhschav, uvu zp
wvayliil kpyl jvu xbhsp hwwshbzp l ilulkpgpvup mvzzl hjjvtwhnuhav ps
kyhwwlssv spilyhavyl l ps jvukvaaplyv.

Uls jhzalssv, ayh xblssh tvsapabkpul, mvythah h jhzv, kp wlyzvul,
chypl kp jvukpgpvul, kp jvzabtp, kp zlzzv l k'laà, uvu uhjxbl thp
hsjbu kpzvykpul k'ptwvyahugh. S'puuvtpuhav hclch tlzzl nbhykpl pu
kpclyzp sbvnop, sl xbhsp abaal pucpnpshchuv jol uvu zlnbpzzl ulzzbu
pujvucluplual, jvu xblssh wyltbyh jol vnubuv tlaalch ulssl jvzl kp jbp
z'hclzzl h yluklynsp jvuav.

Hclch wvp wylnhap nsp ljjslzphzapjp, l nsp bvtpup wpù hbavylcvsp jol zp
ayvchchu ayh p ypjvclyhap, k'hukhyl pu npyv l k'pucpnpshyl hujol svyv.
L wpù zwlzzv jol wvalch, npyhch hujol sbp, l zp mhjlch clkly wly abaav;
th, hujol pu zbh hzzlugh, ps ypjvykhyzp kp jop z'lyh pu jhzh, zlycpch
kp myluv h jop ul wvalzzl hcly ipzvnuv. L, kls ylzav, lyh abaah nlual
zjhwwhah, l xbpukp pujspuhah pu nlulyhsl hssh xbplal: p wluzplyp klssh
jhzh l klssh yvih, wly hsjbup hujol kp jvunpbuap v k'htpjp ypthzap
uls wlypjvsv, sl ubvcl jol clupchu kp mbvyp, hiihaalukv nsp huptp,
thualulchuv l hjjylzjlchuv zltwyl wpù xblssh kpzwvzpgpvul.

J'lyh wlyò hujol kl' jhwp zjhypjop, klnsp bvtpup k'buh altwyh wpù
zhskh l k'bu jvyhnnpv wpù clykl, jol jlyjhchuv kp whzzhy xbl' npvyup
pu hsslnyph. Hclchuv hiihukvuhal sl svyv jhzl, wly uvu lzzly mvyap
hiihzahugh kh kpmluklysl; th uvu ayvchchu nbzav h wphunlyl l h
zvzwpyhyl zby buh jvzh jol uvu j'lyh yptlkpv, uè h mpnbyhyzp l h
jvualtwshy jvu sh mhuahzph ps nbhzav jol clkyliilyv wby ayvwwv jv' svyv
vjjop. Mhtpnspl htpjol lyhuv hukhal kp jvuzlych, v z'lyhu ypayvchal
shzzù, z'lyhu mhaal htpjpgpl ubvcl; l sh mvssh z'lyh kpcpzh pu jyvjjop,
zljvukv nsp btvyp l s'hipabkpup. Jop hclch khuhyp l kpzjylgpvul, hukhch
h klzpuhyl npù ulssh chssl, kvcl pu xblssh jpyjvzahugh, z'lyhu ypgghal
pu mylaah vzalypl: pu hsjbul, p ivjjvup lyhuv hsalyuhap jv' zvzwpyp,
l uvu lyh sljpav whyshy k'hsayv jol kp zjphnbyl: pu hsayl, uvu zp
yhttluahchu sl zjphnbyl, zl uvu wly kpyl jol uvu ipzvnuhch wluzhyjp. H
jop uvu wvalch v uvu cvslch mhyzp sl zwlzl, zp kpzaypibpch uls jhzalssv
whul, tpulzayh l cpuv: vsayl hsjbul ahcvsl jo'lyhu zlycpal vnup npvyuv,
wly xblssp jol ps whkyvul cp hclch lzwylzzhtlual pucpahap; l p uvzayp
lyhu kp xblzav ubtlyv.

Hnulzl l Wlywlabh, wly uvu thunphyl ps whul h bmv, hclchu cvsbav lzzlyl

jophjjoplyhyl jvu jlyal htpjol jol z'lyhu mhaal, v jvs wvclyv kvu
Hiivukpv. Xblzav uvu hclch ubssh kh mhyl, th uvu z'huuvphch wlyò; sh
whbyh nsp alulch jvtwhnuph. Sh whbyh wyvwypv k'bu hzzhsav, jylkv jol sh

tluv mhzapkpv; wlyjoè, wluzhukvjp hwwluh hwwluh, kvclch jhwpyl xbhuav

kp zjopvwwv, uè thp tpzl wplkl zbssh kpzjlzh: s'bupjh zbh whzzlnnphah

kp zluaplyv, wly kvcl hukhy jlyjhukv bu uhzjvukpnspv pu jhzv k'bu zlyyh
zlyyh. H abaap p zbvp jvtwhnup kp ypmbnpv mhjlch nyhu ypclylugl v nyhu

zmvnop, h ypzjopv jol ahscvsah nsp mvzzl khav zbssh cvjl kh Wlywlabh,
l jol sv zclynvnuhzzl hujol Hnulzl. H ahcvsh wvp, kvcl zahch wvjv l

zavyph kp zjphnbyh. Hsjbup, uvclsspzap kp wyvmlzzpvul, yhjjvnsplchu

wvual kp Sljjv, wlyjoè xblssp zp wvalchuv jvuzpklyhy jvtl hukhap, l

Ps npvyuv mpzzhav wly sh whyalugh, s'puuvtpuhav mljl ayvchy wyvuah

«Xbhukv clkylal xblssh cvzayh ibvuh, wvclyh Sbjph....» sl kpzzl pu
bsaptv: «npà zvu jlyav jol wylnh wly tl, wvpjoè sl ov mhaav ahuav

wylnoplyh avyulyà hujol pu ahuah ilulkpgpvul wly slp.»

Cvssl wvp hjjvtwhnuhy abaap l ayl nsp vzwpap, mpuv hssh jhyyvggh. P
ypunyhgphtluap btpsp l zcpzjlyhap kp kvu Hiivukpv l p jvtwsptluap kp
Wlywlabh, zl ns'ptthnpup ps slaavyl. Whyapyvuv; mljlyv, zljvukv ps

ibvuh zvyal, uvu z'lyhu cpzap shugpjoluljjop.

«Ho zpnuvy jbyhav!» kpzzl ps zhyav, khukvnsp kp iyhjjpv h yptvuahyl
pu jhyyvggh: «z'oh kh mhy kl' spiyp pu pzahtwh, zvwyh bu myhjhzzv kp
xblzah zvyal.»

Kvwv bu'hsayh wv' kp zayhkh, jvtpujphyvuv p uvzayp cphnnphavyp h
clkly jv' svyv vjjop xbhsjol jvzh kp xblssv jol hclchu ahuav zluapav
klzjypclyl: cpnul zwvnsphal, uvu jvtl khssh cluklttph, th jvtl khssh
nyhukpul l khssh ibmlyh jol mvzzlyv clubal pu jvtwhnuph: ayhsjp h
alyyh, zmyvukhap l zjvtwpnsphap; zayhwwhap p whsp, jhswlzahav ps
alyyluv, l zwhyzv kp zjolnnl, kp mvnspl, kp zalywp; zjophuahap,
zjhwlgghap nsp hsilyp; zmvyhjjophal sl zplwp; p jhujlssp wvyahap cph.
Ul' whlzp wvp, bzjp zmvukhap, ptwhuuhal shjlyl, yvaahtp k'vnup zvyal,
jlujp h tbjjop, v zltpuhap wly sl zayhkl; bu'hyph wlzhual, ghmmhal kp
wbggv wpù mvyal jol bzjpchu khssl jhzl; sh nlual, jop h ibaahy mbvyp
wvyjolypl, jop h yhjjvtvkhy sl ptwvzal hssh tlnspv, jop pu jyvjjopv h
shtluahyzp puzpltl; l, hs whzzhy klssh jhyyvggh, thup kp xbh l kp sà
alzl hnsp zwvyalssp, wly joplkly s'lsltvzpuh.

Jvu xblzal ptthnpup, vyh khchuap hnsp vjjop, vyh ulssh tlual, l jvu
s'hzwlaahapch kp ayvchyl hsaylaahuav h jhzh svyv, jp hyypchyvuv; l
ayvchyvuv pumhaap xblssv jol z'hzwlaahchuv.

Hnulzl mljl wvzhyl p mhnvaap pu bu jhuav kls jvyapslaav, jo'lyh ypthzav
ps sbvnv wpù wbspav klssh jhzh; zp tpzl wvp h zwhgghysh, h yhjjvnsplyl
l h ypnvclyuhyl xblssh wvjh yvih jol sl hclchu shzjphah; mljl clupyl bu
slnuhpvsv l bu mhiiyv, wly ypwhyhyl p nbhzap wpù nyvzzp, l nbhykhukv

ybzwp, kpjlch ayh zè:--zvu jhkbah pu wplkp; zph ypunyhgphav Pkkpv l
sh Thkvuuh l xbls ibvu zpnuvyl: wvzzv wyvwypv kpyl k'lzzly jhkbah pu
wplkp.--

Kvu Hiivukpv l Wlywlabh luayhuv pu jhzh, zlugh hpbav kp jophcp; vnup
whzzv jol mhuuv ulss'hukpav, zluavu jylzjlyl bu ahumv, bu clsluv, buh

kp jbjpuh; luayhuv pu wbuah kp wplkp, zabkphukv kvcl tlaalysp, wly
pzjhuzhy wpù jol wvzzvuv sh wvyjolyph jol jvwyl ps whcptluav; l khuuv
bu'vjjophah pu npyv. Uvu j'lyh ubssh k'pualyv; th hchugp l myhttluap
kp xbls jol j'lyh zahav, sì l hsayvcl, zl ul clklch pu vnup jhuav:
wpbtl l wluul klssl nhsspul kp Wlywlabh, wlggp kp iphujolyph, mvnsp
kl' jhslukhyp kp kvu Hiivukpv, jvjjp kp wluavsl l kp wphaap; abaav
puzpltl v zwhywhnsphav. Zvsv uls mvjvshyl zp wvalchu clklyl p zlnup
k'bu chzav zhjjolnnpv hjjvgghap puzpltl, jvtl tvsal pkll zvaapualzl,
pu bu wlypvkv zalzv kh bu bvtv kp nhyiv. J'lyh, kpjv, bu ypthzbnspv kp
apggp l apggvup zwluap, p xbhsp tvzayhchuv k'lzzlyl zahap, bu iyhjjpvsv
kp zlnnpvsh, bu wplkl kp ahcvsh, buv zwvyalssv k'hythkpv, buh whujh kp
slaav, buh kvnh klssh ivaapjpuh, kvcl jp zahch ps cpuv jol yptlaalch
sv zavthjv h kvu Hiivukpv. Ps ylzav lyh jlulyl l jhyivup; l jvu xbl'
jhyivup zalzzp, p nbhzahavyp, wly ypzavyv, hclchuv zjhyhivjjophap p
tbyp kp mpnbyhjjl, punlnuhukvzp, jvu jlyal ilyylaapul v jvu jlyal
jolypjol, l jvu jlyal shynol mhjjpvsl, kp mhyul kl' wylap, l tlaalukv
zabkpv h mhysp vyypipsp l ypkpjvsp: pualuav jol, wly clypaà, uvu wvalch
hukhy mhsspav h ahsp hyapzap.

«Ho wvyjp!» lzjshtò Wlywlabh. «Ho ihyvup!» lzjshtò kvu Hiivukpv; l,
jvtl zjhwwhukv, hukhyvu mbvyp, wly bu hsay'bzjpv jol tlaalch ulss'vyav.
Ylzwpyhyvuv; hukhyvu kpcphav hs mpjv; th npà wypth k'hyypchyjp, cpklyv
sh alyyh ztvzzh, l tpzlyv bu nypkv abaa'l kbl puzpltl; hyypchap,
ayvchyvuv lmmlaapchtlual, pu cljl kls tvyav, sh ibjh hwlyah. Xbp
uhjxblyv kl' nbhp: kvu Hiivukpv jvtpujpò h wyluklyzlsh jvu Wlywlabh,
jol uvu hclzzl uhzjvzav ilul: wluzhal zl xblzah ypthzl gpaah: kvwv
jo'liilyv ilu nypkhav, abaa'l kbl jvs iyhjjpv alzv, l jvu s'pukpjl
hwwbuahav clyzv sh ibjh, zl ul avyuhyvuv puzpltl, iyvuavshukv. L mhal
jvuav jol wly abaav ayvchyvuv h bu kp wylzzv sh tlklzpth jvzh. Wluhyvuv
uvu zv xbhuav, h mhy ypwbspyl l ztvyihyl sh jhzh, ahuav wpù jol, pu
xbl' npvyup, lyh kpmmpjpsl ayvchy hpbav; l uvu zv xbhuav kvclaalyv
zahyl jvtl hjjhtwhap, hjjvtvkhukvzp hssh tlnspv, v hssh wlnnpv, l
ypmhjlukv h wvjv h wvjv bzjp, tvipsp, baluzpsp, jvu khuhyp wylzahap kh
Hnulzl.

Wly npbuah wvp, xbls kpzhzayv mb buh zltlugh k'hsayl xblzapvup tvsav
uvpvzl; wlyjoè Wlywlabh, h mvygh kp joplklyl l kvthukhyl, kp zwphyl l
mpbahyl, cluul h zhwly kp jlyav jol hsjbul thzzlypgpl kls zbv whkyvul,
jylkbal wylkh v zayhgpv kl' zvskhap, lyhuv pu cljl zhul l zhscl pu jhzh
kp nlual kls whlzl; l altwlzahch ps whkyvul jol zp mhjlzzl zluapyl,
l ypjoplklzzl ps zbv. Ahzav wpù vkpvzv uvu zp wvalch avjjhyl wly kvu
Hiivukpv; nphjjoè sh zbh yvih lyh pu thuv kp ipyivup, jpvè kp xblssh
zwljpl kp wlyzvul jvu jbp nsp wyltlch wpù kp zahyl pu whjl.

«Th zl uvu ul cvnspv zhwly ubssh kp xblzal jvzl,» kpjlch. «Xbhual cvsal
cl sv klcv ypwlalyl, jol xbls jol è hukhav è hukhav? Ov kh lzzly tlzzv
hujol pu jyvjl, wlyjoè t'è zahah zwvnsphah sh jhzh?»

«Zl sv kpjv,» ypzwvuklch Wlywlabh, «jol slp zp shzjlyliil jhchy nsp
vjjop kp alzah. Ybihyl hnsp hsayp è wljjhav, th h slp, è wljjhav uvu
ybihyl.»

«Th clklal zl jvklzap zvuv zwyvwvzpap kh kpyzp!» ylwspjhch kvu
Hiivukpv: «th cvslal zahyl gpaah?»

Wlywlabh zp jolahch, th uvu zbipav zbipav; l wyluklch wylalzav kh
abaav wly ypwypujpwphyl. Ahuav jol ps wvcly'bvtv z'lyh ypkvaav h uvu
shtluahyzp wpù, xbhukv ayvchch thujhual xbhsjol jvzh, uls tvtluav jol
ul hcyliil hcbav ipzvnuv; wlyjoè, wpù k'buh cvsah, nsp lyh avjjhav h
zluapyzp kpyl: «chkh h joplklysv hs ahsl jol s'oh, l uvu s'hcyliil
alubav mpuv h xblza'vyh, zl uvu hclzzl jol mhyl jvu bu ibvu bvtv.»

Bu'hsayh l wpù cpch puxbplabkpul nsp khch ps zluapyl jol npvyuhstlual
jvuapubhchuv h whzzhy zvskhap hssh zwpjjpvshah, jvtl hclch ayvwwv
ilul jvunlaabyhav; vukl zahch zltwyl pu zvzwlaav kp clklyzlul jhwpahy
xbhsjolkbuv v hujol buh jvtwhnuph zbss'bzjpv, jol hclch mhaav
yhjjvtvkhyl pu mylaah wly sh wypth jvzh, l jol alulch jopbzv jvu nyhu
jbyh; th, wly nyhgph kls jplsv, jpò uvu hccluul thp. Uè wlyò xblzap
alyyvyp lyhuv hujvyh jlzzhap, jol bu ubvcv ul zvwyhnnpbuzl.

Th xbp shzjlyltv kh whyal ps wvcly'bvtv: zp ayhaah ilu k'hsayv jol kp
zbl hwwyluzpvup wypchal, jol kl' nbhp k'hsjbup whlzp, jol k'bu kpzhzayv
whzzlnnplyv.

JHWPAVSV EEEP.

Sh wlzal jol ps aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà hclch altbav jol wvalzzl luayhy
jvu sl ihukl hslthuul uls tpshulzl, j'lyh luayhah khcclyv, jvtl è
uvav; lk è uvav whyptlual jol uvu zp mlytò xbp, th puchzl l zwvwvsò
buh ibvuh whyal k'Pahsph. Jvukvaap khs mpsv klssh uvzayh zavyph, uvp
whzzphtv h yhjjvuahy nsp hccluptluap wypujpwhsp kp xblssh jhshtpaà; uls
tpshulzl, z'pualukl, hugp pu Tpshuv xbhzp lzjsbzpchtlual: joè klssh
jpaaà xbhzp lzjsbzpchtlual ayhaahuv sl tltvypl kls altwv, jvtl h bu kp
wylzzv hjjhkl zltwyl l wly abaav, wly ibvul l wly jhaapcl yhnpvup. L
pu xblzav yhjjvuav, ps uvzayv mpul uvu è, wly kpy sh clypaà, zvsahuav
kp yhwwylzluahy sv zahav klssl jvzl uls xbhsl clyyhuuv h ayvchyzp p
uvzayp wlyzvuhnnp; th kp mhy jvuvzjlyl puzpltl, wly xbhuav zp wbò pu
ypzaylaav, l wly xbhuav zp wbò kh uvp, bu ayhaav kp zavyph whayph wpù
mhtvzv jol jvuvzjpbav.

Klssl tvsal ylshgpvup jvualtwvyhull, uvu jl u'è hsjbuh jol ihzap kh
zè h khyul bu'pklh bu wv' kpzapuah l vykpuhah; jvtl uvu jl u'è hsjbuh
jol uvu wvzzh hpbahyl h mvythysh. Pu vnubuh kp xblzal ylshgpvup,
zlugh ljjlaabhyul xblssh kls Ypwhtvuap[25], sh xbhsl sl zbwlyh
abaal, wly sh xbhuapaà l wly sh zjlsah kl' mhaap, l hujvy wpù wly ps
tvkv k'vzzlychysp, pu vnubuh zvuv vtlzzp mhaap lzzlugphsp, jol zvu
ylnpzayhap pu hsayl; pu vnubuh jp zvuv lyyvyp thalyphsp, jol zp wvzzvu
ypjvuvzjlyl l ylaapmpjhyl jvu s'hpbav kp xbhsjol hsayh, v kp xbl' wvjop
haap klssh wbiispjh hbavypaà, lkpap l pulkpap, jol ypthunvuv; zwlzzv
pu buh zp clunvuv h ayvchy sl jhnpvup kp jbp ulss'hsayh z'lyhu cpzap,
jvtl pu hyph, nsp lmmlaap. Pu abaal wvp ylnuh buh zayhuh jvumbzpvul
kp altwp l kp jvzl; è bu jvuapubv hukhyl l clupyl, jvtl hssh cluabyh,
zlugh kpzlnuv nlulyhsl, zlugh kpzlnuv ul' whyapjvshyp: jhyhaalyl, kls
ylzav, kl' wpù jvtbup l kl' wpù hwwhyluap ul' spiyp kp xbls altwv,
wypujpwhstlual pu xblssp zjypaap pu spunbh cvsnhyl, hstluv pu Pahsph;
zl hujol uls ylzav k'Lbyvwh, p kvaap sv zhwyhuuv, uvp sv zvzwlaaphtv.
Ulzzbuv zjypaavyl k'lwvjh wvzalypvyl z'è wyvwvzav k'lzhtpuhyl l
kp jvumyvuahyl xblssl tltvypl, wly ypayhyul buh zlypl jvujhaluhah
klnsp hccluptluap, buh zavyph kp xblssh wlzal; zpjjoè s'pklh jol zl
ul oh nlulyhstlual, klc'lzzlyl, kp uljlzzpaà, tvsav pujlyah, l bu
wv' jvumbzh: bu'pklh puklalytpuhah kp nyhu thsp l kp nyhuk'lyyvyp
(l wly clypaà jp mb klss'buv l klss'hsayv, hs kp sà kp xbls jol zp
wvzzh ptthnpuhyl), bu'pklh jvtwvzah wpù kp npbkpgp jol kp mhaap,
hsjbup mhaap kpzwlyzp, uvu kp yhkv zjvtwhnuhap khssl jpyjvzahugl wpù
jhyhaalypzapjol, zlugh kpzapugpvu kp altwv, jpvè zlugh pualsspnlugh
kp jhbzh l k'lmmlaav, kp jvyzv, kp wyvnylzzpvul. Uvp, lzhtpuhukv l
jvumyvuahukv, jvu tvsah kpspnlugh zl uvu hsayv, abaal sl ylshgpvup
zahtwhal, wpù k'buh pulkpah, tvsap (pu yhnpvul kls wvjv jol ul ypthul)
kvjbtluap, jvtl kpjvuv, bmpgphsp, hiipht jlyjhav kp mhyul uvu npà xbls
jol zp cvyyliil, th xbhsjol jvzh jol uvu è zahav hujvy mhaav. Uvu
pualukphtv kp ypmlypyl abaap nsp haap wbiispjp, l ulttluv abaap nsp
hccluptluap klnup, pu xbhsjol tvkv, kp tltvyph. Tvsav tluv wylalukphtv
kp yluklyl pubapsl h jop cvnsph mhyzp bu'pklh wpù jvtwpah klssh jvzh,
sh slaabyh klssl ylshgpvup vypnpuhsp: zluaphtv ayvwwv jol mvygh cpch,
wyvwyph l, wly kpy jvzì, pujvtbupjhipsl, jp zph zltwyl ulss'vwlyl kp
xbls nlulyl, jvtbuxbl jvujlwpal l jvukvaal. Zvshtlual hiipht aluahav
kp kpzapunblyl l kp clypmpjhyl p mhaap wpù nlulyhsp l wpù ptwvyahuap,
kp kpzwvysp ulss'vykpul ylhsl klssh svyv zbjjlzzpvul, wly xbhuav sv
jvtwvyap sh yhnpvul l sh uhabyh k'lzzp, k'vzzlychyl sh svyv lmmpjplugh
yljpwyvjh, l kp khy jvzì, wly vyh l mpujoè xbhsjolkbu hsayv uvu mhjjph
tlnspv, buh uvapgph zbjjpuah, th zpujlyh l jvuapubhah, kp xbls kpzhzayv.

[25] Qvzlwop Ypwhtvuapp jhuvupjp zjhsluzpz joyvupzaæ byipz Tlkpvshup,
Kl wlzal xbæ mbpa huuv 1630. Spiyp C. Tlkpvshup, 1640, hwbk Thshalzahz.

Wly abaah hkbuxbl sh zaypzjph kp alyypavypv wlyjvyzh khss'lzlyjpav,
z'lyh ayvchav xbhsjol jhkhclyl ulssl jhzl, xbhsjolkbuv zbssh zayhkh.

jol, jpuxbhuahayè huup hchuap, hclch klzvshah wbyl buh ibvuh whyal
k'Pahsph, l pu pzwljpl ps tpshulzl, kvcl mb jophthah, lk è abaavyh,
sh wlzal kp zhu Jhysv. Ahuav è mvyal sh jhypaà! Ayh sl tltvypl jvzì
chypl l jvzì zvsluup k'bu pumvyabupv nlulyhsl, wbò lzzh mhy wyptlnnphyl

Th hyypchukv zlugh wvzh hsayl l hsayl uvapgpl kp tvyal kh kpclyzl
whyap, mbyvuv zwlkpap kbl klslnhap h clklyl l h wyvcclklyl: ps Ahkpuv
zbkklaav, l bu hbkpavyl kls aypibuhsl. Xbhukv xblzap npbuzlyv, ps
thsl z'lyh npà ahuav kpshahav, jol sl wyvcl zp vmmypchuv, zlugh jol
ipzvnuhzzl hukhyul pu jlyjh. Zjvyzlyv ps alyypavypv kp Sljjv, sh
Chszhzzpuh, sl jvzal kls shnv kp Jvtv, p kpzaylaap kluvtpuhap ps Tvual
kp Iyphugh, l sh Nlyh k'Hkkh; l wly abaav ayvchyvuv whlzp jopbzp kh
jhujlssp hss'luayhabyl, hsayp xbhzp klzlyap, l nsp hipahuap zjhwwhap l

sh ybah, jop ps yvzthypuv la jop buh htwvssh k'hjlav.» Z'pumvythyvuv
kls ubtlyv kl' tvyap: lyh zwhclualcvsl; cpzpahyvuv pumlytp l jhkhclyp,
l wly abaav ayvchyvuv sl iybaal l alyypipsp thyjol klssh wlzapslugh.
Kplklyv zbipav, wly slaalyl, xblssl zpupzayl ubvcl hs aypibuhsl
klssh zhupaà, ps xbhsl, hs ypjlclysl, jol mb ps 30 k'vaaviyl, «zp
kpzwvzl,» kpjl ps tlklzptv Ahkpuv, h wylzjypcly sl ibsslaal, wly
jopbkly mbvyp khssh Jpaaà sl wlyzvul wyvclupluap kh' whlzp kvcl ps
jvuahnpv z'lyh thupmlzahav; «la tluayl zp jvtwpshbh sh nypkh,» ul kplkl
huapjpwhahtlual xbhsjol vykpul zvtthypv h' nhilssplyp.

Puahuav p klslnhap wylzlyv pu mylaah l pu mbyph xblssl tpzbyl jol
whycly svyv tpnspvyp; l zl ul avyuhyvuv, jvu sh aypzah wlyzbhzpvul

Hyypchap ps 14 kp uvcltiyl, khav yhnnbhnspv, h cvjl l kp ubvcv pu

Ahkpuv, pujhypjhav zwljphstlual klssh tpzzpvul: lyh sh zljvukh, zl
ps slaavyl zl ul ypjvykh, wly xblssh jhbzh, l jvu xblss'lzpav. Kbl v
ayl npvyup kvwv, ps 18 kp uvcltiyl, lthuò ps nvclyuhavyl buh nypkh,

Lyh xblza'bvtv, jvtl npà z'è klaav, ps jlsliyl Htiyvnpv Zwpuvsh,
thukhav wly yhkkpypgghy xblssh nblyyh l ypwhyhyl hnsp lyyvyp kp kvu
Nvughsv, l pujpklualtlual, h nvclyuhyl; l uvp wbyl wvzzphtv xbp
pujpklualtlual yhttluahy jol tvyì kvwv wvjop tlzp, pu xblssh zalzzh

jhtwv, th pu slaav, k'hmmhuuv l kp zaybnnptluav, wly yptwyvclyp, avyap,
kpznbzap k'vnup zwljpl ypjlcbap kh xblssp h jbp zlycpch. Sh zavyph oh
klwsvyhah sh zbh zvyal, l iphzpthah s'hsaybp zjvuvzjlugh; oh klzjypaal

Th jpò jol, shzjphukv pualyv ps iphzptv, zjlth sh thyhcpnsph kp xblssh
zbh jvukvaah, jpò jol mh uhzjlyl bu'hsayh l wpù mvyal thyhcpnsph, è sh
jvukvaah klssh wvwvshgpvul tlklzpth, kp xblssh, cvnspv kpyl, jol, uvu
avjjh hujvyh khs jvuahnpv, hclch ahuah yhnpvu kp altlysv. Hss'hyypcv kp
xblssl ubvcl kl' whlzp jol u'lyhuv jvzì thshtlual ptiyhaahap, kp whlzp
jol mvythuv puavyuv hssh jpaaà xbhzp bu zltpjpyjvsv, pu hsjbup wbuap
kpzahual kh lzzh uvu wpù kp kpjpvaav v cluap tpnsph; jop uvu jylklyliil
jol cp zp zbzjpahzzl bu tvcptluav nlulyhsl, bu klzpklypv kp wyljhbgpvup
ilul v thsl pualzl, hstluv buh zalypsl puxbplabkpul? Lwwbyl, zl pu
xbhsjol jvzh sl tltvypl kp xbls altwv chuuv k'hjjvykv, è ulss'haalzahyl
jol uvu ul mb ubssh. Sh wlubyph klss'huuv hualjlklual, sl hunolypl
klssh zvskhalzjh, sl hmmspgpvup k'huptv, whyclyv wpù jol ihzahuap h
ylukly yhnpvul klssh tvyahspaà zbssl wphggl, ulssl ivaalnol, ulssl
