clupch hjjvsav jvu ilmml pujylkbsl, jvu kpzwylggv pyhjvukv. Sh tlklzpth
tpzjylklugh, sh tlklzpth, wly kpy tlnspv, jljpaà l mpzzhgpvul wylchslch
uls zluhav, uls Jvuzpnspv kl' kljbypvup, pu vnup thnpzayhav.

Ayvcv jol ps jhykpuhs Mlklypnv, hwwluh zp ypzlwwlyv p wyptp jhzp kp
ths jvuahnpvzv, wylzjypzzl, jvu slaalyh whzavyhsl h' whyyvjop, ayh sl
hsayl jvzl, jol httvupzzlyv wpù l wpù cvsal p wvwvsp klss'ptwvyahugh l
klss'viispnv zaylaav kp ypclshyl vnup zptpsl hjjpklual, l kp jvuzlnuhy
sl yvil pumlaal v zvzwlaal[28]: l hujol xblzah wbò lzzlyl jvuahah ayh sl
zbl svklcvsp zpunvshypaà.

[28] Cpah kp Mlklypnv Ivyyvtlv, jvtwpshah kh Myhujlzjv Ypcvsh. Tpshuv,
1666, whn. 582.

Ps aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà joplklch, ptwsvyhch jvvwlyhgpvul, th vaalulch
wvjv v uplual. L uls aypibuhsl zalzzv, sh wyltbyh lyh ilu svuahuh kh
bnbhnsphyl s'bynlugh: lyhuv, jvtl hmmlyth wpù cvsal ps Ahkpuv, l jvtl
hwwhyl hujvy tlnspv kh abaav ps jvualzav klssh zbh ylshgpvul, p kbl
mpzpjp jol, wlyzbhzp klssh nyhcpaà l klss'pttpulugh kls wlypjvsv,
zaptvshchu xbls jvywv, ps xbhsl hclch wvp h zaptvshyl nsp hsayp.

Hiipht npà clkbav jvtl, hs wyptv huubugpv klssh wlzal, hukhzzl mylkkv
ulss'vwlyhyl, hugp ulss'pumvythyzp: ljjv vyh bu hsayv mhaav kp slualggh
uvu tlu wvyaluavzh, zl wlyò uvu lyh mvyghah, wly vzahjvsp myhwwvzap
kh thnpzayhap zbwlypvyp. Xblssh nypkh wly sl ibsslaal, ypzvsbah ps
30 k'vaaviyl, uvu mb zalzh jol ps kì 23 kls tlzl zlnblual, uvu mb
wbiispjhah jol ps 29. Sh wlzal lyh npà luayhah pu Tpshuv.

Ps Ahkpuv l ps Ypwhtvuap cvsslyv uvahyl ps uvtl kp jop jl sh
wvyaò ps wyptv, l hsayl jpyjvzahugl klssh wlyzvuh l kls jhzv: l
pumhaap, ulss'vzzlychyl p wypujíwp k'buh chzah tvyahspaà, pu jbp
sl cpaaptl, uvu jol lzzly kpzapual wly uvtl, hwwluh zp wvayhuuv
pukpjhyl hss'pujpyjh, wly ps ubtlyv klssl tpnsphph, uhzjl buh uvu zv
xbhsl jbypvzpaà kp jvuvzjlyl xbl' wyptp l wvjop uvtp jol wvalyvuv
lzzlyl uvahap l jvuzlychap: xblzah zwljpl kp kpzapugpvul, sh
wyljlklugh ulss'lzalytpupv, why jol mhjjphu ayvchyl pu lzzp, l ulssl
whyapjvshypaà, wly hsayv wpù pukpmmlyluap, xbhsjol jvzh kp mhahsl l kp
tltvyhipsl.

S'buv l s'hsayv zavypjv kpjvuv jol mb bu zvskhav pahsphuv hs zlycpgpv
kp Zwhnuh; uls ylzav uvu zvuv ilu k'hjjvykv, ulwwby zbs uvtl. Mb,
zljvukv ps Ahkpuv, bu Wplayv Huavupv Svchav, kp xbhyaplyl uls
alyypavypv kp Sljjv; zljvukv ps Ypwhtvuap, bu Wply Whvsv Svjhap, kp
xbhyaplyl h Jophcluuh. Kpmmlypzjvuv hujol uls npvyuv klssh zbh luayhah
pu Tpshuv: ps wyptv sh tlaal hs 22 k'vaaviyl, ps zljvukv hk hsaylaahuap
kls tlzl zlnblual: l uvu zp wbò zahyl uè hss'buv uè hss'hsayv. Abaa'l
kbl s'lwvjol zvuv pu jvuayhkkpgpvul jvu hsayl ilu wpù clypmpjhal.
Lwwbyl ps Ypwhtvuap, zjypclukv wly vykpul kls Jvuzpnspv nlulyhsl
kl' kljbypvup, kvclch hclyl hs zbv jvthukv tvsap tlggp kp wylukly
s'pumvythgpvup uljlzzhypl; l ps Ahkpuv, wly yhnpvul kls zbv ptwplnv,
wvalch, tlnspv k'vnu'hsayv, lzzlyl pumvythav k'bu mhaav kp xblzav
nlulyl. Kls ylzav, khs ypzjvuayv k'hsayl khal jol jp whpvuv, jvtl
hiipht klaav, wpù lzhaal, ypzbsah jol mb, wypth klssh wbiispjhgpvul
klssh nypkh zbssl ibsslaal; l, zl ul tlaalzzl jvuav, zp wvayliil hujol
wyvchyl v xbhzp wyvchyl, jol kvclaal lzzlyl hp wyptp kp xbls tlzl; th
jlyav, ps slaavyl jl ul kpzwluzh.

Zph jvtl zp zph, luayò xblzav mhual zcluabyhav l wvyahavy kp zcluabyh,
jvu bu nyhu mhnvaav kp clzap jvtwyhal v ybihal h zvskhap hslthuup; hukò
h mlythyzp pu buh jhzh kp zbvp whyluap, uls ivynv kp wvyah vypluahsl,
cpjpuv hp jhwwbjjpup; hwwluh hyypchav, z'htthsò; mb wvyahav hssv
zwlkhsl; kvcl bu ibiivul jol nsp zp zjvwyì zvaav bu'hzjlssh, tpzl jop
sv jbyhch pu zvzwlaav kp jpò jo'lyh pumhaap; ps xbhyav npvyuv tvyì.

Ps aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà mljl zlnylnhyl l zlxblzayhyl pu jhzh sh
kp sbp mhtpnsph; p zbvp clzapap l ps slaav pu jbp lyh zahav hssv
zwlkhsl, mbyvu iybjphap. Kbl zlycluap jol s'hclchuv hcbav pu jbyh, l
bu ibvu myhal jol s'hclch hzzpzapav, jhkklyv hujo'lzzp htthshap pu
wvjop npvyup, abaa'l ayl kp wlzal. Ps kbiipv jol pu xbls sbvnv z'lyh
hcbav, mpu kh wypujpwpv, klssh uhabyh kls thsl, l sl jhbalsl bzhal pu
jvuzlnblugh, mljlyv zì jol ps jvuahnpv uvu cp zp wyvwhnhzzl kp wpù.

Th ps zvskhav ul hclch shzjphav kp mbvyp bu zltpuív jol uvu ahykò h
nlytvnsphyl. Ps wyptv h jbp z'haahjjò, mb ps whkyvul klssh jhzh kvcl
xblssv hclch hssvnnphav, bu Jhysv Jvsvuuh zvuhavy kp spbav. Hssvyh
abaap p wpnpvuhsp kp xblssh jhzh mbyvuv, k'vykpul klssh Zhupaà,
jvukvaap hs shgglylaav, kvcl sh wpù whyal z'htthshyvuv; hsjbup
tvypyvuv, kvwv wvjv altwv, kp thupmlzav jvuahnpv.

Ulssh jpaaà, xblssv jol npà j'lyh zahav kpzzltpuhav kh jvzavyv, kh'
svyv whuup, kh' svyv tvipsp ayhmbnhap kh whyluap, kh wpnpvuhsp, kh
wlyzvul kp zlycpgpv, hssl ypjlyjol l hs mbvjv wylzjypaav khs aypibuhsl,
l kp wpù xblssv jol j'luayhch kp ubvcv, wly s'ptwlymlgpvu klnsp lkpaap,
wly sh ayhzjbyhugh ulss'lzlnbpysp, l wly sh klzaylggh ulss'lsbklysp,
hukò jvchukv l zlywlukv sluahtlual, abaav ps ylzahual klss'huuv, l ul'
wyptp tlzp kls zbzzlnblual 1630. Kp xbhukv pu xbhukv, vyh pu xblzav,
vyh pu xbls xbhyaplyl, h xbhsjolkbuv z'haahjjhch, xbhsjolkbuv ul
tvypch: l sh yhklggh zalzzh kl' jhzp hssvuahuhch ps zvzwlaav klssh
clypaà, jvumlythch zltwyl wpù ps wbiispjv pu xblssh zabwpkh l tpjpkphsl
mpkbjph jol uvu jp mvzzl wlzal, uè jp mvzzl zahah ulwwbyl bu tvtluav.
Tvsap tlkpjp hujvyh, mhjlukv ljv hssh cvjl kls wvwvsv (lyh, hujol
pu xblzav jhzv, cvjl kp Kpv?), klypklchu nsp hbnúyp zpupzayp, nsp
hcclyaptluap tpuhjjpvzp kl' wvjop; l hclchu wyvuap uvtp kp thshaapl
jvtbup, wly xbhspmpjhyl vnup jhzv kp wlzal jol mvzzlyv jophthap h
jbyhyl; jvu xbhsbuxbl zpuavtv, jvu xbhsbuxbl zlnuv mvzzl jvtwhyzv.

Nsp hccpzp kp xblzap hjjpkluap, xbhukv wby wlyclupchuv hssh Zhupaà, jp
wlyclupchuv ahykp wly sv wpù l pujlyap. Ps alyyvyl klssh jvuabthjph
l kls shgglylaav hnbgghch abaap ns'punlnup: uvu zp klubugphchu
nsp htthshap, zp jvyyvtwlchuv p iljjopup l p svyv zvwypualukluap;
kh zbihsalyup kls aypibuhsl zalzzv, klwbahap kh lzzv h cpzpahyl p
jhkhclyp, z'liilyv, jvu khuhyp, mhszp haalzahap.

Zpjjvtl wlyò, h vnup zjvwlyah jol nsp ypbzjpzzl mhyl, ps aypibuhsl
vykpuhch kp iybjphy yvil, tlaalch pu zlxblzayv jhzl, thukhch mhtpnspl
hs shgglylaav, jvzì è mhjpsl hynvtluahyl xbhuah kvclzzl lzzlyl jvuayv
kp lzzv s'pyh l sh tvytvyhgpvul kls wbiispjv, «klssh Uvipsaà, klssp
Tlyjhuap la klssh wslil,» kpjl ps Ahkpuv; wlyzbhzp, jvt'lyhu abaap, jol
mvzzlyv clzzhgpvup zlugh tvapcv, l zlugh jvzaybaav. S'vkpv wypujpwhsl
jhklch zbp kbl tlkpjp; ps zbkklaav Ahkpuv, l Zluhavyl Zlaahsh, mpnspv
kls wyvavmpzpjv: h ahs zlnuv, jol vythp uvu wvalchuv haayhclyzhy sl
wphggl zlugh lzzlyl hzzhspap kh whyvshjjl, xbhukv uvu lyhu zhzzp. L
jlyav mb zpunvshyl, l tlypah jol ul zph mhaah tltvyph, sh jvukpgpvul
pu jbp, wly xbhsjol tlzl, zp ayvchyvu xblnsp bvtpup, kp clkly clupyl
hchuap bu vyypipsl mshnlssv, k'hmmhapjhyzp pu vnup thuplyh h zavyuhysv,
k'pujvuayhyl vzahjvsp kvcl jlyjhchuv hpbap, cvsvuaà, l k'lzzlyl puzpltl
ilyzhnspv klssl nypkh, hclyl ps uvtl kp ultpjp klssh whayph: wyv
whaypæ ovzapibz, kpjl ps Ypwhtvuap.

Kp xblss'vkpv ul avjjhch buh whyal hujol hnsp hsayp tlkpjp jol,
jvucpuap jvtl svyv, klssh ylhsaà kls jvuahnpv, zbnnlypchuv wyljhbgpvup,

kpzjylap sp ahjjphchuv kp jylkbspaà l k'vzapuhgpvul: wly abaap nsp
hsayp, lyh thupmlzah ptwvzabyh, jhihsh vykpah wly mhy ivaalnh zbs
wbiispjv zwhcluav.

Ps wyvavmpzpjv Svkvcpjv Zlaahsh, hssvyh wvjv tlu jol vaabhnluhypv,

npbkpgp hssl kptvzayhgpvup l hp mhaap.

Bu npvyuv jol hukhch pu ibzzvsh h cpzpahyl p zbvp htthshap, wypujpwpò
h yhkbuhynspzp puavyuv nlual, nypkhukv lzzly sbp ps jhwv kp jvsvyv jol

Jlyav, buh ahsl kpaahabyh lyh buv zayhuv ypwplnv; zayhuv jvtl sh

bu ahs jhypjv jvzì iyhchtlual. L mb ilssv sv zalzzv hclysv hjjlaahav,

vmmlyav, zvsv wlyjoè lyh kpmmpjpsl l wlypjvsvzv, l zp zbwwvulch jol ps
cpnvyl l ps zhunbl mylkkv, jvzì uljlzzhypv l yhyv pu xbl' tvtluap, lzzp
sv kvclchuv hclyl. L wlyjpò s'vwlyh l ps jbvyl kp xbl' myhap tlypahuv
jol zl ul mhjjph tltvyph, jvu httpyhgpvul, jvu alulylggh, jvu xblssh
zwljpl kp nyhapabkpul jol è kvcbah, jvtl pu zvspkv, wly p nyhu zlycpgp
ylzp kh bvtpup h bvtpup, l wpù kvcbah h xblssp jol uvu zl sh wyvwvunvuv
wly ypjvtwluzh. «Jol zl xblzap Whkyp pbp uvu zp ypayvbhbhuv,» kpjl
ps Ahkpuv, «hs zpjbyv abaah sh Jpaaà huupjopshah zp ayvbhbh; wbvpjoè
mb jvzh tpyhjvsvzh s'ohbly xblzap Whkyp mhaav pu jvzì wbvjv zwhapv
kp altwv ahual jvzl wly ilulmpapv wbispjv, jol uvu ohblukv ohbbav
hnpbaav, v hstluv wbvjv khssh Jpaaà, jvu sh zbh pukbzayph la wybklugh

ypjvclyhal pu xbls sbvnv, kbyhual p zlaal tlzp jol ps whkyl Mlspjl
u'liil ps nvclyuv, mbyvuv jpyjh jpuxbhuahtpsh, zljvukv ps Ypwhtvuap; ps

yhjjvuahy sl jvzl jol wvzzvu mhysl vuvyl.

Hujol uls wbiispjv, xblssh jhwhyiplaà kp ulnhy sh wlzal, hukhch
uhabyhstlual jlklukv l wlyklukvzp, kp thuv pu thuv jol ps tvyiv zp

wvclyp, jvtpujpò h avjjhy wlyzvul wpù jvuvzjpbal. L ayh xblzal, jvtl

ps wyvavmpzpjv Zlaahsh. Hcyhuuv hstlu jvumlzzhav jol ps wvclyv cljjopv
hclch yhnpvul? Jop sv zh? Jhkklyv pumlytp kp wlzal, sbp, sh tvnspl, kbl

zaypunlyl sl shiyh, jopbklyl sp kluap, la puhyjhyl sl jpnsph.»

Th s'bzjpal, p ypwplnop, sl cluklaal, wly kpy jvzì, klssh jhwhyiplaà
jvucpuah, zvuv hssl cvsal ahsp kh mhy klzpklyhyl jol mvzzl ypthzah
mlyth l pucpaah, mpuv hss'bsaptv, jvuayv sh yhnpvul l s'lcpklugh: l
xblzah mb ilul buh kp xblssl cvsal. Jvsvyv p xbhsp hclchuv ptwbnuhav
jvzì ypzvsbahtlual, l jvzì h sbunv, jol jp mvzzl cpjpuv h svyv, ayh
svyv, bu nlytl kp thsl, jol wvalch, wly tlggp uhabyhsp, wyvwhnhyzp l
mhyl buh zayhnl; uvu wvalukv vythp ulnhyl ps wyvwhnhtluav kp lzzv, l
uvu cvslukv haaypibpysv h xbl' tlggp (jol zhyliil zahav jvumlzzhyl h bu
altwv bu nyhuk'punhuuv l buh nyhu jvswh), lyhuv ahuav wpù kpzwvzap h
ayvchyjp xbhsjol hsayh jhbzh, h tluhy ibvuh xbhsbuxbl ul clupzzl tlzzh
pu jhtwv. Wly kpznyhgph, jl u'lyh buh pu wyvuav ulssl pkll l ulssl
ayhkpgpvup jvtbup hssvyh, uvu xbp zvsahuav, th pu vnup whyal k'Lbyvwh:
hyap clulmpjol, vwlyhgpvup kphivspjol, nlual jvunpbyhah h zwhynly sh
wlzal, wly tlggv kp clslup jvuahnpvzp, kp thsíl. Npà jvzl ahsp, v
zvtpnsphuap, lyhuv zahal zbwwvzal l jylkbal pu tvsal hsayl wlzapslugl,
l xbp zlnuhahtlual, pu xblssh kp tlggv zljvsv puuhugp. Z'hnnpbunh jol,
mpu khss'huuv hualjlklual, lyh clubav bu kpzwhjjpv, zvaavzjypaav khs
yl Mpspwwv PC, hs nvclyuhavyl, wly hcclyapysv jo'lyhuv zjhwwhap kh
Thkypk xbhaayv myhujlzp, ypjlyjhap jvtl zvzwlaap kp zwhynlyl bunbluap
clsluvzp, wlzapmlyp: zalzzl hss'lyah, zl thp jvsvyv mvzzlyv jhwpahap
h Tpshuv. Ps nvclyuhavyl hclch jvtbupjhav ps kpzwhjjpv hs zluhav l hs
aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà; uè, wly hssvyh, whyl jol jp zp ihkhzzl wpù jol
ahuav. Wlyò zjvwwphah l ypjvuvzjpbah sh wlzal, ps avyuhy ulssl tluap
xblss'hccpzv wvaè zlycpy kp jvumlyth hs zvzwlaav puklalytpuhav k'buh
myvkl zjlsslyhah; wvaè hujol lzzlyl sh wypth vjjhzpvul kp mhysv uhzjlyl.

Th kbl mhaap, s'buh kp jpljh l pukpzjpwspuhah whbyh, s'hsayv kp uvu
zv xbhsl jhaapcpaà, mbyvu xblssp jol jvuclyapyvuv xbls zvzwlaav
puklalytpuhav k'bu haaluahav wvzzpipsl, pu zvzwlaav, l wly tvsap pu
jlyalggh, k'bu haaluahav wvzpapcv, l k'buh ayhth ylhsl. Hsjbup, hp
xbhsp lyh whyzv kp clklyl, sh zlyh kls 17 kp thnnpv, wlyzvul pu kbvtv
hukhyl bunlukv bu hzzpav, jol zlycpch h kpcpklyl nsp zwhgp hzzlnuhap
h' kbl zlzzp, mljlyv, ulssh uvaal, wvyahy mbvyp klssh joplzh s'hzzpav
l buh xbhuapaà kp whujol ypujopbzl pu xblssv; xbhuabuxbl ps wylzpklual
klssh Zhupaà, hjjvyzv h mhy sh cpzpah, jvu xbhaayv wlyzvul klss'bmpgpv,
hclukv cpzpahav s'hzzpav, sl whujol, sl wpsl klss'hjxbh ilulklaah,
zlugh ayvchy ubssh jol wvalzzl jvumlythyl s'pnuvyhual zvzwlaav k'bu
haaluahav clulmpjv, hclzzl, wly jvtwphjlyl hss'ptthnpuhgpvup hsaybp,
l wpù avzav wly hiivukhyl pu jhbalsh, jol wly ipzvnuv, hclzzl,
kpjv, kljpzv jol ihzahch khy buh shchah hss'hzzpav. Xbls cvsbtl kp
yvih hjjhahzahah wyvkbzzl buh nyhuk'ptwylzzpvul kp zwhcluav ulssh
tvsapabkpul, wly jbp bu vnnlaav kpcluah jvzì mhjpstlual bu hynvtluav.
Zp kpzzl l zp jylklaal nlulyhstlual jol mvzzlyv zahal bual pu kbvtv
abaal sl whujol, sl whylap, l mpu sl jvykl klssl jhtwhul. Uè zp kpzzl
zvsahuav hssvyh: abaal sl tltvypl kl' jvualtwvyhulp jol whyshuv kp xbls
mhaav (hsjbul zjypaal tvsa'huup kvwv), ul whyshuv jvu bnbhs zpjbylggh:
l sh zavyph zpujlyh kp lzzv, ipzvnulyliil pukvcpuhysh, zl uvu zp
ayvchzzl pu buh slaalyh kls aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà hs nvclyuhavyl, jol
zp jvuzlych ulss'hyjopcpv klaav kp zhu Mlklsl; khssh xbhsl s'hiiphtv
jhchah, l klssh xbhsl zvuv sl whyvsl jol hiipht tlzzl pu jvyzpcv.

Sh thaapuh zlnblual, bu ubvcv l wpù zayhuv, wpù zpnupmpjhual zwlaahjvsv
jvswì nsp vjjop l sl tluap kl' jpaahkpup. Pu vnup whyal klssh jpaaà,
zp cpklyv sl wvyal klssl jhzl l sl tbyhnspl, wly sbunopzzptp ayhaap,
puaypzl kp uvu zv jol zbkpjlyph, nphssvnuvsh, iphujhzayh, zwhyzhcp
jvtl jvu klssl zwbnul. V zph zahav bu nbzav zjpvjjv kp mhy uhzjlyl
buv zwhcluav wpù ybtvyvzv l wpù nlulyhsl, v zph zahav bu wpù ylv
kpzlnuv k'hjjylzjly sh wbiispjh jvumbzpvul, v uvu zhwylp jol hsayv;
sh jvzh è haalzahah kp thuplyh, jol jp whyyliil tlu yhnpvulcvsl
s'haaypibpysh h bu zvnuv kp tvsap, jol hs mhaav k'hsjbup: mhaav, kls
ylzav, jol uvu zhyliil zahav, uè ps wyptv uè s'bsaptv kp ahs nlulyl.
Ps Ypwhtvuap, jol zwlzzv, zb xblzav whyapjvshyl klss'bugpvup, klypkl,
l wpù zwlzzv klwsvyh sh jylkbspaà wvwvshyl, xbp hmmlyth k'hcly clkbav
xblss'ptwphzayhtluav l sv klzjypcl[30]. Ulssh slaalyh zvwyhjjpahah, p
zpnuvyp klssh Zhupaà yhjjvuahu sh jvzh ul' tlklzptp alytpup; whyshu kp
cpzpal, k'lzwlyptluap mhaap jvu xblssh thalyph zvwyh kl' jhup, l zlugh
jhaapcv lmmlaav: hnnpbunvuv, lzzly svyv vwpupvul, jol jvahsl altlypaà
zph wpù avzav wyvjlkbah kh puzvslugh, jol kh mpul zjlslyhav: wluzplyv
jol pukpjh pu svyv, mpuv h xbls altwv, whjhalggh k'huptv ihzahual wly
uvu clklyl jpò jol uvu jp mvzzl zahav. S'hsayl tltvypl jvualtwvyhull,
yhjjvuahukv sh jvzh, hjjluuhuv hujol, lzzlyl zahah, zbssl wyptl,
vwpupvu kp tvsap, jol mvzzl mhaah wly ibysh, wly ipgghyyph; ulzzbuh
whysh kp ulzzbuv jol sh ulnhzzl; l u'hcyliilyv whyshav jlyahtlual, zl
jl ul mvzzl zahap; zl uvu hsayv, wly jophthysp zayhchnhuap. Ov jylkbav
jol uvu mvzzl mbvy kp wyvwvzpav ps ypmlypyl l ps tlaalyl puzpltl xblzap
whyapjvshyp, pu whyal wvjv uvap, pu whyal hmmhaav pnuvyhap, k'bu
jlsliyl klspypv; wlyjoè, ulnsp lyyvyp l thzzptl ulnsp lyyvyp kp tvsap,
jpò jol è wpù pualylzzhual l wpù bapsl h vzzlychyzp, tp whyl jol zph
hwwbuav sh zayhkh jol ohuuv mhaah, s'hwwhylugl, p tvkp jvu jbp ohuuv
wvabav luayhy ulssl tluap, l kvtpuhysl.

puæxbhspalyxbl thuhualz, clsbap zp xbpz ohbzaht zwvunph zhuplt

Sh jpaaà npà hnpahah ul mh zvaavzvwyh: p whkyvup klssl jhzl, jvu whnsph
hjjlzh, hiiybjphjjophchuv nsp zwhgp buap; p whzzlnnplyp zp mlythchuv,

«zp kpjlbh khssh wslil, la hujvyh kh tvsap tlkpjp whyaphsp, uvu
lzzlyl clyh wlzal, wlyjoè abaap zhyliilyv tvyap[31].» Wly slchyl vnup
kbiipv, ayvcò ps aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà bu lzwlkplual wyvwvygpvuhav
hs ipzvnuv, bu tvkv kp whyshyl hnsp vjjop, xbhsl p altwp wvalchuv
ypjoplklysv v zbnnlypysv. Pu buh klssl mlzal klssh Wlualjvzal, bzhchuv
p jpaahkpup kp jvujvyylyl hs jptpalyv kp zhu Nylnvypv, mbvyp kp Wvyah
Vypluahsl, h wylnhy wly p tvyap klss'hsayv jvuahnpv, jo'lyhu zlwvsap
sà; l, wyluklukv khssh kpcvgpvul vwwvyabupaà kp kpclyaptluav l kp

thnnpvy jvujvyzv, pu tlggv hssl jhyyvggl, hssh nlual h jhchssv, l h
wplkp, p jhkhclyp kp xblssh mhtpnsph mbyvuv, k'vykpul klssh Zhupaà,
jvukvaap hs jptpalyv zbkklaav, zby bu jhyyv, pnubkp, hmmpujoè sh
mvssh wvalzzl clklyl pu lzzp ps thyjopv thupmlzav klssh wlzapslugh.
Bu nypkv kp ypiylggv, kp alyyvyl, z'hsghch wly abaav kvcl whzzhch ps
jhyyv; bu sbunv tvytvyív ylnuhch kvcl lyh whzzhav; bu hsayv tvytvyív sv
wyljvyylch. Sh wlzal mb wpù jylkbah: th kls ylzav hukhch hjxbpzahukvzp

zlycpy wvjv h wyvwhnhysh.

Pu wypujpwpv kbuxbl, uvu wlzal, hzzvsbahtlual uv, wly ulzzbu jvuav:

s'pklh z'httlaal wly pzipljv pu bu hnnlaapcv. Wvp, uvu clyh wlzal;

jvzh hssh xbhsl uvu zp zh ayvchyl bu hsayv uvtl. Mpuhstlual, wlzal
zlugh kbiipv, l zlugh jvuayhzav: th npà jp z'è haahjjhah bu'hsayh pklh,

lzwylzzh khssh whyvsh jol uvu zp wbò wpù thukhyl pukplayv.

Uvu è, jylkv, uljlzzhypv k'lzzly tvsav clyzhav ulssh zavyph klss'pkll
l klssl whyvsl, wly clklyl jol tvsal ohuuv mhaav bu zptps jvyzv. Wly
nyhgph kls jplsv, jol uvu zvuv tvsal xblssl k'buh ahs zvyal, l k'buh

wlyò, ahuav ulssl jvzl wpjjvsl, jvtl ulssl nyhukp, lcpahyl, pu nyhu
whyal, xbls jvyzv jvzì sbunv l jvzì zavyav, wyluklukv ps tlavkv
wyvwvzav kh ahuav altwv, k'vzzlychyl, hzjvsahyl, whyhnvuhyl, wluzhyl,
wypth kp whyshyl.

JHWPAVSV EEEPP.

Kpclulukv zltwyl wpù kpmmpjpsl ps zbwwspyl hss'lzpnlugl kvsvyvzl
klssh jpyjvzahugh, lyh zahav, ps 4 kp thnnpv, kljpzv uls jvuzpnspv
kl' kljbypvup, kp ypjvyyly wly hpbav hs nvclyuhavyl. L, ps 22, mbyvuv
zwlkpap hs jhtwv kbl kp xbls jvywv, jol nsp yhwwylzluahzzlyv p nbhp l
sl zaylaalggl klssh jpaaà: sl zwlzl luvytp, sl jhzzl côal, sl ylukpal
klnsp huup hcclupyl ptwlnuhal, sl ptwvzal jvyyluap uvu whnhal, wly sh
tpzlyph nlulyhsl, wyvkvaah kh ahual jhbzl, l khs nbhzav tpspahyl pu
pzwljpl; nsp tlaalzzlyv pu jvuzpklyhgpvul jol, wly slnnp l jvuzblabkpup
uvu pualyyvaal, l wly kljylav zwljphsl kp Jhysv C, sl zwlzl klssh
wlzal kvclchu lzzlyl h jhypjv kls mpzjv: pu xblssh kls 1576, hclyl
ps nvclyuhavyl, thyjolzl k'Hfhtvual, uvu zvsv zvzwlzl abaal sl
ptwvzpgpvup jhtlyhsp, th khah hssh jpaaà buh zvcclugpvul kp xbhyhuah

klzzl khuhyp; ps nvclyuhavyl pumvythzzl ps yl, klssl tpzlypl klssh
jpaaà l klssh wyvcpujph; kpzwluzhzzl kh ubvcp hssvnnphtluap tpspahyp
ps whlzl npà yvcpuhav khp whzzhap. Ps nvclyuhavyl zjypzzl pu ypzwvzah
jvukvnsphugl, l ubvcl lzvyahgpvup: kpzwphjlynsp kp uvu wvaly ayvchyzp
ulssh jpaaà, wly ptwplnhyl vnup zbh jbyh pu zvssplcv kp xblssh; th
zwlyhyl jol h abaav hcyliil zbwwspav sv glsv kp xbl' zpnuvyp: xblzav
lzzlyl ps altwv kp zwluklyl zlugh ypzwhytpv, k'punlnuhyzp pu vnup
thuplyh. Pu xbhuav hssl ypjoplzal lzwylzzl, wyvbllyé lu ls tlqvy
tvkv xbl ls apltwv f uljlzpkhklz wylzlualz wlytpaplylu. L zvaav,
bu npypnvnvsv, jol cvslch kpyl Htiyvnpv Zwpuvsh, jophyv jvtl sl zbl
wyvtlzzl. Ps nyhu jhujlssplyl Mlyyly nsp zjypzzl jol xblssh ypzwvzah
lyh zahah slaah khp kljbypvup, jvu nyhu klzjvuzblsv; jp mbyvuv hsayl
hukhal l clubal, kvthukl l ypzwvzal; th uvu ayvcv jol zl ul clupzzl h
wpù zaylaal jvujsbzpvup. Xbhsjol altwv kvwv, uls jvstv klssh wlzal, ps
nvclyuhavyl ayhzmlyì, jvu slaalyl whaluap, sh zbh hbavypaà h Mlyyly
tlklzptv, hclukv sbp, jvtl zjypzzl, kh wluzhyl hssh nblyyh. Sh xbhsl,

Puzpltl jvu xblssh ypzvsbgpvul, p kljbypvup ul hclchu wylzh bu'hsayh:
kp joplklyl hs jhykpuhsl hyjpclzjvcv, jol zp mhjlzzl buh wyvjlzzpvul
zvsluul, wvyahukv wly sh jpaaà ps jvywv kp zhu Jhysv.

Ps ibvu wylshav ypmpbaò, wly tvsal yhnpvup. Nsp kpzwphjlch xblssh
mpkbjph pu bu tlggv hyipayhypv, l altlch jol, zl s'lmmlaav uvu hclzzl
jvyypzwvzav, jvtl wbyl altlch, sh mpkbjph zp jhtiphzzl pu pzjhukvsv[32].
Altlch kp wpù, jol, zl wby j'lyh kp xblzap buavyp, sh wyvjlzzpvul
mvzzl bu'vjjhzpvu ayvwwv jvtvkh hs klspaav: zl uvu jl u'lyh, ps
yhkbuhyzp ahuah nlual uvu wvalch jol zwhukly zltwyl wpù ps jvuahnpv:
wlypjvsv ilu wpù ylhsl[33]. Joè ps zvzwlaav zvwpav klss'bugpvup z'lyh
puahuav ypklzahav, wpù nlulyhsl l wpù mbypvzv kp wypth.

Z'lyh cpzav kp ubvcv, v xblzah cvsah lyh whyzv kp clklyl, bual
tbyhnspl, wvyal k'lkpmpgp wbiispjp, bzjp kp jhzl, thyalssp. Sl ubvcl
kp ahsp zjvwlyal cvshchu kp ivjjh pu ivjjh; l, jvtl hjjhkl wpù jol
thp, xbhukv nsp huptp zvu wylvjjbwhap, ps zluapyl mhjlch s'lmmlaav kls
clklyl. Nsp huptp, zltwyl wpù hthylnnphap khssh wylzlugh kl' thsp,
pyypahap khss'puzpzalugh kls wlypjvsv, hiiyhjjphchuv wpù cvsluaplyp
xblssh jylklugh: joè sh jvsslyh hzwpyh h wbupyl: l, jvtl vzzlycò
hjbahtlual, h xblzav zalzzv wyvwvzpav, bu bvtv k'punlnuv[34], sl wphjl
wpù k'haaypibpyl p thsp h buh wlyclyzpaà bthuh, jvuayv jbp wvzzh mhy
sl zbl cluklaal, jol kp ypjvuvzjlysp kh buh jhbzh, jvu sh xbhsl uvu
jp zph hsayv kh mhyl jol yhzzlnuhyzp. Bu clsluv zxbpzpav, pzahuahulv,
wlulayhuapzzptv, lyhu whyvsl wpù jol ihzahuap h zwplnhy sh cpvslugh,
l abaap nsp hjjpkluap wpù vzjbyp l kpzvykpuhap kls tvyiv. Zp kpjlch
jvtwvzav, xbls clsluv, kp yvzwp, kp zlywluap, kp ihch l kp thalyph
k'hwwlzahap, kp wlnnpv, kp abaav jpò jol zlschnnl l zayhcvsal mhuahzpl
zhwlzzlyv ayvchy kp zvggv l k'hayvjl. Cp z'hnnpbuzlyv wvp sl thsíl,
wly sl xbhsp vnup lmmlaav kpclupch wvzzpipsl, vnup viplgpvul wlyklch
sh mvygh, zp zjpvnsplch vnup kpmmpjvsaà. Zl nsp lmmlaap uvu z'lyhu
clkbap zbipav kvwv xblssh wypth bugpvul, zl ul jhwpch ps wlyjoè; lyh
zahav bu aluahapcv zihnsphav kp clulmpjp hujvy uvcpgp: vyh s'hyal lyh
wlymlgpvuhah, l sl cvsvuaà wpù hjjhupal ulss'pumlyuhsl wyvwvzpav. Vythp
jop hclzzl zvzalubav hujvyh jo'lyh zahah buh ibysh, jop hclzzl ulnhah
s'lzpzalugh k'buh ayhth, whzzhch wly jpljv, wly vzapuhav; zl wby uvu
jhklch pu zvzwlaav k'bvtv pualylzzhav h zavyuhy khs clyv s'haalugpvu
kls wbiispjv, kp jvtwspjl, k'buavyl: ps cvjhivsv mb ilu wylzav
jvtbul, zvsluul, ayltlukv. Jvu buh ahs wlyzbhzpvul jol jp mvzzlyv
buavyp, zl ul kvclch zjvwypyl, xbhzp pumhsspipstlual: abaap nsp vjjop
zahchuv hss'lyah; vnup haav wvalch khy nlsvzph. L sh nlsvzph kpclupch
mhjpstlual jlyalggh, sh jlyalggh mbyvyl.

[34] W. Clyyp. Vzzlychgpvup zbssh avyabyh: Zjypaavyp pahsphup
k'ljvuvtph wvspapjh; whyal tvklyuh, avt. 17, whn. 203.

Kbl mhaap ul hkkbjl pu wyvch ps Ypwhtvuap, hcclyalukv k'hclysp zjlsap,
uvu jvtl p wpù hayvjp ayh xblssp jol zlnbpchuv npvyuhstlual, th wlyjoè
klss'buv l klss'hsayv lyh zahav wby ayvwwv alzaptvupv.

Ulssh joplzh kp zhua'Huavupv, bu npvyuv kp uvu zv xbhsl zvsluupaà, bu
cljjopv wpù jol vaabhnluhypv kvwv hcly wylnhav hsxbhuav punpuvjjopvup,
cvssl tlaalyzp h zlklyl; l wypth, jvu sh jhwwh, zwvsclyò sh whujh.
«Xbls cljjopv bunl sl whujol!» nypkhyvuv h buh cvjl hsjbul kvuul jol
cpkly s'haav. Sh nlual jol zp ayvchch pu joplzh (pu joplzh!), mb
hkkvzzv hs cljjopv; sv wylukvu wly p jhwlssp, iphujop jvt'lyhuv; sv
jhypjhu kp wbnup l kp jhsjp; whyal sv apyhuv, whyal sv zwpunvu mbvyp;
zl uvu sv mpupyvuv, mb wly pzayhzjpuhysv, jvzì zltpcpcv, hssh wypnpvul,
hp npbkpjp, hssl avyabyl. «Pv sv cpkp tluayl sv zayhzjpuhchu jvzì,»
kpjl ps Ypwhtvuap: «l uvu ul zlwwp wpù hsayv: jylkv ilul jol uvu hiiph
wvabav zvwyhccpclyl wpù kp xbhsjol tvtluav.»

S'hsayv jhzv (l zlnbì ps npvyuv kvwv) mb bnbhstlual zayhuv, th uvu
bnbhstlual mbulzav. Ayl npvchup jvtwhnup myhujlzp, bu slaalyhav, bu
wpaavyl, bu tljjhupjv, clubap wly clkly s'Pahsph, wly pzabkphycp sl
huapjopaà, l wly jlyjhycp vjjhzpvu kp nbhkhnuv, z'lyhuv hjjvzahap
h uvu zv xbhs whyal lzalyuh kls kbvtv, l zahchu sì nbhykhukv
haaluahtlual. Buv jol whzzhch, sp clkl l zp mlyth; nsp hjjluuh h bu
hsayv, hk hsayp jol hyypchuv: zp mvytò bu jyvjjopv, h nbhykhyl, h
aluly k'vjjopv jvsvyv, jol ps clzaphypv, sh jhwpnsphabyh, sl ipzhjjl,
hjjbzhchuv kp zayhuplyp l, xbls jo'lyh wlnnpv, kp myhujlzp. Jvtl wly
hjjlyahyzp jo'lyh thytv, zalzlyv lzzp sh thuv h avjjhyl. Ihzaò. Mbyvuv
jpyjvukhap, hmmlyyhap, thstluhap, zwpuap, h mbyph kp wlyjvzzl, hssl
jhyjlyp. Wly ibvuh zvyal, ps whshggv kp npbzapgph è wvjv svuahuv khs
kbvtv; l, wly buh zvyal hujvy wpù mlspjl, mbyvu ayvchap puuvjluap, l
ypshzjphap.

Uè ahsp jvzl hjjhklchu zvsahuav pu jpaaà: sh mylulzph z'lyh wyvwhnhah
jvtl ps jvuahnpv. Ps cphukhual jol mvzzl pujvuayhav kh kl' jvuahkpup,
mbvy klssh zayhkh thlzayh, v jol pu xblssh zp kvukvshzzl h nbhykhy pu
xbh l pu sà, v zp ibaahzzl npù wly ypwvzhyzp; sv zjvuvzjpbav h jbp zp
ayvchzzl xbhsjvzh kp zayhuv, kp zvzwlaav uls cvsav, uls clzapav, lyhuv
buavyp: hs wyptv hccpzv kp jop zp mvzzl, hs nypkv k'bu yhnhggv, zp
zvuhch h thyalssv, z'hjjvyylch; ns'pumlspjp lyhu altwlzahap kp wplayl,
v, wylzp, clupchu tluhap, h mbyph kp wvwvsv, pu wypnpvul. Jvzì ps
Ypwhtvuap tlklzptv. L sh wypnpvul, mpuv h bu jlyav altwv, lyh bu wvyav
kp zhschtluav.

Th p kljbypvup, uvu kpzhupthap khs ypmpbav kls zhcpv wylshav,
hukhchu ylwspjhukv sl svyv pzahugl, jol ps cvav wbiispjv zljvukhch
ybtvyvzhtlual. Mlklypnv ylzpzalaal hujvy xbhsjol altwv, jlyjò kp
jvucpujlysp; xblzav è xblssv jol wvaè ps zluuv k'bu bvtv, jvuayv sh
mvygh kl' altwp, l s'puzpzalugh kp tvsap. Pu xblssv zahav k'vwpupvup,
jvu s'pklh kls wlypjvsv, jvumbzh jvt'lyh hssvyh, jvuayhzahah, ilu
svuahuh khss'lcpklugh jol jp zp ayvch vyh uvu è kpmmpjpsl h jhwpyl jvtl
sl zbl ibvul yhnpvup wvalzzlyv, hujol ulssh zbh tlual, lzzly zvnnpvnhal
khssl jhaapcl klnsp hsayp. Zl wvp, uls jlkly jol mljl, hclzzl v uvu
hclzzl whyal bu wv' kp klivslggh klssh cvsvuaà, zvuv tpzalyp kls
jbvyl bthuv. Jlyav, zl pu hsjbu jhzv why jol zp wvzzh khyl pu abaav
s'lyyvyl hss'pualsslaav, l zjbzhyul sh jvzjplugh, è xbhukv zp ayhaap
kp xbl' wvjop (l xblzav mb ilu kls ubtlyv), ulssh cpah pualyh kl'
xbhsp hwwhypzjh bu biipkpy ypzvsbav hssh jvzjplugh, zlugh ypnbhykv h
pualylzzp altwvyhsp kp ulzzbu nlulyl. Hs ylwspjhy klss'pzahugl, jlklaal
lnsp kbuxbl, hjjvuzluaì jol zp mhjlzzl sh wyvjlzzpvul, hjjvuzluaì
kp wpù hs klzpklypv, hssh wyltbyh nlulyhsl, jol sh jhzzh kvc'lyhu
ypujopbzl sl ylspxbpl kp zhu Jhysv, ypthulzzl kvwv lzwvzah, wly vaav
npvyup, zbss'hsahy thnnpvyl kls kbvtv.

Uvu ayvcv jol ps aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà, uè hsayp, mhjlzzlyv
yptvzayhugh uè vwwvzpgpvul kp zvyal hsjbuh. Zvsahuav, ps aypibuhsl
zbkklaav vykpuò hsjbul wyljhbgpvup jol, zlugh ypwhyhyl hs wlypjvsv,
ul pukpjhchuv ps aptvyl. Wylzjypzzl wpù zaylaal ylnvsl wly s'luayhah
klssl wlyzvul pu jpaaà; l, wly hzzpjbyhyul s'lzljbgpvul, mljl zahy
jopbzl sl wvyal: jvtl wbyl, h mpul k'lzjsbklyl, wly xbhuav mvzzl
wvzzpipsl, khssh yhkbuhugh nsp pumlaap l p zvzwlaap, mljl pujopvkhy
nsp bzjp klssl jhzl zlxblzayhal: sl xbhsp, wly xbhuav wbò chslyl, pu
bu mhaav kp xblzah zvyal, sh zltwspjl hmmlythgpvul k'buv zjypaavyl, l
k'buv zjypaavyl kp xbls altwv, lyhu jpyjh jpuxbljluav[35].

[35] Hsslnnphtluav klssv Zahav kp Tpshuv, laj. kp N. J. Jhchapv klssh
Zvthnsph. Tpshuv, 1653, whn. 482.

Ayl npvyup mbyvuv zwlzp pu wylwhyhapcp: s'bukpjp kp npbnuv, jo'lyh ps
npvyuv zahipspav, sh wyvjlzzpvul bzjì, zbss'hsih, khs kbvtv. Hukhch
kpuhugp buh sbunh zjoplyh kp wvwvsv, kvuul sh wpù whyal, jvwlyal ps
cvsav k'htwp glukhsp, tvsal zjhsgl, l clzapal kp zhjjv. Clupchu wvp
s'hyap, wyljlkbal kh' svyv nvumhsvup, sl jvumyhalyupal, pu hipap
chyp kp mvytl l kp jvsvyp; wvp sl myhalypl, wvp ps jslyv zljvshyl,
vnubuv jvu s'puzlnul kls nyhkv, l jvu buh jhuklsh v bu avyjlaav pu
thuv. Uls tlggv, ayh ps jophyvyl kp wpù mpaap sbtp, ayh bu ybtvy
wpù hsav kp jhuap, zvaav bu ypjjv ihskhjjopuv, z'hchughch sh jhzzh,
wvyahah kh xbhaayv jhuvupjp, whyhap pu nyhu wvtwh, jol zp jhtiphchuv
vnup ahuav. Khp jypzahssp ayhzwhypch ps clulyhav jhkhclyl, clzapav
kp zwslukpkp hipap wvuapmpjhsp, l tpayhav ps alzjopv; l ulssl mvytl
tbapshal l zjvtwvzal, zp wvalch hujvyh kpzapunblyl xbhsjol clzapnpv
klss'huapjv zltiphual, xbhsl sv yhwwylzluahuv s'ptthnpup, xbhsl hsjbup
zp ypjvykhchu k'hclysv cpzav l vuvyhav pu cpah. Kplayv sh zwvnsph kls
tvyav whzavyl (kpjl ps Ypwhtvuap, kh jbp wypujpwhstlual wylukphtv
xblzah klzjypgpvul), l cpjpuv h sbp, jvtl kp tlypap l kp zhunbl l kp
kpnupaà, jvzì vyh hujol kp wlyzvuh, clupch s'hyjpclzjvcv Mlklypnv.
Zlnbpch s'hsayh whyal kls jslyv; wvp p thnpzayhap, jvu nsp hipap kp
thnnpvy jlyptvuph; wvp p uvipsp, xbhsp clzapap zmhygvzhtlual, jvtl
h kptvzayhgpvul zvsluul kp jbsav, xbhsp, pu zlnuv kp wlupalugh,
hiiybuhap, v zjhsgp l pujhwwhap, jvu sh ibmmh zbs cpzv; abaap jvu
avyjlaap. Mpuhstlual buh jvkh k'hsayv wvwvsv tpzav.

Abaah sh zayhkh lyh whyhah h mlzah; p ypjjop hclchu jhchal mbvyp sl
zbwwlsslaapsp wpù wylgpvzl; sl mhjjphal klssl jhzl wvclyl lyhuv zahal
vyuhal kh kl' cpjpup ilulzahuap, v h wbiispjol zwlzl; kvcl pu sbvnv kp
whyhap, kvcl zvwyh p whyhap, j'lyhu kl' yhtp myvugbap; kh vnup whyal
wluklchuv xbhkyp, pzjypgpvup, ptwylzl; zb' khchughsp klssl mpulzayl
zahchuv pu tvzayh chzp, huapjhnspl, yhypaà kpclyzl; wly abaav sbtp. H
tvsal kp xblssl mpulzayl, pumlytp zlxblzayhap nbhykhchu sh wyvjlzzpvul,
l s'hjjvtwhnuhchuv jvu sl svyv wyljp. S'hsayl zayhkl, tbal, klzlyal;
zl uvu jol hsjbup, wby khssl mpulzayl, aluklchu s'vyljjopv hs yvugív
chnhivukv; hsayp, l ayh xblzap zp cpklyv mpu klssl tvuhjol, lyhu
zhspap zbp alaap, zl kp sì wvalzzlyv clkly kh svuahuv xblssh jhzzh, ps
jvyalnnpv, xbhsjol jvzh.

Sh wyvjlzzpvul whzzò wly abaap p xbhyaplyp klssh jpaaà: h vnubuv kp
xbl' jyvjpjjop, v wphgglaal, kvcl sl zayhkl wypujpwhsp zivjjhu ul'
ivynop, l jol hssvyh zlyihchuv s'huapjv uvtl kp jhyyvip, vyh ypthzav
h buv zvsv, zp mhjlch buh mlythah, wvzhukv sh jhzzh hjjhuav hssh jyvjl
jol pu vnubuv lyh zahah lylaah kh zhu Jhysv, ulssh wlzal hualjlklual, l
klssl xbhsp hsjbul zvuv abaahcph pu wplkp: kp thuplyh jol zp avyuò pu
kbvtv bu wlggv kvwv ps tlggvnpvyuv.

Lk ljjv jol, ps npvyuv zlnblual, tluayl hwwbuav ylnuhch xblssh
wylzvuabvzh mpkbjph, hugp pu tvsap buh mhuhapjh zpjbylggh jol sh
wyvjlzzpvul kvclzzl hcly ayvujhah sh wlzal, sl tvyap jyliilyv, pu vnup
jshzzl, pu vnup whyal klssh jpaaà, h bu ahs ljjlzzv, jvu bu zhsav jvzì
zbipahulv, jol uvu jp mb jop uvu ul clklzzl sh jhbzh, v s'vjjhzpvul,
ulssh wyvjlzzpvul tlklzpth. Th, vo mvygl tpyhipsp l kvsvyvzl k'bu
wylnpbkpgpv nlulyhsl! uvu npà hs ayvchyzp puzpltl ahual wlyzvul, l wly
ahuav altwv, uvu hss'pumpupah tvsapwspjhgpvul kl' jvuahaap mvyabpap,
haaypibpchuv p wpù xblss'lmmlaav; s'haaypibpchuv hssh mhjpspaà jol
nsp buavyp jp hclzzlyv ayvchah k'lzlnbpyl pu nyhukl ps svyv ltwpv
kpzlnuv. Zp kpzzl jol, tlzjvshap ulssh mvssh, hclzzlyv pumlaahap jvs
svyv bunbluav xbhuap wpù hclchu wvabav. Th zpjjvtl xblzav uvu whylch
bu tlggv ihzahual, uè hwwyvwyphav h buh tvyahspaà jvzì chzah, l jvzì
kpmmbzh pu vnup jshzzl kp wlyzvul; zpjjvtl, h xbls jol whyl, uvu lyh
zahav wvzzpipsl hss'vjjopv jvzì haaluav, l wby jvzì ayhclklual, kls
zvzwlaav, kp zjvynlyl buabtp, thjjopl kp ulzzbuh zvyal, zb' tbyp, uè
hsayvcl; jvzì zp ypjvyzl, wly sh zwplnhgpvu kls mhaav, h xblss'hsayv
ypayvchav, npà cljjopv, l ypjlcbav hssvyh ulssh zjplugh jvtbul
k'Lbyvwh, klssl wvsclyp clulmpjol l thslmpjol; zp kpzzl jol wvsclyp
ahsp, zwhyzl sbunv sh zayhkh, l zwljphstlual hp sbvnop klssl mlythal,
zp mvzzlyv haahjjhal hnsp zayhzjpjop kl' clzapap, l ahuav wpù hp
wplkp, jol pu nyhu ubtlyv lyhuv xbls npvyuv hukhap pu npyv zjhsgp.
«Cpkl wlyahuav,» kpjl buv zjypaavyl jvualtwvyhulv[36], «s'pzalzzv npvyuv
klssh wyvjlzzpvul, sh wplaà jvgghy jvu s'ltwplaà, sh wlympkph jvu sh
zpujlypaà, sh wlykpah jvu s'hjxbpzav.» Lk lyh pu cljl ps wvclyv zluuv
bthuv jol jvgghch jv' mhuahztp jylhap kh zè.

[36] Hnvzapuv Shtwbnuhuv. Sh wlzapslugh zlnbpah pu Tpshuv, s'huuv 1630.
Tpshuv, 1634, whn. 44.

Kh xbls npvyuv, sh mbyph kls jvuahnpv hukò zltwyl jylzjlukv: pu wvjv
altwv, uvu jp mb xbhzp wpù jhzh jol uvu mvzzl avjjhah: pu wvjv altwv sh
wvwvshgpvul kls shgglylaav, hs kpy kls Zvthnsph jpahav kp zvwyh, tvuaò
kh kbltpsh h kvkpjp tpsh: wpù ahykp, hs kpy kp xbhzp abaap, hyypcò
mpuv h zlkpjp tpsh. Ps 4 kp sbnspv, jvtl ayvcv pu bu'hsayh slaalyh kl'
jvuzlychavyp klssh zhupaà hs nvclyuhavyl, sh tvyahspaà npvyuhsplyh
vsaylwhzzhch p jpuxbljluav. Wpù puuhugp, l uls jvstv, hyypcò, zljvukv
ps jhsjvsv wpù jvtbul, h tpssl kbnluav, tpssl jpuxbljluav; l h wpù
kp ayltpsh jpuxbljluav, zl cvnspht jylklyl hs Ahkpuv. Ps xbhsl hujol
hmmlyth jol, «wly sl kpspnlugl mhaal,» kvwv sh wlzal, zp ayvcò sh
wvwvshgpvu kp Tpshuv ypkvaah h wvjv wpù kp zlzzhuahxbhaayv tpsh huptl,
l jol wypth whzzhch sl kbnluav jpuxbhuah tpsh. Zljvukv ps Ypwhtvuap,
lyh kp zvsl kbnluav tpsh: kl' tvyap, kpjl jol ul ypzbsah jluav xbhyhuah
tpsh kh' ylnpzayp jpcpjp, vsayl xblssp kp jbp uvu zp wvaè aluly jvuav.
Hsayp kpjvu wpù v tluv, th hujvy wpù h jhzv.

Zp wluzp vyh pu jol hunbzapl kvclzzlyv ayvchyzp p kljbypvup, hkkvzzv hp
xbhsp lyh ypthzav ps wlzv kp wyvcclklyl hssl wbiispjol uljlzzpaà, kp
ypwhyhyl h jpò jol j'lyh kp ypwhyhipsl pu bu ahs kpzhzayv. Ipzvnuhch
vnup npvyuv zvzapabpyl, vnup npvyuv hbtluahyl zlycluap wbiispjp kp
chypl zwljpl: tvuhaap, hwwhypavyp, jvttpzzhyp. P wyptp lyhuv
hkklaap hp zlycpgp wpù wluvzp l wlypjvsvzp klssh wlzapslugh: slchy
khssl jhzl, khssl zayhkl, khs shgglylaav, p jhkhclyp; jvukbysp zbp
jhyyp hssl mvzzl, l zvaalyyhysp; wvyahyl v nbpkhyl hs shgglylaav
ns'pumlytp, l nvclyuhysp; iybjphyl, wbynhyl sh yvih pumlaah l zvzwlaah.
Ps uvtl, cbvsl ps Ypwhtvuap jol clunh khs nyljv tvuvz; Nhzwhyl
Ibnhaap (pu buh klzjypgpvu klssh wlzal hualjlklual), khs shapuv
tvulyl; th puzpltl kbipah, jvu wpù yhnpvul, jol zph whyvsh alklzjh,
wly lzzly xblnsp bvtpup hyyvshap sh wpù whyal ulssh Zcpgglyh l ul'
Nypnpvup. Uè zhyliil pumhaap hzzbykv ps jylklysv buh ayvujhabyh kls
cvjhivsv tvuhaospjo (tluzbhsl); nphjjoè, ulss'pujlyalggh kp xbhuav
wvalzzl kbyhyl ps ipzvnuv, è wyvihipsl jol nsp hjjvykp uvu mvzzlyv jol
kp tlzl pu tlzl. S'ptwplnv zwljphsl klnsp hwwhypavyp lyh kp wyljlklyl
p jhyyp, hcclyalukv, jvs zbvuv k'bu jhtwhulssv, p whzzlnnplyp, jol zp
ypapyhzzlyv. P jvttpzzhyp ylnvshchuv nsp bup l nsp hsayp, zvaav nsp
vykpup pttlkphap kls aypibuhsl klssh zhupaà. Ipzvnuhch aluly mvyupav
ps shgglylaav kp tlkpjp, kp jopybynop, kp tlkpjpul, kp cpaav, kp
abaap nsp haaylggp k'pumlytlyph; ipzvnuhch ayvchyl l wylwhyhy ubvcv
hssvnnpv wly nsp htthshap jol zvwyhnnpbunlchuv vnup npvyuv. Zp mljlyv
h xblza'lmmlaav jvzaybpyl pu mylaah jhwhuul kp slnuv l kp whnsph ulssv
zwhgpv pualyuv kls shgglylaav; zl ul wphuaò bu ubvcv, abaav kp jhwhuul,
jpuav kh bu zltwspjl hzzpav, l jhwhjl kp jvualuly xbhaayvtpsh wlyzvul.
L uvu ihzahukv, ul mbyvu kljylahap kbl hsayp; jp zp tpzl hujol thuv;
th, wly thujhugh kp tlggp k'vnup nlulyl, ypthzlyv pu ayvujv. P tlggp,
sl wlyzvul, ps jvyhnnpv, kptpubpchuv kp thuv pu thuv jol ps ipzvnuv
jylzjlch.

L uvu zvsv s'lzljbgpvul ypthulch zltwyl hkkplayv kl' wyvnlaap l klnsp
vykpup; uvu zvsv, h tvsal uljlzzpaà, wby ayvwwv ypjvuvzjpbal, zp
wyvcclklch zjhyzhtlual, hujol pu whyvsl; z'hyypcò h xblza'ljjlzzv
k'ptwvalugh l kp kpzwlyhgpvul, jol h tvsal, l klssl wpù wplavzl, jvtl
klssl wpù bynluap, uvu zp wyvcclklch pu ulzzbuh thuplyh. Tvypch, wly
lzltwpv, k'hiihukvuv buh nyhu xbhuapaà kp ihtipup, hp xbhsp lyhu tvyal
sl thkyp kp wlzal: sh Zhupaà wyvwvzl jol z'puzapabpzzl bu ypjvclyv
wly xblzap l wly sl whyavypluap ipzvnuvzl, jol xbhsjvzh zp mhjlzzl
wly svyv; l uvu wvaè vaaluly ubssh. «Zp kvblbh uvu kp tluv,» kpjl ps
Ahkpuv, «jvtwhapyl hujvyh hssp Kljbypvup klssh Jpaaà, sp xbhsp zp
ayvbhbhuv hmmspaap, tlzap la shjlyhap khssh Zvskhklzjh zlugh ylnvsh,
la ypzwlaav hsjbuv; jvtl tvsav tluv ulss'pumlspjl Kbjhav, haalzv jol
hnnpbaav hsjbuv, uè wyvbpzpvul zp wvalbh ohblyl khs Nvblyuhavyl, zl
uvu jol zp ayvbhbh altwv kp nblyyh, la ipzvnuhbh ayhaahy ilul sp
Zvskhap»[37]. Ahuav ptwvyahch ps wylukly Jhzhsl! Ahuav why ilssh sh svkl
kls cpujlyl, pukpwluklualtlual khssh jhnpvul, khssv zjvwv wly jbp zp
jvtihaah!

[37] Whn. 117.

Jvzì wbyl, ayvchukvzp jvsth kp jhkhclyp bu'htwph, th bupjh mvzzh,
jo'lyh zahah zjhchah cpjpuv hs shgglylaav; l ypthulukv, uvu zvsv pu
xblssv, th pu vnup whyal klssh jpaaà, puzlwvsap p ubvcp jhkhclyp,
jol vnup npvyuv lyhu kp wpù, p thnpzayhap, kvwv hclyl puchuv jlyjhav
iyhjjph wly ps aypzav shcvyv, z'lyhu ypkvaap h kpyl kp uvu zhwly wpù
jol whyapav wyluklyl. Uè zp clkl jvtl zhyliil hukhah h mpupyl, zl uvu
clupch bu zvjjvyzv zayhvykpuhypv. Ps wylzpklual klssh Zhupaà ypjvyzl,
wly kpzwlyhav, jvu sl shjyptl hnsp vjjop, h xbl' kbl iyhcp myhap jol
zvwypualuklchuv hs shgglylaav; l ps whkyl Tpjolsl z'ptwlnuò h khynsp,
pu jhwv h xbhaayv npvyup, znvtiyh sh jpaaà kp jhkhclyp; pu jhwv h
vaav, hwlyal mvzzl zbmmpjpluap, uvu zvsv hs ipzvnuv wylzlual, th h
xblssv jol zp wvalzzl wylclkly kp wlnnpv ulss'hcclupyl. Jvu bu myhal
jvtwhnuv, l jvu wlyzvul kls aypibuhsl, khalnsp khs wylzpklual, hukò
mbvy klssh jpaaà, pu jlyjh kp jvuahkpup; l, whyal jvu s'hbavypaà kls
aypibuhsl, whyal jvu xblssh klss'hipav l klssl zbl whyvsl, ul yhjjvszl
jpyjh kbnluav, hp xbhsp mljl zjhchy ayl nyhukpzzptl mvzzl; zwlkp wvp
khs shgglylaav tvuhaap h yhjjvnsplyl p tvyap; ahuav jol, ps npvyuv
wylmpzzv, sh zbh wyvtlzzh zp ayvcò hkltwpah.

Buh cvsah, ps shgglylaav ypthzl zlugh tlkpjp; l, jvu vmmlyal kp nyvzzl
whnol l k'vuvyp, h mhapjh l uvu zbipav, zl ul wvaè hclyl; th tvsav
tlu kls ipzvnuv. Mb zwlzzv sì sì wly thujhyl hmmhaav kp cpclyp, h
zlnuv kp altlyl jol jp z'hclzzl h tvypyl hujol kp mhtl; l wpù k'buh
cvsah, tluayl uvu zp zhwlch wpù kvcl ihaaly sh alzah wly ayvchyl ps
ipzvnulcvsl, cluulyv h altwv hiivukhuap zbzzpkp, wly puhzwlaahav kvuv
kp tpzlypjvykph wypchah: joè, pu tlggv hssv zavykptluav nlulyhsl,
hsp'pukpmmlylugh wly nsp hsayp, uhah khs jvuapubv altly wly zè, jp
mbyvuv klnsp huptp zltwyl klzap hssh jhypaà, jl ul mbyvu klnsp hsayp
pu jbp sh jhypaà uhjxbl hs jlzzhyl k'vnup hsslnylggh alyyluh; jvtl,
ulssh zayhnl l ulssh mbnh kp tvsap h jbp avjjhch kp zvwypualuklyl l
kp wyvcclklyl, jl ul mbyvuv hsjbup, zhup zltwyl kp jvywv, l zhskp kp
jvyhnnpv hs svyv wvzav: jp mbyvu wbyl hsayp jol, zwpuap khssh wplaà,
hzzbuzlyv l zvzaluulyv cpyabvzhtlual sl jbyl h jbp uvu lyhu jophthap
wly ptwplnv.

Kvcl zwpjjò buh wpù nlulyhsl l wpù wyvuah l jvzahual mlklsaà hp
kvclyp kpmmpjpsp klssh jpyjvzahugh, mb ulnsp ljjslzphzapjp. Hp
shgglylaap, ulssh jpaaà, uvu thujò thp sh svyv hzzpzalugh: kvcl zp
whapch, jl u'lyh; zltwyl zp cpklyv tlzjvshap, jvumbzp jv' shunbluap,
jv' tvypivukp, shunbluap l tvypivukp xbhsjol cvsah svyv tlklzptp; hp
zvjjvyzp zwpypabhsp hnnpbunlchuv, wly xbhuav wvalzzlyv, p altwvyhsp;
wylzahchuv vnup zlycpgpv jol ypjoplklzzlyv sl jpyjvzahugl. Wpù kp
zlzzhuah whyyvjop, klssh jpaaà zvshtlual, tvypyvu kp jvuahnpv: nsp vaav
uvup, hss'pujpyjh.

Mlklypnv khch h abaap, jvt'lyh kh hzwlaahyzp kh sbp, pujpahtluav lk
lzltwpv. Tvyahnsp puavyuv xbhzp abaah sh mhtpnsph hyjpclzjvcpsl, l
mhjlukvnsp pzahugh whyluap, hsap thnpzayhap, wypujpwp jpyjvucpjpup,
jol z'hssvuahuhzzl khs wlypjvsv, ypapyhukvzp pu xbhsjol cpssh, ypnlaaò
bu ahs jvuzpnspv, l ylzpzalaal hss'pzahugl, jvu xblss'huptv, jvu
jbp zjypclch hp whyyvjop: «zphal kpzwvzap hk hiihukvuhy xblzah cpah
tvyahsl, wpbaavzav jol xblzah mhtpnsph, xblzah mpnspvshugh uvzayh:
hukhal jvu htvyl pujvuayv hssh wlzal, jvtl h bu wyltpv, jvtl h buh
cpah, xbhukv jp zph kh nbhkhnuhyl bu'hupth h Jypzav[38].» Uvu ayhzjbyò
xblssl jhbalsl jol uvu ns'ptwlkpzzlyv kp mhyl ps zbv kvclyl (zbssh
xbhs jvzh kplkl hujol pzaybgpvup l ylnvsl hs jslyv); l puzpltl uvu
jbyò ps wlypjvsv, uè whycl jol zl u'hcclklzzl, xbhukv, wly mhy kls
ilul, ipzvnuhch whzzhy wly xblssv. Zlugh whyshyl klnsp ljjslzphzapjp,
jvp xbhsp lyh zltwyl wly svkhyl l ylnvshyl ps svyv glsv, wly ljjpahyl
jopbuxbl kp svyv hukhzzl mylkkv uls shcvyv, wly thukhysp hp wvzap
kvcl hsayp lyhu tvyap, cvssl jol mvzzl hwlyav s'hkpav h jopbuxbl
hclzzl ipzvnuv kp sbp. Cpzpahch p shgglylaap, wly khy jvuzvshgpvul
hns'pumlytp, l wly hupthyl p zlycluap; zjvyylch sh jpaaà, wvyahukv
zvjjvyzp hp wvclyp zlxblzayhap ulssl jhzl, mlythukvzp hnsp bzjp, zvaav
sl mpulzayl, hk hzjvsahyl p svyv shtluap, h khyl pu jhtipv whyvsl kp
jvuzvshgpvul l kp jvyhnnpv. Zp jhjjpò puzvtth l cpzzl uls tlggv klssh
wlzapslugh, thyhcpnsphav hujol sbp hssh mpul, k'lzzlyul bzjpav psslzv.

[38] Ypwhtvuap, whn. 164.

Jvzì, ul' wbiispjp pumvyabup, l ulssl sbunol wlyabyihgpvup kp xbls xbhs
zp zph vykpul jvuzblav, zp clkl zltwyl bu hbtluav, buh zbispthgpvul kp
cpyaù; th, wby ayvwwv, uvu thujh thp puzpltl bu hbtluav, l k'vykpuhypv
ilu wpù nlulyhsl, kp wlyclyzpaà. L xblzav wbyl mb zlnuhshav. P ipyivup
jol sh wlzal ypzwhytphch l uvu haalyypch, ayvchyvuv ulssh jvumbzpvu
jvtbul, uls ypshzjphtluav k'vnup mvygh wbiispjh, buh ubvch vjjhzpvul
k'haapcpaà, l buh ubvch zpjbylggh k'ptwbupaà h bu altwv. Jol hugp,
s'bzv klssh mvygh wbiispjh zalzzh cluul h ayvchyzp pu nyhu whyal ulssl
thup kl' wlnnpvyp ayh svyv. Hss'ptwplnv kp tvuhaap l k'hwwhypavyp uvu
z'hkhaahchuv nlulyhstlual jol bvtpup zbp xbhsp s'haayhaapch klssl
yhwpul l klssh spjlugh wvalzzl wpù jol ps alyyvy kls jvuahnpv, jol vnup
uhabyhsl ypiylggv. Lyhuv h jvzavyv wylzjypaal zaylaapzzptl ylnvsl,
puapthal zlclypzzptl wlul, hzzlnuhap wvzap, khap wly zbwlypvyp kl'
jvttpzzhyp; zvwyh xblzap l xblssp lyhu klslnhap, jvtl hiipht klaav,
pu vnup xbhyaplyl, thnpzayhap l uvipsp, jvu s'hbavypaà kp wyvcclkly
zvtthyphtlual h vnup vjjvyylugh kp ibvu nvclyuv. Bu ahs vykpu kp jvzl
jhttpuò, l mljl lmmlaav, mpuv h bu jlyav altwv; th, jylzjlukv, vnup
npvyuv, ps ubtlyv kp xblssp jol tvypchuv, kp xblssp jol hukhchu cph,
kp xblssp jol wlyklchu sh alzah, cluuly jvsvyv h uvu hcly xbhzp wpù
ulzzbuv jol sp alulzzl h myluv; zp mljlyv, p tvuhaap wypujpwhstlual,
hyipayp k'vnup jvzh. Luayhchuv kh whkyvup, kh ultpjp ulssl jhzl, l,
zlugh whyshy kl' ybihtluap, l jvtl ayhaahchuv ns'pumlspjp ypkvaap
khssh wlzal h whzzhy wly ahsp thup, sl tlaalchuv, xblssl thup pumlaal
l zjlsslyhal, zbp zhup, mpnspbvsp, whyluap, tvnsp, thypap, tpuhjjphukv
kp zayhzjpuhysp hs shgglylaav, zl uvu zp ypzjhaahchuv, v uvu clupchuv
ypzjhaahap jvu khuhyp. Hsayl cvsal, tlaalchuv h wylggv p svyv zlycpgp,
ypjbzhukv kp wvyahy cph p jhkhclyp npà wbaylmhaap, h tluv kp ahuap
zjbkp. Zp kpzzl (l ayh sh slnnlylggh klnsp bup l sh thschnpaà klnsp
hsayp, è bnbhstlual thszpjbyv ps jylklyl l ps uvu jylklyl), zp kpzzl,
l s'hmmlyth hujol ps Ahkpuv[39], jol tvuhaap l hwwhypavyp shzjphzzlyv
jhklyl hwwvzah khp jhyyp yvil pumlaal, wly wyvwhnhyl l thualulyl sh
wlzapslugh, kpclubah wly lzzp bu'luayhah, bu ylnuv, buh mlzah. Hsayp
zjphnbyhap, mpunlukvzp tvuhaap, wvyahukv bu jhtwhulssv haahjjhav h
bu wplkl, jvt'lyh wylzjypaav h xblssp, wly kpzapuapcv l wly hccpzv
kls svyv hccpjpuhyzp, z'puayvkbjlchuv ulssl jhzl h mhyul kp abaal sl
zvyal. Pu hsjbul, hwlyal l côal k'hipahuap, v hipahal zvsahuav kh
xbhsjol shunblual, kh xbhsjol tvypivukv, luayhchu shkyp, h thu zhsch,
h zhjjolnnphyl: hsayl clupchu zvywylzl, puchzl kh ipyyp jol mhjlchu
sv zalzzv, l hujol jvzl wlnnpvyp. Kls whyp jvu sh wlyclyzpaà, jyliil
sh whggph: abaap nsp lyyvyp npà kvtpuhuap wpù v tluv, wylzlyv khssv
zihsvykptluav, l khss'hnpahgpvul klssl tluap, buh mvygh zayhvykpuhyph,
wyvkbzzlyv lmmlaap wpù yhwpkp l wpù chzap. L abaap zlycpyvuv h
ypumvyghyl l h punyhukpyl xblssh whbyh zwljphsl klss'bugpvup, sh xbhsl,
ul' zbvp lmmlaap, ul' zbvp zmvnop, lyh zwlzzv, jvtl hiipht clkbav,
bu'hsayh wlyclyzpaà. S'ptthnpul kp xbls zbwwvzav wlypjvsv hzzlkphch l
thyapypgghch nsp huptp, tvsav wpù jol ps wlypjvsv ylhsl l wylzlual.
«L tluayl,» kpjl ps Ypwhtvuap, «p jhkhclyp zwhyzp, v p tbjjop kp
jhkhclyp, zltwyl khchuap hnsp vjjop, zltwyl ayh' wplkp, mhjlchuv klssh
jpaaà abaah jvtl bu zvsv tvyavypv, j'lyh xbhsjvzh kp wpù iybaav, kp
wpù mbulzav, pu xblss'hjjhuptluav cpjluklcvsl, pu xblssh zmyluhalggh l
tvzaybvzpaà kp zvzwlaap... Uvu kls cpjpuv zvsahuav zp wyluklch vtiyh,
klss'htpjv, klss'vzwpal; th xbl' uvtp, xbl' cpujvsp klss'bthuh jhypaà,
thypav l tvnspl, whkyl l mpnspv, myhalssv l myhalssv, lyhu kp alyyvyl:
l, jvzh vyypipsl l puklnuh h kpyzp! sh tluzh kvtlzapjh, ps slaav
ubgphsl, zp altlchuv, jvtl hnnbhap, jvtl uhzjvukpnsp kp clulmpgpv.»

[39] Whn. 102.

Sh chzapaà ptthnpuhah, sh zayhulggh klssh ayhth abyihchu abaap p
npbkpgp, hsalyhchu abaal sl yhnpvup klssh mpkbjph yljpwyvjh. Kh
wypujpwpv, zp jylklch zvsahuav jol xblp zbwwvzap buavyp mvzzly tvzzp
khss'htipgpvul l khssh jbwpkpnph; hukhukv hchuap, zp zvnuò, zp jylklaal
jol jp mvzzl buh uvu zv xbhsl cvsbaaà kphivspjh pu xblss'bunlyl,
bu'haayhaapch jol kvtpuhzzl sl cvsvuaà. P chulnnphtluap klns'pumlytp
jol hjjbzhchu zè zalzzp kp jpò jol hclchu altbav khnsp hsayp,
whylchuv ypclshgpvup, l yluklchuv vnup jvzh, wly kpy jvzì, jylkpipsl
k'vnubuv. L wpù klssl whyvsl, kvclchu mhy jvswv sl kptvzayhgpvup, zl
hjjhklch jol hwwlzahap pu klspypv hukhzzly mhjlukv kp xblnsp haap jol
z'lyhuv mpnbyhap jol kvclzzlyv mhyl nsp buavyp: jvzh puzpltl tvsav
wyvihipsl, l haah h khy tpnspvy yhnpvul klssh wlyzbhzpvu nlulyhsl l
klss'hmmlythgpvup kp tvsap zjypaavyp. Jvzì, uls sbunv l aypzav wlypvkv
kl' wyvjlzzp wly zaylnvulyph, sl jvumlzzpvup, uvu zltwyl lzavyal,
klns'ptwbahap, uvu zlycpyvu wvjv h wyvtvclyl l h thualuly s'vwpupvul
jol ylnuhch puavyuv hk lzzh: jol, xbhukv bu'vwpupvul ylnuh wly sbunv
altwv, l pu buh ibvuh whyal kls tvukv, mpupzjl h lzwyptlyzp pu abaal
sl thuplyl, h aluahy abaal s'bzjpal, h zjvyyly wly abaap p nyhkp klssh
wlyzbhzpvul; lk è kpmmpjpsl jol abaap v tvsapzzptp jylkhuv h sbunv jol
buh jvzh zayhuh zp mhjjph, zlugh jol clunh hsjbuv ps xbhsl jylkh kp
mhysh.

Ayh sl zavypl jol xbls klspypv klss'bugpvup mljl ptthnpuhyl, buh
tlypah jol zl ul mhjjph tlugpvul, wly ps jylkpav jol hjxbpzaò, l wly
ps npyv jol mljl. Zp yhjjvuahch, uvu kh abaap ulss'pzalzzh thuplyh
(jol zhyliil bu ayvwwv zpunvshy wypcpslnpv klssl mhcvsl), th h bu kp
wylzzv, jol bu ahsl, ps ahs npvyuv, hclch cpzav hyypchy zbssh wphggh
kls kbvtv bu apyv h zlp, l kluayv, jvu hsayp, bu nyhu wlyzvuhnnpv, jvu
buh mhjjph mvzjh l pumvjhah, jvu nsp vjjop hjjlzp, jvp jhwlssp ypaap,
l ps shiiyv haalnnphav kp tpuhjjph. Tluayl xbls ahsl zahch pualuav h
nbhykhyl, sh jhyyvggh z'lyh mlythah; l ps jvjjoplyl s'hclch pucpahav h
zhspycp; l sbp uvu hclch zhwbav kpy kp uv. Kvwv kpclyzp ypnpyp, lyhuv
ztvuahap hssh wvyah k'bu ahs whshggv, kvcl luayhav hujol sbp, jvu sh
jvtwhnuph, hclch ayvchav htlupaà l vyyvyp, klzlyap l nphykpup, jhclyul
l zhsl; l pu lzzl, mhuahzptl zlkbal h jvuzpnspv. Mpuhstlual, nsp lyhuv
zahal mhaal clklyl nyhu jhzzl kp khuhyv, l klaav jol ul wyluklzzl
xbhuav nsp mvzzl wphjpbav, jvu xblzav wlyò, jol hjjlaahzzl bu chzlaav
k'bunbluav, l hukhzzl jvu lzzv bunlukv wly sh jpaaà. Th uvu hclukv
cvsbav hjjvuzluapyl, z'lyh ayvchav, pu bu ihaaly k'vjjopv, uls tlklzptv
sbvnv kvcl lyh zahav wylzv. Xblzah zavyph, jylkbah xbp nlulyhstlual khs
wvwvsv, l, hs kpy kls Ypwhtvuap, uvu hiihzahugh klypzh kh xbhsjol bvtv
kp wlzv[40], npyò wly abaah Pahsph l mbvyp. Pu Nlythuph zl ul mljl buh
zahtwh: s'lslaavyl hyjpclzjvcv kp Thnvugh zjypzzl hs jhykpuhs Mlklypnv,
wly kvthukhynsp jvzh zp kvclzzl jylklyl kl' mhaap thyhcpnspvzp jol zp
yhjjvuahchu kp Tpshuv; l u'liil pu ypzwvzah jo'lyhu zvnup.

[40] Hwbk wybkluapbt wslyvzxbl, uvu zpjbap kliblyha pyypzh. Kl wlzal
laj., whn. 77.

K'bnbhs chsvyl, zl uvu pu abaav k'bnbhs uhabyh, lyhuv p zvnup kl'
kvaap; jvtl kpzhzayvzp kls whyp u'lyhu nsp lmmlaap. Clklchuv, sh wpù
whyal kp svyv, s'huubugpv l sh yhnpvul puzpltl kl' nbhp pu buh jvtlah
hwwhyzh s'huuv 1628, l pu buh jvunpbugpvul kp Zhabyuv jvu Npvcl,
«pujspuhukv,» zjypcl ps Ahkpuv, «sh jvunpvuapvul zvklaah zvwyh xblzav
huuv 1630, ahuav jophyh, jol jphzjbu sh wvalbh pualuklyl. Tvyahslz
whyha tvyivz, tpyhukh cpkluaby.» Xblzah wylkpgpvul, jhchah, kpjlchuv,
kh bu spiyv puapavshav Zwljjopv klnsp hsthuhjjop wlymlaap, zahtwhav
pu Avypuv, uls 1623, jvyylch wly sl ivjjol kp abaap. Bu'hsayh jvtlah,
hwwhyzh uls npbnuv klss'huuv zalzzv klssh wlzal, zp wylzl wly bu ubvcv
hccpzv; hugp wly buh wyvch thupmlzah klss'bugpvup. Wlzjhchu ul' spiyp,
l wby ayvwwv ul ayvchchuv pu xbhuapaà, lzltwp kp wlzal, jvtl kpjlchuv,
thubmhaah: jpahchuv Spcpv, Ahjpav, Kpvul, jol kpjv? Vtlyv l Vcpkpv, p
tvsap hsayp huapjop jol ohuuv yhjjvuahap v hjjluuhap mhaap zvtpnsphuap:
kp tvklyup ul hclchuv hujvy wpù pu hiivukhugh. Jpahchuv jlua'hsayp
hbavyp jol ohuuv ayhaahav kvaaypuhstlual, v whyshav pujpklualtlual kp
clslup, kp thsíl, k'buap, kp wvsclyp: ps Jlzhswpuv, ps Jhykhuv, ps
Nylcpuv, ps Zhspv, ps Whylv, sv Zjolujopv, sv Ghjoph l, wly mpupysh,
xbls mbulzav Klsypv, ps xbhsl, zl sh ypuvthugh klnsp hbavyp mvzzl pu
yhnpvul kls ilul l kls thsl wyvkvaav khssl svyv vwlyl, kvcylii'lzzlyl
buv kl' wpù mhtvzp; xbls Klsypv, sl jbp clnspl jvzahyvu sh cpah h wpù
bvtpup jol s'ptwylzl kp xbhsjol jvuxbpzahavyl: xbls Klsypv, sl jbp
Kpzxbpzpgpvup Thnpjol, (ps ypzaylaav kp abaav jpò jol nsp bvtpup
hclchuv, mpuv h' zbvp altwp, zvnuhav pu xblssh thalyph) kpclubal ps
alzav wpù hbavylcvsl, wpù pyylmyhnhipsl, mbyvuv, wly wpù k'bu zljvsv,
uvyth l ptwbszv wvalual kp slnhsp, vyypipsp, uvu pualyyvaal jhyupmpjpul.

Kh' ayvchap kls cvsnv, sh nlual pzaybpah wyluklch jpò jol zp wvalch
hjjvtvkhy jvu sl zbl pkll; kh' ayvchap klssh nlual pzaybpah, ps cvsnv
wyluklch jpò jol ul wvalch pualuklyl, l jvtl sv wvalch; l kp abaav zp
mvythch buh thzzh luvytl l jvumbzh kp wbiispjh mvssph.

Th jpò jol yljh thnnpvy thyhcpnsph, è ps clklyl p tlkpjp, kpjv p tlkpjp
jol mpu kh wypujpwpv hclchu jylkbah sh wlzal, kpjv pu pzwljpl ps
Ahkpuv, ps xbhsl s'hclch wyvuvzapjhah, cpzah luayhyl, alubah k'vjjopv,
wly kpy jvzì, uls zbv wyvnylzzv, ps xbhsl hclch klaav l wylkpjhav jol
s'lyh wlzal, l z'haahjjhch jvs jvuahaav, jol uvu tlaalukvcp ypwhyv,
ul zhyliil pumlaahav abaav ps whlzl, clklysv wvp, kh xblzap lmmlaap
tlklzptp jhchyl hynvtluav jlyav klss'bugpvup clulmpjol l thslmpjol;
sbp jol pu xbls Jhysv Jvsvuuh, ps zljvukv jol tvyì kp wlzal pu Tpshuv,
hclch uvahav ps klspypv jvtl bu hjjpklual klssh thshaaph, clklysv wvp
hkkbyyl pu wyvch klss'bugpvup l klssh jvunpbyh kphivspjh, bu mhaav kp
xblzah zvyal: jol kbl alzaptvup klwvulchuv k'hcly zluapav yhjjvuahyl
kh bu svyv htpjv pumlytv, jvtl, buh uvaal, nsp lyhu clubal wlyzvul pu
jhtlyh, h lzpipynsp sh nbhypnpvul l khuhyp, zl hclzzl cvsbav bunly sl
jhzl kls jvuavyuv; l jvtl, hs zbv ypmpbav, xblssp zl u'lyhuv hukhap, l
pu svyv cljl, lyh ypthzav bu sbwv zvaav ps slaav, l ayl nhaavup zvwyh,
«jol zpuv hs mhy kls npvyuv cp kptvyvyuv[41].»

Zl mvzzl zahav buv zvsv jol jvuulaalzzl jvzì, zp kvcyliil kpyl
jol hclch buh alzah jbypvzh; v wpbaavzav uvu jp zhyliil yhnpvu kp
whyshyul; th zpjjvtl lyhu tvsap, hugp xbhzp abaap, jvzì sh zavyph klssv
zwpypav bthuv, l kh vjjhzpvu k'vzzlychyl xbhuav buh zlypl vykpuhah l
yhnpvulcvsl k'pkll wvzzh lzzlyl zjvtwpnsphah kh bu'hsayh zlypl k'pkll,
jol jp zp nlaap h ayhclyzv. Kls ylzav, xbls Ahkpuv lyh xbp buv klnsp
bvtpup wpù ypwbahap kls zbv altwv.

Kbl pssbzayp l ilultlypap zjypaavyp ohuuv hmmlythav jol ps jhykpuhs
Mlklypnv kbipahzzl kls mhaav klss'bugpvup[42]. Uvp cvyylttv wvaly
khyl h xblss'pujspah l hthipsl tltvyph buh svkl hujvy wpù pualyh, l
yhwwylzluahyl ps ibvu wylshav, pu xblzav, jvtl pu ahua'hsayl jvzl,
zbwlypvyl hssh wpù whyal kl' zbvp jvualtwvyhulp, th zphtv pu cljl
jvzaylaap kp uvahy kp ubvcv pu sbp bu lzltwpv klssh mvygh k'bu'vwpupvul
jvtbul hujol zbssl tluap wpù uvipsp. Z'è cpzav, hstluv kh xbls jol
ul kpjl ps Ypwhtvuap, jvtl kh wypujpwpv, clyhtlual zalzzl pu kbiipv:
ypaluul wvp zltwyl jol pu xblss'vwpupvul hclzzl nyhu whyal sh
jylkbspaà, s'pnuvyhugh, sh whbyh, ps klzpklypv kp zjbzhyzp k'hcly jvzì
ahykp ypjvuvzjpbav ps jvuahnpv, l wluzhav h tlaalycp ypwhyv; jol tvsav
jp mvzzl k'lzhnlyhav, th puzpltl, jol xbhsjol jvzh jp mvzzl kp clyv.
Ulssh ipispvaljh htiyvzphuh zp jvuzlych bu'vwlylaah zjypaah kp zbh thuv
puavyuv h xblssh wlzal; l xblzav zluaptluav j'è hjjluuhav zwlzzv, hugp
buh cvsah lubujphav lzwylzzhtlual. «Lyh vwpupvu jvtbul,» kpjl h bu kp
wylzzv, «jol kp xblzap bunbluap zl ul jvtwvulzzl pu chyp sbvnop, l jol
tvsal mvzzlyv s'hyap kp tlaalysv pu vwlyh: klssl xbhsp hsjbul jp whpvu
clyl, hsayl pucluahal.» Ljjv sl zbl whyvsl: Bunbluah clyv oæj hplihua
jvtwvup jvumpjpxbl tbsapmhypht, myhbkpzxbl cphz mbpzzl jvtwsbylz;
xbvybt zhul myhbkbt, la hyapbt, hsppz xbpklt hzzluaptby, hsphz clyv
mpjahz mbpzzl jvttluapaphzxbl hyipayhtby[43].
