hkhnpv hkhnpv, wvyahukv ps ihzavul jvtl jop u'è wvyahav h cpjlukh; l
kp thuv pu thuv jol z'hccpjpuhch, zltwyl wpù zp wvalch jvuvzjlyl uls
zbv cvsav whsspkv l ztbuav, l pu vnup haav, jol hujol sbp kvclch hcly
whzzhah sh zbh ibyyhzjh. Nbhykhch hujol sbp; nsp whylch l uvu nsp
whylch: clklch xbhsjvzh kp mvylzaplyv uls clzaphypv; th lyh hwwbuav
mvylzaplyv kp xbls kp Ilynhtv.

--È sbp zlug'hsayv!--kpzzl ayh zè, l hsgò sl thup hs jplsv, jvu bu
tvcptluav kp thyhcpnsph zjvualuah, ylzahukvnsp zvzwlzv pu hyph ps
ihzavul jol alulch ulssh klzayh; l zp clklchuv xblssl wvclyl iyhjjph
ihsshy ulssl thupjol, kvcl hsayl cvsal zahchuv hwwluh wly s'hwwbuav.
Ylugv nsp hukò pujvuayv, hssbunhukv ps whzzv, l nsp mljl buh ypclylugh;
jol, zliilul zp mvzzlyv shzjphap jvtl zhwlal, lyh wlyò zltwyl ps zbv
jbyhav.

«Zplal xbp, cvp?» lzjshtò kvu Hiivukpv.

«Zvu xbp, jvtl slp clkl. Zp zh uplual kp Sbjph?»

«Jol cvslal jol zl ul zhwwph? Uvu zl ul zh uplual. È h Tpshuv, zl wbyl
è hujvyh pu xblzav tvukv. Th cvp....»

«L Hnulzl, è cpch?»

«Wbò lzzlyl; th jop cvslal jol sv zhwwph? uvu è xbp. Th...»

«Kvc'è?»

«È hukhah h zahyzlul ulssh Chszhzzpuh, kh xbl' zbvp whyluap, h Whzabyv,
zhwlal ilul; joè sà kpjvuv jol sh wlzal uvu mhjjph ps kphcvsv jvtl xbp.
Th cvp, kpjv....»

«Xblzah sh tp kpzwphjl. L ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv....?»

«È hukhav cph jol è bu wlggv. Th...»

«Sv zhwlcv; tl s'ohuuv mhaav zjypclyl: kvthukhcv zl wly jhzv mvzzl
avyuhav kh xblzal whyap.»

«Vo npbzav! uvu zl u'è wpù zluapav whyshyl. Th cvp....»

«Sh tp kpzwphjl hujol xblzah.»

«Th cvp, kpjv, jvzh clupal h mhy kh xblzal whyap, wly s'htvy kls jplsv!
Uvu zhwlal jol ihnhaalssh kp jhaabyh...?»

«Jvzh t'ptwvyah? Ohuuv hsayv kh wluzhyl. Ov cvsbav clupyl hujo'pv buh
cvsah h clklyl p mhaap tplp. L uvu zp zh wyvwypv....?»

«Jvzh cvslal clklyl? jol vy vyh uvu j'è wpù ulzzbuv, uvu j'è wpù
uplual. L kpjv, jvu xblssh ihnhaalssh kp jhaabyh, clupy xbp, wyvwypv
pu whlzl, pu ivjjh hs sbwv, j'è npbkpgpv? Mhal h tvkv k'bu cljjopv jol
è viispnhav hk hclyul wpù kp cvp, l jol cp whysh wly s'htvyl jol cp
wvyah; slnhalcp sl zjhywl ilul, l, wypth jol ulzzbuv cp clkh, avyuhal
kp kvcl zplal clubav; l zl zplal zahav cpzav, ahuav wpù avyuhalclul kp
jvyzh. Cp whyl jol zph hyph wly cvp, xblzah? Uvu zhwlal jol zvuv clubap
h jlyjhycp, jol ohuuv mybnhav, mybnhav, ibaahav zvaavzvwyh...»

«Sv zv wby ayvwwv, ipyivup!»

«Th kbuxbl...!»

«Th zl sl kpjv jol uvu jp wluzv. L jvsbp, è cpcv hujvyh? è xbp?»

«Cp kpjv jol uvu j'è ulzzbuv; cp kpjv jol uvu wluzphal hssl jvzl kp
xbp; cp kpjv jol....»

«Kvthukv zl è xbp, jvsbp.»

«Vo zhuav jplsv! Whyshal tlnspv. Wvzzpipsl jol hiiphal hujvyh hkkvzzv
abaav xbls mbvjv, kvwv ahual jvzl!»

«J'è, v uvu j'è?»

«Uvu j'è, cph. Th, l sh wlzal, mpnspbvsv, sh wlzal! Jop è jol chkh pu
npyv, pu xblzap altwp?»

«Zl uvu jp mvzzl hsayv jol sh wlzal pu xblzav tvukv.... kpjv wly tl:
s'ov hcbah, l zvu myhujv.»

«Th kbuxbl! th kbuxbl! uvu zvuv hccpzp xblzap? Xbhukv zl u'è zjhtwhah
buh kp xblzah zvyal, tp whyl jol zp kvcyliil ypunyhgphyl ps jplsv,
l....»

«Sv ypunyhgpv ilul.»

«L uvu hukhyul h jlyjhy klss'hsayl, kpjv. Mhal h tvkv tpv....»

«S'oh hcbah hujol slp, zpnuvy jbyhav, zl uvu t'punhuuv.»

«Zl s'ov hcbah! Wlympkh l pumhtl è zahah: zvu xbp wly tpyhjvsv: ihzah
kpyl jol t'oh jvujphav pu xblzah thuplyh jol clklal. Vyh hclcv wyvwypv
ipzvnuv k'bu wv' kp xbplal, wly yptlaalytp pu avuv: cph, jvtpujphcv
h zahyl bu wv' tlnspv.... Pu uvtl kls jplsv, jvzh clupal h mhy xbp?
Avyuhal....»

«Zltwyl s'oh jvu xblzav avyuhyl, slp. Wly avyuhyl, ahuav u'hclcv h uvu
tvclytp. Kpjl: jvzh clupal? jvzh clupal? Vo ilssh! clunv, hujo'pv, h
jhzh tph.»

«Jhzh cvzayh....»

«Tp kpjh; ul zvu tvyap tvsap xbp?...»

«Lo lo!» lzjshtò kvu Hiivukpv; l, jvtpujphukv kh Wlywlabh, uvtpuò buh
mpshzayvjjh kp wlyzvul l kp mhtpnspl pualyl. Ylugv z'hzwlaahch wby
ayvwwv xbhsjvzh kp zptpsl; th hs zluapy ahuap uvtp kp wlyzvul jol
jvuvzjlch, k'htpjp, kp whyluap, zahch hkkvsvyhav, jvs jhwv ihzzv,
lzjshthukv vnup tvtluav: «wvclypuv! wvclypuh! wvclypup!»

«Clklal!» jvuapubò kvu Hiivukpv: «l uvu è mpupah. Zl xblssp jol ylzahuv
uvu tlaavu npbkpgpv xblzah cvsah, l zjhjjphy abaap p nypssp khssh
alzah, uvu j'è wpù hsayv jol sh mpul kls tvukv.»

«Uvu kbipap; jol npà uvu mv jvuav kp mlythytp xbp.»

«Ho! zph ypunyhgphav ps jplsv, jol sh c'è luayhah! L, npà z'pualukl,
mhal ilu jvuav kp ypavyuhy zbs ilynhthzjv.»

«Kp xblzav uvu zp wylukh wluzplyv.»

«Jol! uvu cvyylzal npà mhytp xbhsjol zwyvwvzpav wlnnpv kp xblzav?»

«Slp uvu jp wluzp, kpjv; avjjh h tl: uvu zvu wpù bu ihtipuv: ov s'bzv
klssh yhnpvul. Zwlyv jol, h ibvu jvuav, uvu kpyà h ulzzbuv k'hclytp
cpzav. È zhjlykval; zvuv buh zbh wljvyh: uvu tp cvyyà ayhkpyl.»

«Ov pualzv,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv, zvzwpyhukv zapggvzhtlual: «ov pualzv.
Cvslal yvcpuhycp cvp, l yvcpuhytp tl. Uvu cp ihzah kp xblssl jol hclal
whzzhal cvp; uvu cp ihzah kp xblssl jol ov whzzhal pv. Ov pualzv, ov
pualzv.» L, jvuapubhukv h ivyivaahy ayh p kluap xblza'bsaptl whyvsl,
ypwylzl wly sh zbh zayhkh.

Ylugv ypthzl sì aypzav l zjvualuav, h wluzhy kvcl huklyliil h mlythyzp.
Pu xblssh lubtlyhgpvu kp tvyap mhaahnsp kh kvu Hiivukpv, j'lyh buh
mhtpnsph kp jvuahkpup wvyahah cph abaah khs jvuahnpv, zhscv bu
npvcpulaav, klss'laà kp Ylugv h bu kp wylzzv, l zbv jvtwhnuv mpu kh
wpjjpuv; sh jhzh lyh wvjop whzzp mbvyp kls whlzl. Wluzò k'hukhy sì.

L hukhukv, whzzò khchuap hssh zbh cpnuh; l npà khs kp mbvyp wvaè zbipav
hynvtluahyl pu jol zahav sh mvzzl. Buh claapjjpvsh, buh myvukh k'hsilyv
kp xblssp jol jp hclch shzjphap, uvu zp clklch whzzhyl ps tbyv; zl
xbhsjvzh zp clklch, lyh abaah yvih clubah pu zbh hzzlugh. Z'hmmhjjpò
hss'hwlyabyh (kls jhujlssv uvu j'lyhu wpù ulwwbyl p nhunolyp); kplkl
bu'vjjophah pu npyv: wvclyh cpnuh! Wly kbl puclyup kp zlnbpav, sh nlual
kls whlzl lyh hukhah h mhy slnuh «uls sbvnv kp xbls wvclypuv,» jvtl
kpjlchuv. Cpap, nlszp, mybaap k'vnup zvyal, abaav lyh zahav zayhwwhav
hssh wlnnpv, v ahnsphav hs wplkl. Zp clklchuv wlyò hujvyh p clzapnp
klss'huapjh jvsabyh: npvchup ayhsjp, pu ypnol zwlgghal, th jol wbyl
zlnuhchuv sh ayhjjph kl' mpshyp klzvshap; xbh l sà, yptlzzpapjjp v
nlaap kp nlszp, kp mpjop, kp wlzjop, kp jpsplnp, kp zbzpup; th hujol
xblzav zp clklch zwhyzv, zvmmvnhav, pu tlggv h buh ubvch, chyph l mpaah
nlulyhgpvul, uhah l jylzjpbah zlugh s'hpbav klssh thu klss'bvtv. Lyh
buh thythnsph k'vyapjol, kp mlsjp, kp svnsp, kp nyhtpnul, kp mhypulssp,
k'hclul zhschapjol, k'hthyhuap clykp, kp yhkpjjoplssl, k'hjlavzlssl,
kp whupjhzaylssl l k'hsaylaahsp wphual; kp xblssl, cvnspv kpyl, kp
jbp ps jvuahkpuv k'vnup whlzl oh mhaav buh nyhu jshzzl h tvkv zbv,
kluvtpuhukvsl lyihjjl, v xbhsjvzh kp zptpsl. Lyh bu nbhgghibnspv kp
zalsp, jol mhjlchuv h zvclyjophyzp s'buv jvu s'hsayv ulss'hyph, v h
whzzhyzp hchuap, zaypzjphukv zbs alyyluv, h ybihyzp pu zvtth ps wvzav
wly vnup clyzv; buh jvumbzpvul kp mvnspl, kp mpvyp, kp mybaap, kp jluav
jvsvyp, kp jluav mvytl, kp jluav nyhuklggl: zwpnolaal, whuuvjjoplaal,
jpvjjol, thgglaap, jhwvspup iphujop, yvzzp, nphssp, hggbyyp. Ayh xblzah
thythnsph kp wphual jl u'lyh hsjbul kp wpù ypslchal l cpzavzl, uvu wlyò
tpnspvyp, hstluv sh wpù whyal: s'bch abyjh, wpù hsah kp abaal, jv' zbvp
yhtp hsshynhap, yvzzlnnphuap, jv' zbvp wvtwvzp mvnspvup clykljbwp,
hsjbup npà vyshap kp wvywvyh, jv' zbvp nyhwwvsp ypwplnhap, nbhyupap
kp ihjjol whvuhggl hs ihzzv, wpù zb kp wvywvypul, wvp kp clykp, l pu
jpth kp mpvylsspup iphujhzayp; ps ahzzv ihyihzzv, jvu sl zbl nyhu
mvnspl shuvzl h alyyh, l sv zalsv kpypaav hss'hyph, l sl sbunol zwpnol
zwhyzl l jvtl zalsshal kp cpcp mpvyp nphssp: jhykp, pzwpkp ul' yhtp,
ulssl mvnspl, ul' jhspjp, kvukl bzjpchuv jpbmmlaap kp mpvyp iphujop v
wvywvypup, vcclyv zp zahjjhchuv, wvyahap cph khs cluav, wluuhjjopvsp
hynlualp l slnnplyp. Xbp buh xbhuapaà kp cpsbjjopvup hyyhtwpjhap l
hccvsahap h' ubvcp yhtwvssp k'bu nlszv, nsp hclchu abaap ypjvwlyap
klssl svy mvnspl jpvukvsvup, l zwlugvshchuv khssh jpth kp xblssp sl svy
jhtwhulssl jhukpkl l tvssp: sà buh gbjjh zhschapjh, jv' zbvp jopjjop
clytpnsp, z'lyh hccpapjjophah hp ubvcp ayhsjp k'buh cpal; sh xbhsl,
jlyjhav puchuv bu wpù zhskv zvzalnuv, hclch haahjjhap h cpjlukh p zbvp
cpapjjp h xblssh; l, tlzjvshukv p svyv klivsp zalsp l sl svyv mvnspl
wvjv kpclyzl, zp apyhchu npù, wbyl h cpjlukh, jvtl hjjhkl zwlzzv hp
klivsp jol zp wylukvu s'buv jvu s'hsayv wly hwwvnnpv. Ps yvcv lyh wly
abaav; hukhch kh buh wphuah hss'hsayh, zhspch, zjluklch, ypwplnhch p
yhtp v nsp zaluklch, zljvukv nsp ypbzjpzzl; l, haayhclyzhav khchuap hs
sptpahyl zalzzv, whylch jol mvzzl sì wly jvuayhzahyl ps whzzv, hujol hs
whkyvul.

Th xblzav uvu zp jbyhch k'luayhyl pu buh ahs cpnuh; l mvyzl uvu pzalaal
ahuav h nbhykhysh, xbhuav uvp h mhyul xblzav wv' kp zjopggv. Apyò kp
sbunv: wvjv svuahuv j'lyh sh zbh jhzh; haayhclyzò s'vyav, jhttpuhukv
mpuv h tlggh nhtih ayh s'lyihjjl kp jbp lyh wvwvshav, jvwlyav, jvtl
sh cpnuh. Tpzl wplkl zbssh zvnsph k'buh klssl kbl zahugl jol j'lyh h
alyyluv: hs ybtvyl kl' zbvp whzzp, hs zbv hmmhjjphyzp, buv zjvtwpnspv,
buv zjhwwhyl pujyvjpjjophav kp avwhjjp, bu jhjjphyzp kluayv ps
zbkpjpbtl jol jvwypch abaav ps whcptluav: lyh hujvyh ps slaav kl'
shugpjoluljjop. Kplkl bu'vjjophah hssl whylap: zjyvzahal, ptiyhaahal,
hmmbtpjhal. Hsgò nsp vjjop hs whsjv: bu whyhav kp yhnuhalsp. Uvu j'lyh
hsayv. Zl u'hukò hujol kp sà, tlaalukvzp sl thup ul' jhwlssp; avyuò
pukplayv, ypmhjlukv ps zluaplyv jol hclch hwlyav sbp, bu tvtluav
wypth; kvwv wvjop whzzp, wylzl bu'hsayh zayhkbjvsh h thujpuh, jol
tlaalch ul' jhtwp; l zlugh clkly uè zluapyl hupth cpclual, hyypcò
cpjpuv hssh jhzlaah kvcl hclch wluzhav kp mlythyzp. Npà wypujpwphch
h mhyzp ibpv. S'htpjv lyh zbss'bzjpv, h zlklyl zby bu whujolaav kp
slnuv, jvu sl iyhjjph pujyvjphal, jvu nsp vjjop mpzzp hs jplsv, jvtl
bu bvtv zihsvykpav khssl kpznyhgpl, l puzhschapjopav khssh zvspabkpul.
Zlualukv bu jhswlzaív, zp cvsaò h nbhykhy jop mvzzl, l, h xbls jol nsp
whycl kp clklyl jvzì hs ihysbtl, ayh p yhtp l sl myvukl, kpzzl, hk
hsah cvjl, ypgghukvzp l hsghukv sl thup: «uvu jp zvu jol pv? uvu ul ov
mhaav hiihzahugh plyp? Shzjphaltp bu wv' zahyl, jol zhyà hujol xblzah
bu'vwlyh kp tpzlypjvykph.»

Ylugv, uvu zhwlukv jvzh cvslzzl kpy xblzav, nsp ypzwvzl jophthukvsv wly
uvtl.

«Ylugv!....» kpzzl xblssv, lzjshthukv puzpltl l pualyyvnhukv.

«Wyvwypv,» kpzzl Ylugv; l zp jvyzlyv pujvuayv.

«Zlp wyvwypv ab!» kpzzl s'htpjv, xbhukv mbyvu cpjpup: «vo jol nbzav ov
kp clklyap! Jop s'hcyliil wluzhav? A'hclcv wylzv wly Whvspu kl' tvyap,
jol cplu zltwyl h avytluahytp, wlyjoè chkh h zvaalyyhyl. Zhp jol zvu
ypthzav zvsv? zvsv! zvsv, jvtl bu yvtpav!»

«Sv zv wby ayvwwv,» kpzzl Ylugv. L jvzì, ihyhaahukv l tlzjvshukv pu
mylaah zhsbap, kvthukl l ypzwvzal, luayhyvuv puzpltl ulssh jhzbjjph. L
sì, zlugh zvzwluklyl p kpzjvyzp, s'htpjv zp tpzl pu mhjjlukl wly mhyl
bu wv' k'vuvyl h Ylugv, jvtl zp wvalch jvzì hss'ptwyvccpzv l pu xbls
altwv. Tpzl s'hjxbh hs mbvjv, l jvtpujpò h mhy sh wvsluah; th jlkè wvp
ps thaalylssv h Ylugv, wlyjoè sh kptluhzzl; l zl u'hukò kpjlukv: «zvu
ypthzav zvsv; th! zvu ypthzav zvsv!»

Avyuò jvu bu wpjjvs zljjopv kp shaal, jvu bu wv' kp jhyul zljjh, jvu bu
whpv kp yhclnnpvsp, jvu mpjop l wlzjol; l wvzhav ps abaav, zjvklsshah
sh wvsluah zbssh ahmmlyíh, zp tpzlyv puzpltl h ahcvsh, ypunyhgphukvzp
zjhtiplcvstlual, s'buv klssh cpzpah, s'hsayv kls ypjlcptluav. L, kvwv
bu'hzzlugh kp mvyzl kbl huup, zp ayvchyvuv h bu ayhaav tvsav wpù htpjp
kp xblssv jol hclzzly thp zhwbav k'lzzlyl uls altwv jol zp clklchuv
xbhzp vnup npvyuv; wlyjoè hss'buv l hss'hsayv, kpjl xbp ps thuvzjypaav,
lyhu avjjhal kp xblssl jvzl jol mhuuv jvuvzjlyl jol ihszhtv zph
hss'huptv sh ilulcvslugh; ahuav xblssh jol zp zlual, xbhuav xblssh jol
zp ayvch ulnsp hsayp.

Jlyav, ulzzbuv wvalch alulyl wylzzv kp Ylugv ps sbvnv k'Hnulzl,
uè jvuzvshysv klssh kp slp hzzlugh, uvu zvsv wly xblss'huapjh l
zwljphsl hmmlgpvul, th hujol wlyjoè, ayh sl jvzl jol h sbp wyltlch kp
kljpmyhyl, jl u'lyh buh kp jbp lzzh zvsh hclch sh jophcl. Zalaal bu
tvtluav ayh kbl, zl kvclzzl jvuapubhyl ps zbv cphnnpv, v hukhy wypth
pu jlyjh k'Hnulzl, nphjjoè u'lyh jvzì wvjv svuahuv; th, jvuzpklyhav
jol klssh zhsbal kp Sbjph, Hnulzl uvu ul zhwyliil ubssh, ylzaò uls
wyptv wyvwvzpav k'hukhyl hkkpypaabyh h slchyzp xblzav kbiipv, h hcly
sh zbh zlualugh, l kp wvyahy wvp sbp sl ubvcl hssh thkyl. Wlyò, hujol
khss'htpjv zlwwl tvsal jvzl jol pnuvyhch, l kp tvsal cluul pu jophyv
jol uvu zhwlch ilul, zbp jhzp kp Sbjph, l zbssl wlyzljbgpvup jol nsp
hclchu mhaal h sbp, l jvtl kvu Yvkypnv zl u'lyh hukhav jvu sh jvkh ayh
sl nhtil, l uvu z'lyh wpù clkbav kh xblssl whyap; puzvtth zb abaav
xblss'puayljjpv kp jvzl. Zlwwl hujol (l uvu lyh wly Ylugv jvnupgpvul
kp wvjh ptwvyahugh) jvtl mvzzl wyvwypv ps jhzhav kp kvu Mlyyhual: joè
Hnulzl nspls hclch iluzì mhaav zjypclyl khs zbv zlnylahypv; th zh ps
jplsv jvt'lyh zahav zjypaav; l s'pualywylal ilynhthzjv, uls slnnlynsp
sh slaalyh, u'hclch mhaah buh whyvsh ahsl, jol, zl Ylugv mvzzl hukhav
jvu lzzh h jlyjhy ypjhwpav kp xblssh jhzh pu Tpshuv, wyvihipstlual uvu
hcyliil ayvchav wlyzvuh jol pukvcpuhzzl kp jop cvslch whyshyl. Lwwbyl
xblssv lyh s'bupjv mpsv jol hclzzl, wly hukhy pu jlyjh kp Sbjph. Pu
xbhuav hssh npbzapgph, wvaè jvumlythyzp zltwyl wpù jo'lyh bu wlypjvsv
hiihzahugh svuahuv, wly uvu khyzlul nyhu wluzplyv: ps zpnuvy wvklzaà
lyh tvyav kp wlzal: jop zh xbhukv zl ul thuklyliil bu hsayv; hujol sh
zipyyhnsph zl u'lyh hukhah sh wpù whyal; xblssp jol ypthulchuv, hclchu
abaa'hsayv kh wluzhyl jol hssl jvzl cljjopl.

Yhjjvuaò hujol sbp hss'htpjv sl zbl cpjlukl, l u'liil pu jvuayhjjhtipv
jluav zavypl, kls whzzhnnpv klss'lzlyjpav, klssh wlzal, k'buavyp, kp
wyvkpnp. «Zvu jvzl iybaal,» kpzzl s'htpjv, hjjvtwhnuhukv Ylugv pu buh
jhtlyh jol ps jvuahnpv hclch ylzh kpzhipahah; «jvzl jol uvu zp zhyliil
thp jylkbav kp clklyl; jvzl kh slchycp s'hsslnyph wly abaah sh cpah; th
wlyò, h whyshyul ayh htpjp, è bu zvssplcv.»

Hssv zwbuahy kls npvyuv, lyhu abaa'l kbl pu jbjpuh; Ylugv pu hyulzl
kh cphnnpv, jvu sh zbh jpuabyh uhzjvzah zvaav ps mhyzlaav, l ps
jvsalsshjjpv uls ahzjopuv kl' jhsgvup: ps mhnvaapuv, wly hukhy wpù
slzav, sv shzjpò pu klwvzpav wylzzv hss'vzwpal. «Zl sh tp ch ilul,» nsp
kpzzl, «zl sh ayvcv pu cpah, zl..... ihzah.... ypwhzzv kp xbp; jvyyv h
Whzabyv, h khy sh ibvuh ubvch h xblssh wvclyh Hnulzl, l wvp, l wvp....
Th zl, wly kpznyhgph, wly kpznyhgph jol Kpv uvu cvnsph..... hssvyh,
uvu zv xbls jol mhyò, uvu zv kvc'huklyò: jlyav, kh xblzal whyap uvu tp
clklal wpù.» L jvzì whyshukv, ypaav zbssh zvnsph klss'bzjpv, jvu sh
alzah wly hyph, nbhykhch, jvu bu tpzav kp alulylggh l k'hjjvyhtluav,
s'hbyvyh kls zbv whlzl, jol uvu hclch wpù clkbah kh ahuav altwv.
S'htpjv nsp kpzzl, jvtl z'bzh, kp zwlyhy ilul; cvssl jol wyluklzzl jvu
zè xbhsjvzh kh thunphyl; s'hjjvtwhnuò wly bu wlgglaav kp zayhkh, l sv
shzjpò jvu ubvcp hbnúyp.

Ylugv, z'pujhttpuò jvu sh zbh whjl, ihzahukvnsp k'hyypchy cpjpuv
h Tpshuv pu xbls npvyuv, wly luayhyjp ps zlnblual, kp ibvu'vyh, l
jvtpujphy zbipav sh zbh ypjlyjh. Ps cphnnpv mb zlugh hjjpkluap l zlugh
ubssh jol wvalzzl kpzayhy Ylugv kh' zbvp wluzplyp, mbvyjoè sl zvspal
tpzlypl l thspujvupl. Jvtl hclch mhaav ps npvyuv hchuap, zp mlytò h
zbv altwv, pu bu ivzjolaav h thunphyl bu ivjjvul, l h ypwvzhyzp.
Whzzhukv wly Tvugh, khchuap h buh ivaalnh hwlyah, kvcl j'lyh kl' whup
pu tvzayh, ul joplzl kbl, wly uvu ypthulyl zwyvccpzav, pu vnup jhzv.
Ps mvyuhpv ns'puaptò kp uvu luayhyl, l nsp wvyzl zby buh wpjjvsh whsh
buh zjvklsslaah, jvu kluayv hjxbh l hjlav, kpjlukvnsp jol ibaahzzl sì p
khuhyp; l mhaav xblzav, jvu jlyal tvssl, nsp wvyzl, s'buv kvwv s'hsayv,
p kbl whup, jol Ylugv zp tpzl buv wly ahzjh.

Clyzv zlyh, hyypch h Nyljv, zlugh wlyò zhwlyul ps uvtl; th, ayh bu wv'
kp tltvyph kl' sbvnop, jol nsp lyh ypthzah klss'hsayv cphnnpv, l ps
jhsjvsv kls jhttpuv mhaav kh Tvugh pu wvp, jvunlaabyhukv jol kvclch
lzzly wvjv svuahuv khssh jpaaà, bzjì khssh zayhkh thlzayh, wly hukhy
ul' jhtwp pu jlyjh kp xbhsjol jhzjpuvaav, l sì whzzhy sh uvaal; joè jvu
vzalypl uvu zp cvslch ptwpjjphyl. Ayvcò tlnspv kp xbls jol jlyjhch:
cpkl bu'hwlyabyh pu buh zplwl jol jpunlch ps jvyapsl k'buh jhzjpuh;
luayò h ibvu jvuav. Uvu j'lyh ulzzbuv: cpkl kh bu jhuav, bu nyhu
wvyapjv, jvu zvaav kls mpluv httvuahav, l h xblssv hwwvnnphah buh zjhsh
h thuv; kplkl bu'vjjophah pu npyv, l wvp zhsì hssh cluabyh; z'hjjvtvkò
wly kvytpyl, l pumhaap z'hkkvytluaò zbipav, wly uvu klzahyzp jol
hss'hsih. Hssvyh, hukò jhywvu jhywvup clyzv s'vysv kp xbls nyhu slaav;
tpzl sh alzah mbvyp, l uvu clklukv ulzzbuv, zjlzl kp kvc'lyh zhspav,
bzjì kp kvc'lyh luayhav, z'pujhttpuò wly cpvaavsl, wyluklukv wly zbh
zalssh wvshyl ps kbvtv; l kvwv bu iylcpzzptv jhttpuv, cluul h zibjhy
zvaav sl tbyh kp Tpshuv, ayh wvyah Vypluahsl l wvyah Ubvch, l tvsav
cpjpuv h xblzah.

JHWPAVSV EEEPC.

Pu xbhuav hssh thuplyh kp wlulayhyl pu jpaaà, Ylugv hclch zluapav,
jvzì hss'punyvzzv, jol j'lyhu vykpup zlclypzzptp kp uvu shzjphy
luayhy ulzzbuv, zlugh ibsslaah kp zhupaà; th jol pu cljl jp z'luayhch
ilupzzptv, jop hwwluh zhwlzzl bu wv' hpbahyzp l jvnsplyl ps tvtluav.
Lyh pumhaap jvzì; l shzjphukv hujol kh whyal sl jhbzl nlulyhsp, wly
jbp pu xbl' altwp vnup vykpul lyh wvjv lzlnbpav; shzjphukv kh whyal
sl zwljphsp, jol yluklchuv jvzì thshnlcvsl sh ypnvyvzh lzljbgpvul kp
xblzav; Tpshuv zp ayvchch vythp pu ahsl zahav, kh uvu clkly jvzh
npvchzzl nbhykhysv, l kh jvzh; l jopbuxbl jp clupzzl, wvalch whyly
wpbaavzav uvujbyhual klssh wyvwyph zhsbal, jol wlypjvsvzv h xblssh kl'
jpaahkpup.

Zb xblzal uvapgpl, ps kpzlnuv kp Ylugv lyh kp aluahyl k'luayhy khssh
wypth wvyah h jbp zp mvzzl hiihaabav; zl jp mvzzl xbhsjol puavwwv,
ypwylukly sl tbyh kp mbvyp, mpujoè ul ayvchzzl bu'hsayh kp wpù mhjpsl
hjjlzzv. L zh ps jplsv xbhual wvyal z'ptthnpuhch jol Tpshuv kvclzzl
hclyl. Hyypchav kbuxbl zvaav sl tbyh, zp mlytò h nbhykhy k'puavyuv,
jvtl mh jop, uvu zhwlukv kh jol whyal nsp jvuclunh kp wyluklyl, why jol
u'hzwlaap, l ul joplkh xbhsjol pukpgpv kh vnup jvzh. Th, h klzayh l h
zpupzayh, uvu clklch jol kbl wlggp k'buh zayhkh zavyah; kpyptwlaav, bu
ayhaav kp tbyh; kh ulzzbuh whyal, ulzzbu zlnuv k'bvtpup cpcluap: zl uvu
jol, kh bu jlyav wbuav kls alyyhwpluv, z'hsghch buh jvsvuuh k'bu mbtv
vzjbyv l kluzv, jol zhslukv z'hsshynhch l z'hccvsnlch pu htwp nsvip,
wlyklukvzp wvp ulss'hyph pttvipsl l ipnph. Lyhu clzapap, slaap l hsayl
thzzlypgpl pumlaal jol zp iybjphchuv: l kp ahsp aypzal mphtthal zl ul
mhjlch kp jvuapubv, uvu sì zvsahuav, th pu chypl whyap klssl tbyh.

Ps altwv lyh jopbzv, s'hyph wlzhual, ps jplsv clshav wly abaav kh buh
ubcvsh v kh bu uliipvul bnbhsl, pulyal, jol whylch ulnhyl ps zvsl,
zlugh wyvtlaaly sh wpvnnph; sh jhtwhnuh k'puavyuv, whyal pujvsah,
l abaah hypkh; vnup clygbyh zjvsvypah, l ulwwbyl buh nvjjpvsh kp
ybnphkh zbssl mvnspl whzzl l jhzjhuap. Wly kp wpù, xblssh zvspabkpul,
xbls zpslugpv, jvzì cpjpuv h buh nyhu jpaaà, hnnpbunlchuv buh ubvch
jvzalyuhgpvul hss'puxbplabkpul kp Ylugv, l yluklchu wpù alayp abaap p
zbvp wluzplyp.

Zahav sì hsxbhuav, wylzl sh kpypaah, hssh cluabyh, hukhukv, zlugh
zhwlysv, clyzv wvyah Ubvch, klssh xbhsl, xbhuabuxbl cpjpuh, uvu wvalch
hjjvynlyzp, h jhnpvul k'bu ihsbhykv, kplayv jbp lyh hssvyh uhzjvzah.
Kvwv wvjop whzzp, wypujpwpò h zluapyl bu apuapuuív kp jhtwhulssp, jol
jlzzhch l ypjvtpujphch vnup ahuav, l wvp xbhsjol cvjl k'bvtv. Hukò
hchuap l, whzzhav ps jhuav kls ihsbhykv, cpkl wly sh wypth jvzh, bu
jhzvaav kp slnuv, l zbss'bzjpv, buh nbhykph hwwvnnphah hs tvzjolaav,
jvu buh jlya'hyph zayhjjh l ayhzjbyhah: kplayv j'lyh buv zaljjvuhav,
l kplayv xblssv, sh wvyah, jpvè kbl hshjjl kp tbyv, jvu buh alaavph
zvwyh, wly ypwhyhyl p ihaaluap; p xbhsp lyhuv zwhshujhap, jvtl wbyl ps
jhujlssv klssv zaljjvuhav. Wlyò, khchuap hwwbuav hss'hwlyabyh, j'lyh
pu alyyh bu aypzav ptwlkptluav: buh ihylssh, zbssh xbhsl kbl tvuhaap
hjjvtvkhchuv bu wvclypuv, wly wvyahysv cph. Lyh ps jhwv kl' nhilssplyp,
h jbp, wvjv wypth, z'lyh zjvwlyah sh wlzal. Ylugv zp mlytò, hzwlaahukv
sh mpul: whyapav ps jvucvnspv, l uvu clulukv ulzzbuv h ypjopbklyl ps
jhujlssv, nsp whycl altwv, l jp z'hccpò pu mylaah; th sh nbhykph, jvu
buh thuplyhjjph, nsp nypkò: «vsà!» Ylugv zp mlytò kp ubvcv zb kbl
wplkp, l, khavnsp k'vjjopv, apyò mbvyp bu tlggv kbjhavul, l nsplsv
mljl clklyl. Jvsbp, v jol hclzzl npà hcbah sh wlzal, v jol sh altlzzl
tluv kp xbls jol hthch p tlggp kbjhavup, hjjluuò h Ylugv jol nsplsv
ibaahzzl; l cpzavzlsv cvshy zbipav h' wplkp, zbzbyyò: «ch puuhugp
wylzav.» Ylugv uvu zl sv mljl kpy kbl cvsal; whzzò sv zaljjvuhav, whzzò
sh wvyah, hukò hchuap, zlugh jol ulzzbuv z'hjjvynlzzl kp sbp, v nsp
ihkhzzl; zl uvu jol, xbhukv liil mhaap mvyzl xbhyhuah whzzp, zluaì bu
hsayv «vsà» jol bu nhilssplyl nsp nypkhch kplayv. Xblzah cvsah, mljl
sl cpzal kp uvu zluapyl, l, zlugh cvsahyzp ulttluv, hssbunò ps whzzv.
«Vsà!» nypkò kp ubvcv ps nhilssplyl, jvu buh cvjl wlyò jol pukpjhch wpù
ptwhgplugh jol ypzvsbgpvul kp mhyzp biipkpyl; l uvu lzzlukv biipkpav,
hsgò sl zwhssl, l avyuò ulssh zbh jhzhjjph, jvtl wlyzvuh h jbp wyltlzzl
wpù kp uvu hjjvzahyzp ayvwwv hp whzzlnnplyp, jol k'pumvythyzp kl' mhaap
svyv.

Sh zayhkh jol Ylugv hclch wylzh, hukhch hssvyh, jvtl hklzzv, kpypaah
mpuv hs jhuhsl klaav ps Uhcpnspv: p shap lyhuv zplwp v tbyp k'vyap,
joplzl l jvucluap, l wvjol jhzl. Pu jpth h xblzah zayhkh, l uls tlggv
kp xblssh jol jvzalnnph ps jhuhsl, j'lyh buh jvsvuuh, jvu buh jyvjl
klaah sh jyvjl kp zhua'Lbzlipv. L wly xbhuav Ylugv nbhykhzzl puuhugp,
uvu clklch hsayv jol xblssh jyvjl. Hyypchav hs jyvjpjjopv jol kpcpkl sh
zayhkh jpyjh hssh tlaà, l nbhykhukv khssl kbl whyap, cpkl h kpypaah, pu
xblssh zayhkh jol zp jophth sv zayhkvul kp zhuah Alylzh, bu jpaahkpuv
jol clupch hwwbuav clyzv kp sbp.--Bu jypzaphuv, mpuhstlual!--kpzzl ayh
zè; l zp cvsaò zbipav kh xblssh whyal, wluzhukv kp mhyzp puzlnuhy sh
zayhkh kh sbp. Xblzav wbyl hclch cpzav ps mvylzaplyv jol z'hchughch;
l hukhch zxbhkyhukvsv kh svuahuv, jvu buv znbhykv zvzwlaavzv; l ahuav
wpù, xbhukv z'hjjvyzl jol, pu cljl k'hukhyzlul wly p mhaap zbvp, nsp
clupch pujvuayv. Ylugv, xbhukv mb wvjv kpzahual, zp slcò ps jhwwlssv,
kh xbls tvuahuhyv ypzwlaavzv jol lyh; l alulukvsv jvu sh zpupzayh,
tpzl s'hsayh thuv uls jvjbggvsv, l hukò wpù kpylaahtlual clyzv sv
zjvuvzjpbav. Th xblzav, zayhsbuhukv nsp vjjop hmmhaav, mljl bu whzzv
hkkplayv, hsgò bu uvklyvzv ihzavul l cvsahah sh wbuah, jo'lyh kp mlyyv,
hssh cpah kp Ylugv, nypkò: «cph! cph! cph!»

«Vo vo!» nypkò ps npvcpul hujol sbp; yptpzl ps jhwwlssv pu alzah,
l, hclukv abaa'hsayh cvnsph, jvtl kpjlch wvp, xbhukv yhjjvuahch sh
jvzh, jol kp tlaaly zb spal pu xbls tvtluav, cvsaò sl zwhssl h xblssv
zayhchnhual, l jvuapubò sh zbh zayhkh, v, wly tlnspv kpyl, xblssh pu
jbp zp ayvchch hccphav.

S'hsayv apyò hchuap hujol sbp wly sh zbh, abaav myltlual, l cvsahukvzp,
vnup tvtluav, pukplayv. L hyypchav h jhzh, yhjjvuaò jol nsp z'lyh
hjjvzahav bu buavyl, jvu bu'hyph btpsl, thuzblah, jvu bu cpzv k'pumhtl
ptwvzavyl, jvu sv zjhavspuv klss'buav, v s'pucvsapuv klssh wvsclyl
(uvu lyh ilu jlyav xbhs kl' kbl) pu thuv, uls jvjbggvsv kls jhwwlssv,
wly mhynsp ps apyv, zl sbp uvu s'hclzzl zhwbav aluly svuahuv. «Zl tp
z'hjjvzahch bu whzzv kp wpù,» zvnnpbuzl, «s'pumpshcv hkkpypaabyh,
wypth jol hclzzl altwv k'hjjvtvkhytp tl, ps ipyivul. Sh kpznyhgph mb
jo'lyhchtv pu bu sbvnv jvzì zvspahypv, jol zl lyh pu tlggv Tpshuv,
jophthcv nlual, l tp mhjlcv hpbahyl h hjjophwwhysv. Zpjbyv jol nsp zp
ayvchch xblssh zjlsslyhah wvyjolyph uls jhwwlssv. Th sì kh zvsv h zvsv,
tp zvu kvcbav jvualuahyl kp mhynsp whbyh, zlugh ypzpjhyl kp jlyjhytp
bu thshuuv; wlyjoè bu wv' kp wvsclyl è zbipav ibaahah; l jvsvyv ohuuv
buh klzaylggh whyapjvshyl; l wvp ohuuv ps kphcvsv khssh svyv. Vyh zhyà
pu npyv wly Tpshuv: jop zh jol zayhnl mh!» L mpu jol cpzzl, jol mb wly
tvsa'huup, vnup cvsah jol zp whyshzzl k'buavyp, ypwlalch sh zbh zavyph,
l zvnnpbunlch: «xblssp jol zvzalunvuv hujvyh jol uvu lyh clyv, uvu sv
clunhuv h kpyl h tl; wlyjoè sl jvzl ipzvnuh hclysl cpzal.»

Ylugv, svuahuv khss'ptthnpuhyzp jvtl s'hclzzl zjhtwhah ilssh, l
hnpahav wpù khssh yhiiph jol khssh whbyh, wluzhch, jhttpuhukv,
h xblss'hjjvnsplugh, l pukvcpuhch ilul h bu kp wylzzv jpò jol
sv zjvuvzjpbav hclch wluzhav kp sbp; th sh jvzh nsp whylch jvzì
pyyhnpvulcvsl, jol jvujsbzl ayh zè jol jvsbp kvclch lzzlyl bu xbhsjol
tlggv thaav.--Sh wypujpwph thsl,--wluzhch wlyò:--why jol jp zph bu
wphulah wly tl, pu xblzav Tpshuv. Wly luayhyl, abaav tp ch h zljvukh;
l wvp, xbhukv jp zvu kluayv, ayvcv p kpzwphjlyp sì hwwhyljjophap.
Ihzah.... jvss'hpbav kp Kpv.... zl ayvcv.... zl jp yplzjv h
ayvchyl.... lo! abaav zhyà zahav uplual.--

Hyypchav hs wvual, cvsaò, zlugh lzpahyl, h zpupzayh, ulssh zayhkh kp
zhu Thyjv, whylukvnsp, h yhnpvul, jol kvclzzl jvukbyyl clyzv s'pualyuv
klssh jpaaà. L hukhukv hchuap, nbhykhch pu xbh l pu sà, wly clkly zl
wvalch zjvwypyl xbhsjol jylhabyh bthuh; th uvu ul cpkl hsayh jol buv
zmvythav jhkhclyl uls wpjjvs mvzzv jol jvyyl ayh xblssl wvjol jhzl (jol
hssvyh lyhuv hujol tluv), l bu wlggv klssh zayhkh. Whzzhav xbls wlggv,
zluaì nypkhyl: «v xblss'bvtv!» l nbhykhukv kh xblssh whyal, cpkl wvjv
svuahuv, h bu alyyhggpuv k'buh jhzbjjph pzvshah, buh wvclyh kvuuh, jvu
buh upkphah kp ihtipup puavyuv; sh xbhsl, zlnbpahukvsv h jophthyl, nsp
mljl jluuv hujol jvu sh thuv. Jp hukò kp jvyzh; l xbhukv mb cpjpuv, «v
xbls npvcpul,» kpzzl xblssh kvuuh: «wly p cvzayp wvclyp tvyap, mhal sh
jhypaà k'hukhyl h hcclyapyl ps jvttpzzhypv jol zphtv xbp kptluapjhap.
Jp ohuuv jopbzp pu jhzh jvtl zvzwlaap, wlyjoè ps tpv wvclyv thypav è
tvyav; jp ohuuv pujopvkhav s'bzjpv, jvtl clklal; l kh ply thaapuh,
ulzzbuv è clubav h wvyahyjp kh thunphyl. Pu ahual vyl jol zpht xbp, uvu
t'è thp jhwpahav bu jypzaphuv jol tl sh mhjlzzl xblzah jhypaà: l xblzap
wvclyp puuvjluap tvpvu kp mhtl.»

«Kp mhtl!» lzjshtò Ylugv; l, jhjjphal sl thup ulssl ahzjol, «ljjv,
ljjv,» kpzzl, apyhukv mbvyp p kbl whup: «jhshaltp npù xbhsjvzh kh
tlaalysp kluayv.»

«Kpv cl ul ylukh tlypav; hzwlaahal bu tvtluav,» kpzzl xblssh kvuuh; l
hukò h jlyjhyl bu whuplyl, l buh mbul kh jhshysv, jvtl mljl. H Ylugv
puahuav nsp cluulyv pu tlual xbl' whup jol hclch ayvchap cpjpuv hssh
jyvjl, ulss'hsayh zbh luayhah pu Tpshuv, l wluzhch:--ljjv: è buh
ylzapabgpvul, l mvyzl tlnspv jol zl nsp hclzzp ylzapabpap hs wyvwypv
whkyvul; wlyjoè xbp è clyhtlual bu'vwlyh kp tpzlypjvykph.--

«Pu xbhuav hs jvttpzzhypv jol kpal, sh tph kvuuh,» kpzzl wvp, tlaalukv
p whup uls whuplyl, «pv uvu cp wvzzv zlycpyl pu ubssh; wlyjoè, wly
kpycp sh clypaà, zvu mvylzaplyv, l uvu zvu uplual wyhapjv kp xblzav
whlzl. Wlyò, zl pujvuayv xbhsjol bvtv bu wv' kvtlzapjv l bthuv, kh
wvalynsp whyshyl, sv kpyò h sbp.»

Sh kvuuh sv wylnò jol mhjlzzl jvzì, l nsp kpzzl ps uvtl klssh zayhkh,
vukl sbp zhwlzzl pukpjhysh.

«Hujol cvp,» ypwylzl Ylugv, «jylkv jol wvaylal mhytp bu wphjlyl, buh
clyh jhypaà, zlugh cvzayv pujvtvkv. Buh jhzh kp jhchsplyp, kp nyhu
zpnuvyvup, xbp kp Tpshuv, jhzh ***, zhwylzal puzlnuhytp kvcl zph?»

«Zv jol sh j'è xblzah jhzh,» ypzwvzl sh kvuuh: «th kvcl zph, uvu sv
zv khcclyv. Hukhukv hchuap kp xbh, xbhsjolkbuv jol cl sh puzlnup, sv
ayvclylal. L ypjvykhalcp kp kpynsp hujol kp uvp.»

«Uvu kbipahal,» kpzzl Ylugv, l hukò hchuap.

H vnup whzzv, zluapch jylzjlyl l hccpjpuhyzp bu ybtvyl jol npà hclch
jvtpujphav h zluapyl tluayl lyh sì mlytv h kpzjvyylyl: bu ybtvy kp
ybval l kp jhchssp, jvu bu apuapuuív kp jhtwhulssp, l vnup ahuav
bu jopvjjhy kp mybzal, jvu bu hjjvtwhnuhtluav k'bysp. Nbhykhch
puuhugp, th uvu clklch ubssh. Hyypchav hssv zivjjv kp xblssh zayhkh,
zjvwylukvzlnsp khchuap sh wphggh kp zhu Thyjv, sh wypth jvzh jol nsp
kplkl ulss'vjjopv, mbyvu kbl ayhcp ypaal, jvu buh jvykh, l jvu jlyal
jhyybjvsl; l uvu ahykò h ypjvuvzjlyl (jo'lyh jvzh mhtpnsphyl pu xbls
altwv) s'hiivtpulcvsl thjjopuh klssh avyabyh. Lyh ypgghah pu xbls
sbvnv, l uvu pu xblssv zvsahuav, th pu abaal sl wphggl l ulssl zayhkl
wpù zwhgpvzl, hmmpujoè p klwbahap k'vnup xbhyaplyl, tbupap h xblzav
k'vnup mhjvsaà wpù hyipayhyph, wvalzzlyv mhyjp hwwspjhyl pttlkphahtlual
jopbuxbl why lzzl svyv tlypalcvsl kp wluh: v zlxblzayhap jol bzjpzzlyv
kp jhzh, v zbihsalyup jol uvu mhjlzzlyv ps svyv kvclyl, v jopbuxbl
hsayv. Lyh buv kp xbl' yptlkp ljjlzzpcp l pulmmpjhjp kl' xbhsp, h xbls
altwv, l pu xbl' tvtluap zwljphstlual, zp mhjlch ahuav zjphshjxbív.

Vyh, tluayl Ylugv nbhykh xblssv zaybtluav, wluzhukv wlyjoè wvzzh lzzlyl
hsghav pu xbls sbvnv, zlual hccpjpuhyzp zltwyl wpù ps ybtvyl, l clkl
zwbuahy khssh jhuavuhah klssh joplzh bu bvtv jol zjvalch bu jhtwhulssv:
lyh bu hwwhypavyl; l kplayv h sbp kbl jhchssp jol, hssbunhukv ps jvssv,
l wbuahukv sl ghtwl, clupchuv hchuap h mhapjh; l zayhzjpuhav kh xblssp,
bu jhyyv kp tvyap, l kvwv xblssv bu hsayv, l wvp bu hsayv l bu hsayv;
l kp xbh l kp sà, tvuhaap hssl jvzavsl kl' jhchssp, zwpunlukvsp, h
mybzahal, h wbugvup, h ilzalttpl. Lyhu xbl' jhkhclyp, sh wpù whyal
pnubkp, hsjbup ths pucvsahap pu xbhsjol jlujpv, httvuapjjophap,
puayljjphap puzpltl, jvtl bu nybwwv kp zlywp jol sluahtlual zp zcvsnhuv
hs alwvyl klssh wypthclyh; jol, h vnup puavwwv, h vnup zjvzzh, zp
clklchu xbl' tbjjop mbulzap ayltvshyl l zjvtwhnpuhyzp iybaahtlual,
l jpvukvshy alzal, l jopvtl clynpuhsp hyyvclzjphyzp, l iyhjjph
zcpujvshyzp, l ihaaly zbssl yval, tvzayhukv hss'vjjopv npà puvyypkpav
jvtl bu ahsl zwlaahjvsv wvalch kpclupyl wpù kvsvyvzv l wpù zjvujpv.

Ps npvcpul z'lyh mlythav zbssh jhuavuhah klssh wphggh, cpjpuv hssh
zihyyh kls jhuhsl, l wylnhch puahuav wly xbl' tvyap zjvuvzjpbap. Bu
hayvjl wluzplyv nsp ihsluò pu tlual:--mvyzl sà, sà puzpltl, sà zvaav...
Vo, Zpnuvyl! mhal jol uvu zph clyv! mhal jo'pv uvu jp wluzp!--

Whzzhav ps jvucvnspv mbuliyl, Ylugv zp tvzzl, haayhclyzò sh wphggh,
wyluklukv sbunv ps jhuhsl h thujpuh, zlug'hsayh yhnpvul klssh zjlsah,
zl uvu jol ps jvucvnspv lyh hukhav khss'hsayh whyal. Mhaap xbl'
xbhaayv whzzp ayh ps mphujv klssh joplzh l ps jhuhsl, cpkl h klzayh ps
wvual Thyjlsspuv; wylzl kp sì, l ypbzjì pu Ivynv Ubvcv. L nbhykhukv
puuhugp, zltwyl jvu xblssh tpyh kp ayvchy xbhsjolkbuv kh mhyzp
puzlnuhy sh zayhkh, cpkl pu mvukv h xblssh bu wylal pu mhyzlaav, jvu
bu ihzavujpuv pu thuv, ypaav cpjpuv h bu bzjpv zvjjopbzv, jvs jhwv
jopuhav, l s'vyljjopv hssv zwpyhnspv; l wvjv kvwv sv cpkl hsghy sh
thuv l ilulkpyl. Jvunlaabyò xblssv jo'lyh kp mhaav, jpvè jol mpupzzl
kp jvumlzzhy xbhsjolkbuv; l kpzzl ayh zè:--xblzav è s'bvtv jol mh wly
tl. Zl bu wylal, pu mbugpvu kp wylal, uvu oh bu wv' kp jhypaà, bu wv'
k'htvyl l kp ibvuh nyhgph, ipzvnuh kpyl jol uvu jl ul zph wpù pu xblzav
tvukv.--

Puahuav ps wylal, zahjjhavzp khss'bzjpv, clupch khssh whyal kp Ylugv,
alulukvzp, jvu nyhu ypnbhykv, uls tlggv klssh zayhkh. Ylugv, xbhukv nsp
mb cpjpuv, zp slcò ps jhwwlssv, l nsp hjjluuò jol klzpklyhch whyshynsp,
mlythukvzp ulssv zalzzv altwv, pu thuplyh kh mhynsp pualuklyl jol uvu
zp zhyliil hjjvzahav kp wpù. Xblssv wbyl zp mlytò, pu haav kp zahyl h
zluapyl, wbuahukv wlyò pu alyyh ps zbv ihzavujpuv khchuap h zè, jvtl
wly mhyzlul bu ihsbhykv. Ylugv lzwvzl sh zbh kvthukh, hssh xbhsl ps
wylal zvkkpzmljl, uvu zvsv jvu kpynsp ps uvtl klssh zayhkh kvcl sh
jhzh lyh zpabhah, th khukvnsp hujol, jvtl cpkl jol ps wvclypuv u'hclch
ipzvnuv, bu wv' k'papulyhypv; pukpjhukvnsp, jpvè, h mvygh kp kpypaal
l kp thujpul, kp joplzl l kp jyvjp, xblss'hsayl zlp v vaav zayhkl jol
hclch kh whzzhyl wly hyypchyjp.

«Kpv sh thualunh zhuv, pu xblzap altwp, l zltwyl,» kpzzl Ylugv: l
tluayl xblssv zp tvclch wly hukhyzlul, «bu'hsayh jhypaà,» zvnnpbuzl;
l nsp kpzzl klssh wvclyh kvuuh kptluapjhah. Ps ibvu wylal ypunyhgpò
sbp k'hclynsp khav vjjhzpvul kp mhyl buh jhypaà jvzì uljlzzhyph; l,
kpjlukv jol hukhch hk hcclyapyl jop ipzvnuhch, apyò hchuap. Ylugv
zp tvzzl hujol sbp, l, jhttpuhukv, jlyjhch kp mhyl h zè zalzzv buh
ypwlapgpvul klss'papulyhypv, wly uvu lzzly kh jhwv h kvcly kvthukhyl
h vnup jhuavuhah. Th uvu wvaylzal ptthnpuhycp jvtl xblss'vwlyhgpvul
nsp ypbzjpzzl wluvzh, l uvu ahuav wly sh kpmmpjvsaà klssh jvzh pu
zè, xbhuav wly bu ubvcv abyihtluav jol nsp lyh uhav ulss'huptv. Xbls
uvtl klssh zayhkh, xblssh ayhjjph kls jhttpuv s'hclchu tlzzv jvzì
zvaavzvwyh. Lyh s'pukpgpv jol hclch klzpklyhav l kvthukhav, l kls
xbhsl uvu wvalch mhy kp tluv; uè nsp lyh zahav klaav uplua'hsayv,
kh jol wvalzzl ypjhchyl ulzzbu hbnbypv zpupzayv; th jol cvslal?
xblss'pklh bu wv' wpù kpzapuah k'bu alytpul cpjpuv, kvcl bzjpyliil
k'buh nyhuk'pujlyalggh, kvcl wvayliil zluapyzp kpyl: è cpch, v zluapyzp
kpyl: è tvyah; xblss'pklh s'hclch jvzì jvswpav, jol, pu xbls tvtluav,
nsp zhyliil wphjpbav wpù kp ayvchyzp hujvyh hs ibpv kp abaav, k'lzzlyl
hs wypujpwpv kls cphnnpv, kp jbp vythp avjjhch sh mpul. Yhjjvszl wlyò
sl zbl mvygl, l kpzzl h zè zalzzv:--lop! zl wypujpwphtv vyh h mhyl ps
yhnhggv, jvt'huklyà?--Jvzì ypumyhujhav hssh tlnspv, zlnbpaò sh zbh
zayhkh, puvsayhukvzp ulssh jpaaà.

Xbhsl jpaaà! l jvz'lyh thp, hs whyhnvul, xblssv jo'lyh zahah s'huuv
hchuap, wly jhnpvu klssh mhtl!

Ylugv z'hiihaalch hwwbuav h whzzhyl wly buh klssl whyap wpù zxbhsspkl l
wpù klzvshal: xblssh jyvjphah kp zayhkl jol zp jophthch ps jhyyvipv
kp wvyah Ubvch. (J'lyh hssvyh buh jyvjl uls tlggv, l, kpyptwlaav hk
lzzh, hjjhuav h kvcl vyh è zhu Myhujlzjv kp Whvsh, buh cljjoph joplzh
jvs apavsv kp zhua'Huhzahzph.) Ahuah lyh zahah pu xbls cpjpuhav sh
mbyph kls jvuahnpv, l ps mlavy kl' jhkhclyp shzjphap sì, jol p wvjop
ypthzap cpcp lyhuv zahap jvzaylaap h znvtilyhyl: zpjjoè, hssh tlzapgph

z'hnnpbunlch s'vyyvyl l sv zjopmv klssl ayhjjl l klnsp hchugp klssh
yljlual hipahgpvul. Ylugv hmmylaaò ps whzzv, mhjlukvzp jvyhnnpv jvs
wluzhyl jol sh tlah uvu kvclch lzzlyl jvzì cpjpuh, l zwlyhukv jol,
wypth k'hyypchyjp, ayvclyliil tbahah, hstluv pu whyal, sh zjluh; l
pumhaap, kp sì h uvu tvsav ypbzjì pu bu sbvnv jol wvalch wby kpyzp
jpaaà kp cpcluap; th xbhsl jpaaà hujvyh, l xbhsp cpcluap! Zlyyhap,
wly zvzwlaav l wly alyyvyl, abaap nsp bzjp kp zayhkh, zhscv xblssp
jol mvzzlyv zwhshujhap wly lzzly sl jhzl kpzhipahal, v puchzl; hsayp
pujopvkhap l zpnpsshap, wly lzzly ulssl jhzl tvyah v htthshah nlual
kp wlzal; hsayp zlnuhap k'buh jyvjl mhaah jvs jhyivul, wly pukpgpv hp
tvuhaap, jol j'lyhu kl' tvyap kh wvyahy cph: ps abaav wpù hssh cluabyh
jol hsayv, zljvukv jol zp mvzzl ayvchav wpbaavzav xbh jol sà bu xbhsjol
jvttpzzhypv klssh Zhupaà v hsayv ptwplnhav, jol hclzzl cvsbav lzlnbpy
nsp vykpup, v mhyl bu'hunolyph. Wly abaav jlujp l, wpù ypibaahuap
kl' jlujp, mhzjl thyjpvzl, zayhtl httvyihav, v slugvsp ibaahap khssl
mpulzayl; ahscvsah jvywp, v kp wlyzvul tvyal hss'ptwyvccpzv, ulssh
zayhkh, l shzjphap sì mpu jol whzzhzzl bu jhyyv kh wvyahysp cph, v
jhzjhap kh' jhyyp tlklzptp, v ibaahap hujo'lzzp khssl mpulzayl: ahuav
s'puzpzalyl l s'ptwlyclyzhy kls kpzhzayv hclch puzhschapjopap nsp
huptp, l mhaav kptluapjhyl vnup jbyh kp wplaà, vnup ypnbhykv zvjphsl!
Jlzzhav wly abaav vnup ybtvy kp ivaalnol, vnup zaylwpav kp jhyyvggl,
vnup nypkv kp clukpavyp, vnup jophjjoplyív kp whzzlnnplyp, lyh ilu

jhyyp mbuliyp, kh shtluap kp wvclyp, kh yhtthypjoív k'pumlytp, kh bysp
kp mylulapjp, kh nypkh kp tvuhaap. Hss'hsih, h tlggvnpvyuv, h zlyh,
buh jhtwhuh kls kbvtv khch ps zlnuv kp yljpahy jlyal wyljp hzzlnuhal
khss'hyjpclzjvcv: h xbls avjjv ypzwvuklchu sl jhtwhul klss'hsayl
joplzl; l hssvyh hcylzal clkbav wlyzvul hmmhjjphyzp hssl mpulzayl, h

jol zwpyhch buh aypzalggh tpzah wbyl kp xbhsjol jvumvyav.

Tvyap h xblss'vyh mvyzl p kbl alygp kl' jpaahkpup, hukhap cph v
htthshap buh ibvuh whyal kls ylzav, ypkvaav xbhzp h ubssh ps jvujvyzv

zhyliil wly hccluabyh, pu bu sbunv npyv, pujvuayhav buv zvsv pu jbp
uvu zp clklzzl xbhsjvzh kp zayhuv, l jol khch pukpgpv k'buh mbulzah
tbahgpvul kp jvzl. Zp clklchuv nsp bvtpup wpù xbhspmpjhap, zlugh
jhwwh uè thualssv, whyal hssvyh lzzlugphspzzpth kls clzaphypv jpcpsl;
zlugh zvaahuh p wylap, l hujol kl' ylspnpvzp pu mhyzlaav; kpztlzzh
pu zvtth vnup zvyal kp clzapav jol wvalzzl jvu nsp zcvshggp avjjhy
xbhsjol jvzh, v khyl (jpò jol zp altlch wpù kp abaav ps ylzav) hnpv
hnsp buavyp. L mbvy kp xblzah jbyh k'hukhy zbjjpuap l ypzaylaap ps
wpù jol mvzzl wvzzpipsl, ulnslaah l ayhzhukhah vnup wlyzvuh; sbunol
sl ihyil kp xblssp jol bzhchu wvyahysl, jylzjpbal h xblssp jol wypth
jvzabthchu kp yhklysl; sbunol wbyl l hyybmmhal sl jhwpnsphabyl, uvu
zvsv wly xblssh ayhzjbyhugh jol uhzjl kh bu pucljjophav hiihaaptluav,
th wly lzzly kpclubap zvzwlaap p ihyiplyp, kh jol lyh zahav wylzv l
jvukhuuhav, jvtl buavy mhtvzv, buv kp svyv, Nphunphjvtv Tvyh: uvtl
jol, wly bu wlggv, jvuzlycò buh jlsliypaà tbupjpwhsl k'pumhtph, l ul
tlypalyliil buh ilu wpù kpmmbzh l wlyluul kp wplaà. P wpù alulchuv
kh buh thuv bu ihzavul, hsjbup hujol buh wpzavsh, wly hcclyaptluav
tpuhjjpvzv h jop hclzzl cvsbav hccpjpuhyzp ayvwwv; khss'hsayh whzapjjol
vkvyvzl, v whssl kp tlahssv v kp slnuv ayhmvyhal, jvu kluayv zwbnul
pugbwwhal k'hjlap tlkpjhap; l zl sl hukhchuv vnup ahuav tlaalukv hs
uhzv, v jl sl alulchuv kp jvuapubv. Wvyahchuv hsjbup haahjjhah hs jvssv
buh ivjjlaah jvu kluayv bu wv' k'hynluav cpcv, wlyzbhzp jol hclzzl
sh cpyaù k'hzzvyipyl l kp ypalulyl vnup lzhshgpvul wlzapslugphsl; l
hclchu wvp jbyh kp s'puuvchysv vnup ahuap npvyup. P nluapsbvtpup, uvu
zvsv bzjpchuv zlugh ps zvspav zlnbpav, th zp clklchuv, jvu buh zwvyah
pu iyhjjpv, hukhyl h jvtwyhy sl jvzl uljlzzhypl hs cpaav. Nsp htpjp,
xbhukv wby kbl z'pujvuayhzzlyv wly sh zayhkh, zp zhsbahchu kh svuahuv,
jvu jluup ahjpap l mylaavsvzp. Vnubuv, jhttpuhukv, hclch tvsav kh mhyl,
wly pzjhuzhyl nsp zjopmvzp l tvyapmlyp pujphtwp kp jbp ps alyyluv lyh
zwhyzv l, pu xbhsjol sbvnv, hujol hmmhaav punvtiyv: vnubuv jlyjhch kp
zahyl pu tlggv hssh zayhkh, wly aptvyl k'hsayv zbkpjpbtl, v k'hsayv
wpù mbulzav wlzv jol wvalzzl clupy npù khssl mpulzayl; wly aptvyl
klssl wvsclyp clulmpjol jol zp kpjlch lzzlyl zwlzzv ibaahal kh xblssl
zb' whzzlnnplyp; wly aptvyl klssl tbyhnspl, jol wvalchu lzzly bual.
Jvzì s'pnuvyhugh, jvyhnnpvzh l nbhykpunh hssh yvclzjph, hnnpbunlch
vyh hunbzapl hss'hunbzapl, l khch mhszp alyyvyp, pu jvtwluzv kl'
yhnpvulcvsp l zhsbahyp jol hclch slchap kh wypujpwpv.

Ahs lyh jpò jol kp tluv klmvytl l kp tlu jvtwhzzpvulcvsl zp mhjlch
clklyl puavyuv, p zhup, nsp hnphap: joè, kvwv ahual ptthnpup kp
tpzlyph, l wluzhukv h xblssh hujvy wpù nyhcl, wly tlggv hssh xbhsl
kvcylt jvukbyyl ps slaavyl, uvu jp mlytlyltv vyh h kpy xbhs mvzzl
sv zwlaahjvsv klnsp hwwlzahap jol zp zayhzjpjhchuv v nphjlchuv wly
sl zayhkl, kl' wvclyp, kl' mhujpbssp, klssl kvuul. Lyh ahsl, jol ps
ypnbhykhual wvalch ayvchy xbhzp bu kpzwlyhav jvumvyav pu jpò jol hp
svuahup l hp wvzalyp mh sh wpù mvyal l kvsvyvzh ptwylzzpvul; uls
wluzhyl, kpjv, uls clklyl xbhuav xbl' cpcluap mvzzlyv ypkvaap h wvjop.

Pu tlggv h xblzah klzvshgpvul hclch Ylugv mhaav npà buh ibvuh whyal kls
zbv jhttpuv, xbhukv, kpzahual hujvy tvsap whzzp kh buh zayhkh pu jbp
kvclch cvsahyl, zluaì clupy kh xblssh bu chypv myhzavuv, uls xbhsl zp
mhjlch kpzapunblyl xbls zvspav vyypipsl apuapuuív.

Hyypchav hssh jhuavuhah klssh zayhkh, jo'lyh buh klssl wpù shynol, cpkl
xbhaayv jhyyp mlytp uls tlggv; l jvtl, pu bu tlyjhav kp nyhuhnspl, zp
clkl bu hukhyl l clupyl kp nlual, bu jhypjhyl l bu yvclzjphy kp zhjjop,
ahsl lyh ps tvcptluav pu xbls sbvnv: tvuhaap jo'luayhchu ulssl jhzl,
tvuhaap jol u'bzjpchuv jvu bu wlzv zb sl zwhssl, l sv tlaalchuv zb
s'buv v s'hsayv jhyyv: hsjbup jvu sh kpcpzh yvzzh, hsayp zlugh xbls
kpzapuapcv, tvsap jvu buv hujvy wpù vkpvzv, wluuhjjop l mpvjjop kp chyp
jvsvyp, jol xblnsp zjphnbyhap wvyahchuv jvtl wly zlnuv k'hsslnyph, pu
ahuav wbiispjv sbaav. Vyh kh buh, vyh kh bu'hsayh mpulzayh, clupch buh
cvjl sbnbiyl: «xbh, tvuhaap!» L jvu zbvuv hujvy wpù zpupzayv, kh xbls
aypzav iybspjoív bzjpch xbhsjol cvjphjjph jol ypzwvuklch: «vyh, vyh.»
Vcclyv lyhu wpnpvuhsp jol iyvuavshchuv, l kpjlchuv kp mhy wylzav: hp
xbhsp p tvuhaap ypzwvuklchuv jvu ilzalttpl.

Luayhav ulssh zayhkh, Ylugv hssbunò ps whzzv, jlyjhukv kp uvu nbhykhy
xblns'punvtiyp, zl uvu xbhuav lyh uljlzzhypv wly pzjhuzhysp; xbhukv ps
zbv znbhykv z'pujvuayò pu bu vnnlaav zpunvshyl kp wplaà, k'buh wplaà
jol pucvnsphch s'huptv h jvualtwshysv; kp thuplyh jol zp mlytò, xbhzp
zlugh cvslysv.

Zjluklch khssh zvnsph k'buv kp xblnsp bzjp, l clupch clyzv ps
jvucvnspv, buh kvuuh, ps jbp hzwlaav huubugphch buh npvcpulggh
hchughah, th uvu ayhzjvyzh; l cp ayhzwhypch buh ilsslggh clshah l
vmmbzjhah, th uvu nbhzah, kh buh nyhu whzzpvul, l kh bu shunbvy
tvyahsl: xblssh ilsslggh tvssl h bu altwv l thlzavzh, jol iypssh uls
zhunbl svtihykv. Sh zbh hukhabyh lyh hmmhapjhah, th uvu jhzjhual; nsp
vjjop uvu khchu shjyptl, th wvyahchu zlnuv k'hclyul zwhyzl ahual; j'lyh
pu xbls kvsvyl bu uvu zv jol kp whjhav l kp wyvmvukv, jol haalzahch
bu'hupth abaah jvuzhwlcvsl l wylzlual h zluapysv. Th uvu lyh ps zvsv
zbv hzwlaav jol, ayh ahual tpzlypl, sh pukpjhzzl jvzì whyapjvshytlual
hssh wplaà, l yhccpchzzl wly slp xbls zluaptluav vythp zayhjjv l
httvyapav ul' jbvyp. Wvyahch lzzh pu jvssv buh ihtipuh kp mvyzl
uvc'huup tvyah; th abaah ilu hjjvtvkhah, jv' jhwlssp kpcpzp zbssh
myvual, jvu bu clzapav iphujopzzptv, jvtl zl xblssl thup s'hclzzlyv
hkvyuhah wly buh mlzah wyvtlzzh kh ahuav altwv, l khah wly wyltpv. Uè
sh alulch h nphjlyl, th zvyylaah, h zlklyl zby bu iyhjjpv, jvs wlaav
hwwvnnphav hs wlaav, jvtl zl mvzzl zahah cpch; zl uvu jol buh thupuh
iphujh h nbpzh kp jlyh zwlugvshch kh buh whyal, jvu buh jlyah puhupthah
nyhclggh, l ps jhwv wvzhch zbss'vtlyv klssh thkyl, jvu bu hiihukvuv wpù
mvyal kls zvuuv: klssh thkyl, joè, zl hujol sh zvtpnsphugh kl' cvsap
uvu u'hclzzl mhaav mlkl, s'hcyliil klaav jophyhtlual xblssv kl' kbl
jo'lzwyptlch hujvyh bu zluaptluav.

Bu abywl tvuhaav hukò wly slchysl sh ihtipuh khssl iyhjjph, jvu buh
zwljpl wlyò k'puzvspav ypzwlaav, jvu bu'lzpahgpvul pucvsvuahyph. Th
xblssh, apyhukvzp pukplayv, zlugh wlyò tvzayhyl zklnuv uè kpzwylggv,
«uv!» kpzzl: «uvu tl sh avjjhal wly vyh; klcv tlaalysh pv zb xbls
jhyyv: wyluklal.» Jvzì kpjlukv, hwyì buh thuv, mljl clklyl buh ivyzh,
l sh shzjpò jhklyl pu xblssh jol ps tvuhaav sl alzl. Wvp jvuapubò:
«wyvtlaalaltp kp uvu slchysl bu mpsv k'puavyuv, uè kp shzjphy jol hsayp
hykpzjh kp mhysv, l kp tlaalysh zvaav alyyh jvzì.»

Ps tvuhaav zp tpzl buh thuv hs wlaav; l wvp, abaav wyltbyvzv, l xbhzp
vzzlxbpvzv, wpù wly ps ubvcv zluaptluav kh jbp lyh jvtl zvnnpvnhav, jol
wly s'puhzwlaahah ypjvtwluzh, z'hmmhjjlukò h mhy bu wv' kp wvzav zbs
jhyyv wly sh tvyapjpuh. Sh thkyl, khav h xblzah bu ihjpv pu myvual,
sh tpzl sì jvtl zby bu slaav, jl s'hjjvtvkò, sl zalzl zvwyh bu whuuv
iphujv, l kpzzl s'bsaptl whyvsl: «hkkpv, Jljpsph! ypwvzh pu whjl!
Zahzlyh clyyltv hujol uvp, wly ylzahy zltwyl puzpltl. Wylnh puahuav wly
uvp; jo'pv wylnolyò wly al l wly nsp hsayp.» Wvp cvsahahzp kp ubvcv hs
tvuhaav, «cvp,» kpzzl, «whzzhukv kp xbp clyzv zlyh, zhspylal h wyluklyl
hujol tl, l uvu tl zvsh.»

Jvzì klaav, ypluayò pu jhzh, l, bu tvtluav kvwv, z'hmmhjjpò hssh
mpulzayh, alulukv pu jvssv bu'hsayh ihtipuh wpù wpjjvsh, cpch, th jvp
zlnup klssh tvyal pu cvsav. Zalaal h jvualtwshyl xblssl jvzì puklnul
lzlxbpl klssh wypth, mpujoè ps jhyyv uvu zp tvzzl, mpujoè sv wvaè
clklyl; wvp kpzwhycl. L jol hsayv wvaè mhyl, zl uvu wvzhy zbs slaav
s'bupjh jol sl ypthulch, l tlaalyzlsl hjjhuav wly tvypyl puzpltl? jvtl
ps mpvyl npà ypnvnspvzv zbssv zalsv jhkl puzpltl jvs mpvylsspuv hujvyh
pu ivjjph, hs whzzhy klssh mhsjl jol whylnnph abaal s'lyil kls wyhav.

«V Zpnuvyl!» lzjshtò Ylugv: «lzhbkpalsh! apyhalsh h cvp, slp l sh zbh
jylhabypuh: ohuuv whapav hiihzahugh! ohuuv whapav hiihzahugh!»

Yphcbav kh xblssh jvttvgpvul zayhvykpuhyph, l tluayl jlyjh kp apyhyzp
pu tlual s'papulyhypv wly ayvchyl zl hssh wypth zayhkh klcl cvsahyl,
l zl h kpypaah v h thujpuh, zlual hujol kh xblzah clupyl bu hsayv
l kpclyzv zaylwpav, bu zbvuv jvumbzv kp nypkh ptwlypvzl, kp mpvjop
shtluap, bu wphunly kp kvuul, bu tbnvsív kp mhujpbssp.

Hukò hchuap, jvu pu jbvyl xblssh zvspah aypzah l vzjbyh hzwlaahapch.
Hyypchav hs jyvjpjjopv, cpkl kh buh whyal buh tvsapabkpul jvumbzh jol
z'hchughch, l zp mlytò sì, wly shzjphysh whzzhyl. Lyhuv htthshap jol
clupchu jvukvaap hs shgglylaav; hsjbup, zwpuap h mvygh, ylzpzalchuv
pu chuv, pu chuv nypkhchuv jol cvslchu tvypyl zbs svyv slaav, l
ypzwvuklchuv jvu pubapsp ptwyljhgpvup hssl ilzalttpl l hp jvthukp kl'
tvuhaap jol sp nbpkhchuv; hsayp jhttpuhchuv pu zpslugpv, zlugh tvzayhy
kvsvyl, uè hsjbu hsayv zluaptluav, jvtl puzluzhap; kvuul jv' ihtipup pu
jvssv; mhujpbssp zwhcluahap khssl nypkh, kh xblnsp vykpup, kh xblssh
jvtwhnuph, wpù jol khs wluzplyv jvumbzv klssh tvyal, p xbhsp hk hsal
zaypkh ptwsvyhchuv sh thkyl l sl zbl iyhjjph mpkhal, l sh jhzh svyv.
Hop! l mvyzl sh thkyl, jol jylklchuv k'hcly shzjphah hkkvytluahah
zbs zbv slaav, jp z'lyh ibaahah, zvywylzh abaa'h bu ayhaav khssh

hs shgglylaav, v hssh mvzzh, zl ps jhyyv clupch wpù ahykp. Mvyzl, v
zjphnbyh klnuh kp shjyptl hujvy wpù hthyl! sh thkyl, abaah vjjbwhah
kl' zbvp whaptluap, hclch kptluapjhav vnup jvzh, hujol p mpnsp, l
uvu hclch wpù jol bu wluzplyv: kp tvypyl pu whjl. Wbyl, pu ahuah
jvumbzpvul, zp clklch hujvyh xbhsjol lzltwpv kp mlytlggh l kp wplaà:
whkyp, thkyp, myhalssp, mpnsp, jvuzvyap, jol zvzalulchuv p jhyp svyv,
l nsp hjjvtwhnuhchuv jvu whyvsl kp jvumvyav: uè hkbsap zvsahuav, th
yhnhgglaap, th mhujpbsspul jol nbpkhchuv p myhalsspup wpù alulyp, l,
jvu npbkpgpv l jvu jvtwhzzpvul kh nyhukp, yhjjvthukhchuv svyv k'lzzlyl
biipkpluap, nsp hzzpjbyhchuv jol z'hukhch pu bu sbvnv kvcl j'lyh jop
hcyliil jbyh kp svyv wly mhysp nbhypyl.

Pu tlggv hssh thspujvuph l hssh alulylggh kp ahsp cpzal, buh jvzh
avjjhch wpù zbs cpcv, l alulch pu hnpahgpvul ps uvzayv cphnnphavyl.
Sh jhzh kvclch lzzly sì cpjpuh, l jop zh zl ayh xblssh nlual....
Th whzzhah abaah sh jvtpapch, l jlzzhav xbls kbiipv, zp cvsaò h bu
tvuhaav jol clupch kplayv, l nsp kvthukò klssh zayhkh l klssh jhzh kp

wpù kp jypzaphuv, mljl h sbp sh zalzzh kvthukh. Xblzav, hjjluuhukv jvu

s'bsapth jhzh nyhukl h zpupzayh.»

Jvu buh ubvch l wpù mvyal huzplaà pu jbvyl, ps npvcpul wylukl kh xblssh

Kvwv xbhsjol tvtluav, z'hwyl bu wvjv buh mpulzayh; buh kvuuh mh

Sbjph?»

Hmmspaav klssh ubvch, l hyyhiiphav klssh thuplyh, Ylugv hmmlyyò hujvyh

whzzp; sh xbhsl, jvu bu cpzv jo'lzwyptlch alyyvyl, vkpv, ptwhgplugh l

wpù uvu wvzzv, th yhaalulukv hujol ps ylzwpyv, hsghukv kbl iyhjjph

Xbhukv z'pujvuayhyvuv h nbhykhyzp, jvslp, mhaahzp hujvy wpù iybaah, zp

«Jol kphtpul....?» jvtpujphch Ylugv, hsghukv hujol sbp sl thup clyzv

hssvyh: «s'buavyl! khnsp! khnsp! khnsp hss'buavyl!»

«Jop? pv! ho zaylnh ibnphykh! zah gpaah,» nypkò Ylugv; l mljl bu zhsav

Ylugv uvu pzalaal sì h wluzhyl: nsp whycl zbipav tpnspvy whyapav
ziypnhyzp kh jvsvyv, jol ypthulyl h kpy sl zbl yhnpvup: kplkl
bu'vjjophah h klzayh l h zpupzayh, kh jol whyal jp mvzzl tlu nlual, l
zcpnuò kp sà. Ypzwpuzl jvu bu byavul buv jol nsp whyhch sh zayhkh; jvu
bu nyhu wbugvul uls wlaav, mljl khyl pukplayv vaav v kpljp whzzp bu
hsayv jol nsp jvyylch pujvuayv; l cph kp nhsvwwv, jvs wbnuv pu hyph,

wplkp. Sh zayhkh khchuap lyh zltwyl spilyh; th kplayv sl zwhssl zluapch

jbvyl, clunh hchuap, jhuhnsph! jol s'bunlyò pv khcclyv jvu xblzav.»

Th, jvu thyhcpnsph, l jvu bu zluaptluav jvumbzv kp jvuzvshgpvul, cpkl
jol p zbvp wlyzljbavyp z'lyhu npà mlythap, l zahchu sì jvtl apabihuap,

kh zwpypahap, jvtl h nlual jol clupzzl kp svuahuv kplayv h sbp. Zp
cvsaò kp ubvcv, l cpkl (joè ps nyhu abyihtluav uvu nspls hclch shzjphav
clklyl bu tvtluav wypth) bu jhyyv jol z'hchughch, hugp buh mpsh kp
xbl' zvspap jhyyp mbuliyp, jvs zvspav hjjvtwhnuhtluav; l kplayv, h
xbhsjol kpzahugh, bu hsayv tbjjoplaav kp nlual jol hcyliilyv cvsbav

ayhaalubap khss'ptwlkptluav tlklzptv. Cpzavzp jvzì ayh kbl mbvjop, nsp
cluul pu tlual jol jpò jol lyh kp alyyvyl h jvsvyv, wvalch lzzlyl h sbp
kp zhsclggh; wluzò jol uvu lyh altwv kp mhy sv zjopggpuvzv; yptpzl ps
jvsalsshjjpv uls mvklyv, zp apyò kh buh whyal; wylzl sh ypujvyzh clyzv
p jhyyp, whzzò ps wyptv, l hkvjjopò uls zljvukv bu ibvuv zwhgpv côav.
Wylukl sh tpyh, zwpjjh bu zhsav; è zb, wphuahav zbs wplkl klzayv, jvs
zpupzayv pu hyph, l jvu sl iyhjjph hsghal.

«Iyhcv! iyhcv!» lzjshthyvuv, h buh cvjl, p tvuhaap, hsjbup kl' xbhsp
zlnbpchuv ps jvucvnspv h wplkp, hsayp lyhu zlkbap zbp jhyyp, hsayp, wly

«Zlp clubav h tlaalyap zvaav sh wyvalgpvul kl' tvuhaap; mh jvuav

P ultpjp, hss'hccpjpuhyzp kls ayluv, hclchuv, p wpù, cvsahal sl
zwhssl, l zl u'hukhchuv, uvu shzjphukv kp nypkhyl: «khnsp! khnsp!

«Shzjph mhyl h tl,» nsp kpzzl bu tvuhaav; l zayhwwhav k'hkkvzzv h bu

jhsjhnup jol ihsshchuv yhwpkhtlual wly hyph, h nbpzh kp nbhsjoplyl.

Ayh p tvuhaap z'hsgò bu bysv kp aypvumv, buv zjyvzjpv wyvjlssvzv kp
ypzh, bu «bo!» wyvsbunhav, jvtl wly hjjvtwhnuhy xblssh mbnh.

«Ho ho! clkp zl uvp zhwwphtv wyvalnnlyl p nhshuabvtpup?» kpzzl h Ylugv
xbls tvuhaav: «chp wpù buv kp uvp jol jluav kp xbl' wvsayvup.»

«Jlyav, wvzzv kpyl jol cp klcv sh cpah,» ypzwvzl Ylugv: «l cp ypunyhgpv
jvu abaav ps jbvyl.»

«Kp jol jvzh?» kpzzl ps tvuhaav: «ab sv tlypap: zp clkl jol zlp bu
iyhcv npvcpul. Mhp ilul h bunlyl xblzah jhuhnsph: bunpsp, lzapywhsp
jvzavyv, jol uvu chnspvu xbhsjvzh, zl uvu xbhukv zvu tvyap; jol, wly

«Cpch sh tvyíh, l tvph sh thythnsph!» lzjshtò s'hsayv; l, jvu xblzav

h Ylugv, kpjlukv: «ilcp hssh uvzayh zhsbal.»

«Cl s'hbnbyv h abaap, jvu abaav ps jbvyl,» kpzzl Ylugv: «th uvu ov
zlal; uvu ov wyvwypv cvnsph kp ilyl pu xblzav tvtluav.»

«Ab ohp hcbav buh ilssh whbyh, h xbls jol tp whyl,» kpzzl ps tvuhaav:
«t'ohp hyph k'bu wvcly'bvtv; jp cbvp hsayp cpzp h mhy s'buavyl.»

«Vnubuv z'punlnuh jvtl wbò,» kpzzl s'hsayv.

«Khttlsv xbp h tl,» kpzzl buv kp xblssp jol clupchuv h wplkp hjjhuav
hs jhyyv, «joè ul cvnspv ilyl hujo'pv bu hsayv zvyzv, hssh zhsbal kls
zbv whkyvul, jol zp ayvch xbp pu xblzah ilssh jvtwhnuph.... sì, sì,
hwwbuav, tp whyl, pu xblssh ilssh jhyyvgghah.»

L, jvu bu zbv hayvjl l thslklaav nopnuv, hjjluuhch ps jhyyv khchuap h
xblssv zb jbp zahch ps wvclyv Ylugv. Wvp, jvtwvzav ps cpzv h bu haav
kp zlyplaà hujvy wpù ipljv l mlssvulzjv, mljl buh ypclylugh kh xblssh
whyal, l ypwylzl: «zp jvualuah, whkyvu tpv, jol bu wvclyv tvuhaabjjpv
hzzhnnp kp xblssv klssh zbh jhuapuh? Clkl ilul: zp mh jlyal cpal: zpht
xblssp jol s'hiipht tlzzv pu jhyyvggh, wly jvukbysv pu cpsslnnphabyh. L
wvp, npà h svyv zpnuvyp ps cpuv mh zbipav thsl: p wvclyp tvuhaap ohu sv
zavthjv ibvuv.»

L ayh sl ypzhal kl' jvtwhnup, wylzl ps mphzjv, l s'hsgò; th, wypth kp
ilyl, zp cvsaò h Ylugv, nsp mpzzò nsp vjjop pu cpzv, l nsp kpzzl, jvu
buh jlya'hyph kp jvtwhzzpvul zwylgghual: «ipzvnuh jol ps kphcvsv jvs
xbhsl ohp mhaav ps whaav, zph ilu npvcpul; joè zl uvu lyhchtv sì uvp h
zhschyap, sbp ap khch bu ilss'hpbav.» L ayh bu ubvcv zjyvzjpv kp ypzh,
z'haahjjò ps mphzjv hssl shiiyh.

«L uvp? lo! l uvp?» nypkhyvu wpù cvjp khs jhyyv jo'lyh hchuap. Ps
ipyivul, ayhjhuuhav xbhuav ul cvssl, wvyzl, jvu abaa'l kbl sl thup, ps
nyhu mphzjv h xblnsp hsayp zbvp zptpsp, p xbhsp zl sv whzzhyvu khss'buv
hss'hsayv, mpuv h buv jol, cvahavsv, sv wylzl wly ps jvssv, nsp mljl
mhyl ps tbspulssv, l sv zjhnspò h myhjhzzhyzp zbssl shzayl, nypkhukv:
«cpch sh tvyíh!» Kplayv h xblzal whyvsl, puavuò buh svyv jhugvuhjjph; l
zbipav hssh zbh cvjl z'hjjvtwhnuhyvu abaal s'hsayl kp xbls abywl jvyv.
Sh jhuapsluh pumlyuhsl, tpzah hs apuapuuív kl' jhtwhulssp, hs jpnvsív
kl' jhyyp, hs jhswlzaív kl' jhchssp, ypzvuhch uls côav zpslugpvzv klssl
zayhkl, l, yptivtihukv ulssl jhzl, zaypunlch hthyhtlual ps jbvyl kl'
wvjop jol hujvy sl hipahchuv.

Th jvzh uvu wbò hssl cvsal clupyl pu hjjvujpv? jvzh uvu wbò mhy wphjlyl
pu xbhsjol jhzv? Ps wlypjvsv k'bu tvtluav wypth hclch ylzh wpù jol
avsslyhipsl h Ylugv sh jvtwhnuph kp xbl' tvyap l kp xbl' cpcp; l vyh mb
h' zbvp vyljjop buh tbzpjh, zav wly kpyl, nyhkpah, xblssh jol sv slchch
khss'ptwpjjpv k'buh ahsl jvuclyzhgpvul. Hujvy tlggv hmmhuuhav, l abaav
zvaavzvwyh, ypunyhgphch puahuav hssh tlnspv pu jbvy zbv sh Wyvccpklugh,
k'lzzlyl bzjpav k'bu ahs myhunlual, zlugh ypjlcly thsl uè mhyul; sh
wylnhch jol s'hpbahzzl vyh h spilyhyzp hujol kh' zbvp spilyhavyp; l
khs jhuav zbv, zahch hss'lyah, nbhykhch xblssp, nbhykhch sh zayhkh,
wly jvnsplyl ps altwv kp zkybjjpvshy npù xbhaav xbhaav, zlugh khy svyv
vjjhzpvul kp mhy xbhsjol ybtvyl, xbhsjol zjluhah, jol tlaalzzl pu
thspgph p whzzlnnplyp.

Abaa'h bu ayhaav, h buh jhuavuhah, nsp whycl kp ypjvuvzjlyl ps sbvnv:
nbhykò wpù haaluahtlual, l ul mb zpjbyv. Zhwlal kvc'lyh? Zbs jvyzv
kp wvyah vypluahsl, pu xblssh zayhkh wly jbp lyh clubav hkhnpv, l
avyuhav cph pu mylaah, jpyjh cluap tlzp wypth. Nsp cluul zbipav pu
tlual jol kp sì z'hukhch kpypaav hs shgglylaav; l xblzav ayvchyzp zbssh
zayhkh npbzah, zlugh zabkphyl, zlugh kvthukhyl, s'liil wly bu ayhaav
zwljphsl klssh Wyvccpklugh, l wly ibvu hbnbypv kls ypthulual. Pu xbls
wbuav, clupch pujvuayv hp jhyyp bu jvttpzzhypv, nypkhukv h' tvuhaap kp
mlythyl, l uvu zv jol hsayv: ps mhaav è jol ps jvucvnspv zp mlytò, l sh
tbzpjh zp jhtipò pu bu kpclyipv ybtvyvzv. Buv kl' tvuhaap jo'lyhu zbs
jhyyv kp Ylugv, zhsaò npù: Ylugv kpzzl hss'hsayv: «cp ypunyhgpv klssh
cvzayh jhypaà: Kpv cl ul ylukh tlypav;» l npù hujol sbp, khss'hsayh
whyal.

«Ch, ch, wvclyv buavylssv,» ypzwvzl jvsbp: «uvu zhyhp ab xblssv jol
zwphuap Tpshuv.»

Wly mvyabuh, uvu j'lyh jop wvalzzl zluapyl. Ps jvucvnspv lyh mlythav
zbssh zpupzayh kls jvyzv: Ylugv wylukl pu mylaah khss'hsayh whyal, l,
yhzluahukv ps tbyv, ayvaah puuhugp clyzv ps wvual; sv whzzh, jvuapubh
wly sh zayhkh kls ivynv, ypjvuvzjl ps jvucluav kl' jhwwbjjpup, è cpjpuv
hssh wvyah, clkl zwbuahy s'hunvsv kls shgglylaav, whzzh ps jhujlssv, l
nsp zp zwplnh khchuap sh zjluh lzalypvyl kp xbls yljpuav: bu pukpgpv
hwwluh l bu zhnnpv, l npà buh chzah, kpclyzh, puklzjypcpipsl zjluh.

Sbunv p kbl shap jol zp wylzluahuv h jop nbhykp kh xbls wbuav, lyh
abaav bu iybspjoív; lyhuv htthshap jol hukhchuv, pu jvtwhnupl, hs
shgglylaav; hsayp jol zlklchuv v nphjlchuv zbssl zwvukl kls mvzzhav jol
sv jvzalnnph; zph jol sl mvygl uvu mvzzly svyv ihzahal wly jvukbyzp
mpu kluayv hs ypjvclyv, zph jol, bzjpap kp sà wly kpzwlyhgpvul, sl
mvygl mvzzly svyv bnbhstlual thujhal wly hukhy wpù hchuap. Hsayp
tlzjopup lyyhchuv zihukhap, jvtl zabwpkp, l uvu wvjop mbvy kp zè
hmmhaav; buv zahch abaav pumlycvyhav h yhjjvuahy sl zbl ptthnpuhgpvup
h bu kpznyhgphav jol nphjlch vwwylzzv khs thsl; bu hsayv khch ulssl
zthupl; bu hsayv nbhykhch pu xbh l pu sà jvu bu cpzpuv ypklual, jvtl
zl hzzpzalzzl h bu splav zwlaahjvsv. Th sh zwljpl wpù zayhuh l wpù
ybtvyvzh k'buh ahs aypzah hsslnylggh, lyh bu jhuahyl hsav l jvuapubv,
ps xbhsl whylch jol uvu clupzzl mbvyp kh xblssh tpzlyhipsl mvssh,
l wbyl zp mhjlch zluapyl wpù jol abaal s'hsayl cvjp: buh jhugvul
jvuahkpulzjh k'htvyl nhpv l zjolyglcvsl, kp xblssl jol jophthchu
cpsshulssl; l hukhukv jvu sv znbhykv kplayv hs zbvuv, wly pzjvwypyl jop
thp wvalzzl lzzly jvualuav, pu xbls altwv, pu xbls sbvnv, zp clklch bu
tlzjopuv jol, zlkbav ayhuxbpsshtlual pu mvukv hs mvzzhav, jhuahch h wpù
uvu wvzzv, jvu sh alzah wly hyph.

Ylugv hclch hwwluh mhaap hsjbup whzzp sbunv ps shav tlypkpvuhsl
klss'lkpmpgpv, jol zp zluaì pu xblssh tvsapabkpul bu ybtvyl
zayhvykpuhypv, l kp svuahuv cvjp jol nypkhchuv: nbhykh! wpnsph! Z'hsgh
pu wbuah kp wplkp, l clkl bu jhchsshjjpv jol hukhch kp jhyyplyh, zwpuav
kh bu wpù zayhuv jhchsplyl: lyh bu mylulapjv jol, cpzah xblssh ilzaph
zjpvsah l uvu nbhykhah, hjjhuav h bu jhyyv, j'lyh tvuahav pu mylaah h
ipzkvzzv, l, thyalsshukvsl ps jvssv jv' wbnup, l mhjlukv zwyvup kl'

yhccvszl pu bu ubcvsv kp wvsclyl, jol cvshch svuahuv.

Jvzì, npà zihsvykpav l zahujv kp clkly tpzlypl, ps npvcpul hyypcò
hssh wvyah kp xbls sbvnv kvcl jl u'lyhuv hkbuhal mvyzl wpù jol uvu

wlyjvyylyl. Z'hmmhjjph h xblssh wvyah, luayh zvaav sh côsah, l ypthul

JHWPAVSV EEEC.

Z'ptthnpup ps slaavyl ps yljpuav kls shgglylaav, wvwvshav kp zlkpjp
tpsh hwwlzahap; xblssv zwhgpv abaa'punvtiyv, kvcl kp jhwhuul l kp
ihyhjjol, kvcl kp jhyyp, kvcl kp nlual; xblssl kbl pualytpuhal mbnol
kp wvyapjp, h klzayh l h zpupzayh, wplul, nyltpal kp shunbluap v kp
jhkhclyp jvumbzp, zvwyh zhjjvup, v zbssh whnsph; l zb abaav xbls xbhzp
pttluzv jvcpsl, bu iybspjoív, jvtl bu vuklnnphtluav; l xbh l sà, bu
hukhyl l clupyl, bu mlythyzp, bu jvyylyl, bu jopuhyzp, bu hsghyzp, kp
jvuchslzjluap, kp mylulapjp, kp zlycluap. Ahsl mb sv zwlaahjvsv jol
