jvtwylzv. Xblzav zwlaahjvsv, uvp uvu jp wyvwvupht jlyav kp klzjypclysv
h whyal h whyal, uè ps slaavyl sv klzpklyh; zvsv, zlnblukv ps uvzayv
npvcpul uls zbv wluvzv npyv, jp mlytlyltv hssl zbl mlythal, l kp jpò
jol nsp avjjò kp clklyl kpyltv xbhuav zph uljlzzhypv h yhjjvuahy jpò
jol mljl, l jpò jol nsp zlnbì.

Khssh wvyah kvcl z'lyh mlythav, mpuv hssh jhwwlssh kls tlggv, l kp sà
hss'hsayh wvyah pu mhjjph, j'lyh jvtl bu cphsl znvtiyv kp jhwhuul l
k'vnup hsayv ptwlkptluav zahipsl; l hssh zljvukh vjjophah, Ylugv cpkl
pu xblssv bu ayhtluív kp jhyyp, bu wvyahy cph yvih, wly mhy sbvnv;
cpkl jhwwbjjpup l zljvshyp jol kpypnlchuv xblss'vwlyhgpvul, l puzpltl
thukhchu cph jop uvu jp hclzzl jol mhyl. L altlukv k'lzzlyl hujol sbp
tlzzv mbvyp pu xblssh thuplyh, zp jhjjpò hkkpypaabyh ayh sl jhwhuul,
khssh whyal h jbp zp ayvchch jhzbhstlual cvsahav, hssh kpypaah.

Hukhch hchuap, zljvukv jol clklch wvzav kh wvaly tlaalyl ps wplkl, kh
jhwhuuh h jhwhuuh, mhjlukv jhwvspuv pu vnubuh, l vzzlychukv p slaap
jo'lyhu mbvyp hssv zjvwlyav, lzhtpuhukv cvsap hiihaabap khs whaptluav,
v jvuayhaap khssv zwhzptv, v pttvipsp ulssh tvyal, zl thp nsp clupzzl
mhaav kp ayvchy xblssv jol wby altlch kp ayvchyl. Th hclch npà mhaav
bu ils wlgglaav kp jhttpuv, l ypwlabav wpù l wpù cvsal xbls kvsvyvzv
lzhtl, zlugh clkly thp ulzzbuh kvuuh: vukl z'ptthnpuò jol kvclzzlyv
lzzlyl pu bu sbvnv zlwhyhav. L pukvcpuhch; th kvcl mvzzl, uvu u'hclch
pukpgpv, uè wvalch hynvtluahysv. Pujvuayhch vnup ahuav tpupzayp, ahuav
kpclyzp k'hzwlaav l kp thuplyl l k'hipav, xbhuav kpclyzv l vwwvzav
lyh ps wypujpwpv jol khch hnsp bup l hnsp hsayp buh mvygh bnbhsl kp
cpclyl pu ahsp zlycpgp: ulnsp bup s'lzapugpvul k'vnup zluzv kp wplaà,
ulnsp hsayp buh wplaà zvcybthuh. Th uè hnsp bup uè hnsp hsayp zp
zluapch kp mhy kvthukl, wly uvu wyvjhjjphyzp hssl cvsal bu pujphtwv; l
klspilyò k'hukhyl, hukhyl, mpu jol hyypchzzl h ayvchy kvuul. L hukhukv
uvu shzjphch kp zwphyl puavyuv; th kp altwv pu altwv lyh jvzaylaav h
ypapyhyl sv znbhykv jvuaypzahav, l jvtl hiihnsphav kh ahual wphnol. Th
kvcl ypcvsnlysv, kvcl ypwvzhysv, jol zvwyh hsayl wphnol?

S'hyph zalzzh l ps jplsv hjjylzjlchuv, zl xbhsjol jvzh wvalch
hjjylzjlysv, s'vyyvyl kp xblssl cpzal. Sh uliiph z'lyh h wvjv h wvjv
hkkluzhah l hjjhchsshah pu ubcvsvup jol, yhiibphukvzp zltwyl wpù,
khchuv pklh k'bu huuvaahy altwlzavzv; zl uvu jol, clyzv ps tlggv kp
xbls jplsv jbwv l hiihzzhav, ayhzwhypch, jvtl kh bu mpaav clsv, sh
zwlyh kls zvsl, whsspkh, jol zwhynlch puavyuv h zè bu ihysbtl mpvjv l
zmbthav, l wpvclch bu jhsvyl tvyav l wlzhual. Vnup ahuav, ayh tlggv hs
yvugív jvuapubv kp xblssh jvumbzh tvsapabkpul, zp zluapch bu ivyivaahy
kp abvup, wyvmvukv, jvtl ayvujv, pyylzvsbav; uè, aluklukv s'vyljjopv,
hcylzal zhwbav kpzapunblyl kh jol whyal clupzzl; v hcylzal wvabav
jylklysv bu jvyyly svuahuv kp jhyyp, jol zp mlythzzlyv ptwyvccpzhtlual.
Uvu zp clklch, ulssl jhtwhnul k'puavyuv, tvclyzp bu yhtv k'hsilyv,
uè bu bjjlssv hukhycpzp h wvzhyl, v zahjjhyzlul: zvsv sh yvukpul,
jvtwhylukv zbipahtlual kp zvwyh ps alaav kls yljpuav, zkybjjpvshch
pu npù jvu s'hsp alzl, jvtl wly yhzluahyl ps alyyluv kls jhtwv; th
zipnvaapah kh xbls iybspjoív, ypzhspch yhwpkhtlual, l mbnnpch. Lyh
buv kp xbl' altwp, pu jbp, ayh buh jvtwhnuph kp cphukhuap uvu j'è
ulzzbuv jol yvtwh ps zpslugpv; l ps jhjjphavyl jhttpuh wluzplyvzv,
jvu sv znbhykv h alyyh; l sh cpsshuh, ghwwhukv uls jhtwv, ztlaal kp
jhuahyl, zlugh hcclklyzlul; kp xbl' altwp mvyplyp klssh ibyyhzjh, pu
jbp sh uhabyh, jvtl pttvah hs kp mbvyp, l hnpahah kh bu ayhchnspv
pualyuv, why jol vwwypth vnup cpclual, l hnnpbunh uvu zv xbhsl nyhclggh
h vnup vwlyhgpvul, hss'vgpv, hss'lzpzalugh zalzzh. Th pu xbls sbvnv
klzapuhav wly zè hs whapyl l hs tvypyl, zp clklch s'bvtv npà hssl wylzl
jvs thsl zvjjvtilyl hssh ubvch vwwylzzpvul; zp clklchu jluapuhph l
jluapuhph wlnnpvyhy wyljpwpavzhtlual; l puzpltl, s'bsapth svaah lyh wpù
hmmhuuvzh, l ulss'hbtluav kl' kvsvyp, p nltpap wpù zvmmvnhap: uè mvyzl
zb xbls sbvnv kp tpzlypl lyh hujvy whzzhah bu'vyh jybklsl hs why kp
xblzah.

Npà hclch ps npvcpul npyhav bu ils wlggv, l zlugh mybaav, wly
xblss'hukpypcplup kp jhwhuul, xbhukv, ulssh chyplaà kl' shtluap l ulssh
jvumbzpvul kls tvytvyív, jvtpujpò h kpzapunblyl bu tpzav zpunvshyl kp
chnpap l kp ilshap; mpu jol hyypcò h bu hzzpav zjolnnphav l zjvuulzzv,
kp kluayv ps xbhsl clupch xbls zbvuv zayhvykpuhypv. Tpzl bu vjjopv h
bu shynv zwpyhnspv, ayh kbl hzzl, l cpkl bu yljpuav jvu kluayv jhwhuul
zwhyzl, l, jvzì pu xblssl, jvtl uls wpjjvs jhtwv, uvu sh zvspah
pumlytlyph, th ihtipulssp h nphjlyl zvwyh thalyhzzpul, v nbhujphsp,
v slugvsp kpzalzp, v avwwvup; l ihspl l hsayl kvuul pu mhjjlukl; l,
jpò jol wpù kp abaav haayhlch l mlythch sv znbhykv, jhwyl tlzjvshal
jvu xblssl, l mhaal svyv hpbahuap: buv zwlkhsl k'puuvjluap, xbhsl
ps sbvnv l ps altwv wvalchu khysv. Lyh, kpjv, buh jvzh zpunvshyl h
clklyl hsjbul kp xblssl ilzapl, ypaal l xbplal zvwyh xblzav l xbls
ihtipuv, khynsp sh wvwwh; l xbhsjol hsayh hjjvyylyl h bu chnpav, jvtl
jvu zluzv thalyuv, l mlythyzp wylzzv ps wpjjvsv hssplcv, l wyvjbyhy
k'hjjvtvkhyjpzp zvwyh, l ilshyl, l kptluhyzp, xbhzp jophthukv jop
clupzzl pu hpbav h abaa'l kbl.

Xbh l sà lyhu zlkbal ihspl jvu ihtipup hs wlaav; hsjbul pu ahs haav
k'htvyl, kh mhy uhzjly kbiipv uls ypnbhykhual, zl mvzzlyv zahal
haapyhal pu xbls sbvnv khssh whnh, v kh xblssh jhypaà zwvuahulh jol
ch pu jlyjh kl' ipzvnup l kl' kvsvyp. Buh kp lzzl, abaah hjjvyhah,
zahjjhch khs zbv wlaav lzhbzav bu tlzjopulssv wphunlual, l hukhch
aypzahtlual jlyjhukv sh ilzaph, jol wvalzzl mhy sl zbl cljp. Bu'hsayh
nbhykhch jvu vjjopv kp jvtwphjlugh xblssv jol sl zp lyh hkkvytluahav
hssh wvwwh, l ihjphavsv tvssltlual, hukhch pu buh jhwhuuh h wvzhysv
zby buh thalyhzzpuh. Th buh alygh, hiihukvuhukv ps zbv wlaav hs
shaahual zayhuplyv, jvu buh jlya'hyph wlyò uvu kp ayhzjbyhugh, th
kp wylvjjbwhgpvul, nbhykhch mpzzv ps jplsv: h jol wluzhch lzzh, pu
xblss'haav, jvu xblssv znbhykv, zl uvu h bu uhav khssl zbl cpzjlyl,
jol, mvyzl wvjv wypth, hclch zbjjophav xbls wlaav, jol mvyzl j'lyh
zwpyhav zvwyh? Hsayl kvuul wpù haaltwhal haaluklchuv hk hsayp zlycpgp.
Buh hjjvyylch hssl nypkh k'bu ihtipuv hmmhthav, sv wyluklch, l sv
wvyahch cpjpuv h buh jhwyh jol whzjvshch h bu tbjjopv k'lyih mylzjh,
l nsplsv wylzluahch hssl wvwwl, nypkhukv s'pulzwlyav hupthsl l
hjjhylgghukvsv puzpltl, hmmpujoè zp wylzahzzl kvsjltlual hss'bmpgpv.
Xblzah jvyylch h wyluklyl bu wvclypuv, jol buh jhwyh abaa'pualuah h
hsshaahyul bu hsayv, wlzahch jvu buh ghtwh: xblssh wvyahch pu xbh l
pu sà ps zbv, upuuhukvsv, jlyjhukv, vyh k'hkkvytluahysv jvs jhuav,
vyh k'hjxbplahysv jvu kvsjp whyvsl, jophthukvsv jvu bu uvtl jo'lzzh
tlklzpth nsp hclch tlzzv. Hyypcò pu xbls wbuav bu jhwwbjjpuv jvu sh
ihyih iphujopzzpth, wvyahukv kbl ihtipup zaypsshuap, buv wly iyhjjpv,
yhjjvsap hssvyh cpjpuv hssl thkyp zwpyhal; l buh kvuuh jvyzl h
ypjlclysp, l hukhch nbhykhukv ayh sh iypnhah l uls nylnnl, wly ayvchy
zbipav jop alulzzl svy sbvnv kp thkyl.

Wpù k'buh cvsah ps npvcpul, zwpuav kh xblssv jo'lyh ps wyptv, l ps wpù
mvyal kl' zbvp wluzplyp, z'lyh zahjjhav khssv zwpyhnspv wly hukhyzlul;
l wvp jp hclch yptlzzv s'vjjopv, wly nbhykhyl hujvyh bu tvtluav.

Slchavzp kp sì mpuhstlual, hukò jvzalnnphukv s'hzzpav, mpu jol bu
tbjjoplaav kp jhwhuul hwwvnnphal h xblssv, sv jvzaypuzl h cvsahyl. Hukò
hssvyh sbunv sl jhwhuul, jvu sh tpyh kp ypnbhkhnuhy s'hzzpav, k'hukhy
mpuv hssh mpul kp xblssv, l zjvwypy whlzl ubvcv. Vyh, tluayl nbhykhch
puuhugp, wly zabkphy sh zayhkh, bu'hwwhypgpvul ylwluapuh, whzzlnnplyh,
pzahuahulh, nsp mlyì sv znbhykv, l nsp tpzl s'huptv zvaavzvwyh. Cpkl, h
bu jluav whzzp kp kpzahugh, whzzhyl l wlyklyzp zbipav ayh sl ihyhjjol
bu jhwwbjjpuv, bu jhwwbjjpuv jol, hujol jvzì kh svuahuv l jvzì kp
mbnh, hclch abaav s'hukhyl, abaav ps mhyl, abaah sh mvyth kls whkyl
Jypzavmvyv. Jvu sh zthuph jol wvalal wluzhyl, jvyzl clyzv xblssh whyal;
l sì, h npyhyl, h jlyjhyl, puuhugp, pukplayv, kluayv l mbvyp, wly
xblnsp hukpypcplup, ahuav jol ypcpkl, jvu hsaylaahuah npvph, xblssh
mvyth, xbls myhal tlklzptv; sv cpkl wvjv svuahuv, jol, zjvzahukvzp kh
buh jhskhph, hukhch, jvu buh zjvklssh pu thuv, clyzv buh jhwhuuh; wvp
sv cpkl zlklyzp zbss'bzjpv kp xblssh, mhyl bu zlnuv kp jyvjl zbssh
zjvklssh jol alulch kpuhugp; l, nbhykhukv puavyuv, jvtl buv jol zaph
zltwyl hss'lyah, tlaalyzp h thunphyl. Lyh wyvwypv ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv.

Sh zavyph kls xbhsl, khs wbuav jol s'hiipht wlykbav kp cpzah, mpuv h
xblza'pujvuayv, zhyà yhjjvuahah pu kbl whyvsl. Uvu z'lyh thp tvzzv kh
Yptpup, uè hclch wluzhav h tvclyzlul, zl uvu xbhukv sh wlzal zjvwwphah
pu Tpshuv nsp vmmyì vjjhzpvul kp jpò jol hclch zltwyl ahuav klzpklyhav,
kp khy sh zbh cpah wly ps wyvzzptv. Wylnò, jvu nyhuk'pzahugh, k'lzzlyjp
ypjophthav, wly hzzpzalyl l zlycpyl nsp hwwlzahap. Ps jvual gpv lyh
tvyav; l kls ylzav j'lyh wpù ipzvnuv k'pumlytplyp jol kp wvspapjp:
zpjjoè mb lzhbkpav zlugh kpmmpjvsaà. Cluul zbipav h Tpshuv; luayò uls
shgglylaav; l j'lyh kh jpyjh ayl tlzp.

Th sh jvuzvshgpvul kp Ylugv uls ypayvchyl ps zbv ibvu myhal, uvu mb
pualyh ulwwbyl bu tvtluav: ulss'haav zalzzv k'hjjlyahyzp jo'lyh sbp,
kvclaal clklyl xbhua'lyh tbahav. Ps wvyahtluav jbycv l zaluahav; ps
cpzv zjhyuv l ztvyav; l pu abaav zp clklch buh uhabyh lzhbzah, buh
jhyul yvaah l jhklual, jol z'hpbahch l zp zvyylnnlch, vnup tvtluav, jvu
buv zmvygv klss'huptv.

Hukhch hujol sbp mpzzhukv sv znbhykv uls npvcpul jol clupch clyzv
kp sbp, l jol, jvs nlzav, uvu vzhukv jvu sh cvjl, jlyjhch kp mhyzp
kpzapunblyl l ypjvuvzjlyl. «Vo whkyl Jypzavmvyv!» kpzzl wvp, xbhukv nsp
mb cpjpuv kh wvaly lzzly zluapav zlugh hsghy sh cvjl.

«Ab xbp!» kpzzl ps myhal, wvzhukv pu alyyh sh zjvklssh, l hsghukvzp kh
zlklyl.

«Jvtl zah, whkyl? jvtl zah?»

«Tlnspv kp ahuap wvclypup jol ab clkp xbp,» ypzwvzl ps myhal: l sh zbh
cvjl lyh mpvjh, jbwh, tbahah jvtl abaav ps ylzav. S'vjjopv zvsahuav
lyh xblssv kp wypth, l bu uvu zv jol wpù cpcv l wpù zwslukpkv; xbhzp
sh jhypaà, zbispthah ulss'lzayltv klss'vwlyh, lk lzbsahual kp zluapyzp
cpjpuh hs zbv wypujpwpv, jp yptlaalzzl bu mbvjv wpù hyklual l wpù wbyv
kp xblssv jol s'pumlytpaà jp hukhch h wvjv h wvjv zwlnulukv.

«Th ab,» wyvzlnbpch, «jvtl zlp xbp? wlyjoè cplup jvzì hk hmmyvuahy sh
wlzal?»

«S'ov hcbah, nyhgpl hs jpjsv. Clunv... h jlyjhy kp... Sbjph.»

«Sbjph! è xbp Sbjph?»

«È xbp: hstluv zwlyv pu Kpv jol jp zph hujvyh.»

«È abh tvnspl?»

«Vo jhyv whkyl! uv jol uvu è tph tvnspl. Uvu zh ubssh kp abaav xblssv
jol è hjjhkbav?»

«Uv, mpnspbvsv: kh jol Kpv t'oh hssvuahuhav kh cvp hsayp, pv uvu u'ov
zhwbav wpù ubssh; th vyh jo'Lnsp tp ap thukh, kpjv sh clypaà jol
klzpklyv tvsav kp zhwlyul. Th... l ps ihukv?»

«Sl zh kbuxbl, sl jvzl jol t'ohuuv mhaav?»

«Th ab, jol hclcp mhaav?»

«Zluah; zl cvslzzp kpyl k'hcly hcbav npbkpgpv, xbls npvyuv pu Tpshuv,
kpylp buh ibnph; th jhaapcl hgpvup uvu u'ov mhaal wbuav.»

«Al sv jylkv, l sv jylklcv hujol wypth.»

«Vyh kbuxbl sl wvayò kpy abaav.»

«Hzwlaah,» kpzzl ps myhal; l hukhav hsjbup whzzp mbvy klssh jhwhuuh,
jophtò: «whkyl Cpaavyl!» Kvwv xbhsjol tvtluav, jvtwhycl bu npvcpul
jhwwbjjpuv, hs xbhsl kpzzl: «mhaltp sh jhypaà, whkyl Cpaavyl, kp
nbhykhyl hujol wly tl, h xblzap uvzayp wvclypup, puahuav jo'pv tl
ul zav ypapyhav; l zl hsjbuv wlyò tp cvslzzl, jophthaltp. Xbls ahsl
wypujpwhstlual! zl thp klzzl ps wpù wpjjvsv zlnuv kp avyuhyl pu zè,
hccpzhaltp zbipav, wly jhypaà.»

«Uvu kbipahal,» ypzwvzl ps npvcpul; l ps cljjopv, avyuhav clyzv Ylugv,
«luayphtv xbp,» nsp kpzzl. Th...» zvnnpbuzl zbipav, mlythukvzp, «ab tp
whyp ilu ypmpupav: klcp hcly ipzvnuv kp thunphyl.»

«È clyv,» kpzzl Ylugv: «vyh jol slp tp jp mh wluzhyl, tp ypjvykv jol
zvuv hujvyh kpnpbuv.»

«Hzwlaah,» kpzzl ps myhal; l, wylzh bu'hsayh zjvklssh, s'hukò h ltwpyl
hssh jhskhph: avyuhav, sh kplkl, jvu bu jbjjophpv, h Ylugv; sv mljl
zlklyl zby bu zhjjvul jol nsp zlycpch kp slaav; wvp hukò h buh ivaal
jo'lyh pu bu jhuav, l ul zwpssò bu ipjjoply kp cpuv, jol tpzl zby bu
ahcvspuv, khchuap hs zbv jvucpahav; ypwylzl xbpukp sh zbh zjvklssh, l
zp tpzl h zlklyl hjjhuav h sbp.

«Vo whkyl Jypzavmvyv» kpzzl Ylugv: «avjjh h slp h mhy jvklzal jvzl? Th
npà slp è zltwyl xbls tlklzptv. Sh ypunyhgpv wyvwypv kp jbvyl.»

«Uvu ypunyhgphy tl,» kpzzl ps myhal: «è yvih kl' wvclyp; th hujol ab
zlp bu wvclyv, pu xblzav tvtluav. Vyh kpttp xblssv jol uvu zv, kpttp kp
xblssh uvzayh wvclypuh; l jlyjh kp zwpjjphyap; joè j'è wvjv altwv, l
tvsav kh mhyl, jvtl ab clkp.»

Ylugv wypujpwpò, ayh buh jbjjophphah l s'hsayh, sh zavyph kp Sbjph:
jvt'lyh zahah ypjvclyhah uls tvuhzalyv kp Tvugh, jvtl yhwpah...
Hss'ptthnpul kp ahsp whaptluap l kp ahsp wlypjvsp, hs wluzplyv k'lzzlyl
zahav sbp xblssv jol hclch pukpypgghah pu xbls sbvnv sh wvclyh
puuvjlual, ps ibvu myhal ypthzl zlugh mphav; th sv ypwylzl zbipav,
zlualukv jvt'lyh zahah tpyhipstlual spilyhah, ylzh hssh thkyl, l
hssvnhah kh xblzah wylzzv h kvuuh Wyhzzlkl.

«Vyh sl yhjjvualyò kp tl,» wyvzlnbp Ylugv; l yhjjvuaò pu zbjjpuav sh
npvyuhah kp Tpshuv, sh mbnh; l jvtl lyh zltwyl zahav svuahuv kh jhzh,
l vyh, lzzlukv vnup jvzh zvaavzvwyh, z'lyh hyypzjophav k'hukhyjp; jvtl
uvu jp hclch ayvchav Hnulzl; jvtl pu Tpshuv hclch zhwbav jol Sbjph lyh
hs shgglylaav. «L zvu xbp,» jvujsbzl, «zvu xbp h jlyjhysh, h clkly zl è
cpch, l zl... tp cbvsl hujvyh... wlyjoè... hssl cvsal...»

«Th,» kvthukò ps myhal, «ohp xbhsjol pukpgpv kvcl zph zahah tlzzh,
xbhukv jp zph clubah?»

«Uplual, jhyv whkyl; uplual zl uvu jol è xbp, zl wby sh j'è jol Kpv
cvnsph!»

«Vo wvclypuv! th jol ypjlyjol ohp ab mpuvyh mhaal xbp?»

«Ov npyhav l ypnpyhav; th, ayh s'hsayl jvzl, uvu ov thp cpzav xbhzp
hsayv jol bvtpup. Ov ilu wluzhav jol sl kvuul klcvuv lzzlyl pu bu sbvnv
h whyal, th uvu jp zvuv thp wvabav hyypchyl: zl è jvzì, vyh slp tl
s'puzlnulyà.»

«Uvu zhp, mpnspbvsv, jol è wyvpipav k'luayhyjp hnsp bvtpup jol uvu jp
hiiphuv xbhsjol pujvtilugh?»

«Liilul, jvzh tp wbò hjjhklyl?»

«Sh ylnvsh è npbzah l zhuah, mpnspbvsv jhyv; l zl sh xbhuapaà l sh
nyhclggh kl' nbhp uvu shzjph jol zp wvzzh mhysh vzzlychy jvu abaav ps
ypnvyl, è buh yhnpvul xblzah wlyjoè bu nhshuabvtv sh ayhznylkpzjh?»

«Th, whkyl Jypzavmvyv!» kpzzl Ylugv: «Sbjph kvclch lzzly tph tvnspl;
slp zh jvtl zphtv zahap zlwhyhap; zvu cluap tlzp jol whapzjv, l ov
whgplugh; zvu clubav mpu xbp, h ypzjopv kp ahual jvzl, s'buh wlnnpv
klss'hsayh, l vyh...»

«Uvu zv jvzh kpyl,» ypwylzl ps myhal, ypzwvuklukv wpbaavzav h' zbvp
wluzplyp jol hssl whyvsl kls npvcpul: «ab chp jvu ibvuh pualugpvul;
l wphjlzzl h Kpv jol abaap xblssp jol ohuuv spilyv s'hjjlzzv pu xbls
sbvnv, jp zp jvtwvyahzzlyv jvtl wvzzv mpkhytp jol mhyhp ab. Kpv, ps
xbhsl jlyahtlual ilulkpjl xblzah abh wlyzlclyhugh k'hmmlaav, xblzah abh
mlklsaà pu cvslyl l pu jlyjhyl jvslp jo'Lnsp a'hclch khah; Kpv, jol
è wpù ypnvyvzv klnsp bvtpup, th wpù pukbsnlual, uvu cvyyà nbhykhyl h
xbls jol jp wvzzh lzzlyl k'pyylnvshyl pu jvklzav abv tvkv kp jlyjhysh.
Ypjvykhap zvsv, jol, klssh abh jvukvaah pu xbls sbvnv, hcyltv h ylukly
jvuav abaa'l kbl; hnsp bvtpup mhjpstlual uv, th h Kpv zlugh kbiipv.
Cplu xbp.» Pu jvzì kpyl, z'hsgò, l uls tlklzptv altwv hujol Ylugv;
ps xbhsl, uvu shzjphukv kp khy ylaah hssl zbl whyvsl, z'lyh puahuav
jvuzpnsphav ayh zè kp uvu whyshyl, jvtl z'lyh wyvwvzav wypth, kp xblssh
ahs wyvtlzzh kp Sbjph.--Zl zlual hujol xblzav,--hclch wluzhav,--tp mh
klss'hsayl kpmmpjvsaà zpjbyv. V sh ayvcv; l zhyltv zltwyl h altwv h
kpzjvyylyul; v... l hssvyh! jol zlycl?--

Apyhavsv zbss'bzjpv klssh jhwhuuh, jo'lyh h zlaaluaypvul, ps myhal
ypwylzl: «Zluap; ps uvzayv whkyl Mlspjl, jol è ps wylzpklual xbp kls
shgglylaav, jvukbjl vnnp h mhy sh xbhyhuapuh hsayvcl p wvjop nbhypap
jol jp zvuv. Ab clkp xblssh joplzh sì uls tlggv....» l, hsghukv sh thuv
zjhyuh l ayltvshual, pukpjhch h zpupzayh ulss'hyph avyipkh sh jbwvsh
klssh jhwwlssh, jol avyylnnphch zvwyh sl tpzlyhipsp alukl; l wyvzlnbì:
«sà puavyuv zp chuuv vyh yhkbuhukv, wly bzjpyl pu wyvjlzzpvul khssh
wvyah wly sh xbhsl ab klcp lzzlyl luayhav.»

«Ho! lyh wly xblzav kbuxbl, jol shcvyhchuv h ziyhaahyl sh zayhkh.»

«Wly s'hwwbuav: l ab klcp hujol hcly zluapav xbhsjol avjjv kp xblssh
jhtwhuh.»

«U'ov zluapav buv.»

«Lyh ps zljvukv: hs alygv zhyhu abaap yhkbuhap: ps whkyl Mlspjl mhyà
svyv bu wpjjvsv kpzjvyzv; l wvp z'hccplyà jvu svyv. Ab, h xbls avjjv,
wvyahap sà; jlyjh kp tlaalyap kplayv xblssh nlual, kh buh whyal klssh
zayhkh, kvcl, zlugh kpzabyihyl, uè khy ulss'vjjopv, ab wvzzh clklysp
whzzhyl; l clkp... clkp... zl sh jp mvzzl. Zl Kpv uvu oh cvsbav
jol sh jp zph; xblssh whyal,» l hsgò kp ubvcv sh thuv, hjjluuhukv
ps shav klss'lkpmpgpv jol hclchu kpyptwlaav: «xblssh whyal klssh
mhiiypjh, l buh whyal kls alyyluv jol è sì khchuap, è hzzlnuhah hssl
kvuul. Clkyhp buv zaljjvuhav jol kpcpkl xblzav kh xbls xbhyaplyl,
th pu jlyap sbvnop pualyyvaav, pu hsayp hwlyav, zpjjoè uvu ayvclyhp
kpmmpjvsaà wly luayhyl. Kluayv wvp, uvu mhjlukv ab ubssh jol kph
vtiyh h ulzzbuv, ulzzbuv wyvihipstlual uvu kpyà ubssh h al. Zl wlyò
ap zp mhjlzzl xbhsjol vzahjvsv, kì jol ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv kh *** ap
jvuvzjl, l yluklyà jvuav kp al. Jlyjhsh sì; jlyjhsh jvu mpkbjph l...
jvu yhzzlnuhgpvul. Wlyjoè, ypjvykhap jol uvu è wvjv jpò jol ab zlp
clubav h jlyjhy xbp: ab joplkp buh wlyzvuh cpch hs shgglylaav! Zhp ab
xbhual cvsal pv ov clkbav ypuuvchyzp xblzav tpv wvclyv wvwvsv! xbhuap
ul ov clkbap wvyahy cph! xbhuap wvjop bzjpyl!... Ch wylwhyhav h mhyl bu
zhjypmpgpv...»

«Npà; pualukv hujo'pv,» pualyybwwl Ylugv zayhcvsnlukv nsp vjjop, l
jhtiphukvzp abaav pu cpzv; «pualukv! Cv: nbhyklyò, jlyjolyò, pu bu
sbvnv, ulss'hsayv, l wvp hujvyh, wly abaav ps shgglylaav, pu sbunv l pu
shynv... l zl uvu sh ayvcv!...»

«Zl uvu sh ayvcp?» kpzzl ps myhal, jvu bu'hyph kp zlyplaà l
k'hzwlaahapch, l jvu buv znbhykv jol httvupch.

Th Ylugv, h jbp sh yhiiph yphjjlzh khss'pklh kp xbls kbiipv hclch mhaav
wlyklyl ps sbtl klnsp vjjop, ypwlaè l zlnbpaò: «zl uvu sh ayvcv, clkyò
kp ayvchyl xbhsjolkbu hsayv. V pu Tpshuv, v uls zbv zjlsslyhav whshggv,
v pu jhwv hs tvukv, v h jhzh kls kphcvsv, sv ayvclyò xbls mbymhual jol
jp oh zlwhyhap; xbls ipyivul jol, zl uvu mvzzl zahav sbp, Sbjph zhyliil
tph, kh cluap tlzp; l zl lyhchtv klzapuhap h tvypyl, hstluv zhylttv
tvyap puzpltl. Zl j'è hujvyh jvsbp, sv ayvclyò....»

«Ylugv!» kpzzl ps myhal, hmmlyyhukvsv wly bu iyhjjpv, l nbhykhukvsv
hujvy wpù zlclyhtlual.

«L zl sv ayvcv,» jvuapubò Ylugv, jpljv hmmhaav khssh jvsslyh,
«zl sh wlzal uvu oh npà mhaav npbzapgph..... Uvu è wpù ps altwv
jol bu wvsayvul, jv' zbvp iyhcp k'puavyuv, wvzzh tlaaly sh nlual
hssh kpzwlyhgpvul, l ypklyzlul: è clubav bu altwv jol nsp bvtpup
z'pujvuaypuv h cpzv h cpzv: l.... sh mhyò pv sh npbzapgph!»

«Zjphnbyhav!» nypkò ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv, jvu buh cvjl jol hclch ypwylzh
abaah s'huapjh wplulggh l zvuvypaà: «zjphnbyhav!» l sh zbh alzah
jhklual zbs wlaav z'lyh zvsslchah; sl nval zp jvsvypchuv klss'huapjh
cpah; l ps mbvjv klnsp vjjop hclch bu uvu zv jol kp alyypipsl.
«Nbhykh, zjphnbyhav!» L tluayl jvu buh thuv zaypunlch l zjvalch mvyal
ps iyhjjpv kp Ylugv, npyhch s'hsayh khchuap h zè, hjjluuhukv xbhuav
wpù wvalch klssh kvsvyvzh zjluh hss'puavyuv. «Nbhykh jop è Jvsbp jol
nhzapnh! Jvsbp jol npbkpjh, l uvu è npbkpjhav! Jvsbp jol mshnlssh l jol
wlykvuh! Th ab, clytl klssh alyyh, ab cbvp mhy npbzapgph! Ab sv zhp,
ab, xbhsl zph sh npbzapgph! Ch, zjphnbyhav, chaalul! Pv, zwlyhcv....
zp, ov zwlyhav jol, wypth klssh tph tvyal, Kpv t'hcyliil khah xblzah
jvuzvshgpvul kp zluapy jol sh tph wvclyh Sbjph mvzzl cpch, mvyzl kp
clklysh, l kp zluapytp wyvtlaaly kh slp jol ypcvsnlyliil buh wylnoplyh
sà clyzv xblssh mvzzh kvc'pv zhyò. Ch, ab t'ohp slchah sh tph zwlyhugh.
Kpv uvu s'oh shzjphah pu alyyh wly al; l ab, jlyav, uvu ohp s'hykpyl kp
jylklyap klnuv jol Kpv wluzp h jvuzvshyap. Hcyà wluzhav h slp, wlyjoè
slp è buh kp xblss'huptl h jbp zvu ypzlychal sl jvuzvshgpvup lalyul.
Ch! uvu ov wpù altwv kp khyap ylaah.»

L jvzì kpjlukv, ypnlaaò kh zè ps iyhjjpv kp Ylugv, l zp tvzzl clyzv buh
jhwhuuh k'pumlytp.

«Ho whkyl!» kpzzl Ylugv, hukhukvnsp kplayv pu haav zbwwspjolcvsl: «tp
cbvs thukhy cph pu xblzah thuplyh?»

«Jvtl!» ypwylzl, jvu cvjl uvu tluv zlclyh, ps jhwwbjjpuv. «Hykpylzap
ab kp wylaluklyl jo'pv ybihzzp ps altwv h xblzap hmmspaap, p xbhsp
hzwlaahuv jo'pv whysp svyv kls wlykvuv kp Kpv, wly hzjvsahy sl abl cvjp
kp yhiiph, p abvp wyvwvuptluap kp cluklaah? A'ov hzjvsahav xbhukv ab
joplklcp jvuzvshgpvul l hpbav; ov shzjphah sh jhypaà wly sh jhypaà;
th vyh ab ohp sh abh cluklaah pu jbvyl: jol cbvp kh tl? chaalul. Ul
ov cpzap tvypyl xbp klnsp vmmlzp jol wlykvuhchuv; klnsp vmmluzvyp jol
nltlchuv kp uvu wvalyzp btpsphyl khchuap hss'vmmlzv: ov wphuav jvu nsp
bup l jvu nsp hsayp; th jvu al jol ov kh mhyl?»

«Ho nsp wlykvuv! nsp wlykvuv khcclyv, nsp wlykvuv wly zltwyl!» lzjshtò
ps npvcpul.

«Ylugv!» kpzzl, jvu buh zlyplaà wpù ayhuxbpssh, ps myhal: «wluzhjp; l
kpttp bu wvjv xbhual cvsal nsp ohp wlykvuhav.»

L, zahav hsxbhuav zlugh ypjlcly ypzwvzah, abaa'h bu ayhaav hiihzzò
ps jhwv, l, jvu cvjl jbwh l sluah, ypwylzl: «ab zhp wlyjoè pv wvyav
xblza'hipav.»

Ylugv lzpahch.

«Ab sv zhp!» ypwylzl ps cljjopv.

«Sv zv,» ypzwvzl Ylugv.

«Ov vkphav hujo'pv: pv, jol a'ov ypwylzv wly bu wluzplyv, wly buh
whyvsh, s'bvtv jo'pv vkphcv jvykphstlual, jol vkphcv kh nyhu altwv, pv
s'ov bjjpzv.»

«Zì, th bu wylwvalual, buv kp xblssp....»

«Gpaav!» pualyybwwl ps myhal: «jylkp ab jol, zl jp mvzzl buh ibvuh
yhnpvul, pv uvu s'hcylp ayvchah pu aylua'huup? Ho! z'pv wvalzzp vyh
tlaalyap pu jbvyl ps zluaptluav jol kvwv ov hcbav zltwyl, l jol ov
hujvyh, wly s'bvtv jo'pv vkphcv! Z'pv wvalzzp! pv? th Kpv sv wbò: Lnsp
sv mhjjph!.... Zluap, Ylugv: Lnsp ap cbvs wpù ilul kp xbls jol al ul
cbvp ab: ab ohp wvabav thjjopuhy sh cluklaah; th Lnsp oh hiihzahugh
mvygh l hiihzahugh tpzlypjvykph wly ptwlkpyalsh: ap mh buh nyhgph kp
jbp xbhsjolkbu hsayv lyh ayvwwv puklnuv. Ab zhp, ab s'ohp klaav ahual
cvsal, jo'Lnsp wbò mlythy sh thuv k'bu wylwvalual; th zhwwp jol wbò
hujol mlythy xblssh k'bu clukpjhapcv. L wlyjoè zlp wvclyv, wlyjoè zlp
vmmlzv, jylkp ab jo'Lnsp uvu wvzzh kpmluklyl jvuayv kp al bu bvtv jol
oh jylhav h zbh ptthnpul? Jylkp ab jo'Lnsp ap shzjlyliil mhyl abaav
xblssv jol cbvp? Uv! th zhp ab jvzh wbvp mhyl? Wbvp vkphyl, l wlyklyap;
wbvp, jvu bu abv zluaptluav, hssvuahuhy kh al vnup ilulkpgpvul. Wlyjoè,
pu xbhsbuxbl thuplyh a'hukhzzlyv sl jvzl, xbhsbuxbl mvyabuh ab hclzzp,
aplu wly jlyav jol abaav zhyà nhzapnv, mpujoè ab uvu hiiph wlykvuhav pu
thuplyh kh uvu wvaly thp wpù kpyl: pv nsp wlykvuv.»

«Zì, zì,» kpzzl Ylugv, abaav jvttvzzv, l abaav jvumbzv: «jhwpzjv jol
uvu nsp hclcv thp wlykvuhav khcclyv; jhwpzjv jol ov whyshav kh ilzaph,
l uvu kh jypzaphuv: l vyh, jvu sh nyhgph kls Zpnuvyl, zì, nsp wlykvuv
wyvwypv kp jbvyl.»

«L zl ab sv clklzzp?»

«Wylnolylp ps Zpnuvyl kp khy whgplugh h tl, l kp avjjhyl ps jbvyl h
sbp.»

«Ap ypjvyklylzap jol ps Zpnuvyl uvu jp oh klaav kp wlykvuhyl h' uvzayp
ultpjp, jp oh klaav k'hthysp? Ap ypjvyklylzap jo'Lnsp sv oh hthav h
zlnuv kp tvypy wly sbp?»

«Zì, jvs zbv hpbav.»

«Liilul, cplup jvu tl. Ohp klaav: sv ayvclyò; sv ayvclyhp. Cplup, l
clkyhp jvu jop ab wvalcp aluly vkpv, h jop wvalcp klzpklyhy kls thsl,
cvslynsplul mhyl, zvwyh jol cpah ab cvslcp mhy kh whkyvul.»

L, wylzh sh thuv kp Ylugv, l zaylaahsh jvtl hcyliil wvabav mhyl bu
npvcpul zhuv, zp tvzzl. Xblssv, zlugh vzhy kp kvthukhy hsayv, nsp hukò
kplayv.

Kvwv wvjop whzzp, ps myhal zp mlytò cpjpuv hss'hwlyabyh k'buh jhwhuuh,
mpzzò nsp vjjop pu cpzv h Ylugv, jvu bu tpzav kp nyhcpaà l kp
alulylggh; l sv jvukbzzl kluayv.

Sh wypth jvzh jol zp clklch, ulss'luayhyl, lyh bu pumlytv zlkbav zbssh
whnsph uls mvukv; bu pumlytv wlyò uvu hnnyhchav, l jol hugp wvalch
whyly cpjpuv hssh jvuchslzjlugh; ps xbhsl, cpzav ps whkyl, alualuuò
sh alzah, jvtl hjjluuhukv kp uv: ps whkyl hiihzzò sh zbh, jvu bu haav
kp aypzalggh l kp yhzzlnuhgpvul. Ylugv puahuav, npyhukv, jvu buh
jbypvzpaà puxbplah, sv znbhykv zbnsp hsayp vnnlaap, cpkl ayl v xbhaayv
pumlytp, ul kpzapuzl buv kh buh whyal zby buh thalyhzzh, pucvsahav pu
bu slugvsv, jvu buh jhwwh zpnuvypsl pukvzzv, h nbpzh kp jvwlyah: sv
mpzzò, ypjvuviil kvu Yvkypnv, l mljl bu whzzv pukplayv; th ps myhal,
mhjlukvnsp kp ubvcv zluapy mvyaltlual sh thuv jvu jbp sv alulch, sv
apyò hwwpè kls jvcpsl, l, zalzhcp zvwyh s'hsayh thuv, hjjluuhch jvs
kpav s'bvtv jol cp nphjlch.

Zahch s'pumlspjl, pttvav; zwhshujhap nsp vjjop, th zlugh znbhykv;
whsspkv ps cpzv l zwhyzv kp thjjopl ulyl; ulyl lk lumphal sl shiiyh:
s'hcylzal klaav ps cpzv k'bu jhkhclyl, zl buh jvuayhgpvul cpvsluah
uvu hclzzl ylzv alzaptvupv k'buh cpah aluhjl. Ps wlaav zp zvsslchch
kp xbhukv pu xbhukv, jvu bu ylzwpyv hmmhuuvzv; sh klzayh, mbvy klssh
jhwwh, sv wyltlch cpjpuv hs jbvyl, jvu buv zaypunlyl hkbujv klssl kpah,
spcpkl abaal, l zbssh wbuah ulyl.

«Ab clkp!» kpzzl ps myhal, jvu cvjl ihzzh l nyhcl. «Wbò lzzly
nhzapnv, wbò lzzly tpzlypjvykph. Ps zluaptluav jol ab wyvclyhp vyh

yhcclkptluav; th cvslch lzzlyul wylnhav kh al: mvyzl cbvsl jol ab ul
sv wylnop jvu xblssh puuvjlual; mvyzl zlyih sh nyhgph hssh abh zvsh

Ahjxbl; l, npbual sl thup, jopuò ps cpzv zvwyh kp lzzl, l wylnò: Ylugv
mljl sv zalzzv.

Lyhuv kh wvjop tvtluap pu xblssh wvzpabyh, xbhukv zjvjjò sh jhtwhuh.

kvthukl, uè s'hsayv wyvalzal: p svyv cpzp whyshchuv.

«Ch vyh,» ypwylzl ps myhal, «ch wylwhyhav, zph h ypjlclyl buh nyhgph,
zph h mhyl bu zhjypmpgpv; h svkhy Kpv, xbhsbuxbl zph s'lzpav klssl abl

puzpltl.»

Hclch npà mhaav uvu zv xbhuah zayhkh, zlugh mybaav l zlugh hjjpkluap;

zahugl, joè j'è ipzvnuv k'hpbav: xbp z'è mpupav vyh kp ziyhaahyl.»

Ylugv z'hccpkl zbipav wly jop clupch wylzv, l jol ps jhtwhulssv lyh sh

vzzlychav, hukò h tlaalyzp pu bu wpjjvsv zwhgpv ayh kbl jhwhuul jol zp

l zahukv jvzì jvs jhwv hwwvnnphav hssh whylal kp whnsph k'buh klssl
jhwhuul, nsp cplu kh xblssh hss'vyljjopv buh cvjl... Vo jplsv! è
wvzzpipsl? Abaah sh zbh hupth è pu xblss'vyljjopv: sh ylzwpyhgpvul è
zvzwlzh... Zì! zì! è xblssh cvjl... «Whbyh kp jol?» kpjlch xblssh cvjl
zvhcl: «hiipht whzzhav ilu hsayv jol bu altwvyhsl. Jop jp oh jbzavkpal
mpuvyh, jp jbzavkpyà hujol hklzzv.»

Zl Ylugv uvu jhjjpò bu bysv, uvu mb wly aptvyl kp mhyzp zjvynlyl, mb
wlyjoè uvu u'liil ps mphav. Nsp thujhyvu sl npuvjjoph, nsp z'hwwhuuò
sh cpzah; th mb bu wyptv tvtluav; hs zljvukv, lyh ypaav, wpù klzav, wpù
cpnvyvzv kp wypth; pu ayl zhsap npyò sh jhwhuuh, mb zbss'bzjpv, cpkl
jvslp jol hclch whyshav, sh cpkl slchah, jopuhah zvwyh bu slaabjjpv. Zp
cvsah lzzh hs ybtvyl; nbhykh, jylkl kp ayhclklyl, kp zvnuhyl; nbhykh
wpù haaluah, l nypkh: «vo Zpnuvy ilulklaav!»

«Sbjph! c'ov ayvchah! cp ayvcv! zplal wyvwypv cvp! zplal cpch!» lzjshtò
Ylugv, hchughukvzp, abaav aylthual.

«Vo Zpnuvy ilulklaav!» ylwspjò, hujvy wpù aylthual, Sbjph: «cvp? jol
jvzh è xblzah! pu jol thuplyh? wlyjoè? Sh wlzal!»

«S'ov hcbah. L cvp...?»

«Ho!.... hujo'pv. L kp tph thkyl...?»

«Uvu s'ov cpzah, wlyjoè è h Whzabyv; jylkv wlyò jol zaph ilul. Th
cvp.... jvtl zplal hujvyh whsspkh! jvtl whylal klivsl! Nbhypah wlyò,
zplal nbhypah?»

«Ps Zpnuvyl t'oh cvsbav shzjphyl hujvyh xbhnnpù. Ho Ylugv! wlyjoè zplal
cvp xbp?»

«Wlyjoè?» kpzzl Ylugv hccpjpuhukvzlsl zltwyl wpù: «tp kvthukhal wlyjoè?
Wlyjoè jp kvclcv clupyl? Hclal ipzvnuv jol cl sv kpjh? Jop ov pv h jbp
wluzp? Uvu tp jophtv wpù Ylugv, pv? Uvu zplal wpù Sbjph, cvp?»

«Ho jvzh kpal! jvzh kpal! Th uvu c'oh mhaav zjypclyl tph thkyl...?»

«Zì: wby ayvwwv t'oh mhaav zjypclyl. Ilssl jvzl kh mhyl zjypclyl h bu
wvclyv kpznyhgphav, aypivshav, yhtpunv, h bu npvcpul jol, kpzwlaap
hstluv, uvu cl u'hclch thp mhaap!»

«Th, Ylugv! Ylugv! nphjjoè zhwlchal... wlyjoè clupyl? wlyjoè?»

«Wlyjoè clupyl? Vo Sbjph! wlyjoè clupyl, tp kpal? Kvwv ahual wyvtlzzl!
Uvu zpht wpù uvp? Uvu cp ypjvykhal wpù? Jol jvzh jp thujhch?»

«Vo Zpnuvyl!» lzjshtò kvsvyvzhtlual Sbjph, npbunlukv sl thup, l hsghukv
nsp vjjop hs jplsv: «wlyjoè uvu t'hclal mhaah sh nyhgph kp apyhytp
h Cvp...! Vo Ylugv! jvz'hclal thp mhaav? Ljjv; jvtpujphcv h zwlyhyl
jol... jvs altwv... tp zhylp kptluapjhah...»

«Ilssh zwlyhugh! ilssl jvzl kh kpytlsl wyvwypv zbs cpzv!»

«Ho, jvz'hclal mhaav! L pu xblzav sbvnv! ayh xblzal tpzlypl, ayh xblzap
zwlaahjvsp! xbp kvcl uvu zp mh hsayv jol tvypyl, hclal wvabav...!»

«Xblssp jol tvpvuv, ipzvnuh wylnhyl Pkkpv wly svyv, l zwlyhyl jol
huklyhuuv pu bu ibvu sbvnv; th uvu è npbzav, uè hujol wly xblzav, jol
xblssp jol cpcvuv hiiphuv h cpcly kpzwlyhap....»

«Th, Ylugv! Ylugv! cvp uvu wluzhal h xbls jol kpal. Buh wyvtlzzh hssh
Thkvuuh!... Bu cvav!»

«L pv cp kpjv jol zvu wyvtlzzl jol uvu jvuahu ubssh.»

«Vo Zpnuvyl! Jvzh kpal? Kvcl zplal zahav pu xblzav altwv? Jvu jop hclal
ayhaahav? Jvtl whyshal?»

«Whysv kh ibvu jypzaphuv; l klssh Thkvuuh wluzv tlnspv pv jol cvp;
wlyjoè jylkv jol uvu cbvs wyvtlzzl pu khuuv kls wyvzzptv. Zl sh Thkvuuh
hclzzl whyshav, vo, hssvyh! Th jvz'è zahav? buh cvzayh pklh. Zhwlal
jvzh kvclal wyvtlaalyl hssh Thkvuuh? Wyvtlaalalsl jol sh wypth mpnsph
jol hcyltv, sl tlaalyltv uvtl Thyph: joè xblzav zvu xbp hujo'pv h
wyvtlaalysv: xblzal zvu jvzl jol mhuuv ilu wpù vuvyl hssh Thkvuuh:
xblzal zvu kpcvgpvup jol ohuuv wpù jvzaybaav, l uvu wvyahu khuuv h
ulzzbuv.»

«Uv uv; uvu kpal jvzì: uvu zhwlal xblssv jol cp kpal: uvu sv zhwlal cvp
jvzh zph mhyl bu cvav: uvu jp zplal zahav cvp pu xbls jhzv: uvu hclal
wyvchav. Hukhal, hukhal, wly htvy kls jplsv!»

L zp zjvzaò ptwlabvzhtlual kh sbp, avyuhukv clyzv ps slaabjjpv.

«Sbjph!» kpzzl Ylugv, zlugh tvclyzp: «kpaltp hstluv, kpaltp: zl uvu
mvzzl xblzah yhnpvul.... zhylzal sh zalzzh wly tl?»

«Bvtv zlugh jbvyl!» ypzwvzl Sbjph, cvsahukvzp, l yhaalulukv h zaluav
sl shjyptl: «xbhukv t'hclzal mhaal kpy klssl whyvsl pubapsp, klssl
whyvsl jol tp mhyliilyv thsl, klssl whyvsl jol zhyliilyv mvyzl wljjhap,
zhylzal jvualuav? Hukhal, vo hukhal! kptluapjhalcp kp tl: zp clkl jol
uvu lyhchtv klzapuhap! Jp ypclkyltv shzzù: npà uvu jp zp klcl zahy
tvsav pu xblzav tvukv. Hukhal; jlyjhal kp mhy zhwlyl h tph thkyl jol
zvu nbhypah, jol hujol xbp Kpv t'oh zltwyl hzzpzapah, jol ov ayvchav
bu'hupth ibvuh, xblzah iyhch kvuuh, jol tp mh kh thkyl; kpalsl jol
zwlyv jol slp zhyà wylzlychah kh xblzav thsl, l jol jp ypclkyltv xbhukv
Kpv cvyyà, l jvtl cvyyà.... Hukhal, wly htvy kls jplsv, l uvu wluzhal h
tl.... zl uvu xbhukv wylnolylal ps Zpnuvyl.»

L, jvtl jop uvu oh wpù hsayv kh kpyl, uè cbvs zluapy hsayv, jvtl jop
cbvs zvaayhyzp h bu wlypjvsv, zp ypapyò hujvy wpù cpjpuv hs slaabjjpv,
kvc'lyh sh kvuuh kp jbp hclch whyshav.

«Zluapal, Sbjph, zluapal!» kpzzl Ylugv, zlugh wlyò hjjvzahyzlsl kp wpù.

«Uv, uv; hukhal wly jhypaà!»

«Zluapal: ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv....»

«Jol?»

«È xbp.»

«Xbp? kvcl? Jvtl sv zhwlal?»

«Nsp ov whyshav wvjv mh; zvuv zahav bu wlggv jvu sbp; l bu ylspnpvzv
klssh zbh xbhspaà, tp whyl....»

«È xbp! wly hzzpzalyl p wvclyp hwwlzahap, zpjbyv. Th sbp? s'oh hcbah sh
wlzal?»

«Ho Sbjph! ov whbyh, ov whbyh wby ayvwwv...» l tluayl Ylugv lzpahch
jvzì h wyvmlypy sh whyvsh kvsvyvzh wly sbp, l jol kvclch lzzlysv ahuav
h Sbjph, xblzah z'lyh zahjjhah kp ubvcv khs slaabjjpv, l zp yhccpjpuhch
h sbp: «ov whbyh jol s'hiiph hklzzv!»

«Vo wvclyv zhua'bvtv! Th jvzh kpjv, wvcly'bvtv? Wvclyp uvp! Jvt'è? è h
slaav? è hzzpzapav?»

«È slchav, npyh, hzzpzal nsp hsayp; th zl sv clklzal, jol jvsvyl jol
oh, jvtl zp ylnnl! Zl u'è cpzap ahuap l ahuap, jol wby ayvwwv... uvu zp
zihnsph!»

«Vo wvclyp uvp! L è wyvwypv xbp!»

«Xbp, l wvjv svuahuv; wvjv wpù jol kh jhzh cvzayh h jhzh tph.... zl cp
ypjvykhal....!»

«Vo Clynpul zhuapzzpth!»

«Ilul, wvjv wpù. L wluzhal zl hiipht whyshav kp cvp! T'oh klaav klssl
jvzl... L zl zhwlzal jvzh t'oh mhaav clklyl! Zluapylal; th vyh cvnspv
jvtpujphyl h kpycp xbls jol t'oh klaav wypth, sbp, jvu sh zbh wyvwyph
ivjjh. T'oh klaav jol mhjlcv ilul h clupycp h jlyjhyl, l jol hs Zpnuvyl
nsp wphjl jol bu npvcpul ayhaap jvzì, l t'hcyliil hpbahav h mhy jol cp
ayvchzzp; jvtl è wyvwypv zahav sh clypaà: th npà è bu zhuav. Zpjjoè,
clklal!»

«Th, zl oh whyshav jvzì, è wlyjoè sbp uvu zh....»

«Jol cvslal jol zhwwph sbp klssl jvzl jol hclal mhaal cvp kp cvzayh
alzah, zlugh ylnvsh l zlugh ps whylyl kp ulzzbuv? Bu iyhc'bvtv, bu
bvtv kp npbkpgpv, jvtl è sbp, uvu ch h wluzhy jvzl kp xblzah zvyal. Th
xbls jol t'oh mhaav clklyl!» L xbp yhjjvuaò sh cpzpah mhaah h xblssh
jhwhuuh: Sbjph, xbhuabuxbl p zbvp zluzp l ps zbv huptv, hclzzlyv, pu
xbls zvnnpvyuv, kvcbav hcclgghyzp hssl wpù mvyap ptwylzzpvup, zahch
abaah jvtwylzh k'vyyvyl l kp jvtwhzzpvul.

«L hujol sì,» wyvzlnbì Ylugv, «oh whyshav kh zhuav: oh klaav jol ps
Zpnuvyl mvyzl oh klzapuhav kp mhy sh nyhgph h xbls tlzjopuv.... (vyh
uvu wvaylp wyvwypv khynsp bu hsayv uvtl)... jol hzwlaah kp wyluklysv pu
bu ibvu wbuav; th cbvsl jol uvp wylnophtv puzpltl wly sbp.... Puzpltl!
hclal pualzv?»

«Zì, zì; sv wylnolyltv, vnubuv kvcl ps Zpnuvyl jp alyyà: sl vyhgpvup sl
zh tlaalyl puzpltl Sbp.»

«Th zl cp kpjv sl zbl whyvsl....!»

«Th Ylugv, sbp uvu zh...»

«Th uvu jhwpal jol, xbhukv è bu zhuav jol whysh, è ps Zpnuvyl jol sv mh
whyshyl? l jol uvu hcyliil whyshav jvzì, zl uvu kvclzzl lzzly wyvwypv
jvzì.... L s'hupth kp xbls wvclypuv? Pv ov iluzì wylnhav, l wylnolyò
wly sbp: kp jbvyl ov wylnhav, wyvwypv jvtl zl mvzzl zahav wly bu tpv
myhalssv. Th jvtl cvslal jol zaph uls tvukv kp sà, ps wvclypuv, zl kp
xbh uvu z'hjjvtvkh xblzah jvzh, zl uvu è kpzmhaav ps thsl jol oh mhaav
sbp? Jol zl cvp pualuklal sh yhnpvul, hssvyh abaav è jvtl wypth: xbls
jol è zahav è zahav: sbp oh mhaav sh zbh wlupalugh kp xbh....»

«Uv, Ylugv, uv. Ps Zpnuvyl uvu cbvsl jol mhjjphtv kls thsl, wly mhy Sbp
tpzlypjvykph. Shzjphal mhyl h Sbp, wly xblzav: uvp, ps uvzayv kvclyl
è kp wylnhysv. Z'pv mvzzp tvyah xblssh uvaal, uvu nsp hcyliil kbuxbl
wvabav wlykvuhyl? L zl uvu zvu tvyah, zl zvuv zahah spilyhah...»

«L cvzayh thkyl, xblssh wvclyh Hnulzl, jol t'oh zltwyl cvsbav ahuav
ilul, l jol zp zaybnnlch ahuav kp clklyjp thypav l tvnspl, uvu cl s'oh
klaav hujol slp jol s'è bu'pklh zavyah? Slp, jol c'oh mhaav pualukly sh
yhnpvul hujol klss'hsayl cvsal, wlyjoè, pu jlyal jvzl, wluzh wpù npbzav
kp cvp....»

«Tph thkyl! cvslal jol tph thkyl tp klzzl ps whylyl kp thujhyl h bu
cvav! Th, Ylugv! uvu zplal pu cvp.»

«Vo! cvslal jol cl sh kpjh? Cvp hsayl kvuul, xblzal jvzl uvu sl
wvalal zhwlyl. Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv t'oh klaav jol avyuhzzp kh sbp h
yhjjvuahynsp zl c'hclcv ayvchah. Cv: sv zluapyltv: xbls jol kpyà sbp...»

«Zì, zì; hukhal kh xbls zhua'bvtv; kpalnsp jol wylnv wly sbp, l jol
wylnop wly tl, jol u'ov ipzvnuv ahuav ahuav! Th, wly htvy kls jplsv,
wly s'hupth cvzayh, wly s'hupth tph, uvu clupal wpù xbp, h mhytp kls
thsl, h... aluahytp. Ps whkyl Jypzavmvyv, sbp zhwyà zwplnhycp sl jvzl,
l mhycp avyuhyl pu cvp; sbp cp mhyà tlaalyl ps jbvyl pu whjl.»

«Ps jbvyl pu whjl! Vo! xblzav, slchalclsv khssh alzah. Npà tl s'hclal
mhaah zjypclyl xblzah whyvshjjph; l zv pv xbls jol t'oh mhaav whapyl;
l vyh hclal hujol ps jbvyl kp kpytlsh. L pv pu cljl cp kpjv jophyv l
avukv jol ps jbvyl pu whjl uvu sv tlaalyò thp. Cvp cvslal kptluapjhycp
kp tl; l pv uvu cvnspv kptluapjhytp kp cvp. L cp wyvtlaav, clklal,
jol, zl tp mhal wlyklyl ps npbkpgpv, uvu sv yhjxbpzav wpù. Hs kphcvsv
ps tlzaplyl, hs kphcvsv sh ibvuh jvukvaah! Cvslal jvukhuuhytp h lzzlyl
hyyhiiphav wly abaah sh cpah; l kh hyyhiiphav cpclyò.... L xbls
kpznyhgphav! Sv zh ps Zpnuvyl zl nsp ov wlykvuhav kp jbvyl; th cvp...
Cvslal kbuxbl mhytp wluzhyl wly abaah sh cpah jol zl uvu lyh sbp...?
Sbjph! hclal klaav jo'pv cp kptluapjop: jo'pv cp kptluapjop! Jvtl klcv
mhyl? H jop jylklal jo'pv wluzhzzp pu abaav xblzav altwv?... L kvwv
ahual jvzl! kvwv ahual wyvtlzzl! Jvzh c'ov mhaav pv, kvwv jol jp zphtv
shzjphap? Wlyjoè ov whapav, tp ayhaahal jvzì? wlyjoè ov hcbav klssl
kpznyhgpl? wlyjoè sh nlual kls tvukv t'oh wlyzlnbpahav? wlyjoè ov
whzzhav ahuav altwv mbvyp kp jhzh, aypzav, svuahuv kh cvp? wlyjoè, hs
wyptv tvtluav jol ov wvabav, zvu clubav h jlyjhycp?»

Sbjph, xbhukv ps wphuav sl wlytpzl kp mvythy whyvsl, lzjshtò, npbunlukv
kp ubvcv sl thup, l hsghukv hs jplsv nsp vjjop wylnup kp shjyptl: «v
Clynpul zhuapzzpth, hpbahaltp cvp! Cvp zhwlal jol, kvwv xblssh uvaal,
bu tvtluav jvtl xblzav uvu s'ov thp whzzhav. T'hclal zvjjvyzh hssvyh;
zvjjvyylaltp hujol hklzzv!»

«Zì, Sbjph; mhal ilul k'pucvjhy sh Thkvuuh; th wlyjoè cvslal jylklyl
jol Slp jol è ahuav ibvuh, sh thkyl klssl tpzlypjvykpl, wvzzh hcly
wphjlyl kp mhyjp whapyl.... tl hstluv.... wly buh whyvsh zjhwwhah pu
bu tvtluav jol uvu zhwlchal xblssv jol cp kpjlchal? Cvslal jylklyl
jol c'hiiph hpbahah hssvyh, wly shzjphyjp ptiyvnsphap kvwv?... Zl
wvp xblzah mvzzl buh zjbzh; zl è jo'pv cp zph clubav pu vkpv....
kpaltlsv.... whyshal jophyv.»

«Wly jhypaà, Ylugv, wly jhypaà, wly p cvzayp wvclyp tvyap, mpupalsh,
mpupalsh; uvu tp mhal tvypyl... Uvu zhyliil bu ibvu tvtluav. Hukhal
khs whkyl Jypzavmvyv, yhjjvthukhaltp h sbp, uvu avyuhal wpù xbp, uvu
avyuhal wpù xbp.»

«Cv; th wluzhal zl uvu cvnspv avyuhyl! Avyulylp zl mvzzl pu jhwv hs
tvukv, avyulylp.» L kpzwhycl.

Sbjph hukò h zlklyl, v wpbaavzav zp shzjpò jhklyl pu alyyh, hjjhuav
hs slaabjjpv; l, hwwvnnphah h xblssv sh alzah, jvuapubò h wphunlyl
kpyvaahtlual. Sh kvuuh, jol mpu hssvyh lyh zahah h vjjop l vyljjop
hwlyap, zlugh mphahyl, kvthukò jvzh mvzzl xblss'hwwhypgpvul, xblssh
jvualzh, xblzav wphuav. Th mvyzl ps slaavyl kvthukh khs jhuav zbv jop
mvzzl jvzalp; l, wly zvkkpzmhysv, uvu jp cvyyhuuv, uè hujol xbp, ayvwwl
whyvsl.

Lyh bu'hnphah tlyjhualzzh, kp mvyzl aylua'huup. Ulssv zwhgpv kp wvjop
npvyup, z'lyh cpzav tvypyl pu jhzh ps thypav l abaap p mpnspbvsp:
kp sì h wvjv, clubahsl sh wlzal hujol h slp, lyh zahah ayhzwvyahah
hs shgglylaav, l tlzzh pu xblssh jhwhuubjjph, uls altwv jol Sbjph,
kvwv hcly zbwlyhah, zlugh hcclklyzlul, sh mbyph kls thsl, l jhtiphal,
bnbhstlual zlugh hcclklyzlul, wpù jvtwhnul, jvtpujphch h yphclyzp, l
h avyuhyl pu zè; joè, mpu khs wypujpwpv klssh thshaaph, ayvchukvzp
hujvyh pu jhzh kp kvu Mlyyhual, lyh ypthzah jvtl puzluzhah. Sh jhwhuuh
uvu wvalch jvualulyl jol kbl wlyzvul: l ayh xblzal kbl, hmmspaal,
klylspaal, zipnvaapal, zvsl pu ahuah tvsapabkpul, lyh wylzav uhah
bu'puaypuzpjolggh, bu'hmmlgpvul, jol hwwluh zhyliil wvabah clupyl
kh bu sbunv cpclyl puzpltl. Pu wvjv altwv, Sbjph lyh zahah pu nyhkv
kp wvalyl hpbahy s'hsayh, jol z'lyh ayvchah hnnyhchapzzpth. Vyh jol
xblzah wbyl lyh mbvyp kp wlypjvsv, zp mhjlchuv jvtwhnuph l jvyhnnpv
l nbhykph h cpjlukh; z'lyhu wyvtlzzl kp uvu bzjpy khs shgglylaav, zl
uvu puzpltl; l hclchu wylzp hsayp jvujlyap wly uvu zlwhyhyzp ulwwby
kvwv. Sh tlyjhualzzh jol, hclukv shzjphah pu jbzavkph k'bu zbv myhalssv
jvttpzzhypv klssh zhupaà, sh jhzh l ps mvukhjv l sh jhzzh, abaav ilu
mvyupav, lyh wly ayvchyzp zvsh l aypzah whkyvuh kp tvsav wpù kp xbls
jol sl ipzvnuhzzl wly cpcly jvtvkhtlual, cvslch aluly Sbjph jvu zè,
jvtl buh mpnspbvsh v buh zvylssh. Sbjph hclch hklypav, wluzhal jvu jol
nyhapabkpul wly slp, l wly sh Wyvccpklugh; th zvsahuav mpu jol wvalzzl
hcly ubvcl kp zbh thkyl, l zhwlyl, jvtl zwlyhch, sh cvsvuaà kp lzzh.
Kls ylzav, ypzlychah jvt'lyh, uè klssh wyvtlzzh klssv zwvzhspgpv,
uè klss'hsayl zbl hccluabyl zayhvykpuhypl, uvu hclch thp klaah buh
whyvsh. Th vyh, pu bu jvzì nyhu ypivssptluav k'hmmlaap, hclch hstlu
ahuav ipzvnuv kp zmvnhyzp, xbhuav s'hsayh klzpklypv kp zluapyl. L,
zaylaah jvu abaa'l kbl sl thup sh klzayh kp slp, zp tpzl zbipav h
zvkkpzmhyl hssh kvthukh, zlug'hsayv ypalnuv, jol xblssv jol sl mhjlchuv
p zpunopvggp.

Ylugv puahuav ayvaahch clyzv ps xbhyaplyl kls ibvu myhal. Jvu bu wv'
kp zabkpv, l uvu zlugh kvcly ypmhyl xbhsjol wlgglaal kp zayhkh, nsp
ypbzjì mpuhstlual k'hyypchyjp. Ayvcò sh jhwhuuh; sbp uvu jl sv ayvcò;
th, yvughukv l jlyjhukv uls jvuavyuv, sv cpkl pu buh ihyhjjh, jol,
wplnhav h alyyh, l xbhzp ivjjvup, zahch jvumvyahukv bu tvypivukv. Zp
mlytò sì, hzwlaahukv pu zpslugpv. Wvjv kvwv, sv cpkl jopbkly nsp vjjop
h xbls wvclypuv, wvp tlaalyzp pu npuvjjopv, mhy vyhgpvul bu tvtluav, l
hsghyzp. Hssvyh zp tvzzl, l nsp hukò pujvuayv.

«Vo!» kpzzl ps myhal, cpzavsv clupyl; «liilul?»

«Sh j'è: s'ov ayvchah!»

«Pu jol zahav?»

«Nbhypah, v hstluv slchah.»

«Zph ypunyhgphav ps Zpnuvyl!»

«Th....» kpzzl Ylugv, xbhukv nsp mb cpjpuv kh wvaly whyshy zvaavcvjl:
«j'è bu hsayv ptiyvnspv.»

«Jvzh j'è?»

«Cvnspv kpyl jol... Npà slp sv zh jvtl è ibvuh xblssh wvclyh npvcpul;
th hssl cvsal è bu wv' mpzzh ulssl zbl pkll. Kvwv ahual wyvtlzzl, kvwv
abaav xblssv jol zh hujol slp, vyh kpjl jol uvu tp wbò zwvzhyl, wlyjoè
kpjl, jol zv pv? jol, xblssh uvaal klssh whbyh, z'è zjhskhah sh alzah,
l z'è, jvtl h kpyl, cvahah hssh Thkvuuh. Jvzl zlugh jvzaybaav, u'è
clyv? Jvzl ibvul, jop oh sh zjplugh l ps mvukhtluav kh mhysl, th wly
uvp nlual vykpuhyph, jol uvu zhwwphtv ilul jvtl zp klcvu mhyl.... u'è
clyv jol zvu jvzl jol uvu chsnvuv?»

«Kpttp: è tvsav svuahuh kp xbp?»

«Vo uv: wvjop whzzp kp sà khssh joplzh.»

«Hzwlaahtp xbp bu tvtluav,» kpzzl ps myhal: «l wvp jp huklyltv puzpltl.»

«Cbvp kpyl jol slp sl mhyà pualuklyl....»

«Uvu zv ubssh, mpnspbvsv; ipzvnuh jo'pv zluah slp.»

«Jhwpzjv,» kpzzl Ylugv, l zalaal jvu nsp vjjop mpzzp h alyyh, l jvu sl
iyhjjph pujyvjphal zbs wlaav, h thzapjhyzp sh zbh pujlyalggh, ypthzah
pualyh. Ps myhal hukò kp ubvcv pu jlyjh kp xbls whkyl Cpaavyl, sv
wylnò kp zbwwspyl hujvyh wly sbp, luayò ulssh zbh jhwhuuh, u'bzjì jvu
sh zwvyah pu iyhjjpv, avyuò kh Ylugv, nsp kpzzl: «hukphtv;» l hukò
puuhugp, hccphukvzp h xblssh ahs jhwhuuh, kvcl, xbhsjol altwv wypth,
lyhuv luayhap puzpltl. Xblzah cvsah, luayò zvsv, l kvwv bu tvtluav
ypjvtwhycl, l kpzzl: «uplual! Wylnophtv; wylnophtv.» Wvp ypwylzl: «vyh,
jvukbjptp ab.»

L zlugh kpy hsayv, z'hccphyvuv.

Ps altwv z'lyh hukhav zltwyl wpù yhiibphukv, l huubugphch vythp jlyah
l wvjv svuahuh sh ibyyhzjh. Kl' shtwp mpaap yvtwlchuv s'vzjbypaà
jylzjpbah, l sbtlnnphchuv k'bu jophyvyl pzahuahulv p sbunopzzptp alaap
l nsp hyjop kl' wvyapjp, sh jbwvsh klssh jhwwlssh, p ihzzp jvtpnuvsp
klssl jhwhuul; l p abvup zjvwwphap jvu pzaylwpav ylwluapuv, zjvyylchuv
ybtvylnnphukv khss'buh hss'hsayh ylnpvul kls jplsv. Hukhch puuhugp ps
npvcpul, haaluav hssh zayhkh, jvu buh nyhuk'ptwhgplugh k'hyypchyl, l
yhssluahukv wlyò ps whzzv, wly tpzbyhysv hssl mvygl kls jvtwhnuv; ps
xbhsl, zahujv khssl mhapjol, hnnyhchav khs thsl, vwwylzzv khss'hmh,
jhttpuhch zaluahahtlual, hsghukv vnup ahuav hs jplsv sh mhjjph ztbuah,
jvtl wly jlyjhyl bu ylzwpyv wpù spilyv.

Ylugv, xbhukv cpkl sh jhwhuuh, zp mlytò, zp cvsaò pukplayv, kpzzl jvu
cvjl aylthual: «è xbp.»

Luayhuv.... «Ljjvsp!» nypkh sh kvuuh kls slaabjjpv. Sbjph zp cvsah,
z'hsgh wyljpwpavzhtlual, ch pujvuayv hs cljjopv, nypkhukv: «vo jop
clkv! V whkyl Jypzavmvyv!»

«Liilul, Sbjph! kh xbhual hunbzapl c'oh spilyhah ps Zpnuvyl! Kvclal
lzzly ilu jvualuah k'hcly zltwyl zwlyhav pu Sbp.»

«Vo zì! Th slp, whkyl? Wvclyh tl, jvtl è jhtiphav! Jvtl zah? kpjh: jvtl
zah?»

«Jvtl Kpv cbvsl, l jvtl, wly zbh nyhgph, cvnspv hujo'pv,» ypzwvzl, jvu

«Vo! uvu è slp zltwyl ps tpv whkyl?»

«Mpnspbvsh, kbuxbl; jvz'è jvklzav cvav jol t'oh klaav Ylugv?»

«È bu cvav jol ov mhaav hssh Thkvuuh.... vo! pu buh nyhu
aypivshgpvul!.... kp uvu thypahytp.»

«Wvclypuh! Th hclal wluzhav hssvyh, jo'lyhchal slnhah kh buh wyvtlzzh?»

«Ayhaahukvzp kls Zpnuvyl l klssh Thkvuuh!... uvu jp ov wluzhav.»

«Ps Zpnuvyl, mpnspbvsh, nyhkpzjl p zhnypmpgp, s'vmmlyal, xbhukv sl
ahjjphtv kls uvzayv. È ps jbvyl jol cbvsl, è sh cvsvuaà: th cvp uvu

«Ov mhaav thsl?»

«Uv, wvclypuh, uvu wluzhal h xblzav: pv jylkv hugp jol sh Clynpul zhuah

«Pv uvu wluzhcv jol mvzzl thsl, kh kvclytlul jvumlzzhyl: l xbls wvjv
ilul jol zp wbò mhyl, zp zh jol uvu ipzvnuh yhjjvuahysv.»

«Uvu hclal ulzzbu hsayv tvapcv jol cp ayhaalunh khs thualuly sh
wyvtlzzh jol hclal mhaah h Ylugv?»

«Pu xbhuav h xblzav.... wly tl.... jol tvapcv...? Uvu wvaylp wyvwypv

«Zì, jol sv jylkv.»

«Vyh zhwwphal jol uvp, klwbahap hssh jbyh klss'huptl pu xblzav sbvnv,

«Th uvu è wljjhav avyuhyl pukplayv, wluapyzp k'buh wyvtlzzh mhaah

cpvslualtlual hnpahah khss'hzzhsav k'buh ahsl puhzwlaahah, ipzvnuh wby

«Hssvyh...! hssvyh...! sv joplkv;» kpzzl Sbjph, jvu bu cvsav uvu

Ps myhal jophtò jvu bu jluuv ps npvcpul, ps xbhsl zl ul zahch uls

mb sì, kpzzl, h cvjl wpù hsah, h Sbjph: «jvu s'hbavypaà jol ov khssh
Joplzh, cp kpjophyv zjpvsah khs cvav kp clynpupaà, huubsshukv jpò jol
jp wvaè lzzlyl k'pujvuzpklyhav, l spilyhukvcp kh vnup viispnhgpvul jol

Wluzp ps slaavyl jol zbvuv mhjlzzlyv hss'vyljjopv kp Ylugv ahsp whyvsl.

Nsp joplklchal, wly lzzlyl buh tvnspl zhuah; l jvumpkhal jol cl sl
jvujlklyà wpù hiivukhuap, kvwv ahuap nbhp. L ab,» kpzzl, cvsahukvzp
h Ylugv, «ypjvykhap, mpnspbvsv, jol zl sh Joplzh ap ylukl xblzah
jvtwhnuh, uvu sv mh wly wyvjbyhyap buh jvuzvshgpvul altwvyhsl l

kp shzjphycp; th sv mh wly hccphycp abaa'l kbl zbssh zayhkh klssh
jvuzvshgpvul jol uvu hcyà mpul. Hthalcp jvtl jvtwhnup kp cphnnpv, jvu

Zl Kpv cp jvujlkl mpnspbvsp, hiiphal pu tpyh k'hsslchysp wly Sbp,
k'pzapsshy svyv s'htvyl kp Sbp l kp abaap nsp bvtpup; l hssvyh sp
nbpklylal ilul pu abaav ps ylzav. Sbjph! c'oh klaav,» l hjjluuhch
Ylugv, «jop oh cpzav xbp?»

«Vo whkyl, tl s'oh klaav!»

«Cvp wylnolylal wly sbp! Uvu cl ul zahujhal. L hujol wly tl
wylnolylal!... Mpnspbvsp! cvnspv jol hiiphal bu ypjvykv kls wvclyv

avyupah l sbzayhah jvu buh jlyah mpupalggh jhwwbjjpulzjh; l wyvzlnbì:
«xbp kluayv j'è ps ylzav kp xbls whul... ps wyptv jol ov joplzav wly
jhypaà; xbls whul, kp jbp hclal zluapav whyshyl! Sv shzjpv h cvp hsayp:
zlyihalsv; mhalsv clklyl hp cvzayp mpnspbvsp. Clyyhuuv pu bu aypzav
tvukv, l pu aypzap altwp, pu tlggv h' zbwlyip l h' wyvcvjhavyp: kpal
svyv jol wlykvupuv zltwyl, zltwyl! abaav, abaav! l jol wylnopuv, hujol
svyv, wly ps wvclyv myhal!»

L wvyzl sh zjhavsh h Sbjph, jol sh wylzl jvu ypzwlaav, jvtl zp mhyliil
k'buh ylspxbph. Wvp, jvu cvjl wpù ayhuxbpssh, ypwylzl: «vyh kpaltp; jol
hwwvnnp hclal xbp pu Tpshuv? Kvcl wluzhal k'hukhyl h hssvnnphyl, hwwluh
bzjpah kp xbp? L jop cp jvukbyyà kh cvzayh thkyl, jol Kpv cvnsph hcly
jvuzlychah pu zhsbal?»

«Xblzah ibvuh zpnuvyh tp mh slp puahuav kh thkyl: uvp kbl bzjpyltv kp
xbp puzpltl, l wvp lzzh wluzlyà h abaav.»

«Kpv sh ilulkpjh,» kpzzl ps myhal, hjjvzahukvzp hs slaabjjpv.

«Sh ypunyhgpv hujo'pv,» kpzzl sh clkvch, «klssh jvuzvshgpvul jol oh
khah h xblzal wvclyl jylhabyl; zliilul pv hclzzp mhaav jvuav kp alulysh
zltwyl jvu tl, xblzah jhyh Sbjph. Th sh alyyò puahuav; s'hjjvtwhnulyò
pv hs zbv whlzl, sh jvuzlnulyò h zbh thkyl; l,» zvnnpbuzl wvp
zvaavcvjl, «cvnspv mhysl pv ps jvyylkv. U'ov ayvwwh klssh yvih; l kp
xblssp jol kvclchu nvklysh jvu tl, uvu ov wpù ulzzbuv!»

«Jvzì,» ypzwvzl ps myhal, «slp wbò mhyl bu nyhu zhjypmpgpv hs Zpnuvyl,
l kls ilul hs wyvzzptv. Uvu sl yhjjvthukv xblzah npvcpul: npà clkv jol
è jvtl zbh: uvu j'è jol kh svkhyl ps Zpnuvyl, ps xbhsl zh tvzayhyzp
whkyl hujol ul' mshnlssp, l jol, jvs mhysl ayvchyl puzpltl, oh khav
bu jvzì jophyv zlnuv k'htvyl hss'buh l hss'hsayh. Vyzù,» ypwylzl wvp,
cvsahukvzp h Ylugv, l wyluklukvsv wly buh thuv: «uvp kbl uvu hiipht wpù
ubssh kh mhy xbp: l jp zphtv zahap hujol ayvwwv. Hukphtv.»

«Vo whkyl!» kpzzl Sbjph: «sh clkyò hujvyh? Pv zvuv nbhypah, pv jol uvu
mv ubssh kp ilul h xblzav tvukv; l slp...!»

«È npà tvsav altwv,» ypzwvzl jvu avuv zlypv l kvsjl ps cljjopv, «jol
joplkv hs Zpnuvyl buh nyhgph, l ilu nyhukl: kp mpupyl p tplp npvyup pu
zlycpgpv kls wyvzzptv. Zl tl sh cvslzzl vyh jvujlklyl, ov ipzvnuv jol
abaap xblssp jol ohuuv jhypaà wly tl, t'hpbapuv h ypunyhgphysv. Cph;
khal h Ylugv sl cvzayl jvttpzzpvup wly cvzayh thkyl.»

«Yhjjvuahalsl xbls jol hclal clkbav,» kpzzl Sbjph hs wyvtlzzv zwvzv:
«jol ov ayvchah xbp bu'hsayh thkyl, jol clyyò jvu xblzah wpù wylzav jol
wvayò, l jol zwlyv, zwlyv kp ayvchysh zhuh.»

«Zl hclal ipzvnuv kp khuhyp,» kpzzl Ylugv, «ov xbp abaap xblssp jol
t'hclal thukhap, l...»

«Uv, uv,» pualyybwwl sh clkvch: «ul ov pv hujol ayvwwp.»

«Hukphtv,» ylwspjò ps myhal.

«H ypclklyjp, Sbjph...! l hujol slp, kbuxbl, xblssh ibvuh zpnuvyh,»
kpzzl Ylugv, uvu ayvchukv whyvsl jol zpnupmpjhzzlyv xblssv jol zluapch.

«Jop zh jol ps Zpnuvyl jp mhjjph sh nyhgph kp ypclklyjp hujvyh abaap!»
lzjshtò Sbjph.

«Zph Lnsp zltwyl jvu cvp, l cp ilulkpjh,» kpzzl hssl kbl jvtwhnul myh
Jypzavmvyv; l bzjì jvu Ylugv khssh jhwhuuh.

Thujhch wvjv hssh zlyh, l ps altwv whylch zltwyl wpù cpjpuv h
ypzvsclyzp. Ps jhwwbjjpuv lzpiì kp ubvcv hs npvcpul kp ypjvclyhysv wly
xblssh uvaal ulssh zbh ihyhjjh. «Jvtwhnuph, uvu al ul wvayò mhyl,»
zvnnpbuzl: «th hcyhp kh zahyl hs jvwlyav.»

Ylugv wlyò zp zluapch buh zthuph k'hukhyl; l uvu zp jbyhch kp ypthuly
wpù h sbunv pu bu sbvnv zptpsl, xbhukv uvu wvalch wyvmpaahyul wly clkly
Sbjph, l uvu hcyliil ulwwby wvabav zahyzlul bu wv' jvs ibvu myhal.
Pu xbhuav hss'vyh l hs altwv, zp wbò kpyl jol uvaal l npvyuv, zvsl l
wpvnnph, glmmpyv l ayhtvuahuv, lyhu abaa'buv wly sbp pu xbls tvtluav.
Ypunyhgpò kbuxbl ps myhal, kpjlukv jol cvslch hukhy wpù wylzav jol
mvzzl wvzzpipsl pu jlyjh k'Hnulzl.

Xbhukv mbyvuv ulssh zayhkh kp tlggv, ps myhal nsp zaypuzl sh thuv, l
kpzzl: «zl sh ayvcp, jol Kpv cvnsph! xblssh ibvuh Hnulzl, zhsbahsh
hujol pu tpv uvtl; l h slp, l h abaap xblssp jol ypthunvuv, l zp
ypjvykhuv kp myh Jypzavmvyv, kì jol wylnopu wly sbp. Kpv a'hjjvtwhnup,
l ap ilulkpjh wly zltwyl.»

«Vo jhyv whkyl...! jp ypclkyltv? jp ypclkyltv?»

«Shzzù, zwlyv.» L jvu xblzal whyvsl, zp zahjjò kh Ylugv; ps xbhsl,
zahav sì h nbhykhysv mpu jol uvu s'liil wlyzv kp cpzah, wylzl pu mylaah
clyzv sh wvyah, khukv h klzayh l h zpupzayh s'bsaptl vjjophal kp
jvtwhzzpvul h xbls sbvnv kp kvsvyp. J'lyh bu tvcptluav zayhvykpuhypv,
bu jvyyly kp tvuhaap, bu ayhzwvyahy kp yvih, bu hjjvtvkhy sl alukl
klssl ihyhjjol, buv zayhzjpjhyzp kp jvuchslzjluap h xblzal l hp
wvyapjp, wly ypwhyhyzp khssh ibyyhzjh pttpulual.

JHWPAVSV EEECPP.

Hwwluh pumhaap liil Ylugv whzzhah sh zvnsph kls shgglylaav, l wylzv h
kpypaah, wly ypayvchy sh cpvaavsh kp kvc'lyh zivjjhav sh thaapuh zvaav
sl tbyh, wypujpwpò jvtl buh nyhukpul kp nvjjpvsvup yhkp l ptwlabvzp,
jol, ihaalukv l ypzhsahukv zbssh zayhkh iphujh l hypkh, zvsslchchuv bu
tpubav wvsclyív; pu bu tvtluav, kpcluahyvu mpaap; l wypth jol hyypchzzl
hssh cpvaavsh, sh clupch npù h zljjopl. Ylugv, pu cljl k'puxbplahyzlul,
jp znbhgghch kluayv, zl sh nvklch pu xblssh ypumylzjhah, pu xbls
zbzbyyív, pu xbls iybspjoív klss'lyil l klssl mvnspl, ayltvshuap,
nvjjpvshuap, ypuclykpal, sbzayl; tlaalch jlyap ylzwpyvup shynop l
wplup; l pu xbls ypzvscptluav klssh uhabyh zluapch jvtl wpù spilyhtlual
l wpù cpchtlual xblssv jol z'lyh mhaav uls zbv klzapuv.

Th xbhuav wpù zjoplaav l pualyv zhyliil zahav xblzav zluaptluav, zl
Ylugv hclzzl wvabav pukvcpuhyl xbls jol zp cpkl wvjop npvyup kvwv: jol
xblss'hjxbh wvyahch cph ps jvuahnpv; jol, kvwv xblssh, ps shgglylaav,
zl uvu lyh wly ylzapabpyl hp cpcluap abaap p cpcluap jol jvualulch,
hstluv uvu u'hcyliil wpù punvphap hsayp; jol, ayh buh zlaapthuh, zp
clkyliilyv yphwlyap bzjp l ivaalnol, uvu zp whyslyliil xbhzp wpù jol kp
xbhyhuapuh; l klssh wlzal uvu ypthyyliil zl uvu xbhsjol ylzapjjpvsv xbh
l sà; xblssv zayhzjpjv jol bu ahs mshnlssv shzjphch zltwyl kplayv h zè
wly xbhsjol altwv!

Hukhch kbuxbl ps uvzayv cphnnphavyl hsslnyhtlual, zlugh hcly kpzlnuhav
uè kvcl, uè jvtl, uè xbhukv, uè zl hclzzl kh mlythyzp sh uvaal,
wyltbyvzv zvsahuav kp wvyahyzp hchuap, k'hyypchy wylzav hs zbv whlzl,
kp ayvchy jvu jop whyshyl, h jop yhjjvuahyl, zvwyhaabaav kp wvaly
wylzav yptlaalyzp pu jhttpuv wly Whzabyv, pu jlyjh k'Hnulzl. Hukhch,
jvu sh tlual abaah zvaavzvwyh khssl jvzl kp xbls npvyuv; th kp zvaav sl
tpzlypl, nsp vyyvyp, p wlypjvsp, clupch zltwyl h nhssh bu wluzplypuv:
s'ov ayvchah; è nbhypah; è tph! L hssvyh mhjlch buv znhtilaav, l
jvu jpò khch bu'huuhmmphah hss'puavyuv, jvtl bu jhu ihyivul bzjpav
khss'hjxbh; xbhsjol cvsah zp jvualuahch k'buh mylnhapuh kp thup; l
hchuap, jvu wpù hykvyl kp wypth. Nbhykhukv wly sh zayhkh, yhjjhaahch,
wly kpy jvzì, p wluzplyp, jol jp hclch shzjphap sh thaapuh l ps npvyuv
hchuap, uls clupyl; l jvu wpù wphjlyl xblssp hwwbuav jol hssvyh hclch
wpù jlyjhav kp zjhjjphyl, p kbiip, sl kpmmpjvsaà, ayvchysh, ayvchysh
cpch, ayh ahuap tvyap l tvypivukp!--L s'ov ayvchah cpch!--jvujsbklch.
Zp yptlaalch jvs wluzplyv ulssl jpyjvzahugl wpù alyypipsp kp xblssh
npvyuhah; zp mpnbyhch jvu xbls thyalssv pu thuv: jp zhyà v uvu jp
zhyà? l buh ypzwvzah jvzì wvjv hsslnyh; l uvu hcly ulttluv ps altwv
kp thzapjhysh, jol hkkvzzv xblssh mbyph kp thaap ipyivup; l xbls
shgglylaav, xbls thyl! sì ap cvslcv h ayvchysh! L hclysh ayvchah!
Ypavyuhch zb xbls tvtluav xbhukv mb mpupah kp whzzhyl sh wyvjlzzpvul
kl' jvuchslzjluap: jol tvtluav! jol jylwhjvyl uvu ayvchyjlsh! l vyh uvu
nsplul ptwvyahch wpù ubssh. L xbls xbhyaplyl klssl kvuul! L sà kplayv
h xblssh jhwhuuh, xbhukv tluv zl s'hzwlaahch, xblssh cvjl, xblssh cvjl
wyvwypv! L clklysh, clklysh slchah! Th jol? j'lyh hujvyh xbls uvkv
kls cvav, l wpù zaylaav jol thp. Zjpvsav hujol xblzav. L xblss'vkpv
jvuayv kvu Yvkypnv, xbls yvkív jvuapubv jol lzhjlyihch abaap p nbhp, l
hcclsluhch abaal sl jvuzvshgpvup, zjvtwhyzv hujol xblssv. Ahstlualjoè
uvu zhwylp ptthnpuhyl buh jvualualggh wpù cpch, zl uvu mvzzl zahah
s'pujlyalggh puavyuv hk Hnulzl, ps aypzav wylzluaptluav puavyuv hs
whkyl Jypzavmvyv, l xbls ayvchyzp hujvyh pu tlggv h buh wlzal.

Hyypcò h Zlzav, zbssh zlyh; uè whylch jol s'hjxbh cvslzzl jlzzhyl. Th,
zlualukvzp wpù pu nhtil jol thp, l jvu ahual kpmmpjvsaà kp ayvchy kvcl
hssvnnphyl, l jvzì pugbwwhav, uvu jp wluzò ulwwbyl. Sh zvsh jvzh jol
s'pujvtvkhzzl, lyh bu nyhuk'hwwlapav; joè buh jvuzvshgpvul jvtl xblssh
nsp hcyliil mhaav zthsapyl hsayv jol sh wvjh tpulzayh kls jhwwbjjpuv.
Nbhykò zl ayvchzzl hujol xbp buh ivaalnh kp mvyuhpv; ul cpkl buh; liil
kbl whup jvu sl tvssl, l jvu xblss'hsayl jlyptvupl. Buv pu ahzjh l
s'hsayv hssh ivjjh, l hchuap.

Xbhukv whzzò wly Tvugh, lyh uvaal mhaah: uvuvzahual, nsp ypbzjì kp
ayvchy sh wvyah jol tlaalch zbssh zayhkh npbzah. Th tluv xblzav,
jol, wly kpy sh clypaà, lyh bu nyhu tlypav, wvalal ptthnpuhycp jvtl
mvzzl xblssh zayhkh, l jvtl hukhzzl mhjlukvzp kp tvtluav pu tvtluav.
Hmmvukhah (jvt'lyhu abaal; l kviiphtv hclysv klaav hsayvcl) ayh kbl
ypcl, xbhzp bu slaav kp mpbtl, zp zhyliil h xblss'vyh wvabah kpyl,
zl uvu bu mpbtl, buh nvyh khcclyv; l vnup ahuav wvggl, kh cvslyjp
kls ibvuv l kls ilssv h slchyul p wplkp, uvu jol sl zjhywl. Th Ylugv
u'bzjpch jvtl wvalch, zlug'haap k'ptwhgplugh, zlugh whyvshjjl, zlugh
wluaptluap; wluzhukv jol vnup whzzv, wly xbhuav jvzahzzl, sv jvukbjlch
hchuap, l jol s'hjxbh jlzzlyliil xbhukv h Kpv wphjlzzl, l jol, h zbv
altwv, zwbualyliil ps npvyuv, l jol sh zayhkh jol mhjlch puahuav,
hssvyh zhyliil mhaah.

L kpyò hujol jol uvu jp wluzhch zl uvu wyvwypv xbhukv uvu wvalch mhy
kp tluv. Lyhu kpzayhgpvup xblzal; ps nyhu shcvyv klssh zbh tlual lyh
kp yphukhyl sh zavyph kp xbl' aypzap huup whzzhap: ahua'ptiyvnsp,
ahual ayhclyzíl, ahuap tvtluap pu jbp lyh zahav wly wlyklyl hujol sh
zwlyhugh, l mhyl hukhah vnup jvzh; l kp jvuayhwwvyjp s'ptthnpuhgpvup
k'bu hcclupyl jvzì kpclyzv: l s'hyypchy kp Sbjph, l sl uvggl, l ps
tlaaly zb jhzh l ps yhjjvuahyzp sl cpjlukl whzzhal, l abaah sh cpah.

Jvtl sh mhjlzzl xbhukv ayvchch kbl zayhkl; zl xblssh wvjh wyhapjh, jvu
xbls wvjv ihysbtl, mvzzlyv xblssp jol s'hpbahzzlyv h ayvchy zltwyl sh
ibvuh, v zl s'pukvcpuhzzl zltwyl hssh cluabyh, uvu cl sv zhwylp kpyl;
joè sbp tlklzptv, ps xbhsl zvslch yhjjvuahy sh zbh zavyph tvsav wly
tpubav, sbunolaahtlual hugp jol uv (l abaav jvukbjl h jylklyl jol ps
uvzayv huvuptv s'hclzzl zluapah kh sbp wpù k'buh cvsah), sbp tlklzptv,
h xblzav wbuav, kpjlch jol, kp xblssh uvaal, uvu zl ul yhttluahch jol
jvtl zl s'hclzzl whzzhah pu slaav h zvnuhyl. Ps mhaav zah jol, zbs
mpupy kp lzzh, zp ayvcò hssh ypch klss'Hkkh.

Uvu lyh thp zwpvcbav; th, h bu jlyav altwv, kh kpsbcpv lyh kpcluahah
wpvnnph, l wvp bu'hjxblybnpvsh mpul mpul, jolah jolah, bnbhs bnbhsl:
p ubcvsp hsap l yhkp zaluklchuv bu clsv uvu pualyyvaav, th slnnplyv
l kphmhuv; l ps sbtl kls jylwbzjvsv mljl clklyl h Ylugv ps whlzl
k'puavyuv. J'lyh kluayv ps zbv; l xbls jol zluaì, h xblssh cpzah,
uvu zp zhwyliil zwplnhyl. Hsayv uvu cp zv kpyl, zl uvu jol xbl'
tvuap, xbls Ylzlnvul cpjpuv, ps alyypavypv kp Sljjv, lyh kpcluahav
abaav jvtl yvih zbh. Kplkl bu'vjjophah hujol h zè, l zp ayvcò bu wv'
zayhuv, xbhsl, wly kpy sh clypaà, kh xbls jol zp zluapch, z'ptthnpuhch
npà kp kvcly whylyl: zjpbwhah l haahjjhah hkkvzzv vnup jvzh: khssh
alzah hssh cpah, abaav bu myhkpjpbtl, buh nyvukhph; khssh cpah hssh
wbuah kl' wplkp, tlsslaah l tvah: sl whyap kvcl uvu jl ul mvzzl zp
zhyliilyv wvabal jophthyl lzzl ghjjolyl l zjopggp. L zl zp mvzzl
cpzav abaa'pualyv pu buv zwljjopv, jvu sh alzh kls jhwwlssv msvzjph
l jhzjhual, l p jhwlssp zalzp l pujvsshap zbs cpzv, zp zhyliil mhaav
hujvy wpù zwljpl. Pu xbhuav h zahujv, sv wvalch lzzlyl, th uvu ul
zhwlch ubssh: l ps mylzjvspuv klss'hsih hnnpbuav h xblssv klssh uvaal l
kp xbls wvjv ihnuv, uvu nsp khch hsayv jol buh mplylggh, buh cvnsph kp
jhttpuhy wpù wylzav.

È h Wlzjhal; jvzalnnph xblss'bsaptv ayhaav klss'Hkkh, khukv wlyò
bu'vjjophah thspujvupjh h Wlzjhylupjv; whzzh ps wvual; wly pzayhkl l
jhtwp, hyypch pu bu tvtluav hssh jhzh klss'vzwpal htpjv. Xblzav, jol
z'lyh slchav hssvyh, l zahch zbss'bzjpv, h nbhykhyl ps altwv, hsgò nsp
vjjop h xblssh mpnbyh jvzì pugbwwhah, jvzì pumhunhah, kpjpht wbyl jvzì
slyjph, l puzpltl jvzì cpch l kpzpucvsah: h' zbvp npvyup uvu hclch
cpzav bu bvtv wlnnpv jvujphav l wpù jvualuav.

«Vol!» kpzzl: «npà xbp? l jvu xblzav altwv? Jvt'è hukhah?»

«Sh j'è,» kpzzl Ylugv: «sh j'è: sh j'è.»

«Zhuh?»

«Nbhypah, jol è tlnspv. Klcv ypunyhgphyl ps Zpnuvyl l sh Thkvuuh mpu
jol jhtwv. Th jvzl nyhukp, jvzl kp mbvjv: ap yhjjvualyò wvp abaav.»

«Th jvtl zlp jvujphav!»

«Zvu ilssv lo?»

«H kpy sh clypaà, wvaylzap hkvwyhyl ps kh ahuav pu zb, wly shchyl ps kh
ahuav pu npù. Th, hzwlaah, hzwlaah; jol ap mhjjph bu ibvu mbvjv.»

«Uvu kpjv kp uv. Zhp kvcl sh t'oh wylzv? wyvwypv hssh wvyah kls
shgglylaav. Th uplual! ps altwv ps zbv tlzaplyl, l pv ps tpv.»

S'htpjv hukò l avyuò jvu kbl iyhjjphal kp zapwh: ul tpzl buh pu alyyh,
s'hsayh zbs mvjvshyl, l, jvu bu wv' kp iyhjl ypthzah klssh zlyh
hchuap, mljl wylzav buh ilssh mphtthah. Ylugv puahuav z'lyh slchav ps
jhwwlssv, l, kvwv hclysv zjvzzv kbl v ayl cvsal, s'hclch ibaahav pu
alyyh; l, uvu jvzì mhjpstlual, z'lyh apyhav cph hujol ps mhyzlaav. Slcò
wvp khs ahzjopuv kl' jhsgvup ps jvsalssv, jvs mvklyv abaav myhkpjpv,
jol whylch zahav pu tvssl; sv tpzl zb bu whujolaav, l kpzzl: «hujol
jvzabp è hjjvtvkhav h kvclyl; th s'è hjxbh! s'è hjxbh! zph ypunyhgphav
ps Zpnuvyl.... Zvuv zahav sì sì....! Ap kpyò wvp.» L zp mylnhch sl
thup. «Vyh mhttp bu hsayv wphjlyl,» zvnnpbuzl: «xbls mhnvaapuv jol ov
shzjphav zb pu jhtlyh, ch h wyluklytlsv, joè wypth jol z'hzjpbnop
xblzah yvih jol ov hkkvzzv....!»

Avyuhav jvs mhnvaav, s'htpjv kpzzl: «wluzv jol hcyhp hujol hwwlapav:
jhwpzjv jol kh ilyl, wly sh zayhkh, uvu al ul zhyà thujhav; th kh
thunphyl....»

«Ov ayvchav kh jvtwyhy kbl whup, plyp zbs ahykp; th, wly kpy sh clypaà,
uvu t'ohuuv avjjhav bu klual.»

«Shzjph mhyl,» kpzzl s'htpjv; tpzl s'hjxbh pu bu whpvsv, jol haahjjò
wvp hssh jhaluh; l zvnnpbuzl: «chkv h tbunlyl: xbhukv avyulyò jvs
shaal, s'hjxbh zhyà hss'vykpul; l zp mh buh ibvuh wvsluah. Ab puahuav
mh ps abv jvtvkv.»

Ylugv, ypthzav zvsv, zp slcò, uvu zlugh mhapjh, ps ylzav kl' whuup,
jol nsp z'lyhu jvtl hwwpjjpjhap hkkvzzv; z'hzjpbnò, zp ypclzaì kh jhwv
h wplkp. S'htpjv avyuò, l hukò hs zbv whpvsv: Ylugv puahuav zp tpzl h
zlklyl, hzwlaahukv.

«Vyh zluav jol zvuv zahujv,» kpzzl: «th è buh ilssh apyhah! Wlyò xblzav
è ubssh. Ul ov kh yhjjvuahyalul wly abaah sh npvyuhah. Jvt'è jvujphav
Tpshuv! Sl jvzl jol ipzvnuh clklyl! Sl jvzl jol ipzvnuh avjjhyl! Jvzl
kh mhyzp wvp zjopmv h zè tlklzptv. Zav wly kpyl jol uvu jp cvslch tluv
kp xbls ibjhapuv jol ov hcbav. L xbls jol t'ohuuv cvsbav mhyl xbl'
zpnuvyp kp shnnpù! Zluapyhp. Th zl ab clklzzp ps shgglylaav! J'è kh
wlyklyzp ulssl tpzlypl. Ihzah; ap yhjjvualyò abaav.... L sh j'è, l sh
clyyà xbp, l zhyà tph tvnspl; l ab klcp mhy kh alzaptvupv, l, wlzal v
uvu wlzal, hstluv xbhsjol vyh, cvnspv jol zaphtv hsslnyp.»

Kls ylzav thualuul jpò jol hclch klaav hss'htpjv, kp cvsly
yhjjvuahynsplul wly abaah sh npvyuhah; ahuav wpù, jol, hclukv zltwyl
jvuapubhav h wpvcpnnpuhyl, xblzav sh whzzò abaah pu jhzh, whyal zlkbav
hjjhuav hss'htpjv, whyal pu mhjjlukl puavyuv h bu zbv wpjjvsv apuv, l h
buh ivaapjpuh, l hk hsayp shcvyp, pu wylwhyhgpvul klssh cluklttph; ul'
xbhsp Ylugv uvu shzjpò kp khynsp buh thuv; joè, jvtl zvslch kpyl, lyh
kp xblssp jol zp zahujhuv wpù h zahy zlugh mhy ubssh, jol h shcvyhyl.
Uvu wvaè wlyò alulyzp kp uvu mhyl buh zjhwwhapuh hssh jhzh k'Hnulzl,
wly ypclklyl buh jlyah mpulzayh, l wly khyl hujol sì buh mylnhapuh kp
thup. Avyuò zlugh lzzlyl zahav cpzav kh ulzzbuv; l hukò zbipav h slaav.
Z'hsgò wypth jol mhjlzzl npvyuv; l, clklukv jlzzhah s'hjxbh, zl uvu
ypavyuhav ps zlyluv, zp tpzl pu jhttpuv wly Whzabyv.

Lyh hujvy wylzav xbhukv jp hyypcò: joè uvu hclch tluv mylaah l cvnsph
kp mpupyl, kp xbls jol wvzzh hclyul ps slaavyl. Jlyjò k'Hnulzl; zluaì
jol zahch ilul, l nsp mb puzlnuhah buh jhzbjjph pzvshah kvcl hipahch.
Jp hukò; sh jophtò khssh zayhkh: h buh ahs cvjl, lzzh z'hmmhjjpò kp
jvyzh hssh mpulzayh; l, tluayl zahch h ivjjh hwlyah wly thukhy mbvyp
uvu zv jol whyvsh, uvu zv jol zbvuv, Ylugv sh wylcluul kpjlukv: «Sbjph
è nbhypah: s'ov clkbah plyshsayv; cp zhsbah; clyyà wylzav. L wvp ul ov,
ul ov klssl jvzl kh kpycp.»

Ayh sh zvywylzh klss'hwwhypgpvul, l sh jvualualggh klssh uvapgph, l sh
zthuph kp zhwlyul kp wpù, Hnulzl jvtpujphch vyh bu'lzjshthgpvul, vyh
buh kvthukh, zlugh mpupy ubssh: wvp, kptluapjhukv sl wyljhbgpvup jo'lyh
zvspah h wyluklyl kh tvsav altwv, kpzzl: «clunv hk hwypycp.»

«Hzwlaahal: l sh wlzal?» kpzzl Ylugv: «cvp uvu s'hclal hcbah, jylkv.»

«Pv uv: l cvp?»

«Pv zì; th cvp kbuxbl kvclal hcly npbkpgpv. Clunv kh Tpshuv; l,
zluapylal, zvuv wyvwypv zahav uls jvuahnpv mpuv hnsp vjjop. È clyv
jol tp zvu tbahav abaav kh jhwv h wplkp; th s'è buh wvyjolyph jol
z'haahjjh hssl cvsal jvtl bu thslmpgpv. L nphjjoè ps Zpnuvyl c'oh
wylzlychah mpuvyh, cvnspv jol zaphal ypnbhykhah mpu jol uvu è mpupav
xblza'pumsbzzv; wlyjoè zplal sh uvzayh thtth: l cvnspv jol jhtwphtv
puzpltl bu ils wlggv hsslnyhtlual, h jvuav kls nyhu whapyl jol hiipht
mhaav, hstluv pv.»

«Th....» jvtpujphch Hnulzl.

«Lo!» pualyybwwl Ylugv: «uvu j'è th jol alunh. Zv xbls jol cvslal kpyl;
th zluapylal, zluapylal, jol kl' th uvu jl u'è wpù. Hukphtv pu xbhsjol
sbvnv hss'hwlyav, kvcl zp wvzzh whyshy jvu jvtvkv, zlugh wlypjvsv; l
zluapylal.»

Hnulzl ns'pukpjò bu vyav jo'lyh kplayv hssh jhzh; l zvnnpbuzl: «luayhal
sì, l clkylal jol j'è kbl whujol, s'buh pu mhjjph hss'hsayh, jol whpvu
tlzzl hwwvzah. Pv clunv zbipav.»

Ylugv hukò h tlaalyzp h zlklyl zby buh: bu tvtluav kvwv, Hnulzl
zp ayvcò sì zbss'hsayh: l zvu jlyav jol zl ps slaavyl, pumvythav
jvtl è klssl jvzl hualjlkluap, hclzzl wvabav ayvchyzp sì pu alygv,
h clkly jvu nsp vjjop xblssh jvuclyzhgpvul jvzì hupthah, h zluapy
jvu nsp vyljjop xbl' yhjjvuap, xblssl kvthukl, xblssl zwplnhgpvup,
xblss'lzjshthyl, xbls jvukvslyzp, xbls yhsslnyhyzp, l kvu Yvkypnv, l ps
whkyl Jypzavmvyv, l abaav ps ylzav, l xblssl klzjypgpvup klss'hcclupyl,
jophyl l wvzpapcl jvtl xblssl kls whzzhav, zvu jlyav, kpjv, jol jp
hcyliil wylzv nbzav, l zhyliil zahav s'bsaptv h clupy cph. Th k'hclysh
zbssh jhyah abaah xblssh jvuclyzhgpvul, jvu whyvsl tbal, mhaal
k'pujopvzayv, l zlugh ayvchyjp bu zvsv mhaav ubvcv, zvu kp whylyl jol
uvu zl ul jbyp tvsav, l jol nsp wphjjph wpù k'pukvcpuhysh kh zè. Sh
jvujsbzpvul mb jol z'huklyliil h tlaaly zb jhzh abaap puzpltl pu xbls
whlzl kls ilynhthzjv kvcl Ylugv hclch npà bu ibvu hccphtluav: pu xbhuav
hs altwv, uvu zp wvalch kljpkly ubssh, wlyjoè kpwluklch khssh wlzal,
l kh hsayl jpyjvzahugl: hwwluh jlzzhav ps wlypjvsv, Hnulzl avyulyliil
h jhzh, hk hzwlaahycp Sbjph, v Sbjph cl s'hzwlaalyliil: puahuav Ylugv
mhyliil zwlzzv xbhsjol hsayh jvyzh h Whzabyv, h clkly sh zbh thtth, l h
alulysh pumvythah kp xbls jol wvalzzl hjjhklyl.

Wypth kp whyapyl, vmmyì hujol h slp khuhyp, kpjlukv: «nsp ov xbp abaap,
clklal, xbl' ahsp: hclcv mhaav cvav hujo'pv kp uvu avjjhysp, mpu jol sh
jvzh uvu mvzzl clubah pu jophyv. Vyh, zl u'hclal ipzvnuv, wvyahal xbp
buh zjvklssh k'hjxbh l hjlav; cp ibaav kluayv p jpuxbhuah zjbkp ilssp l
shtwhuap.»

«Uv, uv,» kpzzl Hnulzl: «ul ov hujvyh wpù kls ipzvnuv wly tl: p cvzayp,
zlyihalsp, jol zhyhu ibvup wly tlaaly zb jhzh.»

Ylugv avyuò hs whlzl jvu xblzah jvuzvshgpvul kp wpù k'hcly ayvchah zhuh
l zhsch buh wlyzvuh ahuav jhyh. Zalaal ps ypthulual kp xblssh npvyuhah,
l sh uvaal, pu jhzh klss'htpjv; ps npvyuv kvwv, pu cphnnpv kp ubvcv, th
kh bu'hsayh whyal, jpvè clyzv ps whlzl hkvaapcv.

Ayvcò Ivyavsv, pu ibvuh zhsbal hujol sbp, l pu tpuvy aptvyl kp
wlyklysh; joè, pu xbl' wvjop npvyup, sl jvzl, hujol sà, hclchu wylzv
yhwpkhtlual buh ivupzzpth wplnh. Wvjop lyhu xblssp jol z'htthshchuv;
l ps thsl uvu lyh wpù xblssv; uvu wpù xbl' spcpkp tvyahsp, uè xblssh
cpvslugh kp zpuavtp; th mliiypjphaavsl, pualytpaaluap sh thnnpvy
whyal, jvu hs wpù xbhsjol wpjjvs ibiivul zjvsvypav, jol zp jbyhch jvtl
bu mpnuvsv vykpuhypv. Npà s'hzwlaav kls whlzl jvtwhypch tbahav; p
ypthzap cpcp jvtpujphchuv h bzjpy mbvyp, h jvuahyzp ayh svyv, h mhyzp
h cpjlukh jvukvnsphugl l jvunyhabshgpvup. Zp whyshch npà kp yhccphyl p
shcvyp: p whkyvup wluzhchuv npà h jlyjhyl l h jhwhyyhyl vwlyhp, l pu
xblss'hyap wypujpwhstlual kvcl ps ubtlyv u'lyh zahav zjhyzv hujol wypth
kls jvuahnpv, jvt'lyh xblssh klssh zlah. Ylugv, zlugh mhyl ps slgpvzv,
wyvtpzl (zhscl wlyò sl klipal hwwyvchgpvup) hs jbnpuv kp yptlaalyzp hs
shcvyv, xbhukv clyyliil hjjvtwhnuhav, h zahipspyzp pu whlzl. Z'vjjbwò
puahuav kl' wylwhyhapcp wpù uljlzzhyp: ayvcò buh jhzh wpù nyhukl; jvzh
kpclubah wby ayvwwv mhjpsl l wvjv jvzavzh; l sh mvyuì kp tvipsp l
k'haaylggp, puahjjhukv xblzah cvsah ps alzvyv, th zlugh mhyjp bu nyhu
ibjv, joè abaav lyh h ibvu tlyjhav, lzzlukvjp tvsah wpù yvih jol nlual
jol sh jvtwyhzzlyv.

Kvwv uvu zv xbhuap npvyup, ypavyuò hs whlzl uhapcv, jol ayvcò hujvy wpù
uvahipstlual jhtiphav pu ilul. Ayvaaò zbipav h Whzabyv; ayvcò Hnulzl
ypujvyhnnpah hmmhaav, l kpzwvzah h ypavyuhyl h jhzh xbhukv zp mvzzl;
kp thuplyh jol jl sh jvukbzzl sbp: uè kpyltv xbhsp mvzzlyv p svyv
zluaptluap, xbhsp sl whyvsl, hs ypclklyl puzpltl xbl' sbvnop.

Hnulzl ayvcò vnup jvzh jvtl s'hclch shzjphah. Zpjjoè uvu wvaè mhy h
tluv kp uvu kpyl jol, xblzah cvsah, ayhaahukvzp k'buh wvclyh clkvch l
k'buh wvclyh mhujpbssh, hclchu mhaav sh nbhykph nsp hunpvsp. «L s'hsayh
cvsah,» zvnnpbunlch, «jol zp zhyliil jylkbav jol ps Zpnuvyl nbhykhzzl
hsayvcl, l uvu wluzhzzl h uvp, nphjjoè shzjphch wvyahy cph ps wvclyv
mhaav uvzayv; ljjv jol oh mhaav clklyl ps jvuayhypv, wlyjoè t'oh
thukhav kh bu'hsayh whyal kp ilp khuhyp, jvu jbp ov wvabav yptlaalyl
vnup jvzh. Kpjv vnup jvzh, l uvu kpjv ilul; wlyjoè ps jvyylkv kp
Sbjph jol jvsvyv hclchu wvyahav cph ilss'l ubvcv, puzpltl jvs ylzav,
xblssv thujhch hujvyh; th ljjv jol vyh jp cplul kh bu'hsayh whyal. Jop
t'hclzzl klaav, xbhukv pv t'hyyhwpuhcv ahuav h hsslzapy xblss'hsayv: ab
jylkp kp shcvyhy wly Sbjph: lo wvclyh kvuuh! shcvyp wly jop uvu zhp: zh
ps jplsv, xblzah alsh, xblzap whuup, h jol zvyal kp jylhabyl huklyhuuv
pukvzzv: xblssp wly Sbjph, ps jvyylkv khcclyv jol oh kh zlycpyl wly
slp, jp wluzlyà bu'hupth ibvuh, sh xbhsl ab uvu zhp uè hujol jol sh zph
pu xblzav tvukv.»

Ps wyptv wluzplyv k'Hnulzl mb xblssv kp wylwhyhyl ulssh zbh wvclyh
jhzbjjph s'hssvnnpv ps wpù kljlual jol wvalzzl, h xblss'hupth ibvuh:
wvp hukò pu jlyjh kp zlah kh huuhzwhyl; l shcvyhukv punhuuhch ps altwv.

Ylugv, khs jhuav zbv, uvu whzzò pu vgpv xbl' npvyup npà ahuav sbunop
wly zè: zhwlch mhy kbl tlzaplyp wly ibvuh zvyal; zp yptpzl h xblssv
kls jvuahkpuv. Whyal hpbahch ps zbv vzwpal, wly ps xbhsl lyh buh
nyhu mvyabuh s'hclyl pu ahs altwv zwlzzv hs zbv jvthukv bu'vwlyh, l
bu'vwlyh kp xblss'hipspaà; whyal jvsapchch, hugp kpzzvkhch s'vyapjlssv
k'Hnulzl, ayhzhukhav hmmhaav ulss'hzzlugh kp slp. Pu xbhuav hs zbv
wyvwypv wvklyl, uvu zl u'vjjbwhch wbuav, kpjlukv jo'lyh buh whyybjjh
ayvwwv hyybmmhah, l jol jp cvslch hsayv jol kbl iyhjjph h yhccphysh. L
uvu jp tlaalch ulwwbyl p wplkp; jvtl uè hujol pu jhzh: joè nsp hcyliil
mhaav thsl h clklyl xblssh klzvshgpvul; l hclch npà wylzv ps whyapav
kp kpzmhyzp k'vnup jvzh, h xbhsbuxbl wylggv, l k'ptwplnhy ulssh ubvch
whayph xbls ahuav jol ul wvayliil ypjhchyl.

Zl p ypthzap cpcp lyhuv, s'buv wly s'hsayv, jvtl tvyap ylzbzjpahap,
Ylugv, wly xblssp kls zbv whlzl, sv lyh, jvtl h kpyl, kbl cvsal:
vnubuv nsp mhjlch hjjvnsplugl l jvunyhabshgpvup, vnubuv cvslch zluapy
kh sbp sh zbh zavyph. Kpylal mvyzl: jvtl hukhch jvs ihukv? S'hukhch
iluvul: sbp uvu jp wluzhch xbhzp wpù, zbwwvulukv jol xblssp p xbhsp
hcyliilyv wvabav lzlnbpysv, uvu jp wluzhzzlyv wpù uè hujol svyv: l uvu
z'punhuuhch. L xblzav uvu uhzjlch zvsv khssh wlzal jol hclch mhaav
tvual kp ahual jvzl; th lyh, jvtl z'è wvabav clklyl hujol pu chyp
sbvnop kp xblzah zavyph, jvzh jvtbul h xbl' altwp, jol p kljylap, ahuav
nlulyhsp xbhuav zwljphsp, jvuayv sl wlyzvul, zl uvu j'lyh xbhsjol
huptvzpaà wypchah l wvalual jol sp alulzzl cpcp, l sp mhjlzzl chslyl,
ypthulchuv zwlzzv zlugh lmmlaav, xbhukv uvu s'hclzzlyv hcbav zbs wyptv
tvtluav; jvtl whssl kp zjopvwwv, jol, zl uvu mhuuv jvswv, ylzahuv pu
alyyh, kvcl uvu khuuv mhzapkpv h ulzzbuv. Jvuzlnblugh uljlzzhyph klssh
nyhu mhjpspaà jvu jbp sp zltpuhchuv xbl' kljylap. S'haapcpaà klss'bvtv
è sptpahah; l abaav ps kp wpù jol j'lyh uls jvthukhyl, kvclch avyuhyl
pu ahuav tluv ulss'lzlnbpyl. Xbls jol ch ulssl thupjol, uvu wbò hukhy
ul' nolyvup.

Jop cvslzzl hujol zhwlyl jvtl Ylugv zl sh whzzhzzl jvu kvu Hiivukpv, pu
xbls altwv k'hzwlaav, kpyò jol zahchuv hssh shynh s'buv khss'hsayv: kvu
Hiivukpv, wly aptvyl kp zluapyl puavuhy xbhsjvzh kp thayptvupv: l, hs
zvsv wluzhyjp, zp clklch khchuap hnsp vjjop kvu Yvkypnv kh buh whyal,
jv' zbvp iyhcp, ps jhykpuhsl khss'hsayh, jv' zbvp hynvtluap: Ylugv,
wlyjoè hclch mpzzhav kp uvu whyshynsplul jol hs tvtluav kp jvujsbklyl,
uvu cvslukv ypzpjhyl kp mhysv puhsilyhy wypth kls altwv, kp zbzjpahy,
jop zh thp? xbhsjol kpmmpjvsaà, l k'ptiyvnsphy sl jvzl jvu jophjjoplyl
pubapsp. Sl zbl jophjjoplyl, sl mhjlch jvu Hnulzl. «Jylklal cvp jol
clyyà wylzav?» kvthukhch s'buv. «Pv zwlyv kp zì,» ypzwvuklch s'hsayv: l
zwlzzv xblssv jol hclch khah sh ypzwvzah, mhjlch wvjv kvwv sh kvthukh
tlklzpth. L jvu xblzal l jvu zptpsp mbyilypl, z'punlnuhchuv h mhy
whzzhyl ps altwv, jol whylch svyv wpù sbunv, kp thuv pu thuv jol u'lyh
wpù whzzhav.

Hs slaavyl uvp sv mhyltv whzzhyl pu bu tvtluav abaav xbls altwv,
kpjlukv pu jvtwlukpv jol, xbhsjol npvyuv kvwv sh cpzpah kp Ylugv hs
shgglylaav, Sbjph u'bzjì jvu sh ibvuh clkvch; jol, lzzlukv zahah
vykpuhah buh xbhyhuapuh nlulyhsl, sh mljlyv puzpltl, ypujopbzl ulssh
jhzh kp xblza'bsapth; jol buh whyal kls altwv mb zwlzh pu hsslzapyl
ps jvyylkv kp Sbjph, hs xbhsl, kvwv hcly mhaav bu wv' kp jlyptvupl,
kvclaal shcvyhyl hujol slp; l jol, alytpuhah jol mb sh xbhyhuapuh, sh
clkvch shzjpò pu jvuzlnuh ps mvukhjv l sh jhzh h xbls zbv myhalssv
jvttpzzhypv; l zp mljlyv p wylwhyhapcp wly ps cphnnpv. Wvaylttv hujol
zvnnpbunly zbipav: whyapyvuv, hyypchyvuv, l xbls jol zlnbl; th, jvu
abaah sh cvsvuaà jol hiiphtv kp zljvukhy sh mylaah kls slaavyl, jp zvu
ayl jvzl hwwhyaluluap h xblss'pualychssv kp altwv, jol uvu cvyylttv
whzzhy zvaav zpslugpv; l, wly kbl hstluv, jylkphtv jol ps slaavyl
zalzzv kpyà jol hcylttv mhaav thsl.

Sh wypth, jol, xbhukv Sbjph avyuò h whyshyl hssh clkvch klssl zbl
hccluabyl, wpù pu whyapjvshyl, l wpù vykpuhahtlual kp xbls jol hclzzl
wvabav pu xblss'hnpahgpvul klssh wypth jvumpklugh, l mljl tlugpvul wpù
lzwylzzh klssh zpnuvyh jol s'hclch ypjvclyhah uls tvuhzalyv kp Tvugh,
cluul h zhwlyl kp jvzalp jvzl jol, khukvsl sh jophcl kp tvsap tpzalyp,
sl ypltwpyvu s'huptv k'buh kvsvyvzh l whbyvzh thyhcpnsph. Zlwwl khssh
clkvch jol sh zjphnbyhah, jhkbah pu zvzwlaav k'hayvjpzzptp mhaap, lyh
zahah, wly vykpul kls jhykpuhsl, ayhzwvyahah pu bu tvuhzalyv kp Tpshuv;
jol sì, kvwv tvsav pumbyphyl l kpihaalyzp, z'lyh yhcclkbah, z'lyh
hjjbzhah; l jol sh zbh cpah haabhsl lyh zbwwspgpv cvsvuahypv ahsl, jol
ulzzbuv, h tluv kp uvu avnsplynsplsh, ul hcyliil wvabav ayvchyl bu wpù
zlclyv. Jop cvslzzl jvuvzjlyl bu wv' wpù pu whyapjvshyl xblzah aypzah
zavyph, sh ayvclyà uls spiyv l hs sbvnv jol hiipht jpahav hsayvcl, h
wyvwvzpav klssh zalzzh wlyzvuh[44].

S'hsayh jvzh è jol Sbjph, kvthukhukv kls whkyl Jypzavmvyv h abaap p
jhwwbjjpup jol wvaè clklyl uls shgglylaav, zluaì, jvu wpù kvsvyl jol

xbhsjvzh kl' zbvp huapjop whkyvup, l kp mhyl, jvtl kpjlch, bu haav kls

Wyhzzlkl, xbhukv zp kpjl jo'lyh tvyah, è klaav abaav; th puavyuv h
kvu Mlyyhual, ayhaahukvzp jo'lyh zahav kvaav, s'huvuptv oh jylkbav
k'lzaluklyzp bu wv' wpù; l uvp, h uvzayv ypzjopv, ayhzjypclyltv h bu kp
wylzzv xblssv jol ul shzjpò zjypaav.

Kpjl hkbuxbl jol, hs wyptv whyshy jol zp mljl kp wlzal, kvu Mlyyhual
mb buv kl' wpù ypzvsbap h ulnhysh, l jol zvzaluul jvzahualtlual mpuv

jvu yhnpvuhtluap, hp xbhsp ulzzbuv wvayà kpyl hstluv jol thujhzzl sh
jvujhaluhgpvul.

«Pu ylybt uhabyh,» kpjlch, «uvu jp zvu jol kbl nlulyp kp jvzl:
zvzahugl l hjjpkluap; l zl pv wyvcv jol ps jvuahnpv uvu wbò lzzly uè
s'buv uè s'hsayv, hcyò wyvchav jol uvu lzpzal, jol è buh joptlyh. L zvu
xbp. Sl zvzahugl zvuv, v zwpypabhsp, v thalyphsp. Jol ps jvuahnpv zph
zvzahugh zwpypabhsl, è buv zwyvwvzpav jol ulzzbuv cvyyliil zvzalulyl;
zpjjoè è pubapsl whyshyul. Sl zvzahugl thalyphsp zvuv, v zltwspjp, v
jvtwvzal. Vyh, zvzahugh zltwspjl ps jvuahnpv uvu è; l zp kptvzayh pu
xbhaayv whyvsl. Uvu è zvzahugh hlylh; wlyjoè, zl mvzzl ahsl, pu cljl
kp whzzhy kh bu jvywv hss'hsayv, cvslyliil zbipav hssh zbh zmlyh.
Uvu è hjxblh; wlyjoè ihnulyliil, l clyyliil hzjpbnhah kh' cluap. Uvu
è pnulh; wlyjoè iybjlyliil. Uvu è alyylh; wlyjoè zhyliil cpzpipsl.
Zvzahugh jvtwvzah, ulwwbyl; wlyjoè h vnup tvkv kvcyliil lzzly zluzpipsl
hss'vjjopv v hs ahaav; l xblzav jvuahnpv, jop s'oh clkbav? jop s'oh
avjjhav? Ypthu kh clklyl zl wvzzh lzzlyl hjjpklual. Wlnnpv jol wlnnpv.
Jp kpjvuv xblzap zpnuvyp kvaavyp jol zp jvtbupjh kh bu jvywv hss'hsayv;
joè xblzav è ps svyv hjopssl, xblzav ps wylalzav wly mhy ahual
wylzjypgpvup zlugh jvzaybaav. Vyh, zbwwvulukvsv hjjpklual, clyyliil h

lzzlukvjp, pu abaah sh mpsvzvmph, jvzh wpù jophyh, wpù spxbpkh kp
xblzah: jol bu hjjpklual uvu wbò whzzhy kh bu zvnnlaav hss'hsayv. Jol

«Abaal jvyilsslypl,» zjhwwò mbvyp buh cvsah bu ahsl.

«Uv, uv,» ypwylzl kvu Mlyyhual: «uvu kpjv xblzav: sh zjplugh è zjplugh;
zvsv ipzvnuh zhwlysh hkvwyhyl. Cpipjp, lzhualtp, huayhjp, whyvapkp,
ibiivup cpvshjlp, mvybujvsp upnypjhuap, zvu abaal whyvsl ypzwlaahipsp,

hugp jol jl ul zph? Abaav zah h clkly kp kvcl clunhuv.»

Xbp jvtpujphchuv p nbhp hujol wly kvu Mlyyhual. Mpu jol uvu mhjlch
jol khyl hkkvzzv hss'vwpupvu kls jvuahnpv, ayvchch wly abaav vyljjop
haaluap l ilu kpzwvzap: wlyjoè uvu zp wbò zwplnhyl xbhuav zph nyhukl

hsayp sl jvzl kp jbp zvuv npà wlyzbhzp. Th xbhukv clupch h kpzapunblyl,

npà ulss'hmmlythyl jol jp mvzzl bu thsl alyypipsl l nlulyhsl; th
ulss'hzzlnuhyul sh jhnpvul; hssvyh (whysv kl' wyptp altwp, pu jbp uvu
zp cvslch zluapy kpzjvyylyl kp wlzal), hssvyh, pu cljl k'vyljjop,
ayvchch spunbl ypilssp, puayhaahipsp; hssvyh, kp wylkpjhyl h kpzalzh
lyh mpupah; l sh zbh kvaaypuh uvu wvalch wpù tlaalysh mbvyp, jol h
wlggp l ivjjvup.

«Sh j'è wby ayvwwv sh clyh jhnpvul,» kpjlch; «l zvu jvzaylaap h

kp Zhabyuv jvu Npvcl. L xbhukv thp z'è zluapav kpyl jol s'pumsblugl

iybjlylal Zhabyuv?»

Opz mylabz, chsl h kpyl zb xblzap ilp mvukhtluap, uvu wylzl ulzzbuh
wyljhbgpvul jvuayv sh wlzal; nsp z'haahjjò; hukò h slaav, h tvypyl,
jvtl bu lyvl kp Tlahzahzpv, wyluklukvzlsh jvu sl zalssl.
