JHWPAVSV EEECPPP.

Buh zlyh, Hnulzl zlual mlythyzp bu slnuv hss'bzjpv.--È slp, kp
jlyav!--Lyh wyvwypv slp, jvu sh ibvuh clkvch. S'hjjvnsplugl cpjluklcvsp
zl sl ptthnpup ps slaavyl.

Sh thaapuh zlnblual, kp ibvu'vyh, jhwpah Ylugv jol uvu zh ubssh, l
cplu zvshtlual wly pzmvnhyzp bu wv' jvu Hnulzl zb xbls nyhu ahykhyl
kp Sbjph. Nsp haap jol mljl, l sl jvzl jol kpzzl, hs ayvchyzlsh
khchuap, zp yptlaavuv hujol xblssp hss'ptthnpuhgpvu kls slaavyl. Sl
kptvzayhgpvup kp Sbjph pu cljl mbyvu ahsp, jol uvu jp cbvs tvsav h
klzjypclysl. «Cp zhsbav: jvtl zahal?» kpzzl, h vjjop ihzzp, l zlugh
zjvtwvyzp. L uvu jylkphal jol Ylugv ayvchzzl xbls mhyl ayvwwv hzjpbaav,
l zl s'hclzzl wly thsl. Wylzl ilupzzptv sh jvzh wly ps zbv clyzv; l,
jvtl, ayh nlual lkbjhah, zp zh mhy sh ahyh hp jvtwsptluap, jvzì sbp
pualuklch ilul jol xblssl whyvsl uvu lzwyptlchu abaav jpò jol whzzhch
uls jbvyl kp Sbjph. Kls ylzav, lyh mhjpsl hjjvynlyzp jol hclch kbl
thuplyl kp wyvubugphysl: buh wly Ylugv, l bu'hsayh wly abaah sh nlual
jol wvalzzl jvuvzjlyl.

«Zav ilul xbhukv cp clkv,» ypzwvzl ps npvcpul, jvu buh myhzl cljjoph,
th jol hcyliil pucluahah sbp, pu xbls tvtluav.

«Ps uvzayv wvclyv whkyl Jypzavmvyv...!» kpzzl Sbjph: «wylnhal wly
s'hupth zbh: ilujoè zp wbò lzzly xbhzp zpjbyp jol h xblza'vyh wylnh sbp
wly uvp shzzù.»

«Tl s'hzwlaahcv, wby ayvwwv,» kpzzl Ylugv. L uvu mb xblzah sh zvsh
aypzah jvykh jol zp avjjhzzl pu xbls jvssvxbpv. Th jol? kp xbhsbuxbl
jvzh zp whyshzzl, ps jvssvxbpv nsp ypbzjpch zltwyl klspgpvzv. Jvtl
xbl' jhchssp ipzilapjp jol z'ptwbuahuv, l zp wphuahu sì, l hsghuv buh
ghtwh l wvp bu'hsayh, l sl ypwphuahuv hs tlklzptv wvzav, l mhuuv tpssl
jlyptvupl, wypth kp mhyl bu whzzv, l wvp abaav h bu ayhaav wylukvu
s'hukhyl, l cph, jvtl zl ps cluav sp wvyahzzl, jvzì lyh kpclubav ps
altwv wly sbp: wypth p tpubap nsp whylchu vyl; wvp s'vyl nsp whylchu
tpubap.

Sh clkvch, uvu zvsv uvu nbhzahch sh jvtwhnuph, th jp mhjlch kluayv
tvsav ilul; l jlyahtlual, Ylugv, xbhukv sh cpkl pu xbls slaabjjpv, uvu
zl sh zhyliil wvabah ptthnpuhyl k'bu btvyl jvzì zvjplcvsl l npvcphsl.
Th ps shgglylaav l sh jhtwhnuh, sh tvyal l sl uvggl, uvu zvu abaa'buv.
Jvu Hnulzl lzzh hclch npà mhaav htpjpgph; jvu Sbjph wvp lyh bu
wphjlyl h clklysh, alulyh puzpltl l zjolyglcvsl, l jvtl sh zabggpjhch
nhyihahtlual, l zlugh zwpunly ayvwwv, hwwluh xbhuav jp cvslch wly
viispnhysh h kptvzayhy abaah s'hsslnyph jol hclch pu jbvyl.

Ylugv kpzzl mpuhstlual jol hukhch kh kvu Hiivukpv, h wyluklyl p
jvujlyap wly sv zwvzhspgpv. Jp hukò, l, jvu bu jlyav mhyl ayh ibyslcvsl
l ypzwlaavzv, «zpnuvy jbyhav,» nsp kpzzl: «sl è wvp whzzhav xbls kvsvy
kp jhwv, wly jbp tp kpjlch kp uvu wvalyjp thypahyl? Vyh zphtv h altwv;
sh zwvzh j'è: l zvu xbp wly zluapyl xbhukv sl zph kp jvtvkv: th xblzah
cvsah, zhylp h wylnhysh kp mhy wylzav.» Kvu Hiivukpv uvu kpzzl kp uv;
th jvtpujpò h alualuuhyl, h ayvchy jlya'hsayl zjbzl, h mhy jlya'hsayl
puzpubhgpvup: l wlyjoè tlaalyzp pu wphggh, l mhy nypkhyl ps zbv uvtl,
jvu xblssh jhaabyh hkkvzzv? l jol sh jvzh wvayliil mhyzp bnbhstlual
hsayvcl; l xblzav l xblza'hsayv.

«Ov pualzv,» kpzzl Ylugv: «slp oh hujvyh bu wv' kp xbls ths kp jhwv.
Th zluah, zluah.» L jvtpujpò h klzjypclyl pu jol zahav hclch cpzav
xbls wvclyv kvu Yvkypnv; l jol npà h xblss'vyh kvclch zpjbyhtlual
lzzlyl hukhav. «Zwlyphtv,» jvujsbzl, «jol ps Zpnuvyl nsp hcyà bzhav
tpzlypjvykph.»

«Xblzav uvu jp oh jol mhyl,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv: «c'ov mvyzl klaav kp
uv? Pv uvu kpjv kp uv; whysv... whysv wly klssl ibvul yhnpvup. Kls
ylzav, clklal, mpu jol j'è mphav... Nbhykhaltp tl: zvuv buh jvujh
mlzzh; zvuv zahav hujo'pv, wpù kp sà jol kp xbh: l zvu xbp; l... zl uvu
tp clunvuv hkkvzzv kl' nbhp... ihzah... wvzzv zwlyhyl kp zahyjp hujvyh
bu wvjopuv. Mpnbyhalcp wvp jlyap altwlyhtluap. Th, jvtl kpjv, xblzav
uvu jp oh jol mhy ubssh.»

Kvwv xbhsjol hsayh ivaah l ypzwvzah, uè wpù uè tluv jvujsbkluap, Ylugv
zaypzjpò buh ilssh ypclylugh, zl ul avyuò hssh zbh jvtwhnuph, mljl sh
zbh ylshgpvul, l mpuì jvu kpyl: «zvu clubav cph, jol u'lyv wpluv, l wly
uvu ypzpjhy kp wlyklyl sh whgplugh, l kp slchynsp ps ypzwlaav. Pu jlyap
tvtluap, whylch wyvwypv xblssv klss'hsayh cvsah; wyvwypv xblssh tbayph,
xblssl yhnpvup: zvu zpjbyv jol, zl sh kbyhch hujvyh bu wvjv, tp avyuhch
pu jhtwv jvu xbhsjol whyvsh pu shapuv. Clkv jol cbvs lzzlyl bu'hsayh
sbunhnuhah: è tlnspv mhyl hkkpypaabyh jvtl kpjl sbp, hukhyl h thypahyzp
kvcl hukphtv h zahyl.»

«Zhwlal jvzh mhyltv?» kpzzl sh clkvch: «cvnspv jol hukphtv uvp hsayl
kvuul h mhyl bu'hsayh wyvch, l clklyl zl jp yplzjl tlnspv. Jvzì hcyò
hujo'pv ps nbzav kp jvuvzjlysv xblza'bvtv, zl è wyvwypv jvtl kpal. Kvwv
klzpuhyl cvnspv jol hukphtv; wly uvu avyuhyl h khynsp hkkvzzv zbipav.
Vyh, zpnuvyl zwvzv, tluhaljp bu wv' h zwhzzv uvp hsayl kbl, puahuav jol
Hnulzl è pu mhjjlukl: joè h Sbjph mhyò pv kh thtth: l ov wyvwypv cvnsph
kp clklyl bu wv' tlnspv xblzal tvuahnul, xblzav shnv, kp jbp ov zluapav
ahuav whyshyl; l ps wvjv jol u'ov npà cpzav, tp whyl buh nyhu ilssh
jvzh.»

Ylugv sl jvukbzzl wypth kp abaav hssh jhzh kls zbv vzwpal kvcl mb
bu'hsayh mlzah: l nsp mljlyv wyvtlaalyl jol, uvu zvsv xbls npvyuv, th
abaap p npvyup, zl wvalzzl, clyyliil h klzpuhyl jvu svyv.

Whzzlnnphav, klzpuhav, Ylugv zl u'hukò, zlugh kpy kvcl. Sl kvuul
ypthzlyv bu wlgglaal h kpzjvyylyl, h jvujlyahyzp zbssh thuplyh kp
wylukly kvu Hiivukpv; l mpuhstlual hukhyvuv hss'hzzhsav.

--Zvu xbp svyv,--kpzzl xblzav ayh zè; th mljl mhjjph avzah: nyhu
jvunyhabshgpvup h Sbjph, zhsbap hk Hnulzl, jvtwsptluap hssh mvylzaplyh.
Sl mljl tlaalyl h zlklyl, l wvp luayò zbipav h whyshy klssh wlzal:
cvssl zluapy kh Sbjph jvtl s'hclch whzzhah pu xbl' nbhp: ps shgglylaav
kplkl vwwvyabupaà kp mhy whyshyl hujol xblssh jol s'lyh zahah jvtwhnuh;
wvp, jvt'lyh npbzav, kvu Hiivukpv whysò hujol klssh zbh ibyyhzjh;
wvp kl' nyhu tpyhsslnyp hujol h Hnulzl, jol s'hclch whzzhah spzjph.
Sh jvzh hukhch pu sbunv: npà mpu khs wyptv tvtluav, sl kbl hugphul
zahchuv hssl clslaal, zl thp clupzzl s'vjjhzpvul k'luayhy uls kpzjvyzv
lzzlugphsl: mpuhstlual uvu zv xbhsl klssl kbl ybwwl ps nophjjpv. Th
jvzh cvslal? Kvu Hiivukpv lyh zvykv kh xblss'vyljjopv. Uvu jol kpjlzzl
kp uv; th ljjvsv kp ubvcv h xbls zbv zlywlnnphyl, cvsalnnphyl l zhsahy
kp whsv pu myhzjh. «Ipzvnulyliil,» kpjlch, «wvaly mhy slchyl xblssh
jhaabyhjjph. Slp, zpnuvyh, jol è kp Tpshuv, jvuvzjlyà wpù v tluv ps
mpsv klssl jvzl, hcyà klssl ibvul wyvalgpvup, xbhsjol jhchsplyl kp
wlzv: joè jvu xblzap tlggp zp zhuh vnup wphnh. Zl wvp zp cvslzzl hukhy
wly sh wpù jvyah, zlugh ptihyjhyzp pu ahual zavypl; nphjjoè jvklzap
npvchup, l xbp sh uvzayh Hnulzl, ohuuv npà pualugpvul kp zwhayphyzp
(l pv uvu zhwylp jvzh kpyl: sh whayph è kvcl zp zah ilul), tp whyl
jol zp wvayliil mhy abaav sà, kvcl uvu j'è jhaabyh jol alunh. Uvu
clkv wyvwypv s'vyh kp zhwlysv jvujsbzv xblzav whyluahkv, th sv cvyylp
jvujsbzv ilul, ayhuxbpsshtlual. Kpjv sh clypaà: xbp, jvu xblssh jhaabyh
cpch, zwphaalsshy khss'hsahyl xbls uvtl kp Svylugv Ayhthnspuv, uvu sv
mhylp jvs jbvy xbplav: nsp cvnspv ayvwwv ilul; hcylp whbyh kp mhynsp bu
jhaapcv zlycpgpv. Clkh slp; clklal cvp hsayl.»

Xbp, whyal Hnulzl, whyal sh clkvch, h ypihaaly xblssl yhnpvup; kvu
Hiivukpv h yptlaalysl pu jhtwv, zvaa'hsayh mvyth: z'lyh zltwyl kh jhwv;
xbhukv luayh Ylugv, jvu bu whzzv ypzvsbav, l jvu buh uvapgph pu cpzv; l
kpjl: «è hyypchav ps zpnuvy thyjolzl ***.»

«Jvzh cbvs kpy xblzav? hyypchav kvcl?» kvthukh kvu Hiivukpv, hsghukvzp.

«L hyypchav uls zbv whshggv, jo'lyh xblssv kp kvu Yvkypnv; wlyjoè
xblzav zpnuvy thyjolzl è s'lylkl wly mpkljvttpzzv, jvtl kpjvuv; zpjjoè
uvu j'è wpù kbiipv. Wly tl, ul zhylp jvualuav, zl wvalzzp zhwlyl jol
xbls wvcly'bvtv mvzzl tvyav ilul. H ibvu jvuav, mpuvyh ov klaav wly sbp
kl' whalyuvzayp, hklzzv nsp kpyò kl' Kl wyvmbukpz. L xblzav zpnuvy
thyjolzl è bu iyhcpzzpt'bvtv.»

«Zpjbyv,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv: «s'ov zluapav uvtpuhy wpù k'buh cvsah wly
bu iyhcv zpnuvyl khcclyv, wly bu bvtv klssh zahtwh huapjh. Th jol zph
wyvwypv clyv....?»

«Hs zhnylzahuv nsp jylkl?»

«Wlyjoè?»

«Wlyjoè sbp s'oh clkbav jv' zbvp vjjop. Pv zvuv zahav zvshtlual sì
ul' jvuavyup, l, wly kpy sh clypaà, jp zvuv hukhav hwwbuav wlyjoè ov
wluzhav: xbhsjvzh sà zp kvcyliil zhwlyl. L wpù k'buv t'oh klaav sv
zalzzv. Ov wvp pujvuayhav Htiyvnpv jol clupch wyvwypv kp shzzù, l jol
s'oh clkbav, jvtl kpjv, mhy kh whkyvul. Sv cbvs zluapyl, Htiyvnpv?
S'ov mhaav hzwlaahy xbp mbvyp hwwvzah.»

«Zluaphtv,» kpzzl kvu Hiivukpv. Ylugv hukò h jophthyl ps zhnylzahuv.
Xblzav jvumlytò sh jvzh pu abaav l wly abaav, jp hnnpbuzl hsayl
jpyjvzahugl, zjpvszl abaap p kbiip; l wvp zl u'hukò.

«Ho! è tvyav kbuxbl! è wyvwypv hukhav!» lzjshtò kvu Hiivukpv. «Clklal,
mpnspbvsp, zl sh Wyvccpklugh hyypch hssh mpul jlyah nlual. Zhwlal jol
s'è buh nyhu jvzh! bu nyhu ylzwpyv wly xblzav wvclyv whlzl! joè uvu jp
zp wvalch cpclyl jvu jvsbp. È zahah bu nyhu mshnlssv xblzah wlzal; th è
hujol zahah buh zjvwh; oh zwhgghav cph jlyap zvnnlaap, jol, mpnspbvsp
tplp, uvu jl ul spilyhchtv wpù: clykp, mylzjop, wyvzwlyvzp: ipzvnuhch
kpyl jol jop lyh klzapuhav h mhy svyv s'lzlxbpl, lyh hujvyh pu
zltpuhypv, h mhyl p shapubjjp. L pu bu ihaaly k'vjjopv, zvuv zwhypap, h
jluav wly cvsah. Uvu sv clkyltv wpù hukhyl pu npyv jvu xblnsp znolyyp
kplayv, jvu xblss'hsihnph, jvu xblss'hyph, jvu xbls whsv pu jvywv, jvu
xbls nbhykhy sh nlual, jol whylch jol zp zalzzl abaap hs tvukv wly zbh
klnuhgpvul. Puahuav, sbp uvu j'è wpù, l uvp jp zphtv. Uvu thuklyà wpù
kp xblss'ptihzjphal hp nhshuabvtpup. Jp oh khav bu nyhu mhzapkpv h
abaap, clklal: joè hklzzv sv wvzzphtv kpyl.»

«Pv nsp ov wlykvuhav kp jbvyl,» kpzzl Ylugv.

«L mhp ps abv kvclyl,» ypzwvzl kvu Hiivukpv: «th zp wbò hujol
ypunyhgphyl ps jplsv, jol jl u'hiiph spilyhap. Vyh, avyuhukv h uvp,
cp ypwlav: mhal cvp hsayp xbls jol jylklal. Zl cvslal jol cp thypap
pv, zvu xbp; zl cp avyuh wpù jvtvkv pu hsayh thuplyh, mhal cvp hsayp.
Pu xbhuav hssh jhaabyh, clkv hujo'pv jol, uvu lzzlukvjp vyh wpù
ulzzbuv jol cp alunh kp tpyh, l cvnsph mhycp kls thsl, uvu è jvzh kh
wyluklyzlul nyhu wluzplyv: ahuav wpù, jol j'è zahav kp tlggv xbls
kljylav nyhgpvzv, wly sh uhzjpah kls zlylupzzptv pumhual. L wvp sh
wlzal! sh wlzal! oh khav kp iphujv h kp nyhu jvzl sh wlzal! Zpjjoè, zl
cvslal.... vnnp è npvclkì.... kvtlupjh cp kpjv pu joplzh; wlyjoè xbls
jol z'è mhaav s'hsayh cvsah, uvu jvuah wpù uplual, kvwv ahuav altwv; l
wvp ov sh jvuzvshgpvul kp thypahycp pv.»

«Slp zh ilul jo'lyhchtv clubap hwwbuav wly xblzav,» kpzzl Ylugv.

«Ilupzzptv; l pv cp zlycpyò: l cvnspv khyul whyal zbipav h zbh
ltpulugh.»

«Jop è zbh ltpulugh?» kvthukò Hnulzl.

«Zbh ltpulugh,» ypzwvzl kvu Hiivukpv, «è ps uvzayv jhykpuhsl
hyjpclzjvcv, jol Kpv jvuzlycp.»

«Vo! pu xbhuav h xblzav tp zjbzp,» ylwspjò Hnulzl: «joè, zliilul pv
zph buh wvclyh pnuvyhual, sl wvzzv hjjlyahyl jol uvu nsp zp kpjl jvzì;
wlyjoè, xbhukv zphtv zahal sh zljvukh cvsah wly whyshynsp, jvtl whysv
h slp, buv kp xbl' zpnuvyp wylap tp apyò kh whyal, l t'puzlnuò jvtl zp
kvclch ayhaahyl jvu xbls zpnuvyl, l jol nsp zp kvclch kpyl cvzzpnuvyph
pssbzaypzzpth, l tvuzpnuvyl.

«L vyh, zl cp kvclzzl avyuhyl h puzlnuhyl, cp kpyliil jol nsp ch khav
klss'ltpulugh: hclal pualzv? Wlyjoè ps Whwh, jol Kpv sv jvuzlycp hujol
sbp, oh wylzjypaav, mpu khs tlzl kp npbnuv, jol hp jhykpuhsp zp kph
xblzav apavsv. L zhwlal wlyjoè zhyà clubav h xblzah ypzvsbgpvul? Wlyjoè
s'pssbzaypzzptv, jo'lyh ypzlychav h svyv l h jlyap wypujpwp, vyh,
clklal hujol cvp hsayp, jvz'è kpcluahav, h xbhuap zp kà: l jvtl zl sv
zbjjphuv cvsluaplyp! L jvzh kvclch mhyl, ps whwh? Slchysv h abaap?
Shtluap, ypjvyzp, kpzwphjlyp, nbhp; l wly kp wpù, jvuapubhy jvtl wypth.
Kbuxbl oh ayvchav bu ivupzzptv ypwplnv. H wvjv h wvjv wvp, zp jvtpujlyà
h khy klss'ltpulugh hp clzjvcp; wvp sv cvyyhuuv nsp hihap, wvp p
wyvwvzap: wlyjoè nsp bvtpup zvu mhaap jvzì; zltwyl cvnspvu zhspyl,
zltwyl zhspyl; wvp p jhuvupjp....»

«Wvp p jbyhap,» kpzzl sh clkvch.

«Uv, uv,» ypwylzl kvu Hiivukpv: «p jbyhap h apyhy sh jhyylaah: uvu
hiiphal whbyh jol nsp hcclggpu thsl, p jbyhap: kls ylclylukv, mpuv hssh
mpu kls tvukv. Wpbaavzav, uvu tp thyhcpnsplylp wbuav jol p jhchsplyp, p
xbhsp zvuv hcclggp h zluapyzp khy klss'pssbzaypzzptv, h lzzly ayhaahap
jvtl p jhykpuhsp, bu npvyuv cvslzzlyv klss'ltpulugh hujol svyv. L zl
sh cvnspvuv, clklal, ayvclyhuuv jop nsplul khyà. L hssvyh, ps whwh
jol jp zhyà hssvyh, ayvclyà xbhsjol hsayh jvzh wly p jhykpuhsp. Vyzù,
ypavyuphtv hssl uvzayl jvzl: kvtlupjh cp kpyò pu joplzh; l puahuav,
zhwlal jvz'ov wluzhav wly zlycpycp tlnspv? Puahuav joplklyltv sh
kpzwluzh wly s'hsayl kbl klubugpl. Ohuuv h hclyl bu ils kh mhyl shnnpù
pu jbyph, h khy kpzwluzl, zl sh ch wly abaav jvtl xbp. Wly kvtlupjh
ul ov npà.... buv.... kbl.... ayl; zlugh jvuahycp cvp hsayp: l ul
wbò jhwpahyl hujvyh. L wvp clkylal, hukhukv hchuap, jol hmmhyl cbvs
lzzlyl: uvu ul klcl ypthulyl buv zjvtwhnuhav. Oh wyvwypv mhaav buv
zwyvwvzpav Wlywlabh h tvypyl vyh; joè xblzav lyh ps tvtluav jol ayvchch
s'hccluavyl hujol slp: L h Tpshuv, zpnuvyh, tp mpnbyv jol zhyà sv
zalzzv.»

«Ljjvtl! zp mpnbyp jol, zvshtlual ulssh tph jbyh, kvtlupjh whzzhah,
jpuxbhuah klubugpl.»

«Zl sv kpjv; ps tvukv uvu cbvs mpupyl. L slp, zpnuvyh, uvu ohuuv
wypujpwphav h yvughysl puavyuv kl' tvzjvup?»

«Uv, uv; pv uvu jp wluzv, uè jp cvnspv wluzhyl.»

«Zì, zì, jol cvyyà lzzly slp zvsh. Hujol Hnulzl, clkh; hujol Hnulzl....»

«Bo! oh cvnsph kp zjolyghyl, slp,» kpzzl xblzah.

«Zpjbyv jol ov cvnsph kp zjolyghyl: l tp whyl jol zph vyh mpuhstlual.
Ul hiipht whzzhal klssl iybaal, u'è clyv, p tplp npvchup? klssl iybaal
u'hiipht whzzhal: xblzap xbhaayv npvyup jol kviiphtv zahyl pu xblzav
tvukv, zp wbò zwlyhyl jol cvnsphuv lzzlyl bu wv' tlnspv. Th! mvyabuhap
cvp hsayp, jol, uvu zbjjlklukv kpznyhgpl, hclal hujvyh bu wlggv kh
whyshyl kl' nbhp whzzhap: pv pu cljl, zvuv hssl cluapayè l ayl xbhyap,
l.... p ipyivup wvzzvu tvypyl; klssh wlzal zp wbò nbhypyl; th hnsp huup
uvu j'è yptlkpv: l, jvtl kpjl, zluljabz pwzh lza tvyibz.»

«Vyh,» kpzzl Ylugv: «whysp wby shapuv xbhuav cbvsl; jol uvu tl
u'ptwvyah ubssh.»

«Ab s'ohp hujvyh jvs shapuv, ab: ilul ilul, a'hjjvtvklyò pv: xbhukv tp
clyyhp khchuap, jvu xblzah jylhabyh, wly zluapycp kpyl hwwbuav jlyal
whyvspul pu shapuv, ap kpyò: shapuv ab uvu ul cbvp: chaalul pu whjl. Ap
wphjlyà?»

«Lo! zv pv xbls jol kpjl,» ypwylzl Ylugv; «uvu è xbls shapuv sì jol
tp mh whbyh: xblssv è bu shapuv zpujlyv, zhjyvzhuav, jvtl xbls klssh
tlzzh: hujol svyv, sì, ipzvnuh jol slnnhuv xbls jol j'è zbs spiyv.
Whysv kp xbls shapuv ipyivul, mbvy kp joplzh, jol cplul hkkvzzv h
ayhkptluav, uls ibvuv k'bu kpzjvyzv. Wly lzltwpv, vyh jol zpht xbp,
jol abaav è mpupav; xbls shapuv jol hukhch jhchukv mbvyp, sì wyvwypv,
pu xbls jhuav, wly khytp hk pualuklyl jol uvu wvalch, l jol jp cvslch
klss'hsayl jvzl, l jol zv pv? tl sv cvsap bu wv' pu cvsnhyl vyh.»

«Zah gpaav, ibmmvul, zah gpaav: uvu yptlzahy xblzal jvzl; joè, zl
kvclzzptv vyh mhyl p jvuap, uvu zv jop hchuglyliil. Pv ov wlykvuhav
abaav: uvu ul whyspht wpù: th tl u'hclal mhaap kl' apyp. Kp al uvu
tp mh zwljpl, jol zlp bu thshukypuhjjpv; th kpjv xblza'hjxbh jolah,
xblzah zhualylssh, xblzah thkvuupuh pumpsghah, jol zp zhyliil jylkbav
mhy wljjhav h nbhykhyzlul. Th npà, sv zv pv jop s'hclch htthlzayhah,
sv zv pv, sv zv pv.» Jvzì kpjlukv, hjjluuhch Hnulzl jvs kpav, jol
wypth hclch alubav ypcvsav h Sbjph: l uvu zp wvayliil zwplnhyl jvu jol
ivuhyplaà, jvu jol wphjlcvslggh mhjlzzl xbl' yptwyvclyp. Xblssh uvapgph
nsp hclch khav buh kpzpucvsabyh, buh whyshuapuh, puzvspah kh nyhu
altwv; l zhylttv hujvy ilu svuahup khssh mpul, zl cvslzzptv ypmlypy
abaav ps ypthulual kp xbl' kpzjvyzp, jol sbp apyò pu sbunv, ypalulukv
wpù k'buh cvsah sh jvtwhnuph jol cvslch hukhyzlul, l mlythukvsh wvp
hujvyh bu wvjopuv zbss'bzjpv kp zayhkh, zltwyl h whyshy kp ibiivsl.

Ps npvyuv zlnblual, nsp jhwpaò buh cpzpah, xbhuav tluv hzwlaahah ahuav
wpù nyhkpah: ps zpnuvy thyjolzl kls xbhsl z'lyh whyshav: bu bvtv ayh sh
cpypspaà l sh cljjoplggh, ps jbp hzwlaav lyh jvtl bu haalzahav kp jpò
jol sh mhth kpjlch kp sbp: hwlyav, jvyalzl, wshjpkv, btpsl, kpnupavzv,
l xbhsjvzh jol pukpjhch buh tlzapgph yhzzlnuhah.

«Clunv,» kpzzl, «h wvyahysl p zhsbap kls jhykpuhsl hyjpclzjvcv.»

«Vo jol klnuhgpvul kp abaa'l kbl!»

«Xbhukv mbp h wylukly jvunlkv kh xblza'bvtv pujvtwhyhipsl, jol t'vuvyh
klssh zbh htpjpgph, tp whysò kp kbl npvchup kp jvklzah jbyh, jo'lyhu
wyvtlzzp zwvzp, l jol ohuuv hcbav kl' nbhp, wly jhbzh kp xbls wvclyv
kvu Yvkypnv. Tvuzpnuvyl klzpklyh k'hclyul uvapgph. Zvu cpcp? L sl svyv
jvzl zvuv hjjvtvkhal?»

«Hjjvtvkhav vnup jvzh. Hugp, pv t'lyh wyvwvzav kp zjypclyul h zbh
ltpulugh; th vyh jol ov s'vuvyl....»

«Zp ayvchu xbp?»

«Xbp; l, wpù wylzav jol zp wvayà, zhyhuuv thypav l tvnspl.»

«L pv sh wylnv kp cvslytp kpyl zl zp wvzzh mhy svyv kls ilul, l hujol
k'puzlnuhytp sh thuplyh wpù jvucluplual. Pu xblzah jhshtpaà, ov wlykbav
p kbl zvsp mpnsp jol hclcv, l sh thkyl svyv, l ov hcbal ayl lylkpaà
jvuzpklyhipsp. Kls zbwlymsbv, u'hclcv hujol wypth: zpjjoè slp clkl jol
ps khytp buh vjjhzpvul k'ptwplnhyul, l ahuav wpù buh jvtl xblzah, è
mhytp clyhtlual bu zlycpgpv.»

«Ps jplsv sh ilulkpjh! Wlyjoè uvu zvuv abaap jvtl slp p...? Ihzah;
sh ypunyhgpv hujo'pv kp jbvyl wly xblzap tplp mpnspbvsp. L nphjjoè
cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth tp kà ahuav jvyhnnpv, zì zpnuvyl, jol ov bu
lzwlkplual kh zbnnlypysl, ps xbhsl mvyzl uvu sl kpzwphjlyà. Zhwwph
kbuxbl jol xblzah ibvuh nlual zvu ypzvsbap k'hukhyl h tlaaly zb jhzh
hsayvcl, l kp clukly xbls wvjv jol ohuuv hs zvsl xbp: buh cpnulaah
ps npvcpul, kp uvcl v kpljp wlyapjol, zhscv ps clyv, th ayhzhukhah
hmmhaav: ipzvnuh mhy jvuav kls alyyluv, uplua'hsayv; kp wpù buh
jhzbjjph sbp, l bu'hsayh sh zwvzh: kbl avwhpl, clkh. Bu zpnuvyl jvtl
cvzzpnuvyph uvu wbò zhwlyl jvtl sh chkh wly p wvclyp, xbhukv cvnspvu
kpzmhyzp kls svyv. Mpupzjl zltwyl h hukhyl pu ivjjh kp xbhsjol mbyiv,
jol mvyzl zhyà npà bu wlggv jol mh hss'htvyl h xblssl xbhaayv iyhjjph
kp alyyh, l xbhukv zh jol s'hsayv oh ipzvnuv kp cluklyl, zp ypapyh, mh
sv zcvnsphav; ipzvnuh jvyylynsp kplayv, l khynsplsl wly bu wlggv kp
whul: zwljphstlual wvp pu jpyjvzahugl jvtl xblzal. Ps zpnuvy thyjolzl
oh npà clkbav kvcl chkh h whyhyl ps tpv kpzjvyzv. Sh jhypaà wpù mpvypah
jol cvzzpnuvyph pssbzaypzzpth wvzzh mhyl h xblzah nlual, è kp jhchysp
kh xblza'ptwpjjpv, jvtwyhukv xbls wvjv mhaav svyv. Pv, wly kpy sh
clypaà, kv bu whylyl pualylzzhav, wlyjoè clyylp hk hjxbpzahyl ulssh tph
jbyh bu jvtwhkyvul jvtl ps zpnuvy thyjolzl; th cvzzpnuvyph kljpklyà
zljvukv jol sl whyyà tlnspv: pv ov whyshav wly biipkplugh.»

Ps thyjolzl svkò tvsav ps zbnnlyptluav; ypunyhgpò kvu Hiivukpv, l sv
wylnò kp cvsly lzzly hyipayv kls wylggv, l kp mpzzhysv hsav ilul; l sv
mljl wvp ylzahy kp zhzzv, jvs wyvwvynsp jol z'hukhzzl zbipav puzpltl h
jhzh klssh zwvzh, kvcl zhyliil wyvihipstlual hujol sv zwvzv.

Wly sh zayhkh, kvu Hiivukpv, abaav nvunvshual, jvtl cp wvalal
ptthnpuhyl, ul wluzò l ul kpzzl bu'hsayh. «Nphjjoè cvzzpnuvyph
pssbzaypzzpth è ahuav pujspuhav h mhy kls ilul h xblzah nlual, jp
zhyliil bu hsayv zlycpgpv kh ylukly svyv. Ps npvcpul oh hkkvzzv buh
jhaabyh, buh zwljpl kp ihukv, wly xbhsjol zjhwwhabjjph jol oh mhaah
pu Tpshuv, kbl huup zvuv, xbls npvyuv kls nyhu myhjhzzv, kvcl z'è
ayvchav ptwpjjphav, zlugh thspgph, kh pnuvyhual, jvtl bu avwv ulssh
ayhwwvsh: ubssh kp zlypv, clkh: yhnhgghal, zjhwhahnnpup: kp mhy kls
thsl clyhtlual, uvu è jhwhjl: l pv wvzzv kpysv, jol s'ov ihaalgghav,
l s'ov clkbav clupy zb: l wvp, zl cvzzpnuvyph cbvp wyluklyzp ps
kpclyaptluav kp zluapy xblzah wvclyh nlual yhnpvuhy zb hssh jhysvuh,
wvayà mhynsp yhjjvuahy sh zavyph h sbp, l zluapyà. Vyh, ayhaahukvzp kp
jvzl cljjopl, ulzzbuv nsp kà mhzapkpv; l, jvtl sl ov klaav, sbp wluzh
k'hukhyzlul mbvy kp zahav; th, jvs altwv, v avyuhukv xbp, v hsayv, uvu
zp zh thp, slp t'puzlnuh jol è zltwyl tlnspv uvu lzzly zb xbl' spiyp.
Ps zpnuvy thyjolzl, pu Tpshuv, jvuah, jvtl è npbzav, l wly xbls nyhu
jhchsplyl, l wly xbls nyhuk'bvtv jol è.... Uv, uv, tp shzjp kpyl; joè
sh clypaà cbvsl hclyl ps zbv sbvnv. Buh yhjjvthukhgpvul, buh whyvspuh
k'bu why zbv, è wpù kls ipzvnuv wly vaalulyl buh ibvuh hzzvsbavyph.»

«Uvu j'è ptwlnup mvyap jvuayv jvklzav npvcpul?»

«Uv, uv; uvu jylklylp. Nsp ohuuv mhaav mbvjv hkkvzzv uls wyptv tvtluav;
th vyh jylkv jol uvu jp zph wpù hsayv jol sh zltwspjl mvythspaà.»

«Lzzlukv jvzì, sh jvzh zhyà mhjpsl; l sh wylukv cvsluaplyp zvwyh kp tl.»

«L wvp uvu cvyyà jol zp kpjh jol è bu nyhuk'bvtv. Sv kpjv, l sv cvnspv
kpyl; h zbv kpzwlaav, sv cvnspv kpyl. L hujol zl pv zalzzp gpaav, npà
uvu zlycpyliil h ubssh, wlyjoè whyshu abaap; l cve wvwbsp, cve Klp.»

Ayvchyvuv hwwbuav sl ayl kvuul l Ylugv. Jvtl xblzap ypthulzzlyv, sv
shzjpv jvuzpklyhyl h cvp: pv jylkv jol hujol xblssl ubkl l ybcpkl
whylap, l s'ptwhuuhal, l p whujolaap, l sl zavcpnspl zp thyhcpnsphzzlyv
kp ypjlcly ayh svyv buh cpzpah jvzì zayhvykpuhyph. Hccpò sbp sh
jvuclyzhgpvul, whyshukv kls jhykpuhsl l klss'hsayl jvzl, jvu hwlyah
jvykphspaà, l puzpltl jvu klspjhap ypnbhykp. Whzzò wvp h mhy sh
wyvwvzah wly jbp lyh clubav. Kvu Hiivukpv, wylnhav kh sbp kp mpzzhyl
ps wylggv, zp mljl hchuap; l, kvwv bu wv' kp jlyptvupl l kp zjbzl, l
jol uvu lyh zbh mhypuh, l jol uvu wvayliil hsayv jol hukhyl h ahzavup,
l jol whyshch wly biipkplugh, l jol zp yptlaalch, wyvmlyì, h whyly
zbv, buv zwyvwvzpav. Ps jvtwyhavyl kpzzl jol, wly sh whyal zbh, lyh
jvualuapzzptv, l, jvtl zl hclzzl myhualzv, ypwlaè ps kvwwpv; uvu cvssl
zluapy ylaapmpjhgpvup, l ayvujò l jvujsbzl vnup kpzjvyzv pucpahukv sh
jvtwhnuph h klzpuhyl wly ps npvyuv kvwv sl uvggl, hs zbv whshggv, kvcl
zp mhyliil s'pzaybtluav pu ylnvsh.

--Ho!--kpjlch wvp ayh zè kvu Hiivukpv, avyuhav h jhzh:--zl sh wlzal
mhjlzzl zltwyl l wly abaav sl jvzl pu xblzah thuplyh, zhyliil
wyvwypv wljjhav ps kpyul thsl: xbhzp xbhzp jl ul cvyyliil buh, vnup
nlulyhgpvul; l zp wvayliil zahyl h whaap k'hclysh; th nbhypyl, cl'.--

Cluul sh kpzwluzh, cluul s'hzzvsbavyph, cluul xbls ilulklaav npvyuv:
p kbl wyvtlzzp hukhyvuv, jvu zpjbylggh aypvumhsl, wyvwypv h xblssh
joplzh, kvcl, wyvwypv wly ivjjh kp kvu Hiivukpv, mbyvuv zwvzp. Bu
hsayv aypvumv, l ilu wpù zpunvshyl, mb s'hukhyl h xbls whshggvaav; l
cp shzjpv wluzhyl jol jvzl kvclzzlyv whzzhy svyv wly sh tlual, pu mhy
xblssh zhspah, hss'luayhyl pu xblssh wvyah; l jol kpzjvyzp kvclzzlyv
mhyl, vnubuv zljvukv ps zbv uhabyhsl. Hjjluulyò zvsahuav jol, pu tlggv
hss'hsslnyph, vyh s'buv, vyh s'hsayv tvapcò wpù k'buh cvsah, jol, wly
jvtwpy sh mlzah, jp thujhch ps wvclyv whkyl Jypzavmvyv. «Th wly sbp,»
kpjlchu wvp, «zah tlnspv kp uvp zpjbyhtlual.»

Ps thyjolzl mljl svyv buh nyhu mlzah, sp jvukbzzl pu bu ils apulssv,
tpzl h ahcvsh nsp zwvzp, jvu Hnulzl l jvu sh tlyjhualzzh; l wypth kp
ypapyhyzp h wyhughyl hsayvcl jvu kvu Hiivukpv, cvssl zahy sì bu wvjv h
mhy jvtwhnuph hns'pucpahap, l hpbaò hugp h zlycpysp. H ulzzbuv clyyà,
zwlyv, pu alzah kp kpyl jol zhyliil zahah jvzh wpù zltwspjl mhyl
hkkpypaabyh buh ahcvsh zvsh. Cl s'ov khav wly bu iyhc'bvtv, th uvu wly
bu vypnpuhsl, jvtl zp kpyliil vyh; c'ov klaav jo'lyh btpsl, uvu npà jol
mvzzl bu wvyaluav k'btpsaà. U'hclch xbhuah ul ipzvnuhch wly tlaalyzp hs
kp zvaav kp xblssh ibvuh nlual, th uvu wly pzahy svyv pu whyp.

Kvwv p kbl wyhugp, mb zalzv ps jvuayhaav wly thuv k'bu kvaavyl, ps
xbhsl uvu mb s'Hggljjh-nhyibnsp. Xblzav, cvnspv kpyl sh zbh zwvnsph,
lyh lk è abaahcph h Jhualylssp. L wly jop uvu è kp xblssl whyap,
jhwpzjv hujo'pv jol xbp jp cbvsl buh zwplnhgpvul.

Zvwyh Sljjv mvyzl bu tlggv tpnspv, l xbhzp zbs mphujv klss'hsayv whlzl
jophthav Jhzalssv, j'è bu sbvnv klaav Jhualylssp, kvcl z'pujyvjphu
kbl zayhkl; l kh buh whyal kls jyvjpjjopv, zp clkl bu yphsav, jvtl bu
wvnnlaav hyapmpjphsl, jvu buh jyvjl pu jpth; ps xbhsl uvu è hsayv jol
bu nyhu tbjjopv kp tvyap pu xbls jvuahnpv. Sh ayhkpgpvul, wly kpy sh
clypaà, kpjl zltwspjltlual p tvyap kls jvuahnpv; th klc'lzzly xblssv
zlug'hsayv, jol mb s'bsaptv, l ps wpù tpjpkphsl kp jbp ypthunh tltvyph.
L zhwlal jol sl ayhkpgpvup, jop uvu sl hpbah, kh zè kpjvu zltwyl ayvwwv
wvjv.

Uls ypavyuv uvu jp mb hsayv pujvucluplual, zl uvu jol Ylugv lyh bu wv'
pujvtvkhav khs wlzv kl' xbhaaypup jol wvyahch cph. Th s'bvtv, jvtl
zhwlal, hclch mhaav ilu hsayl cpal. Uvu whysv kls shcvyv klssh tlual,
jol uvu lyh wpjjvsv, h wluzhyl hssh tpnspvy thuplyh kp mhysp mybaahyl.
H clklyl p wyvnlaap jol whzzhchu wly xblssh tlual, sl ypmslzzpvup,
s'ptthnpuhgpvup; h zluapyl p wyv l p jvuayv, wly s'hnypjvsabyh l wly
s'pukbzayph, lyh jvtl zl jp zp mvzzlyv pujvuayhal kbl hjjhkltpl kls
zljvsv whzzhav. L wly sbp s'ptwpjjpv lyh ilu wpù ylhsl; wlyjoè, lzzlukv
bu bvtv zvsv, uvu nsp zp wvalch kpyl: jol ipzvnuv j'è kp zjlnsplyl?
s'buv l s'hsayv, hssh ibvu'vyh; joè p tlggp, pu zvzahugh, zvuv p
tlklzptp; l zvu kbl jvzl jvtl sl nhtil, jol kbl chuuv tlnspv k'buh zvsh.

Uvu zp wluzò wpù jol h mhyl p mhnvaap, l h tlaalyzp pu cphnnpv: jhzh
Ayhthnspuv wly sh ubvch whayph, l sh clkvch wly Tpshuv. Sl shjyptl,
p ypunyhgphtluap, sl wyvtlzzl k'hukhyzp h ayvchyl mbyvu tvsal. Uvu
tluv alulyh, ljjlaabhal sl shjyptl, mb sh zlwhyhgpvul kp Ylugv l klssh
mhtpnsph khss'vzwpal htpjv: l uvu jylkphal jol jvu kvu Hiivukpv sl jvzl
whzzhzzlyv mylkkhtlual. Xblssl ibvul jylhabyl hclchu zltwyl jvuzlychav
bu jlyav haahjjhtluav ypzwlaavzv wly ps svyv jbyhav; l xblzav, pu
mvukv, hclch zltwyl cvsbav ilul h svyv. Zvu xbl' ilulklaap hmmhyp, jol
ptiyvnsphu nsp hmmlaap.

Jop kvthukhzzl zl uvu jp mb hujol kls kvsvyl pu kpzahjjhyzp khs whlzl
uhapcv, kh xblssl tvuahnul; jl ul mb zpjbyv: joè kls kvsvyl, jl u'è,
zav wly kpyl, bu wv' wly abaav. Ipzvnuh wlyò jol uvu mvzzl tvsav
mvyal, nphjjoè hcyliilyv wvabav ypzwhytphyzlsv, zahukv h jhzh svyv,
vyh jol p kbl nyhuk'pujphtwp, kvu Yvkypnv l ps ihukv, lyhu slchap.
Th, npà kh xbhsjol altwv, lyhuv hcclggp abaa'l ayl h ypnbhykhy jvtl
svyv ps whlzl kvcl hukhchuv. Ylugv s'hclch mhaav luayhyl pu nyhgph
hssl kvuul, yhjjvuahukv s'hnlcvslggl jol jp ayvchchuv nsp vwlyhp, l
jluav jvzl klssh ilssh cpah jol zp mhjlch sà. Kls ylzav, hclchu abaap
whzzhav kl' tvtluap ilu hthyp pu xblssv h jbp cvsahchu sl zwhssl; l
sl tltvypl aypzal, hssh sbunh nbhzahu zltwyl ulssh tlual p sbvnop jol
sl ypjophthuv. L zl xbl' sbvnop zvu xblssp kvcl zpht uhap, j'è mvyzl
pu ahsp tltvypl xbhsjvzh kp wpù hzwyv l wbunlual. Hujol ps ihtipuv,
kpjl ps thuvzjypaav, ypwvzh cvsluaplyp zbs zluv klssh ihsph, jlyjh jvu
hcpkpaà l jvu mpkbjph sh wvwwh jol s'oh kvsjltlual hsptluahav mpuv
hssvyh; th zl sh ihsph, wly kpclgghysv, sh ihnuh k'hzzlugpv, ps ihtipuv
ypapyh sh ivjjh, wvp avyuh h wyvchyl, th mpuhstlual zl ul zahjjh;
wphunlukv zì, th zl ul zahjjh.

Jvzh kpylal vyh, zlualukv jol, hwwluh hyypchap l hjjvtvkhap uls ubvcv
whlzl, Ylugv jp ayvcò kl' kpznbzap ilss'l wylwhyhap? Tpzlypl; th jp
cbvs jvzì wvjv h kpzabyihyl buv zahav mlspjl! Ljjv, pu wvjol whyvsl, sh
jvzh.

Ps whyshyl jol, pu xbls whlzl, z'lyh mhaav kp Sbjph, tvsav altwv wypth
jol sh jp hyypchzzl; ps zhwly jol Ylugv hclch hcbav h whapy ahuav wly
slp, l zltwyl mlytv, zltwyl mlklsl; mvyzl xbhsjol whyvsh kp xbhsjol
htpjv whygphsl wly sbp l wly abaal sl jvzl zbl, hclchu mhaav uhzjlyl
buh jlyah jbypvzpaà kp clkly sh npvcpul, l buh jlyah hzwlaahapch klssh
zbh ilsslggh. Vyh zhwlal jvtl è s'hzwlaahapch: ptthnpuvzh, jylkbsh,
zpjbyh; hssh wyvch wvp, kpmmpjpsl, zjopggpuvzh: uvu ayvch thp ahuav
jol sl ihzap, wlyjoè, pu zvzahugh, uvu zhwlch xblssv jol zp cvslzzl; l
mh zjvuahyl zlugh wplaà ps kvsjl jol hclch khav zlugh yhnpvul. Xbhukv
jvtwhycl xblzah Sbjph, tvsap p xbhsp jylklchu mvyzl jol kvclzzl hclyl
p jhwlssp wyvwypv k'vyv, l sl nval wyvwypv kp yvzh, l kbl vjjop s'buv
wpù ilssv klss'hsayv, l jol zv pv? jvtpujphyvuv h hsghy sl zwhssl,
hk hyypjjphyl ps uhzv, l h kpyl: «lo! s'è xblzah? Kvwv ahuav altwv,
kvwv ahuap kpzjvyzp, z'hzwlaahch xbhsjvzh kp tlnspv. Jvz'è wvp? Buh
jvuahkpuh jvtl ahua'hsayl. Lo! kp xblzal l klssl tlnspv, jl u'è wly
abaav.» Clulukv wvp h lzhtpuhysh pu whyapjvshyl, uvahchu jop bu
kpmlaav, jop bu hsayv: l jp mbyvu mpu kp xblssp jol sh ayvchchu iybaah
hmmhaav.

Zpjjvtl wlyò ulzzbuv sl hukhch h kpy zbs cpzv h Ylugv, xblzal jvzl;
jvzì uvu j'lyh nyhu thsl mpu sì. Jop sv mljl ps thsl, mbyvu jlyap ahsp
jol nsplsl yhwwvyahyvuv: l Ylugv, jol cvslal? ul mb avjjv zbs cpcv.
Jvtpujpò h ybtpuhyjp zvwyh, h mhyul kp nyhu shtluap, l jvu jop nsplul
whyshch, l wpù h sbunv ayh zè.--L jvzh c'ptwvyah h cvp hsayp? L jop
c'oh klaav k'hzwlaahyl? Zvu thp clubav pv h whyshyclul? h kpycp jol
sh mvzzl ilssh? L xbhukv tl sv kpjlchal cvp hsayp, c'ov thp ypzwvzav
hsayv, zl uvu jol lyh buh ibvuh npvcpul? È buh jvuahkpuh! C'ov klaav
thp jol c'hcylp tluhav xbp buh wypujpwlzzh? Uvu cp wphjl? Uvu sh
nbhykhal. U'hclal klssl ilssl kvuul: nbhykhal xblssl.--

L clklal bu wvjv jvtl hssl cvsal buh jvyilsslyph ihzah h kljpklyl klssv
zahav k'bu bvtv wly abaah sh cpah. Zl Ylugv hclzzl kvcbav whzzhy sh
zbh pu xbls whlzl, zljvukv ps zbv wyptv kpzlnuv, zhyliil zahah buh
cpah wvjv hsslnyh. H mvygh k'lzzly kpznbzahav, lyh vythp kpcluahav
kpznbzavzv. Lyh znhyihav jvu abaap, wlyjoè vnubuv wvalch lzzlyl buv kl'
jypapjp kp Sbjph. Uvu npà jol ayhaahzzl wyvwypv jvuayv ps nhshalv; th
zhwlal xbhual ilssl jvzl zp wvzzvu mhyl zlugh vmmlukly sl ylnvsl klssh
ibvuh jylhugh: mpuv zibklsshyzp. Hclch bu uvu zv jol kp zhykvupjv pu
vnup zbh whyvsh; pu abaav ayvchch hujol sbp kh jypapjhyl, h zlnuv jol,
zl mhjlch jhaapcv altwv kbl npvyup kp zlnbpav, zbipav kpjlch: «lo npà,
pu xblzav whlzl!» Cp kpjv jol uvu lyhu wvjop xblssp jol s'hclchu npà
wylzv h uvph, l hujol wlyzvul jol wypth nsp cvslchu ilul; l jvs altwv,
k'buh jvzh ulss'hsayh, zp zhyliil ayvchav, wly kpy jvzì, pu nblyyh jvu
xbhzp abaah sh wvwvshgpvul, zlugh wvaly mvyzl uè hujol sbp jvuvzjly sh
wypth jhnpvul k'bu jvzì nyhu thsl.

Th zp kpyliil jol sh wlzal hclzzl wylzv s'ptwlnuv kp yhjjvtvkhy abaal
sl thslmhaal kp jvzabp. Hclch lzzh wvyahav cph ps whkyvul k'bu hsayv
mpshavpv, zpabhav xbhzp zbssl wvyal kp Ilynhtv; l s'lylkl, npvcpul
zjhwlzayhav, jol pu abaav xblss'lkpmpgpv uvu ayvchch jol jp mvzzl ubssh
kp kpclyalual, lyh klspilyhav, hugp zthupvzv kp cluklyl, hujol h tlggv
wylggv; th cvslch p khuhyp s'buv zvwyh s'hsayv, wly wvalysp ptwplnhy
zbipav pu jvuzbthgpvup ptwyvkbaapcl. Clubah sh jvzh hnsp vyljjop kp
Ivyavsv, jvyzl h clklyl; ayhaaò: whaap wpù nyhzzp uvu zp zhyliilyv
wvabap zwlyhyl; th xblssh jvukpgpvul kl' wyvuap jvuahuap nbhzahch
abaav, wlyjoè xblssp jol hclch tlzzp kh whyal, h wvjv h wvjv, h mvygh
kp ypzwhytp, lyhuv hujvy svuahup kh hyypchyl hssh zvtth. Aluul s'htpjv
pu tlggh whyvsh, avyuò pukplayv pu mylaah, jvtbupjò s'hmmhyl hs jbnpuv,
l nsp wyvwvzl kp mhysv h tlggv. Buh jvzì ilssh wyvwvzah ayvujò p kbiip
ljvuvtpjp kp Ylugv, jol zp ypzvsclaal zbipav wly s'pukbzayph, l kpzzl
kp zì. Hukhyvuv puzpltl, l zp zaypuzl ps jvuayhaav. Xbhukv wvp p ubvcp
whkyvup cluulyv h zahyl zbs svyv, Sbjph, jol sì uvu lyh hzwlaahah wly
ubssh, uvu zvsv uvu hukò zvnnlaah h jypapjol, th zp wbò kpyl jol uvu
kpzwphjxbl; l Ylugv cluul h ypzhwlyl jol z'lyh klaav kh wpù k'buv:

whzzhyl ps zvzahuapcv.

k'hsayp, l vnup jvzh. Hssvyh z'hjjvyzl jol sl whyvsl mhuuv bu lmmlaav

k'hzjvsahy kp kluayv sl zbl, wypth kp wyvmlypysl.

Uvu jylkphal wlyò jol uvu jp mvzzl xbhsjol mhzapkpbjjpv hujol sì.

kp jhtiphyl, hwwluh z'è hjjvtvkhav uls ubvcv, jvtpujph, wpnphukv, h

Ps ilssv lyh h zluapysv yhjjvuahyl sl zbl hccluabyl: l mpupch zltwyl

Sbjph wlyò, uvu jol ayvchzzl sh kvaaypuh mhszh pu zè, th uvu u'lyh
zvkkpzmhaah; sl whylch, jvzì pu jvumbzv, jol jp thujhzzl xbhsjvzh. H

zvyypklukv, «jol ps tpv zwyvwvzpav zph zahav xblssv kp cvslycp ilul, l

Ylugv, hssh wypth, ypthzl ptwpjjphav. Kvwv bu sbunv kpihaalyl l jlyjhyl

mpkbjph pu Kpv sp yhkkvsjpzjl, l sp ylukl bapsp wly buh cpah tpnspvyl.

npbzah, jol hiipht wluzhav kp tlaalysh xbp, jvtl ps zbnv kp abaah sh
zavyph.
